announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Welspun Corp Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Corp Limited (WCL) has provided an update on its previously announced acquisition of approximately 2.57% equity stake in Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited (WMHL) from Welspun Pipes Inc., USA, a wholly-owned subsidiary of WCL. This acquisition, initially anticipated to conclude by 31 March 2026, is now delayed due to outstanding procedural and transactional formalities. The completion of this transaction is now expected by 30 September 2026. Upon successful completion, WMHL will become a direct wholly-owned subsidiary of WCL, aiming to streamline the company's overseas holding structure. This transaction, being between WCL and its wholly-owned subsidiary, will not impact the consolidated financial statements.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Alkyl Amines Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities
announcements.ai_summary: Alkyl Amines Chemicals Limited's Nomination and Remuneration Committee, in a meeting held on March 31, 2026, approved the grant of 28,300 stock options to eligible employees under the "AACL Employees Stock Option Plan 2018". Of these, 21,900 stock options are granted at an exercise price of Rs. 1,125 per option, and 6,400 stock options are granted at an exercise price of Rs. 875 per option. The stock options are convertible into equity shares of face value Rs. 2/- each. These options will vest over a period of 1 to 4 years and can be exercised within 5 years from the date of vesting. The scheme is in compliance with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: Dev Information Technology Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dev Information Technology Limited has approved the sale and transfer of its products, ByteSIGNER and Talligence, along with their associated business as a going concern on a slump exchange basis. This decision was made by the Board of Directors on March 31, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The sale is to M/s. Byte Technosys Private Limited, an associate company of DEVIT, and will be effective from March 31, 2026. The cash consideration for this transaction is Rs. 11.90 Crores. The valuation for the slump sale was determined by an independent registered valuer. The Board's approval aligns with Section 188 of the Companies Act, 2013, and Regulation 23 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Fusion Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities
announcements.ai_summary: Fusion Finance Limited's Nomination and Remuneration Committee, on March 31, 2026, approved the grant of 25,000 stock options to eligible employees under the Fusion Employee Stock Option Plan 2023. These options are granted at an exercise price of Rs. 138.24 per stock option, which was the closing price on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on March 30, 2026. The options will vest not before one year from the grant date and can be exercised within eight years from the vesting date. The company confirmed that the scheme complies with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Oberoi Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about execution of Development Agreement in respect of land situated at Malabar Hill, Mumbai
announcements.ai_summary: Oberoi Realty Limited has entered into a Development Agreement for the redevelopment of land measuring approximately 1,740 square meters located at Malabar Hill, Mumbai. This land is proposed to be developed under a cluster development scheme along with adjoining societies. The company's estimated entitlement of the free sale component from this land is up to approximately 51,000 square feet (RERA Carpet area), subject to applicable regulations. This agreement was executed on March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Mukka Proteins Limited has informed the Exchange about completion of acquisition of Haris Marine Products Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Mukka Proteins Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of Haris Marine Products Private Limited, a move aimed at expanding its core business. The company acquired 2,000 equity shares of Haris Marine Products Private Limited, each with a face value of Rs.100/-, for a total consideration of Rs. 19,64,000. This acquisition, effective from March 30, 2026, makes Haris Marine Products Private Limited a wholly-owned subsidiary of Mukka Proteins Limited. The target entity is a manufacturer and exporter of fish meal and fish oil. The transaction was conducted on an arm's length basis, despite Haris Marine Products Private Limited being a related party. Mukka Proteins Limited has provided detailed disclosures as required by SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Krishana Phoschem Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production at Meghnagar, Distt.-Jhabua, Madhya Pradesh
announcements.ai_summary: Krishana Phoschem Limited has commenced commercial production of its Diammonium Phosphate & Nitrogen and Phosphorus (DAP/NPK Complex) fertilizer plant located in Meghnagar, District Jhabua, Madhya Pradesh, effective March 31, 2026. This expansion increases the installed production capacity of DAP/NPK to 4,95,000 Metric Tonnes Per Annum. The company has informed the exchange about this commencement of operations as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: D. P. Abhushan Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 31, 2026, titled "D. P. Abhushan Limited hereby submit Press Release titled "D. P. Abhushan Limited Inaugurates a New Showroom in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh, Further Strengthening its Central India Footprint."".
announcements.ai_summary: D. P. Abhushan Limited has inaugurated a new showroom in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh, on March 30, 2026, as part of its strategy to strengthen its presence in Central India. The new showroom, located in Happy Villa Colony, spans approximately 3,000 sq. ft. of retail area and is designed to cater to the region's preference for classic and bridal jewellery, offering a curated collection of gold, silver, diamond, Kundan, and Polki items. This expansion is a regular operational initiative aimed at making premium jewellery collections more accessible in Tier-II cities across India. The company's press release highlights the historical significance of Dhar as a jewellery market rooted in trust and family legacy.

announcements.subject: Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.detail: Senco Gold Limited has informed the Exchange about Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.ai_summary: Senco Gold Limited has extended its strategic and marketing tie-up with August Jewellery Private Limited (AJPL), which operates the omnichannel brand "Melorra." This arrangement, initially valid until March 31, 2026, has now been extended until June 30, 2026, on the same terms and conditions as previously agreed. The company had previously informed the exchange about this tie-up on April 24, 2025, September 27, 2025, and December 29, 2025. The extension covers operational transactions and does not involve any acquisition. The details of the agreement, including its domestic scope and business operations, remain the same as initially disclosed.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the Exchange about Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.ai_summary: PDS Limited has informed the Exchange that NexStyle Apparel Manufacturing Limited has ceased to be a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company effective March 31, 2026. This change is a consequence of the allotment of Employee Stock Options. The company has provided this update in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aditya Vision Limited has informed the Exchange about- opening of showroom
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Vision Limited has announced the opening of five new showrooms on March 31, 2026, as part of its business expansion. The new showrooms are located in Unnao (203rd showroom), Agra (204th showroom), Aligarh (205th showroom), Hardoi (206th showroom), and Agra (207th showroom), all in Uttar Pradesh. This expansion is in line with the company's strategy to increase its retail presence.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: TVS Srichakra Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 31, 2026, titled "Launching of Exclusive Retail Outlet in Ludhiana which will be Company s 14th signature store in India".
announcements.ai_summary: TVS Srichakra Limited has announced the launch of its new exclusive retail outlet in Ludhiana on March 31, 2026. This marks the company's 14th signature store in India, aimed at strengthening its retail presence and providing customers with a complete tyre and 2-wheeler care experience. The new outlet will offer Eurogrip's entire range of tyres, along with services such as professional tyre fitment, tyre care, puncture repair, and air pressure checks. This expansion is part of TVS Srichakra Limited's strategy to enhance its branded retail footprint across key Indian markets and provide a consistent and trusted service environment.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: DOMS Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about update on Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: On March 31, 2026, DOMS Industries Limited announced the completion of the acquisition of an additional 6.5% stake in Pioneer Stationery Private Limited, a subsidiary. The company purchased 3,900 Equity Shares from existing shareholders for a total consideration of ₹5,53,80,000. This acquisition increases DOMS Industries Limited's shareholding in Pioneer to 64.0% from the previous 57.5% of its total paid-up Equity Share capital. This transaction follows the Board of Directors' approval for acquiring an additional 13.0% stake and is a continuation of their letter dated December 29, 2025. The update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: NMDC Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: NMDC Steel Limited has announced an extension for the additional charge of the Director (Commercial) post held by Shri Vinay Kumar, who is also the Director (Technical). This extension is for a further period of 01 year, effective from April 07, 2026, or until a regular incumbent assumes the charge, whichever occurs earlier. This decision is in accordance with orders from the Ministry of Steel, Government of India. The company has informed the exchanges about this update, referencing previous communication dated January 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on the Completion of Transaction
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed about the completion of transactions that have resulted in Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL) becoming a 50:50 joint venture. On March 30, 2026, the company completed the transfer and sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) for a total consideration of approximately ₹56.70 crores, at a price of ~₹158.84/- per equity share. Subsequently, GCL allotted 7,78,60,538 equity shares to RMZ for approximately ₹1,236.77 Crores. As a result of these transactions, both Signatureglobal (India) Limited and RMZ now hold 50% shareholding in GCL, and GCL has ceased to be a subsidiary of the Company.

announcements.subject: Defaults on Payment of Interest/Principal
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding default.
announcements.ai_summary: RKEC Projects Limited has disclosed defaults on the payment of interest and principal on loans from banks and financial institutions as of March 30, 2026. The company has defaulted on principal repayment along with interest for loans from Bank of Baroda, HDFC, Unity Small Finance Bank Ltd, HDB Financial Services Ltd, Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd, Mahindra Finance, Hinduja Leyland Finance, Aditya Birla, Vivriti Capital Ltd, ICICI Bank, & CSB. The current default amount is ₹26.71 crore for the principal and ₹1.49 crore for interest. The total amount of outstanding borrowings from banks/financial institutions is ₹194.29 crore, which also represents the total financial indebtedness of the listed entity. The company is hopeful of securing additional funds to discharge these liabilities.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: CORONA Remedies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 30, 2026, titled  CORONA Remedies announces strategic acquisition of Wokadine® in India .
announcements.ai_summary: CORONA Remedies Limited has announced the strategic acquisition of the brand Wokadine® in India from Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd., effective March 30, 2026. This marks CORONA Remedies' fifth acquisition and is intended to reinforce its commitment to 'Healing'. Wokadine®, ranked #2 in the Povidone Iodine India market, is expected to enable CORONA Remedies to penetrate deeper into targeted specialties and offer wider accessibility. The acquisition represents CORONA Remedies' entry into the INR 648 Cr Povidone Iodine market. The transaction will be fully funded through the company’s internal accruals and cash. This strategic move is expected to leverage CORONA Remedies' extensive reach, strong trust among doctors, pan-India distribution network, and dedicated sales and marketing team.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Saatvik Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, a material subsidiary of Saatvik Green Energy Limited, has received and accepted an order worth INR 57.03 Crores for the supply of Solar PV Modules. The order has been placed by a renowned Independent Power producer/EPC Player and is a domestic commercial contract. The execution of this order is expected to be completed by March 2026. This new order signifies a significant commercial engagement for the subsidiary.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: MIC Electronics Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue as per the attached BM outcome
announcements.ai_summary: MIC Electronics Limited's Board of Directors has approved the acquisition of 71,72,090 equity shares, representing 89.65% of M/s. Neo Semi SG Pte. Ltd., Singapore, for a total consideration of ₹357.60 Cr. This acquisition will be partly settled in cash (₹122,25,82,158 for 24,52,030 shares) and partly through a non-cash component via share swap (₹235,34,22,037 for 47,20,060 shares). The company has also approved a preferential issuance of up to 5,68,73,418 equity shares at ₹41.38 per share (including a premium of ₹39.38 per share) aggregating ₹235,34,22,037 for consideration other than cash, to the selling shareholders of Neo. Both the acquisition and the preferential issuance are subject to shareholders' approval by special resolution at the EGM scheduled for April 29, 2026, and requisite regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Kamat Hotels (I) Limited has informed the Exchange about Closure of IRA by Orchid Hotels, Mumbai.
announcements.ai_summary: Kamat Hotels (India) Limited has announced the closure of its hotel, IRA by Orchid Hotels, Mumbai, effective April 01, 2026. This closure is a consequence of the expiry of the Leave and License Agreement for the property, which was originally entered into on October 26, 2023. The agreement for the hotel located at Dhanodham, Kondivita Road, Off. Andheri-Kurla Road, Andheri (East), Mumbai – 400059, expires on March 31, 2026. The company has stated that the discontinuance of operations for this hotel property will not adversely impact its overall profitability in the coming financial years. The revenue contribution from this unit during the last financial year ending March 31, 2025, was ₹4807.59 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: MIC Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements for Acquisition, Hiving off of two divisions as per the enclosed BM outcome
announcements.ai_summary: Oil India Limited (OIL) and CSIR-Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (IMMT) have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) on March 30, 2026, to collaborate on joint Research and Development (R&D) projects in the field of critical minerals. CSIR-IMMT has been designated as the Centre of Excellence for Critical Minerals under the National Critical Mineral Mission (NCMM). The MoU was executed by the Director (Exploration & Development) of OIL and the Director of CSIR-IMMT, in the presence of the CMD of OIL and other senior officials from both organizations. This collaboration aims to advance R&D activities in critical minerals as per the NCMM framework.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Capital Limited (ABCL) has made an investment of Rs. 53 Crores in the equity shares of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Aditya Birla Capital Digital Limited (ABCDL), on a rights basis. This investment does not alter ABCL's percentage shareholding in ABCDL, which continues to be a wholly-owned subsidiary. The transaction is considered at "arm's length" and is within the financial services industry. This investment is part of ABCL's strategy to support the growth and operations of its digital arm.

announcements.subject: Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.detail: Krishana Phoschem Limited has informed the Exchange about Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Krishana Phoschem Limited has signed a Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). This domestic agreement, valid for a period of 10 years, will facilitate the supply of 70,000 MT per annum of Green Ammonia to Krishana Phoschem Limited through SECI, at a price parity with grey ammonia. No upfront payment is required under this agreement. The company anticipates this arrangement will secure sustainable raw material and support the transition to low-carbon nitrogenous fertilizers, thereby reducing reliance on imported ammonia. The supply is expected to begin three years after the agreement's execution.

announcements.subject: Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.detail: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited has informed the Exchange about Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited has entered into a Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). This domestic agreement, effective for a period of 10 years, will involve the supply of 1,30,000 MT per annum of Green Ammonia to Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited through SECI, with pricing at parity to grey ammonia. There is no upfront payment involved in this agreement. The company expects this arrangement to ensure sustainable raw material security and facilitate a transition to low-carbon nitrogenous fertilizers, reducing dependence on imported ammonia. Supply is expected to commence three years following the execution of the agreement.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Commercial Syn Bags Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Commercial Syn Bags Limited, in its Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 3,87,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 62/- per share. These shares are being allotted to Pravi Investments LLP, a warrant holder categorized under the promoter group, upon exercise of their option to convert warrants issued on March 20, 2025. The company has received the balance amount of Rs. 2,08,98,000 for these warrants. This allotment is on a preferential basis and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Indo Farm Equipment Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indo Farm Equipment Limited has announced an increase in promoter/promoter group shareholding. Mr. Shubham Khadwalia and Ms. Diksha Khadwalia, who are part of the Promoter Group, acquired a total of 1,35,203 equity shares through open market purchases on March 27, 2026, and March 30, 2026, respectively. Following these acquisitions, the aggregate shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group has increased from 70.35% to 70.62% of the company's current issued capital on a fully diluted basis. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: La Opala RG Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Genesis Exports Private Limited, a promoter of La Opala RG Limited, has acquired 25,000 equity shares of the company on March 30, 2026. This acquisition was made on behalf of other promoters and persons acting in concert (PACs). The disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The specific details regarding the percentage of total voting capital before and after this acquisition are not provided in this announcement. No further actions or approvals are mentioned as pending for this transaction.

announcements.subject: Press Release (Revised)
announcements.detail: Indiqube Spaces Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a revised press release dated March 30, 2026, titled "IndiQube Signs Rs. 75 Crore Workspace Deal with Leading Healthcare TechGCC in Bangalore".
announcements.ai_summary: IndiQube Spaces Limited has announced a significant workspace leasing agreement valued at approximately ₹75 crore over a five-year tenure with a leading Global Capability Centre (GCC) in the healthcare technology sector. The deal involves the leasing of over 48,000 sq.ft. of premium Grade A workspace located along Bengaluru's Outer Ring Road. This agreement highlights the increasing demand from GCCs for high-quality, scalable workspaces in strategic business districts and reinforces IndiQube's position as a preferred partner for such entities. The press release, dated March 30th, 2026, also notes that GCCs currently constitute nearly 40% of IndiQube's portfolio.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sagar Cements Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the company at its meeting held on today i.e., 30th March, 2026 has accorded in-principle approval for the proposed merger of one of our subsidiary companies viz., Andhra Cements Limited with the company, which will be subject to necessary approvals as may be required from the regulatories and other authorities concerned.
announcements.ai_summary: Sagar Cements Limited announced on March 30th, 2026, that its Board of Directors has granted in-principle approval for the proposed merger of its subsidiary, Andhra Cements Limited, with the parent company. This significant step towards consolidation is subject to obtaining all necessary approvals from regulatory bodies and other relevant authorities. The Board meeting where this decision was made commenced at an unspecified time and concluded at an unspecified time on the same day. Further updates on the merger process will be provided as approvals are secured.

announcements.subject: Other Restructuring
announcements.detail: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange about Other Restructuring
announcements.ai_summary: BASF India Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 30th, 2026, approved the closure of the Metal Complex Dyes (MCD) production line at its manufacturing site in Mangalore. This business line, part of the Dispersions business under the Industrial Solutions Segment, contributed approximately Rs. 15 crore in revenue during the financial year 2024-25, representing 0.1% of the company's total revenues. The company cited the commoditized nature of the MCD business, its low strategic relevance, and limited pricing power, which have negatively impacted its margins and profitability, as reasons for the closure. The closure is expected to be completed during the last quarter of 2026.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: BASF India Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: BASF India Limited's Board of Directors, on March 30th, 2026, approved the sale of its entire 100% stake in its wholly owned subsidiary, BASF India Coatings Private Limited, to Bond German BidCo 2 GmbH and Bond France BidCo SAS, which are Carlyle Group companies. The transaction is valued at INR 230.16 crore, subject to adjustments at closing. The closing of this divestment is anticipated during the second quarter of 2026, after which BASF India Coatings Private Limited will no longer be a subsidiary of BASF India Limited. As of March 31st, 2025, BASF India Coatings Private Limited was not considered a material subsidiary. This decision follows a global agreement between BASF and funds managed by Carlyle regarding BASF's automotive coatings businesses.

announcements.company: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited (IREDA) has secured an External Commercial Borrowing (ECB) facility of JPY 28 billion from Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation (SMBC) Singapore Branch. The agreement, signed on March 30, 2026, includes a Green Shoe Option of JPY 12 billion. SMBC is acting as the Mandated Lead Arranger and Bookrunner for this facility. This move is part of IREDA's strategy to raise funds for its operations. The company has provided detailed disclosures as required by SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Arihant Capital Markets Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arihant Capital Markets Limited has received a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) concerning the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Arihant Financial Services Limited (AFSL) with Arihant Capital Markets Limited (ACML). This NOC is a significant step in the process, although the Scheme of Arrangement remains subject to other applicable regulatory and necessary approvals. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this development.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: NAVA LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NAVA LIMITED has informed about a temporary shutdown of two Furnaces at its Ferro Alloys Plant (FAP) in Odisha, commencing April 1, 2026, for scheduled inspection and maintenance. These furnaces have been operational for over 25 years and require mid-life structural inspection. The shutdown is expected to last approximately three months, with operations resuming thereafter. During this period, the Company's 30 MW Captive Power Plant (CPP) will continue to operate and export power to the grid. NAVA LIMITED anticipates improved realizations from power sales due to expected peak summer demand and favorable market prices, and does not foresee any material adverse impact on its financial performance.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sundae Capital Advisors Private Limited has submitted to the Exchange a copy of Interim order of The Hon ble SAT in the matter of Open Offer given by Marwadi Chandarana Intermediaries Brokers Private Limited ( Acquirer ) to the shareholders of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sundae Capital Advisors Private Limited has provided an update regarding an interim order from The Hon'ble SAT concerning an open offer made by Marwadi Chandarana Intermediaries Brokers Private Limited to the shareholders of Trucap Finance Limited. The hearing on March 25, 2026, resulted in the Hon'ble Tribunal granting the appellant two weeks to file a rejoinder, and the interim order will remain in effect until the next hearing. The next court date is scheduled for April 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding approval for investments in (i) HCG NCHRI Oncology LLP, wholly owned subsidiary for up to Rs. 98 Crore and (ii) Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Pvt Ltd (Vizag Hospital), a subsidiary of the Company for up to Rs. 155.66 crore for the acquisition of additional stake of 34% in the equity share capital of Vizag Hospital, directly from the selling shareholders..
announcements.ai_summary: Healthcare Global Enterprises Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved significant investments in its subsidiaries. The company will invest up to INR 98 Crore in HCG NCHRI Oncology LLP, a wholly-owned subsidiary. Furthermore, an investment of up to INR 155.66 Crore has been approved for Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Pvt Ltd (Vizag Hospital), a subsidiary. This latter investment is for the acquisition of an additional 34% stake in Vizag Hospital's equity share capital directly from its selling shareholders, as per a Share Purchase Agreement dated June 28, 2024, and its subsequent amendments. The board meeting commenced at 01:45 p.m. and concluded at 03:40 p.m. IST.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Piramal Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about update on sale of stake in Shriram Life Insurance Company Limited - Receipt of consideration of Rs. 600 crore on 30th March, 2026 and completion of transaction
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Finance Limited has successfully completed the sale of its entire equity stake in Shriram Life Insurance Company Limited to Sanlam Emerging Markets (Mauritius) Limited. The transaction, initially announced on December 19, 2025, involved a consideration of Rs. 600 crore. On March 30, 2026, Piramal Finance Limited received the full consideration of Rs. 600 crore. This receipt of funds marks the completion of the divestment. The company has informed the stock exchanges about the receipt of funds and the finalization of the transaction.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: S.A.L. Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: S.A.L. Steel Limited has executed a Deed of Hypothecation dated March 28, 2026, with Yes Bank Limited for a Working Capital Demand Loan (Sublimit Cash Credit Limit) of Rs. 150,00,00,000 (Rupees One Hundred Fifty Crores Only). The funds will be utilized for working capital requirements as per the bank's sanction letter dated March 25, 2026. The borrowing is secured by the hypothecation of all current assets of the company, including movable fixed assets located at Survey No. 245, Village Bharapar, Gandhidham, Kutch, Gujarat. The facility is further secured by an unconditional and irrevocable Personal Guarantee from Mahesh Kumar Agarwal and Kaustubh Agarwal, and an unconditional and irrevocable Corporate Guarantee from Sree Metaliks Limited, both valid during the tenor of the facility.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Madras Fertilizers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Madras Fertilizers Limited held a Board Meeting on March 30, 2026, to consider various business matters. The Board approved the renewal of insurance policies for its buildings, plant, machineries, stock, and other assets. These policies cover fire, machinery breakdown, boiler & pressure vessels, loss of profit, and other miscellaneous perils for the financial year 2026-27. The Board meeting commenced at 12 Noon and concluded at 01:40 P.M.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Hubtown Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation of wholly owned Subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Hubtown Limited has announced the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary, named 25 Chalets Private Limited, on March 30, 2026. This new entity, incorporated in India, will be engaged in the development of real estate projects. Hubtown Limited will hold 100% of the shareholding in 25 Chalets Private Limited, which has an authorized share capital of Rs. 1,00,000/-. The incorporation is a cash consideration transaction and does not require specific governmental or regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Steel City Securities Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Steel City Securities Limited held a Board Meeting on March 30, 2026, where two key decisions were made. Firstly, the company approved the renewal and enhancement of its credit facilities from ICICI Bank, increasing the available amount from Rs. 10 Crores to Rs. 11 Crores. Secondly, the Board engaged in a detailed discussion regarding the company's E-Governance Business Plan. The meeting commenced at 11:45 AM and concluded at 12:30 PM.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gateway Distriparks Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers) Regulations, 2011'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Perfect Communications Private Limited, a promoter of Gateway Distriparks Limited, has acquired 933,070 equity shares of the company. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was reported on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Accuracy Shipping Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Accuracy Shipping Limited has acquired shares in two entities, A.R.S. Liners (India) Private Limited and A.R.S. Terminals (India) Private Limited, as approved by its Board of Directors on March 29, 2026. The company invested Rs. 6,51,00,000 in A.R.S. Liners by subscribing to 6,78,125 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at a premium of Rs. 86 per share. Additionally, Rs. 4,99,00,000 was invested in A.R.S. Terminals through the subscription of 49,90,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at par. Upon completion of these transactions, both A.R.S. Terminals and A.R.S. Liners will become subsidiaries of Accuracy Shipping Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: D. P. Abhushan Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: D. P. Abhushan Limited, operating under the brand "D. P. Jewellers," has opened a new retail showroom in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh, effective March 29, 2026. The showroom will feature a variety of jewellery, including Gold, Silver, Diamond studded items, Kundan, and Polki. This initiative is aligned with the company's objective to expand its retail footprint in Tier-II cities. D. P. Abhushan Limited has indicated that this expansion is not expected to have a significant financial impact in the current fiscal year, and no shareholder approval for capital expenditure was necessary.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of notification of award for a project.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has received a Notification of Award dated March 28, 2026, from NTPC Limited for the "EPC Package for BESS Implementation at NTPC Thermal Power Stations (Lot-1); Mouda Super Thermal Power Station (Mouda)". The contract is on an Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) basis for implementing Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) at the Mouda Super Thermal Power Station, including services, Ex-Works (India) Supply, and Comprehensive Annual Maintenance. The order has a broad consideration of Rs. 413.37 Crores (excluding GST) and is to be executed within 15 months from the Appointed Date.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: The India Cements Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Scheme of Amalgamation'.
announcements.ai_summary: The India Cements Limited has received a certified copy of the order from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, sanctioning the Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of four wholly owned subsidiaries – ICL Financial Services Limited (ICLFSL), ICL International Limited (ICLIL), ICL Securities Limited (ICLSL), and India Cements Infrastructures Limited (ICIL) – with the parent company. The Scheme has been made effective from March 28, 2026, following its filing with the Registrar of Companies, Chennai. The Appointed Date for the amalgamation is January 1, 2025, from which all assets and liabilities of the transferor companies are transferred to The India Cements Limited, and the four subsidiaries stand dissolved without winding up.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Oswal Pumps Limited has informed the Exchange about Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.ai_summary: Oswal Pumps Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the issuance of corporate guarantees to secure credit facilities for its wholly-owned material subsidiary, Oswal Solar Energy Private Limited. The company will provide a corporate guarantee of up to ₹ 86,16,00,000 (Rupees Eighty Six Crore and Sixteen Lakh Only) to State Bank of India. Additionally, a corporate guarantee of up to ₹ 50,00,00,000 (Rupees Fifty Crore Only) will be issued to Yes Bank Limited. These guarantees are intended to secure credit facilities that Oswal Solar Energy Private Limited will avail from these banks. The corporate guarantee to State Bank of India will remain in effect until the guaranteed obligations are fully repaid by the subsidiary.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Limited, in a meeting held on March 28, 2026, approved the allotment of 7,40,700 fully paid-up equity shares. These shares, with a face value of ₹ 10 each, were issued at a price of ₹ 63 each. This allotment is a result of the exercise of 7,40,700 convertible equity warrants previously allotted on a preferential basis. The company had initially allotted 45,84,872 warrants at ₹ 63 each, with 25% of the issue price received upfront. The current allotment represents the conversion of these warrants by Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel, a promoter, who paid the balance 75% of the issue price, amounting to ₹ 3,49,98,075. Following this allotment, Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel still holds 15,51,736 outstanding warrants for future conversion.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Lagnam Spintex Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Lagnam Spintex Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the outcomes of its Board Meeting held on March 28, 2026. Further details regarding the decisions made during this meeting are expected to be disclosed.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: The Federal Bank  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. '.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has confirmed the timely payment of interest on its Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures. The company made an interest payment of INR 0.0480 lacs on debentures with ISIN INE148I07NN5 and INR 5.30658 lacs on debentures with ISIN INE148I07ND6. These payments were due on March 28, 2026, and were actually made on March 27, 2026. The last interest payment for both series was on February 28, 2026. The company has provided this certification in accordance with Regulation 57 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Thermax Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Thermax Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Thermax Babcock & Wilcox Energy Solutions Limited (TBWES), has concluded a significant contract for the supply and supervision of installation and commissioning of a boiler package. This contract is for a 1 × 800 MW ultra-supercritical thermal power plant located in Anuppur district, Madhya Pradesh, India, awarded by M/s Anuppur Powerprojects Private Limited. The contract, signed on March 27, 2026, has an approximate value of Rs. 1600 Crore, excluding GST. The scope of work includes design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, supervision of installation and commissioning, and performance guarantee tests. Execution will be aligned with project milestones and delivery schedules.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange about further investment in Indian Horizon Marketing Services Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited has made a further investment in Indian Horizon Marketing Services Limited (IHMSL) by subscribing to 25,00,000 Class A Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each. This subscription was made as part of a preferential offer by IHMSL. The total investment made by Thomas Cook (India) Limited amounts to INR 2,50,00,000 (Two Crore fifty lakh Only), with each equity share subscribed at Rs. 10/-. This investment is a further contribution to IHMSL, which is a joint venture in India. The paid-up capital of IHMSL will increase post-allotment.

announcements.company: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: The Bombay Burmah Trading Corporation Limited has completed the sale of its Tea Plantations (Dunsandle Estate) located in Village Sholur, Taluka – Udhagamandalam, District – Nilgiris. The sale was executed via an Asset Purchase Agreement with buyers Mr. Rangasamy, Mrs. Rathinambal, Mr. Durai Arun, Mr. Saran, and Poomex Clothing Company. The total consideration for this divestment is Rs. 1,20,00,00,000/- (Rupees One hundred and twenty crores only), subject to applicable taxes. As of March 27, 2026, Rs. 110 Crores has been received, with the balance consideration to be received as per the agreement.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Marathon Nextgen Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition by Nexzone IT Infrastructure Private Limited, WOS (wholly owned subsidiary) of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has acquired 29,541 shares of its wholly owned subsidiary, Inventurus Knowledge Solutions, Inc. (IKS Inc.), as the first tranche of investment. This acquisition amounts to USD 19,000,476/-. This update is in continuation of the company's earlier disclosure dated March 13, 2026, where the Board had approved further investment in IKS Inc. The acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 30(7) of the SEBI LODR Regulations and was disclosed on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Nagarjuna Fertilizers and Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Ltd has approved the allotment of 7,40,700 Equity Shares upon the conversion of warrants. These shares have a face value of ₹ 10/- each and were allotted at an issue price of ₹ 63/- each. The allotment was made to Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel, a Promoter, who exercised 7,40,700 warrants. This conversion represents the balance 75% of the issue price payment for these warrants. The company had previously allotted 45,84,872 convertible equity warrants on a preferential basis. Following this allotment, Piyushbhai Natvarlal Patel still holds 15,51,736 warrants for future conversion. The Board of Directors approved this allotment at their meeting held on March 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: Suspension of Trading
announcements.detail: Members of the Exchange are hereby informed that the trading in equity shares of Sanghi Industries Limited shall be suspended w.e.f. April 06, 2026 (i.e., closing hours of trading on April 02, 2026) on account of the Scheme of Amalgamation.
announcements.ai_summary: Trading in the equity shares of Sanghi Industries Limited will be suspended effective April 06, 2026. This suspension is due to a Scheme of Amalgamation. The last day of trading will be the closing hours of April 02, 2026. Investors should be aware of this impending trading halt related to the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Completion of their Sale of Equity Stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited, a BOT (Toll) Road Project, to Vertis Infrastructure Trust ( VIT ) ".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNC Infratech Limited has issued a press release on March 27, 2026, announcing the completion of the sale of its equity stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited to Vertis Infrastructure Trust (VIT). This transaction marks the final tranche of a divestment initiative that began in January 2024, involving a portfolio of 12 road assets. The total aggregate length of these projects is approximately 3,800 lane-km across four states. The transaction was concluded at an Enterprise Value of Rs. 683.84 crore, which includes Rs 80.48 crore received towards Equity and Rs 134.94 crore received towards Unsecured Loans on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''.SALE OR DISPOSAL OF AN ASSET/UNDERTAKING OF THE COMPANY
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNC Infratech Limited, along with its Wholly Owned Subsidiary PNC Infra Holdings Limited, has transferred its entire stake in PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited (SPV) to Vertis Infrastructure Trust (VIT) on March 27, 2026. This marks the completion of the transfer of all twelve identified Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated January 15, 2024. For the financial year ended March 31, 2025, PNC Challakere (Karnataka) Highways Private Limited contributed Rs. 16402.72 Lakhs (1.30%) to the consolidated revenue and had a net worth of Rs. 7803.22 Lakhs (2.42%) of the consolidated net worth. This divestment is part of a strategic initiative announced in January 2024.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Money Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Money Limited has been informed by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) that a penalty of ₹2,13,864.89 (exclusive of GST) has been imposed on the Company. This penalty is related to Client Code Modifications and pursuant to MCSGFC directives. The Company received this communication on March 27, 2026. While the penalty amount is specified, the Company states that there is no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities apart from the penalty itself.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Mukand Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mukand Limited has executed two Conveyance Deeds for the sale of land parcels at Dighe. The first deed involves the sale of a 50% undivided share in land admeasuring approximately 9,871 sq. mtrs (2.44 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 43,98,02,405. The second deed is for the sale of a portion of land admeasuring approximately 57,386 sq. mtrs (14.18 acres) for a consideration of Rs. 511,36,66,460. The total consideration for both transactions is Rs. 555,34,68,865. After adjusting Rs. 110,00,00,000 paid earlier, the Company has received the balance consideration of Rs. 445,34,68,865. This follows an earlier intimation dated July 23, 2025.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Aksh Optifibre Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''.
announcements.ai_summary: Aksh Optifibre Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT), Jaipur, dated March 24, 2026, which was received by the company on March 26, 2026. The DRT has set aside the Demand Notice issued under Section 13(2) and the Possession Notice issued under Section 13(4) of the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest (SARFAESI) Act, 2002, by Union Bank of India. Consequently, the securitisation action initiated by the Bank has been quashed by the Hon’ble Tribunal.

announcements.subject: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: K.M.Sugar Mills Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.ai_summary: K.M. Sugar Mills Limited has filed a joint First Motion Application with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, for sanction of a Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme involves the demerger of the 'Distillery Division' of K. M. Sugar Mills Limited (Demerged Company) into KM Spirits and Allied Industries Limited (Resulting Company). The NCLT has ordered K. M. Sugar Mills Limited to issue individual notices and convene meetings of its Equity Shareholders and Unsecured Creditors through Video Conference or Other Audio-Visual Means.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''Exercise of 80 options".
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about the exercise of 80 stock options granted under the Sundaram Finance Employee Stock Option Scheme – 2008. The options were granted on May 25, 2022, and exercised on March 27, 2026, by one option holder. The company has taken necessary steps for the transfer of equity shares from the Sundaram Finance Employees Welfare Trust to the demat accounts of the respective option holder.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kross Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Mrs Anita Rai, Promoter and Whole Time Director of the Company has acquired 89,027 equity shares on 27.03.2026 through Open market'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mrs. Anita Rai, a Promoter and Whole Time Director of Kross Limited, has acquired 89,027 equity shares on March 27, 2026, through the open market. This acquisition represents 0.13% of the total issued and paid-up share capital of the company. This transaction is disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited announced that its subsidiary, GFCL EV, a Global Integrated Battery Materials Company, has raised approximately USD 80 million. This funding is in addition to the USD 50 million previously raised from the International Finance Corporation (IFC). These capital raising efforts are aimed at driving high-value manufacturing, creating jobs, strengthening its position in global supply chains, and advancing priorities in energy security and transport electrification. GFCL EV aims to reinforce India's role as a competitive player in the battery materials value chain with its integrated manufacturing capabilities for battery chemicals, including electrolyte salt LiPF6, electrolyte formulations, additives, cathode active materials (LFP), and binders (PVDF and PTFE).

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Press release - DCIL Marks 50 Years with Ambitious Expansion Roadmap, Modernisation Push, and ₹3,000 Crore Growth Target.- Reg.".
announcements.ai_summary: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has issued a press release dated March 27, 2026, outlining an ambitious expansion roadmap and modernization push. The company targets a growth of ₹3,000 Crore as part of its 50th-anniversary celebrations. This announcement signals a strategic focus on expanding its operations and upgrading its infrastructure to achieve significant growth in the coming period.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial operations of Induction Furnace unit situated at Bilaspur Chhattisgarh.
announcements.ai_summary: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has commenced commercial production from its Induction Furnace unit located in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, effective March 27, 2026. This unit has an installed capacity of 1,53,000 TPA and has received the Consent to Operate from the Chhattisgarh Environment Conservation Board. The company has stated that this milestone is a significant step in enhancing its production capacity and operational efficiency. The unit is equipped with advanced technology and is expected to positively contribute to the company's overall performance.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: RSWM Limited has announced two key personnel updates. Firstly, Shri Riju Jhunjhunwala (DIN: 00061060) has been re-appointed as the Managing Director of the Company for a period of three years, effective from May 1, 2026, to April 30, 2029. Shri Jhunjhunwala is not debarred from holding this office by any SEBI order or other authority. Secondly, there has been a revision in the remuneration payable to Shri Rajeev Gupta (DIN: 02049516), the Joint Managing Director of the Company. These decisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Craftsman Automation Limited has informed the Exchange about the extension of Long Stop date under the Asset Purchase Agreement entered into between Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited ("Sunbeam"), Wholly Owned Subsidiary, and Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited ( SPRL ) from 31st March, 2026 to 30th June, 2026 and will complete the Proposed Transaction in multiple tranches. Accordingly, Sunbeam and SPRL have entered into an Amendment  agreement to the APA dated 27th March, 2026 and the closing formalities for the second tranche of the Proposed Transaction are now expected to be completed on or before 30th June, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Craftsman Automation Limited has announced an amendment to the Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) between its wholly owned subsidiary, Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited (Sunbeam), and Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited (SPRL). The Long Stop date for the APA has been extended from March 31, 2026, to June 30, 2026. The parties have entered into an Amendment Agreement dated March 27, 2026, to facilitate the completion of the proposed transaction in multiple tranches, with the closing formalities for the second tranche now expected by June 30, 2026. This relates to the sale of certain plant and machinery for the Piston Manufacturing Business.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015, merger order receipt by the promoter group entities.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has been informed by its promoter companies that the Hon'ble Regional Director, South East Region, Hyderabad, has approved a scheme of merger by absorption. This scheme, effective from March 18, 2026, involves the merger of Kirti Ispat Private Limited ("KIPL"), Utkal Ispat Private Limited ("UIPL"), and V A Transport Private Limited ("VATPL") with Gopal Sponge and Power Private Limited (GSPPL). Consequently, KIPL, UIPL, and VATPL will cease to exist, and investments held in VATPL within Vraj Iron and Steel Limited will be consolidated under GSPPL. The aggregate holding of the promoters in Vraj Iron and Steel Limited will remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.detail: PC Jeweller Limited has informed the Exchange about Memorandum of Understanding with NSDC
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Limited has executed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) on March 26, 2026. Under this MoU, PC Jeweller Limited will partner as the Industry/Franchise Partner for the Gems & Jewellery Sector. The agreement aims to develop and onboard up to 2,00,000 micro-entrepreneurs in India over a 5-year period under the PC Jeweller Brand as part of NSDC's National Entrepreneurship Drive (NED) initiative. This partnership is expected to contribute to employment generation and local economic development, while also expanding PC Jeweller's retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd. has informed the Exchange about Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)- Clarification on news articles published in mainstream media
announcements.ai_summary: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd. has clarified news articles regarding its hospital operations in Katra. The company stated that its wholly owned subsidiary, Narayana Vaishno Devi Specialty Hospitals Private Limited (NVDSHPL), executed a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) with Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Charitable Society on March 27, 2026. This BTA formalizes the transition of the hospital to the Society, effective April 1, 2026, with NVDSHPL retaining a supervisory oversight role until 2033. This arrangement was previously disclosed on March 28, 2025, and the current news pertains to its implementation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Orient Paper & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Paper & Industries Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting on March 27, 2026, approved a modification to its capital expenditure project at the Amlai (M.P.) manufacturing facility. Instead of previously envisaged modernization initiatives, the company will now install a new Tissue Machine incorporating advanced technology. This revision, originally disclosed on August 5, 2025, is driven by evolving market dynamics, demand patterns, and the need for advanced manufacturing technologies. The modernization project approved on March 15, 2023, has incurred and obligated Rs. 239 crores out of a sanctioned outlay of Rs. 475 crores.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sheetal Cool Products Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for Launch of New Ice Cream Café
announcements.ai_summary: Sheetal Cool Products Limited has expanded its retail presence by launching a new Ice Cream Café in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, with operations commencing on March 26, 2026, at 6:30 PM. This new outlet, located at Magnifico Complex, Sindhu Bhavan, Ahmedabad, is part of the company's ongoing business expansion strategy to strengthen its brand presence and enhance customer reach. The café will offer the company's premium ice cream products and related items, aiming to provide an enhanced in-store customer experience. This is considered a general business update in the ordinary course of operations.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome Of Board Meeting - Purchase Of Shares Of Empire Mall Private Limited, Omni Infrastructure Private Limited, Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited From Prozone Liberty International Limited, WOS Of Prozone Realty Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Prozone Realty Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the purchase of equity shares of Empire Mall Private Limited, Omni Infrastructure Private Limited, and Hagwood Commercial Developers Private Limited. These shares will be acquired from Prozone Liberty International Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Prozone Realty Limited based in Singapore. Empire Mall Private Limited has a paid-up share capital of INR 1,36,02,25,320 and a turnover of INR 6,271.36 lakhs. The acquisition is considered an arm's length transaction.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'conclusion of further acquisition of 3,66,49,271 fully paid ordinary shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC (CDPLC), resulting in total acquisition of 51% stake as on date'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited has completed the further acquisition of 3,66,49,271 fully paid ordinary shares in Colombo Dockyard PLC (CDPLC). This acquisition, made through a mandatory offer under Sri Lankan regulations, brings Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Limited's total shareholding in CDPLC to 51% as of March 27, 2026. This transaction was part of a Tripartite Agreement with CDPLC and Onomichi Dockyard Co. Ltd. The company had previously disclosed an initial agreement on January 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pearl Global Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about incorporation of subsidiary in Singapore
announcements.ai_summary: Pearl Global Industries Limited has announced the incorporation of a new subsidiary in Singapore, named Pearl Global Fashion Singapore Pte Limited, effective March 27, 2026. This new entity is a step-down subsidiary of Pearl Global Industries Limited, incorporated through its wholly owned subsidiary, Pearl Global (HK) Limited. The subsidiary will operate in the apparels industry as a trading company, catering to clients in Asia, Japan, Europe, and the US. The incorporation was approved by the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) in Singapore. This move is part of the company's strategy to expand its global operations.

announcements.subject: Amendment(s)
announcements.detail: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited has informed the Exchange about Amendment to Agreement to Purchase Identified Assets
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited (SPRL) has entered into an amendment agreement dated March 27, 2026, to its Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) with Sunbeam Lightweighting Solutions Limited. This amendment extends the long stop date for the purchase of identified plant and machinery and related assets from March 31, 2026, to June 30, 2026, and allows for the completion of the proposed transaction in multiple tranches. The closing formalities for the second tranche are now expected to be completed on or before June 30, 2026. This update is in continuation of earlier intimations dated December 19, 2025, and December 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Schneider Electric Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Schneider Electric Infrastructure Limited, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved a revision in the investment/capital expenditure for enhancing the existing capacity of Switchgears at the company's Vadodara Plant. The earmarked expenditure has been revised from INR 110.2 Crores to INR 156.4 Crores. This revised investment will support additional enhancement in shopfloor, civil, and structural works to facilitate future scalability. The meeting commenced at 3:00 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 3:38 p.m. (IST).

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011'.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited has announced the allotment of equity shares to Tikani Exports Limited, a Promoter Group entity, under its recently concluded Rights Issue. This allotment is made pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Tikani Exports Limited is exempt from making an open offer as all conditions under Regulation 10(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011, have been fulfilled. The exact shareholding percentages before and after the acquisition are not explicitly stated in the provided text, but the transaction is a result of the Rights Issue.

announcements.company: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Deepak Fertilizers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Deepak Fertilizers and Petrochemicals Corporation Limited has responded to a query from BSE regarding a significant increase in the trading volume of its securities. The company has stated that it has been strictly complying with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by filing all relevant disclosures and announcements within the stipulated timeframes. Deepak Fertilizers confirmed that there are no pending information or announcements that could impact the price or volume behavior of its securities. The company also mentioned that the volume movement is market-driven and they have no further comment on it.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Info Edge (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the transfer of the company's entire stake in Shopkirana E Trading Private Limited to Trustroot Internet Private Limited (TIPL). This action is a divestment of Info Edge's holding in Shopkirana, which was held through its subsidiary Startup Investments (Holding) Limited (SIHL). SIHL will transfer 60,673 shares, representing 26.14% on a fully converted and diluted basis, of Shopkirana to TIPL for USD 32,970,499.20. In consideration, TIPL will allot 1,04,868 preference shares to SIHL, representing 2.021% on a fully converted and diluted basis, valued at USD 314.40 per share. This transaction is a part of the company's ongoing strategic realignment.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Info Edge (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the transfer of the company's entire stake in Shopkirana E Trading Private Limited to Trustroot Internet Private Limited (TIPL). This transfer is part of a prior agreement where Startup Investments (Holding) Limited (SIHL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Info Edge, was in discussions with TIPL for the acquisition of SIHL's stake in Shopkirana. SIHL will transfer 60,673 shares, representing 26.14% on a fully converted and diluted basis, of Shopkirana to TIPL for an aggregate consideration of USD 32,970,499.20. In return, TIPL will issue and allot 1,04,868 preference shares to SIHL, representing 2.021% on a fully converted and diluted basis, at a value of USD 314.40 per share. This transaction is a significant step in Info Edge's strategic investments.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Global Education Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Global Education Limited's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the introduction of new student-centric service offerings. These services will include student enrollment assistance, admission facilitation, counseling, guidance, student support, and ancillary services like educational materials and uniforms. This initiative represents an expansion of the company's service portfolio within the education segment, aimed at enhancing value-added services and creating additional revenue streams. The Board also reviewed general business operations and approved a Policy on effective two-way communication between Statutory Auditors and Those Charged with Governance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended ( SEBI Listing Regulations )   Filing of Company Application for Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement before Hon ble NCLT
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Refex Industries Limited has filed a Company Application with the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, on March 26, 2026. This application seeks necessary directions for the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. This scheme involves Refex Green Mobility Limited as the Transferor Company, Refex Industries Limited as the Transferee Company (and Demerged Company), and Refex Mobility Limited as the Resulting Company. This filing is a continuation of previous intimations dated September 22, 2025, and March 17, 2026, and is in accordance with Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. Investors should monitor the NCLT proceedings for further updates on the proposed amalgamation and arrangement.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Poddar Pigments Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.ai_summary: Poddar Pigments Limited has commenced commercial production for an additional 6000 Metric Tons Per Annum (MTPA) of Colour Masterbatches at its Chaksu Plant in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This expansion, which increases the plant's capacity from the existing 8030 MTPA, was undertaken at a capital expenditure of Rs. 1090.01 lakhs. The commencement of operations took place on March 27, 2026, as part of the company's overall growth strategy. This development is expected to contribute to PPL’s expansion plans within the pigments sector.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: MMP Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: MMP Industries Limited's Board of Directors held its Meeting No. 6 for FY 2025-26 on March 27, 2026, from 10:45 am to 12:05 pm. During the meeting, the Board considered and approved the Annual Business Plan and Budget for the Financial Year 2026-27. This approval is a key step in the company's strategic planning and operational roadmap for the upcoming fiscal year.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AYM Syntex Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 33,000 Equity Shares under AYM Employee Stock Option Scheme 2021.
announcements.ai_summary: AYM Syntex Limited's Finance Committee of the Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 33,000 fully paid-up equity shares under the AYM Employee Stock Option Scheme 2021. These shares, with a face value of Rs. 10 per share, were allotted to eligible employees upon their exercise of stock options on March 27, 2026. These newly allotted equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Consequently, the company's paid-up share capital has increased from Rs. 58,58,10,910 (5,85,81,091 equity shares) to Rs. 58,61,40,910 (5,86,14,091 equity shares).

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: PCBL Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about Commissioning of additional Brownfield capacity of 30,000 MT of Carbon Black by M/s PCBL (TN) Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: PCBL Chemical Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, M/s PCBL (TN) Limited, has commissioned an additional brownfield capacity of 30,000 MT of Carbon Black at its plant in Tamil Nadu. Commercial production from this new capacity commenced effectively on March 27, 2026. This expansion is expected to enhance the company's production capabilities and contribute to its long-term growth plans by meeting market requirements. The existing capacity was 2,07,000 MTPA, with an 88% utilization rate.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sundaram Finance Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the approval granted by the Board of Directors to raise funds during FY 2026-27 by issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures on a Private Placement Basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Finance Limited's Board of Directors has approved a proposal to raise funds up to ₹17,000 crore during the financial year 2026-27. The fundraising will be conducted through the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures on a private placement basis, potentially in one or more tranches. This decision was made during the Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026, which commenced at 10:00 A.M. and concluded at 11:50 A.M. This move is intended to strengthen the company's financial resources for its operations in the upcoming fiscal year.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Trident Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has successfully commissioned the additional capacity of 5.40 MWp rooftop Solar Power Project at Budhni, Madhya Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Trident Limited has successfully commissioned an additional capacity of 5.40 MWp for its rooftop Solar Power Project at Budhni, Madhya Pradesh. This commissioning, effective March 27, 2026, brings the total installed capacity of the Solar Power Plant at the Budhni facility to 57.32 MWp. The proposed capacity addition involved an investment of approximately INR 10 Crore, financed through internal accruals. The rationale behind this expansion is the adoption of renewable energy to reduce the company's carbon footprint. The existing capacity was 51.92 MWp, operating at 100% utilization.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Renaissance Global Limited has informed the Exchange about launched of  ISSHŌ , a new lab-grown diamond jewellery collection developed in collaboration with Shibani Akhtar.
announcements.ai_summary: Renaissance Global Limited announced that its luxury brand, Irasva Fine Jewellery, has launched "ISSHŌ," a new lab-grown diamond jewellery collection. This collection is developed in collaboration with Shibani Akhtar and marks Irasva's first dedicated exploration into lab-grown diamonds. The name "ISSHŌ" means "together" in Japanese, reflecting the creative synergy between Irasva's Founder and Creative Director, Leshna Shah, and Shibani Akhtar. The collection features pieces crafted in gold and set with certified lab-grown diamonds, characterized by sculptural forms, refined geometry, and versatile silhouettes designed for everyday wear. The launch positions lab-grown diamonds as a deliberate and forward-looking choice, aligning with evolving consumer values around transparency, responsibility, and accessible luxury.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has announced a proposal to convert M/s. Narhari Engineering Works, a partnership firm where the company holds a 99% stake, into a Private Limited Company. This conversion will be conducted in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. The company has proposed three potential names for the new entity: MEL Heavy Industries Private Limited, MEL Advanced Machines Private Limited, or MEL Heavy Machineries Private Limited, subject to regulatory approvals. Marine Electricals (India) Limited will maintain its existing 99% shareholding in the converted entity, reflecting its current partnership contribution. This disclosure is being made as part of the company's commitment to good corporate governance. The company is seeking to have this information recorded by the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: One Point One Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 27, 2026, titled Disclosure under Regulation 30- Managing Director Honored with Most Promising Business Leader of the Year  Award at ET Edge Asian Business Leaders Conclave 2026..
announcements.ai_summary: One Point One Solutions Limited has announced that its Managing Director and Chairman, Mr. Akshay Chhabra, has been honored with the 'Most Promising Business Leader of the Year' award at the ET Edge Asian Business Leaders Conclave 2026. This award recognizes Mr. Chhabra's leadership, long-term business building approach, and focus on results in a dynamic market.
