The maturity amount of this CP was Rs. 5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crore only), and its maturity date was March 24, 2026. This action was taken in accordance with SEBI Operational Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021. The company has taken this information on record.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Fabtech Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Fabtech Technologies Limited's Board of Directors met on March 24, 2026, and approved the carry-forward of unutilized IPO proceeds from FY 2025-26 to FY 2026-27. These funds will be used for the objects stated in the prospectus dated October 02, 2025, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The company confirmed no deviation in IPO proceeds utilization as per Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The meeting concluded at 12:45 p.m. The next steps involve ensuring continued compliance with SEBI regulations regarding the utilization of these funds.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Outcome of Management Committee Meeting of Board of Directors - Early fullredemption of Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Limited's Management Committee has approved the early full redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). This includes 1,25,000 NCDs worth Rs. 1250,00,00,000 issued on July 11, 2023, and 70,000 NCDs worth Rs. 700,00,00,000 issued on October 11, 2023. The meeting concluded on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Press Release dated March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Piccadily Agro Industries Limited announced on March 24, 2026, the unveiling of Indri Rudhira, India's first single malt whisky matured in Pineau des Charentes casks. This exclusive collaboration with The Dram Club introduces a new cask maturation style to the Indian single malt landscape. Only 252 individually numbered bottles of Indri Rudhira have been released, making it a rare expression for collectors and enthusiasts. The company has filed this press release with the relevant stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Wanbury Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "Wanbury Strengthens Coriminic Brand with Pediatric-Focused, Regulation-Aligned Launches".
announcements.ai_summary: Wanbury Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that it is strengthening its Coriminic brand with new pediatric-focused product launches. These include Coriminic CPM Drops (Chlorpheniramine Maleate) and Coriminic NS (Normal Saline) Nasal Drops, designed to comply with drug control notifications restricting fixed-dose cold combinations for children under 4 years of age. These launches aim to provide physicians with compliant treatment options for children. The disclosure was made by Wanbury Limited to the exchanges.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited disclosed on March 24, 2026, that it has received a Final Order from the ACIT Cir 7(1)(1) with a demand liability of INR 23.21 Crores. This demand pertains to the Assessment Order dated March 23, 2026, received from CPC for the Assessment Year (AY) 2023-2024, following a scrutiny assessment. The company has informed BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited about this order and its potential impact on financial activities.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Arun Kumar Saraf has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Arun Kumar Saraf, a promoter of Robust Hotels Limited, has submitted a prior intimation regarding a proposed acquisition of equity shares. The acquisition will be made by way of gift under Regulation 10(1)(a) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This filing is made at least four working days before the intended acquisition date.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: IIFL Capital Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of IIFL Capital Services Limited met on March 24, 2026. They approved an increase in borrowing limits up to ₹7,000 crores, subject to shareholder approval. This increase applies to both Section 180(1)(c) and Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Tata Communications Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled - Tata Communications Unveils Self-Healing Network, Marks New Frontier in Global Data Centre Connectivity.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Communications Limited has issued a press release dated March 24, 2026, announcing the launch of its IZO™ Data Centre Dynamic Connectivity platform. This software-defined platform aims to transform how enterprises connect their data centers. The new offering is designed to enhance resilience and ensure uninterrupted data flow in the global digital economy.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Timken India Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Timken India Limited has completed the purchase of 26.1% equity shares of Sunstreamgreen Energy C&I Three Private Limited. This acquisition was finalized on March 23, 2026. This update follows earlier communications regarding the agreement to acquire shares of the target company on September 22, 2025, and December 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: We hereby inform the Exchange of the Press Release titled "SEPC Limited announces Strategic Acquistion of 90% stake in Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi". Detailed Letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Limited has announced the strategic acquisition of a 90% stake in Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, based in Abu Dhabi. This acquisition is a significant step for SEPC to expand its global footprint and strengthen its presence in the Oil & Gas engineering sector, particularly in the MENA region. The press release detailing this acquisition will also be posted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "Suzlon wins its sixth repeat order of 100 MW from GAIL".
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited has won its sixth repeat order of approximately 100 MW from GAIL (India) Limited. This project will be executed in the Nandurbar district of Maharashtra and will involve supplying 47 S120 WTGs, each with a rated capacity of 2.1 MW. This marks Suzlon's fourth PSU order for FY26.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Kalpataru Projects International Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Kalpataru Projects International Limited has secured new orders totaling ₹4,439 crores. These orders were received in the normal course of business and are a significant addition to the company's existing contracts. Investors should note the substantial value of these new business wins.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Brightcom Group Limited has informed the Exchange about General Update on Governance, Compliance and Operational Matters
announcements.ai_summary: Brightcom Group Limited is undertaking a structured review to strengthen governance, compliance, and transparency. This includes regularizing certain filings and procedural requirements, reinforcing systems for improved monitoring, and consolidating subsidiary information for enhanced financial reporting. The company is also working with auditors to strengthen internal controls and improve documentation processes.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026, titled "ACME Solar commissions additional 155 MW / 470 MWh Battery Energy Storage System projects in Rajasthan".
announcements.ai_summary: Acme Solar Holdings Limited has announced the commissioning of additional Battery Energy Storage System projects. These projects in Rajasthan have a capacity of 155 MW and 470 MWh. This expansion highlights the company's ongoing development in the renewable energy sector.

announcements.subject: Conversion
announcements.detail: Five-Star Business Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about allotment of 3,10,000 equity shares pursuant to conversion of share warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Five-Star Business Finance Limited has completed the conversion of 3,10,000 share warrants into equity shares. The conversion price for these warrants was INR 770.00 per share. This action increases the company's issued equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Capri Global Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 as amended ( SEBI Listing Regulations ) in relation to the public issue of non-convertible debentures. (Draft Shelf Prospectus)'.
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Limited is proceeding with a public issue of non-convertible debentures. The company's Board of Directors approved this issuance, and the Management Committee has now adopted the draft shelf prospectus. The total amount for this issuance is up to ₹20,000 million, with debentures having a face value of ₹1,000 each.

announcements.subject: Conversion
announcements.detail: Reliance Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange about Conversion
announcements.ai_summary: The company announced that 3.35 crore outstanding warrants issued by Reliance Infrastructure Limited have lapsed. This lapse is due to the non-conversion of these warrants within the prescribed 18-month period. Consequently, the amount paid towards these warrants will not be refunded. This decision was communicated to BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: One 97 Communications Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: One 97 Communications Limited has clarified that the cancellation of the banking license of its associate entity, Paytm Payments Bank Limited (PPBL), by the Reserve Bank of India, effective April 24, 2026, will have no financial or business impact on the company. The company previously disclosed no exposure to PPBL and had impaired its investment in PPBL as of March 31, 2024. All services of One 97 Communications Limited, including the Paytm app, Paytm UPI, and other subsidiaries' offerings, will continue to operate uninterrupted. This clarification is made to ensure stakeholders understand that the matter pertains solely to PPBL, a separate entity.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Execution of two sale deeds'.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 24, 2026, Signatureglobal (India) Limited executed two sale deeds to purchase land parcels measuring approximately 0.8104 Acres and 0.4698 Acres, totaling 1.28 acres. These lands are situated in Sector-71 on Southern Peripheral Road, Village Fazilpur Jharsa, Tehsil Badshahpur & District Gurugram, Haryana. These acquired lands are part of a larger collaboration area of 4.26 acres, with the remaining 2.98 acres to be acquired in the future. The 1.28 acres acquired have a potential developable area of approximately 0.10 million square feet. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this land acquisition.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of trading approval for 3,14,391 Equity Shares converted from partly paid-up equity shares to fully paid-up equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Fusion Finance Limited has received trading approval from BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for 3,14,391 equity shares. These shares have been converted from partly paid-up equity shares to fully paid-up equity shares, following the payment opportunity provided to shareholders via a notice dated February 11, 2026, for the Rights Issue First Call Money. These fully paid shares will rank pari passu with existing equity shares and will commence trading under ISIN INE139R01012 on NSE and BSE from April 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mastek Limited has informed the Exchange about execution of MOU for Sale of Asset
announcements.ai_summary: UPL Ltd has made a further investment in Sinova Inovacoes Agricolas S.A., which is an associate entity of UPL Ltd. The specific details of the investment amount, the percentage of stake acquired, and the valuation of the transaction are not provided in the announcement. Investors should refer to subsequent filings for more granular information on this further investment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 24, 2026, titled "Press Release of Board Meeting for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026.".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, on April 24, 2026. For the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, revenue from operations was ₹28,493 Crore, with Profit Before Tax at ₹1,235 Crore and Profit After Tax at ₹119 Crore. For the full fiscal year FY 2025-26, revenue from operations reached ₹1,05,155 Crore, Profit Before Tax was ₹4,022 Crore, and Profit After Tax stood at ₹1,931 Crore. The company also reported a crude throughput of 4.38 MMT and commissioned 85 new retail outlets, increasing their total to 252. The Board of Directors approved these results during their 274th meeting.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Geecee Ventures Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 ( Listing Regulations ) - Acquisition of shares of Adani Enterprises Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Geecee Ventures Limited has acquired 15,000 equity shares of Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) through open market purchase on April 24, 2026, for an investment of ₹3.45 Crores. This acquisition brings the total cost of investment in AEL equity shares to exceed the threshold specified in Regulation 30(4)(i)(c) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. AEL has an authorised capital of ₹990.43 Crores and a paid-up capital of ₹130.16 Crores, with a turnover of ₹26,708.97 Crores and Profit After Tax of ₹6,040.23 Crores for FY 2024-25. The shares are expected to be credited on April 27, 2026. This investment is part of Geecee Ventures Limited's investment activity and is considered a minuscule part of its investment portfolio.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Orkla India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 24, 2026, titled "A Taste of Tradition: MTR brings back its annual cultural and culinary fest- MTR Karunadu Swada 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Orkla India Limited has issued a press release dated April 24, 2026, announcing the return of its annual cultural and culinary festival, "MTR Karunadu Swada 2026." The festival, held in Bengaluru, celebrates the rich food heritage of Karnataka, focusing on indigenous ingredients and regional flavors. This year's event features over 75 dishes and highlights a "One Region. One Unique Ingredient. One Forgotten Recipe." concept. The company also unveiled the second edition of its coffee table book, "The story before the recipe," at the inauguration.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Pace Digitek Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 24, 2026, titled "Press release".
announcements.ai_summary: Pace Digitek Limited announced on April 24, 2026, that it has entered into an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) Exclusivity Agreement with NEC XON Systems Proprietary Limited. This agreement grants NEC XON exclusive rights to market, distribute, and sell Pace Digitek's products, including Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) and other energy solutions, across South Africa, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, and Mauritius. Pace Digitek, along with its subsidiary Lineage Power Private Limited, will continue to focus on product development, manufacturing, and supply. This partnership is a significant step for Pace Digitek's international expansion, leveraging NEC XON's established presence in Africa, a region identified as having high growth potential for grid-scale energy storage solutions.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: Rudrabhishek Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: Rudrabhishek Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange about the awarding of new orders or contracts. The specific details of these orders, including their value, client names, and delivery timelines, have not been disclosed in this announcement. Investors will need to await further communication for more information on this development.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Acquisition of remaining 49% stake in Madhura Compressors Private Limited by M.R. Organisation Limited, a subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: M.R. Organisation Limited, a subsidiary of Aeroflex Enterprises Limited, has acquired the remaining 49% equity stake in Madhura Compressors Private Limited. This transaction, announced on April 24, 2026, makes Madhura Compressors Private Limited a wholly owned subsidiary of M.R. Organisation Limited. No specific financial details or share percentages were provided in this announcement. The company has informed the BSE and NSE of this development.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited has submitted a statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This statement pertains to the funds raised through the issue of Unlisted, Unrated, Secured, Redeemable, fully paid up Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The company raised Rs. 1,800 Crores on December 12, 2025, and the report covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The statement, reviewed by the Audit Committee, indicates no deviation or variation in the utilization of these funds as per the original objects.

announcements.subject: Monitoring Agency Report
announcements.detail: Monitoring Agency Report issued by CARE Ratings Limited, for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in respect of utilisation of proceeds of the Pre-Initial Public Offer Placement and Initial Public Offer of Aequs Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Aequs Limited has submitted its Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, concerning the utilization of proceeds from its Pre-Initial Public Offer Placement and Initial Public Offer. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, confirms that there has been no material deviation in the utilization of funds raised compared to the stated objects of the issue. The company had previously undertaken a Pre-Initial Public Offer of 11,615,713 equity shares, aggregating to Rs. 144.0 crore. This report is in compliance with SEBI regulations and the Monitoring Agency Agreement dated November 12, 2025.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 24, 2026, titled "Press Release on Financial Results for the FY ended 31 March 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited has issued a press release on April 24, 2026, detailing its audited financial results for the Financial Year (FY) 2025-26. The company has provided these results for both the fourth quarter (Q4FY26) and the full fiscal year. Investors should note that the press release contains forward-looking statements, and actual results may differ due to various risks and uncertainties, including market competition, wage increases, project completion, and economic conditions. The company will not undertake to update these forward-looking statements.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Presentation on Operational and Financial highlights'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited has released a presentation detailing its operational and financial highlights for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The presentation, available on the company's website, showcases robust financial performance with Revenue, EBITDA, and Cash Profit showing year-on-year increases of 22%, 23%, and 11% respectively. Key financial figures for FY26 include Revenue of ₹10,865 Cr, EBITDA of ₹11,602 Cr, and Cash Profit of ₹5,399 Cr. The presentation also covers the Adani Portfolio, AGEL's company profile, ESG initiatives, and investment rationale.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Atul Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Atul Limited met on April 24, 2026, to approve the financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company has submitted these results to the stock exchanges. Further details regarding the financial performance for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, are available.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Krystal Integrated Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts by an Associate Company.
announcements.ai_summary: An associate company of Krystal Integrated Services Limited, Advait Krystal Solar Energy SPV Private Limited, has secured a significant contract from the Directorate of Medical Education & Research, Maharashtra (DMER). This contract is for the design, engineering, supply, installation, testing, commissioning, synchronizing, operation, and maintenance of Power Grid Connected Rooftop Solar PV Systems. The project will be executed on a Built-Own-Operate-Transfer (BOOT) model across various government hospitals and medical colleges in the State of Maharashtra. The agreement spans a substantial period of Twenty-Five Years (25) and includes attendant services. The contract number is DMER/2026-O/O COMMISSIONER/569, dated April 23, 2026. Further details regarding the significant terms and conditions are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Amendment(s)
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Amendment to Joint Venture Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has executed a Novation and Amendment Agreement on April 24, 2026, with The Manufacturers Life Insurance Company ("Manulife") and its wholly owned subsidiary, Manulife Holdings (Bermuda) Limited ("Manulife Bermuda"). This amendment pertains to the joint venture agreement (JVA) established on November 13, 2025, for a life insurance business. Under the new agreement, Manulife has transferred, assigned, and novated all its rights, interests, and obligations under the JVA to Manulife Bermuda. Manulife Bermuda will now assume all of Manulife's responsibilities and rights under the JVA, with all other terms and conditions of the original JVA remaining unchanged. This update is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Spacenet Enterprises India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Spacenet Enterprises India Limited, as part of its Promoter Group for String Metaverse Limited (SML), has sold 30,00,000 equity shares of SML, each with a face value of ₹10. This sale, conducted on April 21 and 22, 2026, through the stock exchange mechanism, represents 2.58% of SML's total issued and paid-up equity share capital. The transaction was undertaken to comply with SEBI's Minimum Public Shareholding requirements, as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 3, 2023. Following this sale, Spacenet Enterprises India Limited's shareholding in SML has decreased from 4.61% to 2.03% of the paid-up equity share capital. This update is to inform the exchange and for their records.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: IRIS RegTech Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts.
announcements.ai_summary: IRIS RegTech Solutions Limited's strategic partner in Brazil, MZ Consult, has been awarded a mandate by a leading Oil and Gas Company in Brazil. The contract is for Disclosure Management and ESG Reporting solutions, with IRIS Carbon being the selected platform. This award follows a competitive RFP process.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Veedol Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Extension of Time for Repayment of Unsecured Loan granted to Andrew Yule & Company Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Veedol Corporation Limited has extended the repayment deadline for an unsecured loan granted to Andrew Yule & Company Limited. The repayment date has been moved from March 31, 2026, to September 30, 2026. All other terms and conditions of the loan remain unchanged. Andrew Yule & Company Limited is a Government of India Enterprise and a co-promoter of Veedol Corporation.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Physicswallah Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Press Release on Physicswallah''s Vishwas Diwas Event.
announcements.ai_summary: Physicswallah Limited has issued a press release titled "PhysicsWallah’s Vishwas Diwas demonstrates deep online penetration in Bharat and strong student response to ‘Ask AI’ Sees record growth in new and underpenetrated pin codes". This announcement highlights the company's online reach in India and the positive student reception to its 'Ask AI' feature. The press release details significant growth in new and underpenetrated areas.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: KPIT Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on N Dream AG ( N-Dream ) Subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: KPIT Technologies Limited has transferred its 26% stake in N Dream AG to its wholly owned subsidiary, KPIT Technologies (UK) Limited. Following this, KPIT UK now holds a 90% stake in N Dream, making it a step-down subsidiary of KPIT India. This restructuring aims to achieve parity and reorganize within the KPIT group's organizational structure, with the overall group holding in N Dream remaining at 90%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited has been levied a penalty of Rs. 25 Lacs by the Office of the Deputy Director, Enforcement Directorate, Mumbai Zonal Office- II. This penalty relates to a contravention of Section 7 of FEMA, 1999, read with regulation 15 of Foreign Exchange Management (Current Account Transaction) Rules, 2000. The company states this is for a procedural matter concerning a bonafide transaction already reported to the RBI.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Welspun Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Grant of Stock Options under Welspun Enterprises Employee Benefit Scheme -2022.
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Enterprises Limited announced the grant of 6,00,000 stock options to eligible employees under its Welspun Enterprises Employee Benefit Scheme - 2022. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors on March 23, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee meeting held on March 21, 2026. Further details of the grant are provided in Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Other Restructuring
announcements.detail: Reduction of equity share capital of Senseforth AI Research Private Limited, a subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Fractal Analytics Limited has completed the reduction of equity share capital for its subsidiary, Senseforth AI Research Private Limited. The equity share capital was reduced from Rs. 26,27,88,470 to Rs. 2,62,88,270, following an order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai. This restructuring involved the extinguishment of equity share capital as per the NCLT's rectified order dated September 23, 2025.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has acquired equity shares in its wholly owned subsidiary, H.G. Banaskantha Bess Private Limited. The investment amounts to Rs. 48,52,00,000/- through a subscription of a Rights issue. This acquisition is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has appointed Ms. Ruchi Kulhari as Executive Vice President (EVP) and Chief of Staff. This appointment is effective from Monday, March 23, 2026 (EST). The company has provided the requisite disclosure as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Report from the Audit Committee of Directors and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution of proceeds to eligible shareholders of fractional entitlements pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. and their respective shareholders.'
announcements.ai_summary: JK Tyre & Industries Limited has reported that the Audit Committee and Independent Directors have certified the distribution of proceeds from fractional entitlements. This distribution is pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cavendish Industries Ltd. with JK Tyre & Industries Ltd. Proceeds from the sale of shares allotted upon consolidation of fractional entitlements have been distributed to eligible shareholders of erstwhile Cavendish Industries Ltd.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Birla Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding copy of press release issued by the Company w.r.t. the commencement of third line of production at Kundanganj unit in Uttar Pradesh of RCCPL Private Limited, a wholly owned material subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Corporation Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, RCCPL Private Limited, has commissioned a third production line at its Kundanganj grinding unit in Uttar Pradesh. This expansion increases the unit's production capacity by 1.4 million tons. A press release detailing this development has been issued.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: GB Global Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: GB Global Limited has lent Rs. 13,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirteen Crore) to Tangent Profin Private Limited. The company has confirmed that the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this investment. The transaction was conducted on an arm's length basis.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: In compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR ESG score of 60 has been assigned by M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited is submitted. The other details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited has received an ESG score of "60" from M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited. This score is now available on the websites of BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR for this disclosure.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities by approving JSW Dulux Limited - Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026, subject to shareholder approval
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) has approved the Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026. This approval is subject to shareholder consent. The company also appointed two new directors to its Board.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AWL Agri Business Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Limited (formerly Adani Wilmar Limited) announced that the Ministry of Corporate Affairs approved the strike-off of its subsidiary, AWL Edible Oils and Foods Private Limited. This approval was granted on March 23, 2026, following an application filed by the subsidiary on January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: We herewith enclosed the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e March 23, 2026, approving the Proposed acquistion of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. Detailed letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. This decision was made during a board meeting held on March 23, 2026. The acquisition is subject to approvals from the company's lenders and shareholders.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) announced board meeting outcomes on March 23, 2026. The board appointed Mr. Kaustubh Sudhakar Kulkarni as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) and Ms. Sutapa Banerjee as an Additional Director (Independent Woman Director). Both appointments are effective March 23, 2026, and are subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Indo-National Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter and HalfYear Ended September 30, 2025'.
announcements.ai_summary: Indo-National Limited has submitted revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025. An omission occurred during the preparation of the previous statements, specifically the failure to eliminate investments in M/s. Helios Strategic Systems Limited amounting to ₹64.50 Crores. This has been rectified, resulting in a reduction in Non-Current Financial Assets and Total Assets.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Redemption of Commercial Papers issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has successfully redeemed its Commercial Papers amounting to ₹50 Crore on the due date, March 23, 2026. The redemption payment, including interest, has been made in full. This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Astral Limited has informed the Exchange about Grant of patent  MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET  to Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited a wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Astral Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited, has been granted a patent by the Government of India for its "MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET" invention. This patent, valid for 20 years from November 01, 2021, relates to a solution for multiple household connections from a single tapping with flexible outlet configurations. The invention aims for cost-efficiency, reduced disruption, and longer main-pipe life.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Solar Industries India Limited has informed the Exchange about Certificate confirming fulfilment of payment obligation with respect to Commercial Paper issued dated December 23, 2025 by Solar Industries India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Solar Industries India Limited has confirmed the full payment of Rs. 100 Crores for its Commercial Paper issued on December 23, 2025. The payment was made on the due date, March 23, 2026, to Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited. This fulfills the company's payment obligation related to this issuance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on a one-on-one meet (virtual) with an institutional investor held on 23rd March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nestle India Limited held a one-on-one virtual meeting with an institutional investor on March 23, 2026. The company has confirmed that no unpublished price sensitive information was shared during this meeting. This update is in reference to their previous letter dated March 9, 2026, and is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: GNG Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Execution of Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GNG Electronics Limited has entered into a Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited on March 10, 2026, to an existing Facility Agreement. The company received this agreement on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has been awarded a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 23, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India for the "Construction of 4 lane Greenfield Section of NH-33 from Mokama to Munger in the State of Bihar." The contract price for this project is INR 2440.87 Crores, and it is to be completed within 910 days on a Hybrid Annuity Mode.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: NBCC (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Work Orders received by NBCC (India) Limited in the ordinary course of business amounting to Rs 58.61 Cr. approx.'.
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has secured a new work order from Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University in Mayurbhanj, Odisha. The approximate value of this order is Rs 58.61 crore, excluding GST. This award falls within the ordinary course of the company's business operations.

announcements.subject: Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Bajaj Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about issue of Securities
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finance Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, approved the issue of 3,472,439 equity shares. These shares will be issued at their respective grant prices to the Trustees of BFL Employee Welfare Trust under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2009. The Board meeting commenced at 2:15 p.m. and concluded at 4:10 p.m.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: DMCC SPECIALITY CHEMICALS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Limited has been served with a commercial suit filed by Shipping Corporation of India Limited (SCI) in the Hon’ble City Civil Court. The company has provided details as required by SEBI Listing Regulations, stating that these litigations are not expected to materially impact its financial position.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: TREJHARA SOLUTIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update on Acquisitions '.
announcements.ai_summary: Trejhara Solutions Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% equity stake in LP Logistics, a Dubai-based entity. LP Logistics will now become a wholly owned subsidiary of Trejhara Solutions Limited. Additionally, the company has set up a joint venture with G S Marketing Associates and concluded the acquisition of its business undertaking.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PVR INOX Limited has informed the Exchange about opening of 3-screen Multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: PVR INOX Limited has opened a new 3-screen multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza in Moti Nagar, New Delhi. This expansion brings PVR INOX's total screen count to 1,802 across 360 properties in 114 cities in India and Sri Lanka. The new cinema features advanced projection and sound systems.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of receipt of ISO 9001:2015 Certification for the Secretarial Function'.
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited's Secretarial Function has received ISO 9001:2015 certification from Bureau Veritas. This certification recognizes the company's robust quality management systems, standardized processes, and commitment to corporate governance and operational excellence.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Foods Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HFL announces acquisition of Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business .
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Foods Limited (HFL) has announced the acquisition of a Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business through a Business Transfer Agreement. This acquisition is being made by HFL, which is a Vanity Case Group Company. Further details of the acquisition are provided in a press release dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Fineotex Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates on the Plant Visit scheduled to be held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Fineotex Chemical Limited will host an investor and analyst plant visit on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at its Ambernath plant in Maharashtra. The visit will include representatives from various firms such as Mili Capital, Prad Capital, and Fort Capital. No price-sensitive information will be discussed during the visit.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Puravankara Limited has informed the Exchange about Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores Rupees) on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited shareholders have approved the transfer of a business undertaking to its subsidiary, Mahindra Blossom Developers Limited, on a slump sale basis. The resolutions were passed by the requisite majority via postal ballot, with the voting results declared on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hind Rectifiers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HIRECT Announces Availability of Advanced Copper Conductors forHigh-Power Transformers from Expanded India Facility".
announcements.ai_summary: Hind Rectifiers Limited (HIRECT) has announced the commercial availability of advanced copper products, including Continuously Transposed Conductors (CTC), Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (PICC), and Enameled Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (EPICC). These products are manufactured at their newly inaugurated state-of-the-art copper processing plant in Nashik, India, and will be exported globally for high-power transformers and wound components.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LTM Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "LTM Expands BlueVerseTM Tech with AppIQ, AgentIQ and FusionIQ to Accelerate AI-Led Engineering".
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 23, 2026, titled "IKS Health Announces Agreement to Acquire TruBridge to Strengthen Access to Rural and Community-Based Healthcare".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has announced a press release dated April 23, 2026, titled "IKS Health Announces Agreement to Acquire TruBridge to Strengthen Access to Rural and Community-Based Healthcare." The press release details a definitive agreement for IKS Health, the U.S. subsidiary of Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited, to acquire TruBridge, Inc. This strategic acquisition aims to broaden access to high-quality care by combining IKS Health's care enablement capabilities with TruBridge's expertise in revenue cycle management and electronic health record (EHR) solutions for rural and community hospitals. The combined entity is expected to strengthen local healthcare systems and enhance care delivery across the continuum.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Pace Digitek Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pace Digitek Limited has entered into an Original Equipment Manufacturer Exclusivity Agreement with NEC XON Systems Proprietary Limited on April 22, 2026. This agreement grants NEC XON exclusive rights to market, distribute, and sell Pace Digitek's products, including Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) and other related energy solutions. The exclusive territory covers South Africa, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, and Mauritius. This expansion aims to broaden the company's market reach for its energy solutions.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: BSE Limited has informed the Exchange about Merger of BSE Investments Limited and BSE Administration & Supervision Limited with BSE Technologies Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: BSE Limited has announced that the Scheme of Merger of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, BSE Investments Limited and BSE Administration & Supervision Limited, with BSE Technologies Private Limited has become effective from April 23, 2026. This merger, undertaken under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013, received approval from the Regional Director - I, Western Region, MCA, via an order dated April 8, 2026, and was filed with the Registrar of Companies on April 23, 2026. Consequently, BSE Investments Limited and BSE Administration & Supervision Limited have ceased to exist as of the Effective Date and are no longer wholly-owned subsidiaries of BSE Limited. The turnover for the entities as of September 30, 2025, based on their last audited financial statements, has been provided.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: FORCE MOTORS LTD has informed the Exchange about Update on Acquisition- Completion of Acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Force Motors Ltd has announced the completion of its acquisition of Veera Tanneries Private Limited (VTPL). The company executed a Share Purchase Agreement on April 23, 2026, with VTPL and its shareholders. The total consideration for the purchase of the entire shareholding of VTPL was Rs. 161,96,25,729. Following this acquisition, VTPL has now become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Force Motors Ltd. This update follows earlier intimations provided by Force Motors Ltd on February 4, 2026, and February 6, 2026, regarding the acquisition. The disclosures required under SEBI LODR Regulations have been furnished in line with applicable SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: BlueStone Jewellery and Lifestyle Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 23, 2026, titled "Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations andDisclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015   Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: BlueStone Jewellery and Lifestyle Limited announced its financial results for the quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026, on April 23, 2026. The company reported a robust 49% year-on-year (YoY) revenue growth in Q4FY26, reaching INR 688 crores, driven by a strong Same Stores Sales Growth (SSSG) of 34% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4FY26 stood at INR 147 crores, a significant increase of 243.1% YoY, with an improved EBITDA margin of 21.4%. Notably, FY26 marked a milestone with the company reporting its first full year of positive Profit After Tax (PAT), with a reported PAT of INR 36 crores in Q4FY26 compared to a loss of INR (49) crores in Q4 FY25. BlueStone also expanded its retail presence by adding 65 stores in FY26, bringing its total store count to 340 across 134 cities.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: BlueStone Jewellery and Lifestyle Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: BlueStone Jewellery and Lifestyle Limited has submitted a statement confirming no deviation or variation in the utilization of proceeds raised through its Initial Public Offer (IPO). The company's equity shares were listed on August 19, 2025. The statement covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as required by Regulation 32(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The total amount raised through the IPO was Rs. 820 Crore. The monitoring agency for the utilization of these funds is CARE Ratings Limited.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has completed the sale of its wholly-owned subsidiary, H.G. Raipur Visakhapatnam OD-6 Private Limited. The company transferred its entire 100% equity stake, comprising 11,37,750 Equity Shares, to Neo Infra Income Opportunities Fund on April 23, 2026. This divestment was a continuation of previous announcements made on August 13, 2025, and November 06, 2025, with the Securities Purchase Agreement executed on November 06, 2025. The total consideration for the sale is Rs. 282.24 crore, with Rs. 203.00 crore received on April 23, 2026, and the remaining amount to be received as per the transaction documents. The subsidiary contributed Rs. 329.10 crore (6.5%) to the consolidated revenue and had a net worth of Rs. 132.19 crore (2.6%) as of March 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Aequs Limited has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation between AeroStructures Manufacturing India Private Limited, Aequs Engineered Plastics Private Limited and Aequs Force Consumer Products Private Limited (Wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company) with the Aequs Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Aequs Limited has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation where AeroStructures Manufacturing India Private Limited, Aequs Engineered Plastics Private Limited, and Aequs Force Consumer Products Private Limited, all wholly-owned subsidiaries, will merge with Aequs Limited. This approval was granted by the Board of Directors on April 23, 2026, following the recommendation of the Audit Committee, and is subject to shareholder and applicable authority approvals. The merger will be conducted under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013. A notice for the shareholder's meeting, along with other required information, will be published and communicated in due course, and will also be available on the company's website.

announcements.company: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited
announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Notice of the NCLT Court Convened Shareholders Meeting for the Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.ai_summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about a Notice for a National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Court Convened Shareholders Meeting concerning the amalgamation/merger with Triumph Offshore Private Limited. This meeting, scheduled for Monday, May 25, 2026, at 10:30 AM IST, will be conducted via video-conferencing or other audio-visual means. Shareholders will consider and approve the proposed Scheme of Arrangement between Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited and Triumph Offshore Private Limited, as directed by the NCLT Ahmedabad Bench. The meeting will adhere to provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI Listing Regulations, including e-voting facilities.

announcements.subject: Monitoring Agency Report
announcements.detail: Monitoring Agency Report & Statement of deviation or variation for the quarter ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Adani Energy Solutions Limited has submitted its Monitoring Agency Report and a Statement of Deviation or Variation for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This report pertains to funds raised through a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) of 8,57,89,959 equity shares, aggregating to Rs. 8,373.10 crore. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, indicates a deviation from the original objects, for which board approval was obtained for reallocation of funds. This reallocation was covered in the Monitoring Agency review for Q1FY26, with the deviation range exceeding 10%. The company is required to submit these reports as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: SG Finserve Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: SG Finserve Limited has announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors, in their meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved these results, which include the Statement of Assets and Liability and Cash Flow statements. Additionally, the company has appointed Mr. Deepak Kumar as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive - Non-Independent Director-Chairperson, effective April 16, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Disclosures regarding the utilization of issue proceeds and any deviations, along with security cover disclosures as per Regulation 54(3), have also been submitted. The audit report from M/s. S.P. Chopra & Co. has been provided with an unmodified opinion.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) announced that ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited has assigned an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) rating to the company. HPCL clarified that it did not engage ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited for this rating, and the report was independently prepared by the rating agency. Investors can access the rating through the provided link: https://india360.esgrisk.ai/Accounts/Ratinglist. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Yuv BharatRam, Rahil Bharat Ram has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Yuv Bharat Ram and Rahil Bharat Ram submitted a disclosure to the stock exchange under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing pertains to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers. Further details regarding the specific transaction and its implications are expected to be provided in subsequent filings or announcements.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Techindia Nirman Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Techindia Nirman Limited's Board of Directors approved the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported zero revenue from operations for both the quarter and the full year. Total expenses for the quarter were ₹20.08 lakh, leading to a net loss of ₹49.04 lakh. For the full financial year, total expenses amounted to ₹33.19 lakh, with a net loss of ₹62.15 lakh. The company also noted other operating income of ₹0.34 lakh for the quarter and the year. The meeting commenced at 10:30 a.m. and concluded at 5:00 p.m.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Tube Investments of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Incremental Investment in 3xper Innoventure Limited'.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Tube Investments of India Limited ("TII") entered into a Supplementary Agreement with its subsidiary, 3xper Innoventure Limited ("3xper"), and Mr. N Govindarajan. Under this agreement, TII will invest Rs. 75 Cr. and Mr. N Govindarajan will invest Rs. 25 Cr. for the subscription of Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) in 3xper. The purpose of this fundraising is to enable 3xper to scale up its operations in the pharmaceutical industry, specifically in Contract Development and Manufacturing Operations. TII currently holds 0.95 Cr. equity shares and 284.05 Cr. Series A CCPS in 3xper. The significant terms of the Supplementary Agreement retain those from the original agreement, including special rights for TII such as the right to appoint directors and pre-emptive rights on future share issuances.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Shree Ram Twistex Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Ram Twistex Limited has informed the Exchange about the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026. The specific details of the resolutions passed or decisions made during this meeting were not provided in the excerpt. Further information regarding the meeting's outcome is expected to be disclosed by the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Shradha Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Shradha Realty Limited executed three sale deeds for the sale of property located in 'ABHIMAN NIWAS', Mauaza: Isasani, Tahsil Hingna, District: Nagpur. The aggregate consideration for these sales amounts to Rs. 57,86,400/-. The buyers are Alka Thakre and Krunal Thakre, Digendra Tembhare and Savitri Tembhare, and Yugesh Meshram and Madhuri Meshram, all individuals. Each sale deed pertains to a residential apartment with a built-up area of 35.046 Sq. Mtrs., along with a 0.211% undivided share in the land. The transaction is a cash consideration for each sale, with individual sale amounts of Rs. 19,28,800/- for the first property, Rs. 19,28,800/- for the second property, and Rs. 19,28,800/- for the third property. This disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aster DM Healthcare Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited, along with its material subsidiary Malabar Institute of Medical Sciences Limited (MIMS), has completed the acquisition of a 26% stake in Oyster Green Hybrid Two Private Limited (Oyster). The total consideration for this acquisition has been revised from the initial INR 7,00,00,000 to INR 5,80,00,000. The company made an initial payment of INR 3,54,00,000 on October 02, 2025, and the remaining balance of INR 2,26,00,000 was paid on April 22, 2026. Oyster Green Hybrid Two Private Limited had a paid-up capital of INR 10,00,00,000 and a net worth of INR 9,74,25,000 as of March 31, 2025. This update is in furtherance of the definitive agreement signed on April 17, 2024, and is in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Himadri Speciality Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of first anode material production
announcements.ai_summary: Himadri Speciality Chemical Limited has announced the commencement of commercial operations at its first anode material production facility. Located in Mahistikry, Hooghly, West Bengal, this facility has an initial installed capacity of 200 MTPA. This development is a significant milestone, stemming from over 10 years of in-house research and development covering the entire anode technology value chain. The facility is designed to accommodate alternative raw material feeds, ensuring scalability and long-term resilience. This expansion strengthens the company's capabilities in advanced battery materials, positioning it to meet the growing global demand for electric vehicles and energy storage systems. The company previously communicated on December 06, 2023, about its phased production of Lithium-ion battery components with a total annual capacity of 200,000 MT.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Oswal Pumps Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Oswal Pumps Limited has informed the Exchange that the company does not meet the criteria specified under Para 1.2 of Chapter XII of the SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. This circular pertains to fund raising through the issuance of debt securities by Large Entities. Consequently, the framework provided in the aforesaid circular is not applicable to Oswal Pumps Limited. The company has requested that this declaration be taken on record by the Exchange. This update was communicated on April 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Dreamfolks Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on Acquisition of ETT Solutions DMCC.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dreamfolks Services Limited has provided an update on its acquisition of ETT Solutions DMCC ("ETT"). The first phase, involving the secondary purchase of shares, has been completed and registered with the Dubai Multi Commodities Centre Authority. Following this, Dreamfolks' current shareholding in ETT is 34%. The subsequent phase, a primary subscription to freshly issued shares, is expected to proceed as per agreed timelines. Upon completion of the primary subscription, Dreamfolks' overall shareholding in ETT will increase to 60.24%. This update follows the Board's approval on December 01, 2025, for the investment in ETT.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Solex Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 23, 2026, titled "Solex Energy to Showcase Advanced Solar Technologies at Renew X, Chennai 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Solex Energy Limited has announced its participation in Renew X Chennai 2026, scheduled from April 27-29, 2026, at the Chennai Trade Centre. The company will showcase its advanced solar module technologies, including Tapi RC, Tapi R, and Ganga Series modules, as well as its N-Type PV modules. Solex Energy will also highlight its integrated EPC capabilities and its Industry 4.0-enabled 4 GW automated manufacturing facility in Tadkeshwar, Gujarat. The company aims to expand its footprint in South India, a high-growth market for renewable energy. Solex Energy invites EPC companies, partners, institutional buyers, and industry professionals to visit their booth (Hall 03 | Booth B165) to explore collaboration opportunities.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Omaxe Limited has informed the Exchange about Granting of Regulatory Approval.
announcements.ai_summary: Omaxe Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary M/s Omaxe Garv Buildtech Private Limited, has received a RERA Registration Certificate for its project "COMMERCIAL-3 BLOCK-3" located in Sarojini Nagar, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. The registration number is UPRERAPRJ787830/04/2026, granted by the Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority (U.P. RERA). This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The project is categorized as Commercial and caters to both domestic and international markets. Details of the project are available on the U.P. RERA website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Concord Enviro Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Concord Enviro Systems Limited has announced that its wholly owned overseas subsidiary, Concord Enviro FZE, has acquired Convertible Preferred Stock of WaHa Inc. This acquisition aligns with the subsidiary's strategic objectives and is expected to enhance its business and technological capabilities. WaHa Inc. is a U.S.-based clean-technology company founded in 2018, specializing in advanced atmospheric water generation and energy-efficient cooling solutions, with proprietary systems like the WaHa Vaporator®. As of March 31, 2025, WaHa Inc. reported a turnover of US$ 0.14 lakhs, a Net Profit After Tax (PAT) of (31.26) lakhs, and a Net Worth of (59.88) lakhs. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Rmc Switchgears Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited has provided an update regarding its preferential issue of 1,45,23,906 equity shares to its promoter, HDFC Bank Limited. As of April 16, 2026, the total number of equity shares on a fully diluted basis is 2,18,39,50,540. Following this preferential issue, HDFC Bank Limited's shareholding in HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited is expected to be 50.27% of the total equity share capital. This disclosure is made pursuant to a suggestion from the Stock Exchanges in connection with the company's in-principle application for the preferential and private placement issue.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Glottis Limited has informed the Exchange about the receipt of ASMT 10 from GST department.
announcements.ai_summary: Nandani Creation Limited has announced a partnership with Reliance Fashion Factory, expanding its retail presence into over 25 Reliance Fashion Factory stores. This collaboration aims to strengthen the company's offline presence and optimize inventory by providing a channel for liquidating aged and slow-moving stock. The partnership is expected to improve working capital efficiency and reduce inventory holding periods. Nandani Creation Limited, operating under the "Jaipur Kurti" brand, will leverage Reliance Fashion Factory's extensive retail network to enhance its direct-to-consumer ecosystem and offer a seamless shopping experience. This move is part of the company's strategy to fortify its position in the women's Indian wear segment through expanded retail networks and strengthened digital and offline channels.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Bharat Coking Coal Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Coking Coal Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 22, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the 4th Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also approved a revision in the price of Washed Coking Coal, effective from April 1, 2026. The new basic prices are ₹13,403/- per MT for Washed Prime Coking Coal and ₹10,937/- per MT for Washed Medium Coking Coal, with other charges applicable. Evacuation charges for washery products were also revised effective April 1, 2026, with approved recovery amounts of ₹731/₹878 per MT for Washed Coal @ 65%, ₹225/₹270 per MT for Washed Power Coal @ 20%, and ₹169/₹202 per MT for Rejects/Slurry @ 15%. Furthermore, the Board approved the waiver of Performance Incentive and Discount in Price to Power Consumers for lifting beyond 100% of Annual Contracted Quantity.

announcements.subject: Rescission/termination(s)
announcements.detail: RKEC Projects Limited has informed the Exchange about Rescission/termination(s)
announcements.ai_summary: RKEC Projects Limited has informed the Exchange about the termination of an EPC contract for the "Passenger Jetty and Terminal Facilities at Radio Jetty near Gateway of India, Mumbai." The contract, initially valued at approximately Rs. 186.67 Cr. and announced on October 5, 2024, was terminated by the client on April 21, 2026. The termination is attributed to factors beyond the company's control, including multiple PILs, SLPs, design changes, and resultant delays. RKEC Projects Limited intends to pursue recovery of all costs, losses, and consequential damages through arbitration.

announcements.subject: Open Offer
announcements.detail: J P Morgan India Private ltd has submitted to  the Exchange a copy of Open offer for acquisition of up to 415,586,443 equity shares of Rs. 10 each ( Equity Shares ) of the company representing 26.00%  of the Expanded Voting Share Capital from the Public Shareholders by Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C.)  pursuant to and in compliance with the requirements of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended (the  SEBI (SAST) Regulations ) (the  Open Offer / Offer ).
