announcements.ai_summary: J P Morgan India Private Ltd has submitted an open offer to the Exchange on behalf of Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C.) for the acquisition of up to 415,586,443 equity shares of RBL Bank Limited. These shares represent 26.00% of the expanded voting share capital and are being acquired from public shareholders. This open offer is made pursuant to and in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: E2E Networks Limited has informed the Exchange about Onboarding of Strategic Advisor.
announcements.ai_summary: E2E Networks Limited has announced the onboarding of Mr. Alok Ohrie as a Strategic Advisor, effective April 22, 2026. Mr. Ohrie brings over three decades of experience in the IT industry, including his tenure as President & Managing Director of Dell Technologies India. His expertise spans enterprise technology, go-to-market strategy, SaaS solutions, and strategic account management. He has also held leadership roles with NASSCOM, AMCHAM, and the Security Council of India. This appointment is disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and further details are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Studds Accessories Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 22, 2026 regarding update for Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Studds Accessories Limited's Board of Directors convened on April 22, 2026, from 04:20 P.M. to 05:05 P.M. The Board approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Italy, Europe, with an authorized capital of up to EUR 1,000,000. This decision supersedes the previous plan to incorporate a subsidiary in Spain. The new subsidiary will be a related party to Studds Accessories Limited upon its incorporation. Its principal business activity will involve the importation, distribution, marketing, and sales of the Company's products in Europe. Further updates will be provided once the subsidiary is officially incorporated.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of Open Offer Opening Advertisement and Corrigendum issued by Magnum under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kwality Wall’s (India) Limited has received the offer opening advertisement and a corrigendum to the detailed public statement from Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Limited. These documents pertain to an open offer made by The Magnum Ice Cream Company HoldCo 1 Netherlands B.V. ("Acquirer"), along with Magnum ICC Finance B.V. and The Magnum Ice Cream Company N.V. (acting in concert), to the public shareholders. The open offer is for the acquisition of up to 61,08,93,729 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 26.00% of the voting share capital, at a price of ₹21.33 per equity share. This is in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Bharat Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has secured new orders worth Rs. 569 Crore, marking the commencement of its order acquisition for the financial year 2026-27. These orders encompass a range of products including avionics, EW systems, high energy lasers, communication equipment, tank sub-systems, laser-based fuzes, test equipment, upgrades, spares, and services. The company announced this through a press release on April 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Company has issued Corporate Guarantee on behalf of The Beverage Company Proprietary Limited (subsidiary company) as per details attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Varun Beverages Limited has issued a Corporate Guarantee of ZAR 770 Million on behalf of its subsidiary, The Beverage Company Proprietary Limited (Bevco), in South Africa. This guarantee is in favour of JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. (Johannesburg branch) and is valid until April 21, 2029, to secure a credit facility extended to Bevco. The company stated that this corporate guarantee has no impact on Varun Beverages Limited itself, and the transaction was conducted at arm's length with no interest from the promoter or promoter group.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd. has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 22, 2026, titled "Press Release pursuant to NCLT order under IBC approving the Company s Resolution plan regarding SDF Industries Limited".
announcements.ai_summary: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd. has received approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kochi Bench, for its resolution plan concerning SDF Industries Limited. This approval, granted on April 16, 2026, paves the way for AABL to acquire SDF Industries Ltd., a distillery and bottling unit in Thrissur, Kerala, for ₹30.85 crore. Upon completion, SDF Industries Ltd. will become a wholly owned subsidiary of AABL. The acquisition will enhance AABL's IMFL bottling capacity by approximately 3.60 lakh cases per annum and an ENA distillery capacity of 75 lakh liters per annum. This strategic acquisition aims to bring bottling operations in-house in Kerala, a key growth market for AABL.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: 3i Infotech Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates. No further specific details are provided in the document.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Larsen & Toubro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 22, 2026, titled "L&T Energy GreenTech Enters Green Ammonia Partnership with Japan s ITOCHU".
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary L&T Energy GreenTech Ltd (LTEGL), has entered into a long-term partnership with ITOCHU Corporation of Japan. Under this agreement, LTEGL will supply ITOCHU with 300,000 tonnes of green ammonia per annum from its proposed facility in Kandla, Gujarat, on a captive long-term take-or-pay basis. This partnership builds upon a Joint Development Agreement signed in July 2025 and signifies a progression from development to securing long-term demand, aiming to establish a globally competitive green ammonia value chain and support the decarbonization of the maritime sector.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Varroc Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 22, 2026, titled "Varroc Reaffirms Commitment to Kham River Restoration and Sustainability on World Earth Day".
announcements.ai_summary: Varroc Engineering Limited has issued a press release on April 22, 2026, titled "Varroc Reaffirms Commitment to Kham River Restoration and Sustainability on World Earth Day." The release highlights the company's progress in renewable energy adoption, carbon reduction, and resource-efficient manufacturing. Varroc's ESG performance has been recognized with an improved rating of 75 from CFC Finlease Private Limited and an upward revision of its EcoVadis rating from 44 to 52, earning it the "Sustainability Committed" badge. These advancements underscore Varroc's commitment to sustainability and driving progress with purpose.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Beta Drugs Limited has informed the Exchange about Beta Drugs Expands International Market Access with Key Regulatory Milestones in Azerbaijan and Philippines.
announcements.ai_summary: Beta Drugs Limited has achieved significant regulatory milestones in Azerbaijan and the Philippines, expanding its international market access. The company's manufacturing facility in Azerbaijan underwent inspection from April 13 to April 17, 2026, and GMP approval is expected within one to two months, facilitating market entry into Azerbaijan and the CIS region. In the Philippines, Beta Drugs received Certificates of Product Registration (CPR) for two brands, marking its first generic approvals in the market and enabling early market presence. Further approvals are anticipated in the Philippines over the next six months, supporting expansion into other Southeast Asian markets like Vietnam and Thailand.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Vikas Lifecare Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Vikas Lifecare Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 21, 2026, approved the Un-audited Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. These results, both standalone and consolidated, were reviewed and recommended by the Audit Committee and have undergone a limited review by the statutory auditors. The company has submitted the Limited Review Reports along with the financial results to the stock exchanges. Additionally, the Board approved seeking members' consent through an addendum to a postal ballot notice for certain corporate actions.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: Sunteck Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: Sunteck Realty Limited has confirmed that there were no deviations or variations in the utilization of funds raised through a preferential issue of warrants for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The statement, reviewed by the Company's Audit Committee on April 21, 2026, indicates that funds amounting to ₹499.999 Crores were raised on December 5, 2025. The report from the monitoring agency, India Ratings & Research Private Limited, confirms no deviation. Specific allocations included ₹188 Crores for acquisition of land and ₹124 Crores for general corporate purposes, with ₹136.25 Crores utilized for land acquisition during the quarter.

announcements.company: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Limited (CMPDIL) has provided a corporate presentation on its integrated financial results for the 4th Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The presentation details key financial figures, including Net Sales of ₹2,316.53 Crores for FY 2025-26, an increase of 10.17% from FY 2024-25. Total Income for FY 2025-26 was ₹2,397.45 Crores, with Total Expenses at ₹1,573.81 Crores. Profit Before Tax stood at ₹823.64 Crores, and Profit After Tax was ₹613.18 Crores for FY 2025-26. The Earnings Per Share (EPS) for FY 2025-26 was ₹8.59. The presentation also breaks down sales and profit analysis by segment, including Planning & Design, Exploration, Geomatics, and Environment.

announcements.subject: Monitoring Agency Report
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the reports of the monitoring agency appointed by the Company i.e. CARE Ratings Limited, in respect of preferential issues of warrants for the quarter ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: 360 ONE WAM LIMITED has submitted the monitoring agency reports from CARE Ratings Limited for the preferential issue of warrants for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. These reports, which were reviewed by the audit committee and the Board of Directors on April 21, 2026, detail the utilization of the gross proceeds amounting to ₹391.59 crore. The reports confirm that there have been no deviations from the stated objects of the preferential issue. The company will make these reports available on its investor relations website.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: The Indian Hotels Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: The Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL), along with its step-down subsidiaries ANK Hotels Private Limited and Pride Hospitality Private Limited, has completed the acquisition of 51% of the share capital in Brij Hospital Private Limited for a total investment of up to ₹222 crores. This acquisition was made through a combination of Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares and partly paid-up equity shares, involving purchases from existing shareholders and a primary investment in Brij. Consequently, Brij Hospital Private Limited has now become a subsidiary of IHCL. This disclosure follows the execution of the Share Subscription and Purchase Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, and Share Purchase Agreement.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Grant of Stock Options under Employee Stock Option Scheme '.
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited's Nomination & Remuneration Committee met on April 21, 2026, and approved the grant of stock options under its Employee Stock Option Schemes. Under the Employee Stock Option Scheme 2025, 8,70,471 equity stock options with a face value of Rs. 10/- each were granted at a price of Rs. 609.75/-. Under the Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022, 32,372 equity stock options with a face value of Rs. 10/- each were granted at the same price of Rs. 609.75/-. Vesting for both grants occurs over three years (30% on the 1st anniversary, 30% on the 2nd, and 40% on the 3rd), with exercise periods of 4 and 5 years respectively from the vesting date.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Rudrabhishek Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange about updates on acquisation
announcements.ai_summary: Rudrabhishek Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange about updates regarding an acquisition. Further details are not provided in the excerpt.

announcements.company: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited
announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of  Effective Date  of Scheme of Amalgamation of Adani Harbour Services Limited, wholly owned subsidiary of the Company with Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited has announced the effective date of the scheme of amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Adani Harbour Services Limited, with itself. This amalgamation, conducted under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013, became effective on April 21, 2026. The company filed a certified copy of the NCLT order sanctioning the scheme with the Registrar of Companies, Gujarat, on the same date. This move consolidates operations and is a significant step in the company's corporate restructuring. Investors should note that this merger is now legally effective.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: JSW Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about material litigation under Regulation 30(4) of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ( Listing Regulations )
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JSW Energy Limited's subsidiary, JSW Mahanadi Power Company Limited (JMPCL), has received a demand for ₹1,447.34 crores towards water charges from the Water Resources Division, Janjgir, Chhattisgarh. This demand primarily pertains to the period before the approval of JMPCL's resolution plan under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The National Company Law Tribunal, Hyderabad, had previously ordered on February 13, 2025, that all crystallised and unclaimed liabilities as of that date would be extinguished. JSW Energy believes this demand is not payable based on judicial precedents and the NCLT order, and JMPCL has challenged the demand before the Hon’ble High Court of Chhattisgarh at Bilaspur.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: PNC Infratech Limited has emerged as the Lowest (L1) Bidder for two National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) projects on a Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM). The aggregate Bid Project Cost (BPC) for these two projects is Rs. 3483.00 crores, exclusive of GST. Project I involves the construction of a 4-lane highway from Barabanki to Mustafabad for Rs. 1728.00 Crores, and Project II involves the construction of a 4-lane highway from Mustafabad to Biswariya for Rs. 1755.00 Crores. Both projects are located in Uttar Pradesh and are to be executed within twenty-four (24) months each. The financial bids were opened on April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has provided an update regarding its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL has informed the stock exchanges about a notice published in newspapers on April 20, 2026. This notice pertains to the final hearing on May 15, 2026, before the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, concerning a Joint Company Scheme Petition. The petition involves the Scheme of Arrangement and Merger by Absorption of Oliver Engineering Private Limited and Adicca Energy Solutions Private Limited with Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Universus Photo Imagings Limited has informed the Exchange about Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015   Order pronounced by Hon'ble National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Universus Photo Imagings Limited has announced that the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) has dismissed the appeal filed by shareholder Mr. Ankit Jain against the company. This dismissal upholds the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated October 15, 2025, which was in favor of Universus Photo Imagings Limited. The company has noted the NCLAT's order and confirmed that the NCLT's decision remains in force. Further details regarding the order are provided in Annexure A, as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: The Karnataka Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Karnataka Bank partners with Pine Labs Limited for Point of Sale (PoS) Services".
announcements.ai_summary: The Karnataka Bank Limited has announced a strategic partnership with Pine Labs Limited to enhance its Point of Sale (PoS) services for customers. This collaboration aims to strengthen digital payment options, particularly for Retail and MSME customers, by providing access to advanced PoS terminals. The partnership is expected to promote digital adoption and drive mutual growth, aligning with the bank's vision of becoming a "Digital Bank of the Future." The announcement was made on April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Mukka Proteins Limited has informed the Exchange about execution of loan agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Mukka Proteins Limited has entered into a loan agreement with its subsidiary, M/s. United Gulf Fishery Products LLC, for an inter-corporate loan up to Rs. 5,00,00,000/- (Rupees Five Crore Only). The loan has a tenure of 5 years from the date of disbursal and carries an interest rate of 8% per annum. The company holds a 68% stake in the borrower, and the transaction is considered an arm's length basis. The loan is unsecured, and the purpose is to meet urgent business commitments. This agreement was executed on April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: CMI Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: CMI Limited has submitted a confirmation certificate received from its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA), Beetal Financial & Computer Services (P) Ltd, for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This certificate is in accordance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. The RTA confirms that securities received from Depository Participants for dematerialization during the quarter were processed and that the security certificates received for dematerialization have been mutilated and cancelled, with the depositories' names substituted in the register of members within 15 days.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Seamec Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation on Deployement Status of Vessel "SEAMEC AGASTYA" - ONHIRE'.
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Limited has informed the stock exchanges that its vessel, "SEAMEC AGASTYA," has been successfully brought back into operation and is now on hire. This follows the completion of necessary technical rectifications. The vessel commenced its on-hire status effective from April 21, 2026, at 12:48 hrs. This update supersedes the company's previous communication dated April 9, 2026, regarding the vessel's off-hire status. The information was officially received by the exchanges on April 21, 2026, at 16:43 hours.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jash Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'TV Interview '.
announcements.ai_summary: Jash Engineering Limited has announced that its Chairman & Managing Director, Mr. Pratik Patel, will participate in a TV interview with ET NOW on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, around 12:30 PM. The interview, titled "All About Your Company," is scheduled to be broadcast on ET NOW. The company has explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) will be discussed during this interview. The schedule for the interview may be subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Modi Naturals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ' Intimation As Per Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015'.
announcements.ai_summary: Modi Naturals Limited has approved the closure of its manufacturing unit located at Village – Lalori Khera, Bareilly Road, Pilibhit, Uttar Pradesh, effective April 21, 2026, due to non-viability of operations. This decision aligns with the company's strategy to consolidate its bulk oil business. Furthermore, the company has approved the sale or disposal of the plant and machinery at this unit, while retaining the land and building. The turnover contributed by this unit was Rs. 16 crores in the last financial year. The closure is not expected to have a material adverse impact as another solvent extraction plant with adequate spare capacity will absorb the processing volume. The sale of plant and machinery does not constitute the sale of an undertaking under Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bartronics India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "KiVi & Avio Smart Market Stack Advance Agri-Fintech Push to Drive Rural Transformation in Maharashtra".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bartronics India Limited (now Avio Smart Market Stack Limited) has issued a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "KiVi & Avio Smart Market Stack Advance Agri-Fintech Push to Drive Rural Transformation in Maharashtra." The press release details a strategic initiative by KiVi (Agrosperity Tech Solutions Private Limited) and Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS) to deploy agri-fintech solutions across key agricultural clusters in Maharashtra, focusing initially on Supa and Patas villages in Pune district. This initiative, part of ASMS's Project AVIO Agritech, aims to build integrated, technology-led solutions for agricultural value chains, rural commerce, and financial infrastructure. The companies are currently conducting field visits and engaging with local stakeholders to assess financial needs and operational challenges to shape scalable, data-driven financial solutions in collaboration with banking partners. The goal is to enhance financial inclusion and improve productivity and economic outcomes for farmers in underserved regions by leveraging digital infrastructure and intelligent data frameworks.

announcements.company: The Orissa Minerals Development Company Limited
announcements.subject: Structural Digital Database
announcements.detail: SDD Certificate for the FY ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Orissa Minerals Development Company Limited (OMDC) has submitted a Structured Digital Database (SDD) certificate for the Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. This submission is made to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited, Bombay Stock Exchange Limited, and The Calcutta Stock Exchange. The certificate, received from Palatasingh & Co., practicing company secretaries, confirms compliance with relevant regulations regarding the SDD. This is for the information and record of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Shree Kishoriju Trading and Investments Pvt Ltd has submitted to  the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulations 31(1) and 31(2) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011/
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Kishoriju Trading and Investments Pvt Ltd has submitted a disclosure to the exchange under Regulations 31(1) and 31(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing pertains to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers and is a mandatory disclosure requirement under these regulations. Further details regarding the specific transaction and its implications are expected to be available in the submitted disclosure document.

announcements.subject: Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about issue of Securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited, through its Finance Committee, has approved the issuance of Unsecured, Redeemable, Rated, Listed, Subordinated Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) constituting Tier II Capital. The issue size aggregates up to ₹250,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees Two Hundred and Fifty Crore only), with a base issue of ₹150,00,00,000 and a green shoe option to retain oversubscription up to ₹100,00,00,000. These NCDs will have a face value of ₹1,00,000 each and will be issued on a private placement basis. The NCDs are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited. The company will pay coupon at a rate of 2% over the applicable coupon rate for any delay in payment of interest or principal. The approval was granted on April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Limited has appointed M/s. Himani R. Patel & Associates, Chartered Accountants (FRN: 145894W), as its Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27. This appointment was approved in the Board Meeting held on April 20, 2026, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The firm is engaged in providing direct tax, indirect tax, audit, and accounting services. This appointment is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Airtel brings wider 5G coverage and faster speeds to millions in Maharashtra & Goa with 3,400+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has deployed over 3,400 new 5G sites across Maharashtra and Goa in the past 12 months, enhancing network experience for over 22 million customers. This expansion covers 36 districts, bringing high-speed coverage to bustling cities, growing towns, and remote rural villages, thereby bridging connectivity gaps in areas like Gadchiroli, Nandurbar, and Sindhudurg. The company is adding more than nine new sites daily, enabling smoother streaming, faster downloads, and reliable digital services for citizens, students, micro-businesses, and tourists. This initiative, announced on April 21, 2026, underscores Airtel's commitment to powering the region's digital growth with a future-ready network.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Shyam Metalics And Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Shyam Metalics Expands Pakuria Operations with Addition of Two Annealing Furnaces (25 MT & 30 MT) and Commissioning of 2300 mm Vertical Foil Separator (LGSS)".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shyam Metalics and Energy Limited has expanded its Pakuria operations by commissioning two new Annealing Furnaces with capacities of 25 MT per annum and 30 MT per annum, respectively. These furnaces are expected to streamline the annealing process, improve production efficiency, and enhance overall product quality. Additionally, the company has commissioned a 2300 mm Vertical Foil Separator (LGSS), which enables accurate separation of Ultra-Light Gauge (ULG) and Light Gauge (LG) foil, catering to specialized customer requirements with thicknesses ranging from 6 to 15 microns. These upgrades, announced on April 21, 2026, aim to strengthen manufacturing capabilities and expand the company's value-added product offerings.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Shadowfax Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Press Release titled "Shadowfax Launches 'Shadowfax 360' Digital Shipping Platform for SMEs and D2C Brands".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shadowfax Technologies Limited has issued a press release on April 21, 2026, announcing the launch of "Shadowfax 360." This new proprietary unified digital shipping portal is designed to empower India's SME and D2C ecosystem by enabling businesses to register and start shipping nationwide in minutes. The platform offers access to an enterprise-grade network covering 15,000+ pincodes across 2,500 cities. It features a transparent flat-rate billing model, integrations with major sales channels, and an AI-driven RTO Predictor. Additionally, it provides the industry's fastest Cash on Delivery (COD) remittance cycles and has no minimum order requirements.

announcements.subject: Product launch
announcements.detail: Shadowfax Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about Launch of Shadowfax 360
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shadowfax Technologies Limited is launching "Shadowfax 360," a proprietary unified digital shipping portal aimed at Small and Medium Enterprises (SME) and Direct to Consumer (D2C) brands. This platform will allow businesses to register and commence shipping within minutes, providing access to a network covering over 15,000 pincodes across 2,500 cities. Key features include a transparent flat-rate billing model, one-click integrations with platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce, and an AI-driven RTO Predictor. The platform also offers fast Cash on Delivery (COD) remittance cycles to support SME liquidity. Shadowfax 360 imposes no minimum order requirements, making enterprise-grade logistics accessible to smaller businesses. The launch was announced on April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: STEEL EXCHANGE INDIA LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Steel Exchange India Limited has strengthened its capital base through an upfront Rs 75 crore infusion by allotting convertible warrants.".
announcements.ai_summary: Steel Exchange India Limited has strengthened its capital base with an upfront infusion of ₹75 crore through the allotment of convertible warrants. This amount was received from M/s India Coke and Power Private Limited and M/s IMR Steel Private Limited (IMR Group) towards subscription of convertible warrants under its preferential issue. This receipt is part of a proposed fund raise of up to ₹350 crore through convertible warrants, approved by the Board of Directors on March 04, 2026. The convertible warrants have a tenure of 18 months from the date of allotment. The investment aims to support operational efficiency, supply chain strengthening, debt reduction, and overall competitiveness, including access to global sourcing of key raw materials.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited has announced a significant operational milestone, becoming India's first listed flex space provider to cross a 10 million sq. ft. operational portfolio. This achievement was marked by the operationalisation of the Tata Intellion Park centre in Mumbai. The company highlights this milestone as a reflection of the structural shift in India's office market towards managed, campus-led solutions for enterprises. Smartworks positions itself as a national-scale enterprise workspace infrastructure platform, enabling multi-city expansion with standardized delivery and consistent experience. This expansion supports the growing steel demand in India and strengthens long-term linkages within the steel value chain.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Power Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation of Step-Down Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Adani Power Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Adani Power Limited (APL) has informed the exchange about the incorporation of a step-down wholly owned subsidiary. Adani Atomic Energy Limited (AAEL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of APL, incorporated Rawatbhata-Raj Atomic Energy Limited (RRAEL) on April 20, 2026, in India. RRAEL will be engaged in generating, transmitting, and distributing power derived from nuclear and/or atomic energy. RRAEL has been incorporated with an authorized capital of Rs. 5,00,000/- divided into 50,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, with AAEL holding 100% of its shareholding. This incorporation is a step towards expanding APL's operations in the nuclear energy sector.

announcements.subject: NLC India Ltd - 513683 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment
announcements.ai_summary: On April 25, 2026, NLC India Limited disclosed that it has been granted composite licenses for the Semhardih Phosphorite & Limestone Block and Raipura Phosphorite & Limestone Block in Balod District, Chhattisgarh. NLCIL emerged as the Preferred Bidder for these blocks in the Tranche-V auction of Critical and Strategic Minerals conducted by the Ministry of Mines on May 27, 2025. The company had submitted Performance Securities on June 10, 2025, and received Letters of Intent (LoI) on September 2, 2025. NLCIL submitted the Scheme of Prospecting on March 30, 2026, and the composite licenses were granted by the Government of Chhattisgarh on April 24, 2026, allowing for detailed geological exploration.

announcements.subject: Kiran Vyapar Ltd - 537750 - Acquisition Of Equity Shares Of Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (Unlisted Public Limited Company) Pursuant To The Scheme Of Amalgamation
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III and other applicable regulation of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure  Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated 11th November 2024 for acquisition of equity shares of Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (Unlisted Public Limited Company) pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: On April 25, 2026, Kiran Vyapar Limited announced the acquisition of equity shares of Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (MSUM) pursuant to a Scheme of Amalgamation. The Scheme of Amalgamation, approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) on March 16, 2026, became effective on April 25, 2026. As a result, Placid Limited, the transferor company, has been dissolved. Kiran Vyapar Limited will receive 8,21,55,375 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each of MSUM in lieu of its shareholding in Placid Limited. Post-amalgamation, Kiran Vyapar Limited will hold 8,97,29,943 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each in MSUM, representing approximately 27.73% of the post-amalgamation paid-up equity share capital, classifying MSUM as an associate of the company.

announcements.subject: UCO Bank - 532505 - Presentation On Financial Results Of The Bank For The Quarter And Year Ended 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Presentation on Financial Results of the Bank for the quarter and year ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: On April 25, 2026, UCO Bank disseminated its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The bank reported a Net Profit of ₹2768 Cr for the fiscal year, marking a 13.21% year-on-year increase. For the quarter, Net Profit stood at ₹801 Cr, an 8.39% increase quarter-on-quarter. Key business highlights include advances of ₹262752 Cr (up 19.44% Y-Y) and deposits of ₹327563 Cr (up 11.59% Y-Y). The bank also reported a Gross NPA of 2.17% and a Net NPA of 0.28%. The presentation also included GDP growth projections from the World Bank, IMF, and RBI, as well as inflation forecasts and external sector data.

announcements.subject: One 97 Communications Ltd - 543396 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Voluntary winding up of Paytm Payments Bank Limited, an associate Company of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: One 97 Communications Ltd has announced the voluntary winding up of its associate company, Paytm Payments Bank Limited (PPBL). This decision follows the cancellation of PPBL's banking license by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) effective April 24, 2026. PPBL's Board of Directors and Shareholders approved the necessary resolutions on April 25, 2026, to initiate the winding-up process as instructed by the RBI. Upon the winding-up order becoming effective, PPBL will cease to be an associate company of One 97 Communications Ltd. The company assures investors that this event is not expected to materially impact its business, operations, or financial condition, as it has no exposure to PPBL and its services will continue to operate uninterrupted.

announcements.company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd
announcements.subject: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd - 500312 - Disclosure Of Event Or Information Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure of event or information under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd (ONGC) has received a "Stop Production Order" dated April 23, 2026, from the Andhra Pradesh Pollution Control Board (APPCB) regarding Well Mori #05 in the Mori Field. The order was received on April 24, 2026. This action follows a well blowout and fire incident on January 5, 2026, and a show cause notice issued to both ONGC and its Production Enhancement Contract (PEC) Operator, M/s Deep Exploration Services Private Limited (M/s DESPL), for environmental violations, including operating without necessary consents and causing air pollution. The APPCB has directed ONGC to immediately stop all further operations at Well Mori-5. ONGC intends to review the order in detail and respond accordingly.

announcements.subject: Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd - 522285 - Announcement Under Regulation 30_Proposed Equity Investment In Solar Power Generation SPV(S) Under Group Captive Multiple Consumers Structure
announcements.detail: Announcement under regulation 30_Proposed equity investment in solar power generation SPV(s) under group captive multiple consumers structure.
announcements.ai_summary: Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd has executed a non-binding term sheet with a Waaree Group entity for an equity investment of approximately Rs. 40.97 Crores. This investment will be made in one or more tranches into a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) for setting up solar power projects. The objective is to procure solar energy on a captive basis for the Company's Steel Plant Division in Raipur and Chhotedongar Iron Ore Mines in Chhattisgarh, aiming to augment green power usage and mitigate grid power tariff volatility. The proposed solar power generation capacity is 104 MWAC / 145.60 MWp, with an anticipated annual consumption of approximately 26.55 Crore Units. This investment is below the disclosure threshold under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd - 500104 - Update On HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited
announcements.detail: This is further to our earlier communication dated April 21, 2026 regarding the unfortunate fire incident that occurred on April 20, 2026 in the Crude Distillation Unit (CDU) of HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL), a Joint Venture Company of Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) has provided an update on its joint venture, HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL), following a fire incident on April 20, 2026. The fire was localized to the Crude Distillation Unit (CDU), affecting 6 heat exchangers and their supporting equipment. Investigations suggest a leakage from a pressure gauge tapping point as the suspected cause. Restoration work is underway and is expected to be completed in 3-4 weeks, with the CDU restart anticipated in the second fortnight of May 2026. Trial production of main products is expected to commence within May 2026.

announcements.subject: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd - 532321 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Zydus receives approval from DCGI to initiate Phase III trials of Zintrodiazine, a novel anti-malarial candidate.
announcements.ai_summary: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd has announced that it has received approval from the Drug Controller General of India (DCGI) to commence Phase III clinical trials for Zintrodiazine. This novel drug candidate is being developed as an anti-malarial treatment. The initiation of Phase III trials marks a significant step forward in the development of this potential new therapy for malaria. Further updates on the trial progress and outcomes are expected as the study progresses.

announcements.subject: JD Cables Ltd - 544524 - Announcement For Business Update Q3 FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: BSE Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015 about the Business Update for the Q3 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JD Cables Limited reported a strong business update for Q4 FY26, with Revenue from Operations reaching ₹12,349.11 Cr, a 51.97% year-on-year increase compared to ₹8,125.80 Cr in Q4 FY25. For the full fiscal year FY26, revenue stood at ₹36,459.15 Cr, up 45.53% from ₹25,052.58 Cr in FY25. The company's order book was approximately ₹515 Cr as of March 2026, with capacity utilization at 82.43% for Unit I and 84.56% for Unit II. JD Cables has also acquired a new facility at Dankuni (approximately 1.18 lakh sq. ft.) and invested ₹10.45 Cr and ₹7.23 Cr in plant and machinery to expand capacity and introduce new product lines like MVCC, AL-59, HTLS, and HT cables. The company anticipates continued growth driven by the execution of large EPC and cable orders, capacity expansion, and increasing vendor approvals.

announcements.subject: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 533573 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited receives USFDA Final Approval for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg. This approval, announced on April 25, 2026, signifies that the approved ANDA is therapeutically equivalent to Novartis Pharmaceuticals Corporation's Gilenya Capsules, 0.5 mg. Fingolimod is indicated for treating relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (MS) in patients aged 10 years and older. The estimated market size for Fingolimod Capsules, 0.5 mg, was US$ 145 million for the twelve months ending December 2025. Alembic Pharmaceuticals now has a cumulative total of 237 ANDA approvals from the USFDA, comprising 219 final and 18 tentative approvals.

announcements.subject: Bharat Dynamics Ltd - 541143 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release- Torpendo Production
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) has achieved a significant milestone in indigenous defence manufacturing with the successful production and delivery of the first Indigenous Wire Guided Heavy Weight Torpedo (WGHWT) to NSTL on April 23, 2026. BDL, as the Development-cum-Production Partner, collaborated with NSTL to realize this advanced naval weapon system, which is now available in practice and combat configurations. This achievement aligns with the Government of India's Aatmanirbhar Bharat initiative and enhances the Indian Navy's operational capabilities with its sophisticated homing, propulsion, and attack abilities. The productionization of this complex underwater weapon system highlights India's growing expertise in cutting-edge naval technologies, a result of collaborative efforts between DRDO (NSTL) and BDL, involving various industrial partners.

announcements.subject: Can Fin Homes Ltd - 511196 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the Press release for the quarter and year ended 31/03/2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Can Fin Homes Limited (CFHL) approved the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, in a meeting held on April 24, 2026. For the fourth quarter of FY26, the company reported a Net Profit of Rs. 346 Crore, a 31% increase from Rs. 265 Crore in the corresponding previous period. The Profit After Tax for the full fiscal year FY26 stood at Rs. 1086 Crore, a 27% growth compared to Rs. 857 Crore in FY25. The loan portfolio grew by 10% to Rs. 42209 Crore as of March 2026, from Rs. 38217 Crore in March 2025, with housing loans comprising 72% of the book. Loan disbursements for the twelve months ended March 31, 2026, reached Rs. 10531 Crore, a 23% Year-on-Year increase from Rs. 8568 Crore in the previous period. The company also reported provisions for expected credit losses of Rs. 400 Crore.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Ltd has filed a Revision Application bearing No. 101 of 2026 before the Hon’ble Revisional Authority, Ministry of Coal, Government of India, on April 24, 2026. This application challenges a Demand Notice dated March 30, 2026, issued by the District Mining Office, Ramgarh, Jharkhand. The notice demands an aggregate amount of ₹1755,10,54,029/- for alleged excess extraction of approximately 1,62,40,399 MT of mineral coal from the Company’s West Bokaro Colliery between FY 2000-01 and FY 2006-07. The company believes the demand lacks justification and substantive basis. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Lodha Developers Ltd - 543287 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Lodha Developers Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a record post-tax Profit of ₹3,431 crores for FY26, a 24% year-on-year increase, with a PAT margin of 20.0%. Pre-sales for FY26 reached a record ₹20,530 crores. Net debt was reduced by approximately ₹800 crores to ₹5,377 crores during the quarter, resulting in a Net Debt-to-Equity ratio of 0.23x. The company added 12 projects with a Gross Development Value (GDV) of approximately ₹60,000 crores during FY26 across MMR, Pune, Bengaluru, and NCR. As of April 1, 2026, the company has GDV amounting to ₹2,00,000 crores available for sale.

announcements.subject: Bandhan Bank Ltd - 541153 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR.
announcements.ai_summary: Bandhan Bank Ltd. has been imposed an aggregate monetary penalty of ₹ 41.80 lakh by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) via an order dated April 21, 2026, received by the bank on April 24, 2026. This penalty stems from a statutory inspection for supervisory evaluation as of March 31, 2025. The penalty includes ₹ 31.80 lakh for contravention of Section 20(1)(b)(iii) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, and ₹ 10.00 lakh for non-compliance with RBI's 'Know Your Customer' directions regarding periodic review of risk categorization of certain accounts. The bank states there is no material impact on its financial or operational activities due to this order.

announcements.subject: Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd - 509732 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: MOU
announcements.ai_summary: Kothari Industrial Corporation Limited (KICL) has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Tvasta Manufacturing Solutions Private Limited on April 24, 2026. This non-binding agreement aims to explore strategic collaboration opportunities in 3D concrete printing and advanced construction technologies across India, the Middle East (GCC), and Australia. The collaboration will leverage KICL's market access and business development capabilities with Tvasta's expertise in 3D printing technology. The parties will jointly evaluate opportunities on a project-by-project basis, with definitive agreements to be executed for specific ventures. The MoU is valid for two years. Further disclosures will be made upon the execution of definitive agreements.

This allotment was made to Clover Technologies Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd - 543257 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited (IRFC) has received a favorable response from the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd (NSE) regarding its request for a waiver of fines. The NSE, in an email dated April 24, 2026, informed IRFC that their request for waiver of fines levied for the quarters from March 2022 to December 2025 has been considered favorably. These fines were related to non-compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations 17(1), 17(2A), 18, 19, 20, and 21, as per SEBI Master Circular No SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sunteck Realty Ltd - 512179 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition

announcements.subject: Cranex Ltd - 522001 - Board Meeting Outcome for Meeting Of Board Of Directors Held Today I.E. Friday, April 24, 2026 Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Please find the attached Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e Friday, 24th April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Cranex Ltd, in their meeting held on April 24, 2026, approved the allotment of 14,50,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at an issue price of Rs. 102 per share. This allotment includes a premium of Rs. 92 per share and is upon conversion of warrants. The allottees include Chaitanya Agrawal (400,000 shares), Amitabh Agrawal (300,000 shares), Securocrop Securities India Private Limited (400,000 shares), Saket Agarwal (150,000 shares), Sangeeta Pareekh (90,000 shares), Vidhi Bansal Gupta (50,000 shares), Vivek Sawhney (40,000 shares), and Amit Kumar (20,000 shares). Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from Rs. 6,57,00,000 to Rs. 8,02,00,000, comprising 80,20,000 equity shares. Additionally, 7,60,000 warrants were forfeited due to non-exercise of conversion rights within the stipulated period.

announcements.subject: R&B Denims Ltd - 538119 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Starlineps Enterprises Ltd - 540492 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements

Under this agreement, Starlineps Enterprises Ltd will grant a loan of up to Rs. 1.45 Crore to Tobias Amines Limited for its business purposes. The loan will carry an interest rate of 8% per annum. The agreement does not include any special rights such as the right to appoint directors or pre-emptive rights on share issuances. announcements.subject: Cryogenic Ogs Ltd - 544440 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: We hereby inform that the board of directors at its meeting held on 24th April, 2026 has approved incorporation of a subsidiary in the name of "Infravolt Engineering Private Limited", for which name approval has been received from the ROC, Ahmedabad.
announcements.ai_summary: Cryogenic Ogs Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 24, 2026, approved the incorporation of a new subsidiary named "Infravolt Engineering Private Limited". The company has received name approval from the ROC, Ahmedabad, for this entity. This subsidiary is intended to expand Cryogenic Ogs Ltd's business operations, focusing on manufacturing precision components for power, energy, and railway infrastructure, and achieving backward integration. The shares of the subsidiary will be subscribed at a face value of ₹10 per share, with Cryogenic Ogs Ltd acquiring a majority stake. The incorporation is subject to further approvals from the Registrar of Companies/Ministry of Corporate Affairs.

announcements.subject: DCB Bank Ltd - 532772 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached Press Release captioned 'DCB Bank announces Financial Year 2026 (FY 2026) Results'
announcements.ai_summary: DCB Bank Ltd announced its audited financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY 2026) and the financial year ended March 31, 2026 (FY2026) on April 24, 2026. The Board of Directors approved these results, which showed a Profit After Tax (PAT) of INR 206 Cr for Q4 FY 2026, a 16% increase from INR 177 Cr in Q4 FY 2025. For FY 2026, PAT was INR 732 Cr, up 19% from INR 615 Cr in FY 2025. The bank reported an 18% year-on-year advances growth and a 21% year-on-year deposits growth. Gross NPA stood at 2.45% and Net NPA at 0.89% as of March 31, 2026, with a Provision Coverage Ratio (PCR) of 78.42%. The Capital Adequacy Ratio was 16.55% as of March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd - 500449 - Commencement Of Commercial Production Of HOCL.
announcements.detail: Commencement of Commercial Production of HOCL Phenol & Cumemen Plant from 24-04-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd (HOCL) has announced the commencement of commercial production at its Phenol & Cumene Plant in Kochi. This follows a temporary shutdown due to a force majeure event. The plant resumed operations and began commercial production effective April 24, 2026. This update is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and follows previous intimations regarding the plant's shutdown. Investors are informed that the plant is now operational.

The transaction is being undertaken on an arm's length basis, although TML is a related party as it is a subsidiary of Trident Lifeline Limited.

announcements.subject: Five-Star Business Finance Ltd - 543663 - Submission Of Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Part A Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Forfeiture Of Upfront Consideration And Lapse Of Share Warrants
announcements.detail: Forfeiture of upfront consideration and lapse of 1,00,000(one lakh) Share Warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Five-Star Business Finance Ltd has informed that 1,00,000 (one lakh) Share Warrants allotted to Mr. Rangarajan Krishnan have lapsed. These warrants were allotted on October 24, 2024, at a price of Rs. 770/- per warrant, convertible into equity shares within 18 months, i.e., by April 23, 2026. Mr. Krishnan paid an upfront consideration of Rs. 1,92,50,000/-, representing 25% of the issue price. As the balance consideration was not remitted within the stipulated period, the warrants have lapsed, and the upfront amount of Rs. 1,92,50,000/- stands forfeited by the Company. This lapse does not result in any change in the paid-up equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd - 531126 - Kati Patang''s Brand Saffron Ledger Awarded Bronze Medal At Prestigious London Beer Competition 2026.
announcements.detail: Kati Patang''s Brand SAFFRON LEDGER awarded BRONZE MEDAL at LONDON BEER COMPETITION 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd has announced that its signature Saffron Lager has been awarded a Bronze Medal at the prestigious London Beer Competition 2026. This award recognizes the brew for its technical excellence, unique 'spiced beer' profile, commercial viability, and the sophisticated integration of Himalayan saffron. This accolade follows the brand's rapid international expansion and reinforces its mission to redefine craft beer globally and showcase the potential of Indian craft beer.

announcements.detail: KPI Green Energy Limited has informed the exchange regarding Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS). The disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: KPI Green Energy Limited has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary named "KPGC Global Corporation IFSC Private Limited" (KGCIPL) in IFSC at GIFT City, Gujarat, on April 23, 2026. KGCIPL has an authorized and subscribed capital of Rs. 2,00,00,000, divided into 20,00,000 equity shares of ₹ 10/- each. announcements.detail: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Post-Offer Advertisement in accordance with Regulation 18(12) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and subsequent amendments thereto for the attention of the public shareholders of Manappuram Finance Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: BC Asia Investments XXV Limited, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), has issued a post-offer advertisement regarding an open offer for up to 24,42,27,387 fully paid-up equity shares of Manappuram Finance Ltd.
