announcements.subject: Bluegod Entertainment Ltd - 539175 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Alteration of the Object Clause ("Main Objects") of the Company to incorporate new sub Clauses.
announcements.ai_summary: Bluegod Entertainment Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on Friday, April 24, 2026, approved the alteration of the company's Object Clause ("Main Objects") to incorporate new sub-clauses aimed at supporting expansion plans. This alteration is subject to shareholder approval through a postal ballot process. The proposed amendments include the ability to carry on business as merchants, manufacturers, wholesalers, traders, commission agents, importers, exporters, buyers, sellers, retailers, suppliers, indenters, packers, movers, preservers, stockists, agents, sub-agents, distributors, and consignors of all kinds of sports equipment, gear, apparel, accessories, and related products for indoor and outdoor games and sports. It also includes the ability to deal and trade in all types of goods, produce, and merchandise, and to conceptualize, establish, and operate inclusive, innovation-driven sports and wellness clubs across India.

announcements.subject: Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd - 500038 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited (BCML) has announced the establishment of a Lactogypsum Processing Plant at Kumbhi, Uttar Pradesh, with an estimated investment of ₹160 crore. This plant will utilize lactogypsum, a by-product of the company's upcoming Polylactic Acid (PLA) project, to manufacture gypsum boards. The facility is expected to produce approximately 76 lakh gypsum boards annually, with commercial production anticipated by December 2027. This initiative is part of BCML's strategy to enhance value creation from by-products and strengthen its integrated operations. The company's Board also approved a fund raise of ₹450 crore via a preferential issue, with promoters participating approximately 43%, to support its next phase of expansion and strategic investments, including the gypsum processing plant.

announcements.subject: Wipro Ltd - 507685 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
Press Release - Wipro Partners with Kongsberg Digital to Transform the Energy & Utilities Sector with Advanced 
AI-Powered Digital Twins
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited, a leading AI-powered technology services and consulting company, has announced a strategic partnership with Kongsberg Digital, a global leader in industrial digitalization. This collaboration aims to transform the Energy & Utilities sector by jointly deploying next-generation AI-powered Digital Twin solutions. The partnership combines Wipro's AI-powered solutions, Industrial-AssetsAI and UpstreamAI, with Kongsberg Digital's Industrial Work Surface. This integration will enable more reliable, efficient, and safer operations across complex asset networks by providing a unified environment for physics-based engineering models, real-time operations, and enterprise AI. The joint offering will function as a digital twin, reflecting real-time conditions and helping organizations simplify digital transformation and strengthen operational resilience. Wipro and Kongsberg Digital will advance a joint roadmap to scale these AI-powered digital twin capabilities.

announcements.subject: Asian Energy Services Ltd - 530355 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Asian Energy Services Ltd has informed the stock exchanges that India Ratings & Research (‘Ind-Ra’) has withdrawn the rating assigned to the company’s bank loan facilities. This withdrawal was made at the request of the company and based on a no-objection certificate from the lenders, in accordance with Ind-Ra’s Policy on Withdrawal of Ratings. The rating for the bank loan facilities, amounting to INR 1,250 million, was withdrawn after being maintained at ‘IND BBB/Rating Watch with Developing Implications’ and ‘IND A3+/Rating Watch with Developing Implications’. The company had previously intimated the stock exchanges on November 04, 2025, regarding ratings assigned by CRISIL Ratings Limited, which remain in force. The withdrawal rating has been published and is accessible via a provided link.

announcements.subject: Bambino Agro Industries Ltd - 519295 - Compliances- Statement Of Deviation & Variation
announcements.detail: Non- applicability certificate of Statement of Deviation & Variation.
announcements.ai_summary: Bambino Agro Industries Ltd has informed the exchange that the statement of deviation or variation under Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to the company. This is because the company has not raised any proceeds from a public issue, including an Initial Public Offer (IPO), Further Public Offer (FPO), or Rights Issue, or preferential issue. Therefore, there are no deviations or variations to report concerning the utilization of such funds. The company has requested that this confirmation be taken on record.

announcements.subject: String Metaverse Ltd - 534535 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: press release
announcements.ai_summary: String Metaverse Limited (formerly Bio Green Papers Limited) has announced the successful completion of its Offer for Sale (OFS), which saw strong participation from both non-retail and retail investors. The OFS for non-retail investors was subscribed to approximately 149% on April 21, 2026, while retail investors subscribed approximately 495% on April 22, 2026. This successful OFS is expected to bring the company into compliance with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements. In recognition of investor support, the Board of Directors will meet on April 29, 2026, to consider a bonus issue for public shareholders, with promoters potentially foregoing their entitlement.

announcements.subject: Lords Mark Industries Ltd - 501261 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Grant Of Manufacturing Licence For Medical Device.
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Lords Mark Industries Limited has been granted a manufacturing license by the Central Licensing Authority under the Medical Devices Rules, 2017, for a high-risk medical device. The license, number MFG/IVD/2023/000058 (Endorsement No. 8), was granted on January 14, 2026, and is for the product "LordsMed HIV 1&2 Self Test" (for Exports only). This device is classified as Class D (In-vitro Diagnostic Device) and has a shelf life of 24 months. The company is among the second in India and ninth globally to receive such a license for this category, with target export markets including Africa, Latin America, and Europe.

announcements.subject: Tata Elxsi Ltd - 500408 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Press Release dated April 24, 2026, titled "JSW Motors and Tata Elxsi Form Strategic Partnership to Power Next-generation Connected & Software-Defined Mobility in India".
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Motors and Tata Elxsi have formed a strategic partnership to establish the JNEXT – JSW NextGen Technology Center in Pune, aimed at developing next-generation software-defined, AI-powered mobility solutions. This alliance focuses on connected and electrified vehicles, including New Energy Vehicles (NEVs) such as electric vehicles (EVs), hybrids, and plug-in hybrids. Tata Elxsi will lead the implementation of the Connected Vehicle Platform and a unified customer experience app for JSW Motors' upcoming vehicle programs, managing the platform from conceptualization to aftersales support. The partnership will leverage capabilities in user experience design, cloud platforms, over-the-air (OTA) frameworks, digital twins, and intelligent solutions like location-based services, cybersecurity, AI/ML analytics, and immersive technologies. This collaboration supports JSW Motors' vision of building a technology-led, new-energy mobility ecosystem in India.

announcements.subject: Intellect Design Arena Ltd - 538835 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intellect Design Arena Limited has informed the Exchange a Press Release Dated 24.04.2026 titled "Deal Win: Myanmar''s Ayeyarwady Farmers Development Bank Public Company Limited selects Intellect''s eMACH.ai Core Banking to drive end-to-end transformation at the Bank".
announcements.ai_summary: Intellect Design Arena Ltd has secured a new deal with Myanmar's Ayeyarwady Farmers Development Bank Public Company Limited (A bank PCL). The bank will implement Intellect's eMACH.ai Core Banking solution to modernize its operations, aiming for a highly agile, scalable, and resilient technology foundation. Additionally, A bank PCL will leverage Intellect’s PF Credit and AI First Lending solutions to significantly enhance its credit processes for loan origination and servicing. ACE Data Systems will serve as the local implementation and support partner, ensuring effective execution in Myanmar. This partnership is expected to accelerate A bank PCL's go-to-market capabilities across core banking, lending, trade finance, and treasury, utilizing a microservices and API-based architecture.

announcements.subject: AK Capital Services Ltd - 530499 - Intimation Regarding Trading And Admission To Dealings Of The Company'S Equity Shares On The National Stock Exchange Of India Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding trading and admission to dealings of the Company''s Equity Shares on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited
announcements.ai_summary: A. K. Capital Services Limited's equity shares have been admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) in the Capital Market segment, effective from April 20, 2026, under the 'Permitted to Trade' category. The designated trading symbol for the company on NSE will be "AKCAPIT". While the company's shares are now traded on NSE, it continues to remain listed only on BSE Limited. This admission to dealings on NSE was communicated via a circular from the National Stock Exchange of India dated April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd - 505850 - Intimation Of Registration Of The Company To Act As Corporate Agent (Composite) With IRDAI Under IRDAI (Registration Of Corporate Agents) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith disclosure under Regulation 30 read with Regulation 51 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd has received approval from the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) to act as a Corporate Agent (Composite). This license, effective from April 24, 2026, allows the company to procure or solicit insurance business for a period of three years, until April 23, 2029. This regulatory approval is significant as it enables the company to offer insurance products to its customers. The company has complied with SEBI Listing Regulations by disclosing this development.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Steel and Japan’s JFE Steel Corporation have formally unveiled their 50:50 joint venture, "JSW JFE Steel Limited," at a ceremony in Sambalpur, Odisha, on April 24, 2026. This new corporate identity encompasses the integrated steel operations at Sambalpur and marks a new phase in their strategic alliance, which began in 2009. The JV aims to combine JSW's operational excellence and project execution capabilities with JFE's world-class technological expertise to create a significant player in India's steel industry, focusing on sustainable steelmaking. The announcement was attended by key dignitaries including the Odisha Chief Minister, Union Ministers, and the Japanese Ambassador.

announcements.subject: Twamev Construction And Infrastructure Ltd - 532738 - Addendum To The Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On 26Th February, 2026
announcements.detail: Addendum to the outcome of the board meeting held on 26th February, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Twamev Construction and Infrastructure Ltd has issued an addendum to the outcome of its Board Meeting held on February 26, 2026. This addendum clarifies that Ms. Suparna Chakrabortti (DIN: 07090308), who was appointed as an Independent Director, has also been inducted as a member of the Audit Committee, Chairperson of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, and a member of the Corporate Social Responsibility Committee. These committee memberships were inadvertently omitted from the initial intimation dated February 26, 2026.

announcements.subject: Prism Johnson Ltd - 500338 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligation And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: The Company informed about the conclusion of  Arbitration proceeding between the Company and M/s Doosan Power Systems India Pvt Ltd in a commercial dispute.
announcements.ai_summary: Prism Johnson Ltd has announced the conclusion of arbitration proceedings with M/s Doosan Power Systems India Pvt Ltd concerning a commercial dispute. An oral Arbitral Award was pronounced on April 16, 2026, in New Delhi, favoring Prism Johnson Ltd. As per the award, M/s Doosan Power Systems India Pvt Ltd is obligated to pay the company an amount of Rs. 8,86,52,116/- by May 27, 2026, to settle all claims, counterclaims, interest, and costs. The company had previously written off this claim amount in earlier years. The written and signed Arbitral Award was received by Prism Johnson Ltd on April 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: SRG Housing Finance Ltd - 534680 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Certificate of payment of Interest and Principal Amount - Apr 2026 - INE559N07066
announcements.ai_summary: The company has confirmed the payment of interest and principal on its secured redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with ISIN INE559N07066. The NCDs, issued through private placement and listed on the stock exchange, have a face value of INR 1,00,000/- each, with an issue size of 2,600 debentures aggregating to INR 26,00,00,000/-, including a Green Shoe Option of INR 1,00,00,000/-. The interest payment due on April 24, 2026, amounting to INR 21,25,243/-, was made on the same date, with TDS deducted. A partial redemption of NCDs by face value on a pro-rata basis occurred on April 24, 2026, as part of a monthly redemption plan. The amount redeemed was INR 39,39,393.94/-, leaving an outstanding amount of INR 23,63,63,636.36/-. The last interest payment was made on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: DHP India Ltd - 531306 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Todays Board Meeting Dated 24/04/2026 And Todays All Four Committees Meetings Of Annual Meet Of Statutory Requirement Related To Year Ended 31/03/2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Todays Board Meeting dated 24/04/2026 and Todays all Four Committees Meetings of Annual Meet of Statutory requirement related to Year ended 31/03/2026
announcements.ai_summary: DHP India Ltd held its Board of Directors meeting on April 24, 2026, following meetings of its four committees: Stakeholders Committee, Nomination & Remuneration Committee, Corporate & Social Responsibility (CSR) Committee, and Audit Committee. The Nomination & Remuneration Committee recommended an increase in employee remuneration for FY2026-27, which was approved by the Board. The Board also approved the commencement of Statutory Audit, Tax Audit, Cost Audit, and Secretarial Audit for FY2025-26. These outcomes are related to the annual general affairs for the year ended March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: ICICI Bank Ltd - 532174 - Transcript Of The Call With Media And Of Earnings Call With Analysts And Investors
announcements.detail: Please find attached the transcripts of the call with media and of earnings call with the analysts and investors on the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Bank Ltd has released transcripts of its media call and earnings call with analysts and investors. These transcripts pertain to the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The documents have been uploaded to the bank's website and can be accessed via provided links. The company also included a disclaimer regarding forward-looking statements, outlining potential risks and uncertainties that could affect future operating results.

announcements.subject: Alkyl Amines Chemicals Ltd-$ - 506767 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Alkyl Amines Chemicals Ltd, has issued an update regarding its production of Ammonia-based products. This announcement follows a previous disclosure on March 16, 2026, concerning disruptions caused by the geopolitical conflict in the Middle East, which had impacted logistics and the global supply chain for crude oil and petrochemicals. While the overall ammonia supply situation remains uncertain and dynamic, it has improved sufficiently to allow for a gradual restart of production for ammonia-based products. This information is provided for the record and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Patel Retail Ltd - 544487 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Patel Retail Limited has informed the Exchange about Press Release dated Friday, April 24,2026 with respect to opening of Patel''s R MART Store No. 51.
announcements.ai_summary: Patel Retail Limited has announced the opening of its 51st Patel’s R Mart store, located at Ganesh Nagar, Rasayani, Khalapur, Raigad. This opening, effective April 24, 2026, strengthens the company's presence in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR) and aims to increase accessibility to quality groceries and daily essentials in suburban and emerging urban markets. The company highlights its integrated sourcing, packaging, processing, and logistics capabilities, which enable efficient scaling of operations and ensure product quality, affordability, and customer convenience. This expansion aligns with Patel Retail Limited's cluster-based growth strategy and its commitment to expanding organized retail accessibility in high-potential residential and semi-urban clusters.

announcements.subject: Seamec Ltd - 526807 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation of Execution of Addendum with Larsen & Toubro for extension of Charter of Vessel "SEAMEC GLRIOUS"
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Limited has executed an Addendum on April 23, 2026, with Larsen & Toubro Limited to extend the charter hire period for its vessel, "SEAMEC GLORIOUS." The extension is valid until May 15, 2026, with an option for the charterer to extend on a day-to-day basis for an additional 15 days. The total value of this extension period is Rs. 6,54,07,500, exclusive of GST. This Addendum is a normal course of business transaction between the two parties. This extension is a continuation of the original Charter Party dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Incorporation Of A Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Incorporation of a Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has announced the incorporation of a new subsidiary company, Sun Pharma America, Inc., in the United States of America on April 23, 2026. This incorporation is part of the company's internal group structuring. The subsidiary operates within the pharmaceutical industry. The initial capital consideration for this newly set-up company was in cash. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are required for this intimation, and there is no applicable indicative time period for completion as it pertains to the establishment of the subsidiary.

announcements.subject: Apcotex Industries Ltd - 523694 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Revised Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Acquisition of shares of M/s. Opera Vayu (Narmada) Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Apcotex Industries Limited has completed the acquisition of 33,75,000 equity shares, representing 5.12% of the total voting capital, in Opera Vayu (Narmada) Private Limited for a total value of INR 3,37,50,000. This acquisition was finalized on April 23, 2026. The objective of acquiring shares in this Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) is to facilitate the captive consumption of hybrid power generated by Opera Vayu (Narmada) Private Limited. The company has requested that this revised intimation supersede any previous submissions regarding this matter. No further approvals are indicated as pending for this transaction.

announcements.subject: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd - 533271 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail:
Ashoka Buildcon Limited (the Company) informs that the Company had submitted bid to the Ministry of Energy and Water, the Republic of Angola, (the Authority) for the Project viz. Electricity Sector Improvemenet and Access Project (the Project).

Further to update that the Company has received Letter of Contract Acceptance for the said Project.
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd has received a Letter of Contract Acceptance from the Ministry of Energy and Water, the Republic of Angola, for the 'Electricity Sector Improvement and Access Project'. The project involves the Design, Supply, Installation, and Commissioning of the Rehabilitation of Distribution Networks for Lot 5 Luanda City 2. The accepted bid cost for this international contract is USD 72,359,639.46. The execution of this contract is expected to be completed within 24 months. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Patel Retail Ltd - 544487 - Patel Retail Limited Has Informed The Exchange About Opening Of 51 Patel''s R Mart Store.
announcements.detail: Patel Retail Limited has informed the Exchange about Opening of 51 Patel''s R Mart Store.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Patel Retail Limited has opened its 51st Patel's R Mart store, located at Survey No 34 B/6 Ganesh Nagar Rees Mohopada Khalapur, Khalapur, Raigad, Maharashtra 410206. This expansion brings the total number of stores operated by the company to fifty-one as of April 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd-$ - 507205 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: House of TI, Tilaknagar Industries Luxury Portfolio, Wins four awards at the London Spirits Competition.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd's luxury portfolio, operating under "House of TI," has won four awards at the London Spirits Competition. Monarch Legacy Edition Brandy and Seven Islands Pure Malt Whisky both received Gold medals, while Amara Vodka secured a Silver medal, and Samsara Pink Gin was awarded a Bronze medal. These accolades, judged by a panel of industry experts, reinforce the strength of House of TI's premium and luxury spirits. The portfolio combines established brands like Monarch and Seven Islands with strategic investments in craft spirits, reflecting a dual approach to building world-class Indian spirits and supporting emerging craft players.

announcements.subject: Greaves Cotton Ltd - 501455 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
Please find enclosed herewith Press Release issued by Greaves Electric Mobility Limited, subsidiary of the Company , with the heading, "Greaves Electric Mobility strengthens Ampere Magnus portfolio with the New Magnus Neo"

Kindly take the same on record.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Greaves Electric Mobility Limited, a subsidiary of Greaves Cotton Ltd, has launched the all-new Magnus Neo under its Ampere electric two-wheeler brand. This new variant is designed to offer a lighter, smoother, and more comfortable riding experience, with a focus on seat ergonomics and rider comfort for everyday use. The vehicle features a lightweight construction for easier maneuverability and a 10-inch rear tire for improved control in city conditions. The new Magnus Neo aims to make electric mobility more practical and accessible for a wider range of riders by addressing practical riding needs and enhancing rideability through ergonomic design and a new wheel and motor configuration for smoother acceleration and stability.

announcements.subject: Tamboli Industries Ltd - 533170 - Admission & Trading Permission On National Stock Exchange (NSE). Regulation 30 Of LODR, 2015.
announcements.detail: Admission & Trading permission on National Stock Exchange (NSE). Regulation 30 of LODR, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Tamboli Industries Ltd has received admission and trading permission on the National Stock Exchange (NSE). This approval is effective from April 20, 2026, as per NSE's Listing Department Circular Ref. No. NSE/CML/73797 dated April 17, 2026. The company's securities will now be permitted to trade on the NSE portal. The trading symbol for Tamboli Industries Ltd on the NSE will be 'TAMBOLIIN'. This development is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Brightcom Group Ltd - 532368 - OMS Operational Updates
announcements.detail: OMS Operational Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Brightcom Group Ltd has announced a significant operational milestone achieved by its subsidiary, OMS. OMS has successfully completed a large-scale programmatic infrastructure deployment in partnership with Azerion, a global digital entertainment and media platform. This project involved scaling Azerion's publisher network from approximately 11 domains to over 100+ domains within a six-month period. OMS utilized its proprietary infrastructure, including independently managed data centers and AI-driven systems, to handle high-volume traffic expansion without performance degradation. The deployment enabled high-throughput query handling, seamless onboarding of multiple domains, and stable performance. By operating its own infrastructure, OMS optimized cost structures and improved operational margins. The company also deployed AI-powered monitoring systems for continuous performance tracking and optimization. This achievement reinforces Brightcom Group's focus on infrastructure-led competitive advantages and AI-driven programmatic capabilities.

announcements.subject: Reliance Industries Ltd - 500325 - Media Release - "TIME To Bring 'TIME100 Next' To India For The First Time In Partnership With Reliance.'
announcements.detail: Please find attached a media release by the Company, titled "TIME to bring ''TIME100 Next'' to India for the First Time in Partnership with Reliance."
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Industries Ltd has entered into a partnership with TIME to launch "TIME100 Next India" for the first time. This initiative will recognize 100 emerging Indian leaders across various sectors, including arts, science, business, sports, and advocacy. The list will be curated by TIME editors and will be published online, culminating in a gala event at the Nita Mukesh Ambani Cultural Centre in Mumbai in December 2026. This collaboration signifies Reliance's commitment to empowering the next generation of talent and leadership in India, aligning with their vision of bringing global best practices to India and showcasing Indian talent to the world.

announcements.subject: JTL Industries Ltd - 534600 - Receipt Of Trading Approval By Subsidiary Company_JTL Defence Limited
announcements.detail: JTL Defence Limited (Erstwhile RCI Industries & Technologies Limited) a subsidiary of the Company has received Trading Approval from the BSE Limited for 1,05,26,315 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each and same shall be availbable for trading from 27.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: JTL Industries Ltd has announced that its subsidiary, JTL Defence Limited (formerly RCI Industries & Technologies Limited), has received trading approval from BSE Limited. The approval is for 1,05,26,315 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares will be available for trading on the exchange starting from Monday, April 27, 2026. The trading approval covers new equity shares issued on account of capital reduction (5,26,315 shares) and on a preferential basis (1,00,00,000 shares). JTL Defence Limited will be listed and admitted to dealings on the BSE under the XT Group and will continue to trade in the Trade-to-Trade segment.

announcements.subject: Aayush Wellness Ltd - 539528 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Aayush Wellness Limited launches "Liver Detox Tablets" to capture growing demand in Preventive Wellness and Lifestyle Disease Management.
announcements.ai_summary: Aayush Wellness Limited has launched "Liver Detox Tablets," a herbal formulation aimed at supporting liver health and addressing the growing prevalence of lifestyle-related liver disorders. This launch represents a strategic expansion of the company's preventive healthcare portfolio and aligns with its focus on condition-led wellness categories. The new product is designed to naturally detoxify, protect, and regenerate liver cells, catering to increasing health awareness and demand for daily preventive solutions. The company believes this move positions it to capitalize on the large and growing wellness opportunity driven by lifestyle disorders and consumer preference for daily health supplements.

announcements.subject: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd - 530965 - Disclosure Under Chapter XIV - Centralized Database For Corporate Bonds/ Debentures Of SEBI Operational Circular Dated August 10, 2021 (Updated As On April 13, 2022)
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Chapter XIV- Centralized Database for Corporate Bonds/Debentures of SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021 (Updated as on April 13, 2022) for the year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Oil Corporation Limited has submitted a disclosure under Chapter XIV-B of the SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021, for its debt securities issued through private placement for the year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosure includes listing details for seven series of debt securities with ISINs INE242A08437, INE242A08502, INE242A08528, INE242A08536, INE242A08544, INE242A08551, and INE242A08569. These securities were allotted between October 22, 2019, and January 6, 2025, and listed on NSE & BSE. The listing quantities range from 15,000 to 250,000 units. The company has also provided hyperlinks to the respective listing notifications on the BSE website for each ISIN.

announcements.subject: Larsen & Toubro Ltd - 500510 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: L&T Enters Industrial Electronics Segment
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro (L&T) has announced its entry into the business-to-business (B2B) industrial electronics segment with the commencement of manufacturing operations at its Coimbatore campus in Tamil Nadu. This new business vertical, named L&T Electronic Products & Systems (LTEPS), will be headquartered in Bengaluru. Initially, two manufacturing lines have been commissioned to provide electronics manufacturing services to both Indian and global clients. L&T Chairman & Managing Director S N Subrahmanyan stated that this move aligns with the company's 'Lakshya 2031' aspiration to deepen technology leadership and enhance India's self-reliance in critical manufacturing. LTEPS will leverage L&T's expertise in Strategic Electronics to develop and manufacture industrial electronic products and systems across domains like power electronics, mobility, industrial robotics & automation, communication platforms, and electronics systems design & manufacturing (ESDM). Future expansion plans include a 40-acre zone in Coimbatore to cover the entire industrial electronics value chain.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Construction Company Ltd - 500185 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We are enclosing a copy of the Press Release being issued by the Company today in this regard. We request you to take the same on record.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Construction Company Ltd (HCC) has won a contract valued at approximately ₹2,917 crore from the City and Industrial Development Corporation of Maharashtra Limited (CIDCO). The contract is for the construction of a 22.21 km raw water tunnel and a 250 MLD water treatment plant in Raigad. This project has been awarded to the LCESPL-HCC Joint Venture, with HCC responsible for executing works estimated at approximately ₹1,100 crore. The scope includes tunnel construction using Tunnel Boring Machine (TBM) technology and the design, build, supply, erection, testing, and commissioning of the water treatment plant, along with 15 years of operation and maintenance under a Design, Build and Operate (DBO) model. This project is crucial for CIDCO's strategy to enhance water supply infrastructure for Navi Mumbai and surrounding areas.

announcements.subject: Atul Auto Ltd-$ - 531795 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Atul Auto and Exponent Signed Contract/ MOU for the manufacture and supply of 15000 electric three-wheelers in a period of 3 years from state approval to vehicles.
announcements.ai_summary: Atul Auto Ltd has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Exponent Energy Private Limited for the manufacturing and supply of 15,000 electric three-wheelers. Under this agreement, Atul Auto will act as the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) and will integrate Exponent's battery system and powertrain into the vehicles. The collaboration covers manufacturing, supply, sales, servicing, and customer support. The volume commitment of 15,000 electric three-wheelers is for a period of three years, extendable by an additional six months, from the date of state transport authority approvals. This MOU is expected to accelerate Atul Auto's presence in the electric vehicle segment.

announcements.subject: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd - 532922 - Disclosure Under The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 regarding IPO of EAAA India Alternatives Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd has received an observation letter from the Securities & Exchange Board of India (SEBI) on April 23, 2026, for the proposed Initial Public Offering (IPO) of its wholly-owned subsidiary, EAAA India Alternatives Limited. The IPO will include an Offer for Sale (OFS) by Edelweiss Securities & Investments Private Limited (ESIPL), not exceeding ₹15,000 million. The receipt of SEBI's observations allows EAAA India Alternatives Limited to proceed with the IPO within the next 12 months, subject to market conditions, necessary approvals, and other regulatory compliances. This disclosure is made in continuation of the company's letter dated January 20, 2026.

announcements.subject: LTM Ltd - 540005 - Submission Of Weblink Of Audio Recording Of Earnings Conference Call Held On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: LTM Limited (formerly LTIMindtree Limited) has informed the stock exchanges that the audio recording of its Q4FY-26 Earnings Conference Call, held on Thursday, April 23, 2026, is now available on the company's website. This follows their previous intimation on April 6, 2026. Investors can access the recording at the provided link: https://www.ltm.com/investors/financial-results/. The company has requested that this intimation be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Gujarat Themis Biosyn Ltd - 506879 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer to the attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Themis Biosyn Ltd (GTBL) has entered into an asset purchase agreement to acquire Sanofi’s global anti-tuberculosis (TB) and anti-infective portfolio. This strategic move aims for global forward integration and involves 13 established branded generic products with sales of approximately EURO 62 million for the year ended 2025. The acquisition includes marketing authorizations, brands, regulatory dossiers, and inventory, but excludes manufacturing facilities and employees, making it an asset-light expansion. The transaction is subject to antitrust and foreign direct investment approvals in relevant jurisdictions. This acquisition is expected to significantly strengthen GTBL's global pharmaceuticals platform and its presence in the anti-infective segment, providing immediate access to regulated markets.

announcements.subject: Tata Capital Ltd - 544574 - Audio Recording Of Media Call And Earnings Conference Call With Analysts And Investors For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Audio Recording of Media call and Earnings Conference call with Analysts and Investors for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 held on April 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Capital Limited has made available the audio recording of its media call and earnings conference call. This call, held on April 23, 2026, discussed the company's audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Investors and analysts can access this recording on the company's official website at https://www.tatacapital.com/about-us/investor-information-and-financials.html. This provides an opportunity for stakeholders to review the detailed financial performance and management commentary. The company has complied with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by making this information public.

announcements.subject: Hari Govind International Ltd - 531971 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change of Company Name
announcements.detail: Submission of new Certificate of Incorporation pursuant to the Name change of the Company from "Hari Govind International Limited" to "Popees Baby Care India Limited".
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Themis Biosyn Ltd has announced a significant change in its corporate identity. The Ministry of Corporate Affairs has officially approved the company's name change from "Hari Govind International Limited" to "Popees Baby Care India Limited". This change is effective from April 22, 2026, as evidenced by the fresh Certificate of Incorporation received on the same date. The company is now operating under its new name, Popees Baby Care India Limited. As per regulations, the company must display its old name, Hari Govind International Limited, alongside its new name for a period of two years. Investors should note this name change for all future correspondence and record-keeping.

announcements.subject: Sheela Foam Ltd - 540203 - Sale Of Fraction Share In Open Market In Pursuant Of Merger
announcements.detail: Sale of 575 fraction shares in open market in pursuant of merger of KEL into SFL
announcements.ai_summary: Sheela Foam Ltd announced on April 23, 2026, the sale of 575 fractional shares in the open market. This sale is a consequence of the composite scheme of arrangement involving the amalgamation of Kurlon Enterprise Limited (KEL) into Sheela Foam Limited (SFL). The fractional entitlements arising from the share exchange ratio have been consolidated and allotted to a Trust appointed by the Board. This Trust sold the consolidated shares on April 22, 2026. The net proceeds from this sale, after deducting charges and taxes, will be distributed to the eligible shareholders of Kurlon Enterprise Limited based on their respective fractional entitlements.

announcements.company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust
announcements.subject: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust - 543655 - Reg 21: Disclosure of valuation report received by the manager
announcements.detail: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Full Valuation report subsequent to material development FY ended 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, EAAA Real Assets Managers Limited, the Investment Manager for Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust, announced that its Board of Directors has taken on record the Valuation Report issued by Mr. Jayesh Kumar Shah. This report is in connection with the proposed acquisition of SEPL Energy Private Limited. The valuation report was received on April 15, 2026, and is enclosed with the announcement. This submission is in accordance with Regulation 21(6) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014.

announcements.subject: Lux Industries Ltd - 539542 - Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, the Board of Directors of Lux Industries Ltd held a meeting where it was informed that the members of the promoter and promoter group from the Todi Family have entered into a Family Settlement Agreement (FSA). The company is not a party to this FSA. The Board has accorded its in-principle approval for a scheme of demerger, subject to regulatory and stakeholder approvals. This demerger contemplates separating the company's businesses into three verticals. Verticals A and C will be demerged into two new listed companies, led by the AKT Family and KKT Family, respectively. Vertical B will remain with Lux Industries Ltd, managed by the PKT Family. Following this, the AKT and KKT families will cease to hold management or control rights in Lux Industries Ltd, while the PKT family will continue to manage and control the company.

announcements.subject: Choice International Ltd - 531358 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Choice International Ltd issued a press release on April 23, 2026, announcing its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For the fourth quarter of FY26, the company reported a total revenue of Rs. 314 Cr, a 23.06% increase year-on-year, and a Profit After Tax (PAT) of Rs. 68 Cr, a 26.76% increase year-on-year. For the full fiscal year FY26, total revenue stood at Rs. 1145 Cr, up 24.18% YoY, and PAT reached Rs. 238 Cr, a significant 46.21% increase YoY. Key business highlights include a 59% revenue contribution from Stock Broking, 28% from Advisory, and 13% from NBFC for FY26. The company also saw a 16% YoY growth in Demat Accounts to 12.63 Lakhs and a 28% YoY growth in Client Assets for Stock Broking to Rs. 52,482 Cr. The AUM for Equity MF surged by 35% YoY to Rs. 2311 Cr, and the total loan book for the NBFC segment reached Rs. 800 Cr.

announcements.subject: Krystal Integrated Services Ltd - 544149 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Advait Krystal Solar Energy SPV Private Limited, an associate company of Krystal Integrated Services Ltd, entered into a Power Purchase Agreement with the Directorate of Medical Education & Research, Mumbai, and the Directorate of Ayush (M.S) Medical Education & Drug Department, Mumbai. This agreement is for the supply of power. The details of the agreement, including the counterparties and the date of execution, have been disclosed as per SEBI Listing Regulations. This development is for the information and records of the exchange.

announcements.subject: Gujarat Gas Ltd - 539336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - titled Gujarat Gas Limited Supports Revival of Morbi Ceramic Industry with Assured Gas Supply and Pricing.
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Gas Limited (GGL) has issued a press release on April 23, 2026, reaffirming its commitment to supporting the revival of the Morbi ceramic industry. Amidst recent geopolitical disruptions that led to increased raw material costs and restrictions on industrial propane usage, GGL ensured uninterrupted natural gas supply and price stability. The company proactively sourced gas from non-Middle East markets to maintain supply as per government directives. GGL's efforts, including engaging with the Morbi Ceramic Association, have facilitated the gradual resumption of industrial activity in Morbi. Gas consumption has increased significantly from approximately 0.36 mmscmd serving 83 units on March 31, 2026, to approximately 2.70 mmscmd serving 290 units on April 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Gamco Ltd - 540097 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulation ,2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Gamco Ltd has received a Confirmation Order dated April 22, 2026, from the Regional Director (RD), Eastern Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Kolkata. This order approves the Scheme of Amalgamation between Complify Trade Private Limited (Transferor Company) and Gamco Limited (Transferee Company) under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013. The Transferor Company will be dissolved without winding up pursuant to this order. The Scheme will become effective upon the filing of the certified copy of the Order with the Registrar of Companies (ROC) by filing Form INC-28. The appointed date is as per the Scheme of Amalgamation, and the employees of the Transferor Company will be entitled to the same facilities and benefits as employees of the Transferee Company without any break in service.

announcements.subject: Havells India Ltd - 517354 - Intimation Of Grant And Vesting
announcements.detail: Intimation of Grant and Vesting of Shares under employees stock purchase schemes of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Havells India Limited announced the vesting of shares to eligible employees under its employee stock purchase plans for the financial year 2025-26. This action was taken based on the Nomination and Remuneration Committee Meeting held on April 21, 2026. Under the Havells Employees Long Term Incentive Plan 2014, 1,14,191 shares of Re. 1/- each were vested. Additionally, 1,50,000 shares of Re. 1/- each were vested under the Havells Employees Stock Purchase Scheme 2015, and 40,619 shares of Re. 1/- each were vested under the Havells Employees Stock Purchase Scheme 2016. The exercise period for these vested shares is 30 days from the date of vesting.

announcements.subject: Birla Corporation Ltd - 500335 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Commencement Of Coal Mining Operations - Corrigendum
announcements.detail: In continuation of our earlier intimation of even date, please find enclosed the corrigendum issued by the Company in the above subject matter.
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Corporation Limited has issued a corrigendum on April 23, 2026, regarding its earlier intimation about the commencement of coal mining operations. The company clarified that the figure of 9.44 Million Tonnes, previously stated as the Annual Production Capacity of the Bikram Coal Mine at Burhar, Shahdol, Madhya Pradesh, actually represents the Extractable Reserves of the mine. The Peak Rated Capacity of the mine is 0.36 Million Tonnes Per Annum (MTPA). This correction is to ensure accurate information is available to stakeholders and has been uploaded to the company's website.

announcements.subject: Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd - 539799 - Intimation Of Acquisition Of Shares By Shareholder(S)
announcements.detail: Intimation of acquisition of shares by shareholder(s)
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Bharat Wire Ropes Limited announced that Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited and Lloyds Enterprises Limited have acquired shares in the company. Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited acquired 20,00,000 shares, representing 2.91% of the total voting capital, increasing their total shareholding to 23,00,000 shares, or 3.35%. Lloyds Enterprises Limited acquired 16,46,875 shares, representing 2.40% of the total voting capital, bringing their total shareholding to 16,46,875 shares, or 2.40%. These acquisitions were made through market purchases. Prior to this, Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited held 3,00,000 shares (0.44%) and 14,569 warrants (0.02%). The disclosures were made under Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Mahindra Logistics Ltd - 540768 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monitoring Agency Report
announcements.detail: Detailed disclosure is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Logistics Ltd has submitted its Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as required by SEBI regulations. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, pertains to the utilization of funds raised through a Rights Issue of equity shares made on July 17, 2025. The aggregate amount of the Rights Issue was ₹749.27 crore. The monitoring agency has confirmed that the proceeds from the Rights Issue have been utilized appropriately for the objects stated in the offer document. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 32(6) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and Regulation 82(4) of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2018. The report is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Digispice Technologies Ltd-$ - 517214 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Order dated April 22, 2026 passed by Hon''ble NCLT for convening meeting of equity shareholders of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: DigiSpice Technologies Limited has received an order dated April 22, 2026, from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Principal Bench, New Delhi. The order directs DigiSpice Technologies Limited to convene a meeting of its equity shareholders, through Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means, as part of the Scheme of Amalgamation by way of merger. This merger involves DigiSpice Technologies Limited, Spice Money Limited, E-Arth Travel Solutions Private Limited, and Vikasni Fintech Private Limited. The NCLT's order is a step towards the approval of this amalgamation scheme.

announcements.subject: Prime Fresh Ltd - 540404 - Intimation Regarding Receipt Of Approval Letter Received From The Stock Exchange For Listing Of 1,18,849 Equity Shares Of Rs. 10/- Each At A Premium Of Rs. 154/- Issued To Promoter On A Preferential Basis Pursuant To Conversion Of Warrants.
announcements.detail: Intimation Regarding Receipt of Approval Letter Received From The Stock Exchange for Listing of 1,18,849 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 154/- Issued to promoter on a Preferential Basis Pursuant to Conversion of Warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Prime Fresh Ltd has received approval from the stock exchange for the listing of 1,18,849 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, issued at a premium of Rs. 154/- per share. These shares were issued to the promoter on a preferential basis pursuant to the conversion of warrants. The total issue price per share is Rs. 164/- (Rs. 10/- face value + Rs. 154/- premium). The company has been advised by the exchange to ensure compliance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations and to file the shareholding pattern in XBRL mode if there is a change exceeding two percent of the total paid-up share capital.

announcements.subject: GV Films Ltd - 523277 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E. Thursday, 23Rd April, 2026

announcements.ai_summary: GV Films Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 23, 2026, resolved to avail financial assistance of up to INR 95 Crores in one or more tranches from M/s Sanctum Trading Corporation Private Limited. The terms and conditions of this financial assistance are to be finalized. The Board also authorized the directors and/or officers of the Company to make all necessary filings with the Registrar of Companies, including Form CHG-1 for the creation of a charge, as well as with the relevant stock exchange(s), SEBI, and any other statutory or regulatory authority.

announcements.subject: Union Bank of India - 532477 - Audio Recording Of Post Earnings Call
announcements.detail: Audio Recording of post Earning Call
announcements.ai_summary: Union Bank of India has made available the audio recording of its Post Earnings Call, which was held on April 23, 2026. This call was in relation to the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the Quarter/Year ended March 31, 2026. The recording can be accessed via the link provided on the bank's website: https://www.unionbankofindia.bank.in/pdf/10042205.mp3. This disclosure is made in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd - 531035 - Outcome Of Fund-Raising Committee Meeting Held Today, I.E. April 23, 2026.
announcements.detail: Conversion of Warrants into equity shares as per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd's Fund-Raising Committee, in a meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the allotment of 31,25,000 Equity Shares of face value Re. 1/- each at an issue price of Rs. 81/- each (including a premium of Rs. 80/- each). This allotment is consequent to the conversion of an equal number of warrants, previously issued on a preferential basis, by Just Right Life Limited, an entity belonging to the Promoter/Promoter Group Category. The company's issued and paid-up capital has increased to Rs. 20,98,19,160/-, comprising 20,98,19,160 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Sarla Performance Fibers Ltd-$ - 526885 - Chairman & Managing Director Note
announcements.detail: Mr. Krishna Jhunjhunwala, Chairman and Managing Director of the Company (DIN: 00097175) - communication to the Shareholders of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Sarla Performance Fibers Ltd has divested its investment in preference shares of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Sarlaflex Inc., located in the United States. The subsidiary, incorporated to expand global manufacturing, suspended operations in December 2017 due to unforeseen business and market circumstances, resulting in a negative net worth as of March 31, 2026. This divestment has led to a recognized loss of ₹7,713.26 lakhs, of which ₹111.59 lakhs was received as sale consideration. The company expects this to improve its Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) by removing non-productive capital and strengthening the balance sheet. The transaction is largely a non-cash accounting adjustment and does not impact operational liquidity or current cash flows.

announcements.subject: Star Cement Ltd - 540575 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: We hereby inform you that M/s Star Cement North East Limited (SCNEL), subsidiary of the Company has acquired 100% shareholding of M/s Jaitaran Renewable Power Private Limited (JRPPL) from its shareholders. Consequently, JRPPL has became a wholly-owned subsidiary of SCNEL and a step down subsidiary of Star Cement Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Star Cement Limited's subsidiary, Star Cement North East Limited (SCNEL), has acquired 100% of the shareholding in Jaitaran Renewable Power Private Limited (JRPPL) from its shareholders. This acquisition makes JRPPL a wholly-owned subsidiary of SCNEL and a step-down subsidiary of Star Cement Limited. JRPPL has an authorized share capital of Rs. 10.00 Lakhs (1,00,000 shares of Rs.10/- each) and a paid-up share capital of Rs. 0.20 Lakhs. The company's turnover for 2025 was Nil. This acquisition is intended to diversify Star Cement's business into the renewable energy sector. No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for this acquisition.

announcements.subject: Power Finance Corporation Ltd - 532810 - Assumption Of Charge By Shri Rajesh Kumar Agarwal (DIN: 09699001) As Director (Finance) On The Board Of Power Finance Corporation Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Power Finance Corporation Ltd has announced that Shri Rajesh Kumar Agarwal (DIN: 09699001) has assumed charge as Director (Finance) on the Board of the company on April 23, 2026. This appointment is pursuant to an order from the Ministry of Power, Government of India, and he will serve for a period of five years or until further orders. Shri Agarwal brings over 31 years of experience in the Power and Financial sectors, holding a Bachelor's degree in Commerce (Honours) and is a Member of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India.

announcements.subject: United Breweries Ltd-$ - 532478 - Media Release - India Operations
announcements.detail: Media Release by Heineken N.V. (Promoter Group) on India Operations
announcements.ai_summary: United Breweries Ltd announced a media release by its promoter group, Heineken N.V., regarding India operations for the Q4-January-March 2026 trading update. The release, published on April 23, 2026, states that net revenue in India grew by a low-single-digit, and total volume grew by a mid-single-digit. The premium segment saw mid-teen growth, led by Kingfisher Ultra. Kingfisher Smooth was also launched to reinforce Kingfisher's leadership in the mainstream segment.

announcements.subject:
CIE Automotive India Ltd - 532756 - Board Meeting Outcome for Unaudited Financial Results (Standalone And Consolidated) Of The Company For The
Quarter Ended On 31St March, 2026 Along-With Limited Review Reports.
announcements.detail:

The ....
announcements.ai_summary: CIE Automotive India Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the unaudited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. These results were accompanied by limited review reports from the statutory auditors. The meeting commenced at 4:30 p.m. and concluded at 5:40 p.m. The financial results are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Go Digit General Insurance Ltd - 544179 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of Observation letters from NSE and BSE with No adverse observation
announcements.ai_summary: Go Digit General Insurance Limited has received observation letters from both NSE and BSE dated April 22, 2026, with no adverse remarks regarding the proposed scheme of amalgamation. This scheme involves Go Digit Infoworks Services Private Limited and Go Digit General Insurance Limited, along with their respective shareholders, under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company had previously informed about the Board's approval of this scheme on December 19, 2025, subject to various regulatory approvals. Go Digit General Insurance Limited will now proceed with filing the scheme with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) in due course, having complied with the conditions stipulated in the observation letters.

announcements.subject: Tulive Developers Ltd - 505285 - Post-Offer Public Announcement
announcements.detail: Saffron Capital Advisors Pvt. Ltd. (Manager to the Delisting Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Post-Offer Public Announcement for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Tulive Developers Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: The delisting offer for Tulive Developers Ltd has been successful. Altis Properties Private Limited and GKS Technology Park Private Limited, along with Atul Gupta and K V Ramana Shetty, proposed to voluntarily delist the equity shares from BSE Limited. The reverse book building process, which ran from April 15, 2026, to April 21, 2026, saw sufficient shares tendered. Following this, the shareholding of the Acquirers, Promoters, and Promoter Group exceeded 90% of the total issued equity shares, excluding those held by inactive shareholders. Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited acted as the Manager to the Delisting Offer. A Post Offer Public Announcement was published on April 23, 2026, confirming the success of the delisting.

announcements.subject: Genesys International Corporation Ltd - 506109 - Board Meeting Outcome for Declaration Of Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On April 23, 2026

announcements.ai_summary: Genesys International Corporation Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 23, 2026, approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital. The authorized share capital has been increased from Rs. 27,25,00,000/- (Rupees Twenty Seven Crores Twenty Five lakhs) divided into 5,45,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- each, to Rs. 45,00,00,000 (Rupees Forty Five Crores) divided into 9,00,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- each. This increase is achieved by creating an additional 3,55,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- each. The meeting commenced at 04.30 p.m. and concluded at 05.15 p.m.

announcements.subject: Vipul Ltd - 511726 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Vipul Limited has informed the exchange about the NCLT order, sanctioning scheme of Amalgamation of five wholly owned subsidiaries with Vipul limited
announcements.ai_summary: Vipul Limited has announced that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, has sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of five wholly owned subsidiaries – Abhipra Trading Private Limited, Graphic Research Consultants India Private Limited, United Buildwell Private Limited, Vineeta Trading Private Limited, and Vipul Eastern Infracon Private Limited – with Vipul Limited. The NCLT order was passed on April 17, 2026, and the scheme is effective from the appointed date of April 1, 2022, subject to compliance with the order's terms. The company formally became aware of the order's implications upon receiving its copy on April 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tata Power Company Ltd - 500400 - Regulation 30 - Incorporation Of Wholly-Owned Subsidiary.
announcements.detail: The Company has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary in the name of ''TP Urja Limited''.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Power Company Limited has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary named 'TP Urja Limited' on April 22, 2026. The authorized and paid-up share capital of TP Urja Limited is ₹5,00,000, divided into 50,000 Equity Shares of ₹10/- each. TP Urja Limited will engage in providing power and energy services and related activities. The incorporation received approval from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs on April 22, 2026. The initial capital for TP Urja Limited is ₹5,00,000/-.

announcements.subject: Rikhav Securities Ltd - 544340 - Open Offer- Press Release
announcements.detail: Press release for Open Offer for acquisition of up to 99,55,920 equity shares, representing 26% of the voting share capital.
announcements.ai_summary: Rikhav Securities Limited has announced an open offer by its promoter group, comprising Mr. Hitesh Lakhani, Mr. Deep Lakhani, Mrs. Vaishali Shah, and Mrs. Bharti Lakhani, along with persons acting in concert. The offer is to acquire up to 99,55,920 equity shares, representing 26% of the voting share capital, at an offer price of ₹47.75 per equity share. The total consideration for the offer is up to ₹47.54 Cr. This open offer is a consequence of the promoter group's recent acquisition of approximately 32.51 lakh equity shares, representing 8.48% of the voting share capital.

announcements.subject: Zodiac Energy Ltd - 543416 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Today I.E. April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting held today i.e. April 23, 2026 for approval of change in designation of Mr. Dhaval Shah from Non-Executive Independent Director to Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of the company and others
announcements.ai_summary: At a Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026, Zodiac Energy Ltd approved a change in the designation of Mr. Dhaval Shah from Non-Executive Independent Director to Non-Executive Non-Independent Director. This change is effective from April 23, 2026, and is subject to shareholder approval at the ensuing General Meeting or within three months of his appointment. The meeting commenced at 04:15 P.M. and concluded at 05:00 P.M.

announcements.subject: Ceigall India Ltd - 544223 - Incorporation Of Project SPV
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2025 we wish to inform you that in accordance with the powers conferred by the Board of Directors of Ceigall India Limited ('the Company'), the Management Committee of the Board of Directors, at its meeting held today i.e. April 23, 2026, has considered and approved the incorporation of project SPV 'Ceigall Ambala Chandigarh Zirakpur Limited' as step down subsidiary of the Company. 

[This is ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Management Committee of the Board of Directors of Ceigall India Ltd, at its meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the incorporation of a project Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) named 'Ceigall Ambala Chandigarh Zirakpur Limited'. This SPV will be a step-down subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited and will be incorporated in India. The SPV's purpose is to implement a project awarded by the National Highways Authority of India for the construction of a 6-lane access-controlled spur connectivity in Punjab on a Hybrid Annuity Mode. The cost of subscription for the SPV is Rs. 26,000/-.

announcements.subject: Cyient Ltd - 532175 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Cyient Ltd. announced on April 23, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved a share buyback program of INR 720 crores. The company also released its financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, reporting DET* Revenue of INR 5,819 crores for FY26, a 5.5% year-on-year growth. The DET* PAT for FY26 was INR 588 crores, showing a 7.2% year-on-year growth. For Q4 FY26, DET* Revenue was INR 1,500 crores, with a 7.4% year-on-year growth. The company's strong cash flow and cash position provide confidence for business investment and shareholder value return. The Board has also agreed in principle to explore a market fundraise through a mix of debt and/or equity to support future growth.

announcements.subject: Azad Engineering Ltd - 544061 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Azad Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange about signing of amendment agreement to the strategic supply agreement executed with Nuovo Pignone S.r.l., an organisation part of Baker Huges Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Azad Engineering Limited announced on April 23, 2026, that it has signed Amendment No. 3 to the Strategic Supply Agreement with Nuovo Pignone S.r.l., a part of Baker Hughes Company. This amendment, originally executed on March 6, 2024, extends the agreement's term to December 2030, maintaining a five-year duration from the original execution. The amendment addresses a significant increase in annual demand for critical turbomachinery components used in power generation applications. This strategic move aligns with the company's objective to strengthen partnerships with global OEMs and expand its presence in the high-value energy equipment supply chain. The specific consideration for this order is confidential.

announcements.subject: Bijoy Hans Ltd - 524723 - Intimation Of Trading Approval Obtained From BSE Limited For 4,05,21,836 Equity Shares Of Rs. 10/- Each Issued At Premium Of Rs. 2.50/- To Promoters And Non-Promoters On A Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: Company has received Trading Approval obtained from BSE Limited for 4,05,21,836 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each issued at a Premium of Rs. 2.50/- to Promoters and Non-Promoters on a Preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Bijoy Hans Ltd has received trading approval from BSE Limited for 4,05,21,836 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, issued at a premium of Rs. 2.50/- per share. These shares were allotted to promoters and non-promoters on a preferential basis. The trading approval was obtained on April 22, 2026, and the shares are effective for trading from Thursday, April 23, 2026. This preferential allotment is a mechanism for the company to raise capital.

announcements.subject: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd - 532734 - Updates: Execution Of Supply Agreement For Purchase Of Balance Of System For 5 Mwh DC Block On CKD Basis For First Phase Of 20 GWH Battery Energy Storage System, By Godawari New Energy Private Limited (GNEPL) A Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of Godawari Power And Ispat Limited.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith update regarding execution of supply agreement by Godawari New Energy Private Limited (GNEPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari New Energy Private Limited (GNEPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Godawari Power and Ispat Limited, has executed a Supply Agreement with Shanghai Shenyi Roche Energy Technology Limited (Roche Energy) for the purchase of Balance of System (BOS) on a CKD basis. This agreement is for the first phase of a 20 GWH Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) plant, specifically for a 5 Mwh DC Block. The agreement, signed on April 23, 2026, secures a stable, reliable, and cost-effective supply chain for GNEPL, which is crucial for the manufacturing of BESS. Roche Energy specializes in BESS product design, manufacturing, material supply, and technology support.

announcements.subject: Espire Hospitality Limited - 532016 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: As per intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Espire Hospitality Limited has entered into an agreement with Marriott International to bring the JW Marriott brand to Kosi Kalan, Mathura. The JW Marriott Kosi Kalan Resort & Spa is anticipated to open in January 2029, spanning 14 acres. This expansion signifies Espire Hospitality's growth in the hospitality sector, with the company owning and operating its hotels. The agreement aims to enhance the luxury portfolio in India's evolving travel landscape, responding to the demand for elevated, experience-led hospitality in emerging markets. This development is expected to contribute significantly to the region's tourism.

announcements.subject: Mrugesh Trading Ltd - 512065 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting & Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today i.e 23/04/2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Mrugesh Trading Ltd held a Board Meeting on April 23, 2026, where it was decided to change the address for maintaining the company's books of accounts and papers. The new address will be A-715 Titanium Business Park, Prahladnagar Extension, Makarba, Ahmedabad, Gujarat – 380051, effective from April 23, 2026. This change is within the local limits of the city, moving from the previous address at Office No 704 Shilp Zaveri, Nr Shyamal Cross Road Satelite, Jodhpur Char Rasta, Ahmadabad City, Gujarat, India – 380015. The meeting commenced at 3:00 P.M. and concluded at 4:00 P.M. at the company's Corporate Office in Ahmedabad.

announcements.subject: STL Networks Ltd - 544395 - Update Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations.
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: STL Networks Ltd has provided an update regarding legal proceedings between its wholly owned step-down subsidiary, Clearcomm Group Limited, and Comex 2000 (UK) Limited. The Hon’ble Court has dismissed the claim filed by Comex with no order as to costs. Comex had filed a claim for £543,501.07 for breach of contract on June 3, 2024, allegedly in retaliation to Clearcomm's £195,000.00 adjudication award. The dismissal follows an out-of-court settlement for an amount of £25,000 (excluding taxes). This settlement has no significant financial impact on STL Networks Ltd. The company had previously attempted to strike out Comex's claim, and an agreement was reached to sample 110 claims. Comex had faced delays in providing required documentation and evidence for these samples.

announcements.subject: Unifinz Capital India Ltd - 541358 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Meeting Updates
announcements.detail: OUTCOME OF FINANCE COMMITTEE MEETING HELD ON 23.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Unifinz Capital India Limited's Finance Committee met on April 23, 2026, and approved the allotment of 57,900 listed, rated, senior, secured, taxable, transferable, redeemable, non-convertible debentures. These debentures are denominated in Indian Rupees and have a face value of INR 10,000 each, with an aggregate nominal value of INR 57,90,00,000 (INR 57.90 Crore). The allotment is on a private placement basis. This decision follows previous intimations regarding board and committee meetings held on March 28, 2026, and April 17, 2026, respectively. The details of the securities are annexed as per SEBI master circulars.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Textiles Ltd - 502986 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation regarding execution of Agreements.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Textiles Limited's Committee of Directors (Renewable Energy) met on April 23, 2026, and approved the execution of a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement and a Captive Power Purchase Agreement. These agreements are with Renew Green Energy Solutions Private Limited and Renew Green (MPR Four) Private Limited. The purpose is to establish a 19 MW AC Wind Solar Hybrid Power Plant in District Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. Vardhman Textiles Limited will acquire a 31.2% stake in Renew Green (MPR Four) Private Limited through these agreements. The agreements were executed on the same day, April 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: ADC India Communications Ltd-$ - 523411 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Post-Offer Advertisement in accordance with Regulation 18(12) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended, for the attention of the public shareholders of ADC India Communications Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Open Offer, has submitted a Post-Offer Advertisement to BSE for the attention of the public shareholders of ADC India Communications Ltd. This advertisement is in accordance with Regulation 18(12) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The open offer is for the acquisition of up to 11,96,000 equity shares, representing 26.00% of the voting share capital, by Amphenol Corporation. This announcement follows previous public announcements, detailed public statements, letters of offer, and pre-offer advertisements issued in connection with the open offer.

announcements.subject: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd - 533271 - Intimation Regarding Redemption Of Non-Convertible Debentures (Ncds) - Series III
announcements.detail: Ashoka Buildcon Limited (the Company) hereby informs that the Company has redeemed in full, 10,000, Rated, Listed, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable, Non-convertible Debentures - Series III (NCDs) of Rs. 1,00,000 each, aggregating Rs. 100 Crore.
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has announced the full redemption of its 10,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) - Series III. These were Rated, Listed, Senior, Unsecured, and Redeemable NCDs, each with a face value of Rs. 1,00,000, aggregating to a total of Rs. 100 Crore. The redemption occurred on their due date, April 23, 2026, with the principal amount and applicable interest paid to the debenture holders. This action fulfills the company's obligation as per Regulation 57 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Morepen Laboratories Ltd - 500288 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Execution of loan agreement with Shinhan Bank
announcements.ai_summary: Morepen Laboratories Limited's Finance Committee, at its meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved availing an unsecured term loan facility of ₹30,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirty Crore Only) from Shinhan Bank. The company has entered into various agreements with Shinhan Bank for this credit facility, which will be used for general business purposes. Mr. Sushil Suri, Promoter, Chairman & Managing Director, will act as a Guarantor for this loan. This fund-raising initiative is aimed at strengthening the company's financial resources for its ongoing operations and business expansion.

announcements.subject: Larsen & Toubro Ltd - 500510 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (SEBI LODR) - Incorporation Of A Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T) has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary named Vyoma.AI Limited (VAL) on April 22, 2026. The authorized capital of VAL is ₹5,00,000, comprising 5000 equity shares of ₹100 each, with the entire share capital subscribed by L&T and its nominee shareholders for a cash consideration. VAL is being established for the purpose of developing data centers and AI infrastructure to provide infrastructure and technology-enabled services. The company has received the Certificate of Incorporation from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs for VAL. This incorporation is a step towards expanding L&T's service offerings in the technology and infrastructure domain.

announcements.company: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd
