announcements.subject: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd - 543308 - Intimation Of Entering Into Memorandum Of Understanding For Strategic Clinical Collaboration
announcements.detail: Intimation of entering into Memorandum of Understanding for Strategic Clinical Collaboration
announcements.ai_summary: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Limited (KIMS) has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for a strategic clinical collaboration with Dakshayani Healthcare Services Private Limited, also known as Renova. Renova is a specialized oncology organization with proprietary clinical protocols and expertise in cancer research. This is a non-commercial brand association agreement where Renova will share its clinical expertise and best practices in Oncology care with KIMS. The collaboration aims to strengthen healthcare delivery standards, particularly in Oncology services, and enhance patient care outcomes by fostering the development of clinical protocols and treatment methodologies. This partnership is expected to positively contribute to the overall service quality and reputation of KIMS.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd - 500040 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release of Birla Estates Private Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company titled "Birla Estates Delivers Strong FY26 Performance with Rs.8136 Cr Booking Value; Sales Momentum driven by NCR, followed by Bengaluru and MMR
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited (ABREL) announced strong financial performance for FY2026 through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Birla Estates Private Limited. The company achieved a booking value of ₹8,136 crores, driven by robust demand in key markets such as NCR, Bengaluru, and MMR. Collections saw a significant increase of 23.5% year-on-year, indicating strong customer engagement and sales momentum. Birla Estates launched 8 new projects spread across four regions during FY2026, catering to the growing demand for integrated community ecosystems and premium residential offerings. The company attributes its success to a focus on design differentiation, execution excellence, and the assurance of a trusted legacy brand, supported by stable macroeconomic fundamentals and sustained end-user demand in India's residential real estate sector.

announcements.subject: Bikaji Foods International Ltd - 543653 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on Demise of Founder Shri Shiv Ratan Agarwal, Promoter, Chairman and Whole - Time Director of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bikaji Foods International Limited has announced the demise of its Founder, Promoter, Chairman, and Whole-Time Director, Shri Shiv Ratan Agarwal, on April 23, 2026. Shri Agarwal was a visionary entrepreneur who played a pivotal role in transforming the company from its origins in Bikaner into a globally recognized packaged food enterprise. With over five decades of experience, he established a strong foundation based on innovation and quality, leading Bikaji to become a leading FMCG brand with an expanding international presence. The company deeply mourns this loss. This announcement is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and will be hosted on the company's website, www.bikaji.com.

announcements.subject: Jio Financial Services Ltd - 543940 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Transcript of Presentation on the Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jio Financial Services Limited has released the transcript of the presentation made to analysts on April 17, 2026, regarding its Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The presentation, which concluded at 8:25 p.m. (IST) on April 17, 2026, is available on the company's website at https://www.jfs.in/financials/?doc=quarterly-results and has also been uploaded to the stock exchanges. The call participants included Mr. Hitesh Sethia (MD & CEO), Mr. Venkata Peri (Group COO), Mr. Abhishek Pathak (Group CFO), Mr. Ganesh AR (Group CTO), and Mr. Dipak Daga (Head - Strategy & Chief Investor Relations Officer). The transcript is provided for information and records.

announcements.subject: Indostar Capital Finance Ltd - 541336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 read with Para A of part A of Schedule and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IndoStar Capital Finance Limited, through a Circular Resolution #01/2026-27 dated April 23, 2026, approved the allotment of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The company will allot 20,000 senior, secured, redeemable, rated, listed, taxable, non-convertible debentures with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, amounting up to INR 200,00,00,000. Additionally, 12,500 NCDs with the same face value will be allotted, amounting up to INR 125,00,00,000, and 27,500 NCDs will be allotted, amounting up to INR 275,00,00,000. In total, 60,000 NCDs will be issued with an aggregate size of INR 600 crore. These NCDs are under the series 9.25% ICFL 26-27/Series XXXI, 9.25% ICFL 26-27/Series XXXII, and 9.25% ICFL 26-27/ Series XXXIII, with tenors of approximately 18 months and 28 days, 19 months and 1 day, and 21 months, respectively. These debentures are proposed to be listed.

announcements.subject: Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd - 543988 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Para A Of Part A Of Schedule III Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: PFA Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nuvama Wealth Management Limited's wholly owned material subsidiary, Nuvama Wealth and Investment Limited (NWIL), received a letter on April 22, 2026, from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). The NSE has levied a penalty of Rs. 8,69,600/- on NWIL. This penalty is related to operational observations concerning Margin Statements & Reporting, noted during a comprehensive inspection conducted jointly by SEBI, Exchanges, and Depositories. The company has stated that this penalty has no impact on the financials, operations, or other activities of Nuvama Wealth Management Limited or its subsidiaries/associates. Nuvama Wealth Management Limited is in the process of filing a review application seeking a waiver of the penalty and any disciplinary action.

announcements.subject: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd - 500520 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited (M&M) announced a significant growth in its patent portfolio, which has expanded by over 20 times in the last decade. The number of granted patents has increased from 56 in FY16 to 1,334 in FY26. The cumulative number of patent applications filed by M&M stands at 2,728 as of March 2026. Of the granted patents, 60% are related to the Automotive Business and 40% to the Farm Business. The conversion rate of applications to patents has improved from 8% in FY16 to over 65% for applications filed in the last decade. This growth reflects the company's increasing R&D capabilities and focus on innovation, including filings by its subsidiary Mahindra Electric Automobile Ltd. M&M has also received several prestigious awards for its innovation efforts.

announcements.subject: G R Infraprojects Ltd - 543317 - Execution Of The EPC Agreement For Project 'EPC Package For BESS Implementation At NTPC Thermal Power Stations (Lot-1); Mouda Super Thermal Power Station (Mouda)'.
announcements.detail: Execution of EPC Agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has executed an Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) Agreement with NTPC Limited on April 23, 2026. This agreement is for the project titled "EPC Package for BESS Implementation at NTPC Thermal Power Stations (Lot-1); Mouda Super Thermal Power Station (Mouda)". The total contract price for this project is Rs. 413.37 Crores, exclusive of GST. The project is to be completed on an EPC basis within 15 months from the Appointed Date. This execution is in accordance with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aurum PropTech Ltd - 539289 - Audited Financial Results (Standalone And Consolidated) Of The Company, Along With The Audit Report Issued By Kirtane & Pandit LLP, Chartered Accountants, Statutory Auditors Of The Company, For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Audited financial results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Aurum PropTech Limited announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, following a Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026. The company achieved a significant milestone by surpassing ₹500 crore in Annualised Recurring Revenue (ARR) and reported its second consecutive profitable quarter. For Q4 FY2026, Total Income increased by 72% YoY to ₹135 Cr, with the PBT Margin expanding by 1,410 bps to 2.5%. For the full fiscal year FY2026, Total Income grew by 49% YoY to ₹424 Cr, and the PBT Margin improved by 1,270 bps to (2.9%). The company highlighted strategic acquisitions, AI-led innovation, and expansion of its rental businesses as key drivers for this growth. These results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors.

announcements.subject: Windsor Machines Ltd - 522029 - Intimation Of Trading Approval For 7,37,680 Equity Shares Of Face Value Rs. 2/- Each Received From National Stock Exchange Of India Limited And BSE Limited
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation of Trading approval for 7,37,680 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each received from BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Windsor Machines Limited has received trading approval from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited for the allotment of 7,37,680 equity shares. These shares, each with a face value of Rs. 2/-, were allotted on a preferential basis. The trading approval from NSE is effective from April 23, 2026, and the shares will be listed and admitted to dealings on the exchange. Similarly, BSE Limited has also granted its trading approval. The company has provided the distinctive numbers for these shares, ranging from 87084522 to 87822201. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd - 532371 - Outcome Of Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Scheduled On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Please see attached audited financial results of the Company for the 4th quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd, in their meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the audited financial results for the 4th quarter and the financial year ended March 31, 2026. These results have been prepared as per Indian Accounting Standards (lndAS). The company has also submitted the Auditors' Report from Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP, which includes a declaration of an unmodified opinion for the financial year 2025-2026. The financial results and related documents are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: KNR Constructions Ltd - 532942 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of LODR
announcements.detail: Intimation about receipt of claims
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: KNR Constructions Limited has announced the receipt of its share of claims amounting to ₹32.87 Crores, including interest of ₹6.89 Crores, on April 23, 2026. These claims arise from Settlement Agreements executed between the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) and BSCPL Infrastructure Limited- KNR Constructions Limited (JV) on March 30, 2026. The claims pertain to the Hubli - Hospet section of NH-63, with the principal amount being ₹25.98 Crores and the interest amount being ₹6.89 Crores. This development is a result of a dispute filed with the Conciliation Committee of Independent Experts (CCIE).

announcements.subject: Future Consumer Ltd - 533400 - Update On NCLT Hearing - SBI Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.detail: Update on NCLT hearing -SBI Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Future Consumer Limited has provided an update on a National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) hearing concerning a case filed by the State Bank of India (SBI). The company's counsel requested more time to file a reply to an amended Form-1, citing a delay in its submission by the financial creditor. The tribunal granted the company one week to file its reply, and the matter has been adjourned to June 4, 2026. Future Consumer Limited will continue to provide updates on this case.

announcements.subject: Quint Digital Ltd - 539515 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Quint Digital Limited has launched Time Out India and announced its first Time Out Market in New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: Quint Digital Limited has officially launched Time Out India and announced its first Time Out Market in New Delhi. This launch follows a franchise agreement from May 2025 and introduces dedicated platforms for Delhi and Mumbai, offering local recommendations across various categories. Time Out India is part of Time Out's global network and will combine editorial curation with a multi-channel presence. The first Time Out Market in India is slated to open in the second half of 2026 at Worldmark Aerocity, New Delhi. This market will span approximately 24,500 sq ft and feature 11 curated kitchens, two full-service bars, a live performance stage, and seating for around 500 guests.

announcements.subject: Fortis Healthcare Ltd - 532843 - Intimation Of Grant Of Employee Stock Options ('Options') Under 'Fortis Healthcare Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme 2026."
announcements.detail: Relevant disclosure is attached
announcements.ai_summary: Fortis Healthcare Limited's Nomination & Remuneration Committee, in a meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the grant of up to 1,32,05,200 (One Crore Thirty Two Lakhs Five Thousand Two Hundred) employee stock options under the "Fortis Healthcare Limited Employee Stock Option Scheme 2026." Each option granted will entitle the holder to one fully paid-up equity share of face value Rs. 10/- upon exercise, subject to SEBI regulations. This grant follows a previous intimation dated February 13, 2026. The meeting commenced at 12:30 PM and concluded at 01:55 PM.

announcements.subject: PCBL Chemical Ltd - 506590 - Intimation Regarding Issuance And Allotment Of Commercial Paper Amounting To Rs. 200 Crores
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding issuance and allotment of Commercial Paper amounting to Rs.200 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: PCBL Chemical Ltd has announced the issuance and allotment of Commercial Paper amounting to ₹200 Crores on April 23, 2026. The Fund Raising Committee-Commercial Paper, acting under delegated authority from the Board of Directors, allotted 4,000 units of Commercial Paper, each with a face value of ₹5,00,000/-, aggregating to ₹200 Crores. The instrument has a tenure of 90 days, with a maturity date of July 22, 2026, and carries a coupon/interest rate of 6.38% per annum, payable upfront. This unsecured Commercial Paper is proposed to be listed on BSE Ltd.

announcements.company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd
announcements.subject: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd - 542760 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Of Sterling And Wilson Renewable Energy Limited For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to the Listing Regulations, we wish to inform you that, based on the recommendation of the
Audit Committee, the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today i.e., Thursday, April
23, 2026, inter alia, considered and approved the Audited Consolidated and Standalone Financial results
of the Company for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
Further, the Statutory Auditors of the Company i.e., M/s. Kalyaniwalla ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 23, 2026. The Board, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee, considered and approved the Audited Consolidated and Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company's statutory auditors, M/s. Kalyaniwalla & Mistry LLP and M/s. Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, have issued their Auditors' Reports with an unmodified opinion on these financial results. The Board meeting commenced at 11:00 a.m. and concluded at 1:20 p.m.

announcements.subject: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd - 507526 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release (Revised)
announcements.detail: Submission of revised press release regarding approval of Resolution Plan of SDF Industries Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd (AABL) has received approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kochi Bench, for its resolution plan to acquire SDF Industries Ltd. This acquisition, costing ₹30.85 crore, will make SDF Industries Ltd. a wholly owned subsidiary of AABL. The approved plan includes SDF Industries Ltd. having an IMFL bottling capacity of approximately 3.60 lakh cases per month and an ENA distillery capacity of 75 lakh liters per annum. The strategically located facility in Kerala spans around 10 acres and is well-connected to major airports, facilitating distribution. AABL entered the Kerala market in 2018, and this acquisition is expected to strengthen its position in the region. The NCLT order was dated April 16, 2026, and the company submitted a revised press release on April 23, 2026, to correct a typographical error regarding the bottling capacity.

announcements.subject: Dynamic Cables Ltd - 540795 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Manufacturing Agreement with TS Conductor Corp, USA.
announcements.ai_summary: Dynamic Cables Ltd has entered into a Manufacturing Agreement with TS Conductor Corp, a company based in the United States of America, on April 23, 2026. Under this agreement, Dynamic Cables Limited will manufacture High Temperature Low Sag (HTLS) Carbon Core Conductors, to be marketed as TS® Conductor, using Encapsulated Core supplied by TS Conductor Corp or a third party authorized by TS. This agreement is for manufacturing operations within India. TS Conductor Corp manufactures advanced power transmission lines using patented Aluminum Encapsulated Carbon Core (AECC) technology, which can increase grid capacity and reduce line loss. Dynamic Cables Limited will be granted a limited, non-transferable license to use TS Designs and Intellectual Property at its facility for manufacturing the approved HTLS conductor. The agreement does not involve a share exchange ratio.

announcements.subject: PH Capital Ltd - 500143 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulations 30 & 33 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today i.e. April 23, 2026, inter-alia, approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter, second half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026 ('Audited Financial Results').
announcements.ai_summary: PH Capital Ltd announced its audited financial results for the fourth quarter, second half year, and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026, on April 23, 2026. The company reported a total income from operations (Net) of Rs. 11,084.8 Lacs for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, compared to Rs. 16,550.80 Lacs for the previous year. Net profit after tax for the financial year was Rs. 323.59 Lacs, a decrease from Rs. 785.10 Lacs in the prior year. Basic and diluted earnings per share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, stood at Rs. 10.79, down from Rs. 26.17 in the previous year. The company's paid-up equity share capital remained at Rs. 300.01 Lacs. The Board meeting to approve these results commenced at 12:00 Noon and concluded at 1:00 P.M. on April 23, 2026. The audited financial results and the audit report from M/s. S.P Jain & Associates have been submitted to the stock exchange and are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd - 524136 - DISCLOSURE UNDER REG 30
announcements.detail: DISCLOSURE UNDER REGULATION 30 FOR PROPOSED INCORPORATION OF WHOLLY OWNED SUBSIDIARY
announcements.ai_summary: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd's Executive Committee of the Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 23, 2026, approved the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary named "Abhaya Nourishtech Limited". This decision follows up on a previous intimation dated March 25, 2026. The proposed subsidiary will have an authorized share capital of Rs.5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crore only), divided into 50,00,000 equity shares of Rs.10 each. The proposed paid-up share capital will be Rs.4,00,00,000 (Rupees Four Crore), divided into 40,00,000 equity shares of Rs.10 each. The incorporation is currently under process in India.

announcements.subject: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 533573 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015 - Incorporation Of Wholly-Owned Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Please find attached enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary named Alembic Pharmaceuticals GmbH in Germany on April 23, 2026. This new entity has a share capital of EUR 25,000, divided into 25,000 shares of EUR 1.00 each. The subsidiary has not yet commenced business operations and its turnover is currently nil. The primary objective of establishing Alembic Pharmaceuticals GmbH is to explore new business opportunities in Germany and to promote, sell, and distribute the company's pharmaceutical products in that geography. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are indicated as required for this incorporation.

announcements.subject: Kranti Industries Ltd - 542459 - Non- Exercise Of Option To Convert Warrants- Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015, we here by inform you that Company had allotted 16,00,000 (Sixteen Lakh) fully Convertible Warrant on Preferential basis to Non Promoter Allottees. Out of total warrants 12,50,000 (Twelve Lakhs Fifty Thousand) warrants have been converted into equity shares and remaining 2,50,000 (Two Lakh Fifty Thousand) stands forfeited due to non conversion of ....
announcements.ai_summary: On April 23, 2026, Kranti Industries Ltd announced that Evolution Capital Advisory Services Private Limited did not exercise its option to convert 2,50,000 warrants into equity shares. These warrants were part of an allotment of 16,00,000 fully convertible warrants on a preferential basis on October 23, 2024, at an issue price of ₹80 per warrant. Evolution Capital Advisory Services Private Limited had initially paid ₹20 per warrant and had the option to pay the remaining ₹60 per warrant within 18 months to convert them into equity shares. The upfront amount received for the 2,50,000 unconverted warrants, amounting to ₹50,00,000 (₹20 per warrant), will be forfeited as per SEBI regulations, subject to Board approval.

announcements.subject: SRG Housing Finance Ltd - 534680 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting - 23042026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of SRG Housing Finance Ltd met on April 23, 2026, and approved a proposal to increase the company's borrowing powers. This increase, subject to shareholder approval, will allow the company to borrow up to ₹2,500 Crores from time to time. Additionally, the Board approved the creation of charges on the company's movable and immovable assets to secure borrowings up to ₹2,500 Crores, including existing borrowings. These charges will be on terms decided by the Board. The company will soon upload a notice for a postal ballot to seek shareholder approval for these proposals.

announcements.subject: Waa Solar Ltd - 541445 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 -  Intimation Of Execution Of Multiple Power Purchase Agreements.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, for Execution of Multiple Power Purchase Agreements, is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Waa Solar Limited has executed 07 (Seven) Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with Madhya Pradesh Power Management Company Limited, a Government of Madhya Pradesh Undertaking. These PPAs aggregate to a total capacity of 48.15 MW and are for concessions awarded under Feeder level Solarization, PM-KUSUM C Yojana. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company had previously submitted similar intimations on December 29, 2025, and January 08, 2026. The details of these agreements are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Astonea Labs Ltd - 544409 - Statement On Redressal Of Investor Grievances/Complaints For The Quarter Ended 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith a statement on redressal of Investor Grievances for the quarter ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Astonea Labs Ltd has submitted its Statement on Redressal of Investor Grievances for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 13(3) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company reported that no investor complaints were received, pending, or unresolved during this quarter. This is further confirmed by the Investor Grievances Report issued by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, for the same period, which also indicates zero complaints.

announcements.subject: Saboo Sodium Chloro Ltd - 530461 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The Company receives Land Conversion Order for 120 Room luxury 5 -star Resort Project in Jawai, Rajasthan.
announcements.ai_summary: Saboo Sodium Chloro Limited has received a Land Conversion Order from the Office of the District Collector, Pali, for its proposed 120-room luxury 5-star resort project in Jawai, Rajasthan. This is a key regulatory approval, following the Forest No Objection Certificate received earlier. With the Conversion Order, architect, and civil contractor in place, the project has secured principal land-use approvals. The company is now submitting architectural plans for building plan approval and expects to commence construction subject to these clearances.

announcements.subject: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd - 543299 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Shyam Metalics announces upcoming launch of Aluminium flat rolled products and foil manufacturing facility in Sambalpur, Odisha.
announcements.ai_summary: Shyam Metalics and Energy Limited, through its step-down subsidiary Smel Steel Structural Pvt. Ltd., is set to launch an aluminium manufacturing facility in Sambalpur, Odisha. The facility will produce Aluminium Flat Rolled Products (FRP) with a capacity of 60,000 tonnes per annum and Aluminium Foils with a capacity of 18,000 tonnes per annum. This expansion into value-added aluminium products is expected to enhance the company's operating margins by approximately 40-50% and reduce India's dependence on imported metal products. The project is in an advanced stage for commencement of commercial production.

announcements.subject: Madhav Infra Projects Ltd - 539894 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI (LODR) Regulations - Intimation Of Execution Of Multiple Power Purchase Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation of Execution of Multiple Power Purchase Agreements is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Madhav Infra Projects Limited has executed 09 (nine) Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with Madhya Pradesh Power Management Company Limited, a Government of M.P. Undertaking. These PPAs aggregate to a total capacity of 73.15 MW and are for concessions awarded under Feeder level Solarization, PM-KUSUM C Yojana. This announcement is a continuation of previous intimations submitted on December 29, 2025, and January 06, 2026. The execution of these agreements is a domestic contract. The company's website, https://madhavcorp.com/annoucement.html, will also host this information.

announcements.subject: Patel Engineering Ltd-$ - 531120 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release - Patel Engineering Ltd has been declared Lowest Bidder (L1) by SJVN Lower Arun Power Development Company (P) Ltd for Package 2 of the 669 MW Lower Arun Hydropower Project in Nepal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Patel Engineering Limited has been declared the Lowest Bidder (L1) by SJVN Lower Arun Power Development Company (P) Ltd for Package 2 of the 669 MW Lower Arun Hydropower Project in Nepal. The contract is valued at ₹1,593.08 Crores. The event occurred on April 22, 2026, at 9:50 pm. Package 2 involves critical civil and hydro-mechanical works, including the construction of Adit-5 and Adit-6, the Head Race Tunnel (10.5 meters in diameter and 5.41 kilometers long), Surge Shaft, Pressure Shaft, Power House, Switchyard, and Tail Race Channel. This is an international contract awarded by a domestic entity. Patel Engineering Limited will proceed with the execution of this significant hydropower project.

announcements.subject: JK Cement Ltd - 532644 - Declaration As Preferred Bidder In The E-Auction For Karunda Limestone Block-I In Rajasthan
announcements.detail: Declaration as Preferred Bidder in the e-Auction for Karunda Limestone Block-1 conducted by Govt. of Rajasthan
announcements.ai_summary: JK Cement Limited has been declared the 'Preferred Bidder' for the Karunda Limestone Block-I, a mining lease located in Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. This declaration was made following an e-auction conducted by the Government of Rajasthan. The mining lease area spans 35.98 hectares. The company received this information on April 22, 2026. This development signifies an expansion of JK Cement's mining operations and secures a new source of limestone, a key raw material for cement production.

announcements.subject: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd - 523754 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 and 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the Press Release dated 23rd April, 2026 of the Company on Audited Financial Results for the year ended 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Limited has announced its audited financial results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026 (FY26). The company reported a significant revenue growth of 14.5%, reaching ₹315.79 crore, an increase from ₹275.09 crore in FY25. Profit Before Tax (PBT) saw a substantial rise of 58.5%, from ₹10.71 crore in the previous year to ₹16.99 crore. Profit After Tax (PAT) also increased by 76%, growing from ₹7.21 crore in FY25 to ₹12.69 crore in FY26. These results reflect strong operational performance and disciplined financial management by the company.

announcements.subject: Steel Exchange India Ltd - 534748 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail: Revised Intimation under Regulation 57(1)
announcements.ai_summary: Steel Exchange India Limited has made a partial voluntary prepayment and scheduled partial redemption of its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) totaling ₹43.19 crore. On April 22, 2026, the company prepaid ₹39,64,56,427/- towards NCDs with ISIN INE503B07044, reducing the face value from 500176 to 396608. Additionally, a scheduled partial redemption of ₹3,54,56,850/- was made, further reducing the face value from 396608 to 387345. The original due date for these redemptions was October 6, 2030, and July 7, 2026, respectively. The total outstanding amount after these redemptions is ₹1,48,27,56,660/-.

announcements.subject: Cipla Ltd - 500087 - Cipla Receives U.S. FDA Approval For First AB Rated Generic Of Ventolin® HFA
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cipla Limited announced on April 23, 2026, that its wholly owned subsidiary, Cipla USA Inc., has received final approval from the United States Food and Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA). This approval is for Albuterol Sulfate Inhalation Aerosol, 90 mcg per actuation, which is the first AB-rated generic therapeutic equivalent of Ventolin® HFA, marketed by GlaxoSmithKline. The product is indicated for the treatment or prevention of bronchospasm in adult and pediatric patients aged four years and older with reversible obstructive airway disease, as well as for preventing exercise-induced bronchospasm. Cipla USA Inc. expects to launch this product in the United States in the first half of FY 2026-27.

announcements.subject: K.P. Energy Ltd - 539686 - Press Release - KP Energy Limited Receives Inter-State Electricity Trading Licence From CERC, Expanding Access To Nationwide Power Markets
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited informed the Exchange regarding press release titled KP Energy Limited Receives Inter-State Electricity Trading Licence from CERC, Expanding Access to Nationwide Power Markets. The Disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: K.P. Energy Limited has been granted an Inter-State Electricity Trading Licence (Category V) by the Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) as announced on April 23, 2026. This license allows the company to trade electricity across state boundaries and participate in nationwide power markets, thereby expanding its market reach and trading capabilities. This development is a significant milestone for K.P. Energy Limited, enhancing its flexibility in power sales, enabling better market-linked realizations, and supporting its strategy of building an integrated renewable energy platform. The company will now be able to access demand centers across multiple states, optimize power sales based on market conditions, engage with a broader customer base, and participate in exchange-led and short-term markets.

announcements.subject: Jindal Stainless Ltd - 532508 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has launched its first-ever brand campaign titled ‘Jindal Saathi Seal Hai, Toh Asli Stainless Steel Hai’ on April 23, 2026, featuring Bollywood actor Ranveer Singh. This campaign signifies a strategic shift towards a more consumer-facing approach from the company's predominantly B2B focus. The campaign introduces the 'Jindal Saathi Seal,' a co-branded mark of trust, to help consumers identify genuine stainless steel products. The initial focus of the brand film is on the Pipes & Tubes category, which is widely used in critical sectors like infrastructure and construction. The campaign utilizes a high-energy musical anthem composed by Amit Trivedi to enhance brand recall and consumer engagement. The initiative addresses the consumer insight that many individuals lack the means to verify the authenticity of stainless steel products, making them vulnerable to counterfeits.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Creation Of Hypothecate/Mortgage/ Pledge And/Or Create Charge Required To Secure The Loan Facility Of Up To USD 550 Million
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Ltd announced on April 23, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved availing a loan facility of up to USD 550 million from banks, financial institutions, and/or other lenders. This loan facility is proposed to be secured by a charge over certain assets of the Company, with terms and conditions to be agreed upon in a facilities agreement dated April 23, 2026. In connection with this, the company is creating a hypothecate/mortgage/pledge and/or charge on all or any of its properties to secure the loan facility. This action is part of the agreed funding structure for the Encora transaction.

announcements.subject: Dynamatic Technologies Ltd-$ - 505242 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Dynamatic Technologies Limited, through its division Dynauton Systems, has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Aerodata AG, a German aviation solutions provider. This MoU establishes a strategic partnership to develop a new unmanned, airborne surveillance and reconnaissance solution specifically for the Indian region. The collaboration will focus on further developing Aerodata's AeroForce® X platform, a Male UAS with high payload capacity and up to 40 hours of endurance, suitable for ISR missions. Dynauton Systems will contribute its engineering and manufacturing expertise in unmanned systems, while Aerodata will bring its experience in integrating complex airborne surveillance systems. This partnership aims to tailor the AeroForce® X platform to meet the requirements of the Indian market for ISR missions, particularly in challenging terrains like the Himalayas and the Indian Ocean Region.

announcements.subject: Bharti Airtel Ltd - 532454 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has disclosed an order received from the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) on April 22, 2026. The order levies a financial disincentive of INR 21,07,116.60/- on the company. This disincentive is due to alleged non-compliance with the Quality of Service (Code of Practice for Metering and Billing Accuracy) Regulation, 2006, for the financial year 2021-22. The company is required to pay this amount as a penalty.

announcements.subject: Sarla Performance Fibers Ltd-$ - 526885 - Results - Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Sarla Performance Fibers Limited, in their meeting held on April 22, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, both standalone and consolidated. This includes the Statement of Assets and Liabilities and Cash Flow Statements. The Statutory Auditors, C N K & Associates LLP, issued a qualified audit opinion on the standalone financial statements for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This qualification relates to the sale of 11 Non-Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares in its subsidiary, Sarla Flex Inc. (USA), for USD 1,21,000, resulting in a loss of ₹25,433.16 lakhs recognized as an Exceptional Item. The company has applied to regulators for necessary approvals regarding this sale, write-off, and credit of sale proceeds, which are currently pending. The Board noted the qualification, with management confident in receiving the approvals, and has enclosed the "Statement on Impact of Audit Qualifications."

announcements.subject:
Man Industries (India) Ltd-$ - 513269 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And
Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform you that the Board of Directors of the Man Industries (India) Limited ('the Company') at its meeting held on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, approved the issuance of Corporate Guarantee of USD 70 Million in favour of lenders of Man International Steel Industries Company ('MISIC'), wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

The details ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Man Industries (India) Limited, in its meeting held on April 22, 2026, approved the issuance of a Corporate Guarantee of USD 70 Million. This guarantee is in favor of the lenders of Man International Steel Industries Company (MISIC), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company. MISIC requires this guarantee for its business expansion in Saudi Arabia. The Corporate Guarantee will be treated as a contingent liability for Man Industries (India) Limited, with no immediate impact on the company. The Board meeting commenced at 9:30 PM and concluded at 10:02 PM.

announcements.company: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd
announcements.subject: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd - 532898 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Incorporation of a Special Purpose Vehicle in Kenya Jointly by POWERGRID and Africa50, for the implementation of Kenya Transmission PPP Project.
announcements.ai_summary: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) and Africa50 have successfully incorporated a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) in Kenya named MWANGA TRANSMISSION COMPANY LIMITED. This SPV is for the implementation of the Kenya Transmission PPP Project. The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Registrar of Companies, Kenya, on April 21, 2026. The SPV has been established pursuant to a Project Agreement with Kenya Electricity Transmission Company Limited (KETRACO) for the Kenya Independent Power Transmission Project under a Public Private Partnership framework. POWERGRID will hold 40 percent equity and Africa50 will hold 60 percent equity in the SPV.

announcements.subject: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd - 544322 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - Unimech Signs Definitive Agreements to acquire Hobel Bellows to Accelerate Capability Expansion and Drive Long-Term Value
announcements.ai_summary: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd has signed definitive agreements to acquire Hobel Bellows, a specialized Indian manufacturer of metallic bellows, flexible tubing components, and precision-engineered assemblies. This acquisition is a significant step towards building a globally competitive, capability-led precision engineering platform and deepening relevance across high-value industrial sectors. Hobel Bellows operates from an 180,000 sq. ft. manufacturing facility in Visakhapatnam and has a strong export-oriented OEM business with approximately 90% of its business being export-oriented to markets like the UK, USA, Singapore, and China. For the year ended March 31, 2026, Hobel Bellows' provisional figures are mentioned in the release. The transaction is subject to the completion of standard closing conditions.

announcements.subject: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd - 540719 - Audio Recording - Earnings Calls For Q4 Of FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Please note that the Audio recording of earnings conference calls with Analysts and Institutional Investors has been hosted on Company''s website.
announcements.ai_summary: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd has informed that the audio recording of the earnings conference calls held on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, with analysts and institutional investors regarding the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, has been hosted on the company's website. This follows their earlier intimation dated April 16, 2026. The recording is available on the company's investor relations section at https://www.sbilife.co.in/en/about-us/investor-relations.

announcements.subject: Adani Green Energy Ltd - 541450 - Operationalisation Of Project
announcements.detail: Operationalisation of Project
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) announced that its wholly-owned stepdown subsidiary, Adani Green Energy Twenty Six A Limited (AGE26AL), has operationalized a solar power project with a capacity of 292 MW located in Khavda, Gujarat. This commissioning brings AGEL's total operational renewable generation capacity to 19,585.8 MW and its total operational BESS capacity to 1,376 MWh. The decision to operationalize the plant and commence power generation was made at 7:37 p.m. on April 22, 2026, with power generation expected to start from April 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Rajratan Global Wire Ltd - 517522 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Audio Recording of Conference Call held on April 22nd , 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Rajratan Global Wire Ltd has uploaded the audio recording of its conference call held on April 22, 2026, to its company website. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015. Investors can access the call recording at https://rajratan.co.in/q4-fy26-post-results-conference-call.

announcements.subject: Knowledge Realty Trust - 544481 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Knowledge Realty Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Knowledge Realty Trust, through its manager Knowledge Realty Office Management Services Private Limited, has scheduled a meeting of its Borrowing Committee for Monday, April 27, 2026. The committee will consider and potentially approve raising funds for the Trust. The proposed fundraising methods include the issuance of listed, rated, redeemable non-convertible debentures, commercial papers, or other permitted modes. These issuances may occur in one or more transactions, series, or tranches to eligible investors.

announcements.subject: PDS Ltd - 538730 - General Updates - Intimation Of Dispatch Of Notice To Creditors For Shifting Of Registered Office.
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the Exchanges regarding dispatch of notice to creditors for shifting of registered office.
announcements.ai_summary: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchanges that it has dispatched notices to its creditors as of March 31, 2026. These notices are in connection with the company's proposed shifting of its registered office from the State of Maharashtra to the State of Haryana. The company is seeking confirmation for this alteration of its Memorandum of Association through an application to the Regional Director, Western Region Directorate I, Mumbai, following a special resolution passed by shareholders on March 14, 2026. Objections can be submitted via the MCA-21 portal or by registered post.

announcements.subject: Reliance Industries Ltd - 500325 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find attached disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Industries Ltd (RIL) announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Jiostar India Private Limited, has amalgamated with its own wholly-owned subsidiary, IndiaCast Media Distribution Private Limited. This amalgamation is effective from April 21, 2026, following an order from the Regional Director, Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs. This corporate restructuring is for information and record purposes.

announcements.subject: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd - 541233 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release- The Company has signed two License Agreements viz. Lemon Tree Premier, Raipur and Lemon Tree Hotel, Jalandhar.
announcements.ai_summary: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd has announced the signing of two new License Agreements for properties in Raipur and Jalandhar. The Lemon Tree Premier, Raipur will feature 78 rooms, a restaurant, banquet hall, conference room, spa, swimming pool, and fitness center. The Lemon Tree Hotel, Jalandhar will offer 60 rooms, a restaurant, banquet hall, conference room, and recreational amenities including a swimming pool, spa, and fitness center. Both properties will be managed by Carnation Hotels Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Lemon Tree Hotels Limited. These signings are part of the company's strategic expansion in key growth markets of Chhattisgarh and Punjab, catering to business and leisure travelers.

announcements.subject: Sundram Fasteners Ltd - 500403 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Regulation 31(A)(8) Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Receipt Of Requests For Reclassification From The Promoter Group Category
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 Read with Regulations 31(A)(8) of the SEBI (Lisitng Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Receipt of requests for reclassificaton from the Promoter Group category is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Sundram Fasteners Limited has received requests for reclassification of Lakshminarayana Ancillaries Private Limited (LNL), Upasana Properties Private Limited (UPP), and Upasana Private Limited (UPL) from the 'Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. LNL and UPP merged with UFL Properties Private Limited (UFL) on October 16, 2025, and UPL merged with TVS Sundram Fasteners Private Limited on March 27, 2026. These entities were dissolved without winding up as part of the amalgamation schemes. The requests, dated April 22, 2026, will be placed before the Board of Directors for approval under Regulation 31A of the SEBI Listing Regulations. The company will take appropriate steps in compliance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Go Fashion (India) Ltd - 543401 - Intimation Pursuant To Regulation 30 Read With Regulation 31A (8) Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Receipt Of Request For Reclassification From 'Promoter And Promoter Group' Category To 'Public' Category
announcements.detail: Intimation pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Regulation 31A (8) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Receipt of request for reclassification from ''Promoter and Promoter Group'' category to ''Public'' category
announcements.ai_summary: Go Fashion (India) Limited has received requests from members of the Promoter Group seeking reclassification from the 'Promoter and Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category, as per Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. These requests were received on April 22, 2026. The individuals and entities seeking reclassification include Rashi Lohia, Rekha Gupta, Anita Goenka, Manju Agarwal, Nirmala Shorewala, Nisha Ajoy Rathi, Ajoy Balkrishna Rathi, Manan Ajoy Rathi, Murli Manohar, Brij Lal HUF, Manan Ajoy Rathi HUF, Murli Manohar HUF, Ajay Balkrishna Rathi HUF, Gupta Traders, Rajasthan Cotton Press Private Limited, Rathi Engineering LLP, Rathi Engineering Solutions Private Limited, Shorewala Paper Industries Private Limited, Shorewala Roller Flour Mills Private Limited, and Unplggd Education LLP. These requests will be placed before the Board of Directors for consideration at its next meeting, after which an application for no-objection will be submitted to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Valencia Nutrition Ltd - 542910 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Valencia Nutrition Limited announces the execution of a service agreement with Awfis Space Solutions Ltd, marking strategic entry into India''s rapidly expanding coworking ecosystem through its Vitabev aluminium can beverage portfolio.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Valencia Nutrition Limited announced on April 22, 2026, the execution of a service agreement with Awfis Space Solutions Ltd. This agreement marks Valencia Nutrition's strategic entry into the coworking ecosystem with its Vitabev aluminium can beverage portfolio, which includes Roar Energy Drinks, Bootea, Lime Leezure, and drink mixers. The first order has been delivered to twenty (20) Awfis centres in Mumbai, with plans to expand to all Awfis centres. Awfis Space Solutions, a workspace provider with over 243 centres in 18 cities as of March 2025, offers a high-frequency consumption environment suitable for Vitabev's urban distribution strategy. Valencia Nutrition's Vitabev brand has already achieved sales exceeding 100,000 cans since August 7, 2025, with a growing retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Sapphire Foods India Ltd - 543397 - Sapphire Foods India Limited Has Informed The Exchange About Receipt Of Order From Hon'Ble Regional Director For Shifting Of Registered Office Of The Company From 'State Of Maharashtra' To The 'State Of Haryana'.
announcements.detail: Sapphire Foods India Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of order from Hon''ble Regional Director for shifting of registered office of the Company from ''State of Maharashtra'' to ''State of Haryana''.
announcements.ai_summary: Sapphire Foods India Limited has received an order from the Hon'ble Regional Director (Western Region Directorate I) on April 21, 2026, approving the shifting of its registered office from the State of Maharashtra to the State of Haryana. This approval follows the company's earlier intimation dated January 1, 2026, regarding the proposed relocation, which was subject to requisite approvals. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this development.

announcements.subject: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd - 531035 - Un-Audited Financial Results For The Quarter And Nine Months Ended December 31, 2025
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Eraaya Lifespaces Limited's Board of Directors met on April 22, 2026, and approved the Un-audited Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The approval covers both standalone and consolidated financial statements, which were duly reviewed by the Audit Committee. The company has also received and enclosed the Limited Review Report from its Statutory Auditors. The Board meeting commenced at 02:00 PM and concluded at 04:35 PM. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd - 531035 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Wednesday, April 22, 2026
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Eraaya Lifespaces Limited's Board of Directors convened on April 22, 2026, at their New Delhi office. During this meeting, the Board approved the Un-audited Financial Results for both standalone and consolidated operations for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. These results were previously reviewed by the Audit Committee and are accompanied by a Limited Review Report from the company's Statutory Auditors. The Board meeting began at 02:00 PM and concluded at 04:35 PM. The company has submitted these financial results and the auditor's report to the exchange for record.

announcements.subject: Prakash Steelage Ltd - 533239 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of LODR
announcements.detail: Announcement under Reg 30 of LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Prakash Steelage Ltd has received a Show Cause Notice dated April 21, 2026, from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) under Rule 4(1) of the SEBI (Procedure for Holding Inquiry and Imposing Penalties) Rules, 1995. The notice pertains to alleged violations of various regulations, including 4(1)(a), (b), (c), (d), (e), (g), (h), (i), (j), 4(2)(e)(i), 23(9), 33(1)(a), 33(1)(c), 34(3) read with Clause B(2) of Schedule V & 48 of LODR Regulations. This is a continuation of an ongoing SEBI investigation, previously intimated on March 28, 2024. The company is preparing its response to the notice and will submit it within the permitted timelines.

announcements.subject: Eveready Industries India Ltd - 531508 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached Press Release issued by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Eveready Industries India Limited has announced the commissioning of India’s only operating alkaline battery facility in Jammu. The new greenfield facility, with an investment of approximately ₹200 crore, boasts an annual installed capacity of 456 million alkaline batteries, with a peak production capacity of 360 million. This facility aims to strengthen domestic manufacturing under the 'Make in India' initiative, reduce import dependence, and cater to the growing demand for high-performance batteries. The plant will also support white labelling and serve domestic and international markets, positioning Eveready as a global player in the alkaline battery segment. The inauguration was conducted by Shri Manoj Sinha, Hon’ble Lieutenant Governor of Jammu and Kashmir.

announcements.subject: Ikoma Technologies Ltd - 531997 - Confirmation Regarding Large Entity As Per SEBI Circular
announcements.detail: This is with reference to SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-RACPOD1/P/CIR/2023/172 dated October 19, 2023. In this connection, we would like to inform you that our Company, Ikoma Technologies Limited (Formerly known as 'Vuenow Infratech Limited') does not fall in the category of Large Entities as per the applicability framework provided in the aforesaid circular.
announcements.ai_summary: Ikoma Technologies Limited (formerly known as Vuenow Infratech Limited) has confirmed that it does not fall under the category of "Large Entities" as defined by SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-RACPOD1/P/CIR/2023/172 dated October 19, 2023. This confirmation is provided for the information and records of the exchanges. The company is operating within the framework established by the SEBI circular.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Receipt Of Observation Letters With ''No Adverse Observations'' From BSE Limited And 'No Objection' From National Stock Exchange Of India Limited In Relation To The Scheme Of Arrangement Between Sammaan Capital Limited ('Company' / 'SCL' / 'Resulting Company') And Sammaan Finserve Limited ('SFL' / 'Demerged Company') And Their Respective Shareholders And Creditors ('Scheme' Or 'Scheme Of Arrangement').
announcements.detail: In continuation of our earlier intimation dated December 31, 2025, informing about the decision taken by the Board of Directors of the Company approving the proposed scheme of Arrangement between the Demerged Company, i.e. SFL and the Resulting Company i.e. SCL and their respective shareholders and creditors under Section 230 and 232 read with Section 52, Section 66, and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, and the rules framed ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Ltd has received observation letters with "no adverse observations" from BSE Limited on April 21, 2026, and "no objection" from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 22, 2026, regarding the Scheme of Arrangement between Sammaan Capital Limited (Resulting Company) and Sammaan Finserve Limited (Demerged Company). This follows the Board's approval of the scheme on December 31, 2025, under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The observation letters are crucial for proceeding with the scheme, which is subject to further requisite regulatory and statutory approvals. Copies of these letters are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Zodiac Energy Ltd - 543416 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of an Letter of Intent (LOI) for Solar Power Projects in Zambia
announcements.ai_summary: Zodiac Energy Ltd has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) from an international entity in Zambia for a turnkey solar power project. The project involves the design, supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of a Ground Mounted Solar PV Power Plant with a capacity of 6 MWp DC, 5 MW AC, and 1 MWh BESS in Lusaka, Zambia. The aggregate value of this order is US $3,288,000, based on the prevailing exchange rate. This order is expected to enhance the company's presence in the renewable energy sector and contribute to its revenues over the project execution period. Further details are provided in Annexure I, as per SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Intimation Pursuant To Master Circular Of SEBI/HO/DDHS/Pod1/P/CIR/2024/54 Dated May 22, 2024 Regarding Listing Of ISIN INE522D07CK1
announcements.detail: Intimation pursuant to Master Circular of SEBI No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated May 22, 2024 regarding listing of ISIN INE522D07CK1
announcements.ai_summary: Amman Finance Ltd has announced the listing details for ISIN INE522D07CK1. The first issue of these securities was allotted on April 20, 2026, and will be listed on April 21, 2026. The listing quantity for this first issue is 52,500 units. This announcement is made in compliance with the Master Circular of SEBI No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated May 22, 2024, regarding the listing of ISINs. Investors should note these listing details for their records.

announcements.subject: True Colors Ltd - 544531 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Intimation Regarding Participation At FESPA Global Print Expo 2026, In Barcelona By Inkia Inks Private Limited, Group Company.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Intimation regarding participation at FESPA Global Print Expo 2026 in Barcelona by Inkia Inks Private limited, Group Company during period 19-22 May, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: True Colors Ltd has announced that its group company, Inkia Inks Private Limited, will be participating in the FESPA Global Print Expo 2026 in Barcelona from May 19-22, 2026. This event will provide Inkia Inks the opportunity to engage with global converters and showcase its latest ink formulations for direct-to-textile and transfer workflows. The expo is expected to highlight the demand for sustainable, high-performance inks in various textile applications. Inkia Inks Private Limited is a specialized digital ink manufacturer.

announcements.subject: Delhivery Ltd - 543529 - Shareholders Facility Visit On May 25, 2026
announcements.detail: The Company is organizing a facility visit for its non-institutional shareholders on May 25, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Delhivery Ltd is organizing a facility visit for its non-institutional shareholders to its Tauru Mega Gateway in Tauru, Haryana, on May 25, 2026. The visit is scheduled from 12 Noon to 3 PM. Shareholders interested in attending must register via a Google Form by May 15, 2026. Due to logistical limitations, the number of participating shareholders will be restricted to a maximum of 50, and final selection will be at the company's discretion. Confirmation emails will be sent by May 19, 2026.

announcements.subject: Arvind Ltd - 500101 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Incorporation of a subsidiary company in UAE
announcements.ai_summary: Arvind Ltd has incorporated a new subsidiary company in the United Arab Emirates (U.A.E.) named "Arvind Atelier (FZC)". The company obtained a Virtual License Certificate from Sharjah Airport International Free Zone (SAIF Zone) for this subsidiary, with the information received on April 22, 2026. Arvind Atelier (FZC) is incorporated in Sharjah, U.A.E., and its primary business will be Ready-made Garments Trading & Textile Trading. The company plans to invest cash consideration, with 80 shares of AED 1500 each to be subscribed by Arvind Ltd out of a total of 100 shares.

announcements.subject: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd - 544133 - Announcement Under Regulation 30-Dilution Of Stake And Change In Status Of Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Exicom has informed the Exchange regarding dilution of stake and change in status of Exicom Power Solutions B.V., Netherlands from "Wholly-owned Subsidiary" to "Subsidiary" of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd has announced a dilution of stake in its material wholly-owned subsidiary, Exicom Power Solutions B.V., Netherlands. The Board of Directors of Exicom B.V. approved the conversion of Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) aggregating USD 5.5 million (approximately EUR 4.77 million) into ordinary equity shares. This conversion, which includes an additional USD 1 million over the previously approved USD 4.5 million, has resulted in the dilution of Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd's shareholding from 100% to 92.23%. Consequently, Exicom B.V. is no longer a wholly-owned subsidiary but will remain a material subsidiary.

announcements.subject: Persistent Systems Ltd - 533179 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: The intimation under Reg. 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 is as enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Persistent Systems Limited has received sanction from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, for the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, Arrka Infosec Private Limited, into Persistent Systems Limited. The NCLT's order was dated April 21, 2026, and the company received official notification via email on the same day. The certified copy of the NCLT order is still awaited, and Persistent Systems Limited will submit it to the stock exchanges upon receipt. This merger by absorption was previously disclosed under Regulation 37(6) of the LODR Regulations on May 16, 2025.

announcements.subject: Burnpur Cement Ltd - 532931 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulation- Order Passed By NCLT.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulation -order of NCLT.
announcements.ai_summary: Burnpur Cement Limited has received a significant order from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, dated April 20, 2026, which was received by the company on April 21, 2026. The NCLT has dismissed and disposed of the application filed by Mittal Pollypacks Private Limited (Operational Creditor) under section 9 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 (application no. C.P(IB) No. 37/KB/2022). This ruling is in favor of Burnpur Cement Limited, meaning the company is not subject to insolvency proceedings and will continue its operations as a going concern.

announcements.subject: Manoj Ceramic Ltd - 544073 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 1,00,000 Equity Shares upon conversion of Warrants into Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Manoj Ceramic Ltd has approved the allotment of 1,00,000 equity shares following the conversion of warrants. These shares, with a face value of ₹ 10.00 each, were issued at a price of ₹ 161.00 each, including a premium of ₹ 151.00 per share. The conversion was exercised by Dhruv Manoj Rakhasiya, a promoter, who applied for the conversion of 1,00,000 warrants. This allotment increases the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital to ₹ 13,80,70,000, comprising 1,38,07,000 equity shares of ₹ 10.00 each. The new shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares. The Board meeting where this was approved took place on April 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Amanta Healthcare Ltd - 544502 - Clarification Letter On Earlier Disclosure Submitted On April 18Th, 2026, Pursuant To SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Clarification Letter on earlier disclosure submitted on April 18th, 2026, pursuant to SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Amanta Healthcare Ltd has provided a clarification regarding the acquisition of shares by its Promoter, Shri Bhavesh Patel. Following an earlier disclosure on April 1st, 2026, and a clarification on April 18th, 2026, the company now confirms that the remaining 15,500 shares purchased on March 30, 2026, were credited to Shri Bhavesh Patel's demat account on April 17, 2026. This brings the total shares credited to 15,500, representing 0.04% of the total voting capital. Consequently, the Promoter's shareholding has increased from 16.25% (63,11,044 shares) before the acquisition to 16.29% (63,26,544 shares) after the acquisition. The company requests that this revised information replace the earlier intimation to accurately reflect the shareholding position.

announcements.subject: EPL Ltd - 500135 - Certificate Confirming Fulfilment Of Payment Obligations Of Commercial Papers Issued By EPL Limited
announcements.detail: Certificate confirming fulfillment of payment obligations of Commercial Papers issued by EPL Limited on January 22, 2026 with a maturity date of April 22, 2026, is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: EPL Ltd has fulfilled its payment obligations for Commercial Papers (CPs) that were issued on January 22, 2026, and had a maturity date of April 22, 2026. The company fully redeemed these CPs, aggregating to an amount of Rs. 60 Crore, on April 22, 2026. This action is in compliance with Chapter XVII of the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025. The ISIN for these CPs is INE255A14726. This confirmation is provided to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for their records.

announcements.subject: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd - 544200 - Intimation Of Submission Of Application For Reclassification From The Category Of ''''''''Promoter Group'''''''' To ''''''''Public".
announcements.detail: Intimation of Submission of Application For Reclassification From the Category of " Promoter Group" to " Public" under Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.

This action is in accordance with Regulation 31A (8) (c) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This submission follows earlier intimations made on April 09, 2026, and April 20, 2026. The company requests that this material event be taken on record. Further details are available on the company's website at https://www.akmefintrade.com/.

announcements.subject: Kaya Ltd - 539276 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Winding-up
announcements.detail: KME Holdings Pte. Ltd., (Singapore) a wholly owned subsidiary of the company which was under voluntary liquidation has been dissolved with effect from April 22, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: KME Holdings Pte. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of Kaya Ltd, has been dissolved effective April 22, 2026, as per records from the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA), Singapore. This dissolution means KME Holdings Pte. Ltd. is no longer a subsidiary of Kaya Ltd. The company stated that KME Holdings Pte. Ltd. was not a material subsidiary, and its dissolution will not materially impact Kaya Ltd's business or financials. As of March 31, 2025, KME Holdings Pte. Ltd. contributed Rs. 25,68,71,565.22 (10% of turnover/revenue/income) and had a net worth of Rs. 75,83,333.62 (1% of net worth).

announcements.subject: Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd - 532796 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 with respect to the order dated April 15, 2026, received by the Company on April 22, 2026, passed by the Hon''ble NCLT, New Delhi Bench in respect of the Scheme of Amalgamation between IAC International Automotive India Private Limited (Transferor Company) and Lumax Auto Technologies Limited (Transferee Company) ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, has passed an order dated April 15, 2026, concerning the Scheme of Amalgamation between IAC International Automotive India Private Limited and Lumax Auto Technologies Limited. This order was received by Lumax Auto Technologies Limited on April 22, 2026. The NCLT has allowed or reserved its order with respect to the Second Motion petition. The final pronouncement date of the order is yet to be listed by the Hon'ble NCLT. Investors should monitor for the listing of the final order date to understand the completion timeline of this amalgamation.

announcements.subject: Grasim Industries Ltd - 500300 - Submission Of Disclosure Pursuant To Chapter XIV - Centralized Database For Corporate Bonds/ Debentures, Annexure XIV - B Of SEBI Master Circular Dated October 15, 2025 As Amended
