announcements.ai_summary: Grasim Industries Ltd has submitted disclosures for its Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) for FY 2025-26, as per Chapter XIV of the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025. The submission includes listing details for various NCD series with different face values and listing dates on BSE and NSE. The company has also provided hyperlinks to the 'Listing Notification by stock exchange' for each ISIN. This disclosure is part of the regulatory requirement for a centralized database for corporate bonds and debentures.

announcements.company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT
announcements.subject: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT - 543261 - Reg 23(5)(c): Disclosure of additional issue of units by the REIT
announcements.detail: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Issue of units through  Institutional placement on 22/04/2026
announcements.ai_summary: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has approved the allotment of 80,495,356 units to eligible institutional investors through an institutional placement. The issue price was ₹323.00 per unit, including a discount of ₹6.94 (2.10%) on the floor price of ₹329.94. This placement is expected to raise approximately ₹2,600 crores. Following this allotment, the total number of issued and outstanding units is 829,880,869. This transaction is part of the REIT's strategy to raise capital from institutional investors.

announcements.subject: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd - 533326 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has received an order from South Western Railway for the outsourcing of OHE and PSI maintenance activities. This contract is valued at Rs. 7.67 crores (excluding taxes) and will be executed over a period of two years. The order is for a domestic entity and is expected to be completed within 24 months from the date of the Letter of Acceptance. This new order contributes to the company's revenue stream and demonstrates its capabilities in maintenance services.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration With Openai To Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation And Unlock AI Value At Scale
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Limited has announced a strategic collaboration with OpenAI, aiming to accelerate enterprise AI transformation and unlock AI value at scale. This partnership will leverage OpenAI's frontier AI models, including Codex, and combine them with Infosys Topaz Fabric, an agentic services suite. The collaboration focuses on co-innovation, scalable enterprise delivery, and responsible adoption of AI, with an initial emphasis on software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps automation. The goal is to help organizations move from AI experimentation to practical, responsible deployment and achieve measurable business outcomes.

announcements.subject: Empower India Ltd - 504351 - Admission Of Securities Of Empower India Limited On National Stock Exchange
announcements.detail: National Stock Exchange vide their Circular ref no. 0645/2026 dated 17th April 2026 admitted securities of Empower India Limited on NSE Portal, permitting trading and dealing in the Securities of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Empower India Limited's securities have been admitted to the National Stock Exchange (NSE) portal, effective April 20, 2026, as per NSE Circular Ref No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026. This admission permits trading and dealing in the company's securities on the NSE under the symbol "EMPOWER". This development signifies increased accessibility and liquidity for investors on a major stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Agribio Spirits Ltd - 539546 - Notice For Update Of Address Of The Corporate Office Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Update of Address of the Corporate Office of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Agribio Spirits Ltd (formerly known as Beekay Niryat Limited) informed on April 22, 2026, about an update to its corporate office address. The new corporate office is located at 302-305, Signature Elite, J7 Govind Marg, Narayan Singh Circle, Jaipur - 302004. The company also stated that its books of accounts are now being maintained and kept at this new address. This update is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Atishay Ltd - 538713 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: The Company has secured a work order from the office of CHiPS, Chhattisgarh for Aadhaar Services project -Order value Rs. 1.90 Crores inclusive of taxes.  For more details kindly refer the announcement.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Atishay Ltd announced on April 22, 2026, that it has secured a Work Order from the Office of CHiPS, Chhattisgarh, for the Aadhaar Services project. The total contract value of this Work Order is ₹1,90,00,000/- (Rupees One Crore Ninety Lakh only), inclusive of taxes. The project involves the Development, Implementation, Operation & Maintenance of Aadhaar and its Allied Services in the State of Chhattisgarh. This domestic order is to be executed within a period of 3 years and 3 months from the date of issuance. The company views this as a significant addition to its order book, enhancing revenue visibility and reinforcing its position as a trusted partner for large-scale government projects.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Foods Ltd - 519126 - Corporate Action-Updates on Amalgamation/ Merger / Demerger
announcements.detail: Please refer to the attached PDF.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hindustan Foods Limited (HFL) announced on April 22, 2026, that its Board of Directors has taken on record the certified copy of the order dated February 25, 2026, from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench. This order sanctions the Scheme of Arrangement between Avalon Cosmetics Private Limited (Demerged Company), Vanity Case India Private Limited (Transferor Company), and Hindustan Foods Limited (Transferee Company). The certified copy of the NCLT order was received on March 6, 2026, and is available on the company's website. This development follows previous announcements made on April 1, 2026, and February 26, 2026, regarding the effective date of the scheme.

announcements.subject: Agi Greenpac Ltd - 500187 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding completion of second tranche investment in Madoverbuilding AI Private Limited by AGI Greenpac Limited
announcements.ai_summary: AGI Greenpac Limited has completed its second tranche investment in Madoverbuilding AI Private Limited (MOB). Following this Tranche 2 Investment, AGI Greenpac Limited now holds an aggregate of 19.75% of the paid-up share capital of MOB on a fully diluted basis. This is a continuation of their investment strategy, with the first tranche completed on May 30, 2025, where they acquired 14.28% of MOB's share capital. The Board of Directors had previously approved a revision to the total stake to be subscribed from 25% to 19.75% on January 28, 2026. Detailed information as required by SEBI regulations is enclosed.

announcements.subject: Modern Dairies Ltd - 519287 - Intimation  Of The Receipt Of Trading Approval From BSE Limited For Trading Of 28,00,000 (Twenty-Eight Lakh) Equity Shares Issued Pursuant To Conversion Of Warrants
announcements.detail:

Warrants to Promoters and Promoter group on preferential basis.

These shares were issued pursuant to the conversion of warrants to Promoters and the Promoter group on a preferential basis. The shares have a face value of Rs. 10/- each and were issued at a premium of Rs. 40/- per share. This approval follows the company's earlier intimation on April 10, 2026, regarding the listing approval for these shares. The company has requested that this information be recorded.

announcements.subject: UVS Hospitality And Services Ltd - 531652 - Board Meeting Outcome for Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Outcome Of Board Meeting W.R.T Shifting Of Registered Office Of The Company
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and pursuant to the certified true copy of the Order dated 20th January, 2026 as received from the Regional Director, Eastern Region, under Section 13(4) of the Companies Act, 2013, for shifting of the Registered Office of the Company from the 'State of West Bengal' to the 'State of Maharashtra', the Board of the Directors of the Company at ....
announcements.ai_summary: UVS Hospitality And Services Ltd has announced the shifting of its registered office from West Bengal to Maharashtra, effective April 22, 2026. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors at a meeting held on the same day. The shifting is pursuant to an Order dated January 20, 2026, received from the Regional Director, Eastern Region, under Section 13(4) of the Companies Act, 2013. The registered office will move from Kolkata, West Bengal, to Andheri, Mumbai, Maharashtra. The company has requested that this change be taken on record by the exchange.

announcements.subject: Angel One Ltd - 543235 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: intimation for Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.ai_summary: Angel One Ltd has released the transcript of its earnings call held on April 17, 2026, for the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2026. This follows their prior intimation on March 27, 2026, regarding the scheduled call with analysts and investors. The transcript provides detailed discussions on the company's financial performance and outlook. Investors can access the full transcript on the company's website at www.angelone.in. The company has also uploaded the audio recordings of the call to the stock exchange on April 17, 2026, which will prevail in case of any discrepancies.

announcements.subject: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd - 505700 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Transcript of the Earnings Conference call held on 16th April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: IDFC First Bank Limited will host an earnings call on April 25, 2026, at 6:00 PM IST to discuss its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Senior management will participate in the call. Dial-in information and a pre-registration link are provided. An audio replay and transcript of the earnings call will be made available on the company's website in due course. This announcement follows an earlier intimation regarding the Board of Directors' meeting scheduled for April 25, 2026, to approve these financial results.

announcements.subject: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd - 590003 - Opening of New Branch
announcements.detail: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has informed BSE regarding Opening of New Branch.
announcements.ai_summary: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has informed BSE regarding the opening of a new branch as part of its business expansion. The new branch, designated as Branch Serial Number 902 and named Thirupuvanam, will be located at No. 99/2, Madurai Mandapam Main Road, Thirupuvanam Town Panchayat and Thirupuvanam Taluk, Sivaganga District – 630 611. The inauguration of this new branch is scheduled for April 27, 2026. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Skyline Millars Ltd - 505650 - Audited Financial Results For The 4Th Quarter And Year Ended 31St March, 2026
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors approved today the Aduited Financial Results for the 4th quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. Enclosed copt of the said results along with Auditor''s report and declaration on Auditor''s report with Unmodified Opinion.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Skyline Millars Ltd convened on April 22, 2026, and approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has enclosed the said results along with the auditor's report, which includes a declaration of an unmodified opinion. The financial statements indicate a loss before tax of Rs. (45.85) Lakhs for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and a loss before tax of Rs. (106.38) Lakhs for the full year ended March 31, 2026. The total income for the quarter was Rs. 7.09 Lakhs, with total expenses amounting to Rs. 52.94 Lakhs. For the full year, total income was Rs. 220.24 Lakhs and total expenses were Rs. 326.62 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: HCL Technologies Ltd - 532281 - Release - 'Hcltech Launches Gemini Enterprise Business Unit To Accelerate Agentic AI Adoption'
announcements.detail: Enclosed please find a release on the captioned subject being issued by the Company today.
announcements.ai_summary: HCL Technologies Ltd has announced the launch of a dedicated Gemini Enterprise Business Unit to accelerate the adoption of agentic AI solutions. This new unit, the first of its kind from a global system integrator, will focus on developing industry-specific solutions built on Google Gemini Enterprise. The initiative aims to help enterprises transition from manual to automated decision-making processes, driving outcomes such as reduced downtime and improved diagnostic accuracy. This launch aligns with HCLTech's vision to boost industry solution-led AI adoption and strengthens its partnership with Google Cloud, following their recent recognition as Google Cloud Partner of the Year in two categories.

announcements.subject: DIC India Ltd - 500089 - Please Find Enclosed Disclosure Regarding Update On Pendency Of Dispute Against Star Plastics.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure in furtherance of the disclosure filed on 14.04.2926 regarding star plastics.
announcements.ai_summary: DIC India Limited has filed an appeal before the Hon’ble Delhi High Court challenging an order dated April 7, 2026, passed by the Ld. District Court, New Delhi. This order was in relation to a commercial suit for recovery filed against Star Plastics. The company had previously disclosed details of this litigation on April 14, 2026. The appeal is being filed in furtherance of the company's disclosure obligations under Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Further details regarding the expected financial implications and the quantum of claims are stated to be as explained in the previous disclosure.

announcements.subject: Premier Explosives Ltd - 526247 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Cancellation Of Export Order.
announcements.detail: This is to inform about the termination / cancellation of export order of Rs. 18.90 crores for supply of defence explosives, which was intimated to stock exchanges on March 18, 2025, due to non receipt of export license from Goverment of India for export of said products.
announcements.ai_summary: Premier Explosives Limited has announced the termination and cancellation of an export order valued at Rs. 18.90 crore for the supply of defence explosives. This order was originally intimated to the stock exchanges on March 18, 2025, and was placed by an International Entity. The cancellation is due to the non-receipt of an export license from the Government of India for the specified products. The company states that this termination will have a negligible impact on its financial performance, and no damages will be incurred due to the cancellation.

announcements.subject: Sheela Foam Ltd - 540203 - Trading Approval For 4,88,146
announcements.detail: Listing and Trading Approval from BSE and NSE has been received for 4,88,146 shares
announcements.ai_summary: Sheela Foam Limited has received trading approval from BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for 4,88,146 equity shares. These shares were allotted on April 22, 2026, as part of a Composite Scheme of Arrangement involving the amalgamation of Kurlon Enterprise Limited into Sheela Foam Limited. The allotment was made at a face value of Rs. 5/- per share to the eligible shareholders of Kurlon Enterprise Limited, based on the approved share exchange ratio. These new shares will rank pari-passu in all respects with the existing equity shares of Sheela Foam Limited.

announcements.subject: Pushpsons Industries Ltd - 531562 - Revised Financial Results For The Period Ended 31St March, 2019
announcements.detail:
As per the instructions, we have added and merged all attachments as a one complete PDF file as, we (accidentally and unintentionally )missed two pages during this merging process.

announcements.ai_summary: Pushpsons Industries Ltd has submitted revised financial results for the period ended March 31, 2019, to the stock exchanges on April 22, 2026. The company confirms that the content of the previously submitted and the newly attached results are identical. This resubmission is to ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements.

announcements.company: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd
announcements.subject: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd - 523874 - Receipt Of Letter Of Acceptance From Central Armed Police Forces- Indo Tibetan Border Police ( ITBP) - Guwahati.
announcements.detail: Receipt of Letter of Acceptance from Central Armed Police Forces - Indo Tibetan Border Police (ITBP) - Guwahati.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from the Indo Tibetan Border Police (ITBP) - Guwahati for the supply of Steel Drums/Barrels. The value of this order is Rs. 2,98,77,397/- (Rupees Two Crore Ninety Eight Lakh Seventy Seven Thousand Three Hundred Ninety Seven Only). The barrels will be supplied to Guwahati. This order signifies a milestone in the company's association with ITBP and reaffirms its capability in delivering industrial packaging solutions for the energy and defense sectors.

announcements.subject: Icodex Publishing Solutions Ltd - 544483 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome-Availing Of Credit Facilities From ICICI Bank And Creation Of Charge Thereon
announcements.detail: The Board of Directors of the Company, at its meeting held on 22nd April 2026, has approved to avail credit facilities from ICICI Bank, Viman Nagar Branch aggregating to Rs. 10,80,00,000 (Rupees Ten Crore Eighty Lakhs only) for working capital and general corporate purposes and capex through Credit Arrangement Letter ("CAL").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Icodex Publishing Solutions Limited, in a meeting held on April 22, 2026, approved availing credit facilities from ICICI Bank, Viman Nagar Branch. The total credit facility amounts to Rs. 10,80,00,000 (Rupees Ten Crore Eighty Lakhs only). These funds are intended for working capital, general corporate purposes, and capital expenditure (capex) through a Credit Arrangement Letter (CAL). The proposed borrowings are within the limits specified under Section 180(1)(c) of the Companies Act, 2013, and the creation of charge on the company's assets will comply with Section 180(1)(a) of the Act.

announcements.subject: SPML Infra Ltd - 500402 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 42,44,844 Equity shares
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SPML Infra Limited's Board of Directors, through a circular resolution passed on April 22, 2026, approved the allotment of 42,44,844 equity shares of face value Rs. 2/- each at a price of Rs. 215/- per share. This allotment includes a premium of Rs. 213/- per equity share and is on a preferential basis to the Promoter Group and non-promoters upon the exercise of rights attached to 42,44,844 warrants. Key allottees include Niral Enterprises Pvt. Ltd (18,94,717 shares), SPML India Ltd (465,116 shares), and Tusk Investments Ltd (755,000 shares). The allotment is in accordance with SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: Umiya Mobile Ltd - 544464 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
We have attached herewith press release as per Reg. 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.

Kindly take the same on your record.

Thank you.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Umiya Mobile Limited has operationalized two new retail stores in Gujarat, located in Vyara and Amreli, on April 21, 2026. The company is also proposing to expand its retail footprint by opening 37 new stores. These new stores will be located across Madhya Pradesh (13 stores), Maharashtra (11 stores), and Gujarat (13 stores). The expansion aims to strengthen the company's market presence across Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 cities. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to enhancing accessibility and its position as a trusted destination for mobile and consumer electronics.

announcements.subject: IDFC First Bank Ltd - 539437 - Earnings Call For Period Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Kindly refer the enclosed attachment for revised timings of Earnings call for period ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: IDFC First Bank Ltd has rescheduled its earnings call for the period ended March 31, 2026. The call with analysts and investors will now take place on Saturday, April 25, 2026, at 05:00 p.m. Indian Standard Time (IST). Senior management will be discussing the Financial Results during this call. Dial-in information for the conference call has been provided, including universal access numbers and toll-free numbers for Singapore, UK, Hong Kong, and USA. A pre-registration link is also available. An audio replay and transcript of the earnings call will be made available on the bank's website in due course. This is a revision of the previously intimated date of April 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: AAA Technologies Ltd - 543671 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail: Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Offer Opening Public Announcement under Regulation 18(7) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended for the attention of the eligible Equity Shareholders of AAA Technologies Ltd ("Target Company").

The open offer is being made by Jyotirgamya Advisory Private Limited and Mr. Ashok Kumar Chordia to acquire up to 33,34,968 fully paid-up equity shares of face value `10 each at a price of `101.00 per equity share. This represents 26.00% of the voting share capital of AAA Technologies Limited. The offer price of `101.00 per equity share has not been revised. The Committee of Independent Directors has reviewed the offer and opined that the Offer Price is fair and reasonable in accordance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The offer is a continuation of previous announcements dated December 29, 2025, January 05, 2026, and January 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: United Drilling Tools Ltd - 522014 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Award of Order from Vedanta Limited (Cairn Oil & Gas)
announcements.ai_summary: United Drilling Tools Ltd has received a domestic order from Vedanta Limited (Cairn Oil & Gas) for the supply of Tubing, Pup Joints & Crossovers, including accessories. The estimated contract value for this order is INR 3,16,65,748.40. The order is to be executed within a period of 4 Months from the award date. This is a commercial order and does not involve any interest from promoters or promoter group companies in Vedanta Limited. The company has not indicated any further steps or approvals required for this order.

announcements.subject: Mangalam Cement Ltd - 502157 - Disclosure U/R 30 Of SEBI ( LODR) Regulations, 2015 For Grant Of Mining Lease Of Minyun Ki Dhani Main Jaisalmer.
announcements.detail: Disclosure u/r 30 of SEBI ( LODR) Regulations, 2015 for grant of mining lease of Minyun Ki Dhani Main, Jaisalmer
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mangalam Cement Ltd has been declared the preferred bidder for the grant of a Mining Lease of Minyun Ki Dhani Main, Jaisalmer. The company participated in a forward e-auction conducted on MSTC’s e-auction portal on April 21, 2026, as per the Notice Inviting Tender (NIT) dated February 27, 2026, issued by the Directorate of Mines and Geology, Rajasthan. This development is a significant step for the company in securing mining resources. The formal grant of the lease is subject to further procedures by the Directorate of Mines and Geology, Government of Rajasthan.

announcements.subject: Hyundai Motor India Ltd - 544274 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR')
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has received an Order from the Commissioner of Customs, Chennai – II (Imports), imposing a differential duty of Rs. 7,27,44,961/-. The order also includes a penalty of Rs. 7,27,44,961/- and a Redemption fine of Rs. 7,47,00,000/-. The violation alleged is the incorrect classification of air purifiers to claim a concessional duty of 7.5%, resulting in a short payment of customs duty. The company is currently reviewing the order and considering its options to file an appeal. The exact amount of interest has not been quantified in the order.

announcements.subject: Supriya Lifescience Ltd - 543434 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Update On Inspection By United States Food & Drug Administration (USFDA)
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith Announcement pertaining to update on USFDA.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Supriya Lifescience Limited has provided an update on an inspection conducted by the United States Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) at its manufacturing facility in Lote, Maharashtra. The inspection took place from February 2, 2026, to February 6, 2026, and resulted in the issuance of a Form 483 with one minor observation. The company has addressed this observation and has received the Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) with a "Voluntary Action Indicated (VAI)" status, confirming the successful completion of the inspection. Supriya Lifescience Limited remains committed to maintaining full compliance with current Good Manufacturing Practice (cGMP) requirements across all its facilities.

announcements.subject: Unicommerce Esolutions Ltd - 544227 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Unicommerce eSolutions Limited has announced a strategic partnership with Relaxo Footwears Limited, India's largest footwear manufacturer, to enhance its e-commerce operations. Relaxo will leverage Unicommerce's flagship platform, Uniware, to integrate its orders, inventory, warehouses, and returns onto a single, connected system. This integration aims to expedite order processing, ensure accurate stock availability across all online channels, and improve the speed and reliability of customer deliveries. The partnership will also streamline Relaxo's returns and exchanges process, enhancing the overall post-purchase customer experience. This move signifies Relaxo's commitment to utilizing technology to scale its e-commerce fulfillment and deliver consistent customer experiences.

announcements.subject: Escorts Kubota Ltd - 500495 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Copy of press release issued by company titled "Escorts Kubota expands Digitrac into a full series, launches three new tractor models"
announcements.ai_summary: Escorts Kubota Ltd has issued a press release announcing the expansion of its Digitrac tractor series and the launch of three new tractor models. This expansion broadens the Digitrac range to a comprehensive series of five models, covering the 45–55 HP category, including a 4-Wheel Drive option. This marks the company's fourth major tractor launch since February 2025 across its three brands: Kubota, Farmtrac, and Powertrac. The Digitrac series, part of the Powertrac brand, is designed for advanced agricultural and heavy haulage applications and will be launched pan-India. The new models are the Digitrac PP 46i 4WD, Digitrac PP 43i Plus, and Digitrac PP 41i, all featuring enhanced specifications like bigger engines and a 12 forward and 3 reverse constant mesh gearbox.

announcements.subject:
Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd - 544540 - Intimation Of TV Interviews Of Managing Director On April 22, 2026 Pursuant To
Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of TV Interviews of Managing Director on April 22, 2026 pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd has announced that its Managing Director, Mr. Sanjay Singhania, is scheduled to participate in TV interviews on April 22, 2026. These interviews are being conducted pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. One such interview is planned with NDTV Profit at 01:30 P.M. today. The company has explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) is intended to be discussed during these interviews. The schedule of these interviews is subject to change due to potential exigencies. The information will also be available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Safari Industries India Ltd - 523025 -  Change In Registrar To An Issue And Share Transfer Agent ('RTA')
announcements.detail: Enclosed here is intimation of change in RTA with effect from 21st April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Safari Industries India Ltd has announced a change in its Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agent (RTA). Effective from April 21, 2026, MUFG Intime India Private Limited will take over as the new RTA, replacing Adroit Corporate Services Private Limited. This change is confirmed by both the National Securities Depository Limited and Central Depository Services Limited for electronic connectivity. Adroit Corporate Services Private Limited ceased its function as RTA at the beginning of April 21, 2026, with MUFG Intime India Private Limited commencing operations on the same day. The company will provide a further update upon signing the tripartite agreement between the old RTA, the new RTA, and Safari Industries India Ltd.

announcements.subject: SER Industries Ltd - 507984 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change of Company Name
announcements.detail: Intimation of Approval of Name Change.
announcements.ai_summary: The company formerly known as SER Industries Limited will now be officially recognized as Desi Farms India Limited. This name change has been approved by the Stock Exchange and will be effective from April 27, 2026. Consequently, the company's equity shares will be traded under the new Scrip ID "DESIFARMS" starting on the same date. This announcement follows previous intimations regarding the name change made on February 21, 2026, and March 19, 2026. Investors should note this change for trading purposes.

announcements.subject: Dev Information Technology Ltd - 543462 - Intimation Regarding 'DEV IT Achieves All Six Microsoft Solutions Partner Designations, Entering Elite Tier Of Global Partners' Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: DEVIT Achieves All Six Microsoft Solutions Partner Designations, Entering elite Tier of Global Partners
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Ltd. has achieved a significant milestone by obtaining all six Microsoft Solutions Partner Designations, entering the elite tier of global Microsoft Partners. This achievement, in conjunction with its wholly-owned subsidiary M/s. Dhyey Consulting Services Pvt. Ltd., validates DEV IT's comprehensive expertise across the Microsoft ecosystem, including Modern Work, Azure Infrastructure, Digital & App Innovation, Data & AI, and Security. This accomplishment reinforces DEV IT's position as a high-maturity, global IT service provider capable of delivering end-to-end digital transformation. The company is making this announcement pursuant to Regulation 30(4) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: IIFL Capital Services Ltd - 542773 - Clarification On Media Report
announcements.detail: Clarification on Media Report
announcements.ai_summary: IIFL Capital Services Limited has responded to media reports and clarifications sought by BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited regarding potential strategic opportunities. The company stated that while it explores various strategic opportunities from time to time, there is no event or information requiring disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 as of the current date. IIFL Capital Services Limited also confirmed that it is not aware of any unannounced information that could explain recent trading movements. The company reiterated its commitment to promptly inform the stock exchanges of any material developments warranting disclosure.

announcements.subject: Transformers and Rectifiers (India) Ltd - 532928 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on financial result as of 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Transformers and Rectifiers (India) Ltd reported strong financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, on April 22, 2026. For FY26, the company's revenue from operations grew approximately 23% year-on-year to Rs.2,395 crore, with EBITDA increasing by ~17% YoY to ~Rs.370 crore and Profit After Tax (PAT) rising by ~20% YoY to Rs.225 crore. In Q4 FY26, revenue grew ~16% YoY to Rs.752 crore, and PAT stood at ~Rs.77 crore. The company maintained a strong unexecuted order book of approximately Rs.5,005 crore as of March 31, 2026, with FY26 order inflows of ~Rs.2,374 crore, ensuring significant revenue visibility. This performance was driven by robust execution, sustained demand, and operational efficiencies.

announcements.subject: Paisalo Digital Ltd - 532900 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Paisalo Digital Ltd announced an accelerated transition to a fully AI-powered lending platform on April 22, 2026, aiming for category-defining growth. The company is already operating with AI infrastructure, including 2 NVIDIA AI chips and 1 immersion-cooled AI server, processing over 350,000 AI-driven customer calls daily in Hindi, English, and Marathi. This AI integration spans customer acquisition, onboarding, underwriting, credit decisioning, and portfolio risk management. Paisalo aims to achieve 2x Asset Under Management (AUM), 2x revenue, and 2x Profit After Tax (PAT) within the next three years, positioning itself as a fast-growing AI-led financial institution in India. The company's proprietary AI/ML credit engine utilizes bureau data, banking behavior, and alternative datasets for real-time approvals and enhanced risk-adjusted returns.

announcements.subject: Lupin Ltd - 500257 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Lupin Launches Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets in the United States.
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Limited announced on April 22, 2026, the launch of Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets in the United States. The product, available in strengths of 5 mg/500 mg, 5 mg/1,000 mg, 10 mg/500 mg, and 10 mg/1,000 mg, received approval for its Abbreviated New Drug Application from the U.S. FDA and is bioequivalent to Xigduo® XR for its approved indications. This launch marks Lupin's expansion in the U.S. market, particularly in the anti-diabetic segment. Lupin is a global pharmaceutical leader headquartered in Mumbai, India, with a significant presence in over 100 markets.

announcements.subject: Dalmia Bharat Ltd - 542216 - Release Of Attached Properties Of The Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Limited, Material Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: ED has vide its order dated April 21, 2026 ordered release of entire attached land parcels.
announcements.ai_summary: Dalmia Bharat Ltd announced on April 22, 2026, that the Enforcement Directorate (ED) has ordered the release of entire attached land parcels belonging to its material subsidiary, Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Limited (DCBL). This follows an earlier Provisional Attachment Order (PAO) dated March 31, 2025, which had provisionally attached land parcels of DCBL. The PMLA Tribunal had previously reduced the Proceeds of Crime (PoC) to Rs. 92.52 crs. DCBL had made an application to the ED along with a bank guarantee of Rs. 92.52 crs, leading to the ED's order on April 21, 2026, to release the attached land parcels. The alleged POC has been reduced from Rs. 793.34 cr to Rs. 92.52 crs. DCBL is in the process of filing an appeal against the impugned order regarding the alleged POC of Rs. 92.52 Cr.

announcements.subject: Ajanta Pharma Ltd - 532331 - Exchange Intimation Pursuant To Reg 30
announcements.detail: Pls find enclosed Reg 30 disclosure
announcements.ai_summary: Ajanta Pharma Ltd disclosed on April 22, 2026, that the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) concluded an inspection at its manufacturing facility in Paithan, Maharashtra, from April 13th to April 21st, 2026. The inspection resulted in the issuance of Form-483 with five observations. The company stated that it will respond to the US FDA within the stipulated timeline. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd - 544283 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: ACME Solar has achieved major milestone of cumulatively operationalising 2 GWh BESS capacity in Rajasthan
announcements.ai_summary: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd announced on April 22, 2026, that it has achieved a significant milestone by cumulatively operationalizing over 2 GWh of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capacity in Rajasthan. This expansion highlights the company's commitment to increasing its renewable energy infrastructure. The announcement was made via a press release, detailing the company's progress in the energy storage sector. This development is part of ACME Solar's broader strategy to enhance its operational capacity and contribute to the energy transition.

announcements.subject: Rikhav Securities Ltd - 544340 - Public Announcement - Open Offer
announcements.detail: Sobhagya Capital Options Pvt. Ltd. ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Public Announcement under Regulations 3(2) & 3(3) read with Regulation 15(1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended for the attention of the public shareholders of Rikhav Securities Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Sobhagya Capital Options Pvt. Ltd., acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Public Announcement regarding an open offer for Rikhav Securities Limited. The offer is to acquire up to 99,55,920 fully paid-up equity shares of face value INR 5 each, representing 26% of the voting share capital of Rikhav Securities Limited. The acquisition will be made from the public shareholders by B D Lakhani, B N Lakhani, H D Lakhani, and N D Lakhani, collectively referred to as "the Acquirers." This offer is made in conjunction with Hitesh Himmatlal Lakhani, Deep Hitesh Lakhani, Vaishali Rajendra Shah, and Bharti Hitesh Lakhani, who are acting as Persons Acting in Concert (PACs). The announcement is made in compliance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: LTM Ltd - 540005 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: The company LTM Limited has announced that it has won two Google Cloud Partner of the Year Awards for 2026. These awards recognize LTM's achievements in the Google Cloud ecosystem, specifically for its Media & Entertainment Industry Solutions and Infrastructure Modernization at Scale. For the Media & Entertainment award, LTM modernized a global media company's data estate using BigQuery, resulting in improved speed, lower costs, and a scalable foundation for real-time analytics and AI-ready pipelines. The Infrastructure Modernization award was for transforming the ERP landscape for a global healthcare services leader, leading to faster time to market and a scalable ecosystem for AI-led innovation. The CEO and Managing Director of LTM, Venu Lambu, highlighted the company's proficiency in achieving client objectives through AI-driven insights and robust digital foundations with Google Cloud.

announcements.subject: Reliance Infrastructure Ltd - 500390 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Infrastructure Limited has disclosed receipt of an order dated April 20, 2026, passed by the Adjudicating Authority in ECIR/STF/17/2025. The company received this communication on April 21, 2026, and it pertains to the provisional attachment of certain assets. Reliance Infrastructure Limited will file an appeal challenging this attachment. The company has confirmed that there is no impact on its business operations.

announcements.subject: Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd - 543895 - Signing Of Term Sheet - Exhibition & Convention Centre At MMLP Indore
announcements.detail: Intimation is enclosed herewith
announcements.ai_summary: Exhicon Events Media Solutions Limited has signed a Term Sheet for a strategic Design & Construction along with Operations & Maintenance (O&M) partnership for an Exhibition & Convention Centre at MMLP Indore, Madhya Pradesh. Under an asset-light model, the entire project CAPEX will be funded by the Developer, with Exhicon Global Development Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary, awarded the design and construction, converting project CAPEX into execution revenue. The company will also act as the Operator with zero capital deployment, generating dual revenue streams from execution and annuity operations. The O&M phase includes a 35% revenue share for Years 1-3 and 30% from Year 4 onwards, applicable across various event types and ancillary revenues. This 10-year O&M agreement with a lock-in period provides long-term revenue visibility and a stable, growing revenue stream with built-in escalation. The project is strategically located at MMLP Indore, spanning approximately 4 acres within a 255-acre Multimodal Logistics Park, and is part of a larger commercial ecosystem. This marks Exhicon's 5th multipurpose venue signed in the last 2 years, reinforcing its position as a fast-growing integrated event venue company.

announcements.subject: Maple Infrastructure Trust - 543925 - Reg 26K: Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate governance
announcements.detail: Maple Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Submission of the Compliance Report on Corporate Governance for the  Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Maple Infrastructure Trust has submitted its Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate Governance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 26K of SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The report, which is also available on the company's website, details the governance structure and directorships within Maple Infra InvIT Investment Manager Private Limited, the investment manager for Maple Infrastructure Trust. Key individuals like Mr. Louis-Marie St-Maurice (Chairman & Non-Independent Director) and Ms. Seema Gupta (Independent Director) are listed with their appointment dates and tenure. The company has requested that this submission be taken on record by BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Mphasis Ltd - 526299 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Mphasis Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Mphasis Ireland Limited, has successfully acquired 100% of the shareholding in Theory and Practice Business Intelligence Inc. (TAP) and its relevant affiliates. This acquisition, effective April 21, 2026, makes TAP and its affiliates step-down subsidiaries of Mphasis. The transaction includes an upfront consideration of CAD 10 million at closing, with an additional multi-year contingent consideration of up to CAD 20 million based on management milestones. TAP, established in 2018 and headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, specializes in a Decision Intelligence platform that combines AI with behavioral economics to enhance business decision-making, particularly for clients in Financial Services, Retail, and Consumer Packaged Goods. This strategic move is expected to strengthen Mphasis' 'Decisioning Intelligence' capabilities and align with its NeoIP™ roadmap.

announcements.subject: Purple Finance Ltd - 544191 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On April 21, 2026
announcements.detail:
We would like to inform you that the Board of Directors of Purple Finance Limited at their Meeting held today i.e. April 21, 2026 has inter-alia considered and approved:

The Statutory Auditors, M/s. Jogin Raval and Associates, have issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results. The Board meeting commenced at 05:05 p.m. IST and concluded at 06:27 p.m. IST. The approved financial results are available on the company's website, www.purplefinance.in.

announcements.subject: HDB Financial Services Ltd - 544429 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Intimation of Earnings Call Transcript

The company has made the transcript of the earnings call held on April 15, 2026, available on its website at https://www.hdbfs.com/investors. This transcript provides detailed insights into the company's financial performance for the specified period. The earnings call was attended by MD & CEO Mr. G Ramesh and CFO Mr. Jaykumar Shah. Investors can access this transcript for a comprehensive understanding of the company's results and future outlook.

announcements.subject: Amber Enterprises India Ltd - 540902 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR Regulations - Completion Of Rights Issue Allotment By IL JIN Electronics (India) Private Limited On 21St April 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform the exchange that, in context of Rights issue of IL JIN Electronics (India) Private Limited ("IL JIN"), a material subsidiary of the Company, the Company has been allotted 12,46,430 equity shares by IL JIN on 21st April 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited has been allotted 12,46,430 equity shares by its material subsidiary, IL JIN Electronics (India) Private Limited ("IL JIN"), on April 21, 2026, as part of IL JIN's rights issue. This allotment represents an additional equity stake in IL JIN, following an investment of Rs. 296.02 Crore. Prior to this allotment, Amber Enterprises India Limited held 48,51,810 equity shares in IL JIN, and post-allotment, its holding has increased to 60,98,240 equity shares. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aeroflex Enterprises Ltd-$ - 511076 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: The Company has successfully acquired an additional stake of 4% in M.R. Organisation Limited, subsidiary company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aeroflex Enterprises Limited has successfully acquired an additional 1,03,350 equity shares in its subsidiary, M.R. Organisation Limited ("MRO"), at a price of Rs. 539.50 per share, aggregating to Rs. 5,57,57,325. This acquisition represents a 4% increase in the issued and paid-up share capital of MRO. This transaction is the third tranche of the acquisition envisaged under the Share Purchase Agreement dated July 27, 2024, and the Deed of Amendment (DOA) dated April 21, 2026. Following this acquisition, Aeroflex Enterprises Limited's shareholding in M.R. Organisation Limited has increased from 64% to 68%. M.R. Organisation Limited operates in the tech-based last-mile utility services industry and had a consolidated turnover of Rs. 78.25 crores.

announcements.subject: Motisons Jewellers Ltd - 544053 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations').
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulations'), we wish to inform you that Motisons Jewellers Limited ('the Company') has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Moti Developers, a partnership firm which pertains to development of a jewellery showroom.

Under the terms of the said MoU, Moti Developers shall undertake the construction and development ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Motisons Jewellers Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Moti Developers, a partnership firm, for the development of a new jewellery showroom in Udaipur, Rajasthan. Under this agreement, Moti Developers will be responsible for the construction and development of the showroom. Upon completion, the premises will be leased to Motisons Jewellers Limited under mutually agreed terms. This collaboration is considered to be in the ordinary course of business and is intended to support the company's expansion plans. Notably, key promoters and promoter group members of Motisons Jewellers Limited, including Mr. Sandeep Chhabra, Mr. Laksh Chhabra, Mr. Kaustubh Chhabra, and Mr. Prakkhar Chhabra, are also partners in Moti Developers. The company has no shareholding in Moti Developers.

announcements.subject: RPSG Ventures Ltd - 542333 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: The intimation is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: RPSG Ventures Limited has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary named M/s. RPSG Brands Mena Private Limited (RBMPL) on April 21, 2026. The incorporation was completed with the Registrar of Companies, Central Registration Centre, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India. RBMPL has a turnover of Nil as of its incorporation. The company plans to explore business opportunities in the trading, distribution, and export-import of Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) and allied products, both in India and abroad, without limiting to the MENA Region. This move is intended to explore new business avenues for the company.

announcements.subject: Tulive Developers Ltd - 505285 - Outcome of Reverse Book Building Process under Regulation 17(3) of the SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021
announcements.detail: Saffron Capital Advisors Pvt. Ltd. (Manager to the Delisting Offer") has informed BSE regarding "Outcome of Reverse Book Building Process under Regulation 17(3) of the SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021."
announcements.ai_summary: The voluntary delisting of Tulive Developers Limited's equity shares from BSE Limited has concluded. The Reverse Book Building Process (RBBP) ran from April 15, 2026, to April 21, 2026. The discovered price for the delisting offer was Rs. 750/- per equity share. Out of the total delisting offer size of 6,01,135 equity shares, 4,79,058 equity shares were tendered by shareholders. The process received 19 successful bids within the price range of Rs. 719.30/- to Rs. 900/- per equity share. The total issued equity shares of the company are 21,54,375.

announcements.subject: KEI Industries Ltd - 517569 - Intimation Of Receipt Of ISO/ IEC 27001:2022 Certification For Information Security Management System (ISMS)
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 we wish to inform you that KEI Industries Limited has been awarded the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification for its Information Security Management System (ISMS) by INTERCERT INC.
announcements.ai_summary: KEI Industries Limited has been awarded the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification for its Information Security Management System (ISMS) by INTERCERT INC. This certification, effective from April 20, 2026, confirms that the company has implemented a systematic approach to identify, assess, and manage information security risks. The certified ISMS covers the management, operation, and protection of information assets, IT infrastructure, enterprise applications, and supporting business processes, ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information. The certificate is valid until April 19, 2027, with a recertification date of April 19, 2029. This achievement aligns with the company's commitment to robust information security practices.

announcements.subject: Sanofi India Ltd - 500674 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Refund Order
announcements.detail: Kindy refer the attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Sanofi India Ltd has received a refund order from the Assistant Commissioner - Central Goods & Service Tax, Division-VIII, Ankleshwar, Vadodara – II. The order, received on April 21, 2026, grants a refund of Rs. 52,07,841 for the periods between August 2014 and June 2017. This refund comprises a principal amount of Rs. 33,96,705 and interest of Rs. 18,11,136. However, the officer did not accept the refund claim of Rs. 11,62,853. The company had filed a refund application of Rs. 45,59,558 related to a pre-deposit payment made during an appeal process, where the matter was decided in the company's favor. Sanofi India Ltd plans to file an appeal against the non-grant of the balance refund amount.

The conference call was hosted by Emkay Global Financial Services Limited. The announcement also includes a disclaimer regarding forward-looking statements.

announcements.subject: HCL Technologies Ltd - 532281 - Enclosed Please Find The Consolidated Financial Statements - IFRS For The Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed please find the Consolidated Financial Statements - IFRS for the year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: HCL Technologies Ltd has released its consolidated financial statements prepared under IFRS for the year ended March 31, 2026. The balance sheet shows total assets of USD 12,261 million as of March 31, 2026, a slight decrease from USD 12,348 million in the previous year. Non-current assets stood at USD 4,821 million, down from USD 5,083 million, while current assets increased to USD 7,440 million from USD 7,265 million. Key components of non-current assets include Goodwill at USD 2,519 million and Property, plant and equipment at USD 491 million. Current assets are largely comprised of Trade receivables (billed) at USD 2,487 million and Inventories at USD 25 million. The company has provided detailed figures for various asset categories for both the years ended March 31, 2026, and March 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Pulsar International Ltd - 512591 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Clarification With Respect To An Email Dated 09.04.2026 Point No. 13 - Mismatch Financial Figure For The Year Ended 31.03.2025.
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30- Clarification with respect to an email dated 09.04.2026 Point No. 13- Mismatch Financial Figure for the Year ended 31.03.2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Pulsar International Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a mismatch in financial figures for the year ended March 31, 2025, which was highlighted in an email dated April 09, 2026. The company explained that it had inadvertently reported figures pertaining to the quarter ended March 31, 2025, instead of the full year figures when submitting its financial results. This was a clerical error and has no impact on the audited financial statements. Pulsar International Ltd has submitted updated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2025, which are now aligned with the audited financial statements. The reported Income from Operations for the year ended March 31, 2025, was Rs. 3117.04 Lakhs, with Expenses including Purchase of Stock-in-Trade at Rs. 2795.59 Lakhs. The Profit for the period from continuing operations for the year ended March 31, 2025, was Rs. 176.46 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Disclosure As Per Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulations 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations 2011 by Mr. Utsav Parekh

announcements.subject: Sigma Advanced Systems Ltd - 532408 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Ref: Our Earlier Disclosure dated Feb 10, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Sigma Advanced Systems Ltd has successfully acquired a 51% stake in AS Strategic Private Limited, Delhi, India. This acquisition follows the signing of a Share Purchase Agreement on February 10, 2026, and the subsequent fulfillment of all condition precedents. The company has now completed the acquisition of the majority shareholding in AS Strategic Private Limited. Investors should note that this is a significant step for Sigma Advanced Systems Ltd, as it expands its ownership in the target company. Further details regarding the integration and strategic implications of this acquisition are expected to be disclosed by the company.

announcements.subject: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd - 544202 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Stanley Lifestyles Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Stanley Lifestyles Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the press release on the opening of its new stores."
announcements.ai_summary: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd has announced the opening of three new retail stores in Bengaluru, Karnataka, as part of its strategic expansion to enhance its presence in high-growth residential micro-markets. Two of these new stores are "Sofas & More by Stanley" located at Mysore Road and Gunjur, offering a range of premium furniture including sofas, recliners, beds, and dining tables with a focus on comfort and customization. The third new store is a "Hilker India" store situated at Electronic City, providing a distinct and immersive retail experience. These store launches reinforce the brand's commitment to bringing design-led, premium living experiences closer to its customers. The stores were inaugurated by the Chairman and Managing Director, Sunil Suresh, and Joint Managing Director, Venkataramana Seshagirirao Gorti.

announcements.subject: Cyient DLM Ltd - 543933 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed press release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cyient DLM Limited announced its financial results for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. In Q4 FY26, revenue was INR 369.1 crores, a 21.7% increase quarter-on-quarter but a 13.8% decrease year-on-year. EBITDA for Q4 FY26 was INR 43.1 crores with an 11.7% margin. For the full year FY26, revenue stood at INR 1261.5 crores, a 17% decrease year-on-year. Normalized EBITDA for FY26 was INR 130.2 crores with a 10.3% margin, showing a 78 bps improvement year-on-year. The company recorded an order intake of over INR 1,843 crores for FY26 and an order book of INR 2,416.6 crores.

For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, no new complaints were received, and none were disposed of, with 5 complaints remaining pending from the previous quarter.

announcements.subject: Karnataka Bank Ltd - 532652 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Karnataka Bank partners with Pine Labs Limited for Point of Sale (PoS) Services
announcements.ai_summary: Karnataka Bank has announced a strategic partnership with Pine Labs Limited, a leading provider of Point-of-Sale (PoS) solutions. This collaboration aims to enhance the digital payment options available to Karnataka Bank's customers. Through this partnership, the bank will offer advanced PoS terminals to its Retail and MSME customers, promoting digital adoption and mutual growth. Shri Raghavendra S Bhat, MD & CEO of Karnataka Bank, stated that this aligns with the bank's vision of becoming the "Digital Bank of the Future." Shri Raja B S, Chief Operating Officer, added that the bank will now be able to offer next-generation digital payment solutions, encouraging customers to utilize this service available at all branches.

announcements.subject: DB International Stock Brokers Ltd - 530393 - Submission Of Audited Standalone And Consolidated Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended On March 31, 2026.

The board meeting commenced at 3:30 p.m. and concluded at 4:33 p.m. The results are available on the company's website, www.dbonline.in, and the stock exchanges' websites.

announcements.subject: Rudra Gas Enterprise Ltd - 544121 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Entering into Tripartite Agreement with GAIL(INDIA) Limited and Gujarat Gas Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Rudra Gas Enterprise Ltd has resolved to enter into a Tripartite Agreement with GAIL (India) Limited and Gujarat Gas Limited for a strategic business transaction. The agreement, currently in the pre-operative stage, is expected to govern the transportation of Compressed Bio Gas (CBG) to retail outlets of Gujarat Gas Limited. The agreement will be valid until December 31, 2047. The monthly billing is estimated to be approximately ₹1 Crore based on present pricing. A comprehensive disclosure will be made upon the formal execution of the agreement. The company's website is www.rudragasenterprise.com.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of 2 New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 2 new Branches on April 21, 2026 as on date the bank has 973 Branches in Total.
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd has announced the opening of two new branches on April 21, 2026. The new branches are located in Surat - Varachha, Gujarat, and Sawai Madhopur, Rajasthan. Following these openings, the bank now operates a total of 973 branches across India. This expansion is in line with the bank's strategy to increase its reach and customer base. The announcement was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015.

announcements.subject: Ethos Ltd - 543532 - Opening Of Ethos Watch Boutiques At Faridabad
announcements.detail: Opening of Ethos Watch Boutiques at Faridabad
announcements.ai_summary: Ethos Limited announced on April 21, 2026, the opening of a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Faridabad. The new boutique is located at SHGF11, Ground Floor, Pacific Mall of Faridabad, Faridabad, 121001. This expansion marks a significant step in strengthening the company's luxury brand portfolio and its presence in the Indian luxury retail market. With this new opening, Ethos Limited now operates 95 boutiques across India, aiming to make exclusive brands more accessible to customers and deliver unparalleled luxury experiences.

announcements.subject: Shakti Pumps India Ltd-$ - 531431 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: We hereby inform that the Company has invested Rs. 10.00 Crores in its wholly owned subsidiary i.e. Shakti EV Mobility Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 21, 2026, Shakti Pumps India Ltd invested ₹10,00,00,000 (Rupees Ten Crores Only) in its wholly owned subsidiary, Shakti EV Mobility Private Limited. This investment was made by subscribing to 1,00,00,000 (One Crore) Equity Shares, each with a face value of ₹10 (Rupees Ten). Following this subscription, the consolidated investment in Shakti EV Mobility Private Limited now stands at ₹65,00,00,000 (Rupees Sixty-Five Crores Only). Shakti EV Mobility Private Limited, incorporated on December 16, 2021, is engaged in the manufacturing of electric vehicle motors, chargers, and controllers. The acquisition is intended to initiate and expand the subsidiary's business, and no government or regulatory approvals are required for this cash consideration transaction.

announcements.subject: Mangalam Global Enterprise Ltd - 544273 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 21, 2026, titled "Press Release on Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and year ended on 31st March 2026.".
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited announced its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, on April 21, 2026. The company reported a Total Income of ₹1065.27 crore in Q4 FY26, a 96% year-on-year increase from ₹542.80 crore in Q4 FY25. Profit After Tax (PAT) for Q4 FY26 stood at ₹12.48 crore, a significant 140% rise from ₹5.19 crore in the same period last year. For the full fiscal year FY26, Total Income grew by 48% to ₹3400.71 crore from ₹2302.91 crore in FY25, with PAT increasing by 96% to ₹45.22 crore from ₹23.10 crore. The company also highlighted its strategic entry into the direct-to-consumer wellness segment with its brand "NEAT EVERYDAY" and plans to open 100 retail stores across India by March 2028.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Intimation Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended ('Listing Regulations')

announcements.subject: Advait Energy Transitions Ltd - 543230 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Order received replacement of old ACSR Panther Conductor with HTLS conductor of 132 KV Rishikesh - T Point-Chilla- Bhupatwala line against tender issued by PTCUL
announcements.ai_summary: Advait Energy Transitions Ltd has received a new order for the replacement of old ACSR Panther conductor with HTLS conductor for the 132 kV Rishikesh - T Point - Chilla - Bhupatwala line. This order was awarded by Power Transmission Corporation of Uttarakhand Limited (PTCUL) on April 20, 2026, against tender specification no PTCUL/E-Tender/C&P-II/TL-13/2025-26. The order is for a domestic entity and is expected to be executed within 10 months. The broad consideration for this order is ₹27,73,95,115.54 (Rupees Twenty-seven crore, seventy-three lakh, ninety-five thousand, one hundred fifteen and fifty-four paise only), inclusive of taxes. This follows an earlier intimation dated January 9, 2026.

announcements.subject: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd-$ - 531381 - Operational Update For Q4FY26 And FY26
announcements.detail: Operational Update - Q4 and FY26
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd, has released its operational update for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. For FY26, the company achieved its highest ever pre-sales of ₹513.70 Cr, representing a 28% year-on-year increase. Total area sold in FY26 was 5,69,261 sq. ft, and collections amounted to ₹359.56 Cr. In Q4FY26, pre-sales reached ₹183.30 Cr, showing a 46% quarter-on-quarter and a 15% year-on-year growth. The ongoing project portfolio has a Gross Development Value (GDV) exceeding ₹11,250 Cr across 8 million sq. ft. These figures indicate a strong operational performance for the company.

announcements.subject: Sonata Software Ltd - 532221 - Sonata Software Achieves AWS Migration And Modernization Competency Status.
announcements.detail: Sonata Software achieves AWS Migration and Modernization Competency status.
announcements.ai_summary: Sonata Software Limited has announced that it has achieved Amazon Web Services (AWS) Migration and Modernization Competency status. It highlights Sonata Software's capabilities in supporting organizations to modernize critical applications, enhance operational efficiency, and build agile, resilient, and scalable digital platforms. This achievement reinforces Sonata Software's position as a modernization engineering company.

announcements.subject: Stylam Industries Ltd - 526951 - Pre-Offer Advertisement & Corrigendum to Detailed Public Statement
announcements.detail: ICICI Securities Ltd ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Pre-Offer Advertisement in accordance with Regulation 18(7) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended, and Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement for the attention of the Public Shareholders of Stylam Industries Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Securities Limited, acting as the Manager to the Open Offer, has submitted a Pre-Offer Advertisement and a Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement for the shareholders of Stylam Industries Ltd. This pertains to the open offer by Aica Kogyo Company, Limited to acquire up to 44,06,496 equity shares of Stylam Industries Ltd. These shares represent 26% of the total voting share capital, with a face value of ₹ 5 each. The offer is being made in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The pre-offer advertisement and corrigendum were published on April 21, 2026, in various newspapers.

announcements.subject: Covidh Technologies Ltd - 534920 - Revised Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Of Isera Lifesciences Limited (Formerly Known As Covidh Technologies Limited) ('The Company') Pursuant To Regulation 29 And 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Revised Outcome of the Meeting of the Board of Directors of iSERA Lifesciences Limited (Formerly known as Covidh Technologies Limited) ('the Company') pursuant to Regulation 29 and 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: iSERA Lifesciences Limited (formerly Covidh Technologies Limited) announced a revised outcome of its Board of Directors meeting held on April 21, 2026. The Board approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital from Rs. 11,00,00,000/- (Rupees Eleven Crore) divided into 1,10,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, to Rs. 25,00,00,000/- (Rupees Twenty-Five Crore) divided into 2,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each. This involves the creation of 1,40,00,000 additional Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each. The Board also approved the consequential alteration of Clause V of the Memorandum of Association and the adoption of a new set of MOA to align with the Companies Act, 2013. These changes are subject to the approval of the company's members through postal ballot or remote e-voting. The meeting was held pursuant to SEBI LODR Regulations.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30- Board Approval For Sale/Disposal Of Land Situated At Ludhiana Unit
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 regarding approval of board of directors of the company regarding sale/disposal of land situated at Ludhiana Unit is attached
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Vardhman Polytex Ltd, at a meeting held on April 21, 2026, approved the sale and disposal of land measuring 26 Acre 6 Kanal 9 Marla located at their Ludhiana Unit. This decision follows the approval obtained from the company's members through a postal ballot on April 19, 2026. Mr. Adish Oswal, Chairman & Managing Director, has been authorized to finalize and execute the transaction. The sale of this land is a strategic move to raise funds for repaying outstanding liabilities to lenders and to support future growth initiatives. The board meeting commenced at 2:30 pm and concluded at 3:00 pm.

announcements.subject: Nile Ltd - 530129 - Dealing Of Equity Shares Of The Company On '' National Stock Exchange Of India"
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is t inform you that the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE), vide its circular no. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026, has notified its members that the equity shares of Nile Limited ( Symbol: NILE, ISIN: IN445D01013) have been permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on the capital market segment of NSE with effect from April, ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nile Ltd has been informed by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) that its equity shares have been permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on the Capital Market Segment of NSE. This decision, notified via NSE circular no. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026, is effective from April 20, 2026. The company clarifies that its equity shares are listed on BSE Limited and are available for trading on NSE under the "Permitted to Trade" (PTT) category, in compliance with applicable regulatory provisions. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Transrail Lighting Ltd - 544317 - Enhancement Of Tower Manufacturing Capacity
announcements.detail: Enhancement of tower manufacturing capacity
announcements.ai_summary: Transrail Lighting Limited has announced the completion of its greenfield expansion at the tower manufacturing plant in Butibori, with commercial production commencing. Additionally, the brownfield expansion at tower manufacturing facilities in Deoli, Baroda, and Silvassa has been partially completed. These expansions have increased the company's total installed capacity for tower manufacturing from 84,000 MTPA to 1,72,400 MTPA. This update is in continuation of previous intimations and is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed the stock exchanges to take this information on record.

announcements.subject: Engineers India Ltd - 532178 - Tripartite Agreement Between The Company, Erstwhile RTA And New RTA
announcements.detail: Tripartite Agreement betwen the Company,erstwhile RTA and new RTA
announcements.ai_summary: Engineers India Limited (EIL) has entered into a tripartite agreement on April 20, 2026, with KFin Technologies Limited, the erstwhile Registrar and Transfer Agent (RTA), and Alankit Assignments Limited, the new RTA, effective from January 24, 2020. This agreement is in compliance with Regulation 7 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This announcement follows up on EIL's previous communication dated January 27, 2020, regarding the change in RTA. The company has informed the stock exchanges of this development for their information and records.

announcements.subject: GEM Enviro Management Ltd - 544199 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: In continuation to our earlier corporate announcement dated February 17, 2026 we would like to inform you that GEM Ecomind Limited, Joint Venture Company has incorporated.
announcements.ai_summary: GEM Enviro Management Limited, in collaboration with Rudrabhishek Infosystem Private Limited, has incorporated a Joint Venture Company named "GEM ECOMIND LIMITED" on April 20, 2026. This new entity, with an authorized share capital of Rs. 1,00,00,000 and a paid-up share capital of Rs. 50,00,000, will focus on providing technical and technological solutions in recycling, waste management, sustainability, and ecosystem conservation. GEM Ecomind Limited has become a subsidiary and related party of GEM Enviro Management Limited. No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for this venture, and the incorporation follows an earlier corporate announcement dated February 17, 2026.

announcements.subject:
Panafic Industrials Ltd - 538860 - Copy Of The Advertisement : Application Form For The Right Issue
Issued By The Company And Published Today, I.E. April 21, 2026, In Respect Of Matters Specified Under Sub-Regulation
(1) Of Regulation 84 Of SEBI ICDR Regulations.
announcements.detail: Submission of Copy of the Advertisement - Application form - Right Issue
announcements.ai_summary: Panafic Industrials Limited has completed the dispatch of the abridged letter of offer and application forms for its proposed Rights Issue of Equity Shares on April 20, 2026. The company published an advertisement on April 21, 2026, in the Financial Express and Jansatta newspapers, detailing these matters as per sub-regulation (1) of Regulation 84 of the SEBI ICDR Regulations. This information is also available on the company's website, www.panaficindustrialsltd.in. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 84 of the SEBI ICDR Regulations and Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Bharat Parenterals Ltd - 541096 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Outcome of the U.S. FDA Inspection at Innoxel Lifesciences Private Limited subsidiary Company of Bharat Parenterals Limited
announcements.ai_summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) conducted a surprise inspection at Bharat Parenterals Limited's subsidiary, Innoxel Lifesciences Private Limited, at its finished dosage manufacturing facility in Vadodara, Gujarat, from April 13, 2026, to April 17, 2026, and on April 20, 2026. The inspection resulted in five observations classified under Voluntary Action Indicated (VAI). Innoxel Lifesciences will submit its response to these observations within the prescribed timelines, and the final Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) is awaited. This facility is crucial for supplying sterile injectable formulations to regulated markets like the United States and the European Union.
