The company highlighted that this outcome reflects the consistency of its quality and compliance systems, and it remains focused on strengthening its manufacturing and regulatory capabilities.

announcements.subject: Hyundai Motor India Ltd - 544274 - Intimation Under Regulation 30A Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30A of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has provided an update under Regulation 30A of the SEBI Listing Regulations regarding a formalizing partnership between its promoter, Hyundai Motor Company (HMC), and TVS Motor Company Limited. This Joint Development Agreement (JDA) was entered into on April 20th, 2026, to drive the commercialization of electric three-wheelers in India. Hyundai Motor India Ltd itself is not a party to this agreement. This follows an earlier disclosure on January 18, 2025, about HMC exploring a potential partnership with TVS Motor Company Limited for last-mile mobility solutions. The details of this agreement are enclosed as Annexure A.

announcements.subject: Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd - 533158 - Akshaya Tritiya Sales For The Year 2026-2027
announcements.detail: Akshaya Tritiya Sales for the year 2026-2027
announcements.ai_summary: Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd. has reported strong Akshaya Tritiya sales for the fiscal year 2026-2027. The company achieved a revenue of ₹279.27 Crores, representing a significant year-on-year (YOY) growth of 75.87% compared to ₹158.80 Crores in the previous year. Despite a 59% increase in gold prices YOY, the company sold 183.20 kg of gold, marking a volume growth of 15.14% YOY from 159.11 kg sold last year. Non-gold revenue also saw a substantial increase of 61%, reaching ₹17.99 Crores compared to ₹11.17 Crores in the prior year.

announcements.subject: Fermenta Biotech Ltd - 506414 - Admission Of Company''s Shares By NSE Under ''Permitted To Trade'' Category On National Stock Exchange (Capital Market Segment).
announcements.detail: The Company''s shares have been admitted by NSE under ''Permitted to trade'' category on National Stock Exchange (Capital Market Segment).
announcements.ai_summary: Fermenta Biotech Limited's equity shares have been admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) under the "Permitted to Trade" category in the Capital Market segment. This admission is effective from April 20, 2026, as per NSE's Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026. This development allows for trading of Fermenta Biotech Limited's shares on the NSE.

announcements.subject: Umiya Mobile Ltd - 544464 - Umiya Mobile Limited Has Proposed To Open 37 (Thirty-Seven) New Retail Stores In Near Future.
announcements.detail:
We have attached herewith announcement as per Reg. 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.

Kindly take the same on your record.

Thank you.
announcements.ai_summary: Umiya Mobile Ltd has announced its proposal to open 37 new retail stores in the near future across various locations in Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Gujarat. These new stores are part of the company's expansion strategy to increase its retail footprint. The announcement details specific addresses for these upcoming outlets, indicating a planned expansion in key states. The company has submitted this intimation as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Fedders Holding Ltd - 511628 - Intimation Regarding Trading Of Securities Of Fedders Holding Limited On National Stock Exchange Of India Limited ('NSE') Under Permitted To Trade Category
announcements.detail: This is with  reference to the captioned subject, we wish to inform you that the securities of Fedders Holding Limited have been admitted to trading on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited vide Circular Ref No. 0645/2026 and Download Ref No. NSE/CML/73797 dated 17th April, 2026 with effect from 20.04.2026 in permitted to trade category.
announcements.ai_summary: Fedders Holding Limited (formerly known as IM+ Capitals Limited) announced on April 21, 2026, that its securities have been admitted to trading on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) under the "Permitted to Trade Category." This admission is effective from April 20, 2026, as per NSE Circular Ref No. 0645/2026 and Download Ref No. NSE/CML/73797 dated April 17, 2026. The securities of Fedders Holding Limited will be traded on the NSE under the symbol FEDDERSHOL. This intimation is made in compliance with relevant regulations.

announcements.subject: Tata Steel Ltd - 500470 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Tata Steel Partners SMS Group to Deploy World-First EASyMelt Decarbonisation Technology
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Steel Limited announced on April 21, 2026, that it has partnered with SMS Group GmbH (part of Paul Wurth, S.A) to deploy the world's first EASyMelt decarbonisation technology. This technology will be implemented in Tata Steel's 'E' Blast Furnace (649 m3) at its Jamshedpur Works, aiming to reduce CO2 emissions by over 50% compared to its baseline operation. This initiative is a significant step towards achieving net-zero emissions. The partnership follows a Memorandum of Understanding signed in June 2023 and a successful front-end loading study. The EASyMelt technology is described as a resource-flexible solution for decarbonising ironmaking.

announcements.subject: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust - 540565 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Indigrid Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited, on behalf of IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust, submitted the unit holding pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd on April 21, 2026. This submission is in compliance with Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The report, issued by KFin Technologies Limited, details the unit holdings across various categories, including Sponsor(s)/Investment Manager and Public Holding. Notably, Foreign Portfolio Investors hold 26.76% of the public holding, while Insurance Companies hold 14.04%. The total unit holding of the Sponsor & Sponsor Group is 1.11%.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd - 500104 - Intimation To The Stock Exchanges Regarding Fire Incident At HRRL Refinery
announcements.detail: Intimation to the stock exchanges regarding fire incident at HRRL Refinery
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has informed about a fire incident that occurred on April 20, 2026, at the Crude Distillation Unit (CDU) section of the HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) refinery, a joint venture company. The fire is believed to have been caused by a leakage of hydrocarbons from a valve or flange in the heat exchanger circuit and was localized to the heat exchangers stack. The CDU, Vacuum Distillation Unit (VDU), and other associated units were promptly isolated and are structurally safe. There were no loss of life or injuries. As a precautionary measure, the scheduled dedication of the refinery by the Hon’ble Prime Minister on April 21, 2026, has been postponed, with a new date to be announced later. An investigation is underway to determine the cause and necessary remedial actions, and the financial and operational impact is being assessed but is not expected to be material.

announcements.subject: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd - 533274 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Prestige Estates Sees Strong Response to ''Prestige Golden Grove'' in Hyderabad, Clocks Rs. 2,500 Crore in Early Sales".
announcements.ai_summary: Prestige Estates Projects Limited has reported a strong response to its residential project, 'Prestige Golden Grove', in Hyderabad, achieving early sales of over ₹2,500 crore. The project, located in Tellapur, has witnessed over 4,000 customer footfalls and sold more than 1,700 units within two weeks of its launch. 'Prestige Golden Grove' is a large-scale development spread across approximately 29 acres, comprising around 5,120 units across 10 towers. The total estimated gross development value (GDV) for the project is approximately ₹9,500 crore. The company highlighted the sustained homebuyer demand and the project's strategic location, modern living blend, quality construction, and lifestyle amenities as key drivers for its success.

announcements.subject: Parsvnath Developers Ltd - 532780 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached Press Release- Received completion of 20.67 Acres Project in Indore
announcements.ai_summary: Parsvnath Developers Limited has announced the completion of its project 'Saatvik Green NX' located in Raukhedi, Indore, Madhya Pradesh. The project is situated on a land parcel measuring 83,670 Sqm or 20.67 Acres. This development, undertaken in collaboration with RRHL Realty Limited, offers residential plots across three categories: Silver, Gold, and Platinum, with a total of 473 plots. The project commenced in April 2024, and all development work has now been finalized. The company has received the Completion Certificate from the Office of the Collector, District Indore. The project is strategically located on the AB Bypass Road, offering good connectivity to city landmarks and amenities.

announcements.subject: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd - 543417 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on "RateGain Partners with Easebuzz as a Gold Partner for RG Pay to Strengthen Payment Capabilities in India"
announcements.ai_summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between RateGain Travel Technologies Limited and Easebuzz, a leading digital payments platform in India. Easebuzz will become a Gold Partner for RateGain's RG Pay solution, integrating its payment gateway and local acquiring capabilities. This integration aims to enhance payment acceptance for travel and hospitality brands in India by offering popular domestic payment methods like UPI, cards, net banking, and wallets. The partnership is expected to reduce friction at checkout, improve payment acceptance rates, and drive higher booking completion for travel brands. This move is particularly significant given India's rapid growth as a travel market and the strong preference for local payment options.

announcements.subject: Embassy Developments Ltd - 532832 - Voluntary Strike-Off Of Non-Operational Step-Down Subsidiaries Of The Company
announcements.detail:
Voluntary strike-off of non-operational step-down subsidiaries of the Company.

For further information, please refer attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Developments Ltd. has completed the voluntary strike-off of two non-operational step-down subsidiaries, Varali Real Estate Limited (VREL) and Devona Infrastructure Limited (DIL), from the register of companies. This action, taken on April 20, 2026, is part of the company's initiative to simplify its corporate structure and reduce administrative and compliance costs. As a result, VREL and DIL have been dissolved and are no longer subsidiaries of Embassy Developments Ltd. The company has stated that this event does not involve the sale of any undertaking or subsidiary and therefore does not contribute to turnover, revenue, income, or net worth.

announcements.subject: GRM Overseas Ltd - 531449 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: GRM Launches 10X Basmati Rice for Diabetics
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: GRM Overseas Ltd has announced the launch of its "10X Basmati Rice Suitable for Diabetics." This product launch is a strategic initiative to expand the company's health-focused product portfolio in both domestic and international markets. The 10X Basmati Rice is designed to offer the aroma, elongation, and taste of premium basmati rice while supporting better glycaemic management with low GI and high fibre content, without compromising on quality or taste. This launch aligns with GRM's vision to evolve into a diversified, consumer-centric food company addressing modern lifestyle needs. The product will be rolled out across key markets to cater to the rising demand for healthier dietary choices.

announcements.subject: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd - 543709 - Akshay Tritiya Sales Update
announcements.detail: Akshay Tritiya Sales Update for FY 2026-27.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd has provided an update on its sales performance for Akshay Tritiya for the financial year 2026-27. The company recorded strong counter sales, including those at Shop-in-Shop (SIS) stores operating on a FOFO (Franchise Owned Franchise Operated) model. Akshay Tritiya revenue for FY 2026-27 reached ₹236.82 Lakhs, representing a Year-on-Year (YoY) growth of 77.41% compared to ₹133.49 Lakhs in FY 2025-26. The revenue channel mix for FY 2026-27 shows that counter sales contributed 76.44% from SIS stores and 23.56% from Exclusive Brand Outlets (EBOs). As of the reporting date, the company has a retail footprint of 127 stores across 65 cities and 21 states.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - 5.95% Fixed Rate Senior Unsecured Notes Issued By Periama Holdings LLC ('Issuer') Have Matured In The Normal Course As Per The Terms Of Their Issuance, And Have Been Fully Redeemed On April 20, 2026 By The Issuer.
announcements.detail: 5.95% fixed rate senior unsecured notes issued by Periama Holdings LLC , have matured in the  normal course as per the terms of their issuance, and have been fulled redeemed on April 20, 2026, by the issuer.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JSW Steel Limited has announced the maturity and full redemption of US$ 750,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 5.95% fixed rate senior unsecured notes issued by its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, Periama Holdings LLC. The notes, issued in two tranches on October 19, 2020 (US$ 500,000,000) and December 21, 2020 (US$ 250,000,000), matured in the normal course and were fully redeemed on April 20, 2026. The redemption was funded by a loan extended by JSW Steel Limited to Periama Holdings LLC. Following the full repayment, the guarantee provided by JSW Steel Limited has terminated. This intimation is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kilburn Engineering Ltd - 522101 - Admission Of Equity Shares Of The Company For Trading On National Stock Exchange Of India Limited
announcements.detail: Equity shares of the Company are permitted to trade and admitted to dealings in the Capital Market Segment of National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE).
announcements.ai_summary: Kilburn Engineering Limited's equity shares have been admitted to dealings and are permitted to trade on the Capital Market Segment of the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) with effect from April 20, 2026. This regulatory update, as per NSE Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026, allows the company's shares to be traded on the NSE. The admission to dealings is a significant step for the company, expanding its accessibility to investors on a major stock exchange. The circular details the securities admitted to dealings and their designated security codes for trading purposes.

announcements.subject: Mobavenue AI Tech Ltd - 539682 - Mobavenue Delivers AI-Powered Campaigns For Sebamed, Goibibo And Snabbit, Securing Two Gold And One Silver At DIGIXX 2026.
announcements.detail: Mobavenue Media Private Limited, a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Mobavenue AI Tech Limited, has been recognized for two Gold awards and one Silver across AI/ML-Powered marketing, programmatic campaign execution and location based targeting categories at the DIGIXX Awards 2026 by Adgully. Theses recognisitions reflect MMPL''s capabilities in delivering data-driven and technology-enabled marketing solutions across diverese campaign objectives.
announcements.ai_summary: Mobavenue Media Private Limited (MMPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Mobavenue AI Tech Limited (MATL), has received significant recognition at the DIGIXX Awards 2026 by Adgully. MMPL secured two Gold awards for Best AI/ML-Powered Marketing Solution for Sebamed and Best Programmatic Marketing Campaign for Goibibo. Additionally, it won a Silver award for Location-Based Targeting Campaign for Snabbit. These accolades highlight MMPL's proficiency in delivering data-driven and technology-enabled marketing solutions, including AI/ML-powered marketing, programmatic campaign execution, and location-based targeting. The company's success is attributed to its ability to integrate data, automation, and audience intelligence to achieve outcome-oriented objectives and drive measurable growth for its clients.

announcements.subject: Biocon Ltd - 532523 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Biocon Limited announced on April 21, 2026, that Health Canada has granted a Notice of Compliance (NOC) for its biosimilars Bosaya™ (denosumab) and Vevzuo™ (denosumab). Bosaya™ is a biosimilar to Prolia®, approved for treating postmenopausal women with osteoporosis at high risk for fracture, increasing bone mass in men with osteoporosis at high risk for fracture, and increasing bone mass in men with nonmetastatic prostate cancer receiving androgen deprivation therapy. Vevzuo™ is a biosimilar to Xgeva®, approved for treating bone complications associated with cancer. Both products are denosumab injections for subcutaneous use, with Bosaya™ in a 60 mg/mL prefilled syringe and Vevzuo™ in a 120 mg/1.7 mL single-dose vial. This approval signifies Biocon's expanding access to high-quality biosimilars in key global markets and strengthens its portfolio of affordable biologic therapies.

announcements.subject: Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd - 544292 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release: Orbicular''s Partner secures tentative  U.S. ANDA approval for a generic version of Ozempic (Semaglutide Injection), supported by OneSource as CDMO Partner.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: OneSource Specialty Pharma Limited has announced that its partner, Orbicular Pharmaceutical Technologies, along with its U.S.-based front-end partner, has secured tentative U.S. FDA approval for an Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for a generic version of Ozempic® (Semaglutide Injection). OneSource is acting as the contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) partner for this product. This milestone signifies a closely integrated development-to-submission model, where Orbicular led product development and OneSource provided end-to-end manufacturing capabilities from its US-FDA approved site in Bangalore for the U.S. market filing. The collaboration aims to ensure reliable commercial supply.

announcements.subject: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd - 531035 - Addendum To Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Saturday, April 18, 2026
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd has issued an addendum to the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 18, 2026. The addendum clarifies an inadvertent clerical oversight where a note forming part of the standalone financial results was skipped during the initial filing. Additionally, a separate note number was incorrectly inserted, causing subsequent note numbering to change. The company has enclosed Notes No. 8, 9, 10, and 11 as Annexure-1 to rectify these issues and ensure clarity. Note 8 details that Eraaya Lifespaces Limited (ELL) acquired Ebix Inc and its global subsidiaries, with Vikas Lifecare Limited (VLL) contributing ₹2,977.27 million (US$34.83 million) to the acquisition. Due to non-repayment by ELL, VLL invoked arbitration, leading to a settlement where 51% of equity shares of Ebix International Holdings Limited (EIHL) were transferred to VLL. All other figures and disclosures in the previously filed financial results remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: GOCL Corporation Ltd-$ - 506480 - Update On Leased Land Situated At Kukatpally, Hyderabad.
announcements.detail: Update on leased land situated at Kukatpally, Hyderabad.
announcements.ai_summary: GOCL Corporation Limited has provided an update regarding leased land situated at Kukatpally, Hyderabad. The company has become aware of ongoing proceedings concerning an order from the Endowment Tribunal, Telangana, which directs GOCL not to alienate its land or provide adequate security. The company is currently reviewing the order and seeking legal advice. Based on their current assessment, this development is not expected to have a material adverse impact on the company's operations or financial position. GOCL Corporation Limited will continue to monitor the situation and make further disclosures as required.

announcements.subject: Ugro Capital Ltd - 511742 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release dated 20 April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: UGRO Capital Limited has announced its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹51.1 Crore for Q4 FY26, representing a 26% increase from ₹40.5 Crore in Q4 FY25. For the full year FY26, PAT stood at ₹174.8 Crore, a 21% year-on-year increase. Net Total Income for the full year was ₹1,067 Crore, up 31% year-on-year. The company's Consolidated Assets Under Management (AUM) reached ₹15,334 Crore as of March 31, 2026. UGRO Capital also confirmed that its five structural objectives announced on February 7, 2026, are on track and that no equity raise is planned through FY29.

announcements.subject: Axita Cotton Ltd - 542285 - Submission Of Audited Financial Results (Standalone) Of The Company For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Submission of Audited financial result of the Company along with Audit Report with unmodified opinion thereon.
announcements.ai_summary: Axita Cotton Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has submitted these results along with the Audit Report from its Statutory Auditor, which contains an unmodified opinion. These financial results are also available on the company's website, www.axitacotton.com.

announcements.subject: Oberoi Realty Ltd - 533273 - Summary Of Bookings For Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Summary of bookings for Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Oberoi Realty Limited has reported provisional bookings for Q4 FY26, with 229 units booked, covering a carpet area of 3,57,552 sq. ft., and a gross booking value of Rs. 1,673 Crore. This is a significant increase compared to Q3 FY26 (130 units, 1,86,054 sq. ft., Rs. 836 Crore) and Q4 FY25 (78 units, 1,37,321 sq. ft., Rs. 853 Crore). For the full fiscal year FY26, the company booked 698 units with a gross booking value of Rs. 5,447 Crore, compared to 929 units and Rs. 5,281 Crore in FY25. These figures are subject to audit.

announcements.subject: Industrial & Prudential Investment Company Ltd - 501298 - Dealing Of Equity Shares Of The Company On ''National Stock Exchange Of India''
announcements.detail: National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) vide circular reference no. 0645/2026 dated 17.04.2026 has notified its members that the Equity shares of the Company (Symbol- INDPRUD) have been permitted to trade and have been admitted to dealings on the Capital Market segment with effect from 20 April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Industrial & Prudential Investment Company Limited's equity shares have been admitted to dealings on the Capital Market segment of the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) with effect from April 20, 2026. This notification was issued by NSE vide circular reference no. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026. The equity shares of the company, with Symbol INDPRUD and ISIN INE620D01011, will now be permitted to trade on the NSE.

announcements.subject: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd - 544307 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vishal Mega Mart Limited has informed the stock exchange that its subsidiary, Airplaza Retail Holdings Private Limited, has received an order from the Court of the Adjudicating Officer, Food Safety -cum- Additional District Magistrate (Revenue), Rayagada. On April 20, 2026, a penalty of Rs. 4,00,000/- was imposed on the subsidiary. This penalty stems from a violation of the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006, identified during an inspection of the subsidiary's store in Rayagada on May 19, 2025. The details of the violation and the imposed penalty are provided in the annexure.

announcements.subject: PDS Ltd - 538730 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchange about the intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PDS Limited has disclosed an incident involving alleged professional misconduct by a former employee of Poeticgem International Limited, a step-down subsidiary in Hong Kong. Poeticgem has initiated legal actions in Bangladesh, and the matter is sub judice. PDS Limited filed a complaint with the Economic Offences Wing (EOW), Mumbai, on January 10, 2026, which led to an FIR being registered on April 18, 2026, under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023. The preliminary internal review suggests historical transactions over four years, starting from August 2021, with an estimated value of approximately ₹20.15 Cr. This is a broad estimate and not a confirmed accounting loss, with no identified incremental financial exposure or future liability at this stage. The investigation is ongoing.

announcements.subject: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd - 540611 - Change Of Registrar & Share Transfer Agent - Ncds
announcements.detail:
In continuation of our earlier intimation dated January 20, 2026, we hereby inform that the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent ('RTA') for electronic connectivity for the following Non Convertible Debentures ('NCDs') has been changed from KFin Technologies Limited ('KFin') to MUFG Intime India Private Limited ('MUFG') with effect from April 20, 2026:

  INE519Q08178
  INE519Q08160
  INE519Q08186
  INE519Q08194

The Bank has received confirmation ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd has changed its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) for electronic connectivity of certain Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) from KFin Technologies Limited to MUFG Intime India Private Limited, effective April 20, 2026. This change applies to NCDs with ISINs INE519Q08178, INE519Q08160, INE519Q08186, and INE519Q08194. The bank received confirmation from NSDL on April 17, 2026, and CDSL on April 20, 2026. A tripartite agreement between AU Small Finance Bank, KFin, and MUFG is currently under process and will be intimated in due course. This update follows an earlier intimation dated January 20, 2026.

announcements.subject: Gayatri Projects Ltd - 532767 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please find appended intimation on allotment of 10,90,00,000 equity shares on preferential basis u/r 30 of LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Gayatri Projects Limited has approved the allotment of 10,90,00,000 (Ten crore ninety lakhs) fully paid-up equity shares of face value Rs.2/- each at an issue price of Rs.10/- per share, including a premium of Rs.8/-, on a preferential basis. This allotment, aggregating to Rs. 109,00,00,000/-, is the first tranche and was approved by the Issue & Allotment Committee on April 20, 2026. This follows the Board Meeting on September 25, 2025, and shareholder approval at the EGM on October 23, 2025. The company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from 18,71,98,685 shares to 29,61,98,685 shares post-allotment. The company will apply for listing and trading approval for these new shares.

announcements.subject: Choice International Ltd - 531358 -  Intimation Of Q4 & FY 26 Earnings Conference Call
announcements.detail: Intimation of Q4 & FY 26 Earnings Conference Call
announcements.ai_summary: Choice International Ltd has announced an earnings conference call scheduled for Friday, April 24, 2026, at 04:00 PM IST. The call will be held to discuss the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Management participants will include Mr. Arun Poddar, Group CEO, and Mr. Ayush Sharma, Head IR. Investors can join the call using a Diamond Pass™ for express access or by dialing the universal dial-in number +91 22 6280 1221 or +91 22 7115 8035. International toll-free numbers are also available for USA, UK, Singapore, Japan, Canada, and Hong Kong.

announcements.subject: Mindspace Business Parks REIT - 543217 - Investor Complaints
announcements.detail: Mindspace Business Parks REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Investor grievance report for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Mindspace Business Parks REIT, through its manager K Raheja Corp Investment Managers Private Limited, has submitted its investor grievance report for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For the financial year ended March 31, 2026, the REIT received one complaint, which was disposed of, leaving zero complaints pending at the end of the year. The average time taken for redressal of complaints during the year was 1 working day. For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, no new investor complaints were received, and no complaints were pending at the beginning or end of the quarter.

announcements.subject: Indbank Merchant Banking Services Ltd - 511473 - Audited Financial Results For The Year Ended 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Audited financial results for the year ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Indbank Merchant Banking Services Ltd, at a meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the audited financial results and cash flow statement for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company also declared that the Statutory Auditors have issued an unmodified opinion in their report for the financial year 2025-26. These audited financial results and the auditor's report are now enclosed for record. The meeting commenced at 5:10 PM and concluded at 6:30 PM.

announcements.subject: AVG Logistics Ltd - 543910 - Incorporation Of Joint Venture Company
announcements.detail: Incorporation of Joint Venture Company in collaboration with Baidyanath LNG Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: AVG Logistics Ltd has informed the exchanges about the incorporation of a Joint Venture Company, "Carbonlite Logistics Private Limited," in collaboration with Baidyanath LNG Private Limited. This JV company has an authorized and paid-up capital of Rs. 10 Lakhs. AVG Logistics Limited and Baidyanath LNG Private Limited will each subscribe to 50% of the shares in cash. The JV company will carry out the business of Logistics. The company is a related party to AVG Logistics Ltd. Further details regarding the business of the JV will be shared in due course.

announcements.subject: Ravindra Energy Ltd - 504341 - General Business Updates Of Electrical Vehicle Business
announcements.detail: Ravindra Energy Limited has informed the exchange regarding General Business update of electrical vehicle business.
announcements.ai_summary: Ravindra Energy Ltd has provided a business update regarding its electrical vehicle (EV) business. Its associate entity, Energy in Motion Limited (EIM), and Drivn have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to deploy approximately 1,000 electric heavy-duty commercial vehicles over the next two years. This partnership will combine EIM's vehicle and energy solutions with Drivn's EV leasing and financing platform, focusing on large-scale electric fleet deployment across India. The collaboration aims to improve access and reduce entry barriers for fleet operators by providing support across vehicle supply, financing, deployment planning, lifecycle management, and energy solutions, including charging and battery-swapping.

announcements.subject: SK Minerals & Additives Ltd - 544584 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Administrative warning from Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI).
announcements.ai_summary: SK Minerals & Additives Ltd has received an Administrative Warning Letter from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) dated April 16, 2026, which was received via email on April 20, 2026. SEBI observed during the examination of the company's SME IPO that the tenure of a loan from related parties was incorrectly disclosed as 'Not Applicable' instead of 'on or before February 22, 2032' in the Offer Document, constituting a non-compliance with Regulation 245(1) of the SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. SEBI has advised the company to be careful in the future and exercise due diligence. The company has noted the observations and will ensure enhanced diligence in future disclosures. This warning does not have any material financial impact.

announcements.subject: 360 ONE WAM LTD - 542772 - Receipt Of In-Principle Approval From International Financial Services Centres Authority ('IFSCA')
announcements.detail: We would like to inform you that 360 ONE Global Asset Management (IFSC) Limited ("GAM"), a wholly owned subsidiary of 360 ONE Asset Management Limited ("AMC") and a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, has received in-principle approval from IFSCA to act as a Fund Management Entity (Retail).
announcements.ai_summary: 360 ONE Global Asset Management (IFSC) Limited (“GAM”), a wholly owned subsidiary of 360 ONE Asset Management Limited and a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of 360 ONE WAM LTD, has received in-principle approval from the International Financial Services Centres Authority (IFSCA). This approval allows GAM to act as a Fund Management Entity (Retail). The company plans to infuse necessary capital into GAM and obtain the final registration certificate from IFSCA to commence its asset and fund management business at GIFT City. This development was communicated to the exchanges on April 20, 2026.

announcements.subject: Amic Forging Ltd - 544037 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to conversion of Warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Amic Forging Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the allotment of 8,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at an issue price of Rs. 1,211.10 per share. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of 8,00,000 convertible equity warrants previously allotted on a preferential basis. The company received the balance 75% of the consideration amount from the warrant holders. Notably, 55,000 warrants were transferred by an existing warrant holder to a new allottee, and shares were allotted to this new allottee upon receipt of the balance consideration. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up capital will increase from Rs. 10,74,88,350 to Rs. 11,54,88,350. The new shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares, and the company will apply for their listing and trading on BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Indosolar Ltd - 533257 - Audited Financial Results For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026 Along With Audit Report.
announcements.detail: Audited Financials Results for the Quarter and Year Ended March 31, 2026 along with Audit Report.
announcements.ai_summary: Indosolar Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 20, 2026. The Board approved the Standalone Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Audit Report. Additionally, the company appointed Mr. Nilesh Bhogilal Gandhi as an additional Non-Executive, Independent Director, effective April 20, 2026, pending shareholder approval. Mr. Abhishek Pareek was appointed as the Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Officer, also effective April 20, 2026. The Board also appointed M/s Mahajan & Aihara Chartered Accountant LLP as the internal auditor for the financial year 2026-2027 and M/s N Ritesh and Associates as the cost auditor for the same period, subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject:
Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Public Notice No.- STK-6/010648/2026-Striking Off Or Removal Of The Name Of CIL Solar PV Ltd (A Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of Coal India Ltd.) Under Section 248(2) Of The Companies
Act, 2013
announcements.detail: Please find the attached update on public notice of MCA for strike off of CIL Solar PV Ltd a wholly owned subsdiary of Coal India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Coal India Ltd has received a public notice from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) regarding the proposed striking off or removal of the name of its wholly-owned subsidiary, CIL Solar PV Ltd. This action is being taken under Section 248(2) of the Companies Act, 2013. Any person objecting to this proposed removal has thirty days from the date of the public notice's publication to send their objections to the MCA office.

announcements.subject: Union Bank of India - 532477 - Schedule Of Earnings Call For The Quarter/Year Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Schedule of Earning Call for the Quarter/year ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Union Bank of India has scheduled an Earnings Call for April 23, 2026, to discuss the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The call will be conducted virtually and will involve discussions with analysts and investors. The bank will refer to publicly available documents during the call, and no unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared. This is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd - 543593 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Monday, April 20, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on Monday, April 20, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 20, 2026, and approved several key decisions. The Board approved the transfer of the company's sugar factory located at Meerganj, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, on a slump sale basis to Forever Global Enterprises Limited. This transaction is subject to requisite approvals, including shareholder consent. Additionally, the Board authorized entering into a Joint Venture with Orgonew Private Limited for the development, manufacture, marketing, distribution, and commercialization of phyto bio-active based functional food products. The Board also approved a change in designation for Mr. Sandeep Kumar from Whole Time Director to Non-Executive Director, effective May 05, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: IIFL Capital Services Ltd - 542773 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: IIFL Capital Services Ltd has been penalized by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) with a monetary penalty of ₹7,68,474.32/-. This penalty is in relation to a client code modification, specifically under the 'ERROR' client code category as per Circular No. NSE/INVG/56395 dated April 17, 2023. The penalty notice was received on April 20, 2026. The company stated that no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities is expected, apart from the monetary penalty. IIFL Capital Services Ltd is in the process of filing a waiver application regarding this matter.

announcements.subject: Ashapura Minechem Ltd - 527001 - Dislcosure letter  under  Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: Chaitali Nishit Salot Family Trust has submitted a letter to Exchange on amendment to trust deed  under Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Chaitali Nishit Salot Family Trust has submitted a certificate from Atul HMV & Associates LLP, Chartered Accountants, to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. This certificate, dated April 20, 2026, confirms the Trust's compliance with Clause 9(d) of the SEBI Exemption Order No. WTM/KCV/CFD/16/2025-26 for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This submission is in relation to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Trust is required to provide this certification annually to maintain its exemption. The company Ashapura Minechem Limited and SEBI have also been copied on this disclosure.

announcements.subject: DSM Fresh Foods Ltd - 544568 - Intimation Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 Regarding Management Meeting
announcements.detail: Intimation pursuant to Regulations 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015 regarding Management Meet
announcements.ai_summary: DSM Fresh Foods Ltd has announced that a management meeting is scheduled for Thursday, April 23, 2026. This meeting will be held virtually and will focus on discussions based on publicly available information. The company explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared or discussed during this meeting. This intimation is provided in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: TVS Motor Company Ltd - 532343 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Signing of Joint Development Agreement with Hyundai Motor Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: TVS Motor Company Ltd has entered into a Joint Development Agreement (JDA) with Hyundai Motor Company on April 20, 2026. This agreement, signed internationally with Hyundai Motor Company of the Republic of Korea, is for the development, manufacturing, and commercialisation of electric micromobility 3-wheelers. The JDA outlines the terms for joint development, with Hyundai Motor Company leading the concept design and both parties collaborating on product development. The agreement also covers manufacturing, marketing, sales, and distribution of these products. TVS Motor Company will pay royalties for sales in India and other territories, while Hyundai Motor Company will provide compensation and royalties for sales in Korea and other designated regions.

announcements.subject: Saraswati Commercial India Ltd - 512020 - Equity Shares Of Saraswati Commercial (India) Limited Included Under The 'Permitted To Trade And Admitted To Dealings' On National Stock Exchange Of India Limited (NSE).
announcements.detail: Equity Shares of Saraswati Commercial (India) Limited included under the ''permitted to trade and admitted to dealings'' on National Stock Exchange of India Limited w.e.f. 20.04.2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Saraswati Commercial (India) Limited's equity shares have been admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). Effective from April 20, 2026, the shares are now "Permitted to Trade and Admitted to Dealings" on the NSE, as per NSE's Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026. This announcement, dated April 20, 2026, was made to BSE Limited and informs stakeholders of the expanded trading availability. This regulatory update signifies increased accessibility for investors to trade the company's shares on a major stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Microfin Ltd - 544055 - Regulation 30- Key Business Update For The Quarter And Fiscal Year Ended 31 March 2026
announcements.detail: Regulation 30-Key business update for the quarter and fiscal year ended 31 March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Muthoot Microfin Limited has provided a key business update for the quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a return to normalized business momentum, with Assets Under Management (AUM) growing by 13% year-over-year to Rs. 14,006 crore as of March 31, 2026, compared to Rs. 12,357 crore in the previous year. Disbursements increased by 6% YoY to Rs. 9,418 crore in FY26. The company's diversification into Individual Loans, Micro-Lap, and Gold Loans is progressing, with the non-JLG portfolio increasing to 17% of the total AUM. Asset quality improved, with GNPA trending lower and collection efficiencies rising. The total branch count stood at 1,670, with 91 branches consolidated during the year.

announcements.subject: Real Touch Finance Ltd - 538611 - Revised Announcement Under Regulation 30  Of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015.
announcements.detail: As per Letter Enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Real Touch Finance Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on Monday, April 20, 2026, approved the transfer and assignment of an identified loan portfolio from certain branch offices. The total value of the loan portfolio being transferred is ₹13,02,64,843.63 (Rupees Thirteen Crore Two Lakh Sixty-Four Thousand Eight Hundred Forty-Three and Sixty-Three Paise Only). This strategic realignment initiative includes Pool 1, valued at ₹12,73,59,172.40, which is effective from April 20, 2026, and Pool 2, valued at ₹29,05,671.23, effective from June 1, 2026. This transaction is considered a material event under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Andrew Yule & Company Ltd - 526173 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Andrew Yule & Company Ltd has entered into loan arrangements to raise funds. On April 18, 2026, the company secured a short-term loan of ₹30,00,00,000 (Rupees thirty crore only) from the Government of India through the Ministry of Heavy Industries, which is the promoter. This loan has a tenure of 1 (one) year and an interest rate of 8.30% per annum. Additionally, on April 20, 2026, the company obtained a soft loan of ₹5,00,00,000 (Rupees five crore only) from the Tea Board of India. This loan also has a tenure of 1 (one) year and an interest rate of 8.65% per annum. These arrangements are in compliance with SEBI regulations and were sanctioned by the Department of Economic Affairs and the Tea Board on April 13, 2026, and April 20, 2026, respectively.

announcements.company: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd
announcements.subject: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd - 540133 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the earnings call transcript.
announcements.ai_summary: The earnings call transcript for ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, has been made available on the company's website, www.iciciprulife.com. The transcript details the company's performance during FY2026. During the call on April 14, 2026, the company announced its welcome of IRDAI's transition to IND-AS, which will enhance financial reporting transparency and global standards. Key personnel present included Anup Bagchi, Amit Palta, Dhiren Salian, Judhajit Das, Manish Kumar, Souvik Jash, and Dhiraj Chugha. Notably, Amit Palta is moving on from the company after more than two decades, with Amish Banker set to take over as Chief Distribution Officer. No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the call.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On Joint Venture Agreement Between JSW Steel Limited And POSCO Group.
announcements.detail: Update on Joint Venture Agreement between JSW Steel Limited and POSCO Group.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Steel Limited, along with POSCO Group (POSCO Co., Ltd and POSCO-India Private Limited), has executed a Share Subscription and Joint Venture Agreement. Through this agreement, Saffron Resources Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of JSW Steel, will become a 50:50 Joint Venture between JSW Steel and POSCO Group. This joint venture is established for setting up a 6 mtpa greenfield steel plant in Odisha. The transaction is subject to necessary regulatory approvals, including from the Competition Commission of India, and other customary conditions precedent. This marks a significant step in the strategic collaboration between JSW Steel and POSCO.

announcements.subject: Carysil Ltd - 524091 - General Update
announcements.detail: General Update
announcements.ai_summary: Carysil Ltd has announced an increase in its installed manufacturing capacity for Quartz Kitchen Sinks. The company now proposes to enhance its annual installed capacity from the existing 1 Million units per annum to 1.25 Million units per annum. This expansion is driven by advanced discussions with major US home improvement retail chains requiring exclusive models and network support. The project will involve additional investment in building, moulds, and plant & machinery, with an estimated total investment of approximately ₹50 crores. The expansion is targeted for completion by the end of FY 2026–27 and will be financed through existing QIP funds and internal accruals. This move aims to meet increasing demand and support business growth.

announcements.subject: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd - 544111 - Press Release On Signing Of Two Hotel Management Agreements
announcements.detail: Press Release on signing of two hotel management agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Limited (ASPHL) has announced the signing of two hotel management agreements for the development of Zone Connect by The Park in Ayodhya and Zone Connect by The Park in Ujjain. This strategic expansion aims to strengthen the company's presence in prominent spiritual destinations known for religious significance and growing tourism. Zone Connect by The Park, Ayodhya will feature 56 rooms and is located near Ram Janmabhoomi and Maharishi Valmiki International Airport. Zone Connect by The Park, Ujjain will have 64 rooms and is situated near Ujjain Railway Station and the Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga Temple. These agreements align with ASPHL's growth strategy to cater to modern travellers seeking hospitality in culturally significant locations.

announcements.company: Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Ltd
announcements.subject: Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Ltd - 544453 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015, we hereby submit that Company has received an order from Western Railway.
announcements.ai_summary: Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Ltd has received a Letter of Acceptance from Western Railway for pre and post tamping track measurement survey services under the Sr. DEN/E/MMCT jurisdiction for the Ukai Songhad - Jalgaon section. The total order value for this project is Rs. 1,54,54,269.59. The company will be utilizing the Trimble GEDO Vorsys trolley system for this survey. This order signifies a new business award for the company. The details of the order are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Modern Malleables Ltd - 517336 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015-Disclosure By Larger Entities
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR)-Disclosure by Large Entities.
announcements.ai_summary: Modern Malleables Limited has confirmed that, as of March 31, 2026, the company does not fall under the definition of a "Larger Entity" as per the circulars issued by SEBI. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has informed the stock exchanges to take this confirmation on record. This announcement clarifies the company's regulatory status regarding the "Larger Entity" classification.

announcements.subject: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd - 542759 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Meeting Of The Management Committee Of The Board Of Directors Held On April 20, 2026.
announcements.detail: It is hereby informed that the Management Committee of the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held on Monday, April 20, 2026, inter-alia considered and approved the issuance of up to 5,00,000 (Five lakh) Listed, Rated, Senior, Secured, Redeemable, Taxable, Non-Convertible Debentures ('NCDs') having face value of ?10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand only) per debenture, including a green shoe option of 2,00,000 (Two lakh) NCDs on private placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: On April 20, 2026, the Management Committee of the Board of Directors of Spandana Sphoorty Financial Limited approved the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) through a private placement. The company plans to issue up to 5,00,000 NCDs, with a face value of ₹10,000 per debenture. This issuance includes a green shoe option for an additional 2,00,000 NCDs. These NCDs will be listed, rated, senior, secured, redeemable, and taxable. The total value of the issuance, considering the base issue and the green shoe option, will be up to ₹700 crore (5,00,000 NCDs * ₹10,000 face value + 2,00,000 NCDs * ₹10,000 face value).

announcements.subject: Aeroflex Industries Ltd - 543972 - Intimation Of Participation In International Exhibition - Data Center World 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation of participation in International Exhibition- Data Center World 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Aeroflex Industries Limited will be participating in the Data Center World Exhibition, which is scheduled to take place in Washington, USA, from April 20 to April 23, 2026. The company will be showcasing its advanced flexible flow solutions specifically designed for liquid cooling systems. This participation highlights Aeroflex Industries' strategic focus on the high-growth data center infrastructure market and its commitment to developing next-generation thermal management technologies for the global market. Investors can note this as an initiative to expand market presence and showcase technological capabilities.

announcements.subject: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd - 544202 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Opening Of New Stores In Bengaluru.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Opening of New Stores in Bengaluru.
announcements.ai_summary: Stanley Lifestyles Limited announced on April 20, 2026, the opening of three new stores in Bengaluru, Karnataka, as part of its business expansion. The new stores include "Sofas & More by Stanley" on Mysore Road (10,000 sq. ft.) and in Gunjur (12,000 sq. ft.), as well as "Hilker India" on Hosur Road (6,000 sq. ft.). This expansion aims to enhance the company's retail presence and reach in the Bengaluru market. The company has provided this intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Jayant Infratech Ltd - 543544 - Compliances-Reg.24(A)-Annual Secretarial Compliance
announcements.detail: With reference to the above we are submitting that  compliance under this regulation is not applicable to the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Jayant Infratech Ltd has informed on April 20, 2026, that compliance with Regulation 24A of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to the company. This is because Jayant Infratech Ltd is listed on the BSE SME Platform. As per Regulation 15(2) of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, certain regulations, including Regulation 24A, do not apply to listed entities whose specified securities are listed on an SME Exchange.

announcements.company: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd
announcements.subject: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd - 540716 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Please find attached transcript of the earnings conference call with investor(s) and analyst(s) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd has submitted the transcript of its earnings conference call held on April 15, 2026. The call was conducted with investors and analysts to discuss the company's financial performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The transcript provides insights from the management, including Mr. Sanjeev Mantri (MD & CEO) and Mr. Gopal Balachandran (CFO), on economic and industry trends, as well as the company's performance and key initiatives. The information will also be available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd - 532734 - Updates On Disposal Of Stake In Ardent Steel Private Limited.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the intimation regarding updates on disposal of stake in Ardent Steel Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited (GPIL) provided an update on April 20, 2026, regarding the disposal of its stake in Ardent Steel Private Limited (ASPL). In the third tranche of the divestment, GPIL transferred 7,32,000 equity shares of ASPL to the respective buyer's account for a consideration of Rs. 22.18 Crores. This transfer represents 9.24% of ASPL's equity shares. Following this transaction, GPIL's stake in ASPL has reduced from 18.46% to 9.22%. This update is in continuation of earlier announcements made on February 6, 2026, March 6, 2026, and March 24, 2026, concerning the disposal of its entire 37.85% stake in ASPL for a total consideration of Rs. 90.87 Crores.

announcements.subject: Shah Metacorp Ltd - 533275 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, in continuous to intimation dated December 23, 2025 disclosing the details of the litigation in accordance Regulation 30 and Part A of Schedule Ill of the SEBI Listing Regulations of the SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. 

In continuation to the above, we would like to inform you of a development on the litigation
disclosed ....
announcements.ai_summary: Shah Metacorp Limited has provided an update on a litigation matter, specifically concerning a Section 9 IBC petition filed by Tejomay Exim Corporation. The company announced that the application has been dismissed as withdrawn following a mutual settlement between the parties. This development is in continuation of their previous intimation dated December 23, 2025, and aligns with SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. The settlement is procedural, and the company states it has no material adverse impact on its financial position, as an amount has been received from the Corporate Debtor, leading to the withdrawal of the petition.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Reg 26K: Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate governance
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Submission of the Compliance Report on Corporate Governance for the  Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Interise Trust, through its Investment Manager Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, has submitted its Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate Governance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This submission is in accordance with Regulation 26K of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and the SEBI Master circular dated July 11, 2025. The report covers Part A, Part B, and Part C of the governance compliance. The Trustee to Interise is IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited, and Axis Trustee Services Limited is the Debenture Trustee. The company has provided its principal place of business as A-303 & 304, 3rd Floor, Delphi Orchard Avenue, Hiranandani Business Park, Powai, Mumbai - 400076.

announcements.subject: NHC Foods Ltd - 517554 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail:
We would like to inform you that NHC INTERNATIONAL L.L.C-FZ, a foreign subsidiary company of NHC Foods Limited has invested and acquired 100% of the paid-up share capital of Conquer Enterprises Limited, a company incorporated and registered in Hong Kong.

The detailed disclosure is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Bondada Engineering Limited has announced the receipt of multiple work orders aggregating to ₹3.94 Crores. These orders are for projects in telecom infrastructure, railway safety systems, and energy-efficient lighting solutions. Specifically, a subsidiary has received a Letter of Award from IIT Hyderabad for the supply and installation of 40M and 50M Ground-Based Angular Towers for a pilot initiative on Indigenous 5G gNB Solution. Another subsidiary has received an order for KAVACH tubular lattice towers from Prathap Technocrats Private Limited for railway infrastructure. Additionally, a subsidiary has secured an order from The Singareni Collieries Company Limited for the supply of LED street light luminaries. These orders are expected to strengthen the company's order book and reinforce its diversified business model.

announcements.subject: String Metaverse Ltd - 534535 - Corporate Action-Updates on intimation of Sub division / Stock Split
announcements.detail: Allotment of New ISIN Pursuant to Subdivision of Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: String Metaverse Ltd has announced the allotment of a new ISIN number for its equity shares following a sub-division. The company's equity shares have been sub-divided from a face value of ₹10/- per share to ₹1/- per share. The new ISIN number for these sub-divided equity shares is INE958L01034. This change will be effective for trades conducted on and from April 24, 2026. This announcement follows the company's earlier disclosures regarding the stock split and is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: UFO Moviez India Ltd - 539141 - Intimation Under Regulation 31A Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Effecting Of Reclassification From 'Promoter/Promoter Group' Category To 'Public' Category Shareholders
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Intimation under Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Effecting of Reclassification from ''Promoter/Promoter Group'' category to ''Public'' category shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: UFO Moviez India Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the reclassification of certain shareholders from the 'Promoter/Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. This reclassification was approved by the company's members through a postal ballot resolution passed on April 17, 2026. The shareholders affected by this change are Apollo Green Energy Limited, which held 22,66,417 shares (5.84% of total shares), and Mr. Raaja Kanwar, who held 12,500 shares (0.03% of total shares), collectively holding 22,78,917 shares or 5.87% of the total shares. The reclassification has been effected in the depository system and confirmed by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, on April 20, 2026. This action is in compliance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Comfort Intech Ltd-$ - 531216 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, regarding the equity shares of the Company being permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (Capital Market Segment) with effect from April 20, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Comfort Intech Limited (CIL) has disclosed on April 20, 2026, that its equity shares have been admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) in the Capital Market Segment, effective from April 20, 2026. The entire existing equity share capital of the company, consisting of 31,99,38,080 equity shares of face value Re. 01.00 each, has been admitted for trading. The NSE symbol for the company is 'COMFINTE', and the ISIN is INE819A01049. The equity shares of Comfort Intech Limited will continue to be traded on BSE Limited alongside their listing on NSE.

announcements.subject: Ashika Credit Capital Ltd - 543766 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Securities Of Ashika Credit Capital Limited Permitted To Trade And Admitted To Dealings On National Stock Exchange
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that vide NSE Download Ref. No. NSE/CML/73797 and Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated 17.04.2026, the securities of Ashika Credit Capital Limited have been permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on National Stock Exchange (Capital Market Segment) w.e.f. 20.04.2026. The symbol of the Company on the NSE Platform is ASHIKA.
announcements.ai_summary: Ashika Credit Capital Limited's securities have been permitted to trade and admitted to dealings on the National Stock Exchange (Capital Market Segment) effective from April 20, 2026. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The NSE symbol for the company will be ASHIKA. This admission to dealings on NSE follows NSE Download Ref. No. NSE/CML/73797 and Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Akshaya Tritiya Revenue Update - FY 2026-27
announcements.detail: Akshaya Tritiya Revenue Update - FY 2026-27
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited announced a strong revenue performance for Akshaya Tritiya in FY 2026-27, recording Rs. 251 Crores. This represents a significant year-on-year growth of 80.3% compared to Rs. 140 Crores in the previous year, marking the company's second-highest single-day revenue. The growth was driven by strong volume, healthy footfall, and traction across product categories. The gold segment contributed Rs. 220 Crores (79.6% YoY growth), silver Rs. 10 Crores (98.0% YoY growth), and diamond & other products Rs. 21 Crores (79.9% YoY growth). The gold segment also saw a 12.8% year-on-year volume growth.

announcements.subject: Deccan Gold Mines Ltd - 512068 - Equity Shares Of Deccan Gold Mines Limited Included Under The 'Permitted To Trade' Category On National Stock Exchange Of India Limited (NSE)
announcements.detail: please refer the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Deccan Gold Mines Limited announced on April 20, 2026, that its equity shares have been included under the 'Permitted to Trade' category on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). This inclusion is effective from April 20, 2026, as per NSE's Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026. The company's symbol on the NSE will be 'DECNGOLD', and the market lot will be 1 equity share. This development allows for trading of Deccan Gold Mines Limited's equity shares on the NSE's Capital Market segment.

announcements.company: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd
announcements.subject: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd - 543995 - Intimation Of Opening Of A New Jewellery Store At Chandanagar, Hyderabad.
announcements.detail: We hereby inform that the Company has inaugurated a new Jewellery store in the brand name "Vaibhav Jewellers" at Chandanagar, Hyderabad, Telangana, Today, i.e. April 20, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Manoj Vaibhav Gems N Jewellers Ltd has inaugurated a new jewellery store under the brand name "Vaibhav Jewellers" at Chandanagar, Hyderabad, Telangana. The inauguration took place on April 20, 2026. The new store is located at Door No: 2-108/7/B/1/1, ICRISAT Colony Road, Chandanagar, Hyderabad, 500050. This expansion is in line with the company's strategy to increase its retail footprint. The company has made this disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd - 509732 - Intimation Regarding Admission Of Equity Shares For Trading On NSE Under 'Permitted To Trade' Category
announcements.detail: trading permission
announcements.ai_summary: Kothari Industrial Corporation Limited (KICL) has announced that its equity shares have been admitted to dealings and permitted to trade on the Capital Market Segment of the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE). This trading permission is effective from April 20, 2026, under the "Permitted to Trade" category, as per NSE Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026. The designated trading symbol allotted by NSE for KICL is "KOTIC". This admission is solely for trading purposes under the "Permitted to Trade" mechanism. The company has made this intimation in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: AAA Technologies Ltd - 543671 - Recommendations of the Committee of ID under Reg 26(7) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Independent Directors Committee (IDC) have submitted to BSE recommendations under Regulation 26(7) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, for the Open Offer to Public Shareholders of AAA Technologies Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: The Independent Directors Committee (IDC) of AAA Technologies Ltd has published its recommendations regarding the Open Offer to public shareholders. The offer, made by Acquirer 1, Jyotirgamya Advisory Private Limited, and Acquirer 2, Mr. Ashok Kumar Chordia, aims to acquire up to 33,34,968 fully paid-up equity shares of face value `10 each. This represents 26.00% of the Target Company's voting share capital. The offer price is set at `101.00 per Equity Share. The recommendations were published in Business Standard (English and Hindi) and Navshakti (Marathi) on April 20, 2026, as per SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. Mark Corporate Advisors Private Limited is the Manager to the Offer. The IDC members include Mr. Kamal Kishor Sharma (Chairman), Ms. Jyoti Torani, and Mr. Prateek Bhansali.

announcements.subject: Viyash Scientific Ltd - 512529 - Change In Domain Name And Website Of The Company
announcements.detail: Change in Doman name and Website of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Viyash Scientific Ltd (formerly Sequent Scientific Limited) has announced a change in its domain name and website, effective immediately. The company's website domain has been changed from www.sequent.in to www.viyash.com. Concurrently, the email addresses of authorized signatories for determining the materiality of information for stock exchange disclosures have also been updated to reflect the new domain, with investorrelations@sequent.in changing to investorrelations@viyash.com. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 and 46 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.company: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd
announcements.subject: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd - 534091 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) has received approval from SEBI to incorporate a new subsidiary, likely to be named 'MCX Coal Exchange Ltd.' or 'MCX Coal Exchange of India Ltd.', to establish a regulated market platform for coal. MCX plans to initially hold a 100% stake in this subsidiary, with a capital commitment of up to ₹100 Crore to meet minimum net worth requirements. This move signifies MCX's commitment to deepening its presence in the energy sector by providing a transparent, technology-driven platform for coal trading and price discovery. The newly incorporated company will subsequently apply to the Coal Controller Organization of India.

announcements.subject: Sundaram Multi Pap Ltd - 533166 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release regarding successful installation and running of new fully automatic notebook manufacturing machine at palghar plant is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Multi Pap Ltd has successfully installed and commenced operations of a new fully automatic notebook manufacturing machine at its Palghar plant. This machine, manufactured by Line-O-Matics, represents an investment of over ₹30 million and is expected to significantly enhance production capacity, improve operational efficiency, and reduce labor costs through automation. The company anticipates increased production output and lower per-unit costs as a result of this upgrade. Sundaram Multi Pap Ltd plans to add more automated lines in the near future to sustain growth momentum.

announcements.subject: SKP Securities Ltd - 531169 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Demise
announcements.detail: Demise of an Independent Director of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: The company, SKP Securities Ltd, has announced the demise of Prof. Santanu Ray, an Independent Director and Chairman of the Audit Committee, on April 18, 2026. This unfortunate event is considered an irreparable loss to the company. The company's directors and employees have conveyed their deepest sympathies to his family. Further details regarding this change, as required by SEBI LODR Regulations, have been enclosed. The company requests that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd - 544200 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Akme Fintrade (India) Limited has informed to the exchange regarding the Issuance of Non Convertible Debentures.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Akme Fintrade (India) Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the issuance of 50,000 Secured, Listed, Rated, Transferable, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of INR 10,000, aggregating to a total issuance of INR 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores). These NCDs will be issued on a private placement basis and are proposed to be listed on the NSE Limited. The Board also considered and analyzed requests from Star Housing Finance Limited, a promoter group entity, seeking re-classification to the 'Public' category under Regulation 31A of the Listing Regulations. The Board was of the view that the outgoing promoters met the specified conditions, subject to receiving a No Objection from the Stock Exchange.

announcements.subject: Banaras Beads Ltd - 526849 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), 2015 In The Matter Of Certificate Of Recognition 'One Star Export House By DGFT, Kanpur Uttar Pradesh' Dt. 18.04.2026.
announcements.detail: The company has obtained from Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and Industries, General Foreign Trade    Certificate of Recognition "One Star Esports House by DGFT Kanpur Uttar Pradesh dt. 18.04.2026 for five years from 18.02.2026 to 18.02.2031.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Banaras Beads Ltd has received a Certificate of Recognition as a "One Star Export House" from the Director General of Foreign Trade (DGFT), Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, Government of India. This recognition is valid for five years, commencing from February 18, 2026, and extending to February 18, 2031. The certificate was officially dated April 18, 2026. This status is granted in accordance with the provisions of the Foreign Trade Policy, 2023, subject to the conditions prescribed in the Hand Book of Procedures (2023). The company has made this information available on its website, www.bblinvestor.com.

announcements.subject: Harshdeep Hortico Ltd - 544105 - Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015, We Are Enclosing Herewith The Business Update Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the Business update of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Harshdeep Hortico Limited announced on April 20, 2026, the launch of a new product category as part of its business expansion and innovation strategy. The company has introduced "Rotomoulded Decorative Water Fountains," a new range of outdoor decorative and landscape products. This launch, which occurred on April 19, 2026, marks a significant step in diversifying the company's premium outdoor and lifestyle product portfolio. Initially catering to the domestic market, Harshdeep Hortico plans for international expansion. The company expects this new product line to strengthen its market position, enhance product diversification, and open new growth opportunities.

announcements.subject: Petronet LNG Ltd - 532522 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Newspaper clipping requesting shareholders for registration/ updation of their email address is attached herewith
announcements.ai_summary: Petronet LNG Ltd has issued a press release on April 20, 2026, requesting shareholders to register or update their email addresses. This initiative aims to facilitate the efficient distribution of important company communications, including Notices of Postal Ballot and Shareholders' Meetings. The announcement was published in the Hindustan Times (English) and Amar Ujala (Hindi) newspapers on April 20, 2026. Shareholders are encouraged to provide their updated email details to ensure they receive all relevant information promptly.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Board Meeting Outcome for OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING DATED 20.04.2026
announcements.detail: OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING DATED 20.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Nexome Capital Markets Ltd, in their meeting on April 20, 2026, approved the allotment of 19,20,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each.
