These shares were allotted pursuant to the exercise of 19,20,000 equity convertible warrants by both promoter and non-promoter category warrant holders. The warrant holders paid the balance 75% of the issue price, amounting to Rs. 48 per warrant, for an aggregate of Rs. 9,21,60,000. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 10,73,55,000, comprising 1,07,35,500 equity shares. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares, and the company will apply for listing and trading approval on the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Cranex Ltd - 522001 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 and other applicable regulations of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and other relevant amendment thereto from time to time, we would like to inform you that the Company has received Purchase Orders from our customers for manufacturing and supply of various products with order value amounting to Rs. 6,30,46,756/-.
announcements.ai_summary: Cranex Limited has announced the receipt of new purchase orders from its customers, with a total value of ₹6,30,46,756/-. These orders are for the manufacturing and supply of various products. Notably, one order from BHEL-Bhopal is for a 50/10 Ton EOT Crane valued at approximately ₹1,73,27,592/-, with delivery within the agreed timeline. Another order from Power Tech Industrial Services is for five units of 5 and 10 Ton Single Girder EOT Cranes, valued at approximately ₹1,01,43,634/-, also with delivery within the agreed timeline. The company emphasizes its commitment to customers despite challenging market conditions.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd - 500449 - Intimation Regarding Re-Opening Of Phenol & Cumene Plant Of HOCL
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding re-opening of HOCL Phenol & cumene PLANT
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd (HOCL) has informed that its Phenol and Cumene plants at the Kochi unit are resuming operations. This follows the resumption of LPG supply by BPCL, as directed by the Government of India, after a temporary shutdown due to a force majeure event. Plant restart activities are currently in progress. HOCL will provide a further update on the status of commercial production in due course. This development is a positive step towards restoring normal operations for these key plants.

announcements.subject: JD Cables Ltd - 544524 - Compliance To The Regulation 32, Statement Of Deviation And Variation For The Half Year And Year Ending As On 31St March 2026
announcements.detail: Reg 32 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015, Intimation to BSE that there is no deviation or variation in utilization of proceeds by the Company for the half year and year ended as on 31st March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: JD Cables Limited has confirmed that there are no deviations or variations in the utilization of funds raised from its Initial Public Offering (IPO) for the half-year and year ended March 31, 2026. This statement is in compliance with Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The total amount raised was ₹8441.47 Lakhs, with ₹4,500 Lakhs allocated for working capital, ₹2,600 Lakhs for repayment of borrowings, ₹754 Lakhs for general corporate purposes, and ₹587.47 Lakhs for public issue expenses. The Audit Committee has reviewed and found the company to be in compliance.

announcements.subject: Dynamatic Technologies Ltd-$ - 505242 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') - Incorporation Of A Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015 - Incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Dynamatic Technologies Limited has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary named "DYNAUTON LIMITED" on April 10, 2026. This incorporation was completed with the issuance of a Certificate of Incorporation by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs on April 19, 2026, under Corporate Identification Number U26515KA2026PLC219138. The company had previously disclosed the necessary details for this subsidiary in a letter dated November 10, 2025. This action is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors should note that this is a step towards potential future business activities or restructuring within the Dynamatic Technologies group.

announcements.company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd
announcements.subject: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd - 542760 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a copy of the press release with respect to  New Domestic Orders received by SWREL worth approx INR 3550 Crore
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited (SWREL) has announced receiving new domestic orders worth approximately INR 3,550 Crore. The company has been declared the L1 bidder for a turn-key EPC package of 875 MW AC in Bikaner, Rajasthan, from Coal India, with a total contract value including O&M and taxes of approximately INR 3,490 Crore. Additionally, SWREL secured an order for a 50 MW AC project in Maharashtra from a private IPP. These new orders bring the total EPC order inflow for FY26 to over INR 10,062 Crore, exceeding the company's initial target. Mr. Chandra Kishore Thakur, Global CEO, highlighted the significance of the first project from Coal India and expressed confidence in sustaining the growth momentum in India's renewable development sector. SWREL is a global pure-play EPC solutions provider with a total portfolio of over 26.1 GWp.

announcements.subject: Krishival Foods Ltd - 544416 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Krishival Foods Crosses 15,000 Deep Freezers, Strengthening Cold Chain Infrastructure and Retail reach Across India for its ice cream brand ''Melt N Mellow''
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Krishival Foods Limited has announced a significant expansion of its cold chain infrastructure for its ice cream brand 'Melt N Mellow'. The company has deployed over 15,000 deep freezers across its retail network, a substantial increase from 3,732 units at the beginning of the year to 15,490 units as of March 31, 2026. This expansion strengthens its last-mile distribution capabilities and aims to enhance product availability in urban and Tier II/III markets. The expanded freezer network is expected to improve product visibility and consistency. Krishival Foods' distribution footprint already covers over 30,000 retail touch points across Maharashtra, Karnataka, Goa, Telangana, and Andhra Pradesh. This initiative aligns with the company's growth outlook and its strategy to capture the increasing demand for its ice cream portfolio.

announcements.subject: Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd - 524000 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation w.r.t Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd has announced the launch of its next-generation conversational AI platform for omnichannel customer service, a key step in its AI-first transformation. This unified platform aims to serve as a single customer service interface across all channels, ensuring a seamless and consistent customer experience. The platform is designed to autonomously resolve up to 80% of voice and chat interactions, which is expected to reduce service costs while simultaneously enhancing customer experience. More complex or high-empathy cases will be routed to human agents, allowing them to focus on value-added tasks. The AI platform incorporates an industry-first contextual interface with real-time insights, including customer history, loan risk flags, and sentiment analysis, to facilitate faster resolutions and improve first-contact closure rates. This initiative underscores Poonawalla Fincorp's strategy to leverage AI as a core driver for growth, sharper decision-making, and operational excellence across customer engagement, credit underwriting, risk management, and internal productivity.

announcements.subject: Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd - 532966 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Press Relese issued by Titagarh Naval Systems Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Titagarh Naval Systems Limited (TNSL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Titagarh Rail Systems Limited, launched its fourth Diving Support Craft A23 (YARD 328) for the Indian Navy on April 19, 2026. This vessel is part of a series of five DSCs being built under the Government of India’s Make in India initiative. The craft, designed as a catamaran, is equipped with advanced, indigenously sourced systems to support the Indian Navy’s Command Clearance Diving Teams (CCDTs) in underwater operations such as inspection, repair, maintenance, and salvage. The launch ceremony, attended by approximately 150 employees, took place on the Hooghly River at 1455 Hrs. The press release regarding this milestone is available on the company's website, www.titagarh.in.

announcements.subject: Twamev Construction And Infrastructure Ltd - 532738 - Intimation Of Demise Of An Independent Director Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Demise of Mr. Santanu Ray, Independent Director,  of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Twamev Construction And Infrastructure Ltd (formerly known as Tantia Constructions Limited) has regretfully informed the stock exchanges of the demise of Mr. Santanu Ray, an Independent Director of the company. Mr. Ray also served as the Chairman of the Audit Committee. The company acknowledged his significant contributions through his guidance, wisdom, and deep understanding of governance and financial oversight during his tenure. His passing is considered an irreparable loss to the company.

announcements.subject: STL Networks Ltd - 544395 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Preferential Issue
announcements.detail: Issue of Convertible warrants on preferential basis
announcements.ai_summary: STL Networks Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 18, 2026, has approved the issuance of up to 4,50,00,000 (Four Crores Fifty Lakhs) convertible warrants to its promoter, Twin Star Overseas Limited, on a preferential basis. The total issue size for these warrants is Rs. 108,00,00,000 (Rupees One Hundred and Eight Crore Only), with each warrant priced at Rs. 24 (Rupees Twenty-Four only). Each warrant is convertible into one equity share of the company with a face value of Rs. 2 (Rupees Two only) at a premium of Rs. 22 (Rupees Twenty-Two only) per share. This preferential issue is subject to shareholder approval and other necessary regulatory clearances. The company also amended its Articles of Association to facilitate the issuance of such securities.

announcements.subject: 360 ONE WAM LTD - 542772 - Disclosure Of Material Events With Respect To Subsidiaries Of The Company
announcements.detail: Disclosure of material events with respect to subsidiaries of the Company under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The board of directors of 360 ONE Portfolio Managers Limited and 360 ONE Asset Management Limited, both wholly owned subsidiaries of 360 ONE WAM LTD, have approved the transfer of the Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) business and the Portfolio Management Services (PMS) business from the former to the latter. This business transfer will be on a going concern and slump sale basis for a consideration not less than the net book value of the undertaking, subject to adjustments for working capital. The transfer is aimed at consolidating the asset management business for public equities, creating a unified investment platform. This transaction does not require shareholder approval as it is an internal restructuring between wholly owned subsidiaries and is not prejudicial to investors, creditors, or shareholders. The effective date of the transfer will be determined by the subsidiaries.

announcements.subject: Bharat Road Network Ltd - 540700 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Demise
announcements.detail: Sad and untimely demise of Prof Santanu Ray (DIN: 00642736), Chairman of the Board and Independent Director
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Road Network Ltd announced with deep sadness the untimely demise of Prof. Santanu Ray (DIN: 00642736), Chairman of the Board and Independent Director, on April 18, 2026. Following his demise, he has ceased to hold the positions of Chairman of the Audit Committee and Member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, effective immediately. Prof. Ray had been associated with the company as a Non-Executive Independent Director since July 30, 2019, and was serving his second term until July 29, 2029. His passing is considered an irreparable loss to the company.

announcements.subject: Omaxe Ltd - 532880 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith copy of intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Omaxe Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Secure Properties Private Limited, has successfully raised Rs. 40 Crore by issuing 400 Unlisted, Unrated, Senior, Secured, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with a face value of Rs. 10 Lakh each through private placement. This fund-raising activity took place on April 18, 2026. The details of this issuance are available on the company's website and the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd - 590003 - Revision in Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rates (MCLR)
announcements.detail:
Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has informed BSE regarding "Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 -
Revision in Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rates (MCLR)".
announcements.ai_summary: Karur Vysya Bank Ltd has informed exchanges about the revision in its Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rates (MCLR). Effective from April 22, 2026, the Overnight MCLR will be revised to 8.85% from 8.80%, the One-month and Three-month MCLR to 9.00% from 8.95%, and the Six-month and One-year MCLR to 9.15% from 9.10%. These revisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Concord Control Systems Ltd - 543619 - Merger Order Of Advanced Rail Controls Private Limited With And Into Concord Control Systems Limited
announcements.detail: Merger order of Advanced Rail Controls Private Limited with and into Concord Control Systems Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Concord Control Systems Limited has announced that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Allahabad Bench, Prayagraj, approved the scheme of amalgamation of its wholly owned subsidiary, Advanced Rail Controls Private Limited, with and into Concord Control Systems Limited on April 15, 2026. The order was uploaded on the NCLT website on April 18, 2026. The merger will become effective upon receipt of the certified copy of the order and its filing with the Registrar of Companies. This follows earlier intimations dated September 01, 2025, and May 14, 2025.

announcements.subject: Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd - 538685 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find the attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd has informed the exchange that the Hon’ble High Court of Judicature at Bombay, in an order dated April 17, 2026, has referred the questions of law arising in the writ proceedings filed by the company to a Larger Bench for adjudication. This follows previous disclosures made by the company on August 03, 2024, February 05, 2025, December 08, 2025, and February 14, 2026. The Court has further directed that all interim orders, including the one preventing further action on the impugned show cause notice/order until final decisions are made, will remain in force until the Larger Bench resolves the issues. The matter pertains to the demand and recovery of allegedly inadmissible Input Tax Credit (ITC).

announcements.subject: Avro India Ltd - 543512 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting For Allotment Of Equity Shares Pursuant To Conversion Of Warrants
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Reg. 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform you that Board of Directors at their meeting held today i.e. April 18, 2026 allotted 1,06,990 fully paid up equity shares of face value of Rs. 10 each to the warrant holders who have paid balance amount in respect of 1,06,990 warrants. The remaining 424361 warrants are forfeited as per provisions of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure ....
announcements.ai_summary: On April 18, 2026, the Board of Directors of Avro India Ltd approved the allotment of 1,06,090 fully paid-up equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each to warrant holders who have paid the balance amount for their warrants. These shares were allotted at an issue price of Rs. 127.25 per share. The company had previously allotted 5,30,451 convertible warrants on a preferential basis. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 13,41,71,400 from Rs. 13,31,10,500. The remaining 4,24,361 warrants have been forfeited.

announcements.subject: James Warren Tea Ltd - 538564 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015-Disclosure By Larger Entities
announcements.detail: Announcement Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015-Disclosure by Larger Entities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: James Warren Tea Ltd has announced that it does not fall under the definition of a "Larger Entity" (LC) as of March 31, 2026, for the financial year 2025-26. This disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIRP12018/144 dated November 26, 2018, and its subsequent amendments. The company has informed BSE Limited of this status and requested that this information be recorded and disseminated to the members of the Stock Exchange.

announcements.subject: Tamil Nadu Newsprint & Papers Ltd - 531426 - Integrated Governance For The Quarter And Year Ended 31St March, 2026
announcements.detail: Integrated Governance for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tamil Nadu Newsprint & Papers Ltd has filed its Integrated Governance report for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company confirms that Annexure I (Part A) regarding the Compliance Report on Corporate Governance and Annexure I (Part B) for the Investor Grievance Redressal Report are applicable. However, the company has not acquired any shares or voting rights in unlisted companies during the quarter, making Annexure I (Part C) not applicable. Similarly, Annexure I (Part D) concerning the imposition of fines or penalties, Annexure I (Part E) for disclosure of updates to ongoing tax litigations or disputes, and Annexure I (Part F) for disclosure of loans, guarantees, comfort letters, or securities are also not applicable as there were no such instances. The company has a Regular Chairperson, who is not related to the MD or CEO.

announcements.subject: Amanta Healthcare Ltd - 544502 - Clarification On Earlier Disclosure Submitted On April 1St, 2026
announcements.detail: Clarification letter on earlier disclosure submitted on April 1st, 2026, pursuant to SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Amanta Healthcare Limited has issued a clarification regarding its earlier disclosure submitted on April 1, 2026, concerning the acquisition of shares by Promoter Shri Bhavesh Patel. The company clarified that while 28,800 equity shares were initially reported as acquired, only 13,300 shares were actually credited to the promoter's demat account on March 27, 2026. The remaining 15,500 shares purchased on March 30, 2026, were not credited due to technical reasons during the transfer process. Consequently, the promoter's shareholding before the transaction was 62,97,744 shares (16.22% of total voting capital), and after the actual credited shares, the holding is 63,11,044 shares (16.25% of total voting capital). The company has requested the exchanges to update their records with this revised information.

announcements.subject: Balkrishna Paper Mills Ltd - 539251 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: We send herewith Letter dated 18th April, 2026 regarding receipt of Return Letter dated 13th April, 2026 received from BSE & NSE, for your perusal and record.
announcements.ai_summary: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited has received return letters dated April 13, 2026, from both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited regarding the proposed Scheme of Reduction of Share Capital. This scheme is being undertaken under Section 66 read with Section 52 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The company had previously informed about the Board of Directors' approval of this scheme on December 23, 2025, subject to various statutory and regulatory approvals. The Scheme of Reduction of Share Capital remains contingent on obtaining approvals from the National Company Law Tribunal and the shareholders of the company.

announcements.subject: Transport Corporation of India Ltd - 532349 - Re- Lodgment Of Transfer Requests Of Physical Shares
announcements.detail: Re - lodgment of transfer requests of physical shares
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Transport Corporation of India Ltd has submitted a report dated April 18, 2026, from its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies Limited, regarding the re-lodgment of transfer requests for physical shares. This submission is in compliance with SEBI Circulars dated July 02, 2025, and January 30, 2026. The report covers the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026. During this period, the company received zero requests for re-lodgment of physical share transfers, processed zero requests, and approved zero requests, with zero requests being rejected. The average time taken for processing requests was not applicable (NA) as no requests were processed.

announcements.subject: Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd - 532798 - Board Meeting Outcome for Regulation 30 & 33 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Outcome Of The Board Meeting
announcements.detail:
We inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today i.e. April 18, 2026, has inter-alia approved the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

We enclose herewith the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) of the Company for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditors' Reports of the Statutory ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd held a meeting on April 18, 2026, where they approved the Audited Financial Results, both Standalone and Consolidated, for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has enclosed these results along with the Auditors' Reports. Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, the statutory auditors, have issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the financial statements. The Board meeting commenced at 12:00 Noon and concluded at 12:50 p.m. The approved financial results will be available on the company's website at https://www.nw18.com/network18/finance.

announcements.subject: Yes Bank Ltd - 532648 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting - SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting - SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Yes Bank Limited met on April 18, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter (Q4) and Year ended March 31, 2026. The Board approved these financial results, along with the specified line items under Regulation 52(4) of the Listing Regulations. The Joint Statutory Auditors have issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, meaning no statement on the impact of audit qualifications is applicable. Yes Bank confirmed that the proceeds from non-convertible debt securities were fully utilized as per the Information Memorandum and that there were no outstanding secured listed non-convertible debt securities as of March 31, 2026. The Board meeting commenced at 10:50 AM and concluded at 01:50 PM.

announcements.subject: ASI Industries Ltd - 502015 - Company Update
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), 2015
announcements.ai_summary: ASI Industries Limited has sold its entire shareholding in Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd on April 17, 2026, through open market transactions. The company sold 75,000 equity shares, which represented approximately 0.014% of the paid-up share capital of Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd. Following this sale, ASI Industries Limited's holding in Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd is now NIL. The company has stated that this divestment of investment has no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities. This update is provided under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kanoria Chemicals & Industries Ltd - 506525 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 7% Non-Convertible, Non-Cumulative, Non-Participating, Redeemable Preference Shares (NCRPS) to R. V. Investment and Dealers limited on a private placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Kanoria Chemicals & Industries Ltd, through its Board of Directors meeting held on April 18, 2026, has approved the allotment of 7% Non-Convertible, Non-Cumulative, Non-Participating, Redeemable Preference Shares (NCRPS) to R. V. Investment and Dealers Limited, a promoter group entity. A total of 4,95,000 NCRPS, each with a face value of Rs. 1,000/-, have been allotted on a private placement basis. The aggregate consideration for this issuance is Rs. 495,000,000/-. This allotment is a preferential issue and is part of the company's fund-raising activities.

announcements.subject: Balaji Telefilms Ltd - 532382 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer attached file.
announcements.ai_summary: Balaji Telefilms Ltd announced that their film "Bhooth Bangla" has achieved a remarkable box office collection of ₹21.60 crore on its opening day in India. The horror-comedy film, presented by Balaji Motion Pictures in association with Cape of Good Films, has surpassed expectations and is performing strongly. Starring Akshay Kumar, Wamiqa Gabbi, Paresh Rawal, Tabu, and Rajpal Yadav, and directed by Priyadarshan, the film is a joint production by Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, and Ektaa R Kapoor. The impressive opening day collection indicates a positive reception from audiences and suggests a strong performance in the coming days.

announcements.subject: Lupin Ltd - 500257 - U.S. FDA Has Concluded An Inspection At The Company''s  Manufacturing Facility Located In Somerset, New Jersey, U.S.A.
announcements.detail: U.S. FDA has concluded an inspection at the Company''s manufacturing facility located in Somerset, New Jersey, U.S.A.
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Ltd has informed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has concluded an inspection at its manufacturing facility located in Somerset, New Jersey, U.S.A. The inspection, which took place from April 13, 2026, to April 17, 2026, resulted in the issuance of a Form-483 with three observations. Lupin Ltd has stated its commitment to addressing these observations and will provide a response to the U.S. FDA within the stipulated timeframe. The company emphasizes its dedication to maintaining CGMP (Current Good Manufacturing Practice) standards across all its facilities. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd - 544225 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the exchange regarding a press release dated April 18, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd has issued a press release dated April 18, 2026, announcing "Ola Sona Weekend" to celebrate Akshaya Tritiya, offering benefits up to ₹50,000 across its electric vehicle portfolio. Customers have a chance to win a limited edition Ola Sona scooter with 24-karat gold plated elements. The company is extending the purchase window for its 4680 Bharat Cell powered Roadster X+ 9.1 kWh on April 18th and 19th, 2026, from 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM. The Ola Sona Weekend includes a starting price of ₹49,999 for the Gen 3 S1 X (2kWh) and Roadster X (2.5 kWh), discounts of up to ₹40,000, credit card EMI offers worth ₹10,000 from various banks, and an 8-year extended warranty across all products.

announcements.subject: Hardwyn India Ltd - 541276 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosures Requirement) Regulations, 2015. ('Listing Regulations') We hereby inform you that the company has received purchase order from the following projects as we mentioned in attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Hardwyn India Ltd has announced the receipt of multiple purchase orders for its ISI-Certified floor springs from various prestigious projects. These include orders for CM House in Chhattisgarh (New Raipur) for 600 Floor Springs, Baba Raghav Das Medical College in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, for 240 Floor Springs, UP Medical College in Gajipur, Uttar Pradesh, for 310 Floor Springs, UP Medical College in Sidharth Nagar, Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, for 460 Floor Springs, UP Medical College in Pilibhit, Near Lakhimpur, Uttar Pradesh, for 180 Floor Springs, and Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University (CSJMU) in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, for 255 Floor Springs. The company's floor springs are designed for reliable glass door control and are manufactured to meet safety standards and durability requirements for commercial and high-traffic applications.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Incident At Process Plant Of Khetri Copper Complex (A Unit Of Hindustan Copper Ltd) At District Jhunjhunu, Rajasthan
announcements.detail: This is to report an incident at Process Plant of Khetri Copper Complex (a unit of Hindustan Copper Ltd) at District Jhunjhunu, Rajasthan on 17.04.2026 in which one contractual employee engaged by a civil contractor met with fatality.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Ltd has reported an unfortunate incident at the Process Plant of its Khetri Copper Complex in District Jhunjhunu, Rajasthan, on April 17, 2026. A contractual employee engaged by a civil contractor met with a fatality during the incident. The company has expressed its deep sorrow over the event. Importantly, the incident did not cause any disruption to the ongoing operations of the plant. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Interarch Building Solutions Ltd - 544232 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI(LODR) Regulations,2015 regarding receipt of an order
announcements.ai_summary: Interarch Building Solutions Ltd has secured a new domestic order for the Design, Engineering, Manufacturing, Supply & erection of a Pre-Engineered Steel Building System. The customer's name is being withheld due to commercial confidentiality. The order has an approximate completion period of 8 months from the date of award. This new order represents a significant addition to the company's order book and is expected to be executed within the specified timeframe. The company will be responsible for the complete design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, and erection of the steel building system.

announcements.subject: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd - 508869 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: As per annexure enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has received an order dated April 15, 2026, from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Division Bench - II, Chennai, regarding a proposed composite scheme of arrangement. This scheme involves Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited, Apollo Healthco Limited (Transferor Company 1), Keimed Private Limited (Transferor Company 2), and Apollo Healthtech Limited (Resultant Company). The order directs the convening of meetings of secured creditors, unsecured creditors, and equity shareholders of the involved companies, as applicable. The company received a copy of the order on April 17, 2026, which was uploaded on the Tribunal's website on the same day. A certified true copy of the order is awaited and will be filed upon receipt. The scheme remains subject to the approval of shareholders and creditors.

announcements.subject: Orient Green Power Company Ltd - 533263 - Intimation Regarding Contract With M/S. Pioneer Wincon Energy Systems Pvt Limited (Pioneer) For Supply Of 2 Numbers Of P57-750 KW Wind Turbine Generator (WTG) Aggregating To 1.5 MW As Required Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Clarion Wind Farm Private Limited contract with Pioneer Wincon Energy Systems Pvt Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Clarion Wind Farm Private Limited, a material stepdown subsidiary of Orient Green Power Company Ltd, has entered into a contract with M/s. Pioneer Wincon Energy Systems Pvt Limited for the supply of 2 numbers of P57-750 KW Wind Turbine Generators (WTGs), aggregating to 1.5 MW. This contract is for re-powering an existing wind farm at Devarkulam site in Tamil Nadu. The consideration for this contract is Rs. 8.61 Crores, inclusive of GST. The WTGs and components are to be supplied within 10 weeks from the execution of the contract, which took place on April 17, 2026. This announcement is made as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Tega Industries Ltd - 543413 - Announcement Pursuant To Reg. 30 Of The SEBI LODR Regulation - Incorporation Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation with respect to incorporation of wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Tega Industries Limited has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary in India named "Tega Solutions Limited" (TSL). The Certificate of Incorporation was received from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs on April 17, 2026. TSL has an Authorised Share Capital of Rs. 100,00,00,000/- and a Paid-up Share Capital of Rs. 99,00,00,000/-. The object of incorporation is to carry on the business of providing management consultancy services and manufacturing grinding media for the mining industry and related products. TSL is a related party to Tega Industries Limited and its other subsidiaries, and the incorporation is part of the company's strategic objectives, as previously disclosed on November 29, 2025.

announcements.subject: NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Declaration Of COD Of Capacity Of 87.50 MW Solar Out Of The Total Installed Capacity Of 150 MW Solar Project Located In Rajasthan, By A Group Company Of NGEL.
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NTPC Ltd has announced that its subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), has declared the Commercial Operation Date (COD) for a capacity of 87.50 MW of solar power. This capacity is part of a larger 150 MW solar project located in Rajasthan, undertaken by a group company of NGEL. The COD is effective from April 19, 2026. Following this declaration, the total installed capacity of the NTPC group has reached 89,615 MW, with a commercial capacity of 88,535 MW. This update was disclosed on April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd - 500104 - HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) Project
announcements.detail: HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) Project
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) has received approval from the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas on April 17, 2026, for a revision in the project cost of the HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) Project. The project cost has been revised from Rs. 43,129 Crore to Rs. 79,459 Crore. HPCL's equity investment will remain Rs. 19,600 Crore to maintain its 74% equity stake in the project. HRRL is a greenfield integrated refinery cum petrochemical complex with a high Nelson Complexity Index of 17 and petrochemical intensity of 26%. The project is in an advanced stage of commissioning, with trial runs of the CDU and other units currently in progress.

announcements.subject: Rathi Steel & Power Ltd-$ - 504903 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release- Grant of GreenPro Ecolable Certification by CII for TMT Rebars manufactured by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rathi Steel and Power Limited (RSPL) has been awarded the prestigious GreenPro ecolabel certification by the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) for its Rathi Powertech brand of TMT rebars, manufactured at its Ghaziabad Unit. This certification, effective April 17, 2026, specifically covers the Fe 550 Grade of TMT Rebars and signifies RSPL's commitment to sustainable manufacturing and environmental stewardship. The GreenPro certification provides essential credits for green building certifications like LEED or IGBC, ensures a toxic-free environment for end-users, and guarantees high-quality, durable steel for structural designers, streamlining due diligence and accelerating construction. This achievement aligns RSPL with global sustainability standards and the industry's shift towards "Green Steel" and reduced carbon footprints.

announcements.subject: AXIS Bank Ltd - 532215 - General Updates
announcements.detail: General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Axis Bank Ltd has received speaking orders from the Employees Provident Fund Organization (EPFO) levying damages and interest for delays in remittance of provident fund and allied dues. The damages amount to Rs. 91,50,641 and the interest amounts to Rs. 47,34,743. These levies are under Section 7Q (interest) and Section 14B (damages) of the Employees Provident Fund Act & Miscellaneous Provisions Act 1952, for the period from April 1, 2022, to June 13, 2024. The bank has reviewed the matter and submitted the requisite information. Axis Bank Ltd anticipates no significant impact on its financial, operational, or other business activities as a result of these orders. The orders were dated March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd - 500040 - Reply To The Clarification Sought With Reference To The Media Report Appearing On Https://Economictimes.Indiatimes.Com Dated April 16, 2026
announcements.detail: Reply to the clarification sought with reference to the media report appearing on https://economictimes.indiatimes.com dated 16th April, 2026 which is an old news of which disclosures had been already submitted to stock exchanges.
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited (formerly Century Textiles and Industries Limited) is responding to a clarification sought by BSE and NSE regarding a media report published on https://economictimes.indiatimes.com dated April 16, 2026. The company states that the report, titled "Birla Estates enters JV with M S Ramaiah Realty, targets Rs 3000 cr revenue," is an old news item that was previously disclosed in March 2022. A disclosure regarding this press release was submitted to the stock exchanges on March 25, 2022. Additionally, the company submitted an intimation on April 14, 2026, regarding a press release titled "Birla Estates records robust bookings of Rs.650 crores at Birla Trimaya phase 4 in Bengaluru" as a continuous disclosure.

announcements.subject: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd - 532702 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Receipt of final order today from Hon''ble Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi sanctioning the Composite Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd has received the Final Order from the Hon'ble Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA), New Delhi, sanctioning the Composite Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves Gujarat State Petroleum Corporation Limited, Gujarat State Petronet Limited, and GSPC Energy Limited as Transferor Companies, Gujarat Gas Limited as the Transferee/Demerged Company, and GSPL Transmission Limited as the Resulting Company. The scheme is being implemented under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. A copy of the MCA's Order has been uploaded on the company's website, www.gspcgroup.com.

announcements.subject: Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd - 514402 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For Audited Financial Results Of The Company For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Audited Financial Results (Standalone & Consolidated) of the Company for the quarter and Financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd met on April 17, 2026, and approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a 35% increase in revenue for the March 2026 quarter compared to the December 2025 quarter. The statutory auditors, M/s. K. M. Garg & Co., have issued an unmodified opinion on these financial results. A declaration from the Director Finance & Chief Financial Officer regarding the unmodified opinion is also enclosed. The results will be published in newspapers and uploaded on the company's website, www.ehrlindia.in, and the BSE website. The Board meeting commenced at 03:10 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 05:55 p.m. (IST).

announcements.company: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust)
announcements.subject: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust) - 544462 - Reg 21: Disclosure of valuation report received by the manager
announcements.detail: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second Scheme Of The Property Share Investment Trust) has informed the Exchange regarding Annual Full Valuation report for assets for FY ended 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: PropShare Titania SM REIT has submitted its Detailed Valuation Report for the year ended March 31, 2026, as required by Regulation 26ZJ of the SEBI (Real Estate Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The valuation report, prepared by KZEN VALTECH PRIVATE LIMITED, covers leasable space in 6 floors of G Corp Tech Park in Thane, Maharashtra. The report details the proportionate undivided share, right, title, and interest of approximately 1,03,900 square feet or 9,652.64 square meters, along with 370 exclusive car parking spaces and rights to use common services and utilities. This valuation is a step in the REIT's fund-raising activities.

announcements.subject: Niyogin Fintech Ltd - 538772 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Niyogin Fintech Limited (NFL) announced that its Board, in a meeting held on April 17, 2026, approved the dilution or reduction of the company's shareholding (on a percentage basis without reducing the number of shares held) in its material subsidiary, Iserveu Technology Private Limited. This approval is in anticipation of a proposed fund-raise by Iserveu, which could involve up to a 10% dilution or a change in control of Iserveu. The Board also approved a draft Postal Ballot Notice to seek shareholder consent via a Special Resolution under Section 110 of the Companies Act, 2013, for this dilution or change in control. The purpose is to induct potential investors into Iserveu.

announcements.subject: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd - 532540 - Statement By Chief Executive Officer And Managing Director
announcements.detail: Statement by Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has provided an update regarding a recent matter in Nashik. The company has engaged expert teams from Deloitte and the law firm Trilegal to conduct an internal investigation led by Ms. Aarthi Subramanian, President and COO. An Oversight Committee, chaired by Independent Director Mr. Keki Mistry, has been constituted to review the investigation findings. TCS clarified that Ms. Nida Khan, mentioned in the press, is not an HR manager or responsible for recruitment, having served as a process associate. The company also stated that its Nashik unit remains operational and reports of its shutdown are untrue. Preliminary reviews indicate no complaints were received through ethics or POSH channels, and TCS reiterated its zero-tolerance policy for misconduct, emphasizing its commitment to employee safety and a respectful workplace. TCS is cooperating with law enforcement agencies for a thorough investigation.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd - 533229 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of Listing Regulations - Audio Recording Of Earnings Conference Call

The company also stated that the transcript of the conference call will be submitted to the stock exchanges and published on its website in due course. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd - 544283 - Receipt Of Certificate Of Commissioning Of 16 MW Capacity Of Wind Power Project In Gujarat.
announcements.detail: Receipt of Certificate of Commissioning of 16 MW Capacity of Wind Power Project in Gujarat.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, has received a Certificate of Commissioning dated April 16, 2026, from the Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA). This certificate pertains to the commissioning of a 16 MW wind power project located in Gujarat, specifically at Village: Nana Morsal, Mota Kandhasan, Dhinkvali and Dhakaniya, Taluka: Chotila, Sayla, Dist: Surendranagar. This update follows previous intimations made on March 17, March 19, and March 26, 2026, and is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd - 533162 - Audited Financial Results (Consolidated And Standalone) For The Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hathway Cable & Datacom Limited has announced its Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors at a meeting held on April 17, 2026, which commenced at 3:00 p.m. and concluded at 5:00 p.m. The company has submitted these results, along with Auditors’ Reports which contain unmodified opinions, to the stock exchanges. announcements.subject: Subam Papers Ltd - 544267 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulation-2015 Commencement Of Commercial Production
announcements.detail: Commencement of Commercial Production at New Manufacturing Facility
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Subam Papers Ltd has announced the commencement of commercial production of Kraft paper at its new manufacturing facility. This facility is operated by its wholly-owned subsidiary, M/s. Subam Paper and Boards Private Limited, and is located at S.FNO.: 126,128,129,140,141,142 Vaduganpati Village, IC Pettai, Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu. The company's management views this expansion as a significant step in its strategic growth journey, aiming to leverage favorable trends in the Indian paper packaging sector. The new plant features automated Kraft manufacturing technology designed for higher efficiency, product consistency, and operational flexibility, enabling the company to serve large-volume and quality-sensitive customers. This intimation is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: eMudhra Ltd - 543533 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release (Revised)
announcements.detail: "eMudhra launches emSigner for SMEs to accelerate digital workflows across India".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: eMudhra Limited has announced the launch of "emSigner for SMEs," a new offering designed to accelerate digital workflows for small and medium enterprises across India. This solution, priced affordably starting from INR 1000, aims to digitize document workflows in HR, Legal, Finance, and other functions, addressing operational inefficiencies and compliance risks associated with manual processes. emSigner for SMEs enables legally compliant digital signatures under the Indian IT Act, offering rapid deployment, intuitive usage, and cost-effectiveness. The platform combines enterprise-grade reliability and security with the simplicity required for SME adoption, supporting eMudhra's "SME Digitalization for India" initiative. The company has also submitted a revised press release to the stock exchanges due to inadvertent errors in the initial submission.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Industries Ltd - 500243 - Update Of Material Subsidiary
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir / Madam,

Please find enclosed the update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company.

You are requested to take the same on your record.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has provided an update regarding its listed material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL has informed the stock exchanges about the progress of its Scheme of Arrangement and Merger by Absorption of Oliver Engineering Private Limited and Adicca Energy Solutions Private Limited. The Company Petition [No. C.P.(CAA)/46(MB)2026] was filed with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai. Following a hearing on April 9, 2026, the NCLT passed an order on April 16, 2026, directing the issuance of notices to statutory and regulatory authorities and admitting the petition for hearing and final disposal on May 15, 2026. A notice of the hearing will also be published in newspapers.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Money Ltd-$ - 532974 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation,2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Aditya Birla Money Ltd met on April 17, 2026, and approved the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting commenced at 4:50 PM and concluded at 6:45 PM. The approved results, along with the Auditors’ Report and a declaration of unmodified opinion, have been submitted to the stock exchanges. The financial results indicate Total Revenue from Operations of INR 12,979.6 Lakhs for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and INR 46,850.10 Lakhs for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Profit after tax for the quarter was INR 1,822.48 Lakhs, and for the financial year, it was INR 7,419.08 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: 3i Infotech Ltd - 532628 - 3I Infotech Joins SAP Partner Ecosystem To Strengthen Enterprise Transformation Capabilities
announcements.detail: Please find attached press release issue by the Company titled 3i Infotech Joins SAP Partner Ecosystem to Strengthen Enterprises Transformation Capabilities.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: 3i Infotech Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary 3i Infotech Inc., USA, has joined the SAP Partner Ecosystem under the PE Service Partnership model. This partnership focuses on SAP Cloud ERP and enterprise transformation services, aligning with 3i Infotech's cloud-led SAP strategy. The company will now support enterprises with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, RISE with SAP, and SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Through this engagement, 3i Infotech will offer implementation, application management services (AMS), managed services, and industry-led solutions. The partnership aims to leverage SAP's technology framework to enhance service delivery and accelerate outcomes in enterprise resource planning, data-driven decision-making, and business process transformation. This move is expected to drive faster deployments and measurable business impact for clients, particularly in North America.

announcements.subject: Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd - 544292 - Intimation Of "Renewal Of EU -GMP Certification For Onesource : Flagship Unit II Facility
announcements.detail: Intimation of the renewal of EU -GMP Certification for OneSource: Flagship Unit II Facility located in Bengaluru.
announcements.ai_summary: Onesource Specialty Pharma Limited has announced the renewal of its European Union Good Manufacturing Practices (EU-GMP) certification for its flagship Unit II manufacturing facility located in Bengaluru. This renewal follows an inspection by a European regulatory authority. Unit II is an integrated biologics drug-substance and drug-product manufacturing site with capabilities in drug-device combinations and sterile injectable products. This certification is crucial for the company's operations and compliance with international pharmaceutical standards.

announcements.subject: Mindspace Business Parks REIT - 543217 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Mindspace Business Parks REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Mindspace Business Parks REIT has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS-PoD -2/P/CIR/2025/99 dated July 11, 2025. The report details the unit holdings across various categories. Notably, under the Sponsor(s)/Manager and their associate/related parties, Indian entities hold 43,17,73,357 units, representing 66.60% of the total outstanding units. Within this category, Bodies Corporates hold 31,80,38,568 units (49.05% of total outstanding units), with 13,63,94,182 units (42.89% of their holding) being pledged or otherwise encumbered. There are no foreign unit holders reported for this quarter.

announcements.subject: Bharat Forge Ltd - 500493 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding acquisition by wholly-owned subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: On April 17, 2026, Bharat Forge Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, BF Industrial Solutions Limited (BFISL), entered into definitive transaction agreements with RS Aerostructures Limited (RS). Under these agreements, BFISL will acquire a 90% stake in RS on a fully diluted basis. RS Aerostructures Limited, incorporated on January 14, 2026, is engaged in the aerospace structural assembly business and had no revenue for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Its net worth was ₹7,000. RS is not a related party to Bharat Forge Limited, and the acquisition is being conducted at arm's length.

announcements.subject: Nandan Denim Ltd - 532641 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015. - Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: On April 17, 2026, Nandan Denim Limited's Board of Directors approved entering into a Share Transfer cum Shareholders’ Agreement. This agreement is with M/s. Opera Vayu (Narmada) Private Limited (SPV) and Shivman Wind Energy Private Limited. The company will acquire a 6.1% equity shareholding in the SPV. This acquisition is for the purchase of wind and solar power under the applicable captive power route. The SPV was incorporated on August 1, 2022, and for the financial year ended March 31, 2025, it had a turnover of Nil, an authorized capital of ₹25.00 Crores, and a paid-up capital of ₹20.17 Crores. Currently, the authorized capital is ₹66.00 Crores and paid-up capital is ₹65.93 Crores.

announcements.company: Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Ltd
announcements.subject: Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Ltd - 544355 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: The Company has received today on April 17, 2026 "No objection - Observation Letter" from NSE and BSE pursuant to Scheme of Arrangement for Demerger under Regulation 37. Please refer attachment for complete details.
announcements.ai_summary: Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Ltd has received "No objection - Observation Letters" from both NSE and BSE on April 17, 2026, concerning the Scheme of Arrangement for Demerger. This follows the company's earlier intimation on November 04, 2025, regarding the approval of the Scheme. The Scheme involves the demerger between Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Limited (Demerged Company) and Jubilant Agri Solutions Limited (Resulting Company). The Observation Letters from NSE (Ref: NSE/LIST/52055) and BSE (Ref: DCS/AMAL/RD/R37/024/2026-27) are available on the respective stock exchange websites and the company's website, https://www.jacpl.co.in/. The Scheme is still subject to further approvals, including those from shareholders, creditors, the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), and other regulatory bodies.

announcements.subject: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd - 543334 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Kindly refer the attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd has announced the availability of the transcript for the Investor and Analyst Conference Call held on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. This call discussed the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The transcript is enclosed with this announcement and is also accessible on the company's website, www.nuvoco.com. During the call, the company highlighted that it ended fiscal year 2026 with its strongest annual performance, achieving a record volume of 20.4 million tons and an EBITDA of INR 1,881 crores. announcements.subject: UltraTech Cement Ltd - 532538 - Company Update: Commissioning Of Cement Capacity
announcements.detail: Commissioning of cement capacity
announcements.ai_summary: UltraTech Cement Limited has announced the commissioning of an additional 8.7 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) of cement capacity. This expansion includes a 2.7 mtpa cement grinding unit in Shahjahanpur, Uttar Pradesh, a 3.0 mtpa cement grinding unit in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, and a 3.0 mtpa cement grinding unit in Patratu, Jharkhand. Following this commissioning on April 17, 2026, the company's total domestic grey cement manufacturing capacity has increased to 200.1 mtpa. Including its overseas capacity of 5.4 mtpa, UltraTech Cement's global capacity now stands at 205.5 mtpa. This makes the company the world's largest cement company by sales volume and the largest single-country cement manufacturer globally (excluding China).

announcements.subject: Jagran Prakashan Ltd - 532705 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Jagran Prakashan Limited has informed the stock exchange regarding disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Jagran Prakashan Limited (JPL) has provided an update on two company petitions, "Mahendra Mohan Gupta and Ors. v. Devendra Mohan Gupta and Ors., C.P. No. 64 of 2023" and "Shailendra Mohan Gupta and Ors. v. Jagran Media Network Investment Private Limited, C.P. No. 57 of 2025." These matters were listed before the National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench, on April 16, 2026. The Tribunal did not hear the captioned matters and has re-notified them for further hearing on May 4, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. JPL will provide further disclosures upon any material developments in these proceedings. The information will be uploaded on the company's corporate website (www.jplcorp.in) and the websites of the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited.

announcements.detail: BSE Intimation regarding the CFO Certification for the half year and year ended as on 31st March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: JD Cables Ltd has submitted a CEO/CFO Certificate on April 1, 2026, as per Regulation 33(2)(a) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Chief Financial Officer, Hemant Kumar Choradia, certifies that the Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026, do not contain any false or misleading statements or figures, nor do they omit any material facts that could render them misleading. This certification is provided to the Board of Directors of JD Cables Limited.

announcements.subject: Petronet LNG Ltd - 532522 - Incorporation Of A Section 8, Limited By Guarantee, A Wholly-Owned Subsidiary Company Of Petronet LNG Limited
announcements.detail: Disclosure regarding incorporation of MC2 Foundation, a wholly-owned subsidiary of PLL is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Petronet LNG Limited (PLL) has incorporated a new wholly-owned subsidiary named 'MC2 Foundation' on April 3, 2026, with the Certificate of Incorporation received on April 17, 2026. This Section 8, limited by guarantee company, is established to foster innovation and sustainable entrepreneurship within the energy sector. MC2 Foundation aims to support startups through incubation, mentorship, acceleration, and promotion, aligning with India's national development and energy transition goals. It will focus on innovation infrastructure, industry-led mentorship, research translation, capital mobilization, and ecosystem integration. The first directors of MC2 Foundation include Dr. Neeraj Mittal (Chairman, PLL), Shri Akshay Kumar Singh (MD & CEO, PLL), Shri Sanjay Khanna (CMD, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited), and Shri Vikas Kaushal (CMD, Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited).

announcements.subject: Archidply Industries Ltd - 532994 - Intimation Of Approval Of Scheme Of Amalgamation Of Promoter Group Entities
announcements.detail: The approval of scheme of Amalgamation of promoter group entities by the Hon''ble NCLT, Guwahati has been received.
announcements.ai_summary: Archidply Industries Limited has received approval from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Guwahati Bench, for the Schemes of Amalgamation of promoter group entities. The approved schemes involve the amalgamation of Ravi Marketing and Services Private Limited with Assam Timber Products Private Limited, and Vanraj Suppliers Private Limited with Shree Shyam Tea Private Limited. Following these amalgamations, the shareholding of Ravi Marketing and Services Private Limited will vest in Assam Timber Products Private Limited, and the shareholding of Vanraj Suppliers Private Limited will vest in Sri Shyam Tea Private Limited, consolidating shareholding within the promoter group. Importantly, there will be no change in the overall promoter group shareholding, control, or management of Archidply Industries Limited, as this restructuring is internal to the promoter group. The Schemes will become effective upon the filing of the certified copy of the NCLT order with the Registrar of Companies.

announcements.subject: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd - 500103 - Withdrawal Of BHEL''s  Acceptance To Letter Of Intent From MB Power (Madhya Pradesh) Limited
announcements.detail: Withdrawal of BHEL''s acceptance of Letter of Intent from MB Power (Madhya Pradesh) Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has withdrawn its acceptance of a Letter of Intent (LOI) from MB Power (Madhya Pradesh) Limited. The LOI was for the supply of equipment, specifically Boiler, Turbine, and Generator, for the 1x800 MW Anuppur Thermal Power Project. BHEL had initially accepted this LOI on September 3, 2025. However, the LOI was contingent on the execution of a formal contract within an agreed timeline. Despite multiple discussions and extensions, the contract could not be finalized as per the terms of the LOI. Consequently, BHEL formally informed the customer of the withdrawal of its acceptance to the LOI on April 17, 2026, at 1636 hrs.

announcements.subject:
Standard Capital Markets Ltd - 511700 - Corrigendum To Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing
Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Redemption Of Non-Convertible Debentures (Ncds)
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that certain inadvertent errors were noted in the aforesaid disclosure. Accordingly the Revised  details are to be filled
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Standard Capital Markets Ltd, has issued a corrigendum to its earlier intimation regarding the redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). The original disclosure on March 30, 2026, stated the redemption of 123 NCDs with a face value of ₹10,00,000 each, totaling ₹12,30,00,000. However, it is now clarified that this figure inadvertently included 98 NCDs that were already redeemed on February 23, 2026, amounting to ₹9,80,00,000. Therefore, the actual redemption on March 30, 2026, was for 25 NCDs, each with a face value of ₹10,00,000, aggregating to ₹2,50,00,000. Following this correction, the reported balance of NCDs post-redemption has been revised from 881 to 979. All other details from the previous intimation remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Update On Debt Reduction
announcements.detail: Update on debt reduction
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PC Jeweller Limited has provided an update on its debt reduction efforts, reporting a further approximately 10% reduction in its outstanding bank debt as per the Joint Settlement Agreement with its Consortium Lenders. With this latest reduction, the company has now repaid over 90% of its outstanding bank debt since the agreement was executed. This progress reaffirms the company's commitment to achieving a debt-free status in the near future. The company has informed the stock exchanges of this development for their records.

announcements.subject: Jash Engineering Ltd - 544402 - TV Interview
announcements.detail: TV Interview
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jash Engineering Ltd has announced that Mr. Pratik Patel, Chairman & Managing Director, will be participating in a TV interview on NDTV - Profit. The interview, titled "Know your Company (KYC)," is scheduled for Monday, April 20, 2026, at approximately 11:40 AM. The company has explicitly stated that no unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) will be discussed during this interview. The schedule is subject to change due to unforeseen circumstances. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015.

announcements.subject: Mirc Electronics Ltd - 500279 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Friday, April 17, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith Outcome of the Board Meeting held on Friday, April 17, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mirc Electronics Limited held a Board Meeting on April 17, 2026, where two significant property-related decisions were approved. The Board discussed and approved the redevelopment and/or sale or transfer of the company's property, "Onida House," in Mumbai, which measures approximately 2,143 square meters. Additionally, the Board discussed and approved a proposal for the monetization of the company's property located in Lote, District Ratnagiri, measuring approximately 20,004 square meters. In both instances, Mr. Kaval Mirchandani, the Managing Director, has been authorized to take appropriate actions, subject to obtaining necessary regulatory approvals. The company has assured that these actions will not involve any manpower cuts, and all permanent employees will be relocated if required during redevelopment. Further disclosures will be made at appropriate times as per SEBI Master Circular dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: TTK Prestige Ltd - 517506 - Award Of CII Greenco Certification
announcements.detail: Award of GreenCo Certification
announcements.ai_summary: TTK Prestige Limited has been awarded the CII GreenCo Certification for all its manufacturing plants, recognizing its commitment to environmental stewardship and sustainable operations. The certification, awarded by the CII–Sohrabji Godrej Green Business Centre, is valid for three years for each plant. The Karjan plant in Gujarat received a SILVER rating (Feb 2024-Feb 2027), Hosur in Tamil Nadu also received SILVER (Jan 2025-Jan 2028), Coimbatore in Tamil Nadu achieved PLATINUM (Nov 2025-Nov 2028), Roorkee in Uttarakhand received GOLD (Feb 2026-Feb 2029), and Khardi in Maharashtra was awarded GOLD (Apr 2026-Apr 2029). The certification follows a comprehensive assessment of parameters like energy efficiency, water conservation, renewable energy usage, and waste management, reinforcing the company's ESG objectives and stakeholder confidence. This disclosure was made voluntarily under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Cipla Ltd - 500087 - USFDA Inspection At Company'S Manufacturing Facility In Goa, India
announcements.detail: USFDA inspection at Company''s manufacturing facility in Goa, India
announcements.ai_summary: Cipla Ltd has informed that the US Food and Drug Administration (USFDA) conducted a routine current Good Manufacturing Practices (cGMP) and Pre-Approval Inspection (PAI) at its manufacturing facility in Verna, Goa, India, from April 6 to April 17, 2026. Upon conclusion of the inspection, the company received two observations in Form 483. Cipla has stated its commitment to working closely with the USFDA and addressing these observations comprehensively within the stipulated time.

announcements.subject: Premier Explosives Ltd - 526247 - Submission Of The Disclosure Received From AKS Family Trust As Per The SEBI Exemption Order Dated January 08, 2026.
announcements.detail: Submission of the disclosure received from AKS Family Trust as per the SEBI Exemption Order dated January 08, 2026.
