The company is submitting this information for the records of the stock exchanges and SEBI.

announcements.subject: Amrutanjan Health Care Ltd-$ - 590006 - Product Launch
announcements.detail: Product Launch
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Amrutanjan Health Care Limited announced on April 17, 2026, its strategic entry into the razors category with the launch of new brands: Comfy Close & Clean Women’s Razor, Comfy Silky Smooth Women’s Razor, and Smoothe’ Xpress Men’s Razor. These products are developed using advanced Korean technology. The company is also launching Amrutanjan Plastry, a range of medicated antiseptic plasters, including Regular and Wash proof variants. These plasters are designed for ease of use and storage, made with breathable fabric, strong adhesion, and offer protection against bacteria and water. This expansion aims to strengthen the company's personal care portfolio and enter the male grooming segment.

announcements.subject: Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd - 540956 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation Of Loan Agreement - Disclosure Under The Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 regarding intimation of loan agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhatia Communications & Retail (India) Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 17, 2026, approved entering into a loan agreement with M/s Skytower Enterprises LLP. The agreement is for an Inter Corporate Loan amounting to Rs. 6 Crores. The significant terms of this agreement include an interest rate of 9.00% per annum and a tenure of 4 years from the first disbursement, or earlier upon demand by the lender. The company has no shareholding in M/s Skytower Enterprises LLP, and there is no stated relationship with promoters or group companies. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Comfort Fincap Ltd - 535267 - Outcome Of Circular Resolution Passed By Board Of Directors As On April 17, 2026.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, enclosed herewith Outcome of Circular Resolution passed by the Board of Directors as on April 17, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Comfort Fincap Ltd's Board of Directors, through a circular resolution passed on April 17, 2026, approved the conversion of 80,50,000 share warrants into 80,50,000 equity shares. These shares, with a face value of Rs. 02/- each, were allotted on a preferential basis to specific persons/entities upon their exercise of conversion rights. The company received an aggregate amount of Rs. 5,43,37,500/- at a price of Rs. 6.75/- per warrant, representing the remaining 75% of the issue price. Consequently, the company's paid-up equity capital has increased from Rs. 18,00,13,000 (9,00,06,500 equity shares) to Rs. 19,61,13,000 (9,80,56,500 equity shares). The newly allotted equity shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: ZEN Technologies Ltd - 533339 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Zen Technologies Ltd has received a significant arms manufacturing licence from the Government of India under the Arms Act, 1959. This licence authorizes the company to manufacture 12.7mm, 23mm, 30mm, and 40mm cannons, which are critical weapon systems for Air Defence, naval operations, and Counter-Unmanned Aircraft System (C-UAS) roles. These cannons are effective last-layer defence solutions against drones and other low-flying aerial threats. The company highlights that these systems, when integrated with advanced fire-control systems and sensors, provide responsive and cost-effective protection for strategic assets and infrastructure. This development is a key step in advancing India's indigenous defence manufacturing capabilities, particularly relevant given the increasing prevalence of drone warfare.

announcements.company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust
announcements.subject: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust - 543655 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust, acting through its Investment Manager EAAA Real Assets Managers Limited, has submitted disclosure pursuant to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated April 13, 2022, for the Centralized Database for corporate bonds/debentures. The disclosure includes details of listing for three ISINs: INE0MIZ07020, INE0MIZ07038, and INE0MIZ07046. For INE0MIZ07020, 3000 units were listed on December 2, 2022, as a first issue. For INE0MIZ07038, 70000 units were listed on March 6, 2025, as a further issue. For INE0MIZ07046, 77500 units were listed on November 27, 2025, as a further issue. The trust has also provided hyperlinks to the listing notifications from BSE Limited for these ISINs.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd - 500245 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Update in respect of the Scheme of Arrangement and Merger by Absorption of Oliver Engineering Private Limited and Adicca Energy Solutions Private Limited with Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL) has provided an update on the Scheme of Arrangement and Merger by Absorption of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Oliver Engineering Private Limited (OEPL) and Adicca Energy Solutions Private Limited (AESPL), with KFIL. The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, has passed an order on April 9, 2026, directing the issuance of notices to statutory and regulatory authorities. The Company Petition concerning the Scheme has been admitted for hearing and final disposal on May 15, 2026. The NCLT has also ordered the publication of the hearing notice in newspapers and issuance of notices to authorities as per the Companies (Compromises, Arrangements and Amalgamations) Rules, 2016. This follows the filing of the Company Petition on March 18, 2026.

announcements.subject: Hyundai Motor India Ltd - 544274 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Approval For Re-Classification Of Hyundai Motor Investment, INC From 'Promoter & Promoter Group' To 'Public' Category Of Hyundai Motor India Limited ('The Company')
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of approval for reclassification of Hyundai Motor Investment, INC from " Promoter & Promoter Group" to "Public" Category of Hyundai Motor India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has received approval from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for the re-classification of Hyundai Motor Investment, INC. This re-classification moves Hyundai Motor Investment, INC from the "Promoter & Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category of Hyundai Motor India Limited. The approval was granted by NSE on April 16, 2026, and by BSE on April 16, 2026, following applications made on February 02, 2026, and February 06, 2026. This change is in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has enclosed the approval letters from both exchanges for record.

announcements.subject: Bigbloc Construction Ltd - 540061 - Subsidiary Updates - Announcement For Commencement Of Trail Production At Umargaon Facility
announcements.detail: Intimation Attached
announcements.ai_summary: Bigbloc Construction Limited has announced an update regarding its wholly owned subsidiary, Bigbloc Building Elements Private Limited. The subsidiary has commenced trial production at its new construction chemicals plant located at the Umargaon facility. This development signifies the Group's commitment to innovation and expansion within the construction materials sector. The commencement of trial production is a step towards full-scale operations at this new facility. Investors should consider this as a positive step towards the growth and diversification of the company's product offerings and manufacturing capabilities.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Interise Trust has provided its Unit Holding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report details the distribution of units across various categories of holders. Notably, "Foreign Body" holds 63,41,46,428 units, representing 60.83% of the total units, and 32,44,00,000 units, representing 31.12% of the total units. Public Holding includes Institutions, with Provident/Pension Funds holding 3,35,06,195 units (3.21%) and Foreign Portfolio Investors holding 36,24,52,413 units (34.77%). Non-Institutions include Body Corporates holding 1,06,95,416 units (1.03%). The company is managed by Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, with IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited and Axis Trustee Services Limited acting as Trustees. The announcement is for record purposes and no further action is immediately required from investors.

announcements.subject: Windlas Biotech Ltd - 543329 - Board Meeting Outcome for Regulation 30 And Regulation 42 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulation') As Amended
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 and Regulation 42 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulation') as amended for Buyback of shares of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Windlas Biotech Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 17, 2026, approved a proposal for the buyback of up to 4,70,000 fully paid-up equity shares. These shares represent 2.23% of the company's total equity shares. The buyback will be conducted for an amount not exceeding Rs. 47,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees Forty Seven Crore Only), which constitutes 9.80% of the company's paid-up equity share capital and free reserves as of March 31, 2025. The buyback price has been set at INR 1,000 per equity share, with a face value of INR 5.00 per share. The buyback will exclude promoters and members of the promoter group and will be carried out through the "Tender Offer" route. Transaction costs such as brokerage, taxes, and fees are not included in the stated buyback size.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Finance Ltd - 500034 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Allotment of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finance Ltd has successfully allotted 2,00,400 Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The Debenture Allotment Committee of the company approved this allotment on April 17, 2026. Each NCD has a face value of Rs. 1 Lakh, aggregating to a total issue size of Rs. 2004.31 crore. These debentures have a tenure of 1096 days, maturing on April 17, 2029, and carry a coupon rate of 7.77% per annum. The repayment of these debentures, along with interest, will be secured by a first pari-passu charge on book debts/loan receivables, ensuring a security cover of not less than 1.00 time the aggregate outstanding value. The debentures are proposed to be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market Segment of BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Housing Finance Ltd - 544252 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Allotment of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Housing Finance Ltd has announced the allotment of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The Debenture Allotment Committee, in its meeting held on April 17, 2026, allotted 1,00,000 NCDs with a face value of Rs. 1,00,000 each. The total issue size aggregates to Rs. 1008.3292 crore, which includes discount and accrued interest. These debentures are proposed to be listed on the Wholesale Debt Market Segment of BSE Limited. The NCDs have a tenure of 1011 days (residual) with a maturity date of January 22, 2029, and carry an interest rate of 7.25% per annum, with the first interest payment on January 22, 2027.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of New Branch
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened a New Branch on April 17, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 964 Branches in total
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd has announced the opening of one new branch on April 17, 2026, located in Kokapet, Hyderabad. This expansion brings the bank's total branch network to 964 branches as of the announcement date. The new branch, identified by CBS Code 00969, is situated at House No: 10-16, GKR Square, Radial Road No.5, Shanthi Nagar Road, Kokapet, Gandipet Mandal, Hyderabad - 500 075, Rangareddy District, Telangana. This strategic move is part of the bank's ongoing efforts to enhance its reach and customer service. The bank has informed the stock exchanges about this development in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015.

announcements.subject: Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd - 544492 - Revised Corporate Announcement Filed Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Revised Corporate announcement filed under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015 as required by BSE vide its email dt 17.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd has filed a revised corporate announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This revision was made in response to an email from BSE dated April 17, 2026, requesting additional details. The company submitted the revised announcement on the BSE Listing Centre, incorporating the required details as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024. Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd also addressed an observation regarding a delay in disclosure, explaining that the order from the GST department, dated June 9, 2023, pertaining to Input Tax Credit and corporate guarantees, came to their knowledge only on April 16, 2026, via the GST portal, and they have not yet received a hard copy.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd - 540691 -  Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about its subsidiary, Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited raising Rs. 2,750 crore of growth capital.
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Birla Capital Limited announced that its material subsidiary, Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited (ABHFL), has raised growth capital. On April 17, 2026, ABHFL's Board approved the allotment of 12,32,52,061 equity shares of face value INR 10 each at a price of INR 223.12 per share to Indriya Limited, an entity of Advent International, L.P., through a preferential issue. Following this allotment, Indriya Limited now holds 14.286% of ABHFL's equity share capital on a fully diluted basis. Consequently, ABHFL is no longer a wholly owned subsidiary, and Aditya Birla Capital Limited now holds 85.505% of ABHFL's paid-up equity share capital on a fully diluted basis. ABHFL's revenue and net worth in FY 2024-25 were INR 2,655.18 crore and INR 3,783.06 crore, respectively, contributing 6.54% and 12.45% to the company's consolidated revenue and net worth.

announcements.subject: Future Consumer Ltd - 533400 - Update On NCLT Hearing - Resurgent India Special Situations Fund Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.detail: Update on NCLT hearing- Resurgent India Special Situations Fund Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Future Consumer Limited provided an update on the NCLT hearing concerning the case filed by Resurgent India Special Situations Fund. During the hearing on April 17, 2026, the company's counsel resumed arguments, but the Tribunal directed both parties to file written submissions instead of continuing oral arguments. The Company has been instructed to file its written submissions within 10 days, with the Financial Creditor to respond within one week thereafter. The matter has been adjourned to June 8, 2026, for further hearing, and the company will continue to provide updates.

announcements.subject: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd - 539876 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of award
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd has received an award of order from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited (MSEDCL). The company has been empanelled and has secured a rate contract for the design, manufacture, supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of Off-grid DC Solar Photovoltaic Water Pumping Systems (SPWPS). This order is part of the MTSKPY/ PM -KUSUM-B scheme and covers various locations across Maharashtra. The total order value is approximately Rs. 71.75 Crores, excluding GST, for 3540 units of Solar Photovoltaic Water Pumping Systems. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd - 540879 - General Update
announcements.detail: General Update
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd (AMS) has been granted a License by the Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), for the manufacture of ammunitions. This Lifetime License, issued on April 10, 2026, authorizes AMS to manufacture, assemble, integrate, and proof-test high-value strategic weapon systems and munitions. The license covers the manufacturing of Missiles, Anti-Tank Guided Missiles (ATGMs), Torpedoes, Underwater Mines, Aerial Bombs, Rockets, and Loitering Munition. The company will utilize its owned facilities in Hyderabad for commercial manufacture and proof-testing. This grant significantly transforms AMS's revenue architecture and strategic positioning in defence manufacturing.

announcements.subject: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd - 538446 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the Press Release dated April 17, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd has successfully onboarded STCI Finance Limited and IndusInd Bank as new lenders in March 2026, raising a total of INR 350 million. This includes INR 15 crore from STCI Finance Limited and INR 20 crore from IndusInd Bank. The company, which focuses on impact financing for small and micro entrepreneurs in semi-urban and rural India, has now raised over INR 12 billion in debt funding to date from 32 lenders, including HDFC Bank and Kotak Mahindra Bank. This additional capital will be used to further extend its reach and provide financial resources to micro-entrepreneurs.

announcements.subject: Aurionpro Solutions Ltd - 532668 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Aurionpro launches Fintra: First AI - Native Platform and Operating layer for Trade Finance.
announcements.ai_summary: Aurionpro Solutions Ltd has issued a press release announcing the launch of "Fintra," its first AI-Native Platform and Operating Layer for Trade Finance. Fintra is designed to process trade finance instruments like Letters of Credit and Bank Guarantees using AI agents, with human governance integrated at every decision point. The platform aims to modernize trade finance workflows, which are traditionally document-heavy and manual, with an estimated 70% rejection rate on first presentation according to the International Chamber of Commerce. Fintra is built on Aurionpro's AI-native banking software stack, Aurion AI, and will be followed by similar platforms for other banking areas. This launch was announced on April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bosch Ltd - 500530 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 and 46(2)(oa) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Transcript of Investors'' Concall held on April 13, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Ltd has disclosed the transcript of its Investors' Concall held on April 13, 2026. The call focused on a significant transaction where Bosch Ltd received board approval to acquire Bosch Chassis Systems India Private Limited, a group company. This acquired entity is a market leader in safety and braking systems for the automotive sector in India, operating from three state-of-the-art locations and employing approximately 2,000 people. The transcript details the acquisition of this entity, which has a major manufacturing plant in Chakan. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd - 500108 - Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount For Loans
                    Including Revolving Facilities Like Cash Credit From Banks / Financial Institutions
announcements.detail:
Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount for loans including revolving
                    facilities like cash credit from banks / financial institutions
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd (MTNL) has disclosed defaults in the payment of principal (instalment) and interest to several banks as of March 31, 2026. The total outstanding principal amounts to Rs. 7,794.34 crore, with overdue interest of Rs. 1,468.19 crore, bringing the total obligation to Rs. 9,262.53 crore. The company has defaulted on payments to Union Bank of India, Bank of India, Punjab National Bank, State Bank of India, UCO Bank, Punjab and Sind Bank, and Indian Overseas Bank. The total principal amount involved is Rs. 9,263 Crore. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Pidilite Industries Ltd - 500331 - Intimation Of Q4FY26 Earnings Call
announcements.detail: Intimation of Q4FY26 Earnings Call
announcements.ai_summary: Pidilite Industries Ltd has announced an earnings conference call scheduled for Friday, May 8, 2026, at 4:00 PM IST. The call will provide updates on the company's Q4FY26 performance and business. Management participants will include Mr. Sudhanshu Vats (Managing Director), Mr. Kavinder Singh (Joint Managing Director), Mr. Sandeep Batra (Executive Director - Finance & CFO), and Mr. Bhavesh Joshi (Sr. Vice President - Domestic Accounts and Taxation). Investors can join the call using the provided universal dial-in number +91 22 7115 8115. The details of the earnings call are also available on the company's website, www.pidilite.com.

announcements.subject: NBCC (India) Ltd - 534309 - NBCC Received 'No Objection' From DIPAM For Initiation Of Merger Of HSCC (India) Limited, A Wholly Owned Subsidiary With NBCC (India) Limited (Holding Company).
announcements.detail: As per the attached intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NBCC (India) Limited has received a 'No Objection' from the Department of Investment and Public Asset Management (DIPAM), Ministry of Finance, Govt. of India, on April 16, 2026, for the initiation of the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, HSCC (India) Limited, with NBCC (India) Limited. This 'No Objection' is in compliance with extant guidelines. The company has also made this information available on its website.

announcements.subject: Rane Holdings Ltd - 505800 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 - Part A Para B.8 Schedule III Of SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Order received by the wholly owned subsidiary company - Rane Steering Systems Private Limited from office of Principal Commissioner of Customs ICD, Patparganj, New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rane Holdings Limited has disclosed that its wholly owned subsidiary, Rane Steering Systems Private Limited (RSSL), received an order from the Office of the Principal Commissioner of Customs ICD, Patparganj, New Delhi, on April 16, 2026. This order confirms a differential duty of Rs. 2.69 Crores and levies interest and penalty of Rs. 0.20 Crores, stemming from a previous Show Cause Notice regarding the wrong tariff classification of 39 import bill of entries. The period for which this communication is applicable is May 2023 to January 2025. This follows a previous intimation on May 02, 2025, regarding the Show Cause Notice.

announcements.subject: L&T Technology Services Ltd - 540115 - Partnering With A Leading Global Energy Major To Be Its Engineering Services And Technology Partner For Its Digital Expertise Centre In India For About 500 Engineers.
announcements.detail: L&T Technology Services, a global leader in AI, Digital & ER&D Consulting Services, is partnering with a leading global energy major to be its engineering services and technology partner for its Digital Expertise centre in India for about 500 Engineers.
announcements.ai_summary: L&T Technology Services Ltd has entered into a significant partnership with a leading global energy major. This collaboration positions L&T Technology Services as the engineering services and technology partner for the energy company's new Digital Expertise Centre in India. The centre will be staffed by approximately 500 engineers, indicating a substantial expansion of L&T Technology Services' operations and capabilities in the digital and engineering sectors. This strategic alliance is expected to leverage L&T Technology Services' expertise in AI, Digital, and ER&D consulting. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Excel Industries Ltd - 500650 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Approval For Reclassification Application Of Promoter Under Regulation 31A Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Company has received approval from National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited for reclassification of Promoter shareholder, Malti Bhatia as Public shareholder.
announcements.ai_summary: Excel Industries Ltd has received approval from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited for the reclassification of promoter shareholder, Mrs. Malti D. Bhatia, from the "Promoter" category to the "Public" category. This approval is in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mrs. Malti Bhatia held 104,082 shares, representing 0.83% of the company's shareholding, prior to this reclassification. The stock exchanges granted their no-objection letters on April 16, 2026.

announcements.subject: Lupin Ltd - 500257 - Settlement Agreement.
announcements.detail: Execution of Settlement Agreement.
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Pharmaceuticals, Inc. USA ("LPI"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Lupin Limited, has entered into a Settlement Agreement with Humana Inc. to resolve multiple civil lawsuits alleging anticompetitive behavior and antitrust law violations. Under the terms of the agreement, LPI will pay USD 30 million to Humana Inc. in full and final settlement of all claims. LPI explicitly denies all allegations and the settlement does not constitute an admission of liability or unlawful conduct. This settlement amount has already been accounted for in the company's prior consolidated financial results. The company is providing this disclosure as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: NTPC Green Energy Ltd - 544289 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited has announced that a 150 MW solar capacity, out of a total installed capacity of 300 MW for the Project Sixteen Renewable Power Private Limited located in Rajasthan, has been declared on Commercial Operation effective April 18, 2026. Project Sixteen Renewable Power Private Limited is a step-down subsidiary of ONGC NTPC Green Private Limited, a joint venture of NTPC Green Energy Limited. This declaration increases the total installed capacity of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group to 10,276.40 MW from the previous 10,126.40 MW.

announcements.subject: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd - 542933 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Withdrawal Application Filed By Mr. Ankit Jain Before Hon'Ble NCLAT, New Delhi
announcements.detail: General Update
announcements.ai_summary: Universus Photo Imagings Limited has been informed that Mr. Ankit Jain's appeal before the Hon'ble National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT), New Delhi, has been dismissed as withdrawn. The NCLAT allowed Mr. Jain's withdrawal application during proceedings on April 16, 2026. This means the order dated October 15, 2025, passed by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, which was in favour of Universus Photo Imagings Limited, remains operative. The company had previously informed about the NCLT's decision on October 22, 2025, after Mr. Jain's petition was dismissed by the NCLT. A formal order from the NCLAT is still awaited, and the company will provide further intimation upon its receipt. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR Regulations.

announcements.subject: Embassy Developments Ltd - 532832 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Sale Of Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment, for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Developments Limited has completed the sale of its wholly owned subsidiary, Sepset Real Estate Limited, to 'Pen India Private Limited' on April 16, 2026. This transaction involved the transfer of 100% of Sepset's equity share capital. As a result, Sepset is no longer a subsidiary of Embassy Developments Limited, effective from April 16, 2026. The company had previously intimated the execution of the Share Purchase Agreement on April 12, 2026. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR Regulations.

announcements.subject: Kolte-Patil Developers Ltd - 532924 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Operational update Q4 & FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kolte-Patil Developers Limited has announced its operational update for the fourth quarter (Q4) and the full financial year (FY26) ended March 31, 2026. In Q4 FY26, the company achieved sales of Rs. 714 crore, representing a 13% year-on-year (YoY) growth, and recorded record quarterly collections of Rs. 834 crore, up 18% YoY. For the full FY26, annual sales reached Rs. 2,605 crore, with record annual collections of Rs. 2,689 crore, an 11% YoY increase. The company's flagship project, Life Republic, contributed 0.37 million sq. ft. of sales in Q4 FY26 and 1.78 million sq. ft. for the full FY26. Project launches in Q4 FY26 amounted to approximately 1 million sq. ft., and for FY26, it was around 4.6 million sq. ft. The average price realization in Q4 FY26 was Rs. 9,601 per sq. ft., a 21% YoY increase, and for FY26, it was Rs. 8,314 per sq. ft., up 7% YoY.

announcements.subject: Swelect Energy Systems Ltd-$ - 532051 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Commissioning Of Newly Erected 110/33 KV Pooling Sub Station (PSS) Of SWELECT Energy Systems Limited At Sirungattur, Tiruvanamalai District, Tamil Nadu
announcements.detail: Commissioning of newly erected 110/33 KV Pooling Sub Station (PSS) of SWELECT Energy Systems Limited at Sirungattur, Tiruvanamalai District, Tamil Nadu
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SWELECT Energy Systems Limited has successfully commissioned its newly erected 110/33 KV Pooling Sub Station (PSS) at Sirungattur, Tiruvanamalai District, Tamil Nadu, on April 16, 2026. The substation includes a 1 X 50 MVA, 110/33 KV Power Transformer, facilitating 110 KV connectivity. This infrastructure is designed for the evacuation of a 50 MW Solar Power project in the Villupuram Operation Circle. The commissioning of this pooling substation marks a significant operational milestone for the company.

announcements.subject: Abans Enterprises Ltd - 512165 - Update On Withdrawal Of Scheme Of Amalgamation
announcements.detail: Withdrawal of scheme of Amalgamation of Abans Jewels Limited, Wholly owned subsidiary with Abans Enterprises Limited and their respective shareholder.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Abans Enterprises Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the withdrawal of the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Abans Jewels Limited, with Abans Enterprises Limited and their respective shareholders. This withdrawal follows an earlier intimation on February 05, 2026, where the Audit Committee and Board of Directors had approved the withdrawal, subject to requisite approvals. The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, has now disposed of the application as withdrawn. A certified copy of the NCLT's order is enclosed as Annexure A. The company has also made this information available on its website at https://abansenterprises.com/.

announcements.subject: Wipro Ltd - 507685 - Auditor''s Report On Financial Statements For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026 With UDIN
announcements.detail: Auditor''s Report on financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 with UDIN
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Wipro Limited has submitted its auditor's report on the financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This report, which includes a Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN), confirms that the standalone financial results are presented in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The auditor, Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, opines that the financial statements provide a true and fair view of the company's net profit and other comprehensive income, adhering to Indian Accounting Standard 34. The audit was conducted in accordance with the Standards on Auditing specified under Section 143(10) of the Companies Act, 2013. The auditor has fulfilled their ethical responsibilities as per the Code of Ethics issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India. The auditor's report is available on the company's website, www.wipro.com.

announcements.subject: Bharat Gears Ltd - 505688 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that the Board members have received an intimation from Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar, Chairman and Managing Director of the Company vide his e-mail dated April 16, 2026 that he has received a communication from the Regional Passport Office regarding revocation of his passport, with a right of appeal to the Central Passport Office. Acting on legal advise, he has promptly filed an appeal on April 15, 2026 before the competent authority ....
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Gears Ltd informed the exchanges regarding an intimation received by its Board members from Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar, Chairman and Managing Director. Mr. Kanwar received a communication from the Regional Passport Office regarding the revocation of his passport, with a right of appeal to the Central Passport Office. Acting on legal advice, he filed an appeal on April 15, 2026, seeking a stay on the revocation and its quashing. Mr. Kanwar reiterated that his citizenship status is determined by the Central Government and that the Board had previously noted this position after considering legal opinions. He has also written to the Ministry of Home Affairs and Ministry of External Affairs seeking clarification on his citizenship status, with a reply still awaited.

announcements.subject: Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd - 534618 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Waaree Renewable Technologies Limited announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, showcasing a significant increase in revenue and profitability. Revenue from operations for FY26 stood at Rs. 3,331.42 crores, a growth of 108.51% year-on-year compared to Rs. 1,597.75 crores in FY25. Profit After Tax (PAT) for FY26 was Rs. 478.65 crores, marking a growth of 109.09% year-on-year from Rs. 228.92 crores in FY25. EBITDA also doubled, reaching Rs. 641.10 crores in FY26, a 106.21% increase from Rs. 310.90 crores in FY25. The company highlighted a strong unexecuted orderbook of 2.83 GWp and its expansion into Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) and data centres.

announcements.subject: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd - 540777 - Audio Recording Of Earnings Call For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find attached file for further details
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd has made available the audio recording of its earnings call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This recording, hosted on the company's investor relations website at https://www.hdfclife.com/about-us/investor-relations, was made public on April 16, 2026. The call discussed the company's financial performance for the aforementioned periods, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors can access this recording for detailed insights into the company's financial results.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - New Branch Opening On April 16, 2026
announcements.detail: Opening of Four New Branches on April 16, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd has opened four new branches on April 16, 2026, bringing its total branch network to 953. The new branches are located in Kakkanad (Kerala), Thakurpukur (Kolkata, West Bengal), Shakespeare Sarani (Kolkata, West Bengal), and Srikalahasti (Andhra Pradesh). This expansion is in line with the bank's growth strategy and is disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015.

announcements.subject: Honda India Power Products Ltd - 522064 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR)Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Honda India Power Products Ltd has disclosed the successful conclusion of its Annual Dealer Meet on April 16, 2026. This event served as a strategic platform for the company's leadership to review past achievements and unveil the roadmap for the upcoming year. The announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Intimation For Notice Dispatch Of Forfeiture Of Partly Paid-Up Equity Shares For Non-Payment Of First Call Money.
announcements.detail: Intimation for notice dispatch of forfeiture of Partly Paid up Equity shares for non payment of First call money.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd has announced the forfeiture of 1,37,972 partly paid-up equity shares due to non-payment of the First Call Money by the due date of April 03, 2026. This decision was approved by the Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors on April 13, 2026. The forfeiture is in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013, the company's Articles of Association, and the Letter of Offer dated October 09, 2025. This action follows previous intimations regarding the First Call Notice, Final Reminder-cum-Forfeiture Notice, and Second & Final Reminder-cum-Forfeiture Notice, which were dispatched on January 28, 2026, February 19, 2026, and March 16, 2026, respectively. A copy of the forfeiture notice has been sent to the affected shareholders.

announcements.subject: Embassy Office Parks REIT - 542602 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Embassy Office Parks REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Office Parks REIT has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The filing details the holdings of various unit holders. Notably, Embassy Property Developments Private Limited, a Sponsor and Body Corporate, holds 72,864,279 units, representing 7.69% of the total outstanding units. Within this holding, 71,664,279 units, or 98.35% of its total units held, are pledged or otherwise encumbered. The filing also lists other Sponsor categories, including foreign entities, though specific unit counts and percentages for these are not detailed in the provided excerpt.

announcements.subject: VST Industries Ltd - 509966 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Audited Financial Results-Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: VST Industries Limited announced its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, reporting a significant year-on-year growth. Net cigarette revenue increased by 25% to Rs. 1151 crores from Rs. 921 crores in the previous year. EBITDA saw a substantial rise of 61%, reaching Rs. 450 crores compared to Rs. 279 crores. The company's cigarette volume grew by 8.6% on average per month to 696 million units in FY26 from 641 million units in FY25. Revenue from operations for cigarettes grew by 30.0% to Rs. 1732 crores. Profit after tax (before exceptional item) increased by 43.6% to Rs. 292.3 crores. The company noted that changes in indirect taxes, including the reduction of Compensation Cess to 'Nil' and significant increases in GST and Excise Duty, affect the comparability of gross sales figures.

announcements.subject: Setco Automotive Ltd - 505075 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Revocation Of Direction Issued By Gujarat Pollution Control Board
announcements.detail: Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Setco Automotive Ltd has informed the stock exchanges on April 16, 2026, that the Gujarat Pollution Control Board (GPCB) has revoked its earlier closure direction issued to the company's subsidiary, SASPL. The revocation order, dated April 16, 2026, is effective for three months and is subject to the subsidiary complying with Consolidated Consent Authorisation (CCA) conditions and an undertaking submitted by the company. This revocation follows an earlier direction issued on March 10, 2026, under Section 33A of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974. The company has confirmed that corrective actions have been implemented, and operations at the unit are permitted to resume with no material adverse impact expected.

announcements.subject: Texel Industries Ltd - 526638 - Outcome Of The Meeting Duly Convened On 16Th April, 2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Meeting duly convened on 16th April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Texel Industries Ltd's Finance and Investment Committee, in a meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,72,875 equity shares to Avani Shailesh Mehta, a promoter, upon conversion of warrants. These shares were allotted at an issue price of ₹38.25 per share, including a premium of ₹28.25 per share. The allotment follows the receipt of the balance 75% consideration amounting to ₹49,59,351.56 from the allottee. This conversion has increased the company's total paid-up equity share capital from ₹13,91,84,280 (1,39,18,428 shares) to ₹14,09,13,030 (1,40,91,303 shares), each with a face value of ₹10.

announcements.subject: CESC Ltd - 500084 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation is attached
announcements.ai_summary: CESC Limited has informed the stock exchanges on April 16, 2026, about signing Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) for procuring power from Grid Connected Wind Solar Hybrid Power Projects. These agreements are for a total capacity of 600 MW. Specifically, CESC will procure 100 MW from Vismaya Renewables India Project Private Limited, 100 MW from Hexa Climate Solutions Private Limited, 300 MW from its subsidiary Purvah Green Power Private Limited, and 100 MW from Sprng Energy Private Limited. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, following the issuance of Letters of Awards on March 17, 2026.

announcements.subject: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust - 543225 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has submitted its Unitholding Pattern as of March 31, 2026, to the stock exchange on April 16, 2026. This submission is in accordance with Regulation 23 of SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The unitholding pattern was issued by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar to the Trust. The information has also been filed via XBRL on the BSE listing portal and is available on the Trust's website. The report details the unit holdings by various categories, including Sponsor(s), Investment Manager, and Public Holding, with specific entities like BIF IV Jarvis India Pte. Ltd. and Project Holdings Nine (DIFC) Limited holding significant percentages.

announcements.subject: Vikran Engineering Ltd - 544496 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of board meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Vikran Engineering Ltd held a meeting on April 16, 2026, and approved several key decisions. The board appointed RSM Astute Consulting Private Limited as the Internal Auditor for the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2029. Additionally, Ms. Kajal Rakholiya was appointed as the Nodal Officer and Ms. Preeti Deshmukh as the Deputy Nodal Officer, both effective from April 16, 2026, to manage investor claims and coordinate with the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority. The board also noted and paid a penalty of ₹4,720 levied by the National Stock Exchange for a two-day delay in disclosing the shareholding pattern, attributing the delay to inadvertence and implementing measures to prevent future occurrences.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited - Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025
announcements.ai_summary: Rain Industries Limited has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The report, filed on April 16, 2026, provides disclosures as per Regulation 34(2)(f) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company's paid-up capital is ₹672,691,358. The BRSR report is prepared on a consolidated basis and has undergone reasonable assurance for BRSR Core indicators and limited assurance for selected non-core indicators by DQS India. The report details the company's products and services, and general disclosures regarding its corporate identity, registered office, and contact information for queries.

announcements.subject: Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd - 542649 - Rail Vikas Nigam Limited Emerges As The Lowest Bidder (L1) From East Coast Railway- Normal Course Of Business Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited emerges as the Lowest Bidder (L1) from East Coast Railway- Normal course of business of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) has emerged as the Lowest Bidder (L1) from East Coast Railway for a project involving the construction of 3rd and 4th lines between Nergundi-Barang (22Km) and Khurda Road-Vizianagaram (363Km) on the Bhadrak-Vizianagaram section (385Km). The project includes the construction of four major bridges over rivers Birupa, Mahanadi, Kathjori, and Kuakhai on an EPC mode. The total value of this contract is INR 967,92,66,661.70 (Rupees Nine Hundred Sixty Seven Crore, Ninety Two Lakh, Sixty-Six Thousand, Six Hundred Sixty-One). This work is expected to be executed within a period of three (03) years and is considered a normal course of business for RVNL.

announcements.subject: Gravita India Ltd - 533282 - Update On Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure requirements) Regulations, 2015, we would like to inform you that the company has additionally acquired 20,400 shares, representing 0.49% of Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited ("RMIL") a subsidiary of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Gravita India Ltd has further acquired 20,400 shares, representing 0.49% of Rashtriya Metal Industries Limited (RMIL), a subsidiary of the company. This acquisition, announced on April 16, 2026, increases Gravita India Ltd's shareholding in RMIL from the previous 98.95% to 99.44%. This update is in continuation of an earlier disclosure made on March 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: VA Tech Wabag Ltd - 533269 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Clarification on news the item appearing in "https://www.cnbctv18.com/" dated 16th April 2026 captioned "VA Tech Wabag shares surge on the back of this CNBC-TV18 exclusive"
announcements.ai_summary: VA Tech Wabag Limited has issued a clarification regarding news items published on CNBC-TV18.com on April 16, 2026. The company clarified that it is not aware of any project worth over INR 600 Crores in Saudi Arabia where it has been declared the lowest bidder. Regarding a news item about being the lowest bidder for a project in Kuwait valued at around INR 3,400 crore in a joint venture with a US-based company, VA Tech Wabag clarified that on August 06, 2025, the customer notified on their portal that the Joint Venture of VA TECH WABAG and HEISCO, Kuwait, had submitted the lowest bid of KD 114,280,000 for a Desalination Plant in Kuwait. The company is still awaiting the Letter of Award (LOA) for this project.

announcements.subject: Dodla Dairy Ltd - 543306 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Dodla Dairy Limited has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, HR Food Processing Private Limited, has been allotted 311,333 sqft (7.15 acres) of land in the Dumaria industrial area of Motipur cluster, Bihar. This land, leased for 90 years from Bihar Industrial Area Development Authority (BIADA), will be used to establish a manufacturing unit for milk, dahi, paneer, lassi, butter, ghee, flavored milk, milk sweets, and other related milk products. The company has accepted the terms and conditions for the allotment and is in the process of completing the acquisition formalities.

announcements.subject: Motisons Jewellers Ltd - 544053 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform that the board of directors in meeting today i.e. on April 16, 2026 has considered and approved the redemption of unlisted 50,00,000 2.5% Non-Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each ('Preference Shares') held by Gajraj Tradecom Private Limited, ('Preference Shareholder'), out of profit of the Company.

Post redemption, the issued and ....
announcements.ai_summary: Motisons Jewellers Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved the redemption of 50,00,000 unlisted 2.5% Non-Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares. These preference shares, with a face value of Rs. 10/- each, were held by Gajraj Tradecom Private Limited. The redemption will be funded out of the company's profits. Following this redemption, the issued and paid-up preference share capital will be reduced to 50,00,000 preference shares of Rs. 10/- each. The board meeting commenced at 05:00 P.M. and concluded at 05:30 P.M.

announcements.subject: Apollo Tyres Ltd - 500877 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Tyres Ltd has received an order from the Joint Commissioner of Customs, Chennai, on April 16, 2026. The order levies a penalty of Rs. 14.34 lacs under the Customs Act, 1962, due to a dispute regarding HSN classification. The company has stated that there is no material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities due to this order. Apollo Tyres Ltd intends to file an appeal before the Appellate Authority in due course.

announcements.subject: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd - 533033 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding execution of Memorandum of Understanding with The National Sugar Development Council, Federal Republic of Nigeria
announcements.ai_summary: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with The National Sugar Development Council, Federal Republic of Nigeria, on April 16, 2026. This agreement is for providing technical support in relation to the development of sugar plants in Nigeria. The MOU outlines the provision of technical support for developing feasibility studies and preparing project proposals. This collaboration is considered an international venture, and further details regarding consideration and specific terms are provided in Annexure-1. The rationale behind this agreement is to leverage ISGEC's expertise in the sugar industry for international development.

announcements.subject:
Spice Islands Industries Ltd-$ - 526827 - Statement Of Deviation Or Variation In Utilization Of Funds Raised
Through Preferential Issue For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Statement of deviation or variation in utilization of funds raised through Preferential issue for the quarter ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Spice Islands Industries Limited has provided a statement on the deviation or variation in the utilization of funds raised through a Preferential Issue for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company had previously allotted warrants convertible into equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 45/- per warrant, including a premium of Rs. 35/- per warrant. On October 30, 2024, 19,33,324 warrants were allotted, with 25% of the issue price (Rs. 11.25/- per warrant) paid, totaling Rs. 2,17,49,895/-. Subsequently, on December 01, 2025, 19,33,324 equity shares were allotted upon conversion of these warrants at an issue price of Rs. 45/- per equity share, including a premium of Rs. 35/- per equity share, with the remaining 75% of the issue price (Rs. 33.75/- per warrant) paid, aggregating to Rs. 6,52,49,685/-. The statement indicates no deviation or variation in the use of funds raised for this quarter.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Clarification/Confirmation On News Item Appearing In 'Media/Publication"
announcements.detail: Clarification/Confirmation on news item appearing in "Media/Publication" is submitted.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL) has provided clarification regarding a news item about potential talks with Codelco for a Chile copper joint venture. HCL confirmed that an Agreement for cooperation and exchange of information was executed with Codelco on April 1, 2025, to identify and implement joint activities in exploration and exploitation of mining properties. While Codelco has shared details of exploration projects in Chile for HCL's assessment, no negotiation for the formation of a Joint Venture Company is currently ongoing. HCL is evaluating the geophysical exploration information provided by Codelco. Any material development will be informed to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: HDFC Bank Ltd - 500180 - Investment In The Equity Shares Of HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited
announcements.detail: Investment in the equity shares of HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Bank's Board of Directors has approved an investment of up to ₹1,000 crore in the preferential issue of equity shares by its subsidiary, HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited. This investment will be made in one or more tranches, in compliance with SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018, including pricing regulations. The investment is subject to necessary approvals, including from the Reserve Bank of India.

announcements.subject: Alok Industries Ltd - 521070 - Board Meeting Outcome for Audited Financial Results (Standalone And Consolidated) For The Quarter / Year Ended March 31, 2026 And Approval Of Change Of RTA
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 33 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we enclose the following: (a) Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter / year ended March 31, 2026; and (b) Auditors' Reports with unmodified opinions on the aforesaid Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Result. 

The Board of Directors has also approved the change of RTA.
announcements.ai_summary: Alok Industries Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company also announced the approval of a change in its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA). KFin Technologies Limited will replace MUFG Intime India Private Limited as the RTA. The transition process, including data shifting and electronic connectivity, will be completed in due course. The Auditors' Reports on the financial results received unmodified opinions.

announcements.subject: Investment & Precision Castings Ltd - 504786 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR, 2015.
announcements.detail: intimation under regulation 30 of SEBI LODR, 2015 Receipt of Significant order from MKU Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Investment & Precision Castings Limited has secured a significant defence order from MKU Limited, a prominent defence solutions provider. The order involves the manufacture and supply of precision aluminium components for thermal weapon sight systems. While specific financial details are confidential, the order is expected to contribute meaningfully to the company's revenue over its execution period. This marks a key milestone for the company in the defence and aerospace sector, highlighting its capabilities in manufacturing complex aluminium components and strengthening its position in strategic defence programs. The execution of this order is anticipated to enhance order book visibility and improve revenue quality.

announcements.subject: Aditya Infotech Ltd - 544466 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Execution of Joint Venture agreement with Orient Cables (India) Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Infotech Limited (AIL) and Orient Cables (India) Limited have executed a 50:50 Joint Venture Agreement on April 16, 2026, to form a new Private Limited Company. This joint venture will focus on the manufacturing of electric cables, including LAN cables and CCTV cables, terminated assemblies, electric cables, and connectors, along with allied products. The share capital of the proposed JV Company will be held in a 50:50 proportion by AIL and Orient. This agreement follows a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed between the parties on February 12, 2026, and is subject to the completion of customary conditions precedent.

announcements.subject: AAA Technologies Ltd - 543671 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer to the eligible Equity Shareholde of AAA Technologies Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Jyotirgamya Advisory Private Limited and Mr. Ashok Kumar Chordia have made an Open Offer to acquire up to 33,34,968 fully paid-up equity shares of AAA Technologies Limited, representing 26.00% of the Voting Share Capital. The offer price is ₹101.00 per Equity Share, payable in cash, in accordance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This offer is being made pursuant to Regulations 3(1) and 4 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations 2011 and is not conditional on any minimum level of acceptance. The acquirers may withdraw the offer as per Regulation 23(1) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations. The offer price may be subject to upward revision. Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd is acting as the Manager to the Offer.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - Infosys To Announce Fourth Quarter And Annual Results On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Ltd has announced that it will declare its financial results for the fourth quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026, on Thursday, April 23, 2026. The results are scheduled to be announced around 3:45 p.m. Indian Standard Time (IST). Following the results announcement, the leadership team will participate in a press conference at 4:30 p.m. IST on the same day, which will be streamed live on the Investor Relations section of Infosys' website. Additionally, an earnings call for investors and analysts will be held at 5:30 p.m. IST on April 23, 2026, to discuss the company's performance.

announcements.subject: Autoline Industries Ltd - 532797 - Update On Sale Of Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Update on Sale of Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Autoline Industries Ltd has announced the completion of the sale of its subsidiary, Autoline Industrial Parks Ltd (AIPL). The transfer of all stakes held by Autoline Industries Ltd, its Promoters, and Autoline Design Software Ltd (ADSL) in AIPL to MNSC Realty & Developers Pvt. Ltd. was completed on April 16, 2026, upon receipt of the entire Share Subscription Money as per the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA). Consequently, all directors associated with Autoline Industries Ltd on AIPL's Board have resigned, and management control has been transferred to MNSC Realty & Developers Pvt. Ltd. effective April 16, 2026. AIPL is no longer a Material Subsidiary, Subsidiary, or Associate of Autoline Industries Ltd. The net worth of AIPL as of March 31, 2025, was Rs. 1,15,83,82,301, and its turnover or income was Nil.

announcements.subject: Rashi Peripherals Ltd - 544119 - Announcement Under Reg. 30 - Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: we submit the outcome of Board meeting held on 16th April, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Rashi Peripherals Limited met on April 16, 2026, and approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) in India named Rashi Semiconductor Solutions Pvt. Limited, with an investment of up to Rs. 80 crores. They also approved the incorporation of a step-down subsidiary in Singapore, Rashi Semiconductor Solutions Pte. Ltd., which will be a subsidiary of the Indian WOS. Additionally, the Board approved the acquisition of 100% shareholding of RP Tech Electronics Limited from the Promoters for strategic business alignments, with an investment of up to Rs. 10 Crores. The acquisition of RP Tech Electronics Limited is at a consideration of Rs. 10 per share. These decisions are subject to regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd - 514402 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Eco Hotels and Resorts Limited Announces Strategic Partnership with Kesari Tours Pvt. Ltd. to Strengthen Presence in Spiritual Destinations.
announcements.ai_summary: Eco Hotels and Resorts Limited has entered into a strategic partnership with Kesari Tours Pvt. Ltd. to enhance its presence in spiritual destinations like Varanasi and Ayodhya. This collaboration aligns with the company's asset-light growth strategy and its objective to expand into high-growth spiritual tourism markets. The partnership aims to leverage Kesari Tours' extensive reach in pilgrimage travel with Eco Hotels' focus on sustainable and comfortable hospitality. This initiative is expected to deliver curated stay experiences for travellers undertaking spiritual journeys, thereby improving customer satisfaction and engagement. The disclosure is available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Pre-Offer Advertisement & Corrigendum to Detailed Public Statement
announcements.detail: Citigroup Global Markets India Private Ltd ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Pre-Offer Advertisement in accordance with Regulation 18(7) and other applicable provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and subsequent amendments thereto, and corrigendum to the detailed Public Statement for the attention of the Public Shareholders of Sammaan Capital Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: A corrigendum to the detailed public statement and a pre-offer advertisement have been submitted by Citigroup Global Markets India Private Ltd, the Manager to the Open Offer, for Sammaan Capital Ltd. This pertains to the open offer for the acquisition of up to 34,17,54,286 equity shares of face value INR 2 each, representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital. The offer is being made by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, along with IHC Capital Holding LLC, as persons acting in concert. This announcement is in compliance with the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The pre-offer advertisement cum corrigendum was published on April 16, 2026, in the Financial Express, Jansatta, and Navshakti newspapers.

announcements.subject: DCM Shriram Ltd - 523367 - Board Meeting Outcome for Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Transfer Of Equity Stake In Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, ('Listing regulations'), we inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today, i.e., 16th April 2026, has approved execution of Shareholders' Agreement, Share Purchase Agreement and other transaction documents amongst the Company, Shriram Polytech Limited ('SPL'), wholly owned subsidiary ....
announcements.ai_summary: DCM Shriram Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved the execution of agreements for the transfer of a 50% equity stake in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Shriram Polytech Limited (SPL), to Teknor Apex B.V. This transaction is for a cash consideration of USD 5.6 million. Consequently, SPL will be reclassified as a Joint Venture of DCM Shriram Limited. This partnership aims to strengthen the company's advanced materials Polymer compounds portfolio and expand global partnerships. As of March 31, 2025, SPL had a turnover of ₹201.63 Crores and a net worth of ₹78.36 Crores. The sale is expected to be completed by April 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Anlon Healthcare Ltd - 544497 - Board Meeting Outcome for For Entered Into Share Purchase Agreement With Remember India Health Links Private Limited
announcements.detail:
We have attached herewith outcome of Board Meeting held on Thursday, April 16, 2026.

Kindly take the same on your record.

Thank you.
announcements.ai_summary: Anlon Healthcare Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 16, 2026, approved the acquisition of 1,11,00,000 Equity Shares, representing 63.98% of the Equity Share Capital of Remember India Health Links Private Limited. The acquisition is for a consideration of Rs. 5,38,12,800 and is subject to the terms specified in the share purchase agreement dated April 16, 2026. Upon completion, Remember India Health Links Private Limited will become a subsidiary of Anlon Healthcare Limited. The meeting commenced at 12:30 p.m. IST and concluded at 01:00 p.m. IST.

announcements.subject: Kaveri Seed Company Ltd - 532899 - Annual Compliance Status Certificate From An Independent Auditor In Accordance With The SEBI Order Number. No. WTM/SKM/CFD/12/2021-22, Dated 19Th April, 2021 For Kaveri Seed Company Limited.

WTM/SM/CFD/5/2022-23, dated 30th November, 2022 for Kaveri Seed Company Limited. In relation to Madhushree Private Trust (Acquirers), as per the conditions mentioned in para 5(j) of the SEBI Order, please find enclosed herewith Independent Auditors Annual Compliance ....
announcements.ai_summary: Madhushree Private Trust has submitted its Annual Compliance Status Certificate from an Independent Auditor for the year ended March 31, 2026. This certificate is in accordance with SEBI Order No. WTM/SKM/CFD/12/2021-22, dated April 19, 2021, and its corrigendum order dated November 30, 2022. As of March 31, 2026, the Trust holds 1,00,89,338 shares of Kaveri Seed Company Limited, representing a 9.61% stake. The auditor has reviewed the relevant documents and disclosures provided by the Trust to ensure compliance with the SEBI order.

announcements.subject: Vega Jewellers Ltd - 512026 - Intimation Of New Store Opening In Guntur Today I.E., 16.04.2026
announcements.detail: Intimation of New Store opening in Guntur today i.e., 16.04.2024
announcements.ai_summary: Vega Jewellers Limited has announced the inauguration of a new store in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, on April 16, 2026. This new store is located at Lakshmi Puram, Besides Reliance Digital Store, Building no: 5, 87-16, Pandaripuram, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh 522002. The opening of this store expands the company's retail presence, bringing its total number of stores to six. This expansion is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Gulshan Polyols Ltd - 532457 - Submission Of The Disclosures Received From The Trusts(S) As Per The SEBI "Exemption Order" Dated June 22, 2021.
announcements.detail: Submission of the Disclosures received from the Trust(s) as per the SEBI "Exemption Order" dated June 22, 2021.
announcements.ai_summary: Gulshan Polyols Limited has submitted disclosures received from four trusts: Gulshan Family Benefit Trust, Lotus Holding Trust, Chandra Holding Trust, and Mridula Family Trust. These disclosures are in accordance with the SEBI Order dated June 22, 2021, concerning an exemption under Regulation 11(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company has received compliance status certifications from an independent auditor for the financial year 2025-26 for these trusts.

announcements.subject: Reliance Infrastructure Ltd - 500390 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Statement
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Infrastructure Ltd has issued a media statement to address media queries. The company clarifies that Mr. Amitabh Jhunjhunwala departed from the Reliance Group in September 2019 and has had no subsequent association with Reliance Infrastructure Limited and Reliance Power Limited. During his employment, he held the position of Group Managing Director of the Reliance Group and served as Vice Chairman and Director of Reliance Capital Limited. Furthermore, Mr. Amit Bapna left the Reliance Group in December 2019 and has had no association with Reliance Infrastructure Limited and Reliance Power Limited since then. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Reliance Capital Limited and as a Director of Reliance Home Finance Limited. The statement also briefly describes the businesses of Reliance Infrastructure and Reliance Power.

announcements.subject: SG Finserve Ltd - 539199 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: SG Finserve Ltd has announced the release of its Earnings Presentation and Press Release pertaining to the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has made these documents available on its website, www.sgfinserve.com, for investors and stakeholders. The presentation includes forward-looking statements and is intended for informational purposes, not as an offer to sell or solicit an offer to buy securities.

announcements.subject: Reliance Power Ltd - 532939 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 - Media Release
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Power Ltd has issued a media statement to clarify information based on media queries. The company states that Mr. Amitabh Jhunjhunwala left the Reliance Group in September 2019 and has had no association with Reliance Infrastructure Limited and Reliance Power Limited since then. During his tenure, he served as Group Managing Director of the Reliance Group and Vice Chairman and Director of Reliance Capital Limited. Similarly, Mr. Amit Bapna left the Reliance Group in December 2019 and has had no association with Reliance Infrastructure Limited and Reliance Power Limited thereafter. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Reliance Capital Limited and Director of Reliance Home Finance Limited. The statement also provides a brief overview of Reliance Infrastructure and Reliance Power's operations and investor base.

announcements.subject: WPIL Ltd - 505872 - Intimation For Publication Audited Financial Results
announcements.detail: Intimation for publication of Audited Financial Results.
announcements.ai_summary: WPIL Ltd has informed BSE Limited that it will publish its Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, within the stipulated timeframe. Consequently, the company will not be preparing or publishing Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This decision allows for a single publication of audited results for the period. The company's CIN is L36900WB1952PLC020274.

announcements.subject: Krypton Industries Ltd - 523550 - Non-Applicability Of Escrow Payment Mechanism
announcements.detail: Non- Applicability of Escrow Payment Mechanism
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Krypton Industries Limited has clarified to the Bombay Stock Exchange that the Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the company. This clarification was in response to an email dated April 15, 2026, from the exchange regarding the submission of details for this mechanism. The company stated that it has not issued, nor does it have, any instruments or arrangements for which the Escrow Payment Mechanism is applicable under the relevant SEBI Regulations, and therefore, no disclosure or submission is required in this respect.

announcements.subject: Moschip Technologies Ltd - 532407 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 16-04-2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Moschip Technologies Limited has approved the acquisition of 73% of the share capital of Vayavya Labs Private Limited (VLPL) from its existing shareholders for a total consideration of ₹245.49 crores. This consideration comprises ₹148.52 crores in cash and ₹96.97 crores through the issuance of 50,50,686 equity shares of Moschip Technologies, with a face value of ₹2 each, at an issue price of ₹192 per share. The issuance and allotment of these 'Swap Shares' are on a preferential basis and are subject to shareholder and requisite regulatory approvals. Moschip Technologies also plans to acquire the remaining 27% shareholding in VLPL after March 31, 2028, with the valuation linked to VLPL's business performance.

announcements.subject: AVI Polymers Ltd - 539288 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release regarding Strategic Pivot into AI-Agritech with Launch  of "KrishiBuddy".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: AVI Polymers Ltd announced the official launch of 'KrishiBuddy', an advanced AI-powered smart farming platform developed by its wholly-owned subsidiary, AVI Eco Spark Private Limited. This marks a strategic pivot into the agritech sector, aiming to digitize and optimize agricultural intelligence for Indian farmers. KrishiBuddy leverages satellite-based crop monitoring and predictive AI to provide real-time insights on crop health, field conditions, and pest alerts. The platform is designed for zero-barrier adoption with a multilingual AI interface, allowing interaction via voice, text, and image in regional languages. Future revenue streams are expected from a B2B agri-input marketplace, subscription services, and data monetization for institutional credit access. The company also reported a strong net profit of ₹701.98 lakh in Q3 FY26.

announcements.subject: Sasken Technologies Ltd - 532663 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a Press Release bearing the title 'Sasken Announces Hyderabad Center of Excellence to Scale Product Engineering and Digital Innovation' being released today.
announcements.ai_summary: Sasken Technologies Ltd has announced the launch of its new Center of Excellence (CoE) in Hyderabad, aimed at scaling product engineering and digital innovation. This new facility will enhance Sasken's regional delivery capabilities and strengthen its collaboration with key chipset customers like Qualcomm and their OEMs. The Hyderabad CoE will focus on next-generation engineering for connected devices, 5G platforms, IoT solutions, and embedded systems. As part of this expansion, Sasken has appointed Nirmala Datla as the Site Leader for the Hyderabad CoE and plans to hire over 100 specialized engineering professionals in the coming months. The hiring will focus on high-skill roles in semiconductors, ODM, automotive, and Data Science & Engineering.

announcements.subject: LTIMindtree Ltd - 540005 - Details Of Earnings Call Scheduled On April 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Ltd (formerly LTIMindtree Limited) has announced the details for its Earnings Conference Call to discuss the financial performance for the fourth quarter (Q4) and the full fiscal year (FY26). The call is scheduled to take place on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 19:00 hours IST.
