The session will begin with a management discussion on the company's performance, followed by an interactive Question & Answer session. Investors can register for the call using the provided link. A recording and transcript of the call will be made available on LTIMindtree's investor relations webpage.

announcements.subject: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd - 544141 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Allotment Of 16,00,000 Convertible Warrants On Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith annoucement / Board meeting outccome under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 for allotment of 16,00,000 covertible warrants on preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd, in a meeting held on April 16, 2026, has approved the allotment of 16,00,000 (Sixteen Lakhs) convertible warrants on a preferential basis. This decision was made upon receiving duly signed application forms and application amounts from the proposed allottees. The board meeting commenced at 11:00 am and concluded at 11:30 am. This allotment is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd - 543299 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015-Commencement Of Commercial Production Of Phase II Of Colour Coated Sheets Facilitity
announcements.detail: We are enclosing disclosure Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd, through its step-down subsidiary Shyam Sel and Power Limited (SSPL), has successfully commenced commercial production for Phase II of its Colour Coated Sheets facility at its Jamuria plant. This expansion adds an incremental capacity of 0.15 Million Tonnes Per Annum (MTPA) for Colour Coated Sheets. The total installed capacity for this facility now stands at 0.40 MTPA, combining the existing 0.25 MTPA from Phase I and the new 0.15 MTPA from Phase II. This development is a significant step in the company's phased capacity expansion strategy, aiming to strengthen SSPL's production capabilities and product offerings in the value-added steel segment. The company anticipates this enhancement will improve its manufacturing competitiveness and market presence in the Colour Coated Sheets sector.

announcements.subject: Gail (India) Ltd - 532155 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a copy of Press Release on "GAIL to set up 600 MW Solar Power Project in UP"
announcements.ai_summary: GAIL (India) Limited is set to establish a 600 MW solar power project in Jhansi, Uttar Pradesh, at TUSCO's Solar Park. The company has signed contract agreements with M/s TUSCO Limited for this project, which will also include a 550 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). This initiative is primarily aimed at meeting the captive energy requirements of GAIL's Petrochemical Plant in Pata, Auraiya district, Uttar Pradesh. Additionally, it will cater to the increased demand from electrification of gas-based equipment and CBG plants being set up in the state. This project signifies GAIL's diversification into low-carbon and sustainable energy solutions and its commitment to expanding its business footprint in Uttar Pradesh.

announcements.subject: MIC Electronics Ltd - 532850 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the receipt of the LOAs (letters of acceptance) intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: MIC Electronics Limited has secured two significant orders from Indian Railways. The first order, received from the Signal and Telecommunication (S&T) department of Nagpur Division, Central Railway, is for the Supply, Installation, Testing & Commissioning of Telecom assets/Passenger amenities IPIS at Wardha station, valued at Rs. 1,12,14,148.93. The execution timeline for this order is 6 months. Additionally, the company received a variation order from Salem Division, Southern Railway, for the Provision of Passenger Information System in connection with the Amrit Bharat Scheme at multiple stations and for CAMC (Comprehensive Annual Maintenance Contract) over a period of five years. This second order is valued at Rs. 1,09,45,604. The terms and conditions for both orders will be finalized upon agreement execution.

announcements.subject: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd - 541729 - Grant Of Employee Stock Options And Performance Linked Stock Units
announcements.detail: Grant of Employee Stock Options And Performance Linked Stock Units
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination & Remuneration Committee of HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the grant of 35,710 Employee Stock Options and 34,825 Performance-linked Stock Units. These grants represent an aggregate of 70,535 Equity Shares of Rs. 5/- face value each. The options and units are granted to eligible employees of the company and its wholly-owned subsidiary, HDFC AMC International (IFSC) Limited, under the Employees Stock Options and Performance-linked Stock Units Scheme – 2025. The grant price for each Option is Rs. 2,663.70, and for each PSU is Rs. 5/-. This scheme is in compliance with SEBI (Share Based Employees Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

announcements.subject: Birlasoft Ltd - 532400 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - Birlasoft Recognized as a Leader in ISG''s Manufacturing Industry Services and Solutions Report
announcements.ai_summary: Birlasoft Ltd, a part of the CK Birla Group, has been recognized as a Leader in ISG's Manufacturing Industry Services and Solutions report. The company achieved leadership positions in two key quadrants: Supply Chain & Aftermarket Services and Technology, Transformation & Consulting Services. This recognition highlights Birlasoft's expertise in AI-led digital manufacturing transformation, its strong domain knowledge, ecosystem partnerships, and proprietary solutions like IntelliBridge and IntelliAsset. In the Supply Chain & Aftermarket Services quadrant, Birlasoft was acknowledged for its ability to modernize and optimize operations using technologies such as AI, IoT, and GenAI. For the Technology, Transformation & Consulting Services quadrant, ISG noted Birlasoft's integrated transformation framework and its capabilities in digital engineering and smart factory solutions.

announcements.subject: Vashu Bhagnani Industries Ltd - 532011 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome For The Board Meeing Of The Company Held On 16Th April, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the meeting of the Board of Directors of Vashu Bhagnani Industries Limited (''the Company'') in accordance with Regulation 29 and 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015 (''Listing Regulation'') held on 16th April, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Vashu Bhagnani Industries Limited, in its meeting held on April 16, 2026, noted a clerical error in the books of accounts of a subsidiary. The Board concluded that this error does not have any material impact on the financial statements of the subsidiary or the holding company. The Statutory Auditors confirmed that no revision or restatement of the financial statements of the Indian holding company is necessary. Therefore, the financial statements previously approved and submitted to the stock exchanges are considered final and conclusive, with no requirement for restatement or re-submission.

announcements.subject: Elitecon International Ltd - 539533 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Order of Long-Term Supply of Goods
announcements.ai_summary: Elitecon International Limited has secured a long-term supply contract for cigarettes and other tobacco-allied products, with an aggregate contract value of INR 2.02 Billion. This order is expected to provide steady export visibility and reflects continued demand in international markets, particularly strengthening the company's presence in South African markets. The contract is considered a milestone for entering the African continent and is anticipated to contribute positively to business stability and long-term growth. The order has been received in the normal course of business, supporting efficient utilization of manufacturing capacities and better operational planning.

announcements.subject: HDB Financial Services Ltd - 544429 - Board Meeting Outcome for Revision To Audited Standalone Financial Results Along With Audit Report For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Revision to Audited Standalone Financial Results along with Audit Report for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: HDB Financial Services Limited has revised its Audited Standalone Financial Results and Audit Report for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The revision is due to an inadvertent clerical error identified in the "Statement of Cash flow," specifically within the "Components of cash and cash equivalents" for the previous year ended March 31, 2025. The corrected figure for "Demand drafts on hand" is Rs. 56 million, compared to the previously reported Rs. 352 million, leading to a revised total cash and cash equivalents of Rs. 9,504 million for the year ended March 31, 2025, down from Rs. 9,800 million. The company confirmed that no other changes were made to the financial results or audit report. The Board of Directors approved these revised results on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Cholamandalam Financial Holdings Ltd - 504973 - Intimation On NOC Received From Exchanges
announcements.detail: Cholamandalam Financial Holdings Limited has informed the exchange regarding No objection received under Regulation 31A(8) of SEBI Listing regulations from stock exchanges
announcements.ai_summary: Cholamandalam Financial Holdings Limited has received no-objection letters from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for the de-classification of Algavista Greentech Private Limited from its promoter group. The NSE granted its approval via letter no. NSE/LIST/COMP/CHOLAHLDNG/575/2026-2027 dated April 15, 2026, and BSE provided its approval through letter no. LIST/COMP/KR/031/2026-27, also dated April 15, 2026. This follows previous communications regarding the de-classification application, which was initially dated February 11, 2026. The company is required to ensure compliance with subsequent disclosure requirements under Regulation 31A of SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd - 544309 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Enclosed is the Press Release titled "IKS Health Debuts First-of-Its-Kind Agentic AI Platform that Automates and Personalizes Patient Engagement at the 2026 American Medical Group Association Annual Conference."
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd announced the debut of its innovative Agentic AI platform, MyCareHubTM, at the 2026 American Medical Group Association Annual Conference on April 15, 2026. This platform is designed to automate and personalize patient engagement throughout their healthcare journey, before, during, and after care. MyCareHubTM is integrated with Epic and available in the Epic Connection Hub, utilizing a multi-agent behavioral algorithm for an adaptive and autonomous patient experience. The company highlights that prioritizing patients through this platform leads to improvements in total collections, patient payments, and net payments. IKS Health has already implemented MyCareHubTM at OrthoNY, a leading orthopedic and pain management practice.

announcements.subject: NESCO Ltd - 505355 - Update
announcements.detail: Update
announcements.ai_summary: NESCO Ltd has issued an update following its disclosure on April 13, 2026, enclosing a press release that clarifies the company's position regarding an incident at its venue. The company expresses condolences to the families affected and hopes for the recovery of the injured. NESCO Ltd is fully cooperating with investigating authorities and states that it has always complied with applicable laws, regulatory requirements, and prescribed protocols for events hosted at its venue, including adequate safety and security measures. The company maintains a zero-tolerance policy for illegal substances and emphasizes that attendees are subject to entry conditions and event terms that prohibit such conduct. NESCO Ltd unequivocally states that there has been no lapse or negligence on its part or its employees' in relation to this incident, expressing full confidence that the ongoing investigation will establish this.

announcements.subject: 63 Moons Technologies Ltd - 526881 - Investor Update Received From Our Subsidiary-63SATS Cybertech Limited
announcements.detail: Investor update received from our Subsidiary-63SATS Cybertech Limited
announcements.ai_summary: 63 Moons Technologies Ltd has provided an investor update received from its subsidiary, 63SATS Cybertech Limited. The update highlights significant growth for 63SATS Cybertech Limited in FY 2025-26, with a 24x revenue growth from Rs. 3.6 Cr to Rs. 87 Cr. The subsidiary serves 72 enterprise clients, including large enterprises, and has achieved over 18 lakh CYBX downloads with 2.32 lakh subscribers for its B2C, B2B, and B2G offerings. The Chairman's message emphasizes the importance of constant preparedness in the cyber landscape, comparing it to modern warfare, and positions 63SATS to play a meaningful role in economic stability and institutional resilience. The MD & CEO's message also underscores the company's strong foundation and clear direction for future execution.

announcements.subject: Tejas Networks Ltd - 540595 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Tejas Networks Ltd has issued a press release on April 15, 2026, regarding its financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has submitted this press release to the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd and BSE Limited for their information and records. Investors can refer to this press release for detailed financial performance information for the specified period.

announcements.subject: Syschem India Ltd - 531173 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Under regulation 30_Material Information _Fraudulent Funds transfer.
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Syschem India Ltd, has reported a fraudulent transfer of funds amounting to Rs. 1,96,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Ninety-Six Lakhs only). This incident occurred on April 15, 2026, and was detected on the same day, stemming from cyber fraud through WhatsApp impersonation. Syschem India Ltd has promptly lodged a formal complaint with cybercrime authorities and is reviewing its internal controls to prevent recurrence. The company is also exploring recovery options and legal remedies. While the financial impact is estimated at Rs. 1.96 Cr, the management believes this incident will not materially impact the company's operations. Further updates will be provided to the stock exchange as developments occur.

announcements.subject: Quadrant Future Tek Ltd - 544336 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of order from PLW for installation of KAVACH 4.0
announcements.ai_summary: Quadrant Future Tek Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Patiala Locomotive Works (PLW) for the supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of Onboard KAVACH Loco Equipment Ver- 4.0 with warranty. The contract value is Rs. 20,19,27,500/- (Rupees Twenty Crores Nineteen Lakhs Twenty-Seven Thousand Five Hundred Only), inclusive of taxes. This is an EPC contract with a domestic entity, and the company announced this significant order on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd - 516072 - Intimation On Maintenance Shutdown Of Company'S Visakhapatnam Parwada Plant.
announcements.detail: Intimation on Maintenance Shutdown of Company''s Visakhapatnam Parwada plant is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Vishnu Chemicals Limited has announced a temporary shutdown of its Visakhapatnam Parwada plant for routine maintenance activities. The shutdown is scheduled to commence on April 15, 2026, and is expected to last for approximately three weeks. This maintenance is part of the company's ongoing efforts to ensure optimal plant performance and improve operational efficiency. Vishnu Chemicals Limited will inform the stock exchanges once the plant resumes its operations.

announcements.subject: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd - 517334 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchange a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has disclosed a penalty imposed by the State of California Franchise Tax Board (SCFTB) on its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, Motherson SAS Automotive Services USA Inc. The penalty of $28,518 USD, equivalent to approximately INR 26,62,742, relates to the income and tax computation return for the year ended March 31, 2025. This arose from the classification of certain sales as foreign, impacting the calculation of eligible tax for Motherson SAS. The company states there is no material impact on the financial or operational activities of either Motherson SAS or Samvardhana Motherson International Limited. The disclosure was made on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Suraj Estate Developers Ltd - 544054 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release for Acquisition of Land
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Suraj Estate Developers Limited has acquired a piece of land in Dadar (West), Mumbai, for an acquisition cost of ₹8.53 crore plus an additional area of 2,200 sq ft to be handed over to the landowners, resulting in a total acquisition cost of approximately ₹18.00 crore. This plot is situated in a micro-market with strong demand fundamentals and excellent connectivity. Suraj Estate Developers plans to redevelop the land to create a project with a saleable carpet area of approximately 0.18 lakh sq ft and an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of ₹100 crores. This acquisition is expected to strengthen the company's project pipeline and consolidate its presence in South-Central Mumbai. The company is actively evaluating additional strategic acquisition opportunities.

announcements.subject: Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd - 543732 - Announcement Regarding Frauds In Subsidiary By A Former Employee Of Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Announcement regarding fraud in subsidiary by a former employee of subsidiary company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd has disclosed an incident of fraud within its subsidiary, Aceware Fintech Services Private Limited (RadiantAcemoney), perpetrated by a former employee. The fraud involved unauthorized and fraudulent activities through the misuse of residual system access credentials, leading to an estimated financial exposure of approximately ₹3.13 crore at the subsidiary level. The incident, which occurred between July 2025 and February 2026, was confined to a limited number of Business Correspondent (BC) Agent accounts. The investigation, including a forensic audit, confirmed no involvement of existing employees. RadiantAcemoney has taken immediate containment measures, including suspending affected functionalities and filing complaints with law enforcement. The Audit Committee of RadiantAcemoney and the Company reviewed the investigation reports on April 15, 2026. The consolidated financial impact on Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd is not considered material.

announcements.subject: Allcargo Terminals Ltd - 543954 - Allca
announcements.detail: Monthly business update for the month of March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Allcargo Terminals Ltd released its monthly business update for March 2026 on April 15, 2026. The company reported total volumes of 58.6 '000 TEUs for March 2026, which represents a 2% increase compared to February 2026 and a 4% increase compared to March 2025. This information is provided in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has undergone a limited review by the management. The update also notes that the ICD is a joint venture with CONCOR. The information will be available on the company's website at www.allcargoterminals.com.

announcements.subject: BLS International Services Ltd - 540073 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in RTA
announcements.detail: Update on Change in Registrar and Share Transfer Agent ('RTA') of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: BLS International Services Ltd provided an update on April 15, 2026, regarding the change in its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA). Following the earlier intimation on February 06, 2026, about the transition from M/s. Beetal Financial and Computer Services Private Limited (BEETAL) to KFin Technologies Limited (KFIN), the company has confirmed that the electronic connectivity with both NSDL and CDSL has been successfully shifted to KFIN as of April 15, 2026. Letters from NSDL dated April 13, 2026, and CDSL dated April 15, 2026, confirm this change. A tripartite agreement among BLS International Services Ltd, BEETAL, and KFIN will be executed in due course and will be intimated to the stock exchanges. Stakeholders are advised to direct all future correspondence regarding the company's securities to KFin Technologies Limited.

announcements.subject: Lotus Chocolate Company Ltd - 523475 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For Financial Results For The Quarter / Financial Year Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Financial Results for the quarter / financial year ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Lotus Chocolate Company Ltd announced on April 15, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved the Audited Financial Statements for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. These results were recommended by the Audit Committee and have been audited by Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, Chartered Accountants, who have provided an unmodified opinion. The company is submitting these results in accordance with Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Board meeting commenced at 5:35 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 5:50 p.m. (IST).

announcements.subject: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd - 511644 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting pursuant to regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd announced on April 15, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 5,31,29,400 Equity Shares. These shares are being allotted pursuant to the conversion of 5,31,29,400 Fully Convertible Equity Warrants, which were originally issued on August 04, 2025, at an issue price of INR 103.50 per warrant. The allotment is a preferential allotment to individuals and entities belonging to the Non-Promoter category, including Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel (19,750,000 shares), Nayanaben Chandubhai Thakor (19,320,000 shares), and Doxtrec Trade Private Limited (12,535,000 shares). This allotment will increase the company's paid-up equity share capital from INR 2,59,12,490 to INR 7,90,41,890, with the total number of equity shares increasing from 2,59,12,490 to 7,90,41,890, each with a face value of INR 1.

announcements.subject: Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd - 512267 - Audited Financial Results Of The Company For The 4Th Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail:
In terms of Regulation 30 read with Part A of Schedule III of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations'), we would like to inform all our stakeholders that the Board of Directors, at its meeting held today i.e. April 15, 2026, has inter-alia, considered and approved the following:

Audited Financial Results of the Company for the 4th Quarter and Financial ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd, in their meeting held on April 15, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the 4th Quarter and the Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. These results, which include the Statement of Profit & Loss, Statement of Assets & Liabilities, and Statement of Cash Flow for the financial year 2025-26, have been prepared on both standalone and consolidated bases. The financial results were duly reviewed by the Audit Committee and audited by M/s SGN & CO., Chartered Accountants, the company's statutory auditors. The company has also made arrangements for the publication of these financial results in newspapers as required by SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Press Release-Update On Finacle CBS Migration
announcements.detail: Press Release-Update on Finacle CBS Migration
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Limited has successfully migrated its Core Banking System (CBS) to Finacle, a significant step in its digital transformation journey. This migration involved an investment of approximately ₹200 crore and establishes a scalable, modular, and future-ready technology platform designed to support the bank's next phase of growth, including its transition to a Small Finance Bank (SFB). The migration was completed within the anticipated timeline, despite a temporary moderation in business volumes during Q4 FY26 to ensure system stability and data integrity. The new Finacle CBS is expected to enhance performance, agility, transaction throughput, system resilience, and accelerate product launches.

announcements.subject: UFO Moviez India Ltd - 539141 - Press Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Press Release titled ''UFO MOVIEZ TIES UP WITH CHINA FILM GROUP PROMOTED "CINITY" A HOLLYWOOD APPROVED PREMIUM LARGE SCREEN FORMAT TO PROVIDE A LARGER-THAN-LIFE EXPERIENCE TO CINEGOERS IN INDIA''
announcements.ai_summary: UFO Moviez India Limited has announced an exclusive tie-up with China Film Group for their Hollywood-approved Premium Large Screen Format (PLF) called "CINITY," for the Indian market. This collaboration aims to provide a larger-than-life cinematic experience to cinegoers in India. CINITY integrates advanced cinema technologies such as 4K resolution, 3D, high brightness, high frame rate (HFR), high dynamic range (HDR), wide color gamut, and immersive sound. UFO Moviez believes this partnership will offer Indian exhibitors a platform to deliver premium large screen experiences that align with global industry standards, enhancing the quality of cinema viewing and drawing more audiences to theaters.

announcements.subject: Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd - 526263 - Utilization Of Proceeds Of Preferential Issue Of Equity Shares.
announcements.detail: Utilization of proceeds of Preferential Issue of Equity Shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Mold-Tek Technologies Limited has provided details on the utilization of proceeds from its preferential issue of equity shares, which aggregated to ₹4,75,60,000. The entire amount, representing 100% of the proceeds, will be utilized for capital expenditure towards the construction of the company's new branch office building at its Nashik location. The land for this project was acquired in 2023, and the construction is intended to establish a dedicated facility to support current business operations and future growth, as the Nashik branch currently operates from rented premises. The utilization of these funds for the construction project is expected to be completed within an estimated timeline of 15 to 18 months from the date of allotment.

announcements.subject: Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd - 539659 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015-Lapse Of 45,270 Fully Convertible Warrants Held By Non-Promoter Entity.
announcements.detail: Lapse of 45,270 fully convertible Warrants held by Non-Promoter entity
announcements.ai_summary: Vikram Kamats Hospitality Limited has announced the lapse of 45,270 fully convertible warrants held by a non-promoter entity, Nabs Vriddhii LLP. These warrants were part of an allotment of 19,12,163 warrants on October 16, 2024, at a price of ₹74 per warrant. The allottee failed to exercise the option to convert the warrants within the stipulated 18-month period. Consequently, the 45,270 warrants have lapsed, and the upfront subscription amount of ₹10,04,994, representing 30% of the issue price, has been forfeited. There is no change in the company's paid-up equity share capital as a result of this lapse.

announcements.subject: JK Tyre & Industries Ltd - 530007 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: The Directors at their meeting approved an Investment up to Rs. 1.31 Crore for acquiring 26% equity shares of Roofsol Renewables Five Pvt. Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: JK Tyre & Industries Ltd's Directors, in a meeting held on April 15, 2026, approved an investment of up to ₹1.31 Crore for acquiring a 26% equity stake in Roofsol Renewables Five Pvt. Ltd. This acquisition is intended to comply with regulatory requirements for captive power consumption under Indian Electricity laws, necessitating the acquisition and maintenance of a minimum 26% stake in Roofsol Renewables Five Pvt. Ltd throughout the term of the Power Purchase Agreement. The acquisition involves a cash consideration and is expected to be completed within 180 days, with no governmental or regulatory approvals required.

announcements.subject: Orient Tradelink Ltd - 531512 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
Please find enclosed herewith the disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations') regarding acquisition of Film Rights
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Tradelink Limited has entered into an agreement on January 14, 2026, to acquire the exclusive rights for the spiritual feature film titled “Children of God,” produced by Aum Sportainment Private Limited. The total consideration for this acquisition is ₹4 Crores, plus additional publicity and promotional expenditure to be incurred by Orient Tradelink Limited. The scope includes global marketing, distribution, promotion, and merchandising across theatrical, OTT, and digital platforms, with an expected release timeline in June 2026. This acquisition is expected to strengthen the company's presence in the spiritual and entertainment segment, generate increased revenue streams over the next 12-18 months, and positively impact profitability and shareholder value.

announcements.subject: Tarc Ltd - 543249 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Tarc Ltd has announced significant delivery milestones and expansion of its luxury real estate pipeline for FY2026. The company has commenced customer handovers for TARCTripundra, a development with a gross development value of ₹1,000 crore, and is now recognizing revenue from this project. Additionally, Tarc Kailasa has introduced its most premium tower inventory, with its total gross development value now standing at ₹4,400 crore, and has launched a new Experience Gallery and Sample Residence to drive sales. These achievements are underpinned by strong cash flows, supporting long-term value creation. The company is focused on expanding its luxury offerings and delivering on its development commitments.

announcements.subject: Paradeep Parivahan Ltd - 544383 - Non-Applicability Of Escrow Payment Mechanism.
announcements.detail: Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Paradeep Parivahan Limited has clarified on April 15, 2026, that the Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the company. This clarification is in response to an email received regarding the submission of details related to the Escrow Payment Mechanism. The company stated that it has not issued, nor does it have, any instruments or arrangements for which the said mechanism is applicable under the relevant SEBI Regulations, and therefore, no disclosure or submission is required in this respect.

announcements.subject: Barak Valley Cements Ltd - 532916 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: refer enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Barak Valley Cements Limited ("the Company") has acquired an additional 7,06,500 equity shares of its wholly-owned subsidiary, M/s Meghalaya Minerals and Mines Limited ("Target Company"), through a preferential allotment on April 15, 2026. This acquisition was made by converting an outstanding loan of ₹4,09,77,000/- into 7,06,500 fully paid-up equity shares, each with a face value of Rs 10/-, at a price of ₹58/- per share, which includes a premium of ₹48/- per share. The company clarifies that the delay in disclosing this information was purely procedural and has no impact on its financial position or shareholder value. The asset size of Meghalaya Minerals and Mines Limited was Rs 15,42,49,000/- and its turnover was Rs 4,68,55,000/- as of March 31, 2025.

announcements.subject: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd - 532734 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith intimation regarding Acquisition/Investment in Godawari New Energy Private Limited, a Wholly owned subsidiary of Godawari Power and Ispat Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited (GPIL) has made a further investment of ₹50.00 Crores in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Godawari New Energy Private Limited (GNEPL), on April 15, 2026. This investment was made through the allotment of 5,00,00,000 equity shares of ₹10/- each at par by GNEPL to GPIL. Consequently, GPIL's total investment in GNEPL has increased to ₹350.00 Crore, comprising 35,00,00,000 equity shares of ₹10/- each, representing 100% of GNEPL's paid-up capital. This investment is part of the previously approved further investment of up to ₹200 Crores for GNEPL's capex and working capital requirements for setting up a 20 Gwh Battery Energy Storage System Plant in its first phase.

announcements.subject: Purple Finance Ltd - 544191 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Please Find enclosed ISIN Statement for the Half Year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Purple Finance Limited has submitted its half-yearly report for the period ended March 31, 2026, concerning its listed Non-Convertible Securities. This submission is in compliance with Regulation 17 of SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021, and the SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/000000013 dated October 15, 2025. The report details two outstanding debt issuances: one with an amount issued and outstanding of ₹25 Crores, maturing on January 12, 2028, with a 12.25% coupon rate, and another with an amount issued and outstanding of ₹5 Crores, maturing on February 6, 2031, with a 12.50% coupon rate.

announcements.subject: John Cockerill India Ltd-$ - 500147 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: In compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regs, 2015, please find attached intimation with respect to receiving or order/contract.
announcements.ai_summary: John Cockerill India Limited announced on April 15, 2026, that it has received an order from JSW Steel Coated Products Limited. The order is for the Design, Manufacturing, Supply, and Supervision of Erection & Commissioning of a Continuous Galvanizing Line (CGL#3) at JSW Steel's Khopoli plant. The total value of this contract is approximately INR 300 crores. The execution of this order is expected to be completed by May 2028. This significant domestic order was awarded following the company's compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: IRB InvIT Fund - 540526 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: IRB Invit Fund has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: IRB InvIT Fund has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This filing is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and the SEBI Master Circular dated July 11, 2025. The report details the distribution of units among various categories, including Sponsor(s)/Investment Manager/Project Manager(s) and their associates, as well as Public Holding which encompasses institutions and non-institutions. The total units outstanding as of March 31, 2026, are 1,28,16,00,000. The company has provided this information for the record.

announcements.subject: Brigade Enterprises Ltd - 532929 - Material Information - 'Brigade Group Signs JDA For 8.63 Acres, Unlocking A 39 Acre Development In East Bengaluru
announcements.detail: Material Information - "Brigade Group Signs JDA for 8.63 Acres, Unlocking a 39 Acre Development in East Bengaluru
announcements.ai_summary: Brigade Enterprises Ltd has signed a Joint Development Agreement (JDA) for an 8.63-acre parcel of land in Gunjur, East Bengaluru. This agreement is a crucial step that enables the development of a larger, integrated 39-acre residential township in the Whitefield–Sarjapur corridor. The entire 39-acre development is projected to have an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of approximately ₹7,200 crore. This development is being undertaken through a combination of outright purchases and joint development agreements. The company is making this disclosure as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has also released a press release detailing this material information.

announcements.subject: Starlog Enterprises Ltd - 520155 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended ('Listing Regulations') - Update
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended ('Listing Regulations') - Update
announcements.ai_summary: Starlog Enterprises Ltd has received a significant update regarding an arbitration award concerning its material subsidiary, Starlift Services Private Limited. An arbitration award dated April 18, 2011, had initially granted Starlift approximately ₹9.02 crore plus interest against Syama Prasad Mookerjee Port, Kolkata (KPT). Although KPT challenged this award, leading to its setting aside by the Hon'ble High Court at Calcutta on December 24, 2020, Starlift appealed this decision. On April 9, 2026, the Division Bench of the Hon'ble High Court at Calcutta set aside the earlier order, deeming it without jurisdiction, and has thereby restored the original arbitration award in favor of Starlift. The company is continuing to evaluate the matter and will take appropriate legal steps.

announcements.subject: Aelea Commodities Ltd - 544213 - Achievement Of The Fairdeal Filaments Award For Outstanding Entrepreneurship In The MSME Segment For 2024-2025
announcements.detail: Intimation under Reg.30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Achievement of Fairdeal Filament Award for Outstanding Entrepreneurship in the MSME Segment for 2024-2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Aelea Commodities Limited has been honored with the Fairdeal Filaments Award for Outstanding Entrepreneurship in the MSME Segment for the fiscal year 2024-2025. This recognition was bestowed by The Southern Gujarat Chamber of Commerce & Industry (SGCCI). The company is formally informing the stock exchange about this achievement as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This award highlights the company's significant contributions and entrepreneurial spirit within the Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises sector.

announcements.subject:
Satin Creditcare Network Ltd - 539404 - Board Meeting Intimation for Working Committee Meeting, Inter-Alia, To Consider And Approve Fund Raising Proposal By Way Of Issuance Of Listed,
Secured/Unsecured, Non-Convertible Debentures On Private Placement Basis
announcements.detail: Satin Creditcare Network Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 20/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve fund raising proposal by way of issuance of listed, secured/unsecured, non-convertible debentures on private placement basis
announcements.ai_summary: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd will hold a Working Committee meeting of its Board of Directors on April 20, 2026. The primary agenda item is to consider and approve a proposal for raising funds. This fund-raising will be conducted through the issuance of listed, secured or unsecured, non-convertible debentures on a private placement basis. The company is adhering to SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, for this announcement. Further details regarding the terms and conditions of the proposed debenture issuance are expected to be disclosed following the board meeting.

announcements.subject: Rubicon Research Ltd - 544578 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Rubicon Research Ltd has announced the acquisition of an 85% equity ownership in Arinna Lifesciences Limited from its current shareholders. This acquisition marks Rubicon's entry into the Indian Central Nervous System (CNS) formulations market. Arinna Lifesciences possesses a portfolio of over 60 brands in chronic therapies and an established distribution network across India. This move aligns with Rubicon's strategy to leverage its intellectual property and chronic products to drive growth in key markets, particularly in the CNS therapeutic category. The acquisition is expected to provide Rubicon with access to patients and prescribers in India for its specialized offerings.

announcements.subject: Vega Jewellers Ltd - 512026 - Receipt Of BSE In-Principle Approval For Bonus Issue
announcements.detail: BSE In principle Approval for Bonus Issue
announcements.ai_summary: Vega Jewellers Ltd has received in-principle approval from BSE Limited for its proposed Bonus Issue. The approval, dated April 15, 2026, grants permission for the issue and allotment of 4,07,05,192 equity shares of Re.10/- each as bonus shares. This will be in the ratio of 4:1, meaning shareholders will receive four new equity shares for every one existing equity share held. This follows the company's earlier intimation on March 5, 2026, regarding the bonus issue proposal.

announcements.subject: Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd - 533047 - Update
announcements.detail: As per corporate announcement attached
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd (IMFA) has provided an update on its ongoing projects. The 100,000 tpa (2 x 33 MVA) Greenfield Ferro Chrome Project in Kalinganagar is in its final construction stages, with pre-commissioning for the first furnace scheduled for June 2026 and the second furnace in September 2026. The strategic acquisition in Kalinganagar is complete, and all four furnaces are now operational. The Ethanol Project in Therubali is experiencing a delay in commissioning, now expected in July 2026, due to equipment delivery slippage and geopolitical impacts, though this is not expected to materially affect the company's financials.

announcements.subject: Samhi Hotels Ltd - 543984 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: A copy of Press Release on signing of Agreement with INGKA Centres for leasing ~162 rooms upscale hotel in Noida, Uttar Pradesh is enclosed for your kind information.
announcements.ai_summary: Samhi Hotels Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary SAMHI Skyline Private Limited, has signed an agreement with INGKA Centres India Private Limited, part of the Ingka Group, for leasing an upscale ~162-room hotel. This hotel will be part of Ingka Centres’ upcoming ~2.5 million sq. ft. mixed-use development in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. The agreement was signed on April 15, 2026. The project will be executed under Samhi Hotels' long-term variable lease model, with Ingka Centres leasing the building and Samhi Hotels investing in interior fit-outs. This partnership aims to create a modern retail-led destination combining shopping, leisure, and community experiences.

announcements.subject: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Ltd - 544476 - Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed The Exchange About Receipt Of NABH Accreditation For Noida Hospital.
announcements.detail: Receipt of NABH Accreditation for Noida Hospital.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has received NABH Accreditation for its Noida Hospital, located at Plot No. 24, Block SB, Sector 117, Noida, Uttar Pradesh. The accreditation, specifically for Panchakarma services, has the certification number AH-2026-0451 and is valid until March 09, 2029. This accreditation signifies the hospital's adherence to national standards for quality healthcare, patient safety, and operational excellence. The company stated that this development is in the ordinary course of business and does not constitute business expansion, capacity enhancement, or acquisition.

announcements.subject: GMR Airports Ltd - 532754 - Monthly Traffic Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly Traffic Updates
announcements.ai_summary: GMR Airports Limited has released its monthly traffic data for March 2026, along with updates for Q4 FY2026 and FY2026. In Q4 FY26, GMR Airports served approximately 32 million passengers, marking a 0.9% year-on-year growth. Domestic traffic grew by 1.6% to 24.1 million, while international traffic saw a 1.3% decrease to 7.7 million. For the full FY26, the company handled over 121 million passengers, the highest ever, with record domestic (92 million) and international (30 million) passenger numbers. Delhi, Hyderabad, and Goa airports also set records for passenger and ATM handling, with Delhi and Hyderabad achieving record cargo volumes. The company noted that traffic was impacted by geopolitical events and runway upgrades at Delhi Airport.

announcements.subject: Triveni Turbine Ltd - 533655 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations - Merger between two step-down wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Triveni Turbine Limited has announced a merger between two of its step-down wholly owned subsidiaries, TSE Engineering (Pty) Ltd and Triveni Turbines Africa (Pty) Ltd (TTAPL). The Companies and Intellectual Property Commission, South Africa, approved this merger on April 14, 2026, with the effective date of April 01, 2026. Following the merger, TSE Engineering (Pty) Ltd has been dissolved and is no longer a subsidiary of Triveni Turbine Limited. The merger was executed as per a merger agreement between the two entities.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of 3 New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 3 new Branches on April 15,2026 and as on date the Bank has 959 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd has opened 3 new branches on April 15, 2026. This expansion brings the bank's total branch count to 959. The new branches are located in Barmer, Rajasthan; Zirakpur, Punjab; and Lucknow - Mahanagar, Uttar Pradesh. This move is in line with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations 2015.

announcements.company: Shree Krishna Paper Mills & Industries Ltd
announcements.subject: Shree Krishna Paper Mills & Industries Ltd - 500388 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Meeting of Board of Directors of the Company was held today whereby the Company has entered into a Power Purchase Agreement dated 15 April, 2026 with M/S Ratan Green Projects One Private limited ("RGPOPL") as per details in enclosed intimation.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shree Krishna Paper Mills & Industries Ltd announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 15, 2026, entered into a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) dated April 15, 2026, with M/S Ratan Green Projects One Private Limited (RGPOPL). Under this PPA, RGPOPL will supply solar power to Shree Krishna Paper Mills & Industries Ltd as a captive user. The company is also in the process of entering into a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement to subscribe to 26.5% of the Equity Share capital of RGPOPL. RGPOPL, incorporated on December 11, 2025, is setting up an 8.5 MW AC / 12 MWp DC Solar and 1.3 MWh BESS power project in Rajasthan to supply power to captive users. This move is part of the company's strategy to secure solar power.

announcements.subject: Varun Beverages Ltd - 540180 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligation And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Update
announcements.detail: Varun Beverages Limited has acquired 29.99% of Equity Share Capital of FPEL HR2 Energy Private limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Varun Beverages Limited has acquired 29.99% of the Equity Share Capital of FPEL HR2 Energy Private Limited for Rs. 1.58 Crore. This acquisition, which took place on April 15, 2026, is an update to a previous intimation dated February 3, 2026. FPEL HR2 Energy Private Limited is a special purpose vehicle engaged in generating and supplying solar power to consumers in Haryana. The purpose of this acquisition is to obtain solar power for captive consumption by Varun Beverages Limited. The detailed disclosure requirements under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, were already submitted in the previous intimation.

announcements.subject: JK Cement Ltd - 532644 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Investment made in Mehrauni Electro Power Private Limited by subscribing 21,00,000 Equity shares of Rs.10 each
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: J. K. Cement Limited has invested in Mehrauni Electro Power Private Limited by subscribing to 21,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each. This subscription amounts to Rs. 2,10,00,000 (Rupees Two Crore Ten Lakh only) and represents 9.77% of the equity share capital of Mehrauni Electro Power Private Limited. The investment was made pursuant to a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement executed on April 15, 2026. Mehrauni Electro Power Private Limited is involved in the renewable energy sector, focusing on setting up, generating, and distributing power from renewable power plants in India. This acquisition aligns with J. K. Cement Limited's long-term renewable energy strategy. The transaction is at arm's length and does not involve related parties.

announcements.subject: Indiqube Spaces Ltd - 544454 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Indiqube Signs Rs. 52 Crore Workspace Deal with Japanese E-Commerce Giant in Bangalore
announcements.ai_summary: IndiQube Spaces Limited has announced the signing of a workspace deal worth ₹52 crore with a leading Japanese e-commerce giant. The deal is for approximately 35,000 sq. ft. of space located on the Outer Ring Road in Bengaluru, with a tenure of five years. This agreement is expected to support the client's India operations by providing a fully managed, enterprise-grade workplace. The transaction highlights the increasing adoption of managed workspaces by enterprises for faster expansion and operational flexibility. Bengaluru, particularly the Outer Ring Road, is identified as a strategic hub for global companies due to its talent pool and business infrastructure. The workplace solution is designed to be operationally seamless and tailored to the client's brand.

announcements.subject: Samhi Hotels Ltd - 543984 - Signing Of An Agreement To Lease/ Sub-Lease For A Proposed ~162 Rooms Up-Scale Hotel To Be Constructed As Part Of A Mixed-Use Development In Noida, Uttar Pradesh
announcements.detail: SAMHI Skyline Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company has on 15th April 2026 executed an agreement with INGKA Centres India Private Limited ("Lessor") for a long term lease in respect of ~162 rooms Upscale hotel to be developed as a part of mixed use development in Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh. The required information as per SEBI Listing Regulations is provided in enclosed disclosure.
announcements.ai_summary: SAMHI Skyline Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of SAMHI Hotels Limited, has executed a long-term lease/sub-lease agreement with INGKA Centres India Private Limited on April 15, 2026. The agreement is for a proposed upscale hotel with approximately 162 rooms, to be constructed as part of a mixed-use development in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. The estimated built-up area for the hotel is 15,022 square meters. SAMHI Skyline will take possession for hotel fit-outs and branding after the Lessor completes their scope of work. The hotel will operate under an international brand to be determined later. This agreement is part of SAMHI's capital-efficient growth strategy and aims to expand its presence in key markets.

announcements.subject: Retaggio Industries Ltd - 544391 - Board Meeting Outcome for Meeting Held Today 15Th April, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find the attached outcome of the board meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Retaggio Industries Ltd held a meeting on April 15, 2026, where they approved several key matters. Firstly, the board approved a revision in the remuneration of Mr. Savinay Lodha, the Managing Director, subject to shareholder approval. Secondly, the company approved the incorporation of a subsidiary named "Lodha Heritage Private Limited" or any other name approved by the Registrar of Companies. This subsidiary will have an authorized capital of Rs. 10,00,000 divided into 1,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each, and a paid-up capital of Rs. 10,00,000. The board also approved the draft postal ballot notice for the revision in Mr. Savinay Lodha's remuneration. The meeting commenced at 4:00 p.m. and concluded at 4:30 p.m.

announcements.subject: Adani Enterprises Ltd - 512599 - Intimation For Allotment Of Equity Shares Pursuant To The Composite Scheme Of Amalgamation
announcements.detail: Intimation for allotment of equity shares pursuant to Composite Scheme of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd's Management Committee of the Board of Directors met on April 15, 2026, and approved the allotment of 90,11,048 equity shares of face value Re. 1 each, fully paid up. These shares are being allotted to eligible shareholders of Adani Emerging Business Private Limited as per the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation, which was approved by the National Company Law Tribunal on March 16, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up share capital has increased from 1,29,26,82,416 equity shares to 1,30,16,93,464 equity shares of Re. 1 each. The newly allotted shares will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares. The committee meeting took place from 4:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.

announcements.subject: Nahar Industrial Enterprises Ltd-$ - 519136 - DEMATERIALISATION OF SHARES ISIN: INE289A01011
announcements.detail: DEMATERIALISATION OF SHARES ISIN: INE289A01011
announcements.ai_summary: The company has reported the dematerialisation of 550 equity shares in NSDL and 200 equity shares in CDSL during the period from January 2026 to March 2026. As of December 31, 2025, a total of 43,089,722 equity shares of the company had been dematerialised. This update is in accordance with the SEBI (Depository & Participant) Regulations, 2018. No further actions or approvals are pending regarding this dematerialisation process.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - 7-Time Grand Slam Champion Carlos Alcaraz Is Infosys Global Brand Ambassador
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Limited has announced a multi-year partnership with Carlos Alcaraz, the youngest athlete to achieve the World No. 1 ranking in men's tennis, appointing him as its Global Brand Ambassador. This collaboration aims to leverage Alcaraz's champion mindset, relentless drive, and pursuit of excellence, aligning with Infosys' values of responsible leadership and innovation. Infosys will work with Alcaraz and his coaching team to develop an AI-powered match analytics and personalized performance application using Infosys Topaz. The partnership also includes joint initiatives with the Carlos Alcaraz Foundation to drive social impact through tech-for-good initiatives.

announcements.subject: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd - 524804 - Expanding Existing CMO Operations With Merck Sharpe & Dohme Singapore Trading Pte. Ltd  By Theranym Biologics Private Limited, A Subsidiary Of The Company .
announcements.detail: Intimation of addition of  additional  product schedule  to the existing CMO agreement entered in to with  Merck Sharpe & Dohme Singapore Trading Pte (MSD) by TheraNym Biologics Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: TheraNym Biologics Private Limited, a subsidiary of Aurobindo Pharma Ltd, has executed an additional product schedule with Merck Sharp & Dohme Singapore Trading Pte. Ltd. (MSD). This expands their existing Contract Manufacturing Organization (CMO) agreement, which was initially disclosed in May 2024. Under this new schedule, TheraNym Biologics will construct a greenfield project for a large-scale mammalian Drug Substance manufacturing facility, referred to as "Unit 2," with a total capacity of 60 KL bioreactors. This development further strengthens the CMO relationship between the two entities.

announcements.subject: Goodyear India Ltd - 500168 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Goodyear India Limited has announced the launch of two new tyre products: the Eagle F1 Asymmetric 6 and the Eagle F1 Asymmetric 6 SUV. These products were launched on April 15, 2026, and cater to the domestic market in India. The newly launched tyres will be manufactured by Goodyear South Asia Tyres Pvt Ltd. in Aurangabad and sold by Goodyear India Limited in the replacement market. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Baazar Style Retail Ltd - 544243 - Intimation Regarding Settlement Of Insurance Claim
announcements.detail: Pursuant to the Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform that the insurance claim in respect of inventory loss has been settled, the details of which is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Baazar Style Retail Limited has announced the settlement of an insurance claim related to inventory loss due to a fire incident that occurred on May 20, 2024, at their erstwhile central warehouse in Hooghly, West Bengal. The company had initially recognized a receivable of ₹43.65 Crores against inventory loss valued at ₹50.85 Crores. Bajaj Allianz General Insurance Co. Limited has settled the claim for an aggregate amount of ₹23.00 Crores under Policy No. OG-24-2495-4008-00000005. The company has accepted this settlement, and the amount will be received in due course.

announcements.subject: Shriram Finance Ltd - 511218 - Update With Respect To Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Shriram Overseas Investments Limited, wholly owned subsidiary  of the Company has received today i.e. April 15, 2026 an in-principle approval to commence Primary Dealer (PD) business from Reserve Bank of India, subject to compliance with the conditions specified therein
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Finance Ltd has announced an update regarding its wholly-owned subsidiary, Shriram Overseas Investments Limited. On April 15, 2026, Shriram Overseas Investments Limited received an in-principle approval from the Reserve Bank of India to commence Primary Dealer (PD) business. This approval is subject to the subsidiary complying with the conditions specified by the RBI. This development is a significant step for the subsidiary in expanding its financial services offerings.

announcements.subject: SPEL Semiconductor Ltd - 517166 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 15.04.2026 For Considering Unaudited Financial Results For The Quarter Ended 31St Dec 2025
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on 15.04.2026 for considering unaudited Financial results for the Quarter ended 31st Dec 2025
announcements.ai_summary: SPEL Semiconductor Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 15, 2026, and approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, along with the Limited Review Report from the Statutory Auditors. Additionally, the Board approved the sale of 3.8 acres of land to mobilize funds and improve liquidity. The meeting commenced at 10 am and concluded at 2:50 pm. These decisions are in line with the company's strategy to enhance its financial position.

announcements.subject: A-1 Ltd - 542012 - Clarification W.R.T Regulation 30 Of The SEBI(LODR) Regulations,2015 -A-1 Limited_BSE Email Dated 13.04.2024
announcements.detail: Clarification w.r.t Regulation 30 of the SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015- A-1 Limited_BSE email dated 13.04.2024
announcements.ai_summary: A-1 Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a false rumor circulating on the Telegram channel 'Chase Alpha-SEBI REG' that the company acquired a 20% stake in Yashvi Lifesciences. A-1 Ltd categorically states that this information is false, baseless, and fabricated. The company has not acquired any stake in Yashvi Lifesciences, nor is there any such proposal under consideration by its Board of Directors. A-1 Ltd also clarifies that it has no affiliation with the mentioned Telegram channel or its operators. The company is evaluating legal action against those spreading the misinformation and reiterates its commitment to transparency and compliance with SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Bharat Global Developers Ltd - 521238 - Submission Of Revised Financial Results For The Quarter And Nine Months Ended On 31St December, 2025
announcements.detail: Submission of revised financial results for 31.12.2025
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Global Developers Ltd has submitted revised unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. This revision was made in response to discrepancies identified in the previously submitted PDF file, which was not in the required IND-AS format. The company is also separately submitting the Earnings Per Equity Share figures in XBRL format as per the relevant stock exchange circulars. The revised results provide updated financial performance data for the specified periods.

announcements.subject: Shraddha Prime Projects Ltd - 531771 - Intimation Under Reg. 30 For Receiving CC For New Project Shraddha Paradise Enclave
announcements.detail: Intimation under Reg. 30 for receiving CC for New Project Shraddha Paradise Enclave
announcements.ai_summary: Shraddha Prime Projects Ltd has received the Commencement Certificate (CC) for its new project, "Shraddha Paradise Enclave," located in Mulund West, Mumbai. This project, which involves the redevelopment of Himgiri CHS, will have a RERA carpet area of approximately 1,30,000 Sq. Ft. for residential units and 20,000 Sq. Ft. for commercial units. The company anticipates this project will generate revenue of approximately Rs. 420 Crores over the next three years. This development signifies a strategic expansion for Shraddha Prime Projects Ltd in the Mumbai real estate market, focusing on residential and redevelopment opportunities. The company aims to strengthen its presence in key suburban areas.

announcements.subject: Anantam Highways Trust - 544579 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Anantam Highways Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Anantam Highways Trust has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trust) Regulations, 2014. The report details the unit holdings across various categories, including Sponsor(s), Investment Manager, and Public Holding. Notably, the Sponsor(s) / Investment Manager / Project Manager(s) and their associates/related parties hold a total of 8,16,49,861 units, representing 37.54% of the total units. Within the Public Holding category, Institutions hold 50,72,436 units (2.33%) as Mutual Funds and 85,49,527 units (3.93%) as Insurance Companies. Foreign Portfolio Investors hold 1,20,000 units (0.06%). The complete unitholding pattern is also available on the Trust's website.

announcements.subject: JHS Svendgaard Laboratories Ltd - 532771 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in RTA
announcements.detail: Update on the change of Registrar and Transfer Agent(RTA)
announcements.ai_summary: JHS Svendgaard Laboratories Ltd has announced an update regarding the change of its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA). The company will transition from Alankit Assignments Limited to Beetal Financial and Computer Services (P) Ltd. This change is intended to further strengthen the company's investor services function. A tripartite agreement between JHS Svendgaard Laboratories Ltd, the outgoing RTA (Alankit Assignments Limited), and the incoming RTA (Beetal Financial and Computer Services Private Ltd) is currently being processed and is expected to be completed in due course. The effective date of this change will be communicated to the stock exchanges once the definitive agreements are finalized and executed under the applicable statutes.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Specifications related to ISIN of private placement of debt securities outstanding as on 31st March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Corp Limited has provided details regarding its privately placed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) outstanding as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The company has two outstanding NCD issuances with ISIN INE191B08020, both issued on July 9, 2021, and maturing on July 9, 2036. These NCDs carry a coupon rate of 7.90% and have an annual payment frequency. The first issuance had an amount of Rs. 1,00,00,00,000, with an outstanding amount of Rs. 20,00,00,000 as of March 31, 2026. The second issuance also had an amount of Rs. 20,00,00,000, with an outstanding amount of Rs. 20,00,00,000 as of the same date. This information was submitted on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Shelter Pharma Ltd - 543963 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Hired Senior Management Personnel In Line With Business Expansion Plans
announcements.detail: Intimation Under Regulation 30 Hired Senior Management Personnel In Line with Business Expansion Plans
announcements.ai_summary: Shelter Pharma Limited has strategically strengthened its sales and export organizational structure through key appointments to align with its business expansion plans. Mr. Javed has been appointed as the Zonal Sales Manager (ZSM) for the Veterinary Division, responsible for overseeing a defined zone, managing Regional Sales Managers (RSMs), and driving sales performance. Mr. Ashok Chauhan has been appointed as the Regional Sales Manager (RSM) for Uttarakhand and Western Uttar Pradesh, tasked with managing regional sales operations and leading field teams. Additionally, the company has appointed Sales Officers, including Mr. Paresh Jalondhare in Surat, Gujarat; Mr. Anil Jangir in Sikar, Rajasthan; and Mr. Ranveer Jhajharia in Hanumangarh, Rajasthan. Mr. Saumil Ghaghada has been appointed as an Export Executive at the Head Office to enhance export operations and support international business development. These appointments are expected to improve sales efficiency, deepen market penetration, and expand the company's presence in domestic and international markets. This intimation was made on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Antony Waste Handling Cell Ltd - 543254 - Business Update - Q4 & FY26
announcements.detail: Please find attached Business Update for Q4 & FY26 .
announcements.ai_summary: Antony Waste Handling Cell Ltd reported a healthy operational performance for Q4 and the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, with significant volume expansions in waste management. The company's core revenue grew by 13% in both periods, demonstrating resilient demand and operational efficiencies. In FY26, Antony Waste celebrated 25 years of operations since 2001, highlighting its role as a leader in sustainable waste management in India. For Q4 FY26, Collection and Transportation (C&T) tonnage grew approximately 6% year-over-year to about 0.52 million tonnes. Processing tonnage saw a substantial increase of approximately 32% to about 1.15 million tonnes, attributed to enhanced capacity utilization. The total Municipal Solid Waste (MSW) handled rose by approximately 23% to about 1.67 million tonnes, reflecting increased throughput across the value chain. This business update was provided on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: AVI Polymers Ltd - 539288 - Revised Intimation Under Requlation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Requlations, 2015 - Launch Of 'Krishibuddy' Agritech Platform By Wholly-Owned Subsidiary, AVI Eco Spark Private Limited.
announcements.detail: Revised Intimation under regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) regulations, 2015- Launch of ''"KrishiBuddy"'' Agritech Platform by Wholly-Owned Subsidiary, AVI Eco Spark Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: AVI Polymers Ltd has submitted a revised intimation regarding the launch of the 'KrishiBuddy' Agritech Platform by its wholly-owned subsidiary, AVI Eco Spark Private Limited. The platform is now live and accessible to the public at https://krishibuddy.tech/. This launch signifies AVI Polymers Ltd's strategic move into high-growth technological sectors, particularly in artificial intelligence and IoT for Indian agriculture. KrishiBuddy is an AI-powered smart farming assistant designed for Indian smallholder farmers, aiming to capture a significant share of the $9 billion agritech market. The platform features a multimodal, multilingual AI with a conversational interface that supports voice, text, and image inputs in regional languages.

announcements.subject: Globe Civil Projects Ltd - 544424 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) 2015, please find attached the business update for FY 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Globe Civil Projects Ltd has provided a Business Update for FY 2026, highlighting a strong order book of ₹730 Crore as of March 2026. The company operates in 11+ states with over 37 completed projects and 13-15 ongoing projects. Approximately 55% of its pending order book is from government exposure. Key order wins in FY26 include projects for Central University of Punjab (₹173 Crore), an International Cricket Stadium (₹222 Crore), IIT Kanpur (₹71 Crore), and NIT Delhi (₹13 Crore). The company expects continued growth driven by the execution of its existing order book and participation in government infrastructure projects, with margins expected to remain stable due to disciplined bidding and efficient execution.

announcements.subject: Nilachal Refractories Ltd - 502294 - Corrigendum to the Draft Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Corrigendum to the Draft Letter of Offer dated March 27, 2026 for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Narnolia Financial Services Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Corrigendum to the Draft Letter of Offer for Nilachal Refractories Ltd to BSE. This corrigendum is for the attention of the Equity Shareholders of Nilachal Refractories Ltd. The submission confirms that the advertisement has been duly published in all newspapers where the Detailed Public Statement was originally published, in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. Investors should review the corrected offer document for any updated terms or details related to the offer. The filing is for record purposes by the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Umiya Mobile Ltd - 544464 - Announcement For Opened A New Retail Stores.
announcements.detail:
We have attached herewith announcement as per Reg. 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.

Kindly take the same on your record.

Thank you.
announcements.ai_summary: Umiya Mobile Limited has announced the opening of five new retail stores on April 15, 2026. Two stores have been opened in Gujarat, specifically in Sutrapada. The remaining three stores are located in Maharashtra, in the cities of Beed, Amravati, Hingoli, and Ahilyanagar. This expansion is in line with the company's earlier announcement dated February 19, 2026, and is being reported under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd - 540975 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Strikes /Lockouts / Disturbances
announcements.detail: Update in relation to Nurse  Strike at Hospital in Kerala
announcements.ai_summary: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd has provided an update regarding the nurse strike at its hospitals in Kerala. The company has been actively engaging with the United Nurses Association to resolve wage structure demands. While the Hon’ble High Court has extended the deferral of the strike until May 31, 2026, proceedings are ongoing for a final settlement. Importantly, the entire nursing staff across Aster hospitals in Kerala has resumed work, and operations have returned to full capacity. The company incurred an additional revenue loss of INR 5,77,60,948 due to the strike, but no further losses are expected if the current status quo is maintained until settlement terms are agreed upon.

announcements.subject: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd - 532540 - Press Release - TCS And University Of Cincinnati Announce ''My First AI Job'' Program To Prepare Students For Entry-Level AI Careers
announcements.detail: Press Release - TCS and University of Cincinnati Announce ''My First AI Job'' Program to Prepare Students for Entry-Level AI Careers
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has partnered with the University of Cincinnati and Salesforce to launch the "TCS My First AI Job" program. This initiative aims to equip final-year students with essential AI skills through an intensive three-month curriculum. The program includes hands-on projects, mentorship, global certifications, and practice interviews to prepare students for entry-level AI roles at TCS. The goal is to build a future-ready workforce in the US and enhance the competitiveness of American companies. This program is being launched in Cincinnati, home to TCS's new North America Salesforce Center of Excellence.

announcements.subject: Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd - 543991 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we would like to inform you that Techknowgreen Solutions Limited ('TSL') has entered into a Teaming Up Agreement (TUA) dated April 14, 2026, with Sri Sri Naisargik LLP ('SSNL').

The agreement establishes a strategic collaboration between TSL and SSNL for the deployment, promotion, and execution of Yuka Yantra - Ambient Air Purification System ....
announcements.ai_summary: On April 15, 2026, Techknowgreen Solutions Limited (TSL) announced the execution of a Teaming Up Agreement (TUA) with Sri Sri Naisargik LLP (SSNL) on April 14, 2026. This agreement establishes a strategic collaboration for the deployment, promotion, and execution of the Yuka Yantra - Ambient Air Purification System and other environmental technologies. SSNL will serve as the Promotional Partner, focusing on stakeholder engagement and market outreach, while TSL will act as the Technology Partner, responsible for design, engineering, deployment, and monitoring. The agreement outlines a revenue-sharing mechanism and aims to enhance TSL's reach through SSNL's network for air pollution mitigation projects.

announcements.subject: Oxygenta Pharmaceutical Ltd - 524636 - Compliance As Per Regulation 74(5) Of SEBI (Depositories And Participants) Regulations, 2018 For The Quarter Ended 31St March, 2026
announcements.detail: Compliance as per Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the Quarter ended 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Oxygenta Pharmaceutical Ltd has submitted its compliance confirmation for Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company has furnished details of securities dematerialized during this period to all stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A letter dated April 3, 2026, from Venture Capital and Corporate Investments Private Limited (RTA) confirms that securities received for dematerialization have been duly processed, including mutilation and cancellation of share certificates, and the depositories' names have been updated as the registered owner.
