announcements.subject: Datamatics Global Services Ltd - 532528 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer attached  PDF File
announcements.ai_summary: Datamatics Global Services Ltd announced that its Automatic Fare Collection (AFC) and mobile ticketing systems have gone live for Phase 1 of Mumbai Metro Lines 2B and 9. This system facilitates faster entry-exit and auto fare deduction using QR coded tickets or common mobility cards. The inauguration of Phase 1 for these lines took place on April 8, 2026. Datamatics has previously implemented AFC solutions for Mumbai Metro Lines 2A and 7, and has a global track record of over 30 AFC projects in cities like London, New York, and Dubai, as well as in India for projects such as Delhi-Meerut RRTS and Pune Metro. The company's Vice Chairman and CEO, Rahul Kanodia, expressed pride in their continued association with Mumbai Metro, highlighting the positive impact on millions of Mumbaikars.

announcements.subject: Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd - 543895 - Business Update For The Half Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Business update is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd has provided a business update for the half-year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported strong performance in aviation, infrastructure development, and marquee events, maintaining leadership in India and eight international markets. Despite market volatility, Exhicon maintained a high-growth trajectory and strong cash flows with a lean balance sheet. The company is strategically pivoting towards large-scale infrastructure ownership and high-margin service diversification for its FY27 outlook. A significant development is the board meeting convened to consider migration to the Main Board of BSE & NSE, subject to approvals. Exhicon also emerged as the winning bidder for the Mohali Convention & Exhibition Centre project under a PPP model and completed Phase I of Exhibition Hall expansion at Expo Centre Greater Noida. Additionally, the company secured a helicopter shuttle contract for the Mandakini Valley to Shri Kedarnath Ji route.

announcements.subject: Scan Steels Ltd - 511672 - Non-Applicability Of Escrow Payment Mechanism
announcements.detail: Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Scan Steels Limited has clarified to the stock exchange that the Escrow Payment Mechanism is not applicable to the company. This is because Scan Steels Limited has not issued, nor does it currently have, any instruments or arrangements for which this mechanism is required under the relevant SEBI Regulations. Therefore, no disclosure or submission related to the Escrow Payment Mechanism is necessary for the company.

announcements.subject: Ramco Systems Ltd - 532370 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Korean Air goes live with Ramco Aviation" which is being released from our end.
announcements.ai_summary: Ramco Systems Limited has announced that Korean Air, South Korea's flag carrier, has successfully gone live with Ramco Aviation Suite. This implementation digitally transforms Korean Air's Engine Maintenance Center and establishes the technology foundation for its upcoming Maintenance Cluster, which is set to be Asia's Largest Engine MRO Hub. The Ramco Aviation Suite will streamline complex operations, enhance productivity, and support the expansion of Korean Air's engine maintenance capabilities. It facilitates seamless collaboration across Engine Maintenance, Finance, Customer Support, and Billing, and integrates with internal and external platforms, including Korean Air’s Automated Storage Retrieval System. Over 400 mechanics and engineers will now utilize Ramco’s mobile application for paperless performance maintenance execution.

announcements.subject: Megastar Foods Ltd - 541352 - Revised Disclosure Undrer Regulation 30 (2) Of SEBI LODR Regulations
announcements.detail: Revised disclosure under Regulation 30 (2) of SEBI LODR Regulations read with Clause 20 of Part A of Para A of Schedule III of LODR, in continuation of the original disclosure dated 14.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Megastar Foods Limited has issued a revised disclosure under Regulation 30(2) of SEBI LODR Regulations, correcting an unintentional error in a previous disclosure dated April 14, 2026. The original disclosure pertained to a notice received from the Market Committee, Rupnagar, regarding alleged non-payment of Market Committee Fee and RDF Fee. The revised disclosure clarifies that the total amount of Market Committee Fee and RDF Fee raised in the notice was Rs. 36,68,59,110/-, not Rs. 36,568,59,110/- as initially stated. The notice was dated April 9, 2026, and received by the company on April 13, 2026, with the initial disclosure filed within the prescribed timeframe.

announcements.company: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd
announcements.subject: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd - 500093 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd has announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Axiro Semiconductor Private Limited, has joined EdgeCortix as an investor and partner. This announcement, made on April 15, 2026, highlights EdgeCortix's new investment round to advance next-generation edge AI platforms. Axiro Semiconductor, headquartered in India, brings expertise in RF, mmWave, and advanced connectivity IC design for next-generation wireless systems. Axiro's CEO, Dr. Naveen Yanduru, stated that this investment aligns with Axiro's focus on advancing semiconductor and connectivity technologies, particularly in areas like AI-driven infrastructure and industrial systems. The partnership aims to leverage EdgeCortix's low-power, high-performance AI capabilities.

announcements.subject: Sharp India Ltd - 523449 - Public Announcement - Open Offer
announcements.detail: Navigant Corporate Advisors Ltd. ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Public Announcement under Regulation 3(1), Regulation 4 read with Regulation 13 and Regulation 14 and Regulation 15(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for the attention of the equity shareholders of Sharp India Ltd (Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Shanti Gold International Limited has announced its operational update for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, the company reported a 25% year-on-year (YoY) volume growth and over 120% YoY revenue growth, driven by strong demand and higher gold prices. For the full year FY26, gold volumes grew by 15% YoY, and revenues increased by over 80% YoY. The company highlighted that Q4 FY26 was its strongest quarterly performance to date. Shanti Gold International Limited has also expanded its client network by onboarding new clients, particularly in the northern region, and strengthening relationships with existing customers across India. The company emphasizes its design capabilities and ability to offer a comprehensive one-stop solution for organized retail chains.

announcements.subject: Chalet Hotels Ltd - 542399 - Disclosure On Outcome Of Litigation/Dispute
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations and letter dated August 14, 2023, this is to inform you that the Karnataka High Court has dismissed the Writ Petition filed by the Company as per the enclosed letter
announcements.ai_summary: The Karnataka High Court has dismissed the Writ Petition filed by Chalet Hotels Limited challenging the revision in Property Tax rates for its Bengaluru Marriott Hotel Whitefield. The court stated that the revision factors in escalation as per law. Consequently, the company will now pay the disputed Property Tax amount, which is approximately Rs. 8.88 crore. Chalet Hotels Limited has confirmed that this outcome does not impact its business operations or financials. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited of this development.

announcements.subject: Hampton Sky Realty Ltd - 526407 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 - Signing Of Memorandum Of Understanding (MOU)
announcements.detail: Intimation about execution of Memorandum of Understanding (MOU)
announcements.ai_summary: Hampton Sky Realty Limited, through its Wholly Owned Subsidiary Hampton Sky Hospitality Private Limited (HSHPL), has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) on April 13, 2026, with Mr. Manjit Kumar, Ms. Saroj Rani, Mr. Ankit Arora, Mr. Arpit Arora, Ms. Isha Arora, Mr. Jasdeep Singh, Mr. Amarjeet Singh, Ms. Sakshi Arora, M/s Sopan Bagh Developers, and Soopan Bagh Developers Private Limited. The parties intend to identify, negotiate, and consolidate contiguous land parcels in Village Gahour, Baddowal, and Karimpura, Ludhiana, for a large-scale mixed-use development. This prospective joint development will primarily comprise residential plotting, along with built-up residential units and commercial components.

announcements.subject: Hitachi Energy India Ltd - 543187 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer the attached document
announcements.ai_summary: Hitachi Energy India Limited, in collaboration with Adani Energy Solutions Ltd. (AESL), has successfully commissioned a high-voltage direct current (HVDC) city center infeed in Mumbai. This new HVDC link increases the city's power supply from external sources by 50%, injecting up to 1,000 megawatts (MW) of clean power. The project, which includes a space-saving converter station and 50 km of underground HVDC cables, strengthens Mumbai's transmission infrastructure to support over 20 million people. The technology enhances grid resilience, facilitates renewable energy integration, and aligns with the city's Climate Action Plan and decarbonization goals. This development sets a global benchmark for urban transmission.

announcements.subject: Vedanta Ltd - 500295 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vedanta Ltd is reporting an unfortunate incident that occurred at Unit-1 boiler of its Athena Power plant in Singhita rai, Chhattisgarh, on April 14, 2026. The incident involved personnel of its sub-contractor, NGSL, resulting in 24 affected workmen, with 10 succumbing to their injuries. The company's immediate priority is to provide medical assistance to the injured and support to the families of the deceased. Vedanta is coordinating with medical teams and local authorities to ascertain the details and has initiated a detailed investigation in conjunction with its sub-contractor and relevant authorities. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Vikas Lifecare Ltd - 542655 - Outcome Of Fund-Raising Committee Meeting Held On Tuesday, April 14, 2026
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vikas Lifecare Ltd's Fund-Raising Committee, in its meeting held on April 14, 2026, approved the allotment of up to 61,90,62,500 (Sixty-One Crores Ninety Lakhs Sixty-Two Thousand Five Hundred Only) Fully Convertible Warrants. Each warrant is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share of face value Re. 1/- (Rupee One Only). The issue price per warrant is Rs. 1.60/- (Rupee One and Sixty Paise Only), which is higher than the floor price. This preferential issue aims to raise up to Rs. 99,05,00,000 (Rupees Ninety-Nine Crores Five Lakhs Only) in cash. The proposed allottees include members of the Promoter/Promoter Group and Non-Promoter, Public Category. This fund-raising is subject to the approval of shareholders and other applicable regulatory authorities.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Compliances-Half Yearly Communication - Debt Instruments
announcements.detail: Half yearly Statement of debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Manappuram Finance Ltd has submitted a half-yearly statement of its debt securities issued on a private placement basis, as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The statement details several debt issuances, including Rs. 25,00,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Five Crore Only) with a coupon rate of 9.50% maturing on July 9, 2030, and Rs. 100,00,00,000 (Rupees One Hundred Crore Only) also with a 9.50% coupon rate maturing on July 9, 2030. Additionally, Rs. 600,00,00,000 (Rupees Six Hundred Crore Only) issued at 8.57% maturing on January 28, 2028, currently has Rs. 450,00,00,000 (Rupees Four Hundred and Fifty Crore Only) outstanding. The company has also issued Rs. 11,000,000,000 (Rupees One Thousand One Hundred Crore Only) at 9.22% maturing on March 13, 2033, and Rs. 25,00,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Five Crore Only) at 8.60% maturing on March 28, 2034. Another issuance of Rs. 450,00,00,000 (Rupees Four Hundred and Fifty Crore Only) at 9.10% matures on August 19, 2026, and Rs. 500,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Hundred Crore Only) at 8.00% matures on December 15, 2027.

announcements.subject: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd - 538446 - Opening Of New Branch Office
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the intimation with respect to the opening of branch office in Karnal, Haryana, 132001.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd has announced the opening of a new branch office in Karnal, Haryana, effective April 14, 2026. The new branch is located at SCO-11, Sector 14, 2nd floor, Karnal, Haryana, 132001. This expansion is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company will also host this information on its website, www.moneyboxxfinance.com. This move signifies the company's ongoing efforts to expand its physical presence and reach.

announcements.subject: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd - 533274 - Operational Update For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith is the operational update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Prestige Estates Projects Limited has announced its operational performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company achieved its highest-ever annual sales of ₹3,00,245 million, representing a 76% year-on-year growth. Total sales volume reached 22.28 million square feet, an increase of 77% year-on-year, with 11,692 units sold. The company also added new projects with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹5,00,000 million. The office portfolio maintained stability with 4.47 million square feet of leasing activity and over 90% occupancy. The retail portfolio reported near-full occupancy of 99% and a gross turnover of ₹25,671 million. The hospitality segment also demonstrated strong performance.

announcements.subject: Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd - 500124 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories LLC, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited in Russia, has received a final penalty decision from the Interdistrict Inspectorate of the Federal Tax Service of Russia on April 13, 2026. The penalty relates to the re-classification of marketing services as taxable services, leading to a levy of Value Added Tax (VAT). The final penalty amount has been quantified at RUB 9.27 million (INR 11.40 million), a reduction from the original RUB 20.09 million (INR 24.50 million). The company has evaluated this penalty and stated that it has no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

announcements.subject: Power Finance Corporation Ltd - 532810 - Incorporation Of Four Wholly Owned Subsidiaries Of PFC Consulting Limited (A Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of Power Finance Corporation Limited)- (I) BABAI TRANSMISSION LIMITED (Ii) BIKANER TRANSMISSION LIMITED (Iii) HUMNABAD POWER TRANSMISSION LIMITED (Iv) HEBBANI POWER TRANSMISSION LIMITED
announcements.detail: INTIMATION
announcements.ai_summary: Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC) has announced the incorporation of four new wholly owned subsidiaries through its wholly owned subsidiary, PFC Consulting Limited (PFCCL). These new entities are BABAI TRANSMISSION LIMITED, BIKANER TRANSMISSION LIMITED, HUMNABAD POWER TRANSMISSION LIMITED, and HEBBANI POWER TRANSMISSION LIMITED. These Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) companies have been incorporated to undertake transmission system projects. Babai Transmission Limited and Bikaner Transmission Limited are related to transmission systems for 765kV GSS in Rajasthan, with PFCCL nominated as the Bid Process Coordinator (BPC) by Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Prasaran Nigam Ltd. Humnabad Power Transmission Limited and Hebbani Power Transmission Limited are for 400kV transmission systems in Bidar District and Mandya District, respectively, with PFCCL nominated as BPC by Karnataka Power Transmission Corporation Limited.

announcements.subject: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd - 539254 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Adani Energy Commissions 1,000 MW Power Link to bring More Clean Energy into Mumbai
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Energy Solutions Limited (AESL), through its subsidiary Adani Electricity Mumbai Infrastructure Limited (AEMIL), has successfully commissioned a 1,000 megawatt (MW) high-voltage direct current (HVDC) transmission link. This new link connects Kudus and Aarey, comprising a 30-kilometer overhead line and a 50-kilometer underground corridor, designed for dense urban environments. The project includes the world's first compact HVDC substation and aims to improve grid reliability and energy security across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR). This initiative, conceived after the October 2020 Mumbai blackout, will enable greater flow of renewable energy into Mumbai, reducing dependence on in-city generation and lowering outage risks. The HVDC link enhances connectivity by allowing more controlled, efficient, and higher-capacity power flows, particularly for renewable energy integration.

announcements.subject: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd - 532540 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: Transcript of the earnings conference call
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd (TCS) has submitted the transcript of the earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The conference call was conducted on April 09, 2026, following the Board of Directors' meeting. The transcript, which provides details of the company's financial performance for Q4 and FY2026, is available on TCS's website. The call featured the leadership team, including CEO & MD Mr. K Krithivasan, COO & Executive Director Ms. Aarthi Subramanian, CFO Mr. Samir Seksaria, and Chief HR Officer Mr. Sudeep Kunnumal. The transcript will be archived on the company's website for the duration of the quarter.

announcements.subject: Supreme Petrochem Ltd - 500405 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of LODR - Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith, disclosure with respect to capacity addition.
announcements.ai_summary: Supreme Petrochem Ltd has commissioned its EPS-Phase II expansion project at the Amdoshi Plant in Nagothane, Maharashtra. This expansion increases the company's total production capacity for EPS from the existing 85,000 TPA to 115,000 TPA, adding 30,000 MT per year. The project was commissioned on April 14, 2026. The investment for this expansion was Rs. 54 crores, financed through internal accruals. The rationale behind this capacity addition is to meet the projected demand growth in the packaging, construction, and cold supply chain sectors. The company's existing capacity utilization was 75%.

announcements.subject: LE Lavoir Ltd - 539814 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Tie-up with Hotel Tunga Regency Private Limited For Providing Laundry Services
announcements.ai_summary: LE Lavoir Ltd has entered into a 3-year agreement with Hotel Tunga Regency Private Limited to provide laundry services, including wet cleaning, washing, and dry-cleaning. This tie-up, effective from the date of execution, aims to expand LE Lavoir's footprint among institutional clients and explore broader commercial opportunities under the "Le Lavoir" brand. The agreement covers room linen, staff uniforms, and guest laundry services. This partnership signifies a strategic shift towards providing linen rental-based solutions to customers and is expected to enhance operational synergies and broaden the customer base. The company views this as a significant milestone in strengthening its presence in the hospitality sector.

announcements.subject: Gravita India Ltd - 533282 - Intimation Of Closure Of Subsidiary I.E. Recyclers South Africa (PTY) Ltd.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015; Intimation of Closure of Subsidiary I.E. Recyclers South Africa (PTY) Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: Gravita India Ltd has announced the completion of the voluntary dissolution of its subsidiary, Recyclers South Africa (PTY) Ltd. This subsidiary was part of Gravita Netherlands B.V. and was located in South Africa. The company stated that this subsidiary had no business activity and therefore will not have any material financial impact on Gravita India Ltd's books. The total income and net worth contributed by this step-down subsidiary on a standalone basis were NIL and Rs. 1.03 Lakhs (0.00%) respectively for the last financial year. The closure was completed on April 14, 2026.

announcements.subject: Landmark Cars Ltd - 543714 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Business Updates For Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Landmark Cars Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''Business Update for Q4 FY 2025-26 under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015''.
announcements.ai_summary: Landmark Cars Limited has provided a business update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a consolidated total revenue from operations of Rs. 1,790 crore for Q4 FY26, a 17.30% increase year-on-year from Rs. 1,526 crore in Q4 FY25. For the full fiscal year FY26, the proforma revenue from operations reached Rs. 6,713 crore, up 19.32% from Rs. 5,626 crore in FY25. Vehicle sales, including agency and pre-owned vehicle sales, also saw a significant increase. The after-sales service and spare parts segment contributed Rs. 282 crore in Q4 FY26. The company expects normalized BYD car supply to resume in the June quarter and has seen strong performance from newly opened workshops. Deliveries for key models like the Mercedes Benz V Class and Mahindra XUV 7XO commenced in the March quarter.

announcements.subject: National Highways Infra Trust - 543385 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: National Highways Infra Trust (NHIT) has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report details the distribution of units among various categories of holders, including Sponsor(s)/Investment Manager, Public Holding (Institutions and Non-Institutions), and others. As of March 31, 2026, the Sponsor and Sponsor Group held 22,44,54,500 units, representing 10.50% of the total units. Public holding accounted for the remaining 1,92,17,17,717 units, or 89.50% of the total. Key institutional holders include BODIES CORPORATES (FOREIGN BODY) with 1,00,52,75,300 units (47.01%) and Foreign Portfolio Investors with 15,41,20,671 units (7.21%).

announcements.subject: Tata Chemicals Ltd - 500770 - Voluntary Strike-Off And Dissolution Of Cheshire Salt Holdings Limited And New Cheshire Salt Works Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiaries Of The Company
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation for voluntary strike-off and dissolution of Cheshire Salt Holdings Limited and New Cheshire Salt Works Limited, wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Chemicals Limited has informed that its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Cheshire Salt Holdings Limited and New Cheshire Salt Works Limited, have been voluntarily struck off and dissolved from the Companies House, UK, effective April 14, 2026. Consequently, these entities have ceased to be wholly-owned subsidiaries of the company. This action is intended to simplify the group's holding structure without altering the ultimate ownership of the company's UK operations. The dissolved entities were non-operational, and therefore, no turnover, revenue, income, or net worth was contributed by them in the last financial year.

announcements.subject: Brand Concepts Ltd - 543442 - Intimation For Opening Of New Store "Juicy Couture" At Lakeshore Y Junction, Kukatpally Hyderabad.
announcements.detail: Brand Concepts Limited has informed the exchange about the Opening of New Store "Juicy Couture" at LakeShore Y Junction, Kukatpally Hyderabad-500072.
announcements.ai_summary: Brand Concepts Limited has announced the opening of a new "Juicy Couture" store located at Unit No. GF-20, LakeShore Y Junction, Kukatpally, Hyderabad-500072. This expansion is a part of the company's growth strategy, aiming to provide greater convenience and improved services to its customers. The opening of this new retail outlet signifies the company's commitment to strengthening its market presence and reaching a wider customer base.

announcements.subject: Ladderup Finance Ltd - 530577 - Intimation For Acquisition Of Jericho Ventures Private Limited (JVPL) By Ladderup Asset Managers Private Limited (Formerly Ladderup Wealth Management Private Limited), Subsidiary Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Intimation for acquisition of Jericho Ventures Private Limited by Ladderup Asset Managers Private Limited (formerly known as Ladderup Wealth Management Private Limited), subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Ladderup Finance Limited's subsidiary, Ladderup Asset Managers Private Limited (LAMPL), has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on April 14, 2026, to acquire 100% of the paid-up equity shares in Jericho Ventures Private Limited (JVPL). The total consideration for this acquisition is Rs. 14,00,00,000/- (Rupees Fourteen Crores Only). Upon completion, JVPL will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of LAMPL and a step-down subsidiary of Ladderup Finance Limited. JVPL has a paid-up capital of Rs. 1,17,660/- and reported a turnover of Rs. 2,33,66,920/- as of March 31, 2025. This acquisition is in line with the company's strategy to expand its business within the financial services sector.

announcements.subject: Kalpataru Ltd - 544423 - Key Operational Updates For The Quarter And Year Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Key Operational Updates for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Kalpataru Limited has provided key operational updates for the quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. In the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, the company reported pre-sales of INR 1,833 crore, a 6% year-on-year increase from INR 1,724 crore in Q4 FY 2024-25. Collections for the same quarter rose significantly by 41% to INR 1,487 crore from INR 1,057 crore in the prior year. For the full fiscal year FY 2025-26, pre-sales grew by 17% to INR 5,280 crore compared to INR 4,531 crore in FY 2024-25. Full-year collections also saw a substantial increase of 34%, reaching INR 4,960 crore from INR 3,710 crore in the previous fiscal year. These figures are provisional and subject to a limited review.

announcements.company: Apoorva Leasing Finance and Investment Company Ltd
announcements.subject: Apoorva Leasing Finance and Investment Company Ltd - 539545 - Non Applicability Of Reg. 32 Of SEBI (Listing Obligation And Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015 (Statement Of Deviation Or Variation For Proceeds Of Public Issue, Rights Issue, Preferential Issue Or QIP)
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that Reg. 32 with respect to Statement of Deviation or Variation is not applicable to the Company as the Company has not made any public issue, right issue, preferential issue, or QIP for quarter and year ended March 31st 2026.

This is because the company has not undertaken any public issue, rights issue, preferential issue, or Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company is providing this information for record and information purposes.

announcements.subject: Capital India Finance Ltd - 530879 - Compliances-Half Yearly Communication - Debt Instruments
announcements.detail: Statement on ISIN of Debt Securities as per Regulation 17 of SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021 for the half year ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Capital India Finance Limited has submitted its half-yearly communication regarding its debt instruments for the period ended March 31, 2026. As per Regulation 17 of the SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021, the company has provided details of its listed debt securities. The company has one listed debt security with ISIN INE345H07054, issued on July 28, 2025, with a maturity date of July 28, 2028. The coupon rate is 9.55% per annum, with interest payable annually and principal payable on maturity. The amount issued was Rs. 50.00 Crores, and the outstanding amount remains Rs. 50.00 Crores.

announcements.subject: North Eastern Carrying Corporation Ltd - 534615 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Pursuant to the Regulations 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015, read with master ciruclar dated January 30, 2026 we hereby inform that the Object Clause and Capital Clause of the Company''s Memorandum of Associaton (MOA) have been amended, altered, and modified, subject to the approval of shareholder of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: North Eastern Carrying Corporation Limited has informed about amendments to its Memorandum of Association (MOA). The company has altered its Main Object Clause to include broader transportation business activities, such as acquiring, selling, and hiring various types of vehicles. Additionally, a new sub-clause has been added to establish and operate warehouses, cold storage facilities, depots, and distribution centers, offering inventory management and packaging services. Furthermore, the Capital Clause has been amended to increase the Authorised Share Capital from Rs. 100,00,00,000 to Rs. 110,00,00,000, divided into 11,00,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. These amendments are subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Zelio E Mobility Ltd - 544563 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the Press Release titled "Zelio Electric Scooters joins hands with Punjab Kings as Official EV Partner for 2026 Season".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zelio Electric Scooters has announced a significant partnership with Punjab Kings, becoming their Official EV Partner for the 2026 season. This collaboration aims to leverage the popularity of cricket to enhance Zelio's brand presence across India, particularly in Tier 2 markets and beyond. The partnership includes branding rights, digital media integration, and in-stadia activations. Two of Zelio's popular models, the XMen+ and X Men 2.0, will be featured. This strategic move is intended to accelerate brand awareness and consumer consideration for Zelio's electric two-wheeler lineup. The company's Managing Director, Kunal Arya, highlighted cricket's power in connecting with Indian audiences and aligning visibility with growth momentum. Punjab Kings' Chief Commercial Officer, Saurabh Arora, expressed enthusiasm for partnering with a forward-looking brand in sustainable innovation.

announcements.subject: Syrma SGS Technology Ltd - 543573 - Update On Joint Venture Between Syrma SGS Technology Limited (Company), Syrma SGS Design And Manufacturing Private Limited (Jvco) And Elemaster S.P.A. Tecnologie Elettroniche (Elemaster) - Completion Of Transaction
announcements.detail: As per attached Letter
announcements.ai_summary: Syrma SGS Technology Limited has provided an update on its joint venture with Elemaster S.P.A. Tecnologie Elettroniche, forming Syrma SGS Design and Manufacturing Private Limited (JVCo). The closing of this transaction occurred on April 14, 2026, as per the terms of the Joint Venture Agreement dated September 1, 2025. Syrma SGS Technology Limited acquired 11,43,322 equity shares of JVCo for a total consideration of INR 32,69,90,092, increasing its stake to 60%. Elemaster S.P.A. Tecnologie Elettroniche acquired 7,68,881 equity shares for INR 21,98,99,966, holding a 40% stake. This announcement follows the company's earlier disclosure on September 1, 2025, and the JVCo board meeting held on April 14, 2026, which finalized the transaction.

announcements.subject: Nexxus Petro Industries Ltd - 544265 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Nexxus Petro Industries Limited has intimated to the Stock Exchange regarding Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for Press Release titled "Nexxus Petro Indutries Limited Positioned at the Forefront of India''s Bio-Bitument Revolution"
announcements.ai_summary: Nexxus Petro Industries Limited has issued a press release titled "Nexxus Petro Industries Limited Positioned at the Forefront of India's Bio-Bitumen Revolution." The company is leveraging its CSIR-CRRI & CSIR-IIP certified license for proprietary Bio-Bitumen Technology (KrishiBind™) as India aims to reduce its bitumen import costs, which have surged by approximately 40% due to the West Asia conflict. Domestic bitumen prices have risen from around ₹40,000 per tonne to ₹54,000–₹76,000 per tonne. India currently imports about 54% of its bitumen requirement, totaling nearly 6 million tonnes annually. Nexxus Petro Industries Limited is among only 15 companies nationwide holding this crucial technology license, positioning it to benefit from government policies promoting indigenous bitumen supply and the acceleration of India's road construction programs.

announcements.subject: Den Networks Ltd - 533137 - Board Meeting Outcome for Standalone And Consolidated Audited Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Den Networks Limited announced its standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved these financial statements at their meeting held on April 14, 2026, following a recommendation from the Audit Committee. The company has submitted these audited financial results, along with unmodified auditors' reports, to the stock exchanges. Investors can access the detailed financial results on the company's website, www.dennetworks.com. The board meeting commenced at 3:00 PM and concluded at 3:51 PM on April 14, 2026.

announcements.subject: Time Technoplast Ltd - 532856 - Time Technoplast Limited Has Entered A Memorandum Of Understanding (Mou) With Promoters Of Systoverse Private Limited (SPL) For Acquisition Of 76% Stake In SPL
announcements.detail: Time Technoplast Limited, as a part of its strategy to strengthen its High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) pipe portfolio and drive inorganic growth, has entered a MOU with the promoters of Systoverse Private Limited, to acquire 76% stake, subject to due diligence.
announcements.ai_summary: Time Technoplast Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the promoters of Systoverse Private Limited (SPL) to acquire a 76% stake in SPL. This acquisition is part of Time Technoplast's strategy to enhance its High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) pipe portfolio and pursue inorganic growth. The transaction is subject to customary due diligence, including financial, legal, tax, and regulatory assessments. The MOU establishes a transparent framework for the acquisition, ensuring regulatory compliance. The acquisition of SPL is expected to create strong synergies and unlock new growth opportunities, aligning with Maharashtra's infrastructure growth policy.

announcements.subject: Puretrop Fruits  Ltd - 530077 - Letter Of Offer For Buyback Of Equity Shares.
announcements.detail: Submission of Letter of Offer for buyback of 11,00,000 equity shares at price of Rs. 200/- per equity shares payable in cash for total considertaion not exceeding Rs. 22,00,00,000/-
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Puretrop Fruits Limited has submitted its Letter of Offer for the buyback of 11,00,000 equity shares. The buyback is being conducted at a price of Rs. 200/- per equity share, payable in cash, for a total consideration not exceeding Rs. 22,00,00,000/-. The buyback represents 13.80% of the company's total issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital. The offer is being made to all eligible shareholders through the Tender Offer process using the stock exchange mechanism as prescribed by SEBI (Buy-Back of Securities) Regulations, 2018. The Letter of Offer, dated April 13, 2026, has been sent to shareholders and is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Shanti Gold International Ltd - 544459 -  Business Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: Business Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shanti Gold International Limited has released its operational update for Q4 FY26 and the full year FY26. For Q4 FY26, the company achieved a 25% YoY volume growth and over 120% YoY revenue growth, marking its strongest quarterly performance historically. For the full year FY26, gold volumes grew by 15% YoY, and revenues increased by over 80% YoY. The company highlighted strong client network expansion, particularly in the northern region, and a shift towards organized sourcing by large retail chains. Shanti Gold International Limited attributes its success to strong design capabilities and its ability to offer a comprehensive one-stop solution.

announcements.subject: Meta Infotech Ltd - 544441 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: We wish to inform that company has received renewal order amounting to Rs. 1.03 crores bagged by the Company in the ordinary course of business.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Meta Infotech Limited has received a renewal order amounting to Rs. 1,03,67,974.08 from a large domestic private sector bank for Sustenance Resources. This order is valid for the period from April 01, 2026, to March 31, 2027, and is to be executed within 15 days. The company has confirmed that the order falls within the ordinary course of business and that its promoters or group companies have no interest in the entity awarding the contract. This renewal signifies continued business relationship and revenue stream for Meta Infotech Limited.

announcements.subject: Investment & Precision Castings Ltd - 504786 - Statment Of Deviation & Variation  - NIL
announcements.detail: Statment of Deviation & veriation for F.Y. 2025-26 will be attachede here with
announcements.ai_summary: Investment & Precision Castings Ltd. has stated that it has not raised any capital during the financial year 2025-26. Consequently, there has been no deviation in the utilization of previously raised funds, which have been fully utilized. The company is submitting a NIL statement of deviation and variation for the financial year 2025-26 as per the prescribed format. They are unable to file in XBRL format due to the system not allowing NIL entries. The company requests that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd - 505029 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Update
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Update
announcements.ai_summary: Atlas Cycles (Haryana) Ltd. has announced an update regarding the sale of 20 acres of land situated in Sonepat, Haryana. The Buyer has requested a further extension until June 30, 2026, for the execution of the Sale Deed, which has been approved by the Board of Directors. As per the Agreement to Sell dated December 7, 2024, the Company has received Rs. 34.80 Crore as part consideration to date. The Buyer has also committed to paying another part consideration of Rs. 25.20 Crores in April 2026. The company will provide further updates on any material developments. This intimation is in continuation of previous announcements made on January 16, 2026, October 31, 2025, May 29, 2025, and December 7, 2024.

announcements.subject: DIC India Ltd - 500089 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 And Schedule III Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations').
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure in furtherance of the disclosure filed by the Company on 24.03.2026 regarding commercial suit for recovery filed against Star Plastics.
announcements.ai_summary: DIC India Ltd. has provided a further disclosure regarding a commercial suit for recovery filed against Star Plastics, in furtherance of its previous filing on March 24, 2026. As per an order dated April 7, 2026 (uploaded on April 13, 2026), the District Court has directed DIC India Ltd. to first initiate pre-litigation mediation under Section 12A of the Commercial Courts Act, 2015, to explore amicable resolution before the suit can be entertained. Consequently, the District Court disposed of the suit with this direction. DIC India Ltd. intends to challenge this order. The disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Microfin Ltd - 544055 - Asset Liability Management (ALM) statement
announcements.detail: The ALM statement for month ended 31 March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Muthoot Microfin Ltd. has submitted its Provisional Asset Liability Management (ALM) statement for the month ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54. The statement provides details on the company's outflows across various time buckets. Notably, under the 'Capital' outflow category, Equity Capital shows an outflow of Rs. 16,776.70 for the period beyond 90 days. Under 'Reserves & Surplus', the total outflow for the period beyond 90 days is Rs. 8,265.60, with Rs. 160,573.60 attributed to the Share Premium Account and Rs. 23,593.50 to Reserves under Section 45-IC of the RBI Act, 1934. The company is providing this statement for information and record.

announcements.subject: Bihar Sponge Iron Ltd - 500058 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Bihar Sponge Iron Ltd. has received a Demand Notice under The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, from M/s Agarwal Coal Corporation Private Limited. The notice pertains to an alleged unpaid operational debt amounting to Rs. 16,91,99,617/-. The company is currently reviewing the matter and is in the process of taking legal steps. Bihar Sponge Iron Ltd. explicitly states that it has neither acknowledged nor admitted the claim and has not recognized any liability in respect of it. This disclosure is being made to BSE Ltd. in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, due to the materiality of the amount involved. The company emphasizes that this intimation is purely for disclosure purposes and should not be construed as an acceptance of liability.

announcements.subject: Balkrishna Industries Ltd-$ - 502355 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 17 of SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021 read with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated 15th October, 2015, please find enclosed herewith details of debt securities as on 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Balkrishna Industries Ltd. has provided a half-yearly statement detailing its debt securities as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The company has outstanding debt securities including Commercial Papers and Unsecured Rated Listed Redeemable Non Convertible Debentures. Specifically, there are two Commercial Papers, each issued for Rs. 100 Crores, with maturity dates in March 2026. Additionally, two series of Non Convertible Debentures are outstanding: Series I for Rs. 270 Crores maturing in March 2029 with a coupon rate of 7.20% p.a., and Series II for Rs. 270 Crores maturing in March 2030 with a coupon rate of 7.38% p.a. These debt securities are listed on the BSE Limited. The company is submitting this information for record and dissemination.

announcements.subject: Cube Highways Trust - 543899 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Cube Highways Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cube Highways Trust has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as required by SEBI regulations. The report, filed in accordance with Regulation 23(10) of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/102 dated July 11, 2025, details the distribution of units among various categories of holders. Notably, "FOREIGN BODIES CORPORATE" hold 44,18,81,123 units, representing 32.88% of the total units. For the previous quarter, this category held 20,16,10,464 units, representing 45.63% of the total units. The submission has been made to the Listing Department of BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: JSW Infrastructure Ltd - 543994 - Update - Commissioning Of The Gati Shakti Multi Modal Cargo Terminal At Arakkonam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached herewith
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JSW Infrastructure Limited has announced the successful commissioning of its Gati Shakti Multi Modal Cargo Terminal located at Arakkonam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The terminal, which is situated entirely on Railway land, has received official approval from Southern Railway, Chennai Division, under Indian Railways, to commence commercial operations effective April 14, 2026. This follows an earlier intimation on June 27, 2024, regarding the receipt of the Letter of Acceptance for the construction and operation of this terminal. The approval for commercial operations was received via email on April 14, 2026, at approximately 9:45 a.m.

announcements.subject: AXIS Bank Ltd - 532215 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Reporting of ISIN details of Debt Listed Securities of Axis Bank Limited for the year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Axis Bank Limited has submitted its half-yearly report containing ISIN details of its debt-listed securities for the year ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The report includes details of nine series of debt securities issued on a private placement basis. These include Series - 24 with an issued amount of ₹24,30,00,00,000 and maturity on May 27, 2026, Series - 25 with an issued amount of ₹18,00,00,00,000 and maturity on November 23, 2026, and Series - 27 with an issued amount of ₹50,00,00,00,000 and maturity on June 15, 2027. Other series include Series - 4 (₹30,00,00,00,000, maturity Dec 28, 2028), Series - 5 Infra (₹41,75,00,00,000, maturity Jan 30, 2027), Series - 6 Infra (₹26,00,00,00,000, maturity Dec 22, 2031), Series - 30 (₹1,20,00,00,00,000, maturity Dec 13, 2032), and Series - 7 Infra (₹38,51,00,00,000, maturity Mar 07, 2034). The bank has also reported Series - 8 with an issued amount of ₹39,25,00,00,000. The report is for the information and records of the stock exchanges and depositories.

announcements.subject: Hikal Ltd - 524735 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Retirement
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015- Superannuation/Retirement of Senior Management Personnel (SMP).
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hikal Limited has announced the retirement of Mr. Vimaldeep Kulshrestha, President- Crop Protection, from his employment with the company. Mr. Kulshrestha will cease to be an employee of Hikal Limited at the end of business hours on April 14, 2026, due to superannuation. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Megastar Foods Ltd - 541352 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 (2) Of SEBI LODR Regulations
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 (2) of SEBI LODR Regulations read with Clause 20 of Para A of Part A of Schedule III
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Megastar Foods Limited has received a Notice from the Market Committee, Rupnagar, alleging non-payment of Market Committee Fee and RDF Fee. The company has already procured the necessary license from the Punjab State Agricultural Marketing Board, valid until March 31, 2030, for the purchase, sale, storage, and processing of agricultural produce. Megastar Foods Limited is approaching the Punjab State Agricultural Marketing Board to address the matter and is considering appropriate legal recourse, expressing optimism for a favorable outcome. The notice was dated April 9, 2026, and received by the company on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd - 531035 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eraaya Lifespaces Limited has resolved a long-standing shareholder matter concerning Ebix Payment Services, a step-down subsidiary of ItzCash, with the Bombay High Court approving the Consent Terms. This matter originated from legacy structures under the previous Ebix group management and was an inherited overhang post-acquisition, not part of the original acquisition consideration. Eraaya will execute a complete buyout of the minority shareholding in Ebix Payment Services Private Limited for an aggregate settlement amount of approximately INR 1,800 million, to be discharged over an agreed timeframe. This resolution aims to eliminate uncertainty, simplify the group structure, and allow for a sharper strategic focus on core operating priorities. The company views this as a material clean-up of a legacy overhang, reflecting a decisive governance-led approach and disciplined capital allocation.

announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Capacity Addition
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: WeWork India Management Ltd has entered into a Leave & License Agreement for capacity addition in Pune, expanding its operational space by 61,998 square feet. This expansion will add approximately 864 desks and is tentatively scheduled for completion by August 2026. The investment required for this capacity addition is approximately ₹36 Crore, which will be financed through internal accruals or debt. This move is aimed at catering to incremental demand and enhancing the company's operational capacity in line with business growth. The company's existing capacity was 1,21,638 desks with a utilization rate of 83.90% as of December 31, 2025.

announcements.company: Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd
announcements.subject: Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd - 523309 - Request For Reclassification Of Shareholding From 'Promoter And Promoter Group' Category To 'Public' Category
announcements.detail: Intimation for receipt of request for reclassification of shareholding from Promoter and Promoter Group category to Public category.
announcements.ai_summary: Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd has received requests from Mr. Ajay Gupta, Mr. Shailesh Gupta, Mr. Siddharth Gupta, and Mr. Ramesh Gupta on April 14, 2026, seeking reclassification of their shareholding. These individuals wish to be reclassified from the "Promoter and Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category, in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. These requests will be presented to the Board of Directors at their next meeting, after which the company will proceed with obtaining the necessary approvals.

announcements.subject: Him Teknoforge Ltd - 505712 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Joint Venture
announcements.detail: we attach herewith intimation regarding proposed strike of joint venture company Dinamico axles & Drive wheels Pvt Ltd
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Him Teknoforge Ltd, via a resolution passed through circulation on April 13, 2026, has consented to call off the joint venture with its Italian counterparts. This joint venture was established for the incorporation of Dinamico Axles & Drive Wheels Private Limited. Him Teknoforge Ltd had agreed to subscribe to 40% of the shareholding in this JV company, however, no investment has been made to date. Given that the JV company has not commenced significant business operations, the company proposes to apply for striking off its name from the records of the Registrar of Companies. This action will have no financial impact on Him Teknoforge Ltd as no capital has been infused into the JV company.

announcements.subject: Prithvi Exchange (India) Ltd - 531688 - Opening Of New Branch At Trivandrum
announcements.detail: The Company had opened a new branch at Trivandrum, Kerala
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Prithvi Exchange (India) Ltd has announced the opening of a new branch in Trivandrum, Kerala, located at “A5/2, Old TC 29/219, Ramakripa, Elankom Gardens, Vellayambalam, Sasthamangalam (PO), Trivandrum – 695010, Kerala.” This expansion is part of the company's strategy to offer forex services in a contemporary and technologically updated environment and aims to provide the best service to its clients. The company intends to increase its national footprint by building more branches in the near future. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Puravankara Ltd - 532891 - Intimation Of Corporate Guarantee Given On Behalf Of Purvaland Private Limited, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation of Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Purvaland Private Limited, wholly owned subsidiary of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Ltd has provided a corporate guarantee on behalf of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Purvaland Private Limited, for an amount of Rs. 196,00,00,000/- (Indian Rupees One Hundred and Ninety-Six Crore only). This guarantee is in favor of Vistra ITCL (India) Limited, the debenture trustee, for the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) of the same value. The transaction is disclosed as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The promoter/promoter group/group companies do not have any interest in this transaction, and it is conducted at arm's length.

announcements.subject: Apollo Pipes Ltd - 531761 - Commencement Of Commercial Production At New Manufacturing Plant At Mirzapur (Near Varanasi), Uttar Pradesh
announcements.detail: We are pleased to inform that our new manufacturing plant at Mirzapur (near Varanasi), Uttar Pradesh has commenced commercial production from today, i.e. 14th April, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Apollo Pipes Ltd is pleased to inform that its new manufacturing plant located in Mirzapur (near Varanasi), Uttar Pradesh, has commenced commercial production as of April 14, 2026. This development follows earlier intimations provided by the company on May 20, 2024, May 10, 2025, January 29, 2026, and March 31, 2026. The commencement of production at this new facility is a significant step for the company. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sharp India Ltd - 523449 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation of Share Purchase Agreement executed on 14th April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sharp India Ltd announced on April 14, 2026, that its promoter and holding company, Sharp Corporation, Japan (Seller), has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) with Smart Services Private Limited (Purchaser). The Purchaser has agreed to acquire 1,94,58,000 equity shares, representing 75.00% of the paid-up equity share capital of Sharp India Ltd, at a price of Rs 10.00 per equity share. The total consideration for this transaction is Rs. 19,45,80,000. This acquisition triggers the requirement for the Purchaser to make an open offer to the public shareholders of Sharp India Ltd, as per SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Board of Directors of Sharp India Ltd took note of this agreement on April 14, 2026.

announcements.subject: Piccadily Agro Industries Ltd - 530305 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Indri Diwali Collector''s Edition 2025 won the "Best Special Edition Design" at World Whiskies Awards 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Piccadily Agro Industries Ltd has announced that its "Indri Diwali Collector's Edition 2025" has won the "Best Special Edition Design" award at the World Whiskies Awards 2026. This information is being shared with the stock exchanges as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release is dated April 14, 2026.

announcements.subject: Valencia Nutrition Ltd - 542910 - Press Release- Resistance To 2026 Strait Of Hormuz Crisis
announcements.detail: We hereby provide comprehensive update on the operations and strategic resilience of Valencia Beverages and Superwater Private Limited (VBSW) Unit I & Unit II in Cherlaplly, Hyderabad.
announcements.ai_summary: Valencia Nutrition Ltd has provided an update on the operational resilience of its Valencia Beverages and Superwater Private Limited (VBSW) Unit I & Unit II in Cherlapally, Hyderabad, in the face of the 2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis. The company secured a three-month supply of packaging materials before the crisis began on February 28, 2026, and purchased fruit pulp at low prices due to export chokes, securing its entire year's requirement. VBSW also converted its boilers from LPG to Diesel, creating a dual-fuel system, and is managing supply and demand using its in-house ERP and FIFO methodology. The company has seen growth in its own brand sales, is awaiting final orders from GCC clients for juice samples, and has signed an agreement with Virchow Laboratories Ltd to manufacture eight juice SKUs, securing 15% of Unit II's capacity. Despite a labor challenge on April 06, 2026, operations remained uninterrupted due to engineering executives from Valencia Engineering Group stepping in.

announcements.subject: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd - 543265 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: New Order Received
announcements.ai_summary: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has received a work order from the Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment And Promotion Board for providing security-related ancillary services during recruitment examinations. The order, received on April 13, 2026, at 15:39, has a broad consideration of Rs. 43,96,34,195 (including tax). The execution period for this domestic order is until April 12, 2028. This information is disclosed as per Regulation 30 read with Part A (B) of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd - 544309 - Response To Clarification Sought By BSE Limited.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed clarification sought by BSE on media report.
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd has responded to a clarification sought by BSE Limited regarding a media report titled “Jhunjhunwala-backed IKS Healthcare looks to acquire TruBridge for $600 million.” The company clarified that it regularly evaluates strategic opportunities, including potential transactions through its subsidiaries. One wholly-owned subsidiary of Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd did participate in discussions with TruBridge, Inc. for a potential acquisition. However, as of April 14, 2026, no definitive or binding agreements have been executed, and the discussions remain non-binding, subject to negotiations, approvals, and definitive agreement execution. The company will make disclosures as per applicable regulations for any material developments.

announcements.subject: Embassy Office Parks REIT - 542602 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Embassy Office Parks REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Embassy Office Parks REIT, through its Manager Embassy Office Parks Management Services Private Limited, will host an earnings conference call on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 1700 Hrs IST. The purpose of this call is to discuss Embassy REIT’s financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. A playback of the call and a transcript will be made available on the Investor Relations section of their website following the conference. Global dial-in details have been provided for stakeholders to participate.

announcements.subject: DCX Systems Ltd - 543650 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Purchase Orders
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Purchase Orders
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: DCX Systems Limited has announced the receipt of purchase orders totaling approximately INR 17.45 Crores in the normal course of business. These orders are for the manufacture and supply of Cable and Wire Harness Assemblies. Additionally, its wholly-owned subsidiary, Raneal Advanced Systems Pvt. Ltd., has received purchase orders amounting to approximately INR 14.19 Crores for the manufacture and supply of Printed Circuit Board Assemblies. These orders are from both domestic and international customers.

announcements.subject: Pasupati Acrylon Ltd - 500456 - Intimation About Resumption Of Plant Operations - Acrylic Fiber
announcements.detail: Please find the intimation about resumption of plant operations.
announcements.ai_summary: Pasupati Acrylon Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the resumption of operations at its Acrylic Fiber Plant. The plant had been temporarily shut down due to delays in raw material shipments, which were attributed to the ongoing war in the Middle East Region. The company had previously communicated this shutdown on March 24, 2026. With the resumption of manufacturing operations, the company is expected to return to its normal production schedule. Investors are requested to take this information on record.

announcements.subject: Bluspring Enterprises Ltd - 544414 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled Bluspring Enters High-Growth Aviation Catering with Strategic Acquisition of LSG India
announcements.ai_summary: Bluspring Enterprises Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Bluspring New Horizon Two Private Limited (BNHTPL), has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire 100% of the shareholding of LSG Sky Chefs (India) Private Limited (LSG India). This strategic acquisition marks Bluspring's entry into the aviation catering sector, securing a footprint at Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru. LSG India, ultimately owned by AURELIUS, operates airline catering facilities at Bengaluru and Hyderabad airports, with the Hyderabad operations to be carved out before closing. The Bengaluru operations, which generate over INR 110 crores in revenue and mid-to-high-teens EBITDA margins, include a 9272 sq. mt. kitchen with a capacity of approximately 15,000 meals per day. The transaction is expected to close within 60-90 days, subject to customary closing conditions.

announcements.subject: NESCO Ltd - 505355 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.ai_summary: On April 13, 2026, NESCO Ltd. disclosed that on April 11, 2026, an incident occurred at the Nesco Exhibition Center, leading to the police custody of the Vice President (Events and Exhibitions), a Senior Managerial Personnel, on April 13, 2026. The company is fully cooperating with the authorities. At present, no impact on the listed entity is foreseen. The company is providing this disclosure in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Regulations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: On April 13, 2026, Fino Payments Bank Limited informed the stock exchanges about the continued unavailability of its Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Rishi Gupta. This unavailability, exceeding 45 days in a rolling 90-day period, is due to a pending re-assessment of his fit and proper status by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and the Board of Directors, with a view to be taken by the Reserve Bank of India. An interim CEO was appointed with RBI's approval during this period. The bank assures that its operations remain stable and uninterrupted, and it continues to serve customers and stakeholders normally. Notably, the bank recorded its highest-ever deposit balance in March 2026 and witnessed strong momentum in its referral lending business.

announcements.subject: Just Dial Ltd - 535648 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For Financial Results For The Financial Year Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Financial Results for the Financial Year ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Just Dial Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 13, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Statements and Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Audit Committee had recommended these results. Separately, Mr. Abhishek Bansal has resigned as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company, effective April 15, 2026, due to personal career considerations. The company has expressed appreciation for his services. The audited financial results, along with the auditors' report with an unmodified opinion, are enclosed and will be available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: UCO Bank - 532505 - Change In The Chief Risk Officer Of The Bank
announcements.detail: Change in the Chief Risk Officer of the Bank w.e.f. 14.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Chief Risk Officer (CRO) of UCO Bank has been changed. Mr. Rajeev Gupta, a General Manager with over 29 years of banking experience, has been appointed as the new CRO, effective April 14, 2026. He replaces Mr. Shashi Kant Kumar, who has been assigned a new role as Zonal Head, Mumbai. Mr. Gupta holds a Bachelor of Commerce, an MBA in Finance, and a Post Graduate Diploma in Banking, along with certifications in Treasury, Investment, and Risk Management. This change is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Life Insurance Corporation of India - 543526 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The Press Release on Issuance of Bonus Equity Shares is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) announced on April 13, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved the issuance of bonus equity shares in the proportion of 1:1 to existing shareholders, subject to shareholder approval. The current authorized equity share capital is ₹25,000 crores, with a paid-up equity share capital of ₹6,324.99 crores. Post the proposed bonus issuance, the paid-up equity share capital will increase to ₹12,649.99 crores. As of December 31, 2025, LIC had Reserves & Surplus of ₹1,46,440.58 crores and a Profit After Tax of ₹33,998 crores for the nine-month period ended December 31, 2025. The bonus issuance aims to reward shareholders, balance paid-up capital with reserves, and enhance liquidity and marketability. The company clarified that this proposal will not impact its solvency margin or other financial parameters.

announcements.subject: RITES Ltd - 541556 - Intimation Of Closure Of MMG-Metro Management Group Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation of closure of MMG-Metro Management Group Limited
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the closure of MMG-Metro Management Group Limited. This joint venture company, involving RITES, DMRC, and Israeli firm M/s. Poran Shrem Engineering and Appraisal Limited, has been liquidated. This intimation follows a previous notification dated December 27, 2024, and is in compliance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Pitti Engineering Ltd-$ - 513519 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) - Updates On Scheme Of Amalgamation
announcements.detail: Updates on Scheme of Amalgamation
announcements.ai_summary: Pitti Engineering Limited has received an order from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Hyderabad Bench, on April 10, 2026, which was uploaded on April 13, 2026. This order approves the dispensation of meetings of Equity Shareholders, Secured Creditors, and Unsecured Creditors for Pitti Industries Private Limited, Dakshin Foundry Private Limited, and Pitti Engineering Limited. This development is part of the Scheme of Amalgamation of Pitti Industries Private Limited and Dakshin Foundry Private Limited with Pitti Engineering Limited, as previously disclosed on February 5, 2026. The NCLT's approval is a significant step in the amalgamation process under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Windsor Machines Ltd - 522029 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation for allotment of equity shares on conversion of equity warrants as per SEBI ICDR Regulations and SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: Windsor Machines Ltd's Board of Directors, through a circular resolution passed on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 27,80,000 equity shares upon the conversion of an equal number of equity warrants. These warrants were issued to Mr. Rameshbhai Keshubhai Siyani, who belongs to the Promoter Group. The conversion price is ₹191.85 per share, which includes a premium of ₹189.85 per share. The company received an aggregate amount of ₹40,00,07,250, representing 75% of the issue price per warrant, at a rate of ₹143.88 per warrant. Mr. Rameshbhai Keshubhai Siyani held 45,12,405 warrants prior to conversion and has 17,32,405 warrants pending for conversion.

announcements.subject: Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd - 512441 - Outcome Of The Rights Issue Committee Of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited (The ''''Company'''') Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015 -- Outcome Of Rights Issue Committee Meeting - Allotment Of Equity Shares On Rights Basis
announcements.detail: The Right Issue Committee of Board of Directors of the Company in its meeting held today i.e. April 13, 2026  has approved the allotment of 125,619,642 fully paid-up Equity Shares of face Value Rs 1 /- each at an issue price of Rs 1 /- each to the eligible applicants.
announcements.ai_summary: Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd's Rights Issue Committee, in a meeting held on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 125,619,642 fully paid-up Equity Shares. These shares have a face value of ₹1 each and were issued at a price of ₹1 each on a rights basis to eligible applicants. This allotment is in accordance with the Letter of Offer dated March 02, 2026, and the Basis of Allotment finalized with the Registrar to the Issue and BSE Limited. The meeting of the Rights Issue Committee took place between 06:55 pm and 7:15 pm on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Dhoot Industrial Finance Ltd - 526971 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: The shareholders of Dhoot Industrial Finance Ltd have approved an alteration to the company's Memorandum of Association (MOA) through a special resolution passed via postal ballot. This decision follows previous disclosures made on May 27, 2024, December 5, 2025, and February 11, 2026. The company has applied to the Registrar of Companies for the necessary approvals to implement these changes. Further details regarding the specific amendments to the MOA are provided in Annexure A. The company is awaiting further regulatory action to finalize the alteration.

announcements.subject: ICICI Bank Ltd - 532174 - Call With Media On Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: The Bank will host a conference call with media at 4:00 p.m. (IST) on April 18, 2026, to discuss the financial results of the Bank for quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: ICICI Bank Ltd will host a conference call with media on April 18, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. (IST) to discuss its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the bank will hold an earnings call with analysts and investors on the same day at 5:00 p.m. (IST) for the same purpose. Dial-in details for the media call will be shared separately, while universal dial-in numbers and toll-free numbers for the analyst call are provided. The audio recording and transcript will be available on the bank's website.

announcements.subject: Indian Overseas Bank - 532388 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Interest Rates Updates
announcements.detail: Change in MCLR w.e.f 15.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Overseas Bank has announced a revision in its Marginal Cost of Funds based Lending Rate (MCLR) effective from April 15, 2026. The Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) decided to reduce the Overnight, 1-Year, and 2-Year MCLR by 5 basis points (bps) each. The Overnight MCLR will now be 7.90%, the 1-Year MCLR will be 8.75%, and the 2-Year MCLR will also be 8.75%. Other MCLR tenors, including One-Month, Three-Month, Six-Month, and Three-Year, will remain unchanged. These revised rates will be effective until further review.

announcements.subject: Euro Panel Products Ltd - 544461 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release issued by Euro Panel Products Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Panel Products Ltd announced a significant financial achievement, crossing ₹500 Crore in revenue for the fiscal year FY26, representing a 19% year-over-year growth from ₹423.19 Crore in FY25. Production volumes also saw a substantial increase of 22.4%, reaching over 16 lakh sheets in FY26, driven by backward integration and an expanded product portfolio. To support its international expansion, the company established a wholly-owned subsidiary in Qatar and a distribution network in Europe. This growth is attributed to strategic improvements in the supply chain and the introduction of advanced facade solutions like AluZn, Eurodual, and SolidAL. The company is focused on building better products and improving its supply chain to drive future growth.

announcements.subject: Gail (India) Ltd - 532155 - EXTENSION OF COMPLETION SCHEDULE OF KOCHI- KOOTTANAD- BENGALURU- MANGALURU PIPELINE (KKBMPL) PROJECT
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure pertaining to event or information as stipulated in Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: GAIL (India) Ltd has announced an extension for the completion schedule of its Kochi-Koottanad-Bengaluru-Mangaluru Pipeline (KKBMPL) project. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The specific details regarding the revised completion timeline are provided in the enclosed disclosure document. Investors should refer to the full disclosure for the updated project schedule.

announcements.subject: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Ltd - 542904 - Update On Universal Banking Application
announcements.detail: Update on Universal Banking Application
announcements.ai_summary: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Limited has received a letter from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) dated April 13, 2026, regarding its application for voluntary transition from a Small Finance Bank to a Universal Bank. The RBI acknowledged the bank's efforts in diversifying its loan portfolio but noted that there is still scope for improvement in this area. Consequently, the RBI has returned the application and advised the bank to reapply after demonstrating a more diversified loan portfolio. This update is in continuation of the bank's previous communication dated February 04, 2025. The information will also be available on the bank's website.

announcements.subject: Roni Households Ltd - 542145 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
