announcements.detail: Pursuant to regulation 30, we would like to inform that the company has Sold  29066 Equity Shares representing 0.58% of the paid up Capital  of its Associate Roni Agro Limited Resulting in reduction of its Shareholding from 44.76% to 44.17% .
announcements.ai_summary: Roni Households Limited has divested 29,066 equity shares of its associate company, Roni Agro Limited, on April 13, 2026. These shares represent 0.58% of Roni Agro Limited's paid-up share capital. The sale was conducted at a price of Rs. 12 per share, amounting to a total consideration of Rs. 3,48,792. As a result of this transaction, Roni Households Limited's shareholding in Roni Agro Limited has decreased from 44.76% to 44.17%. Roni Agro Limited's turnover was Rs. 937.26 Lakhs, contributing 54.63% to the consolidated turnover, and its net worth was Rs. 512.73 lakhs, contributing 31.25% to the consolidated net worth.

announcements.subject: Hubtown Ltd - 532799 - Receipt Of NCLT Order In Relation To The Proposed Scheme Of Arrangement Between The Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited ("Transferee Company") And Hubtown Limited ("Transferor Company")
announcements.detail: The Company has received NCLT order in relation to the proposed Scheme of Arrangement between the Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited ("Transferee Company") and Hubtown Limited ("Transferor Company")
announcements.ai_summary: Hubtown Limited has received an order from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, dated April 09, 2026, concerning the proposed Scheme of Arrangement between Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited (Transferee Company) and Hubtown Limited (Transferor Company). The NCLT order directs Hubtown Limited to convene a meeting of its Equity Shareholders and Unsecured Creditors to consider and approve the Scheme. The company is awaiting the certified copy of this order. Hubtown Limited had previously approved this Scheme of Arrangement on February 14, 2025, subject to regulatory approvals. The company will provide further updates on the details of the shareholder and creditor meetings.

announcements.subject: Arunjyoti Bio Ventures Ltd - 530881 - Clarification In Trading Of The Shares Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Clarification in trading of the shares of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Arunjyoti Bio Ventures Limited has issued a clarification regarding unsolicited messages being circulated in the company's scrip. The company has been informed of these instances and advises investors to exercise due care and caution when dealing in the shares of Arunjyoti Bio Ventures Limited. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30(11) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Indoco Remedies Ltd - 532612 - Update On The Company''s Testing Facility  At Chhatrapati Sambaji Nagar - Aurangabad
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR)Regulations,2015, this is to inform you that the U.S. Food & Drug Administration completed Pre-approval inspection at the Company''s testing facility in Chhatrapati Sambaji Nagar (Aurangabad).
announcements.ai_summary: Indoco Remedies Limited has announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) has completed a Pre-Approval Inspection at the company's testing facility located in Chhatrapati Sambaji Nagar (Aurangabad). The inspection took place from April 08, 2026, to April 10, 2026, and concluded without any Form 483 observations. This update is provided pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: HMA Agro Industries Ltd - 543929 - RE: Intimation Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI(SAST) Regulation 2011
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir,

We hereby give the disclosure given by the sellers/promoters under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI(SAST) Regulation, 2011 for sale of shares through stock exchange mechanism for achieving the Minimum Public Shareholding(MPS) requirements.
announcements.ai_summary: HMA Agro Industries Limited promoters, including Mohammad Ashraf Qureshi, Mohammad Mehmood Qureshi, Zulfiqar Ahmad Qureshi, Gulzar Ahmad, and Wajid Ahmed, have sold a total of 3,31,81,173 equity shares through the stock exchange mechanism. This sale was conducted to comply with the Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements as per Rule 19A(1) of the Securities Contracts (Regulation) Rules, 1957, and Regulation 38 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, has been filed with the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: BCC Fuba India Ltd - 517246 - Announcement Under Reg 30-OCD Alloted By Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Announcement under Reg 30-OCD Allotted by Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: BCC Fuba India Ltd has allotted INR 8,00,00,000/- (Rupees Eight Crores Only) in Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) of its subsidiary, Iogems Technologies Private Limited. The OCDs were issued on a private placement basis at an issue price of INR 10/- per OCD, with a face value of INR 10/- each. These OCDs carry a coupon/interest of 7% per annum, payable annually, and have a tenure of 7 years from the allotment date of April 10th, 2026. The investment complies with relevant sections of the Companies Act, 2013, and necessary approvals have been obtained.

announcements.subject: Minda Corporation Ltd - 538962 - Incorporation Of New Joint Venture Company
announcements.detail: Incorporation of new Joint Venture Company
announcements.ai_summary: Minda Corporation Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Spark Minda Green Mobility Systems Private Limited (SMGM), has incorporated a new joint venture company named "Spark Minda Turntide Private Limited" in India on April 11, 2026. This incorporation follows a Joint Venture Agreement signed on March 09, 2026, between SMGM and Turntide Drives Limited, United Kingdom. The joint venture aims to develop and manufacture advanced new-generation motor controllers, axial flux motors, pumps for thermal applications, and other customized controllers for India's EV segment. This disclosure is in furtherance of the company's intimation on March 09, 2026, regarding the JV agreement.

announcements.subject: SEPC Ltd - 532945 - First And Final Reminder Cum Forfeiture Notice Dated April 09, 2026, In Respect Of First And Final Call On The Outstanding Partly Paid -Up Equity Shares
announcements.detail: We hereby inform the Exchange the First and Final Reminder Cum Forfeiture Notice in respect of First and Final Call on the Outstanding Partly Paid -Up Equity Shares of the Company issued and alloted on Rights Basis, pursuant to the Letter of Offer dated May 22, 2025. Detailed letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Ltd has issued a First and Final Reminder Cum Forfeiture Notice on April 13, 2026, for the outstanding 49,291,505 partly paid-up equity shares. These shares were issued and allotted on a rights basis pursuant to a Letter of Offer dated May 22, 2025. The First and Final Call amount is ₹5 per share, comprising ₹5.00 towards face value and ₹Nil towards premium. The payment period for this call is from April 15, 2026, to April 29, 2026, inclusive. This notice follows previous intimations on October 14, 2025, and November 12, 2025, and was approved by the Rights Issue Committee on November 12, 2025.

announcements.subject: Jaykay Enterprises Ltd - 500306 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations - Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Jaykay Enterprises Ltd has entered into a Slump Sale Agreement to acquire the business undertaking of Patange Industries Private Limited, Pune, for a net consideration of Rs. 5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crores only). This acquisition includes business operations, assets, intellectual property, and customer relationships. Patange Industries manufactures critical defence components, including warhead systems, and serves clients like BrahMos Aerospace and Bharat Dynamics Limited, who are also key customers of Jaykay Enterprises Ltd. This strategic move aims to strengthen Jaykay Enterprises Ltd's missile systems capabilities, enhance its competitive positioning, and improve margins through the integration of critical components. The transaction is expected to position the company strongly within India's growing defence sector, particularly in high-precision defence manufacturing and end-to-end missile subsystem capabilities. This announcement was made on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: H.G. Infra Engineering Ltd - 541019 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has received an order from Mirzapur Thermal Energy (UP) Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited has received an order from Mirzapur Thermal Energy (UP) Private Limited on April 13, 2026. The order is for the execution of Civil (earthwork, bridges, and Station buildings), and P-way works for the development of Railway Infrastructure at a 2x800 MW Thermal Power Project in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh. The project cost is Rs. 519.33 crore, including taxes, and the execution period is 18 months. The nature of the contract is Item Rate/BOQ.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd - 500040 - Certificate from CEO/CFO
announcements.detail: Certificate relating to Commercial Paper of the Company for the quarter ended on 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited has submitted a certificate from its Chief Financial Officer for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Chapter XVII of the SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS­PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The certificate confirms that the company has issued Commercial Papers (CP) for working capital requirements and that the proceeds have been used for the disclosed purposes. It also confirms adherence to the listing conditions specified in the SEBI Master Circular. The announcement was made on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd - 543953 - Change Of Market Maker Of The Company
announcements.detail: Change of Market Maker of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Khazanchi Jewellers Limited has announced a change in its Market Maker. M/s. SW Capital Private Limited has been appointed as the new Market Maker, replacing M/s. SVCM Securities Private Limited. This change is effective from April 01, 2026, as per the agreement executed between Khazanchi Jewellers Limited, Mark Corporate Advisors Private Limited (Merchant Banker), and SW Capital Private Limited. The company is listed on the BSE SME Platform.

announcements.subject: Tata Communications Ltd - 500483 - Certificate Of Compliance In Respect Of Commercial Papers Issued By The Company
announcements.detail: Certificate of compliance in respect of Commercial Papers issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Communications Ltd has issued a certificate of compliance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding its Commercial Papers (CPs). This compliance is in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The company confirms that the proceeds from its CPs have been utilized as disclosed and that all listing conditions under the relevant chapter have been met. As of March 31, 2026, the company had outstanding CPs with face values of ₹300,00,00,000 (ISIN: INE151A14248, maturity April 14, 2026), ₹750,00,00,000 (ISIN: INE151A14263, maturity April 24, 2026), and ₹300,00,00,000 (ISIN: INE151A14255, maturity May 22, 2026). These funds were used for working capital, repayment of debt, or general corporate purposes.

announcements.subject: Cyient Ltd - 532175 - Update
announcements.detail: Update
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cyient Ltd has informed that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Bengaluru Bench, has ordered the commencement of the liquidation process for Infotech HAL Limited, a 50:50 joint venture between Cyient Ltd and HAL. The NCLT admitted the Interlocutory Application filed by Infotech HAL Limited and appointed Mr. Vasudevan Gopu as the Liquidator. The NCLT order was received on March 3, 2026. The liquidation is being undertaken as the joint venture entity is not carrying out any business activity, and this measure is intended to mitigate further financial losses. The company has stated that there will be no quantitative or qualitative effect on the listed entity due to this liquidation.

announcements.subject: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd - 532922 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Submission of details of ISINs as per the provisions of the Chapter VIII of the Operational Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021 (updated as on April 13, 2022)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd has submitted its half-yearly report detailing the ISINs of Non-convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued on a private placement basis and listed on BSE. This submission is in accordance with Chapter VIII of SEBI Operational Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, as updated on April 13, 2022. The report covers the year ended March 31, 2026. The company has two NCD issuances detailed: one with ISIN INE532F07GN0, issued on October 28, 2024, with a maturity date of April 28, 2027, and a coupon rate of 10.20% annually, with Rs. 50,00,00,000 issued and outstanding. The second NCD, with ISIN INE532F07IS5, was issued on February 13, 2026, matures on February 12, 2029, has a 9.50% annual coupon rate, and also has Rs. 50,00,00,000 issued and outstanding.

announcements.subject: Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd - 540788 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail: Aftertrade Broking Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Pre-Offer Advertisement and Corrignendum to the Detailed Public Statement under Regulation 18(7) in terms of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 to the Public Shareholders of the Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aftertrade Broking Pvt Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Pre-Offer Advertisement and a Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement to BSE for the shareholders of Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd. This submission is in compliance with Regulation 18(7) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The offer is for the acquisition of 26,76,180 Equity Shares by Mr. Arvind Karsandas Bhanushali, Mrs. Deepali Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Jay Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Nikunj Velji Mange, and Mr. Raj Arvind Bhanushali, along with Mrs. Shraddha Nikunj Mange (PAC). The advertisement and corrigendum were published on April 13, 2026, in The Financial Express (English), Jansatta (Hindi), and Mumbai Lakshdeep (Marathi).

announcements.subject: Punjab National Bank - 532461 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in RTA
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Change of Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agent (RTA)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Punjab National Bank (PNB) has announced a change in its Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agent (RTA). The Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 13, 2026, approved the transition from M/s Beetal Financial & Computer Services Pvt. Ltd. to M/s KFin Technologies Limited. This change is a result of a structured Request for Proposal (RFP) process. Beetal will continue to act as the RTA until the completion of data transition, shifting of electronic connectivity, and other necessary procedures, including confirmations from NSDL and CDSL. The effective date of the change will be communicated separately once these procedures are finalized.

announcements.subject: Qualitek Labs Ltd - 544091 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation under regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) regulation 2015 - Participation of Mr. Antaryami Nayak, Managing director & CEO of the company, in Podcast Interview.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Qualitek Labs Ltd has informed the stock exchanges on April 13, 2026, that its Managing Director & CEO, Mr. Antaryami Nayak, participated in a podcast interview. During the interview, Mr. Nayak shared general insights on the Testing, Inspection & Certification (TIC) industry and discussed the company's business operations and the industry landscape at a broad level. The company has clarified that no unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI) was shared or discussed during this interaction. The podcast is available for viewing at the provided YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AWnlaydkuY8. This disclosure is made for information and record purposes.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of 6 New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 6 new Branches on April 13, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 956 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: City Union Bank Ltd has announced the opening of six new branches on April 13, 2026. These new branches are located in Perinthalmanna, Adoor, Indore - Sukhliya, Hanamkonda - Waddepally, Badangpet, and Madhapar. Following this expansion, the bank now operates a total of 956 branches. This initiative is part of the bank's ongoing efforts to increase its geographical reach and customer accessibility. The bank has provided the specific addresses and branch numbers for each new location.

announcements.subject: Vraj Iron And Steel Ltd - 544204 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation of grant of electricity duty exemption on electricity generated from the solar power plant for captive consumption at its siltara division.
announcements.ai_summary: Vraj Iron and Steel Limited has received an order from the Chief Electrical Inspector, Government of Chhattisgarh, Raipur, granting an exemption from paying Electricity Duty. This exemption applies to electricity generated from the company's Solar Photovoltaic Power Plant installed for captive consumption at its Siltara Division. The exemption is effective from December 17, 2025, and will remain valid as long as the solar power plant is operational for auxiliary use. This exemption is expected to result in significant savings in energy costs, improve operating margins and cash flows, and support the company's renewable energy initiatives. The exact financial impact will depend on the quantum of power generated and consumed.

announcements.subject: Bigbloc Construction Ltd - 540061 - Intimation Of Change In IR
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Bigbloc Construction Limited has announced a change in its Investor Relations (IR) Advisor. Churchgate Advisory Private Limited will no longer serve as the IR Advisor for the company. Bigbloc Construction Limited has engaged Valorem Advisors as its new IR Advisor, effective from the Financial Year 2026-27. This intimation is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors are requested to take note of this change.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Zinc Ltd - 500188 - Declaration Of Successful Bidder For Critical Mineral Blocks Under Critical Mineral Auctions Tranche V Conducted By The Ministry Of Mines, Government Of India
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited (HZL) has been declared the 'Successful Bidder' for the Jhandawali – Satipura Amalgamated Potash and Halite Block in Rajasthan. This was announced by the Ministry of Mines, Government of India, as part of Tranche V of critical mineral block auctions. HZL participated in the e-auction and secured the block based on the highest Final Price Offer of 03.05%. The block is at the G3 level of exploration and covers a total area of 1841.22 hectares. A Composite License deed in favor of Hindustan Zinc Limited will be executed and submitted. This information is provided pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd - 543498 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.ai_summary: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd has issued a clarification regarding recent media reports concerning labor protests in Noida and other cities. The company states that these are broader labor issues affecting multiple industries, driven by misinformation about wage revisions. Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd confirms that its operations remain compliant with all applicable laws and that there has been no material impact on the company. Employee safety is highlighted as the company's top priority. Authorities are actively working with the industry to restore normalcy as quickly as possible. This announcement is made in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and will be simultaneously released to the media.

announcements.subject: Travel Food Services Ltd - 544443 - Regulation 30 - Update
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 - Update
announcements.ai_summary: Travel Food Services Ltd has provided an update regarding an ongoing litigation involving the company and an order passed by the Hon’ble High Court of Delhi on April 6, 2026. The Court has allowed a petition filed by the Airport Authority of India under Section 34 of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996, setting aside an arbitral award dated September 26, 2022, which was in favor of Travel Food Services Ltd. This award related to arbitration proceedings initiated by the company in 2018 concerning its operations at the Dabolim Airport, Goa. The company is currently assessing the implications of this order with its legal advisors to safeguard its interests. Further details are provided in Annexure I, and the information is also uploaded on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Tirupati Finlease Ltd - 539488 - Compliances-Reg.24(A)-Annual Secretarial Compliance
announcements.detail: Non Applicability of Regulation 24A of SEBI (LODR) Regulation
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Tirupati Finlease Ltd, has informed the Bombay Stock Exchange that Regulation 24A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to it for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. This exemption is due to the company's paid-up equity share capital not exceeding ₹10 Crore and its net worth not exceeding ₹25 Crore as of the last day of the previous financial year. Tirupati Finlease Ltd has confirmed it meets the prescribed threshold criteria for non-applicability and will inform the exchange if this status changes in the future. This disclosure is made in compliance with SEBI regulations and circulars.

announcements.subject: Texel Industries Ltd - 526638 - Outcome Of The Finance And Investment Committee Duly Convened On 13Th April, 2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Finance and Investment Committee duly convened on 13th April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Finance and Investment Committee of Texel Industries Ltd, in its meeting on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,75,000 equity shares to Avani Shailesh Mehta, a promoter, upon conversion of warrants. The conversion price is Rs. 38.25 per share, including a premium of Rs. 28.25 per share. The company received Rs. 50,20,312.50, representing 75% of the full consideration for the conversion. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital increased from Rs. 13,56,84,280 (1,35,68,428 shares) to Rs. 13,74,34,280 (1,37,43,428 shares), with a face value of Rs. 10 per share. Avani Shailesh Mehta still has 3,47,875 warrants pending for conversion.

announcements.subject: Shiva Texyarn Ltd - 511108 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015 - Update
announcements.detail: Update on the pending material litigations as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements), Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Shiva Texyarn Limited has provided an update on a material litigation with M/s. Louis Dreyfus Company India Pvt. Ltd. The company had filed a petition before the Hon'ble High Court of Mumbai to set aside an award passed by a Sole Arbitrator. Based on a compromise agreement and consent terms, the Hon'ble High Court of Mumbai has set aside the Arbitration Award, and the petition stands disposed off. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Avonmore Capital & Management Services Ltd - 511589 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: updates on Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Avonmore Capital & Management Services Ltd has successfully completed the acquisition of 100% stake in Excelling Geo & Engineering Consultant Private Limited on April 13, 2026. Following the fulfillment of all conditions precedent as per the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Excelling Geo & Engineering Consultant Private Limited has become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Avonmore Capital & Management Services Ltd. Details regarding this acquisition were previously disclosed on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: Systematix Corporate Services Ltd - 526506 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that the Company has made investment through rights issue in its Wholly-Owned Subsidiary i.e. M/s. Systematix Shares and Stocks (India) Limited by subscribing to 17,50,036 equity shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each at an issue price of Rs. 200/- (Including premium of Rs. 190/-) per equity share
announcements.ai_summary: Systematix Corporate Services Limited has invested Rs. 35,00,07,200 in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Systematix Shares and Stocks (India) Limited, through a rights issue. The company subscribed to 17,50,036 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at an issue price of Rs. 200 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 190 per share. Systematix Shares and Stocks (India) Limited is a SEBI registered intermediary engaged in the broking business.

announcements.subject: Mankind Pharma Ltd - 543904 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Board of Directors of the Company in its meeting held on April 13, 2026 i.e. today, approved the closure/winding up of Mankind Pharma Lanka (Private) Limited, a WOS incorporated in Sri Lanka.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Mankind Pharma Ltd, in a meeting held on April 13, 2026, approved the closure and winding up of its wholly owned subsidiary, Mankind Pharma Lanka (Private) Limited, incorporated in Sri Lanka. The decision was made because changed regulatory requirements have rendered the anticipated business objectives unviable. The company stated that there have been no business operations in this subsidiary, and it is not considered a material subsidiary. The Board meeting commenced at 03:00 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 03:15 P.M. (IST). Further details are provided in Annexure-I as per Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Kalpataru Projects International Ltd - 522287 - Certificate from CEO/CFO
announcements.detail: Certificate issued by the Chief Financial Officer of the Company for the quarter ended March, 31, 2025
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kalpataru Projects International Ltd has submitted a certificate from its Chief Financial Officer for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This certificate confirms that the company has utilized the proceeds of Commercial Papers (CPs) as stated in the Disclosure Documents and has adhered to the listing conditions specified in Chapter XVII of the SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The Commercial Paper was allotted on November 13, 2025, and was redeemed on its maturity date, February 11, 2026. This submission is in accordance with Para 10 of Chapter XVII of the aforementioned SEBI Master Circular.

announcements.subject: Aqylon Nexus Ltd - 530943 - Revised Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Saturday 11 April, 2026
announcements.detail: Revised Outcome of Board Meeting held on Saturday 11 April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Aqylon Nexus Limited (formerly Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Limited) held a Board Meeting on Saturday, April 11, 2026, and has revised the outcome of this meeting. The Board considered and approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor’s Report. The company has also approved a proposal to incorporate a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (100% ownership) in Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority, United Arab Emirates (UAE), to be named M/s Aqylon Nexus Holding LLC or as approved by authorities. This decision is driven by the significant growth and strong market demand for the company's AI Technology Products and Services. Director Mr. Kiran Kumar Inampudi has been authorized to undertake all necessary steps for this incorporation.

announcements.subject: MRF Ltd - 500290 -  Specification Related To International Securities Identification Numbers For The Debt Securities For The Period Ended - 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Details Attached
announcements.ai_summary: MRF Limited has provided an update on its debt securities, specifically those issued on a private placement basis, as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made pursuant to SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/PICIR12025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025, and Regulation 17(1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The company has listed the International Securities Identification Numbers (ISINs) for its debt securities. Notably, MRF has one outstanding debt instrument with ISIN INE883A08016, issued on February 24, 2023, with a maturity date of February 24, 2026. This instrument carries a coupon rate of 6.87% payable annually and has an embedded option if issued. The outstanding amount for this issuance is Rs. 150 crore. These debentures were listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Reclassification Of Promoters
announcements.detail: Reclassification of Promoters
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IIRM Holdings India Ltd has informed the stock exchanges on April 13, 2026, regarding an application for reclassification of promoters under Regulation 31A(8)(c) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company had applied for the reclassification of Mr. Rajiv Agarwal, Ms. Indu Bala Agarwal, Ms. Anupma Agarwal (deceased), Mr. J L Gupta (deceased), Sudev Constructions Private Limited, Sudev Exports Limited, and Sudev Financial Consultants Private Limited from promoter to public category. The company noted that in cases of promoter death, classification as promoter automatically ceases as per Regulation 31A(6)(c), and they were under the bona fide view that filing the reclassification application was procedural. The company assures that necessary steps will be taken for timely compliance in the future.

announcements.subject: Athena Global Technologies Ltd-$ - 517429 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of Athena Global Technologies Ltd met on April 13, 2026, and approved the allotment of 7,00,000 (Seven Lakhs) share warrants to Karthikeya Manchala, a promoter group member. These warrants are convertible into an equal number of equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 84/- per warrant, including a premium of Rs. 74/- per share. The company has received 25% of the total consideration, aggregating to Rs. 1,47,00,000/-, as required by SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The allotment was made in accordance with the shareholder approval from the EGM on March 25, 2026, and the in-principle approval from BSE Limited on April 1, 2026. There is no change in the company's paid-up capital at this stage.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Capital Services Ltd - 511766 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Statement of Debt Securities for the half-year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Muthoot Capital Services Limited has issued a revised submission for its Statement of Debt Securities for the half-year ended March 31, 2026. The company corrected an inadvertent error in the maturity date of the Debenture bearing ISIN: INE296G07309, changing it from "July 19, 2027" to "July 29, 2027." This correction, made on April 13, 2026, does not alter any other previously disclosed particulars. The revised disclosure adheres to SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 and Regulation 17 of the SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The company has outstanding debt securities including Rs. 100 Crores with ISIN INE296G07135 maturing on December 28, 2026, and Rs. 50 Crores with ISIN INE296G07150 maturing on May 16, 2027.

announcements.subject: A-1 Ltd - 542012 - Revised Intimation Regarding Debt-Free Fleet And Increase In Vehicles/Tankers
announcements.detail: Revised Intimation Regarding Debt- free Fleet and increase in Vehicles/ Tanker
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: A-1 Ltd has provided a revised intimation regarding its fleet of vehicles and tankers. The company announced that over 90% of its fleet is now debt-free, with the remaining dues expected to be settled by October 2026, resulting in a 100% owned debt-free fleet. Additionally, A-1 Ltd is expanding its fleet by adding 10 multi-excel vehicles/tankers. This expansion aims to strengthen its logistics department, meet customer requirements on time, reduce delays, boost sales, and enhance market competitiveness by reducing dependency on transporters. The company anticipates a significant boost in its logistics revenue.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Microfin Ltd - 544055 - Certificate from CEO/CFO
announcements.detail: The CFO certificate of utilization of CP for quarter ended 31 March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Muthoot Microfin Limited has submitted a certificate from its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) confirming the utilization of proceeds from Commercial Paper (CP) issuances for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This certification is in compliance with Chapter XVII of the SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025, and the SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021. The CFO has confirmed that the CP proceeds were used for the purposes disclosed in the respective offer documents and that all other listing conditions have been adhered to. The company has requested BSE Limited to take this information on record.

announcements.subject: JOJO Ltd - 531910 - Change In Website Of The Company
announcements.detail: Change in Website of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: JOJO Limited (formerly known as Madhuveer Com 18 Network Limited) has officially changed its website to https://jojolimited.com, effective from April 13, 2026. This change reflects the company's recent name change and aims to provide easier access and better identification for shareholders, investors, and other stakeholders. The previous website, https://www.mcom18.com/, will be discontinued or redirected to the new URL in due course. All required disclosures and investor information will continue to be available on the new website.

announcements.subject: Kothari Products Ltd - 530299 - CONFIRMATION NOT BEING A LARGE ENTITY
announcements.detail: CONFIRMATION NOT BEING A LARGE ENTITY
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kothari Products Ltd has confirmed that it is "Not a Large Entity" as of March 31, 2026. This confirmation is in response to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 and related BSE and NSE circulars concerning fund raising by issuance of debt securities by Large Entities. The company does not meet the criteria to be classified as a Large Entity. This declaration is for the information and records of the stock exchanges. The announcement was made on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd - 532481 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On April 13, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on April 13, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd held a Board Meeting on April 13, 2026, from 11:30 a.m. to 1:15 p.m. The Board of Directors took note of an independent assessment regarding the operations, maintenance, and major maintenance requirements for the DND Flyway. Additionally, the Board was updated on the status of ongoing road upgradation work. This information is being disclosed in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company's corporate office is in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, and its registered office is in New Delhi.

announcements.subject: Glittek Granites Ltd - 513528 - Regulation 32(1) Statement Of Deviation
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that during the year the company has not raised fund by public issues/ right issues / preferential issues / QIP / others.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Glittek Granites Ltd has announced that during the financial year ending March 31, 2026, the company has not raised any funds through public issues, rights issues, preferential issues, Qualified Institutional Placements (QIP), or any other means. This confirmation is in accordance with Regulation 32(1) of SEBI regulations. The company's registered office is located in Hoskote, Bangalore Rural, Karnataka. The announcement was made on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd - 543991 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Issuance Of Tokens Under The Name Sust (Sustainable Token)
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we would like to inform you that Techknowgreen Solutions Limited has decided to issue Tokens on blockchain under the name 'SusT' (Sustainable Token) as part of its sustainability-linked initiatives. 

We have uploaded a comprehensive Whitepaper which details tokenomics, rules of issuance, and phase-wise plan. 

The issuance of these tokens, ....
announcements.ai_summary: Techknowgreen Solutions Limited has announced its decision to issue tokens on the blockchain under the name 'SusT' (Sustainable Token) as part of its sustainability-linked initiatives. A comprehensive Whitepaper detailing the tokenomics, rules of issuance, and a phase-wise plan has been uploaded. The issuance of these tokens, commencing on April 2, 2026, will be based on specific criteria. For service-based issuance, Copper Tokens equivalent to 0.1% of the payment amount received from the client will be issued. Additionally, for the Yuka Yantra - Air Purifier, 1 Cu SusT token will be issued for every 10,000 m³ of air purified. The company is an established environmental consulting and solutions firm with over two decades of experience.

announcements.subject: Dev Accelerator Ltd - 544513 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Accelerator Limited (DevX) has announced a significant enterprise deal valued at ₹110 Crore with Manubhai and Shah LLP. This 9-year contract involves approximately 1,00,000 sq. ft. of managed workspace at DevX's Capital One campus in Ahmedabad, which has a total capacity of 2,000 seats. This agreement highlights the growing institutional demand for managed office solutions, particularly in Tier-II cities, and reinforces DevX's annuity-led growth strategy. Manubhai and Shah LLP will be relocating its headquarters to this premium managed campus. The deal also includes over 1,000 seats committed in Phase 1. Other enterprise clients in the campus include Openxcell Technolabs Private Limited with 360 seats and Tatvic Digital Analytics.

announcements.subject: Stovec Industries Ltd - 504959 - Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
announcements.detail: Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for the FY2025
announcements.ai_summary: The company has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year ending December 31, 2025, as required by SEBI regulations. This report details the company's environmental, social, and governance practices. Stovec Industries Ltd, a subsidiary of SPG Prints B.V. in the Netherlands, manufactures rotary and digital printing machines, engravers, and related consumables. The company's paid-up capital is ₹20,880,160.00. The BRSR report is prepared on a standalone basis and will be available on the company's website, www.stovec.com. The report covers the company's business activities, which accounted for 100% of its turnover in manufacturing printing machines and 83.30% in textile consumables and graphics products.

announcements.subject: Pakka Ltd-$ - 516030 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Lapse Of Warrants Allotted On A Preferential Basis And Forfeiture Of Upfront Amount
announcements.detail: Kindly find attached herewith Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 with regard to Lapse of 36,00,000 warrants allotted on Preferential Basis and forfeiture of 25% upfront Money as given in attached disclosure.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pakka Limited announced the lapse of 36,00,000 warrants that were allotted on a preferential basis on October 14, 2024, at an issue price of Rs. 272/- per warrant. These warrants were convertible into equity shares and had a deadline for conversion by April 13, 2026, as per SEBI ICDR Regulations. As no conversion applications were received within the stipulated 18-month period, the warrants have lapsed. Consequently, the upfront amount equivalent to 25% of the issue price, paid at the time of allotment, has been forfeited by the company, in accordance with Regulation 169(1) of the SEBI ICDR Regulations. This disclosure was made on April 13, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.

announcements.subject: Safa Systems & Technologies Ltd - 543461 - Non- Applicability Of Large Entity Disclosure
announcements.detail: Safa Systems & Technologies Limited, does not fall in the category of Large Entities as per the applicable provisions.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Safa Systems & Technologies Limited has informed the stock exchanges that it does not fall under the definition of "Large Entities" as per the provisions of SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018, and SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-RACPOD1/P/CIR/2023/172 dated October 19, 2023. This clarification is in relation to fund raising by the issuance of debt securities by large entities. The company's Managing Director, Faizal Bavaraparambil Abdul Khader, confirmed this on April 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Puravankara Ltd - 532891 - Operational Performance Update Q4 FY26 For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Operational Performace Update Q4 FY26 for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Puravankara Limited reported a significant operational performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. In Q4 FY26, the company's sales increased by 190% to Rs. 3,547 crores, compared to Rs. 1,225 crores in the previous year. For the full fiscal year FY26, total sales reached Rs. 7,407 crores, marking a 55% increase from FY25. Customer collections for Q4 FY26 were Rs. 1,213 crores, up 36% year-on-year, and for FY26, collections stood at Rs. 4,258 crores, a 15% increase. The company handed over 1,301 homes (1.67 msft) in Q4 FY26, bringing the FY26 total to 3,747 homes (4.25 msft). Puravankara plans to launch 30 new projects over the next 24 months, with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over Rs 55,000 crores.

announcements.subject: HCL Technologies Ltd - 532281 - Conference Call On The Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed please find an intimation on the captioned subject.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: HCL Technologies Ltd. will announce its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, after the Indian stock markets close. Following the announcement, senior management will host an audio conference call at 7:30 p.m. (IST) for 60 minutes to discuss the results and conduct a question-answer session. Investors can participate via dial-in numbers provided for various regions, including India, Hong Kong, Singapore, UK, and USA. A live audio webcast will be available on www.hcltech.com/investor-relations, and a replay will be accessible until April 28, 2026.

announcements.subject: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust - 543290 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust (PGInvIT) has submitted its unitholding pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report indicates that the Sponsor Group, including its associates and related parties, holds 13,65,00,100 units, representing 15.00% of the total units. Public holding includes 9,29,64,562 units held by Mutual Funds, accounting for 10.22% of the total units. The filing is made in compliance with SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and the SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/102 dated July 11, 2025. The information has been provided by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar & Transfer Agent for PGInvIT.

announcements.subject: R R Kabel Ltd - 543981 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: R R Kabel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated 13 April 2026 titled " RR Kabel Expands FMEG Portfolio with New Kitchen  Appliances and Enhanced Air Cooler Range."
announcements.ai_summary: RR Kabel Ltd has issued a press release on April 13, 2026, announcing the expansion of its Fast-Moving Electrical Goods (FMEG) portfolio. The company is strategically entering the Kitchen Appliances segment with products like Mixer Grinders, Electric Cooktops (Induction and Infra-Red), and Hand Blenders under its RR Signature brand. This move aims for deeper penetration into Indian households. Furthermore, RR Kabel has enhanced its Air Cooler range by introducing Industrial (Semi-Commercial) Air Coolers with higher tank capacities and superior air throw. The company plans to introduce additional kitchen appliance categories in FY26-27.

announcements.subject: Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd - 531859 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of award from Rail Coach Factory, Kapurthala
announcements.ai_summary: Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd has secured a new order worth Rs. 1,57,36,863.50 from Rail Coach Factory, Kapurthala, Indian Railways. The order involves the manufacturing, supply, and installation of 25 sets of "one set of seats & berths for LHB GS coaches." The delivery timeline for this order is September 28, 2026. Payment terms stipulate that 95% of the contract value will be paid upon submission of an inspection certificate and proof of dispatch or delivery, with the remaining 5% released after receipt, inspection, and acceptance by the consignee. This is a domestic order, and the promoter/promoter group has no interest in the awarding entity.

announcements.subject: NBCC (India) Ltd - 534309 - Intimation Of Mou Between NBCC And HUDCO
announcements.detail: As per the attached intimation
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has entered into two Memorandum of Understandings (MoUs) with Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) on April 11, 2026. The first MoU is for the joint redevelopment of August Kranti Bhawan, Bhikaji Cama Place, New Delhi, covering approximately 18830 sqmt. NBCC will provide techno-economic feasibility studies, construction, project management, and monetization of built-up space. The second MoU focuses on HUDCO providing funds for NBCC's ongoing and upcoming self-sustainable model projects, with NBCC offering Project Management and Marketing consultancy services. This collaboration is expected to expedite project execution and enhance asset value.

announcements.subject: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd - 543299 - Clarification Regarding Social Media Rumours - CPCB Directions And Relief Obtained In Respect Of Certain Units At Rengali Plant, Sambalpur, Odisha
announcements.detail: We are enclosing the clarification regarding social media rumours-CPCB Directions
announcements.ai_summary: Shyam Metalics and Energy Limited has provided clarification regarding social media rumors concerning its Rengali Plant in Sambalpur, Odisha. The Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) had initially issued directions for the closure of one Pellet Plant, the Ferro Alloys Plant, and the Power Plant due to pollution-related non-compliances. Following representations from the company, the CPCB has granted relief from these closure directions and instructed the Odisha State Pollution Control Board (OSPCB) to facilitate the resumption of operations. The company has been given a period of three months to achieve full compliance and is undertaking necessary remedial measures.

announcements.subject: Piramal Pharma Ltd - 543635 - Successful Closure Of US FDA Inspection At Piramal Pharma'S Manufacturing Facility Located At Lexington, USA
announcements.detail: Please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Pharma Limited has announced the successful closure of the US FDA inspection at its manufacturing facility located in Lexington, USA. The company received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) with a VAI (Voluntary Action Indicated) status, marking the completion of the inspection. This update follows a previous intimation on December 11, 2025, regarding the commencement of the inspection. The disclosure is being made on the first working day after the receipt of the EIR.

announcements.subject: Unichem Laboratories Ltd - 506690 - Announcement Under Reg. 30 - Product Recall
announcements.detail: Pl. find attached herewith announcement under Reg. 30.
announcements.ai_summary: Unichem Laboratories Ltd announced a voluntary product recall by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Unichem Pharmaceuticals (USA), Inc., for its Buspirone Hydrochloride Tablets, USP, 5 mg strength in 500 count bottles. The recall is due to an out-of-specification (OOS) assay result identified at the 12-month long-term stability time point. The company has not received any reports of adverse events related to this recall to date. Unichem Laboratories Ltd emphasizes its highest priority on patient safety and product quality. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The recall is effective from the date of the announcement.

announcements.subject: Reliance Communications Ltd - 532712 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Reg. 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015 - Confirmation of provisional attachment orders by Adjudicating Authority (update on disclosure filed with stock exchanges on 04.11.2026)
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Communications Ltd has provided an update regarding provisional attachment orders (PAOs) issued by the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002. The Hon’ble Adjudicating Authority has confirmed the attachment of property under PAO No. 32/2025, PAO No. 36/2025, and PAO No. 40/2025. Specifically, PAO No. 32/2025, dated October 31, 2025, relates to the lease of a plot of land measuring 3.7 Acres situated at Maharaja Ranjit Singh Marg, New Delhi. This confirmation follows earlier disclosures made on November 04, 2025, and November 20, 2025, concerning PAOs received in respect of assets of Reliance Communications Limited, Campion Properties Limited, and Reliance Realty Limited.

announcements.subject: Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd - 544081 - Litigation Involving A Wholly Owned Subsidiary - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Litigation Involving Wholly Owned Subsidiary  - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Jyoti CNC Automation Limited has disclosed a litigation involving its material wholly-owned subsidiary, Huron Graffenstaden SAS. French authorities have initiated an investigation against Huron Graffenstaden SAS and certain employees concerning export controls and documentation of dual-use machinery. As interim measures, the director general of Huron Graffenstaden SAS has been temporarily restricted from duties, and certain bank accounts totaling approximately EUR 4.0 million, along with two residential properties owned by Jyoti SAS, have been seized. A formal judicial investigation has been launched. Huron Graffenstaden SAS refutes the allegations and is seeking clarity and legal advice to contest these actions. The company believes that while seized assets and involved employees may be temporarily unavailable, the current business and operations of Huron Graffenstaden SAS remain unaffected. Furthermore, these actions are not expected to adversely impact Jyoti CNC Automation Limited's standalone business and operations, which contribute over 85% of the Group's revenue.

announcements.subject: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd - 517334 - Voluntary Dissolution Of Indirect Wholly Owned Subsidiary.
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchange regarding voluntary dissolution of foreign wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has announced the voluntary dissolution of its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, SMRC Automotive Interior Modules Croatia d.o.o. (“SMRC-Croatia”). The Commercial Court of Zagreb dissolved SMRC-Croatia from its register effective April 11, 2026, following an application by the subsidiary. SMRC-Croatia was dissolved as it had no foreseeable new business and was incurring significant annual costs. The turnover and net worth of SMRC-Croatia during FY 2024-25 were Euro 256,362 and €6,448 respectively, which are considered negligible and represent 0.00% of the consolidated revenue and net worth of Samvardhana Motherson International Limited. The dissolution was based on a Commercial Court order dated March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Baazar Style Retail Ltd - 544243 -  Intimation Of Opening Of A New Retail Store Of The Company
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform that the Company has opened a new store of Express Baazar at Balasore, Odisha, today
announcements.ai_summary: Baazar Style Retail Limited has opened a new retail store under the brand "Express Baazar" in Balasore, Odisha. This marks an expansion of the company's retail footprint. With the addition of this new store, the total number of stores operated by Baazar Style Retail Limited now stands at 270 as of today, April 12, 2026. This expansion is in line with the company's ongoing strategy to increase its market presence.

announcements.subject: Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd - 540530 - Mous Between HUDCO And NBCC
announcements.detail: MoUs between HUDCO and NBCC
announcements.ai_summary: Housing & Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) has signed two Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with NBCC (India) Limited on April 11, 2026. These MoUs aim to foster collaboration and leverage each other's strengths. The first MoU focuses on the redevelopment of a leasehold plot of approximately 18830 sqmt. at Bhikaji Cama Place, New Delhi, covering techno-economic feasibility, construction, project management, and space monetization. The second MoU involves undertaking asset monetization activities for NBCC's self-sustainable model projects, where HUDCO will provide funding and NBCC will offer project management and consultancy services, subject to Government of India approval.

announcements.subject: NCL Industries Ltd-$ - 502168 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir, 

Please take this intimation on record.

Thanks
Company Secretary
announcements.ai_summary: NCL Industries Ltd has provided its monthly business updates for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For cement, production increased by 2% to 8,02,600 MT and dispatches by 1% to 8,04,813 MT for the quarter, with year-end figures showing a 2% increase in both production and dispatches. However, Cement Boards saw a significant decline in production (-51%) and dispatches (-22%) for the quarter, and a -39% and -29% decrease respectively for the year. RMC production and sales decreased by 5% for the quarter and 12% for the year. Door production and sales saw a 100% drop for the quarter and a 94% drop for the year. Energy (Hydro Power) production decreased by 21% for the quarter but increased by 3% for the year.

announcements.subject: Everest Industries Ltd - 508906 - Completion Of Sale Of Land At Podanur Under Phase I
announcements.detail: This intimation is in furtherance to our initial intimation dated August 29, 2025 on the board approval and execution of a binding term sheet for the sale of vacant land at Podanur and subsequent updates in connection with the said transaction on October 27, 2025, January 25, 2026 and April 01, 2026. As per the last update dated April 01, 2026, we had informed the exchanges that the phase I sale of land of ~ 16 acres would be completed  in the month ....
announcements.ai_summary: On April 10, 2026, Everest Industries Limited concluded the sale of approximately 16.84 acres of vacant land at Kurichi Village, Podanur, Coimbatore District, Tamil Nadu, to G Square Properties Private Limited. This transaction is the Phase I completion of a sale initiated with a binding term sheet approved by the board on August 29, 2025, with subsequent updates provided on October 27, 2025, January 25, 2026, and April 1, 2026. The sale deed was executed and registered on the transaction date. The company has stated that the sale of vacant, excess land is not applicable for turnover or revenue contribution calculations for the last financial year.

announcements.subject: Shalby Ltd - 540797 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Approval For Kidney Transplant At Shalby Hospitals, Krishna Unit-Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt pf approval for kidney transplant of Shalby Hospitals, Krishna unit-Regulation 30 SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shalby Hospitals' Krishna unit in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, has received approval for performing kidney transplants for a period of 5 years, effective from April 9, 2026. This approval aims to provide local access to advanced transplant services, reducing the need for patients to travel long distances and incur associated costs. It also facilitates comprehensive pre- and post-transplant management within a single facility, enhancing continuity of care. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE Limited about this development.

announcements.subject: Uravi Defence and Technology Ltd - 543930 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Of The Company Held On Saturday, April 11, 2026.
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that the Board of Directors at their meeting held today, considered and approved, inter alia, the Unaudited consolidated financial results of the Company for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025 along with the Limited Review Report.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Uravi Defence and Technology Ltd. met on Saturday, April 11, 2026, and approved the Unaudited consolidated financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The Board also approved the accompanying Limited Review Report. These results will be made available on the websites of the Stock Exchanges (NSE and BSE) and the company's website, www.uravilamps.com, along with a QR code for easy access. The Board meeting commenced at 3:50 P.M. and concluded at 4:20 P.M. This announcement provides investors with the latest financial performance of the company for the specified periods.

announcements.subject: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd - 544332 - Corporate Announcement On Order Booking And Update
announcements.detail: Corporate Announcement on Order booking and update for month of March 31,2026
announcements.ai_summary: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd. has announced its order bookings and business updates for the month ending March 31, 2026. During March 2026, the company secured consolidated orders totaling ₹9.82 crore, with the Pharma sector contributing ₹7.67 crore, Renewable Energy ₹2.13 crore, and Others ₹0.02 crore. By business vertical, Cleanroom Partitions accounted for ₹7.49 crore and HVAC Systems for ₹2.33 crore. As of March 31, 2026, the consolidated order book stands at ₹199.21 crore, with significant portions from Renewable Energy (₹117.08 crore) and Pharma (₹41.95 crore). The company also has orders under active consideration amounting to ₹482 crore, with major opportunities in Renewable Energy (₹296.10 crore) and Pharma (₹164.71 crore). This indicates continued growth and diversification across high-growth sectors.

announcements.subject: Somany Ceramics Ltd - 531548 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Receipt of First Motion Order passed by National Company Law Tribunal, Kolkata Bench regarding Scheme of Amalgamation of Somany Bathware Limited, Somany Excel Vitrified Private Limited and SR Continental Limited (hereinafter collectively referred to as the Transferor Companies) with and into Somany Ceramics Limited (Company/ Transferee Company) and their respective shareholders and creditors.
announcements.ai_summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, has passed a First Motion Order approving the Scheme of Amalgamation. This scheme involves the amalgamation of Somany Bathware Limited, Somany Excel Vitrified Private Limited, and SR Continental Limited (collectively the Transferor Companies) with and into Somany Ceramics Limited (the Transferee Company). The NCLT order, pronounced on April 9, 2026, and uploaded on April 10, 2026, directs the convening of meetings for the equity shareholders and unsecured creditors of Somany Ceramics Limited on June 13, 2026, via Video Conferencing. Notably, the NCLT has dispensed with the meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors of the Transferor Companies, as well as the secured creditors of both Transferor and Transferee Companies. This marks a significant step towards the completion of the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd - 524136 - Disclosure Under Reg 30 For Change In Nominee Shareholders Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Disclosure under reg 30 for change in nominee shareholders of wholly owned subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd has disclosed a change in nominee shareholders of its wholly owned subsidiary, India Trading Infra Limited, following a meeting of its Executive Committee of the Board of Directors on April 11, 2026. The changes involve the transfer of one equity share of Rs. 10/- each for three sets of outgoing nominees (Divya Jain, Ankit Jain, and Shivangi Jain) to three incoming nominees (Stuti Jain, Samayak Jain, and Shikha Jain, respectively). The company clarified that this change is administrative, with no alteration in the beneficial ownership, control, or shareholding pattern of the subsidiary, which continues to be wholly owned.

announcements.company: Mardia Samyoung Capillary Tubes Company Ltd
announcements.subject: Mardia Samyoung Capillary Tubes Company Ltd - 513544 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of 78,15,000 Equity Shares Of Face Value Of INR 10/- Each Pursuant To Conversion Of 78,15,000 Fully Convertible Equity Warrants ("Warrants'''')
announcements.detail: Allotment Of 78,15,000 Equity Shares Of Face Value Of INR 10/- Each Pursuant To Conversion Of 78,15,000 Fully Convertible Equity Warrants ("Warrants'''')
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mardia Samyoung Capillary Tubes Company Ltd announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 11, 2026. The Board approved the allotment of 78,15,000 Equity Shares of face value INR 10/- each, pursuant to the conversion of 78,15,000 Fully Convertible Equity Warrants. These warrants were previously allotted on February 06, 2026, on a preferential basis to non-promoter category individuals, Mr. Patel Biralkumar Rajeshbhai and Mr. Shaikh Sajidbhai Rahimbhai, at an issue price of INR 13.50/- per warrant. Consequently, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from INR 67,73,30,730/- (6,77,33,073 shares) to INR 75,54,80,730/- (7,55,48,073 shares).

announcements.subject: Aqylon Nexus Ltd - 530943 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held Today I.E., April 11, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aqylon Nexus Limited (formerly Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Limited) held a Board Meeting on April 11, 2026. The Board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor's Report. Additionally, the company approved a proposal to incorporate a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (100% ownership) named M/s Aqylon Nexus Holding LLC, or a similar approved name, in the Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority, United Arab Emirates. Mr. Kiran Kumar Inampudi, Director, has been authorized to undertake all necessary steps for this incorporation. This strategic move is driven by the company's growth and strong market demand.

announcements.subject: B2B Software Technologies Ltd - 531268 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 11.04.2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting held on 11.04.2026
announcements.ai_summary: B2B Software Technologies Ltd held a Board of Directors meeting on April 11, 2026, where they approved the audited financial results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also approved the Auditor's Report along with a Declaration as per Regulation 33 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for the same period. Furthermore, Ms. Srijani Sarkar, a Chartered Accountant, was appointed as the Internal Auditor of the Company for the financial year 2026-27. The meeting commenced at 12:30 p.m. and concluded at 4:45 p.m.

announcements.subject: Chartered Logistics Ltd - 531977 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Approval from Gujarat International Finance Tec-city (GIFT), IFSC and GIFT SEZ LTD to commence business as Finance Company
announcements.ai_summary: Chartered Logistics Ltd's wholly-owned subsidiary, Chartered Comcare IFSC Limited, has received a Certificate of Registration to commence business as a Finance Company at Gujarat International Finance Tec-city (GIFT), IFSC, Gujarat. Additionally, GIFT SEZ LTD has issued a Letter of Approval (Form G) for the establishment of a unit in GIFT SEZ LTD for authorized operations, specifically operating a ship leasing entity under the IFSCA Finance Company Regulations 2021. This development signifies a strategic expansion for the company into the financial services sector within the GIFT City ecosystem.

announcements.subject: Kiri Industries Ltd - 532967 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Kiri Industries Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 11, 2026, approved the allotment of 51,45,446 equity shares. These shares are being allotted pursuant to the conversion of 51,45,446 warrants at an issue price of Rs. 369 per share, including a premium of Rs. 359 per share. The company has received the balance consideration of Rs. 181 per warrant, aggregating to Rs. 93,13,25,726, from the promoters and members of the promoter group, including Manishkumar P Kiri, Anupama Manishkumar Kiri, Arunaben Pravinbhai Kiri, and Hemil Manishkumar Kiri. Following this allotment, the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 65,16,80,000, comprising 6,51,68,000 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: Simran Farms Ltd - 519566 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: The Company hereby submits clarification on incorrect name in annexure attached in Continuous Disclosure filed dated 30th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Simran Farms Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a typographical error in the name of an investor mentioned in a continuous disclosure filed on March 30, 2026. The error occurred in the annexure on Page 7, where the name "Harender Singh Bhatia (HUF)" was incorrectly mentioned instead of "Ashwani Chowdhry". This error is limited to the investor's name and does not affect the number of shares allotted, consideration, or any other details. The correct name was already mentioned on Page 2 of the covering part of the disclosure. A revised annexure with the corrected name is enclosed for records. The company confirms this correction has no impact on the substance of the disclosure.

announcements.subject: Panacea Biotec Ltd - 531349 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail:
We are delighted to inform you that Panacea Biotec Ltd. has received a Letter of Award dated 10.04.2026 from Central Medical Services Society, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India ("CMSS") for supply of Diphtheria and Tetanus Vaccine (Absorbed) for Adults and Adolescents IP in several tranches to  CMSS for the value aggregating to Rs.20.79 Crore.

A detailed disclosure as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Panacea Biotec Ltd has received a Letter of Award dated April 10, 2026, from the Central Medical Services Society (CMSS), an entity under the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India. The award is for the supply of Diphtheria and Tetanus Vaccine (Absorbed) for Adults and Adolescents IP. The supply will be made in several tranches to CMSS, with deliveries scheduled from September/October 2026 until November/December 2028. The total value of this order aggregates to INR 20.79 Crore. This is a domestic order, and the company will be executing it as per the specified terms and timeline.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - Board Meeting Outcome for RBL Bank Limited Informs The Exchange About Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange about disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of RBL Bank Ltd, in its meeting held on April 11, 2026, approved an Amendment Agreement to the Investment Agreement dated October 18, 2025, with Emirates NBD Bank (P .J.S.C). This amendment relates to the proposed issuance of up to 95,90,45,636 equity shares of RBL Bank, with a face value of INR 10 each, at a price of INR 280 per share, aggregating to INR 268,53,27,78,080. The transaction is subject to member, Reserve Bank of India (RBI), and other regulatory approvals. The members had previously approved the transaction on November 12, 2025, with 98.84% votes in favour. The RBI had also approved the acquisition of up to 74% of the bank's paid-up share capital by Emirates NBD Bank on April 1, 2026, with the condition that RBL Bank will be classified as a foreign bank in subsidiary mode.

announcements.subject: Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd - 541402 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Affordable Robotic & Automation Ltd announced that its subsidiary, ARAPL RaaS Private Limited, has entered into a Term Sheet on April 09, 2026, with Sai Green Projects Private Limited. The agreement outlines a proposed fund raise of up to INR 48 Crore for the subsidiary, to be completed in multiple tranches through the subscription of equity shares. This fundraising is contingent upon satisfactory due diligence, necessary approvals including board and shareholder approvals, and the execution of definitive agreements. The objective of this initiative is to strengthen the subsidiary's capital base and support its growth plans. Further updates will be provided upon the finalization of agreements or any material developments.

announcements.subject: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd - 532527 - Submission Of Certificate From Statutory Auditor In Terms Of Regulation 169(5) Of SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 169(5) of SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018, please find enclosed herewith a certificate issued by M/s S K Naredi & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, Statutory Auditors of the Company, certifying that the Company is in compliance with Regulation 169(4) of SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018
announcements.ai_summary: Ramkrishna Forgings Limited has submitted a certificate from its statutory auditors, M/s S K Naredi & Co. LLP, confirming compliance with Regulation 169(4) of the SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018. This certificate is issued pursuant to Regulation 169(5) of the SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018, and is for onward submission to the BSE and NSE. The auditors have certified that the company is in compliance with the relevant regulations concerning the receipt of consideration for preferential convertible warrants issued on August 14, 2025. The company maintains the necessary documents for these warrants.

announcements.subject: Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd - 532371 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Action Initiated or Order passed
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Teleservices (Maharashtra) Ltd has received an order dated April 10, 2026, from the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI). The order imposes a financial disincentive of Rs. 64,000 for the quarter ending June 2024. The violation pertains to the company's alleged failure to curb Unsolicited Commercial Communications (UCC) sent through its network, as required by the Telecom Commercial Communications Customer Preference Regulations, 2018. The company is currently reviewing the order and evaluating its next steps. The financial impact is limited to the penalty amount.

announcements.subject: SJ Corporation Ltd - 504398 - Intimation Of Approval Received For Listing 3,50,00,000 Equity Shares On A Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Approval received for Listing 3,50,00,000 Equity Shares on a Preferential Basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SJ Corporation Ltd has received approval from BSE Limited for the listing of 3,50,00,000 equity shares on a preferential basis. These shares, with a face value of Re. 1/- each, are being issued at an issue price of Rs. 12/- each, including a premium of Rs. 11/- per share. The shares are to be allotted to proposed promoters and non-promoters. The company has been informed by BSE that trading approval will be granted only after the company files the listing approval from the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd (if applicable) and confirmation letters from NSDL/CDSL regarding the crediting of shares to beneficiary accounts. SJ Corporation Ltd must also ensure compliance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, including Regulation 167.

announcements.subject: NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Declaration Of COD Of 4Th Unit (250) MW Of Tehri PSP (4X250 MW) Of THDC India Limited.
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: THDC India Limited, a subsidiary of NTPC Ltd, has declared the Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the 4th Unit of its Tehri Pumped Storage Project (PSP). This unit has a capacity of 250 MW, and the project comprises four such units totaling 1000 MW. The COD is effective from 00:00 Hrs on April 12, 2026. Following this declaration, the total installed capacity of the NTPC group has reached 89,378 MW, with a commercial capacity of 88,298 MW. This development signifies an increase in NTPC's overall operational capacity.

announcements.subject: Rudra Ecovation Ltd - 514010 - Admission Of Second Motion Petition Pertaining To Merger Between Rudra Ecovation Limited And Shiva Texfabs Limited
announcements.detail: We are pleased to inform you that the Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chandigarh Bench-I,  Chandigarh has admitted the 2nd motion petition
announcements.ai_summary: Rudra Ecovation Limited has announced that on April 10, 2026, the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chandigarh Bench-I, Chandigarh, admitted the second motion petition pertaining to the proposed merger between Rudra Ecovation Limited and Shiva Texfabs Limited. This admission is a significant step in the merger process. The company has provided this update as a general disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
