announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ventures Ltd - 543747 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Allotment of 3,614 Equity Shares by Kamdhenu Colour and Coatings Limited on right issue basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Ventures Limited has confirmed the allotment of 3,614 equity shares by its wholly owned subsidiary, Kamdhenu Colour and Coatings Limited (KCCL), to Kamdhenu Ventures Limited on a rights basis. This allotment, confirmed on April 11, 2026, was at an issue price of Rs. 36,000 per share, with a face value of Rs. 10 and a premium of Rs. 35,990 per share. The total investment made by Kamdhenu Ventures Limited was Rs. 13,01,04,000. This follows earlier intimations on April 10, 2026, regarding the investment approval and payment. The company has submitted the complete details as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Vikas Lifecare Ltd - 542655 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On Saturday, April 11, 2026
announcements.detail: As per letter attached
announcements.ai_summary: Vikas Lifecare Ltd announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 11, 2026, approved a fund-raising plan not exceeding Rs. 200 Crores. This fund raising will be conducted in one or more tranches through the issuance of warrants and/or equity shares on a preferential basis, in accordance with Chapter V of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The Board also approved an increase in the Authorized Share Capital to Rs. 300 Crores, consisting of equity shares with a face value of Re.1/- each, and a consequent amendment to the Memorandum of Association. Additionally, the Articles of Association will be altered to include a clause for "Further Issue of Capital" to align with the company's fund-raising proposals. The 'Fund Raising Committee' has been authorized to finalize details, including proposed allottees and issue price, which must adhere to SEBI pricing formulas. The company's scrip code is 542655.

announcements.subject: Medplus Health Services Ltd - 543427 - Update Under Regulation 30 Read With Para A Part A Of Schedule III Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 read with Para A Part A of schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Medplus Health Services Ltd has announced that its subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, has received a suspension order for a Drug License for a store located in Odisha. The suspension is for a period of five days and was issued by the Dy. Drugs Controller, Southern Zone, Berhmpur, Licensing Authority, Odisha. The order was received on April 10, 2026, and is related to a violation of Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945. This action is expected to result in a potential revenue loss of Rs 3.80 lacs. The company has made this disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This announcement was made on April 11, 2026.

announcements.subject: Advance Agrolife Ltd - 544562 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30, The Company has informed regarding Bagging/Receiving of order/contract
announcements.ai_summary: Advance Agrolife Ltd has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) from National Fertilizers Limited (NFL) on April 10, 2026, for the supply of agrochemicals. The order, under Tender No. NFL/CO/Mking-D/AC/Kh-2026/09, is valued at INR 30,37,91,000.00. The contract requires a security deposit of 5% of the contract value. The payment terms are 90 days from the date of invoice. The supply of agrochemicals is for NFL’s marketing territory and the contract period is until September 30, 2026. This is a domestic order, and the company's promoter or promoter group has no interest in NFL. The announcement was made on April 11, 2026.

announcements.subject: AAA Technologies Ltd - 543671 - Disclosure under Regulation 30A of LODR
announcements.detail: DISCLOSURE OF MATERIAL EVENT UNDER REGULATION 30 OF SEBI(LODR) REGULATION 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: AAA Technologies Ltd has been empanelled by NATIONAL INFORMATICS CENTRE SERVICES INCORPORATED (NICSI) for Comprehensive Security Audit (CSA) of Critical Applications. This empanelment is valid until March 31, 2029, under Empanelment No. 10(21)/2025-NICSI. The company received the empanelment letter on April 10, 2026. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is an ISO 9001:2015 & ISO 27001:2013 certified entity and is also listed on both BSE and NSE. This announcement was made on April 11, 2026.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Update On The Conversion Of Fully Convertible Warrants Allotted On September 30, 2024 And October 11, 2024
announcements.detail: Update on conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants allotted on September 30, 2024 and October 11, 2024
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Ltd has successfully completed the conversion of 43,58,82,572 Fully Convertible Warrants into equity shares, benefiting 111 allottees, including promoter group entities. This conversion was done at a price of ₹ 42.15 per warrant, representing 75% of the issue price. The company had initially allotted 48,08,02,500 warrants on September 30, 2024, and October 11, 2024. Out of the total allotted warrants, 43,58,82,572 were converted, while 4,49,19,928 warrants lapsed upon expiry. The total amount raised through the allotment and conversion of these warrants is ₹ 2512,77,25,534.80. The upfront amount received for the lapsed warrants has been forfeited. The update was provided on April 11, 2026.

announcements.subject: Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd - 590072 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) With-Regarding To Fire Incident.
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the listing Regulation , it is hereby informed that on Friday, 10th April 2026, at around 09.55 PM a fire incident occurred at the factory of Plant -1 situted at Kariapatti, Virundhunagar, Tamil nadu.

This is for your information and records.

Thanking You,
Hari S.
CFO
announcements.ai_summary: Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd has reported a fire incident at its Plant-1 located in Kariapatti, Virudhunagar, Tamil Nadu, which occurred on Friday, April 10, 2026, at approximately 09:55 PM IST. The fire was controlled, and fortunately, there were no casualties or injuries. However, the affected operations will be temporarily shut down. The extent of damage to assets and equipment is currently being evaluated, and a detailed estimate will be provided in due course. The assets at the affected plant are adequately insured, and the company has already informed the insurance company, with an insurance survey expected shortly. The company has provided this disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Craftsman Automation Ltd - 543276 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, (SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015)
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and in continuation of our earlier intimations dated 24th May, 2025 and 27th March, 2026, with respect to Equity investment in RC Green Powers Private Limited ("RCGPPL"), under the Group Captive Scheme, we wish to inform you that the Company has completely exited its investment in RCGPPL.
announcements.ai_summary: Craftsman Automation Limited has announced a complete exit from its investment in RC Green Powers Private Limited (RCGPPL). This divestment follows earlier intimations regarding equity investment in RCGPPL under the Group Captive Scheme. As of April 11, 2026, Craftsman Automation Limited no longer holds any equity shares or other interests in RC Green Powers Private Limited. The company has stated that this exit will not have any material impact on its operations or financial position.

announcements.subject: One 97 Communications Ltd - 543396 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Incorporation of a wholly owned step down subsidiary in Indonesia.
announcements.ai_summary: One 97 Communications Limited announced on April 10, 2026, the incorporation of a new wholly owned step-down subsidiary in Indonesia named "PT PAYTM INDONESIA TEKNOLOGI" (Paytm Indonesia). This was achieved through its wholly owned subsidiary, Paytm Cloud Technologies Limited (PCTL), and PCTL's wholly owned subsidiary, Paytm Singapore Pte. Ltd. The new entity has subscribed to 15,00,000 equity shares of Indonesian Rupiah 10,000 each, for an aggregate subscription amount of Indonesian Rupiah 15 billion, which is approximately equivalent to Indian Rupees Eight Crores Fifteen Lakh. This incorporation follows a previous disclosure made on December 22, 2025. The details will be available on the company's website at https://ir.paytm.com/.

announcements.subject: Seamec Ltd - 526807 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015 - "Updates"
announcements.detail: Intimation on Deployment Status of Vessel "SEAMEC DIAMOND" - Onhire
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Ltd has announced the deployment status of its vessel, "SEAMEC DIAMOND." Following the completion of statutory drydocking, the vessel has returned to operations and resumed its contract with ONGC. The "SEAMEC DIAMOND" has been on hire since April 10, 2026, at 21:36 hrs. This update follows a previous communication dated February 18, 2026, regarding the vessel's off-hire status. The information was received on April 10, 2026, at 22:20 hours.

announcements.subject: Dabur India Ltd - 500096 - Submission Of Information Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Imposition Of Penalty
announcements.detail: Submission of information under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Imposition of Penalty
announcements.ai_summary: Dabur India Ltd has been notified of a penalty imposed by the Additional District Magistrate, Almora. The penalty amounts to INR 4,00,000/- and is related to alleged contraventions of Section 26 and Section 27 of The Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006, concerning the labelling of one of the company's products. Dabur India Ltd received this order on April 10, 2026. The company believes the demand is not maintainable and intends to file an appeal before the 1st Appellate Authority. Dabur India Ltd states that this order will not have any impact on its financial, operational, or other activities, and it is confident of a favorable outcome in higher forums. The company will also make this information available on its website.

announcements.subject: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd - 539254 - Provisional Operational Updates - Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: Provisional Operation Updates - Q4 FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd has released its Provisional Operational Updates for the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2026 (Q4 FY26). The update includes an executive summary, operational highlights for Q4 FY26 and the full fiscal year FY26, and annexures detailing line availability for ATSOL and USPP obligor groups, as well as the operational and under-construction asset portfolio. The document also provides an overview of the Adani Portfolio, which includes various infrastructure and utility assets. Notably, it mentions the acquisition of NQXT by APSEZ, pending regulatory approval, and the increase in promoter holding in NDTV to 69.02% post-completion of a rights issue in October 2025. Adani Energy Solutions Limited (AEL) is also exiting its joint venture with Wilmar for AWL Agri Business Ltd., having signed an agreement for the residual 20% stake dilution.

announcements.subject: Jindal Poly Films Ltd - 500227 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Order Passed By The Hon'Ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Dated 09.04.2026
announcements.detail: Update
announcements.ai_summary: The Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Principal Bench, New Delhi, has issued an order dated April 9, 2026, in response to a petition filed by minority shareholders of Jindal Poly Films Limited. The NCLT has issued notice in an intervention application filed by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and directed parties to file their replies. Jindal Poly Films Limited has received the SEBI intervention application but is awaiting the NCLT order. The company reiterates its commitment to legal and regulatory compliance and states that all transactions were conducted according to due process and necessary approvals. Further disclosures as required by SEBI regulations are provided in Annexure A. The company expresses full trust in the judicial system.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Update On Reduction Of Outstanding Debt Payable To Banks
announcements.detail: Update on reduction of outstanding debt payable to banks
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Ltd has announced a further reduction of approximately 14% in its outstanding debt payable to banks under the Joint Settlement Agreement with its Consortium Lenders. This reduction brings the company closer to its objective of achieving a debt-free status. The repayment was facilitated by the balance consideration received from the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants into equity shares by both the Promoter Group and Non-Promoter, Public entities. This marks significant progress towards the company's financial goal of becoming debt-free in the near future.

announcements.subject: Stylam Industries Ltd - 526951 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: ICICI Securities Ltd ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer for the attention of the Public Shareholders of Stylam Industries Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ICICI Securities Limited, as the Manager to the Open Offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer dated April 10, 2026, to BSE Limited for the attention of the Public Shareholders of Stylam Industries Limited. The open offer is being made by Aica Kogyo Company, Limited, the Acquirer, to acquire up to 44,06,496 fully paid-up equity shares of face value of ₹5 each. This represents 26% of the total voting share capital of Stylam Industries Limited. The offer is made pursuant to and in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended. The Letter of Offer is being sent to public shareholders and provides details for those requiring clarification or who have recently sold their shares.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Industries Ltd - 500243 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This is in continuation of our earlier Intimation dated 11 March 2026.

This is to inform you that the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) has favourably considered our request for waiver of the fine, vide its letter dated 10 April 2026.

You are requested to take the same on your record.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has received favorable news regarding a fine levied by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). Following an application filed on February 20, 2026, seeking a waiver of the fine for delayed compliance with Regulation 31 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, the NSE has now granted this waiver. The NSE communicated this decision on April 10, 2026, vide its letter No. NSE/LIST/CD/2026/0013. The company has been advised to ensure future compliance with listing regulations.

announcements.subject: Reliance Power Ltd - 532939 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half yearly Statement of Debt Securities as on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The company has submitted its half-yearly statement of debt securities as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. This statement details the outstanding debt instruments of Reliance Power Limited. Specifically, it reports an amount of Rs. 250.00 Crore issued under ISIN No. INE614G07089, with a coupon rate of 8.00% and a maturity date of June 30, 2035. The full amount of Rs. 250.00 Crore remains outstanding as of the reporting date. The interest payment is scheduled for the maturity date.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 - Receipt Of In-Principle Approval From Stock Exchanges For Preferential Issue
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 - Receipt of In-principle approval from Stock Exchange for preferential issue
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has received in-principle approval from the stock exchanges for a preferential issue, marking a significant step towards the acquisition of Encora US Holdco, Inc. and Encora Holdings Ltd. The company will proceed with the issuance and allotment of 93,796,508 Equity Shares of ₹2/- each at a price of INR 1,815.91 per share. This preferential issue is a key part of the share subscription and share purchase agreement executed on December 26, 2025. Coforge Limited expects to complete all closing formalities for the acquisition within the next 15 days. This approval signifies the successful completion of the regulatory review process for the Encora acquisition.

announcements.subject: EPACK Durable Ltd - 544095 - Receipt Of Disbursement Under Production Linked Incentive Scheme For FY 2024-25
announcements.detail: EPACK Durable Limited has informed the Exchange about Receipt of disbursement under Production Linked Incentive Scheme for FY 2024-25.
announcements.ai_summary: EPACK Durable Limited has received a disbursement of Rs. 37,50,00,000/- (Rupees Thirty Seven Crores Fifty Lakhs only) under the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods for the Financial Year 2024-25. This disbursement follows the sanction letter received from IFCI Limited, a Government of India undertaking, on March 30, 2026. The company had previously informed the exchange about the sanction of this incentive. The details of this disbursement will also be posted on the company's website at www.epackdurable.com.

announcements.subject: Balkrishna Paper Mills Ltd - 539251 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 10Th April, 2026 And Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail:
We wish to inform you that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held today, have interalia approved the following:
i. To commence  the business of  real estate development and allied activities, as authorised under sub-clause 3 of Clause III(A) (Main Object Clause) of the Memorandum of Association of the Company; and

ii. To avail Inter corporate Deposits (ICDs), subject to approval of Shareholders:
a. From S P Finance and Trading ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Balkrishna Paper Mills Ltd, in their meeting held on April 10, 2026, approved commencing the business of real estate development and allied activities. Additionally, the Board approved availing Inter Corporate Deposits (ICDs) subject to shareholder approval. These ICDs can be up to Rs.25 Crore for FY2026-27 and up to Rs.25 Crore for FY2027-28 from S P Finance and Trading Limited, a related party. Similar limits apply for ICDs from Sanchna Trading and Finance Limited, also a related party. The company aims for strategic diversification, optimal utilization of land assets, and long-term shareholder value creation through this new venture. Further details on the investment amount will be determined based on project feasibility and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Advait Energy Transitions Ltd - 543230 - Intimation - Confirmation For L1 Stage - Successful Bidder
announcements.detail: L1 stage successful bidder
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Advait Energy Transitions Limited has announced that it has been confirmed as the L1 stage successful bidder for a tender for a turnkey contract. The contract involves the supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of 11KV 55mm2 AAAC Medium Voltage Covered Conductor (MVCC) with accessories and additional poles. This tender is for the jurisdiction area of DGVCL under the Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana-2 (VKY-2) Scheme or other schemes. The tender reference is DGVCL/SD&P/MVCC/VKY-2/202601, and the bid confirmation was received on April 9, 2026. Further details, as required by SEBI regulations, will be provided once a Letter of Intent or Award is received.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Ltd - 544569 - Compliances-Half Yearly Communication - Debt Instruments
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a statement containing details of the Company''s  listed debt securities as per the format specified by SEBI as on March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Motors Limited has submitted a statement detailing its listed debt securities as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with SEBI's Master Circular dated October 15, 2025. The company has five outstanding debt instruments with varying maturity dates and coupon rates. These include two tranches of E-28B Series, each issued for Rs. 250 crore and maturing in December 2026 and January 2027 respectively, with an 8.00% coupon rate. Additionally, there is an E-30A Series issued for Rs. 500 crore maturing in May 2026 with a 6.60% coupon rate, and two tranches of E-31 A Series issued for Rs. 500 crore and Rs. 800 crore respectively, maturing in March 2027 and March 2028 with a 7.65% coupon rate. These debt securities were transferred to Tata Motors Limited as part of a composite scheme of arrangement effective October 1, 2025.

announcements.subject: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 500420 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the stock exchanges that its Bileshwarpura (Oncology) facility underwent an inspection by the USFDA from April 6, 2026, to April 10, 2026. The inspection has concluded with zero observations. This positive outcome indicates that the facility met the USFDA's regulatory standards during the inspection period. The company has submitted this information to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for their records.

announcements.subject: Jindal Stainless Ltd - 532508 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Statement containing details of ISIN for debt securities issued by Jindal Stainless Limited for the half year ended on March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has submitted a statement detailing its outstanding listed debt securities for the half-year ending March 31, 2026, as per SEBI's circular dated October 15, 2025. The company has issued debt securities with ISIN INE220G07127, which were issued on September 28, 2022, and mature on September 28, 2026. These securities carry an annual coupon rate of 8.62% and were issued for an amount of Rs. 99 crore, with the outstanding amount remaining at Rs. 99 crore. The company has provided this information to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. for their records.

announcements.subject: TVS Srichakra Ltd-$ - 509243 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Agreement is attached
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: TVS Srichakra Limited has executed an Assignment and Assumption Agreement on April 10, 2026, with Super Grip Corporation, USA (a wholly owned subsidiary) and Bristol Motor Speedway, LLC, USA. Through this agreement, TVS Srichakra Limited will assume all rights, duties, and obligations of Super Grip Corporation under a Suite License Agreement dated February 16, 2024, and a Sponsorship Agreement dated April 5, 2024. The purpose of this agreement is to enhance the visibility and reach of the company's brands in global markets. In consideration for the rights granted, TVS Srichakra Limited will pay USD 10,33,250 in tranches for the remaining years.

announcements.subject: Emerald Leisures Ltd - 507265 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Receipt Of Letter Of Intent For SRA Redevelopment Project
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015, read with Schedule III thereto, we are pleased to inform you that Emerald Leisures Limited has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) dated 10th April, 2026, as in principle approval to the scheme for development on Plot no. 366/6 (PT) of village Chembur, Taluka Kurla U/Reg. 33(10) of DCPR 2034 situated at Swastik Park, Chembur, Mumbai 400 071.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Emerald Leisures Limited has received a Letter of Intent (LOI) dated April 10, 2026, for the redevelopment of a plot at Swastik Park, Chembur, Mumbai. The project, located on plot no. 366/6 (PT) of village Chembur, has a plot area of 6299 sq.mtrs. The estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of this project is INR 600 crores, with an expected carpet area of approximately 1,75,000 sq.ft. This marks a strategic milestone for the company's diversification into the real estate sector. The company plans for 50% of its future growth to stem from similar real estate projects. The information will be available on the company's website, www.clubemerald.in.

announcements.subject: Union Bank of India - 532477 - Statement Of Debt Securities For The Half Year Ended On March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail:
Statement of Debt Securities for the half year ended on 
March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Union Bank of India has submitted its Statement of Debt Securities for the half-year ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. This submission is in compliance with Chapter VIII, para 10.1 (a) of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, as amended, and Paragraph 9.1 (a) of Chapter VIII of the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025. The statement details the debt securities issued and outstanding as of March 31, 2026. The disclosed debt securities include three issuances with ISIN numbers INE692A08029, INE692A08169, and INE692A08177, all with a coupon rate of 9.50%, 8.70%, and 8.40% respectively, and an amount outstanding of Rs. 1000 Crore, Rs. 2000 Crore, and Rs. 1500 Crore respectively.

announcements.subject: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd - 533033 - Reg 30 - Update On Direction For Closure Of The Factory / Unit
announcements.detail: Update on Direction for closure of the factory / unit of the Company situated at Village Nara, Meerut Road, Muzaffarnagar, Uttar Pradesh
announcements.ai_summary: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd has received permission to resume full operations at its factory unit located in Village Nara, Meerut Road, Muzaffarnagar, Uttar Pradesh. This follows a direction issued by the Commission for Air Quality Management in January 2025 to close down industrial operations at the unit. The National Green Tribunal had previously permitted resumption of operations subject to compliance with stipulated conditions. The Commission granted permission to resume full operations on April 09, 2026, after the company complied with the directions and submitted the requisite documents. This intimation is also being disclosed on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Adani Green Energy Ltd - 541450 - Provisional Operational Update: FY 26
announcements.detail: Provisional Operational Update: FY 26
announcements.ai_summary: The company has provided a provisional operational update for FY26. This update includes information about Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) raising INR 24,930 Cr through right shares in December 2025. It also details the acquisition of North Queensland Export Terminal (NQXT) by APSEZ on December 23, 2025, which involved the allotment of 14,38,20,153 equity shares of Rs. 2 face value to a Promoter Group Entity. The update also mentions an increase in promoter holding in NDTV to 69.02% post a right issue in October 2025. Furthermore, it notes that Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has solar-wind hybrid plants in Jaisalmer, Rajasthan, and a renewable energy plant in Khavda, Gujarat.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail:
Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has informed BSE as under:

"Please note that in relation to the Open Offer Nil Equity Shares, have been tendered in the Open Offer Escrow Demat Account namely "MIIPL MANAPPURAM FINANCE OPEN OFFER ESCROW DEMAT ACCOUNT" opened with Ventura Securities Limited bearing depository participant identification number IN303116 and the client identification number 15544837 (PAN: AABCM6882E), ....
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Capital Company Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has informed BSE that Nil Equity Shares have been tendered in the Open Offer Escrow Demat Account. This account is named "MIIPL MANAPPURAM FINANCE OPEN OFFER ESCROW DEMAT ACCOUNT" and is held with Ventura Securities Limited, with depository participant identification number IN303116 and client identification number 15544837.

announcements.subject: GE Vernova T&D India Ltd - 522275 - Intimation Of Update In Litigation Filed By The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation of update in litigation filed by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: The company, GE Vernova T&D India Ltd, is providing an update on its ongoing litigation concerning the exemption from Basic Customs Duty on imported parts used in the manufacture of relays between 2002 and 2014. The Hon'ble Madras High Court had previously dismissed the company's writ petition against an Order-in-Original dated March 25, 2015, directing them to the appellate authority. Subsequently, on November 13, 2025, the company filed a Special Leave Petition before the Hon'ble Supreme Court. The Supreme Court, in its order dated April 8, 2026, received on April 10, 2026, dismissed the Special Leave Petition but permitted the company to file an appeal before the Commissioner (Appeals). GE Vernova T&D India Ltd will now proceed to file an appeal on merits against the Order-in-Original dated March 25, 2015.

announcements.subject: Cube Highways Trust - 543899 - Investor Complaints
announcements.detail: Cube Highways Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Investor grievance report for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cube Highways Trust has submitted its Investor Grievance Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This report is in compliance with Regulation 4.16 of the SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/102 dated July 11, 2025. The report, provided by KFin Technologies Limited, the Registrar & Transfer Agent, indicates that there were no investor complaints pending at the beginning of the quarter, no complaints received during the quarter, and no complaints pending at the end of the quarter. The average time taken for redressal of complaints for the quarter was also zero, with zero complaints in all categories (less than 1 month, 1-3 months, etc.).

announcements.subject: Zee Learn Ltd - 533287 - Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI LODR Regulations')
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ("SEBI LODR Regulations")
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zee Learn Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the dismissal of a petition filed by Axis Bank Limited. This update is a continuation of a previous intimation dated March 20, 2026, regarding the withdrawal of Petition No. 1126 of 2023. The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, has uploaded the order on its website, confirming that the petition has been dismissed as withdrawn. Consequently, all pending Interlocutory Applications (IAs), including IA 2029/2024, have also been disposed of. The company has provided a copy of the NCLT order for the records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Bhagyanagar India Ltd - 512296 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Joint Company Petition Connected with C.A. (CAA) NO. 5/230/HDB/2026 under section 230 to 232 read with section 66 of the Companies Act,2013
announcements.ai_summary: Bhagyanagar India Limited has announced that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Hyderabad Bench, has admitted a Joint Company Petition concerning a Composite Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves Bhagyanagar Copper Private Limited (Transferor Company), Bhagyanagar India Limited (Transferee/Demerged Company), and Tieramet Limited (Resulting Company). The petition, filed under Sections 230 to 232 read with Section 66 of the Companies Act, 2013, has been scheduled for a hearing on June 9, 2026. The company has provided a copy of the petition for the record.

announcements.subject: Vakrangee Ltd-$ - 511431 - VAKRANGEE EXPANDS INSURANCE PORTFOLIO THROUGH TIE-UP WITH INDIAFIRST LIFE INSURANCE
announcements.detail: Please refer the attachment for futher details
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vakrangee Limited has entered into a strategic corporate partnership with IndiaFirst Life Insurance Company Limited, as announced on April 10, 2026. This tie-up will enable Vakrangee Kendras to offer a wide range of life insurance products, including term protection plans, to individuals and businesses. The partnership aims to significantly strengthen the availability of insurance services, particularly in underserved rural and semi-urban regions where Vakrangee Kendras are predominantly located. This initiative is part of Vakrangee's mission to expand access to essential financial services and promote inclusive growth by making insurance solutions more accessible and convenient. The Managing Director, Vedant Nandwana, highlighted the company's commitment to expanding financial services reach and driving deeper insurance penetration, especially in Tier 4 to Tier 6 markets.

announcements.subject: Agri- Tech (India) Ltd - 537292 - Audited Financial Results As On 31St March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Agri-Tech (India) Ltd announced its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, following a Board Meeting held on April 10, 2026. The company reported total income of Rs. 7.94 Lacs for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and Rs. 27.81 Lacs for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Total expenses for the quarter were Rs. 32.70 Lacs, resulting in a net loss of Rs. 26.75 Lacs for the quarter. For the financial year, total expenses amounted to Rs. 139.29 Lacs, leading to a net loss of Rs. 94.08 Lacs. The company also submitted the statement of impact of audit qualification and the independent auditors' report.

announcements.subject: Filatex Fashions Ltd - 532022 - Receipt Of No-Objection Certificate From BSE And NSE For Reclassification Under Regulation 31A Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find the attached NOC received from BSE and NSE for reclassification from the promoter to public category pursuant to Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulation,2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Filatex Fashions Ltd has received a No-Objection Certificate (NOC) from both BSE and NSE on April 10, 2026, for the reclassification of promoters Prashant Kumar Sethia and Rajkumar Sethia from the promoter category to the public category. This reclassification is in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company had applied for this reclassification on November 15, 2025. The reclassification is subject to the approval of the company's members in a general meeting. Following this, the company will need to ensure compliance with subsequent disclosure requirements related to this material event.

announcements.subject: TGV Sraac Ltd - 507753 - Announcement Under Reg. 30 - Intimation Of Capacity Addition With Respect To Chloromethanes And Other Products.
announcements.detail: As a result of steps taken by the company for increase in productiion capacities of various products of the company.  The company has submitted the required details to the concerned authorities regarding capacity increase for various products manufactured by the company.
announcements.ai_summary: TGV Sraac Ltd announced on April 10, 2026, a significant capacity addition for several of its products, effective from the same date. The company has increased its production capacity for Potassium Hydroxide by 27150 TPA to a total declared capacity of 76650 TPA. Other products with increased capacities include Liquid Chlorine (17160 TPA addition), Methylene Chloride (17817 TPA addition), Chloroform (12450 TPA addition), Carbon Tetra Chloride (1534 TPA addition), and HCL (100%) from CMS (1606 TPA addition). These details have been declared to the concerned authorities.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Submission of ISIN details of Interise Trust
announcements.ai_summary: Interise Trust has submitted its half-yearly report on April 10, 2026, detailing its outstanding debt securities and commercial papers as of March 31, 2026. This submission is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 and SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The report includes ISIN details, issuance and maturity dates, coupon rates, and outstanding amounts for various debt instruments. For instance, the debt security with ISIN INE790Z07053 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 93,418.50 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Swiggy Ltd - 544285 - Board Meeting Outcome for Alteration Of The Articles Of Association
announcements.detail: Alteration of the Articles of Association of the company
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Swiggy Limited, at its meeting held on April 10, 2026, approved the alteration of the company's Articles of Association and the grant of special rights to identified shareholders. A summary of the proposed changes to the Articles of Association is enclosed as Annexure-A, detailing amendments to rationalize and update provisions related to nomination rights on the Board. The Board also approved a Postal Ballot Notice to seek shareholders' approval for these alterations and special rights. The notice will be published and communicated in due course. The board meeting commenced at 03:50 PM IST and concluded at 04:30 PM IST.

announcements.subject: Kopran Ltd - 524280 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Pronouncement of NCLT order dated April 09, 2026 for Scheme of Amalgamation.
announcements.ai_summary: Kopran Limited has announced an update regarding its Scheme of Amalgamation, where Kopran Laboratories Limited will be merged by absorption into Kopran Limited. The Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, issued an order on April 09, 2026, directing the respective companies to convene meetings of their Equity Shareholders, Secured Creditors, and Unsecured Creditors. The order copy is available on the company's website. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations. The amalgamation is subject to the receipt of applicable regulatory and other approvals.

announcements.subject: Panacea Biotec Ltd - 531349 - Receipt Of Awards From The Presiding Officer Of Industrial Tribunal, Mohali
announcements.detail:
We would like to inform you that the Company has received four Awards from the Presiding Officer (in the rank of Additional District Judge) of Industrial Tribunal, S.A.S. Nagar, Mohali.

A detailed disclosure as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations read with SEBI Master Circular dated 30.01.2026 and Industry Standards on Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Panacea Biotec Limited has received four Awards from the Presiding Officer of the Industrial Tribunal, S.A.S. Nagar, Mohali, on April 9, 2026. These awards include setting aside the transfer of 23 workmen and granting them full back wages from the date of transfer, awarding reasonable wage revision for the workmen, and ordering the reinstatement of workers (excluding those who have settled) with 50% back wages from their termination date. Further details are provided in Annexure A, as required by SEBI LODR Regulations.

announcements.subject: Mcleod Russel India Ltd - 532654 -  Company Update
announcements.detail: Company Update
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: McLeod Russel India Ltd has accepted a Sanction Letter from National Asset Reconstruction Company Ltd (NARCL) on April 9, 2026, for debt restructuring. NARCL represents approximately 75.02% of the total lenders as of December 31, 2025, and discussions are ongoing with the remaining 24.98% of lenders. The company is required to pay a sustainable debt of Rs. 1,050 crores to NARCL by February 15, 2029. As part of the restructuring, NARCL will receive 10% of the company's new equity shares on a fully diluted basis through the conversion of unsustainable debt, and promoter shareholding will be pledged, subject to necessary approvals.

announcements.subject: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd - 524715 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Rumour Verification
announcements.ai_summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd has responded to a news item published on www.moneycontrol.com on April 10, 2026, which speculated about a $12 billion Organon deal entering its final stages. The company clarifies that the information presented in the article is speculative and that there is no material event or information requiring disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations. Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd reaffirms its commitment to adhering to high standards of corporate governance and disclosures. The company will continue to inform the stock exchanges of any material events as mandated by Regulation 30. This clarification is for the information and dissemination by the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Industrial Investment Trust Ltd - 501295 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Request For Reclassification From The ''''Promoter/Promoter Group'''' To The ''''Public'''' Category In Accordance With Regulation 31A Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of request for reclassification from the Promoter / Promoter group to the Public category in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Mr. Swaran Singh, holding 25,000 equity shares representing 0.13% of the total voting rights in Industrial Investment Trust Ltd, has requested reclassification from the 'Promoter/Promoter Group' to the 'Public' category. This request is made in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has received this request via a letter dated April 10, 2026. Industrial Investment Trust Ltd will undertake the necessary steps to comply with Regulation 31A of the Listing Regulations. This intimation is a compliance measure under Regulation 31A (8) of the Listing Regulations. The company has enclosed the copy of Mr. Swaran Singh's request letter as an annexure to this intimation.

announcements.subject: JK Cement Ltd - 532644 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: ISIN Details for the Half year ended 31.3.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JK Cement Ltd has submitted a statement detailing its listed privately placed debt securities for the half-year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The company has one listed privately placed debt security with ISIN INE823G07219, issued on March 21, 2023, and maturing on March 21, 2028. The security carries a coupon rate of 7.90% and has a half-yearly payment frequency. The total amount issued was Rs. 1,00,00,00,000, and the outstanding amount as of March 31, 2026, is Rs. 50,00,00,000. The debenture trustee is IDBI Trusteeship Services Ltd. The redemption of the principal is scheduled in 8 equal installments starting from the 18th month after allotment, with each installment representing 12.5% of the principal.

announcements.subject: Heranba Industries Ltd - 543266 -  Intimation About New Products Launch
announcements.detail: The Company has launched a new products 'Fentaamine' and 'MycoHil' on April 10, 2026, Press Release regarding the same is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Heranba Industries Limited has announced the launch of two new products, 'Fentaamine' and 'MycoHil', on April 10, 2026. These products are categorized as Innovative Crop Nutrition Solutions and cater to the domestic market. 'Fentaamine' is a next-generation bio stimulant designed to enhance plant metabolism, improve stress tolerance, and boost crop yield. 'MycoHil' is an advanced biofertilizer aimed at improving nutrient absorption, strengthening soil microbiology, and promoting sustainable agriculture practices. The company has developed these products in collaboration with a leading American multinational company. Heranba Industries aims to leverage these new offerings to target ₹2,500 Crore revenue this fiscal year from its Crop Protection and Crop Nutrition segments.

announcements.subject: Texel Industries Ltd - 526638 - Outcome Of Finance And Investment Commitee Meeting Held On 10/04/2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Finance and Invetsment commitee meeting held on 10/04/2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Texel Industries Ltd announced the outcome of its Finance and Investment Committee meeting held on April 10, 2026. The committee approved the allotment of 1,96,078 equity shares to Bhupendra Ramniklal Mehta, a promoter, upon conversion of an equal number of fully convertible equity warrants. The issue price for each share was ₹38.25, including a premium of ₹28.25 per share. The company received ₹56,24,987.63, representing 75% of the total consideration for the conversion. These warrants were initially issued on a preferential basis on October 5, 2024, at an issue price of ₹38.25 per warrant, with 25% of the consideration paid at the time of allotment. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹13,37,23,500 (1,33,72,350 equity shares) to ₹13,56,84,280 (1,35,68,428 equity shares), each with a face value of ₹10. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd - 539876 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations') - Intimation Of Order Passed
announcements.detail: Intimation of order passed
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd has received an order from the XXXV Metropolitan Magistrate Court, Egmore at Allikulam, Chennai, dated April 8, 2026, which was received on April 9, 2026. The court found all accused not guilty under Section 138 of the NI Act and acquitted them. This case involved proceedings initiated by Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd against Variety Agency and two of its partners concerning a cheque bearing No. 407640, dated January 29, 2025, for a sum of ₹ 6,54,276. The court's decision means there is no material impact on the company's financials, operations, or other activities.

announcements.subject: Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd - 543415 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release dated 10th April, 2026 - Anand Rathi Wealth Limited crosses Rs. 1 Lakh Crores in Asset Under Management
announcements.ai_summary: Anand Rathi Wealth Limited has announced a significant milestone, crossing Rs. 1 Lakh Crores in Assets Under Management (AUM) as of April 10, 2026. This achievement is attributed to the positive movement in the equity market post-March 2026, and the company expresses gratitude to its clients for their continuous support and its team members for their commitment. The company believes its uncomplicated and scalable business model will continue to drive such milestones and create sustainable value for all stakeholders. Anand Rathi Wealth Limited is a leading wealth management firm in India, serving high and ultra-high-net-worth individuals, with operations in 18 cities and a representative office in Dubai. The company also recently received FCA approval for Anand Rathi Wealth (UK) Ltd.

announcements.subject: Davangere Sugar Company Ltd - 543267 - Approval Of Stock Exchange For Reclassification Application Made Under Regulation 31A Of SEBI(LODR), Regulation 2015
announcements.detail: Stock Exchange approved Company''s application for reclassification made under Regulation 31A of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Davangere Sugar Company Ltd has received approval from BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited for its application to reclassify certain shareholders from the "Promoter and Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category. This reclassification is in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The applications were initially submitted to BSE Limited on October 28, 2024, and to NSE on October 29, 2024. Following the approval on April 09, 2026, shareholders S S Mallikarjuna and S B Murugesh will cease to be part of the Promoter and Promoter Group. Pre-reclassification, the Promoter holding was 41.78% (59,74,04,945 shares) and Public holding was 58.22% (83,25,85,853 shares). Post-reclassification, the Promoter holding will be 41.63% (59,53,23,205 shares) and Public holding will be 83,46 (this number appears incomplete in the source text).

announcements.subject: Niyogin Fintech Ltd - 538772 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith the Business Update for Q4 FY2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Niyogin Fintech Limited has released its business update for the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company reported strong growth in its lending business, with Gross Loan AUM reaching Rs. 351.2 Crores in Q4 FY2026, a 26% year-on-year increase from Rs. 278.8 Crores in Q4 FY2025, and a 12% quarter-on-quarter increase from Rs. 314.0 Crores in Q3 FY2026. iServeU Tech recorded a net revenue of Rs. 21.2 Crores in Q4 FY2026, a 56% year-on-year increase from Rs. 13.6 Crores in Q4 FY2025, with no quarter-on-quarter change. The iServeU Tech order book stands at Rs. 610 Crores, and the full-year net revenue for FY26 was Rs. 74.9 Crores. These figures are provisional and subject to approval from the Audit Committee, Board of Directors, and Statutory Auditors.

announcements.subject: Pace Digitek Ltd - 544550 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release of Pace Digitek Reports BESS Manufacturing Milestone: Advances Energy Platform Execution.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pace Digitek Limited, through its subsidiary Lineage Power Private Limited (LPPL), has achieved a significant milestone by delivering and supporting the deployment of 178 containerized Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) units as of March 31, 2026. LPPL, the manufacturing arm for Pace Digitek's energy platform, operationalized approximately 2.5 GWh capacity in its BESS manufacturing facility in October 2025 and has since aligned production with project execution. The company has developed integrated capabilities across the BESS value chain, including system design, integration, power electronics, energy management, and project execution. Pace Digitek is currently executing projects for central and state agencies, as well as private sector customers, across multiple locations.

announcements.subject: Bank of Maharashtra - 532525 - Chapter XIV - Centralized Database Of Corporate Bonds
announcements.detail: Chapter XIV - Centralized database of Corporate Bonds
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bank of Maharashtra has submitted a disclosure in compliance with Chapter XIV of the SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021, concerning the Centralized Database for Corporate Bonds/Debentures. The disclosure, made as of March 31, 2026, includes details of the bank's listed non-convertible securities. Specifically, it lists 14 ISINs with their respective allotment dates, listing dates, listing quantities, and whether they were first or further issues, all listed on the BSE. For example, ISIN INE457A08134 was allotted on December 26, 2022, listed on December 28, 2022, with a listing quantity of 880 units as a first issue on BSE. The bank also provided a hyperlink to the BSE listing notification for ISIN INE457A08134.

announcements.subject: UCO Bank - 532505 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Interest Rates Updates
announcements.detail: Update on Benchmark Rates of the Bank
announcements.ai_summary: UCO Bank has announced updates to its benchmark interest rates, effective from April 10, 2026. The Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) reviewed and decided on revisions for certain rates. While the Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rate (MCLR) for all tenors (Overnight, One month, Three month, Six month, and One year) remains unchanged at 7.90%, 8.15%, 8.40%, 8.65%, and 8.75% respectively, there are changes in other benchmark rates. The Treasury Bill Linked Rate (TBLR) for a 3-month tenor has increased from 5.30% to 5.35%. The UCO G-Sec Rate for a 1-year tenor has been revised from 5.58% to 5.72%, and the 10-year G-Sec Rate YTM has increased from 6.83% to 7.24%. Rates for TBLR (6 month), TBLR (12 month), Repo Linked Rate – UCO Float, Repo Linked Rate – UCO Prime, Base Rate, and BPLR remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Thomas Cook (India) Ltd - 500413 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We are enclosing herewith the Press Release dated April 10, 2026 titled, "Deepti Sheth elevated as President & Group Head - Human Resources at Thomas Cook India Group".
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited announced on April 10, 2026, the elevation of Deepti Sheth as President & Group Head – Human Resources. This appointment reinforces the company's commitment to strengthening leadership and its people strategy across the Group. In her new role, Deepti Sheth will oversee the Group HR function, focusing on talent, leadership development, employee experience, diversity, inclusion, and digital transformation. Her tenure with the Group spans over a decade, during which she has been instrumental in enhancing HR frameworks and aligning people practices with business growth. She previously served as Senior Vice President & Head – Human Resources at SOTC Travel Ltd.

announcements.subject: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd - 544537 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Corrigendum to Intimation dated March 30, 2026 under Regulation 30 - Acquisition of Equity Shares in Captive Generating Plant Companies for Captives Use of Electricity.
announcements.ai_summary: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd has issued a corrigendum to its earlier intimation dated March 30, 2026, regarding the acquisition of equity shares in Captive Generating Plant (CGP) companies for captive electricity use. The correction pertains to the acquisition price for Sea Sindu Green Energy Private Limited. The company will acquire 26% shareholding in Sea Sindu Green Energy Private Limited for Rs. 26,000, 26% in Sri Kamakshi Wind Power Private Limited for Rs. 13,00,000, and 26% in OM Sakthi Wind Power Private Limited for Rs. 60,83,000. The total consideration for these acquisitions is Rs. 74,09,000. This corrigendum, dated April 10, 2026, clarifies the pricing details for the acquisition of shares in these CGP companies, which are established for the company's captive use of electricity.

announcements.subject: Dev Information Technology Ltd - 543462 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation Regarding Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Limited (DEV IT) has secured a significant mandate worth ₹26 crore from the National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) for the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System (NPRTS). This project, under the Pharmacy Council of India, involves the design, development, system integration, and maintenance of a centralized, web-based platform for national pharmacist registration and tracking. The contract is on a fixed-cost basis with an execution timeline of approximately three years, providing medium-term revenue visibility. DEV IT's Chairman, Pranav Pandya, highlighted the company's capability in delivering large-scale digital solutions, reinforcing its position in government and enterprise digital transformation programs. The announcement was made on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: Cochin Shipyard Ltd - 540678 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Cochin Shipyard Limited has provided details regarding the International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of its debt securities as of March 31, 2026. The company has one debt security with ISIN INE704P07030, issued on March 28, 2014, and maturing on March 28, 2029. This security has a coupon rate of 8.72% paid annually. The total amount issued was Rs. 23,00,00,000, and the outstanding amount remains Rs. 23,00,00,000. The debenture trustee is SBICAP Trustee Co. Ltd. This information is submitted as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025 /0000000137.

announcements.subject: Mini Diamonds India Ltd - 523373 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Domestic Order for Fancy Coloured Lab Grown Polished Diamonds amounting to INR 14.00 Crores
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mini Diamonds (India) Limited has secured a significant domestic order valued at INR 14.00 Crores for the supply of fancy coloured cut and polished lab grown diamonds. This order was received on April 9, 2026, from a Mumbai-based existing client. The order signifies an expansion into a new product category for this repeat customer, demonstrating growing market acceptance and confidence in MDIL's offerings. This development is crucial for strengthening the company's domestic business and building larger, more diverse client relationships, especially in the current uncertain global business environment.

announcements.subject: Godrej Properties Ltd - 533150 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Godrej Properties Limited (GPL) announced its highest ever bookings, collections, operating cash flow, and business development for FY2026. The company achieved a booking value of INR 34,171 crore, marking a 16% year-on-year growth and a 3-year CAGR of 41%, making it the highest booking value reported by an Indian real estate developer in a financial year. Collections grew by 17% to INR 19,965 crore in FY2026, also a record for an Indian real estate developer. Direct construction spend increased by 62%, and operating cash flow rose by 5% to INR 7,830 crore. GPL added INR 42,100 crore of future sales potential through portfolio additions, exceeding its guidance by over 200% and achieving 59% year-on-year growth. The company also delivered projects aggregating 12.1 million sq. ft., meeting 121% of its guidance. These results were announced on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: TIL Ltd - 505196 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Raising of Funds
announcements.detail: Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held on 9th April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: TIL Limited, through its Rights Issue Committee meeting held on April 09, 2026, has approved the allotment of 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares on a Rights Basis. These shares were allotted to eligible shareholders and/or renouncees as per the Letter of Offer dated March 20, 2026. On application, ₹123.75 per Rights Equity Share has been paid, which includes a premium of ₹116.25 per Rights Equity Share. The balance amount will be payable on future calls. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital includes 7,03,52,056 fully paid-up Equity Shares of ₹10 each, amounting to ₹70,35,20,560, and 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares of ₹10 each (₹7.50 paid-up), amounting to ₹9,06,88,200.

announcements.subject: International Conveyors Ltd - 509709 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, we wish to inform you that International Conveyors Limited ("the Company") has acquired the equity shares of "Religare Enterprise Ltd."
announcements.ai_summary: International Conveyors Limited has acquired 1,40,000 equity shares of Religare Enterprise Limited for a cash consideration of ₹3.13 Crore. Religare Enterprise Limited is an investment company and the holding entity for a diversified financial services group, offering services such as SME loans, affordable housing finance, health insurance, and capital markets. The acquisition, which was completed on April 09, 2026, is for investment purposes and does not involve related parties. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals were required for this transaction.

announcements.subject: JSW Energy Ltd - 533148 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 in relation to the exercise of Call Option for acquiring the balance 26% Equity Stake in JSW Mahanadi Power Company Limited by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Energy Limited has exercised its call option to acquire the remaining 26% equity stake in JSW Mahanadi Power Company Limited (JMPCL). This acquisition is in accordance with the Approved Resolution Plan sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Hyderabad Bench, and the Securities Holders’ Agreement dated March 6, 2025. JSW Energy had previously acquired 74% of JMPCL's equity share capital. The company will provide further information required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, at the time of the actual acquisition of the balance 26% equity shareholding.

announcements.subject: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd - 532540 - Audio Of Earnings Conference Call For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Audio of earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Consultancy Services Limited has announced the audio recording of its earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The call, held on April 9, 2026, discussed the company's audited standalone and consolidated financial results. These results were approved by the Board of Directors at their meeting on the same date, April 9, 2026. Investors can access the audio recording via a provided link on the company's investor relations website. This announcement follows the board's approval of the financial statements for the period.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Copy Of The Letter Of Offer Together With The Addendum To The Letter Of Offer Received By The Company From Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited In Relation To The Open Offer To The Public Shareholders Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Please find attached the copy of the Letter of Offer together with the addendum to the Letter of Offer received by the Company from Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited in relation to the open offer to the public shareholders of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has received a Letter of Offer and an Addendum from Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited concerning an open offer to its public shareholders. The open offer, made by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, acting in concert with IHC Capital Holding LLC, aims to acquire up to 34,17,54,286 equity shares, representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital. These shares have a face value of INR 2 each. The offer is being made in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The addendum, dated April 09, 2026, provides additional information and disclosures related to the acquirer, PAC, target company, and the open offer, supplementing the original Letter of Offer dated April 03, 3036.

announcements.subject: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd - 544516 - Corporate Growth & Prformance
announcements.detail: Corporate growth and performance of the Company During the FY - 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Airfloa Rail Technology Limited has provided an update on its operational performance for the financial year 2025-26, projecting a topline of over ₹315.00 crore, indicating a significant YoY growth of approximately 64%. This growth is attributed to strong order inflows and execution across railway, defense, renewable energy, and emerging segments. The company has an unexecuted order book of approximately ₹500 crore and an active order pipeline of approximately ₹236 crore, with tenders worth ₹1,350 crore participated in. Key strategic developments include a planned Joint Venture with Big Bang Boom Solutions (BBBS) for entry into electronic warfare, AI-led defense systems, and advanced materials, and an MoU with Janatics Industrial Automation for automatic door systems. The company is also enhancing its participation in integrated and system-level railway projects.

announcements.subject: Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd - 543281 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Increase in Authorised Share Capital of Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Suvidhaa Infoserve Ltd announced on April 09, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved an increase in the company's Authorised Share Capital. The Authorised Share Capital will be increased from Rs. 25 crore to Rs. 30 crore. This change will consequently lead to an alteration in the Capital Clause of the Memorandum of Association of the company.

announcements.subject: VA Tech Wabag Ltd - 533269 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation for execution of Shareholders Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: VA Tech Wabag Ltd has executed a Shareholders Agreement on April 09, 2026, with PEAK Sustainability Venture Fund I, PEAK Sustainability Partners LLP, and Ghaziabad Bioenergy Private Limited (the SPV). This agreement formalizes the terms governing the relationship between the parties, including the management and control of the SPV, which was previously incorporated on February 16, 2026. The SPV is established to execute a Compressed Bio-Gas (CBG) project on a Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) basis in Dundaheda, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Sical Logistics Ltd - 520086 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Sical Logistics Limited has informed the exchange regarding amalgamation of promoter with promoter group entity
announcements.ai_summary: Sical Logistics Limited's promoter, Pristine Malwa Logistics Park Private Limited, and promoter group entity, Pristine Logistics & Infraprojects Limited, have approved a Scheme of Amalgamation. The boards of both entities met on April 09, 2026, to approve the scheme, which is subject to statutory approvals and consent from their respective shareholders and creditors. This amalgamation, under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013, will result in the Promoter merging with the Promoter Group Entity. Importantly, there will be no change in the aggregate holding of the promoter and promoter group, nor any change in the management or control of Sical Logistics Limited.

announcements.subject: WSFx Global Pay Ltd - 511147 - Intimation Of New Product Launch
announcements.detail: Intimation of launch of UNI-Z Digital Forex Card
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: WSFx Global Pay Ltd has launched a new product, the UNI-Z Digital Forex Card, on April 8, 2026. This 100% digital payment solution is designed for international markets, specifically to facilitate instant pre-admission education payments for students through the GlobalPay App. The card offers features such as instant digital issuance after KYC and funding, multi-currency support in 12 major currencies, and real-time app management for transactions and reloads. It aims to replace traditional payment methods like demand drafts and international bank transfers, providing faster processing, reduced costs, and enhanced convenience. The company has informed the BSE about this product launch as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd - 534597 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd has informed about an internal restructuring within its subsidiaries. The company has transferred its entire shareholding in Cocoblu Retail Limited, which was a subsidiary, to Neobrands Limited, another wholly owned subsidiary of Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd. This transfer does not alter the ultimate ownership or control of Cocoblu Retail Limited. Cocoblu Retail Limited continues to be a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd. This information is provided under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: VVIP Infratech Ltd - 544219 - Integrated Filing For The Quarter Ended On 31St March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/H0/CFD/CFD-Pod-2/CIR/P/2024/185 dated March 31st, 2026, read with BSE Circular No.  20250102-4 dated January 2, 2025, we are submitting herewith the Integrated filing for the Quarter ended 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: VVIP Infratech Ltd is submitting its Integrated Filing for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This filing is made pursuant to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/CIR/P/2024/185 dated December 31, 2024, and BSE Circular No. 20250102-4 dated January 2, 2025. The company will also make this information available on its website, www.vvipinfra.com. The submission is for the record of the Stock Exchange.

announcements.subject: Sera Investments & Finance India Ltd - 512399 - Response To The Query Received From BSE Regarding Intimation Under Regulation 31A(8) Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: We hereby inform you that the company pursuant to the query received from BSE and Regulation 31A(8) of SEBI(LODR) Reg, 2015 on 11th August 2025 have filed an application for seeking approval of BSE for Promotor Reclassification.
announcements.ai_summary: Sera Investments & Finance India Ltd has responded to a query from BSE regarding an intimation under Regulation 31A(8) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. On August 11, 2025, the company filed an application with BSE seeking approval for the reclassification of existing promoters, Mr. Mahendrabhai Gulabdas Patel and Mr. Munjal Mahendrabhai Patel, from the Promoter Category to the Public Category. The filing indicates that these promoters currently hold Nil equity shares and Nil percentage of shareholding/voting rights, and their relation with the Board of Directors is noted as NA. The company is awaiting BSE's approval for this reclassification.

announcements.subject: Saint Gobain Sekurit India Ltd - 515043 - Intimation Of Termination Of Agreements Executed With Radiance MH Sunrise Thirteen Private Limited
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation of termination of Agreements executed with Radiance MH Sunrise Thirteen Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Saint-Gobain Sekurit India Limited has mutually terminated the Power Purchase Agreement and Share Subscription Agreement executed with Radiance MH Sunrise Thirteen Private Limited on August 6, 2025. This termination, effective April 9, 2026, follows earlier intimations on October 28, 2024, May 16, 2025, and August 6, 2025. The company has stated that this termination will have no material impact on its financials and/or operations. The disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The termination was by mutual consent of both parties.

announcements.subject: Gravity India Ltd-$ - 532015 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Corporate Office Address
announcements.detail: Change in address of Corporate Office.
announcements.ai_summary: The corporate office of Gravity India Ltd has been relocated. The new address is C-804, Krishna Beackon, Near Vaishnodevi Circle, Khoraj, Gandhi Nagar, Gujarat, India, 382735. This change is being reported to the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company has provided its new contact details, including a phone number +91-9725235106 and email addresses acctbillingdnh@gmail.com and info@gravityindialtd.com. The Managing Director, Mukesh Mahendrabhai Parmar (DIN: 11473295), has signed off on the announcement. Investors should note this change for any future correspondence or official records.

announcements.subject: Tarsons Products Ltd - 543399 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Tarsons Products Ltd has completed an equity investment of EUR 300,000 in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Tarsons Life Science Pte. Ltd., Singapore. This investment is a tranche of the previously announced decision by the Board of Directors to infuse EUR 3,000,000 into the subsidiary. The company subscribed to 100 equity shares at a nominal value of EUR 3,000 per share. The funds will be utilized for the quarterly repayment of a bank loan in Singapore, associated interest, and general corporate purposes. Tarsons Products Ltd will continue to inform the stock exchanges about further tranches of equity investments as they are made.

announcements.subject: Kesar India Ltd - 543542 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Kesar India Delivers 64% Revenue Growth and 52% PAT Growth in FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Kesar India Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, reporting significant growth. The company's consolidated revenue from operations for FY26 stood at INR 176.5 Crores, marking a 64% year-on-year increase from INR 107.8 Crores in FY25. EBITDA for FY26 was INR 46.2 Crores, a 61% increase from INR 28.7 Crores in FY25, with EBITDA margins at 26.2%. Profit After Tax (PAT) for FY26 reached INR 29.9 Crores, a 52% rise from INR 19.6 Crores in FY25, with PAT margins at 16.9%. The company attributes this strong performance to its land-led development model, execution efficiency, and capital management.

announcements.subject: IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd - 532947 - Toll Revenue For The Month Of March 2026
announcements.detail: Project wise Toll Revenue for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd has reported its toll revenue for the month of March 2026, showing a year-on-year increase of 21%. The consolidated toll collection for March 2026 across various subsidiaries and trusts amounted to Rs. 7,835 million, compared to Rs. 6,489 million in March 2025. Key subsidiaries contributing to this revenue include IRB MP Expressway Pvt Limited with Rs. 1,651 million and IRB Ahmedabad Vadodara Super Express Tollway Private Limited with Rs. 810 million. For the full financial year FY26, the IRB Group reported a total toll revenue of Rs. 8,323 Crores, representing a 10% market share of India's total toll revenue of Rs. 82,900 Crores for FY26.

announcements.subject: Sandur Manganese & Iron Ores Ltd - 504918 - Execution Of Forest Lease Agreement In Favour Of The Company For Establishing A Downhill Conveyor Pipe System
announcements.detail: Execution of Forest Lease Agreement in favour of the Company for establishing a DCS
announcements.ai_summary: Sandur Manganese & Iron Ores Ltd has executed a Forest Lease Agreement (FLA) on April 8, 2026, with the Deputy Conservator of Forests (DCF), Government of Karnataka, Ballari Division. This agreement is for establishing a Downhill Conveyor Pipe System (DCS) from Kammathuru Iron Ore Mine to PMBR (BMM) siding. The FLA covers 2.4314 hectares of forest land in Deogiri, Swamimalai Forest Block, Sandur Taluk, Ballari District, Karnataka. This execution follows the final approval received from the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change on October 3, 2025, for the diversion of forest land. The agreement incorporates all conditions stipulated in the prior approval letter.

announcements.subject: Mega Nirman and Industries Ltd - 539767 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release titled "Megacharge partners with National Highways for Electric Vehicles (NHEV) for India''s 5,500 km E-Highway Network"
