announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mega Nirman & Industries Ltd, through its EV charging solutions arm MegaCharge, has announced a strategic partnership with the National Highways for Electric Vehicles (NHEV) on April 8, 2026. This collaboration aims to deploy EV charging infrastructure for 660 charging points across India's 5,500 km e-highway network. MegaCharge will be responsible for deploying and maintaining advanced EV charging stations along critical highway corridors. The partnership is a significant step towards strengthening India's EV ecosystem by enabling seamless long-distance electric mobility and establishing a robust intercity EV charging backbone.

announcements.subject: Grindwell Norton Ltd-$ - 506076 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Termination Of Agreements With Radiance MH Sunrise Thirteen Private Limited
announcements.detail: Please find attached Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Grindwell Norton Limited has mutually agreed with Radiance MH Sunrise Thirteen Private Limited to terminate the Power Purchase Agreement and Share Subscription Agreement, effective April 9, 2026. These agreements were initially established for sourcing green energy under a Group Captive arrangement. The termination is due to the inability of the Power Producer Company to meet the Commercial Operation Date and commence green energy supply as per the agreement. The company has stated that this termination will have no material impact on its financials or operations.

announcements.company: Star Imaging And Path Lab Ltd
announcements.subject: Star Imaging And Path Lab Ltd - 544482 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 -Opening Of New Diagnostic Centre At Dwarka, New Delhi
announcements.detail: Opening of New Centre at Dwarka, New Delhi
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Star Imaging And Path Lab Ltd has executed a Lease Agreement on April 9, 2026, to establish a new Diagnostic and Imaging Centre in Dwarka, New Delhi. This expansion is part of the company's strategy to broaden its diagnostic network in the Delhi NCR region. The new centre, located at Plot Number 20, Sector 13, Block-B, Pocket 10, Dwarka, New Delhi, 110075, will offer MRI, CT scan, Ultrasound, and X-Ray services. The lease agreement has a tenure of 9 years, and the estimated capital expenditure for this new facility is approximately ₹ 14 Crore. The expected commencement date for operations is August 1, 2026, subject to regulatory approvals. The company anticipates this new centre will positively contribute to its revenue and operations.

announcements.subject: Batliboi Ltd-$ - 522004 - Certificate From Independent Auditor
announcements.detail: Please find the attached copy fo Certficate form Independent Auditor in complinace to SEBI Order
announcements.ai_summary: Bhogilal Family Trust has submitted a certificate from an independent auditor to BSE Limited. This certificate is in compliance with SEBI Order and pertains to the conditions for exemption granted under regulation 11(5) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The exemption relates to the inter-transfer (off-market) of 45,00,000 equity shares, representing 15.6708% of Batliboi Ltd, from Mr. Nirmal Bhogilal to Bhogilal Family Trust. The trust has requested that this certificate be taken on record.

announcements.subject: RSWM Ltd - 500350 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of RSWM Limited, in their meeting held on April 9, 2026, has approved a preferential issue to the Promoter/Promoter Group. This approval is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, including from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited. The company plans to raise INR 36.06 Crore by issuing up to 24,70,000 convertible warrants. Each warrant will be convertible into one equity share of face value Rs. 10/- at an issue price of Rs. 146/-, which includes a premium of Rs. 136/-. This preferential issue is in accordance with Chapter V of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: Real Touch Finance Ltd - 538611 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of Proposed Closure of branch offices under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Real Touch Finance Ltd has announced its intention to close several branch offices as part of a strategy to streamline operations and enhance efficiency. The branches slated for closure include those in Arani, Kanchipuram, Vandavasi, Tindivanam, Villupuram, Tiruvannamalai, Chengalpattu, and Thiruvallur. The proposed closure dates range from July 10, 2026, onwards. The company assures that these closures will not materially impact its operations or financial performance, and all existing loan accounts and customer relationships will continue to be serviced without disruption from the Corporate Branch Office in Chennai. A public notice regarding these closures will be issued in compliance with the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Texel Industries Ltd - 526638 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of Finance And Investment Commitee.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Meetiing of Finance and Investment commitee.
announcements.ai_summary: Texel Industries Ltd's Finance and Investment Committee, in a meeting held on April 09, 2026, approved the allotment of 65,359 equity shares to Avishi Anuj Sharedalal, who belongs to the promoter category. These shares were allotted upon the conversion of 65,359 warrants at an issue price of ₹38.25 per share, including a premium of ₹28.25 per share. The company received the balance amount of ₹18,74,986.31, representing 75% of the total consideration, from the allottee for this conversion. These warrants were originally issued on a preferential basis on October 05, 2024, at an issue price of ₹38.25 per warrant, with 25% of the consideration paid at the time of allotment. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹13,30,69,910 (1,33,06,991 equity shares of face value ₹10) to ₹13,37,23,500 (1,33,72,350 equity shares of face value ₹10). The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: Container Corporation of India Ltd - 531344 - Disclosure Of Physical Volumes
announcements.detail: Disclosure of Physical Volumes
announcements.ai_summary: Container Corporation of India Ltd (CONCOR) has disclosed its provisional physical volumes for the quarter ended March 2026, comparing them with the same period in the previous year. For the quarter ended March 2026, EXIM throughput was 10,45,042 TEUs, an increase of 2.22% from 10,12,07,756 TEUs in the quarter ended March 2025. Domestic throughput reached 13,74,437 TEUs, up by 14.59% from 11,99,438 TEUs in the prior year's quarter. The total throughput for the quarter ended March 2026 was 55,82,193 TEUs, a 9.56% increase compared to 50,94,942 TEUs in the quarter ended March 2025. The company also reported period-ended figures, showing a 8.02% increase in EXIM and a 14.59% increase in DOM for the period ended March 2026 compared to the period ended March 2025. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Axita Cotton Ltd - 542285 - Intimation Of Certificate Of Registration Received From Jurisdictional Registrar Of Companies Confirming Alteration In Memorandum Of Association Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation of certificate of registration received from RoC confirming alteration of MoA of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Axita Cotton Ltd has received a Certificate of Registration from the Registrar of Companies (ROC) on April 8, 2026, confirming an alteration in its Memorandum of Association (MOA). This alteration was approved by the company's members through a special resolution passed via postal ballot and remote e-voting. The ROC's certificate confirms the change in the objects clause of the MOA under Section 13(1) of the Companies Act, 2013, and the adoption of a new MOA. Consequently, the company's Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has been updated to L01632GJ2013PLC076059. The revised MOA, as approved and confirmed by the ROC, is available on the company's website. This intimation is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd-$ - 524342 - Updates on Open Offer
announcements.detail: IIFL Capital Services Ltd (formerly known as IIFL Securities Ltd) ("Manager to the Open Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Offer Opening Public Announcement in accordance with Regulation 18(7) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended ("SEBI (SAST) Regulations") cum Corrigendum to the Detailed Public Statement for the attention of the public shareholders of Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: IIFL Capital Services Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Open Offer for Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd, has submitted an Offer Opening Public Announcement cum Corrigendum to the stock exchanges. This announcement is in accordance with Regulation 18(7) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The open offer is being made by Zenrock Chemicals Private Limited, along with India Special Assets Fund III, ISAF III Onshore Fund, and Special Situation India Fund. The tendering period for the open offer is scheduled to commence on April 10, 2026. This announcement provides an update to the public shareholders regarding the ongoing open offer process.

announcements.subject: Ashiana Housing Ltd-$ - 523716 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Regarding Acquisition Of Land In Pune (Maharashtra).
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 regarding acquisition of Land in Pune (Maharashtra).
announcements.ai_summary: Ashiana Housing Ltd has acquired a piece of land measuring approximately 28.55 acres in Vadgaon, Taluka - Maval, District - Pune, Maharashtra. This acquisition was made on an outright purchase basis. The company has highlighted that this is its largest land deal to date for the development of a Senior Living project. The estimated saleable area from this land is 20 lakhs sq. ft., with a potential sales value of INR 1,800 crores. This acquisition is a significant step for the company's expansion in the senior living segment.

announcements.subject: Shalby Ltd - 540797 - Giving Guarantees/Indemnity/ Becoming A Surety For Third Party
announcements.detail: Issuance of Standby Letter of Credit
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Ltd has issued a Standby Letter of Credit (SBLC) of up to USD 13.27 Million, availed from IndusInd Bank Limited. This SBLC is for the utilization by M/s. Shalby Advanced Technologies, Inc., USA ("SAT Inc."), which is an overseas step-down subsidiary of Shalby Ltd. The purpose of this SBLC is to assist SAT Inc. in obtaining credit facilities. Shalby Ltd has stated that providing this SBLC is in the overall interest of the company and no material financial or operational impact is foreseen. This disclosure is made as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Zim Laboratories Ltd - 541400 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: In continuation of the disclosures dt. 13.05.2024 and 02.07.2024, we wish to inform you that out of the approved investment amount of upto Rs. 2 crores, the Company has invested Rs. 89,45,100 in the equity share capital of ZIMTAS PTY LTD, subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Zim Laboratories Ltd has made a further investment of Rs. 89,45,100 in the equity share capital of its subsidiary, ZIMTAS PTY LTD. This investment is part of an approved total investment of up to Rs. 2 crores. The amount invested is equivalent to AUD 1,35,000. Following this investment, Zim Laboratories Ltd now holds 99.96% of the total share capital of ZIMTAS PTY LTD. This move strengthens the company's control over its subsidiary. The company had previously disclosed intentions for this investment on May 13, 2024, and July 2, 2024.

announcements.subject: Pradeep Metals Ltd - 513532 - Update On Scheme Of Amalgamation - Order Of NCLT For Convening Meeting Of Shareholders
announcements.detail: Update on Scheme of Amalgamation - Order of NCLT for convening Meeting of Shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: Pradeep Metals Limited has provided an update on its Scheme of Amalgamation with Nami Capital Private Limited (NCPL). On April 8, 2026, the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, issued an order directing Pradeep Metals Limited to convene a meeting of its Equity Shareholders. This meeting will be held to consider and approve, with or without modifications, the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation. The meeting can be conducted through video conferencing, other audio-visual means, or in physical presence. Pradeep Metals Limited will announce the date of the shareholders' meeting and submit the detailed Notice and Explanatory Statement in due course. A copy of the NCLT order has been enclosed and will be uploaded on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Noida Toll Bridge Company Ltd - 532481 - Initimation Under Regulation 32 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 - Non Applicability Of Statement Of Deviation Or Variation.
announcements.detail: Non applicabilty of statement of deviation or variation
announcements.ai_summary: Noida Toll Bridge Company Limited has informed the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. on April 9, 2026, regarding the non-applicability of the statement of deviation or variation under Regulation 32 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company confirms that no securities were issued by way of public issue, rights issue, or preferential issue during the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Consequently, the provisions of Regulation 32 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, are not applicable to the company for the said period.

announcements.subject: Pricol Ltd - 540293 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Clarification regarding incorrect information circulating on social media
announcements.ai_summary: Pricol Limited has issued a clarification to address incorrect information circulating on social media platforms, specifically mentioning a post by the handle @REDBOXINDIA on X (formerly Twitter). The social media post falsely claimed that Pricol Limited had announced the acquisition of a 100% stake in a German automotive components firm. Pricol Limited categorically denies this claim, stating that the information is factually incorrect, baseless, and misleading. The company has not made any such announcement, nor has it entered into any agreement or arrangement for such an acquisition. Pricol Limited assures that it is in full compliance with its disclosure obligations under SEBI regulations and advises shareholders and investors to rely only on official filings from the BSE, NSE, and the company's website for authentic information.

announcements.subject: BEML Ltd - 500048 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: BEML LIMITED and DMRCL, have agreed to jointly bid for identifying, pursuing and executing opportunities under a strategic Partnership for Rail & Metro Projects.
announcements.ai_summary: BEML Ltd and M/s Delhi Metro Rail Corporation Limited (DMRCL) have entered into a strategic partnership to jointly bid for rail and metro projects. A Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) was signed on April 8, 2026, to formalize this collaboration. The partnership aims to identify, pursue, and execute opportunities in both domestic and international rail and metro sectors. This initiative is considered to be in the normal course of business for BEML Ltd. The announcement was made on April 9, 2026, and is for the information and records of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Maharashtra Seamless Ltd - 500265 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Closure Of Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Attached
announcements.ai_summary: Maharashtra Seamless Limited has announced the voluntary strike-off and closure of its subsidiary, Internovia Natural Resources FZ LLC. The company has stated that this closure will not have any impact on its operations or financial position. The subsidiary's contribution to the company's total income for the financial year ended March 31, 2025, was Nil, representing 0.00% of consolidated income. Its net worth was ₹0.40 Crore. No agreement for sale was entered into, and therefore, there is no consideration received from any sale or disposal, nor are there any buyers to disclose. The closure is not related to any scheme of arrangement.

announcements.subject: Castrol India Ltd - 500870 - Press Release As Enclosed.
announcements.detail: Press Release as enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Castrol India Limited has announced the elevation of its flagship products in the two- and four-wheeler segments to full synthetic formulations. The Castrol Activ range will now include viscosities 10W-30 and 5W-30 as full synthetic, expanding its offering for modern motorcycles. Additionally, Castrol GTX will become full synthetic for viscosities 5W-30 and 0W-20, marking a significant upgrade for its four-wheeler engine oil range. This move positions Castrol India as a segment disruptor by bringing full synthetic technology to mass market segments. The company aims to provide stronger engine protection and more consistent performance in real-world usage, making advanced engine care more accessible to Indian consumers. This transition is driven by evolving consumer needs and mobility trends, ensuring lubricants keep pace with advancements in engine technology and demanding driving conditions.

announcements.subject: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd - 544200 - Intimation Of Request Received For Reclassification By Person Falling Under Promoter Group As Per Regulation 31(A) Of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation of request received for reclassification by person falling under promoter group as per Regulation 31(A) of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd has received requests for reclassification of shareholding from the "Promoter Group" category to the "Public" category under Regulation 31A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The request has been made by Star Housing Finance Limited, which currently holds 0 shares and 0.00% of the total voting capital. The reclassification will be considered by the Board of Directors and is subject to the approval of the Stock Exchange. The company will take appropriate steps in accordance with SEBI regulations. This intimation is considered a material event as per Regulation 31A (8) (a) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The information will also be made available on the company's website, www.akmefintrade.com.

announcements.subject: Taj Gvk Hotels & Resorts Ltd - 532390 - Share Transfer Audit For The Year Ended 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Share Transfer Audit for the year ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Taj Gvk Hotels & Resorts Ltd has submitted its compliance report on share transfers for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company has provided a certificate from a Practicing Company Secretary confirming that all registered transfers and rejections were processed within the stipulated 30-day period from the date of lodgment. This compliance pertains to Regulation 40(9) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The report covers the period from April 1, 2025, to March 31, 2026. The company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agents, Venture Capital and Corporate Investments Private Limited, have confirmed that there were no physical share transfers during this period. Taj Gvk Hotels & Resorts Ltd has therefore complied with the SEBI regulations regarding share transfer processing for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tata Power Company Ltd - 500400 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Tata Power Collaborates with Databricks to Build Future-Ready Data and AI Platform to Accelerate Energy Transition"
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Power Company Ltd has announced a strategic collaboration with Databricks to build a future-ready data and AI platform. This initiative aims to accelerate the company's energy transition across all its business clusters, including renewable integration, smart grids, and its B2C portfolio. The unified platform will leverage Databricks' capabilities to enable intelligent grid management, advanced power planning, improved billing and collection, accurate renewable forecasting, and operational excellence in solar manufacturing and rooftop businesses. By integrating data engineering, analytics, and AI on a single, scalable platform, Tata Power expects to eliminate data silos and accelerate insight-led decision-making. A key feature of this transformation is the adoption of Genie, Databricks' AI agent, which will empower employees to interact with data more effectively. This partnership is expected to drive enhanced operational efficiency, smarter decision-making, and scalable digital innovation for Tata Power.

announcements.subject: Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd - 544203 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited (ABD) has announced the launch of ZOYA Pink Mix Berries Gin through its subsidiary, ABD Maestro Private Limited. This new product is an extension of the ZOYA portfolio and aims to cater to the growing demand for craft-led and flavour-forward spirits in India. The gin is made in small batches using premium grain neutral spirits and features a blend of strawberry, cranberry, blackberry, and raspberry. The company highlights that this launch aligns with the increasing consumer preference for elevated drinking experiences and visual appeal in the premium spirits market.

announcements.subject: Anant Raj Ltd-$ - 515055 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligation Arid Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Anant Raj Limited has entered into a Supplementary Agreement with Destination Properties Private Limited to modify an existing collaboration for a residential group housing project in Gurugram, Haryana. The project will be developed on approximately 5.0875 acres of land, with Destination Properties Private Limited contributing 2.25 acres. This agreement establishes a revenue-sharing model, granting Anant Raj Limited exclusive development, marketing, and sales rights for the project. Revenue will be shared periodically through a RERA-compliant mechanism, with a provision for post-completion reconciliation of unsold inventory. This move signifies an expansion of Anant Raj Limited's development activities.

announcements.subject: Honasa Consumer Ltd - 544014 - Quarterly Update - Q4 FY2025-26
announcements.detail: Update on operating performance during the quarter ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Honasa Consumer Limited provided an update on its operating performance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, expecting strong growth in the early twenties on a reported basis. The company anticipates growth in the late twenties when adjusted for changes in revenue recognition policy by the Flipkart group. Mamaearth, the largest brand, is expected to deliver teens growth, while younger brands are projected to grow in the mid-twenties. The offline channel, including General Trade and Modern Trade, is expected to be a key growth driver. This quarter also marks the first full quarter of consolidation for the acquisition of BTM Ventures Private Limited. The company expects to sustain its overall operating profit margin profile due to leverage in marketing spends and fixed overheads.

announcements.subject: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 532296 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Receives U.S. FDA Approval for Progesterone Vaginal Inserts, 100 mg
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited announced on April 09, 2026, that it has received final approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for its Progesterone Vaginal Inserts, 100 mg. These inserts are bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to Endometrin® Vaginal Inserts, 100 mg, manufactured by Ferring Pharmaceuticals Inc. Glenmark's Progesterone Vaginal Inserts, 100 mg will be distributed in the U.S. by Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA. The market for Endometrin® Vaginal Inserts achieved annual sales of approximately $59.2 million for the 12-month period ending February 2026, according to IQVIA® sales data.

announcements.subject: Antony Waste Handling Cell Ltd - 543254 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation w.r.t to announcement of Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Antony Waste Handling Cell Limited announced on April 9, 2026, a strategic partnership with Japan-based JFE Engineering Corporation, marking the first Japanese FDI into India's Waste-to-Energy sector. JFE Engineering will invest approximately ¥750 Million to acquire a 25% equity stake in two special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for Waste-to-Energy plants in Kadapa and Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh, with Antony Waste holding the remaining 75%. JFE Engineering India will also undertake the Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) for both plants. This partnership aligns with the India-Japan Joint Vision 2025 and signifies global confidence in India's Waste-to-Energy opportunities.

announcements.company: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd
announcements.subject: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd - 544469 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Sri Lotus Developers unveils one of its kind brand campaign "Luxury Coastline Collection" showcasing its vision of luxury living across Mumbai''s coastline"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Limited has launched its first brand campaign, "Luxury Coastline Collection," on April 9, 2026. This initiative marks a strategic expansion into Mumbai's prestigious coastal micro-markets, including Versova, Juhu, Carter Road, Bandstand, Prabhadevi, and Nepean Sea Road. The campaign showcases 11 stunning projects across these locations, aiming to highlight the company's vision of luxury living. These waterfront developments are slated for completion within the next four years, strengthening the company's brand presence in key Mumbai micro-markets.

announcements.subject: Kesar India Ltd - 543542 - Statement Of Utilization Of The Proceeds Of The Preferential Issue Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Statement of utilization of the proceeds of the preferencial issue of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Kesar India Ltd has reported that there were no deviations or variations in the utilization of proceeds from its Preferential Issue during the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This statement of utilization has been reviewed by the Audit Committee and taken on record by the Board of Directors at their respective meetings held on April 8, 2026. The company is providing this update pursuant to Regulation 32 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Circular No. CIR/CFD/CMD1/162/2019.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Update Regarding Full Settlement Of Outstanding Dues With Phoenix ARC
announcements.detail: Disclosure under regulation 30 regarding full settlement of outstanding dues with Phoenix ARC is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited has successfully repaid and settled its entire outstanding dues with Phoenix ARC Private Limited. This settlement was financed by the proceeds from the Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the company. As a result of this full repayment, the previously reported default, which was being disclosed quarterly in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is now fully cured and resolved. This repayment is expected to trigger a write-back of approximately Rs. 300 Crore pertaining to previous debt settlement liabilities.

announcements.subject: KEC International Ltd - 532714 - Intimation Of Issuance Of Corporate Guarantee Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation on issuance of Corporate Guarantee on behalf of subsidiary company is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: KEC International Limited has issued a Corporate Guarantee of SAR 125 Million on April 08, 2026, in favor of an overseas bank. This guarantee is on behalf of its subsidiary, Al Sharif Group & KEC Limited Company, which has secured a banking facility. The promoter/promoter group/group companies have no interest in this transaction, and it is conducted at "arms length." This Corporate Guarantee represents a potential contingent liability for KEC International Limited, though it currently has no impact on the company's operations.

announcements.subject: Transworld Shipping Lines Ltd - 520151 - Sale Of Vessel, M.V. SSL Krishna
announcements.detail: Sale of Vessel, M.V. SSL Krishna
announcements.ai_summary: Transworld Shipping Lines Ltd has successfully completed the sale of its vessel, M.V. SSL Krishna, to Avana Logistek Limited on April 8, 2026. This follows the execution of the Protocol of Delivery and Acceptance between the buyer and seller. The vessel was delivered at Chennai, India. This sale was previously referenced in the company's letter dated March 20, 2026. The company has submitted this information for record and dissemination to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Info Edge (India) Ltd - 532777 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - First motion Order dated April 7, 2026 passed by Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, New Delhi Bench
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Ltd has received a First Motion Order dated April 7, 2026, from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, which was uploaded on April 8, 2026. This order allows the First Motion Application filed in connection with the Scheme of Amalgamation involving Allcheckdeals India Private Limited, Axilly Labs Private Limited, Diphda Internet Services Limited, and Zwayam Digital Private Limited (collectively "Transferor Companies") with Info Edge (India) Limited ("Transferee Company"). The NCLT has dispensed with the requirement of convening meetings of shareholders and creditors for the Transferor Companies. However, the NCLT has directed the convening of meetings for the equity shareholders, secured creditors, and unsecured creditors of the Transferee Company.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Composites Ltd - 509635 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Disclosure Under Regulation 30 regarding update on Waiver Application and fine levied for the period ended 30.06.2019
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Composites Ltd has been informed by BSE Limited on April 8, 2026, that their waiver application for a fine of Rs. 1,62,000/- (excluding GST) has been rejected. This fine was imposed by both BSE and NSE for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1A) of the SEBI Listing Regulations. Additionally, the company has been fined Rs. 1,55,000 (excluding GST) for the delayed submission of its unaudited consolidated financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2019. The company is exploring further options but will make the payment within the prescribed timelines. The total fine, including GST for the first instance, amounts to Rs. 1,91,160/-.

announcements.subject: Riddhi Siddhi Gluco Biols Ltd-$ - 524480 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015- Intimation Of Proposal Received From Mr Ganpatraj Chowdhary, Promoter Of Company For His Intention To Offer For Sale ("OFS") Of 8,23,422 Equity Shares In Order To Comply With MPS.
announcements.detail: With reference to Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015, We hereby inform you that Riddhi Siddhi Gluco Biols Limited ("Company") has received a proposal from Mr. Ganpatraj Chowdhary, promoter of the Company for his intention to Offer for Sale ("OFS") of 8,23,422 equity shares of the Company held by him in order to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding ("MPS") ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Riddhi Siddhi Gluco Biols Limited has received a proposal from its promoter, Mr. Ganpatraj Lalchand Chowdhary, to offer for sale (OFS) 8,23,422 equity shares. This proposed sale represents 11.55% of the company's total paid-up equity share capital and is intended to help the company comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements, as per an order dated March 9, 2026, from the Hon’ble Securities Appellate Tribunal (SAT). Following this potential OFS, the promoter's shareholding would be 75%, and the public shareholding would be 25%. The company will provide further disclosures upon final confirmation from the promoter.

announcements.subject: Xtglobal Infotech Ltd - 531225 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Sir/Madam, it is to inform you that XTGlobal has won an order of Rupees 14.8 Crore (Apprx.) from a U.S.- based State Transportation Agency. please find the attached material event disclosure as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: XTGlobal Infotech Limited's U.S. subsidiary, XTGlobal Inc., has secured a new order from a U.S.-based State Transportation Agency. The order is for an "Internal eForms modernization program leveraging Adobe Experience Manager (AEM)" and has a duration of approximately 14 months. The maximum amount payable under this work order is USD $1.59 million, which is approximately INR 14.8 Crores. The scope of work includes migrating and redeveloping over 230 enterprise forms, integrating with internal systems, and implementing accessibility standards.

announcements.subject: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd - 500547 - Intimation Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd (BPCL) has been directed by the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) to pay an environmental compensation of Rs. 1 crore for failing to install Vapour Recovery Systems (VRS) at its storage locations by the prescribed deadline of March 2024. BPCL had appealed this direction to the National Green Tribunal, but the Tribunal, in its order received on April 7, 2026, upheld the CPCB's directive. The company has confirmed that VRS have since been installed at all 41 mandated storage locations by March 2025. This environmental compensation payment is not expected to have a material impact on BPCL's financial or operational activities.

announcements.subject: Network People Services Technologies Ltd - 544396 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Reg 30 read with Para A of Part A of Schedule III of SEBI LODR, 2015, please find attached press release on securing AI-Powered Risk Management Order from Public Sector Bank
announcements.ai_summary: Network People Services Technologies Limited (NPST) has secured an order from a public sector bank to deploy its AI-Powered Risk Intelligence and Decision Platform (RIDP). This platform is a cloud-native solution designed for merchant underwriting and lifecycle risk monitoring across online and Point of Sale (POS) channels. The RIDP offers automated risk assessment, monitoring, and compliance functionalities and is provided under a managed SaaS model, which is expected to generate recurring revenue. The solution includes automated website crawling to detect prohibited content and payment scheme violations, and it triggers re-underwriting when a merchant's business details change materially. The risk scoring is based on identity, behavioral, and website risk signals.

announcements.subject: Balaji Amines Ltd-$ - 530999 - Intimation Regarding Reconstitution And Change In Name Of Internal Audit Firm.
announcements.detail: Intimation Regarding Reconstitution and Change in name of Internal Audit Firm
announcements.ai_summary: Balaji Amines Limited has informed the exchanges about a change in its internal audit firm. The name of the internal audit firm has been changed from M/s. Pandhare & Co. to M/s. Pandhare Bhutada & Co. This change is due to the reconstitution of the firm following the induction of new partners. This intimation is provided in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd - 544425 - Reg 30 LODR General Announcement
announcements.detail:
Reg 30 LODR - General Annoucement
Opening of new showroom by Subsidiary Company
announcements.ai_summary: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd. has announced that its subsidiary, Esthara Jewels Private Limited, has opened a new showroom. The showroom commenced operations and was inaugurated on April 6, 2026, at Hilite Mall, Thrissur, Kerala. This new outlet will focus on the retail sale of silver jewellery. The opening of this showroom is part of AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd.'s business expansion strategy. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Fortis Healthcare Ltd - 532843 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: The relevant disclosure is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Fortis Healthcare Limited has submitted a half-yearly report as per SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017, detailing its listed debt securities as of March 31, 2026. The company has outstanding debt securities with ISINs INE061F07044 (Old) and INE061F08018 (New), INE061F07051 (Old) and INE061F08026 (New), and INE061F07069 (Old) and INE061F08034 (New). These debt securities were issued on December 19, 2024, and mature on December 19, 2029. The coupon rate for the first year is 7.7648% per annum, with subsequent resets on an annual basis. The outstanding amount for each of these issuances is 500 Crore, 500 Crore, and 550 Crore, respectively.

announcements.subject: Belrise Industries Ltd - 544405 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended - Issuance Of Corporate Guarantee
announcements.detail: Belrise Industries Limited has informed to exchange regarding issue of Corporate Guarantee.
announcements.ai_summary: Belrise Industries Limited has issued a Corporate Guarantee to ICICI Bank UK PLC for an amount of GBP 1,38,60,000. This guarantee serves as security for a term loan facility sanctioned to Belrise UK Holdings Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Belrise Industries. The guarantee represents a contingent liability for the company and is valid for the tenure of the facility. This issuance is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has also stated that the promoter/promoter group/group companies do not have any interest in this transaction, and it is conducted at arm's length.

announcements.subject: Parshva Enterprises Ltd - 542694 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 8Th April, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting Held on 8th April, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Parshva Enterprises Ltd. met on April 8, 2026, and approved the re-designation of Mr. Harsh Prashant Vora from Executive Director (Whole-time director) to Non-Executive Non-Independent Director. This change is effective from the close of business hours on April 8, 2026. The decision was made based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. The meeting commenced at 17:30 and concluded at 18:05. This disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Suraj Ltd-$ - 531638 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the Company is undertaking a capacity expansion project to enhance its manufacturing capability up to 170 mm OD pipes.
The details as required under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations read with SEBI Master Circular HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026 are provided in the attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Limited is undertaking a significant capacity expansion project to enhance its manufacturing capability for pipes up to 170 mm Outer Diameter (OD). The company's existing capacity is around 5000 MT per annum and is close to full utilization. The proposed expansion will increase the total capacity to up to 7000 MT per annum. This project is expected to be completed by September 2026, with an investment of approximately ₹ 15 Crores, which will be financed through internal accruals. The rationale behind this expansion is to reduce dependence on imports and cater more effectively to domestic demand.

announcements.subject: Container Corporation of India Ltd - 531344 - Additional Charge Of Director (Finance)/ CONCOR
announcements.detail: Additional Charge of Director (Finance)/CONCOR
announcements.ai_summary: Container Corporation of India Ltd (CONCOR) has been informed by the Ministry of Railways (MOR) that Ms. Pallavi Joshi, IRAS, EDF/C&PPP, Railway Board, has been entrusted with the additional charge of the post of Director (Finance) at CONCOR. This appointment is effective from the date of assumption of charge and will continue until further orders, pending approval from the Competent Authority. CONCOR is undertaking the necessary procedures as per the Companies Act 2013 and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and will file the required disclosures with the stock exchanges within the stipulated time.

announcements.subject: NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Uprating Of Dadri Thermal Power Station Unit No. 5 And 6 (From 2×490 MW To 2×500 MW) Of NTPC Limited
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Limited has announced an uprating of its Dadri Thermal Power Station Units 5 and 6 from 490 MW each to 500 MW each, effective April 7, 2026, as confirmed by the Central Electricity Authority (CEA). This enhancement increases NTPC group's total installed capacity to 89,128 MW and its commercial capacity to 88,048 MW. The company has filed this disclosure as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. No further immediate actions or approvals are mentioned as pending for this capacity enhancement.

announcements.subject: India Tourism Development Corporation Ltd - 532189 - Comments Of The Board Of Directors Regarding Non-Compliance Observed In IGR For The Quarter Ended On 31.12.2025
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed comments made by the Board in its meeting held on 24.03.2026 w.r.t. non compliance observed in IGR for the Quarter ended on 31.12.2025 under SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: India Tourism Development Corporation Ltd (ITDC) has submitted comments from its Board of Directors regarding non-compliance observed in its Integrated Governance Report (IGR) for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The non-compliance pertains to not having the minimum number of directors and the requisite number of Independent Directors, including a woman Independent Director, on the ITDC Board. The Board noted that directors are appointed by the Government of India through the Administrative Ministry and therefore ITDC is not at fault. ITDC plans to seek a waiver of penalties and is following up with the concerned appointing authority for compliance. Once compliance is achieved, a request for waiver of the imposed fine will be submitted to the exchange. This matter was discussed in the Board meeting held on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Suzlon Energy Ltd - 532667 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited has responded to a noticed material price movement in its scrip on April 8, 2026, at 11:15 a.m. The company has stated that it could not ascertain any specific event or information in the mainstream media that would have triggered this price movement. This information is being provided for the record and for the information of the exchange members and the public. The company has confirmed its compliance with Regulation 30(11) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by addressing the query regarding the price movement.

announcements.subject: NHPC Ltd - 533098 - Investment Approval For Kamala Hydro Electric Project (1720 MW)
announcements.detail: In compliance to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR, Investment approval for 1720 MW Kamala Hydro Electronic Project by CCEA is submitted. The details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Ltd has received investment approval from the Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs (CCEA) for the construction of the 1720 MW Kamala Hydro Electric Project (HEP) in Arunachal Pradesh. The total investment approved is ₹26,069.50 Crore, with an estimated completion period of 96 months. The project, which will have an installed capacity of 1720 MW, is expected to generate 6870 MUs of energy annually. This project will be implemented through a Joint Venture Company between NHPC Limited and the Government of Arunachal Pradesh. The Government of India will provide budgetary support of ₹4,743.98 crore for flood moderation and ₹1,340 crore for enabling infrastructure, along with Central Financial Assistance of ₹750 crore towards the State's equity share.

announcements.company: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd
announcements.subject: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd - 540767 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Nippon Life India Asset Management Limited has received an order dated April 7, 2026, from the Regional PF Commissioner-II, Employee’s Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO). The order, issued under Section 7A of the Employees Provident Funds & Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952, mandates the payment of balance E.P.F. and allied dues amounting to Rs. 36,54,699/- (Rupees Thirty Six Lakhs Fifty-Four Thousand Six Hundred and Ninety-Nine Only). These dues pertain to international workers engaged by the company for the period from May 2013 to March 2017, due to the company calculating dues only on basic wages and not on personal pay, conveyance, and medical reimbursement. The company is liable to pay interest under Section 7Q and damages under Section 14B of the Act, with the payment due within 60 days of receiving the order.

announcements.subject: Jet Airways (India) Ltd - 532617 - Intimation Regarding Auction Outcome For Sale Of Aircraft Assets
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding Auction Outcome for Sale of Aircraft Assets
announcements.ai_summary: Jet Airways (India) Limited (Under Liquidation) has completed the e-auction for the sale of two Boeing 777 aircraft. The first aircraft, MSN 35157 (VT-JET), was sold to Ace Aviation XIV Limited for Rs. 3,09,24,90,000, exceeding the reserve price of Rs. 1,71,80,50,000. The second aircraft, MSN 35160 (VT-JEU), was sold to Ace Aviation XV Limited for Rs. 2,58,93,00,000, surpassing its reserve price of Rs. 1,84,95,00,000. The total consideration for both aircraft amounts to Rs. 5,68,17,90,000. This outcome is in consultation with the Stakeholders’ Consultation Committee and follows the IBBI (Liquidation Process) Regulations, 2016.

announcements.subject: Mkventures Capital Ltd - 514238 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Wholly Owned Subsidiary Likely To Become A Material Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Wholly Owned Subsidiary Likely to become a Material Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: MKVentures Capital Limited informed on April 8, 2026, that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Destination Properties Private Limited, is likely to become a material subsidiary. This is due to a Supplementary Agreement dated April 7, 2026, entered into with Anant Raj Limited for the development of a residential group housing project in Gurugram, Haryana. The revised commercial arrangement and expected scale-up in operations and revenue potential, where the subsidiary is entitled to approximately 17.69% of total project revenue, are the key factors. The subsidiary has contributed approximately 2.25 acres to the project's total land parcel of 5.0875 acres. Anant Raj Limited will have exclusive development, marketing, and sales rights.

announcements.subject: Redtape Ltd - 543957 - Intimation Pursuant To Acquisition Of Brand Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation pursuant to Acquisition of Brand under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Redtape Limited has acquired the international sports footwear brand SPRANDI for the markets of India, Nepal, Bhutan, and Sri Lanka, as announced on April 8, 2026. SPRANDI is a globally recognized brand with established sales in markets like China, Russia, and the Middle East. Redtape Limited plans to launch the brand in the Indian market soon through online and retail stores, aiming for significant sales volumes. This acquisition is intended to expand Redtape's brand portfolio and market presence. No specific financial details of the acquisition were disclosed in this announcement.

announcements.subject: Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd - 539659 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Conversion of Warrants and Allotment of Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd announced on April 8, 2026, that its Allotment Committee has approved the allotment of 1,44,000 Equity Shares to Dr. Vikram V. Kamat. These shares, with a face value of ₹ 10/- each, were allotted upon the conversion of 1,44,000 warrants and receipt of the balance 70% subscription money. The newly allotted shares will rank pari passu with existing equity shares. Post-allotment, Dr. Vikram V. Kamat's shareholding has increased to 14,20,541 shares, representing 8.15% of the total equity. The company's paid-up equity share capital has consequently increased from ₹ 17,28,98,650/- to ₹ 17,43,38,650/-, with the total number of equity shares rising to 1,74,33,865.

announcements.subject: Confidence Petroleum India Ltd - 526829 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: attaching herewith disclosure under regulation 30 (LODR) for acquisition made
announcements.ai_summary: Confidence Petroleum India Ltd announced on April 8, 2026, that it has acquired 25,00,000 equity shares, representing 50% of the paid-up share capital of BW Confidence Enterprise Private Limited, from BW LPG Infrastructure DMCC. Previously, Confidence Petroleum India Ltd held a 50% stake in BW Confidence Enterprise Private Limited. Following this acquisition, BW Confidence Enterprise Private Limited has now become a wholly owned subsidiary of Confidence Petroleum India Ltd. The acquisition was completed within 7 days and was conducted on an arm's length basis. The authorized share capital of BW Confidence Enterprise Private Limited is Rs. 8,00,00,000, divided into 80,00,000 equity shares of Rs.10/- each.

announcements.subject: Adani Enterprises Ltd - 512599 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Disclosure of half yearly report pursuant to SEBI circular no. CIR/IMD/DF/-1/67/2017
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Limited has submitted a half-yearly report on April 8, 2026, to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited, as required under Chapter XIV of SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated May 22, 2024, and Regulations 17(1) and 20 of SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The disclosure pertains to private placement debt securities for the half-year ended March 31, 2026. The company has an outstanding Non-Convertible Debenture (NCD) with ISIN INE423A07476, issued on October 7, 2025, maturing on March 24, 2028, with a coupon rate of 8.70% payable twice a year. The issued and outstanding amount for this NCD is INR 10,00,00,00,000.

announcements.subject: Dhruva Capital Services Ltd - 531237 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: :Launch of NeoMoney App"
announcements.ai_summary: Dhruva Capital Services Limited announced the launch of its new digital lending platform, "NeoMoney," on April 8, 2026, with a planned launch date of April 15, 2026. NeoMoney is designed to offer instant, compliant, and scalable credit solutions across India, powered by AI-driven infrastructure for intelligent underwriting and automated decision-making. The platform will facilitate loan sizes from INR 500 to INR 5,000 with tenures of 30, 60, or 90 days, plus a 90-day extension, and offers a credit limit of up to INR 50,000. Disbursements will be powered by RazorpayX and its payment gateway, with IDFC First Bank as the banking partner for real-time disbursals. The target segment includes students aged 18-30 years and salaried professionals aged 18-50 years, offering benefits such as 24x7 access, zero processing fees, and fast disbursements.

announcements.subject: Clean Science and Technology Ltd - 543318 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, Investment In Clean Fino-Chem Limited - Wholly Owned Subsidiary
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, Investment in Clean Fino-Chem Limited - Wholly owned Subsidiary
announcements.ai_summary: Clean Science and Technology Limited has invested an additional ₹ 50,00,00,358 in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Clean Fino-Chem Limited. This investment was made by subscribing to 8,36,121 Equity Shares of ₹ 10 each at a premium of ₹ 588 per share. The transaction occurred on April 8, 2026. The additional capital will be used by Clean Fino-Chem Limited to fund its projects. This investment is considered an arm's length transaction, and the equity shares will rank pari passu with existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: HMA Agro Industries Ltd - 543929 - Notice of Offer for Sale of Shares by Promoters & Floor Price
announcements.detail: Zulfiqar Ahmad Qurashi, Mohammad Ashraf Qureshi, Mohammad Mehmood Qureshi, Gulzar Ahmad and Wajid Ahmed ("the Sellers"/"Promoters") proposes to sell up to 3,31,81,173 Equity Shares of the Company (representing approximately 6.63% of the total issued and paid up equity share capital of the Company) ("Base Offer Size"), on April 09, 2026, ("T day") (for non-Retail Investors only) and on April 10, 2026 ("T+1 day") (for Retail Investors and for non-Retail ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Promoters of HMA Agro Industries Ltd, namely Zulfiqar Ahmad Qurashi, Mohammad Ashraf Qureshi, Mohammad Mehmood Qureshi, Gulzar Ahmad, and Wajid Ahmed, propose to sell up to 3,31,81,173 Equity Shares. This represents approximately 6.63% of the company's total issued and paid-up equity share capital. The sale will occur on April 09, 2026, for non-Retail Investors, and on April 10, 2026, for Retail Investors and others. The floor price for this Offer for Sale has been set. Further details regarding the transaction and the floor price are expected to be disclosed.

announcements.subject: Scoda Tubes Ltd - 544411 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 For Setting Up Of Ground Mounted Solar Project Under Gujarat Integrated Renewable Energy Policy-2025 For Captive Generating Plant
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA) has approved an application of the company for setting up of 3 MW (AC)/3.8 MW (DC) Ground Mounted Solar Project, at Survey No. 295, Village - Mundana, Tal. Sidhpur, Dist. Patan.
announcements.ai_summary: Scoda Tubes Limited has received approval from the Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA) to establish a 3 MW (AC)/3.8 MW (DC) Ground Mounted Solar Project for captive power generation. The project will be located at Survey No. 295, Village - Mundana, Tal. Sidhpur, Dist. Patan, under the Gujarat Integrated Renewable Energy Policy-2025. The estimated total cost of the project is Rs. 13,69,74,420. The project is expected to generate an average of 16,340 KWH of electricity daily, leading to an estimated annual saving in electricity bills of Rs. 3,75,73,830. The Managing Director of Scoda Tubes Limited is Jagrutkumar Rameshbhai Patel. This intimation was made on April 8, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bosch Ltd - 500530 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Intimation under regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 8, 2026, approved a significant acquisition and a preferential issue of equity shares. The company will acquire 100% of Bosch Chassis Systems India Private Limited (RBIC) from its existing shareholders, Robert Bosch Investment Nederland B.V. and Robert Bosch LLC, USA. The total consideration for this acquisition is a cash and non-cash amount not exceeding Rs. 9,068.68 crores. Upon completion, RBIC will become a wholly-owned and material subsidiary of Bosch Limited. Additionally, the Board approved the issue of 1,230 Equity Shares, each with a face value of Rs. 10 and a price of Rs. 35,200 (including a premium of Rs. 35,190), on a preferential basis for consideration other than cash. This preferential issue is to Robert Bosch Investment Nederland B.V. and Robert Bosch LLC, both classified as Promoter Group. These transactions are subject to necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals, including a postal ballot process.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulations 29(2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations. 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosures pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Aquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Limited (formerly SMIFS Capital Markets Limited) has submitted a disclosure pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of equity shares of Nexome Capital Markets Limited by Merlin Resources Private Limited. This filing is a mandatory requirement under SEBI regulations for substantial acquisitions. The specific details of the acquisition, including the number of shares acquired and the resulting shareholding percentage of Merlin Resources Private Limited, are expected to be provided in the enclosed format. The disclosure has been made to BSE Limited, and the company requests that it be taken on record.

announcements.subject: GOCL Corporation Ltd-$ - 506480 - Update On Electronics Manufacturing Services ('EMS') Business
announcements.detail: Update on Electronics Manufacturing Services (''EMS'') Business
announcements.ai_summary: GOCL Corporation Limited has announced that its newly established Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) facilities located in Gummadidala, near Hyderabad, are now fully operational. This significant development was confirmed on April 8, 2026, upon the receipt of the necessary factory license. The company had previously made disclosures regarding this expansion, and this update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The operationalization of these new facilities marks a key milestone in the company's EMS business segment. Investors can refer to the company's disclosures for further details on the EMS business.

announcements.subject: Manba Finance Ltd - 544262 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half yearly statement on specification of ISIN''s of Listed Non - Convertible Debentures for the year end March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Manba Finance Limited has provided a half-yearly statement detailing specifications for its listed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is in compliance with SEBI regulations, specifically Regulation 17 of SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021, and Clause 9.1 (a) of the SEBI Master Circular dated October 15, 2025. The statement includes ISIN numbers, issuance and maturity dates, coupon rates, payment frequencies, and the amounts issued and outstanding for various NCD series. For instance, NCDs with ISIN INE939X08034 were issued on May 17, 2024, mature on May 17, 2026, carry a coupon rate of 11.5% paid quarterly, and have an outstanding amount of Rs. 10 Crore (100,000,000). Another series, INE939X07226, issued on June 27, 2025, matures on July 27, 2027, with an 11.25% monthly coupon rate and an outstanding amount of Rs. 50 Crore (500,000,000). The company requests that this information be taken on record by BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Textiles Ltd - 502986 - Demat Report For The Month Ended March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Demat Report for the month ended March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vardhman Textiles Limited has submitted its Demat Report for the month ended March 2026, as per Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. During March 2026, a total of 10,065 equity shares were dematerialized after verification of share certificates. These shares were processed through both CDSL and NSDL. For CDSL, 6,975 shares were dematerialized across various certificate and distinctive numbers, with dates ranging from March 5, 2026, to March 31, 2026. For NSDL, 3,090 shares were dematerialized between March 9, 2026, and March 24, 2026. Following dematerialization, the original share certificates have been cancelled.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Microfin Ltd - 544055 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 - Intimation on Issue of NCDs
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Muthoot Microfin Ltd's Debenture Issue and Allotment Committee, in a meeting held on April 08, 2026, approved the issuance of up to 7,161 Listed, Rated, Secured, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). Each NCD has a face value of ₹100,000, aggregating to a nominal value of ₹71,61,00,000 (Seventy-One Crores Sixty-One Lakh Rupees). This issuance is on a Private Placement basis and the total value is approximately USD 7.7 million. The NCDs will have a tenure of 29 months from the tentative allotment date of April 28, 2026, and are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Special Steels Ltd - 534392 - Demat Report For The Month Ended March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith Demat Report for the month ended March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Special Steels Ltd has submitted its Demat Report for the month ended March 2026. During this period, a total of 554 equity shares were dematerialized. This dematerialization process involved the cancellation of share certificates and the substitution of the company's records with the depository as the registered owner. The report details the distinctive numbers, certificate numbers, and the number of shares dematerialized from both NSDL and CDSL. The dematerialization occurred on various dates in March 2026, with specific breakdowns provided for each depository.

announcements.subject: Karnataka Bank Ltd - 532652 - Statement Of Debt Securities Issued Under Private Placement Basis In Accordance With SEBI (Issue And Listing Of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021- For The Half Year Ended March 31, 2026. (Listed On NSE Debt Segment)
announcements.detail: Statement of Debt Securities issued under Private Placement basis in accordance with SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021 - for the half year ended March 31, 2026 (Listed on NSE Debt Segment)
announcements.ai_summary: Karnataka Bank Ltd has submitted a statement of debt securities issued under private placement for the half-year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The bank issued debt securities amounting to ₹300.00 crore with a coupon rate of 10.70% per annum and an annual interest payment frequency. These securities mature on March 30, 2032, and have an embedded call option exercisable after five years from the allotment date, subject to RBI approval. The total amount outstanding for these debt securities remains ₹300.00 crore.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Holdings Ltd - 500439 - Demat Report For The Month Ended March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith the Demat Report for the month ended 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Holdings Limited has submitted its Demat Report for the month ended March 31, 2026. The report indicates that 94 equity shares were dematerialized during March 2026. Specifically, 30 shares were dematerialized via CDSL, and 64 shares were dematerialized via NSDL. Following the dematerialization process, the original share certificates have been cancelled, and the company's records have been updated to reflect the depository as the registered owner. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 74(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: Mawana Sugars Ltd - 523371 - Closure Of Sugarcane Crushing Operations For The Sugar Season 2025-26
announcements.detail: Closure of sugarcane crushing operations for the sugar season 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Mawana Sugars Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the closure of its sugarcane crushing operations for the sugar season 2025-26. The operations at its Mawana Sugar Works unit, located in Mawana, Distt. Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, have ceased. This intimation is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Kkalpana Industries (India) Ltd - 526409 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Strikes /Lockouts / Disturbances
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Update on Impact of Operations due to Force Majeure
announcements.ai_summary: Kkalpana Industries (India) Ltd has announced a disruption in its manufacturing operations due to force majeure, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company cites current geopolitical tensions and ongoing conflict in the Middle East as the cause for significant supply chain disruptions and a critical shortage of essential raw materials. These force majeure conditions have adversely affected operations at the company's unit. Kkalpana Industries is closely monitoring the situation and taking steps to mitigate the impact and resume operations. Further updates will be provided regarding the restoration of normalcy.

announcements.subject: Desco Infratech Ltd - 544387 - Disclosure Under Regulation 10(6) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011 received from Mr. PANKAJ PRUTHU DESAI
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 8, 2026, Desco Infratech Limited disclosed an acquisition of equity shares by Mr. Pankaj Pruthu Desai, a Promoter of the company. Mr. Desai acquired 23,82,354 equity shares, representing 31.04% of the voting rights, through a gift via an off-market inter-se transfer from Indiraben Pruthu Desai, also a Promoter. This transaction, which occurred on April 7, 2026, qualifies for exemption under Regulation 10(1)(a)(i) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as it is an inter-se transfer between immediate relatives. The disclosure has been filed in compliance with Regulation 10(6) of the SEBI SAST Regulations.

announcements.subject: Shriram Finance Ltd - 511218 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - MUFG subscribes to 47,11,21,055 Equity Shares of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shriram Finance Limited has announced the successful completion of a significant investment by MUFG Bank, Ltd., a subsidiary of Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. MUFG Bank has subscribed to 471,121,055 equity shares of Shriram Finance Limited at an issue price of INR 840.93 per share, totaling approximately INR 396.18 billion. This preferential issue was approved by Shriram Finance's Board of Directors on April 8, 2026, and has received all necessary regulatory and statutory approvals, including from the Competition Commission of India. Upon allotment, MUFG Bank will hold a 20.0% equity stake in Shriram Finance on a fully diluted basis, marking the largest cross-border investment in India's financial services sector. This transaction aims to strengthen MUFG's presence in India and enable Shriram Finance to leverage MUFG's global expertise for its growth strategy.

announcements.subject: Cube Highways Trust - 543899 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Submission of Half Yearly statement on ISINs of Debt Securities as on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Cube Highways Trust has submitted its Half Yearly Statement on ISINs of Debt Securities as of March 31, 2026. This submission is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. The statement provides details for various ISINs, including Cube Highways Trust's debt securities. For ISIN INE0NR607017, the outstanding amount is Rs. 932 crores, with a coupon rate of 7.49% and maturity on April 15, 2041. For ISIN INE0NR607033, the outstanding amount is Rs. 849 crores, with a coupon rate of 7.67% and maturity on December 31, 2042. ISIN INE0NR607041 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 600 crores with a coupon rate of 7.59% and maturity on March 31, 2044, with principal payments starting from the quarter ended March 31, 2030. ISIN INE0NR607058 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 552 crores with a coupon rate of 7.2503% and maturity on April 25, 2028, with full repayment on maturity. ISIN INE0NR607066 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 600 crores with a coupon rate of 7.3006% and maturity on April 25, 2032, with full repayment on maturity. ISIN INE0NR607074 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 420 crores with a coupon rate of 6.93% and maturity on February 20, 2029, with full repayment on maturity. ISIN INE0NR607082 has an outstanding amount of Rs. 400 crores with a coupon rate of 7.3015% and maturity on August 20, 2035, with principal payments starting from September 30, 2032. It is also noted that all outstanding payments under ISIN INE0NR607025 have been duly made pursuant to a call notice.

announcements.subject: Torrent Power Ltd - 532779 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI Listing Regulations
announcements.detail: Disclosure on update of acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Power Limited has received approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) for its proposed acquisition of 100% of the equity stake and convertible instruments of Nabha Power Limited from L&T Power Development Limited. This communication from the CCI was received on April 7, 2026. The company had previously intimated about this acquisition on February 16, 2026. The CCI has indicated that a formal order in this regard will follow. This development is a significant step towards the completion of the acquisition process. Torrent Power Limited is now awaiting the official order from the CCI.

announcements.subject: Emami Realty Ltd - 533218 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: This is to inform that the Finance Committee of the COmpany at its meeting held today i.e, 8th April, 2026 at the registered Office of the Company has inter-alia considered and approved the allotment of 82,00,000 fully paid-up equity shares of Rs. 2/- each at an Issue price of Rs. 128.50 per equity share to the warrant holders pursuant to exercise of their right to convert 82,00,000 warrants into equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Emami Realty Ltd's Finance Committee has approved the allotment of 82,00,000 fully paid-up equity shares of face value Rs. 2 each to warrant holders. The issue price for these shares is Rs. 128.50 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 126.50 per share. This allotment is a result of the exercise of conversion rights by the warrant holders. Specifically, Suraj Finvest Private Limited and Diwakar Finvest Private Limited, both part of the Promoter Group, have converted 41,00,000 warrants each. The conversion was facilitated by an existing unsecured loan, with the remaining exercise price of Rs. 96.375 per warrant being settled, aggregating to Rs. 79,02,75,000. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up capital has increased from Rs. 8,76,67,778 to Rs. 10,40,67,778. The newly allotted shares will rank pari passu with existing equity shares and are subject to lock-in restrictions as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Adani Green Energy Ltd - 541450 - Further Update On USA Matter
announcements.detail: Further update on USA matter
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited has provided a further update regarding a civil matter initiated by the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in the United States District Court for the Eastern District of New York (EDNY). This update is in furtherance of previous intimations filed with the stock exchanges. The update states that the Defendants, Mr. Gautam Adani and Mr. Sagar Adani, who are directors of Adani Green Energy Limited, intend to move to dismiss the SEC's complaint by April 30, 2026. They have submitted a pre-motion conference letter to the EDNY judge, outlining their grounds for dismissal. These grounds include the court lacking personal jurisdiction over the Defendants, the claims being impermissibly extraterritorial, the alleged misstatements being non-actionable, and the Defendants' lack of involvement in the Offering barring the SEC's claims. The company, Adani Green Energy Limited, is not a party to these proceedings, and no charges have been brought against it.

announcements.subject: Renaissance Global Ltd - 532923 - Revised Press Release-Renaissance Global Strengthens Balance Sheet With Approx. Rs. 123 Crore Debt Reduction In Q4 FY26
announcements.detail:
Please note that the date of Press Release- Renaissance Global Strengthens Balance sheet with Approx Ts. 123 Crore Debt reduction in Q4 FY26, submitted with the exchanges was inadvertently mentioned as April 08, 2025 instead of April 08, 2026.

The Revised Press release of subject matter with corrected date is enclosed herewith for updating our investors.
announcements.ai_summary: Renaissance Global Limited has issued a revised press release to correct an inadvertent error in the submission date of a previous announcement. The original press release, titled "Renaissance Global Strengthens Balance Sheet With Approx. Rs. 123 Crore Debt Reduction In Q4 FY26," was mistakenly dated April 08, 2025, instead of April 08, 2026. The company has now submitted the corrected press release with the accurate date of April 08, 2026. The press release highlights that Renaissance Global has reduced its gross debt by approximately INR 123 crore during the fourth quarter of FY26, representing a 20% decline from the previous quarter's gross debt levels. This reduction is attributed to the company's focus on strengthening its balance sheet, improving financial efficiency, and prudent financial management.

announcements.subject: True Colors Ltd - 544531 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Of The Company Held On April 08, 2026.
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the meeting of Board of Directors of the company is held on Wednesday, 8th April, 2026 at 11:00 AM at Registered Office and the Board has inter alia approved the following: 1. Alteration of object clause of the Memorandum of Association of the Company, subject to approval of Members. 2. Authorize the board to borrow money pursuant to section 180(1)(C) ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Board of Directors of True Colors Ltd held a meeting on April 8, 2026, at their registered office.
