During the meeting, the Board approved the alteration of the object clause of the Memorandum of Association (MOA) of the Company, which is subject to the approval of the members. Additionally, the Board authorized the company to borrow money pursuant to Section 180(1)(C) of the Companies Act, 2013, also subject to member approval. To facilitate these approvals, the Board has decided to issue a Postal Ballot Notice for seeking member approval through remote e-voting, in accordance with Sections 108 and 110 of the Companies Act, 2013. The meeting commenced at 11:00 AM and concluded at 12:45 PM.

announcements.subject: Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd - 500830 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find herewith attached Media Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited has issued a media release on April 8, 2026, titled "Colgate Makes Preventive Dental Care Accessible to All with FREE Dental Check-Ups." This initiative aims to enhance the accessibility of preventive dental care across India by offering free dental check-ups. The program builds upon its success in 2024-25, having facilitated over 4.5 million dental screenings. To address the issue of dentist availability in rural areas, where the dentist: patient ratio is 1:250,000, Colgate has partnered with Bajaj Health to integrate a Virtual Consultation option. Consumers can also access personalized Dental Screening Reports and find participating dentists by scanning a QR code on Colgate Toothpaste packs.

announcements.subject: Trishakti Industries Ltd - 531279 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of Order Received - Larsen & Toubro Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Trishakti Industries Limited has secured a significant work order from Larsen & Toubro Limited for the deployment of advanced machinery and skilled manpower. This domestic order involves the hiring of machines with manpower and is for an initial contract period of 06 months. The total contract value is expected to be upwards of ₹75 Lacs, inclusive of taxes. The execution of this order is scheduled to be completed by the end of April. This award reinforces the trust of top-tier corporates in Trishakti Industries' execution capabilities and asset strength, which is anticipated to lead to stronger revenue visibility and profitability in the upcoming quarters.

announcements.subject: PTC India Financial Services Ltd - 533344 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Statement containing the data related to ISINs for debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PTC India Financial Services Ltd has submitted its half-yearly report containing data related to ISINs for debt securities, as per SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The report, outstanding as of March 31, 2026, details two outstanding debenture issues by the company. The first issue, with ISIN INE560K07102, has an issuance date of March 30, 2012, a maturity date of March 30, 2027, and a coupon rate of 9.15% annually, with an outstanding amount of Rs. 2,13,70,000. The second issue, ISIN INE560K07110, also matures on March 30, 2027, with a 9.15% cumulative coupon rate and an outstanding amount of Rs. 6,44,55,000. Both issues have a put option available annually after seven years from the allotment date, which was March 30, 2019.

announcements.subject: Yash Chemex Ltd - 539939 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Retirement
announcements.detail: We are Submitting herewith Disclosure under Regulation of SEBI(LODR), Regulations 2015 - Retirement of Independent Director.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Yash Chemex Ltd has announced the retirement of Mrs. Angee Rajendrakumar Shah, a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective April 8, 2026. Her tenure concluded upon the completion of her second consecutive term as an Independent Director. The company has provided the necessary disclosures as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The current board of directors, effective April 9, 2026, includes Mr. Pritesh Yashwantlal Shah (Managing Director), Mrs. Dimple Priteshkumar Shah (Whole-Time Director), Mr. Rushabh Anilkumar Shah (Non-Executive Independent Director), Mr. Dhanik Jayeshkumar Mehta (Non-Executive Independent Director), and Mr. Bhaveshkumar Rajnikant Shah (Non-Executive Independent Director).

announcements.subject: Royal Orchid Hotels Ltd - 532699 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed the Press Release regarding "Strategic Agreement with Royal Orchid Hotels for launching of 125 New Hampton by Hilton Hotels".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Royal Orchid Hotels Ltd has announced a strategic agreement with Hilton to launch 125 new Hampton by Hilton hotels across Western and Southern India by 2035. This partnership aims to address a significant supply gap in emerging Indian cities and commercial hubs. The franchised hotels will primarily be developed in states including Goa, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana. This initiative is expected to accelerate Hilton’s upper midscale expansion in India, driven by rising domestic travel and demand from the expanding middle class. The agreement signifies a strategic leap for Royal Orchid Hotels in its 50-year journey, complementing its focus on the mid-market segment with globally renowned Hampton brand standards.

announcements.subject: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd - 544256 - Quarterly Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: Quarterly Update - Q4 FY26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd provided a Quarterly Update for Q4 FY26 on April 08, 2026. The company reported a significant YoY revenue increase of 40% for FY26, reaching ₹10,744 crore, with Q4 FY26 revenue growing by 124% YoY to ₹3,552 crore. The Retail segment saw 102% YoY growth in Q4 FY26, driven by strong wedding and festive season demand. Franchise Operations grew by 132% YoY and E-commerce by 67% YoY. Gold category volumes increased by 27% YoY, silver by 37% YoY, and diamond volumes by 125% YoY, contributing to a studded jewellery mix. Same-store sales growth (SSSG) for the quarter was a robust 86% YoY. The company also added 8 COCO stores and 4 FOCO stores during the quarter, bringing the total store count to 78.

announcements.subject: Dee Development Engineers Ltd - 544198 - Update On Order Book Of The Company For The Month Of March 2026
announcements.detail: Update on Order Book of the Company for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dee Development Engineers Limited has provided an update on its order book for the month of March 2026. The company's total order book as of March 1, 2026, stood at Rs. 1,913.16 Crores. During March 2026, the company secured new orders amounting to Rs. 155.70 Crores, while orders worth Rs. 128.80 Crores were executed. As a result, the closing order book as of March 28, 2026, stands at Rs. 1,940.07 Crores. For the financial year 2025-26, the cumulative order inflow reached Rs. 1,869.67 Crores, and cumulative orders executed were Rs. 1,158.22 Crores. The order book comprises various segments including Pipings and Heavy Fabrication across industries like Power, Oil & Gas, and Others.

announcements.subject: Shriram Finance Ltd - 511218 - Board Meeting Outcome for Approved The Allotment Of Equity Shares To MUFG Bank Ltd.
announcements.detail: Approved the allotment of 47,11,21,055 fully paid-up Equity Shares of face value of Rs.2/- each fully paid-up of the Company at an issue price of Rs.840.93 per equity share (including a premium of Rs.838.93 per equity share) aggregating to Rs.3,96,17,98,28,781.15 by way of a preferential issue on a private placement basis to MUFG Bank Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shriram Finance Limited has approved the allotment of 47,11,21,055 fully paid-up Equity Shares, each with a face value of Rs.2/-, at an issue price of Rs.840.93 per share. This includes a premium of Rs.838.93 per share, resulting in a total aggregate value of Rs.3,96,17,98,28,781.15. The allotment is being made through a preferential issue on a private placement basis to MUFG Bank Ltd., as per the Investment Agreement dated December 19, 2025. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Shriram Finance has received in-principle approval from both NSE and BSE for this preferential issuance. The company will make further applications for listing and trading approval of the allotted equity shares in due course.

announcements.subject: Le Travenues Technology Ltd - 544192 - Media Release - Ixigo Trains & Confirmtkt Partner With Swiggy To Offer On-Train Food Delivery
announcements.detail: Media Release - ixigo Trains & ConfirmTkt Partner with Swiggy to offer On-Train Food Delivery
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Le Travenues Technology Ltd (ixigo Trains & ConfirmTkt) has partnered with Swiggy to offer on-train food delivery. Announced on April 8, 2026, this collaboration integrates Swiggy's restaurant network into the ixigo and ConfirmTkt apps, allowing travelers to order meals from over 40,000 restaurants across 160+ stations. Passengers can order meals from 4 days up to 30 minutes before train arrival, with real-time tracking and berth delivery. Swiggy is also offering an "assured delivery or full refund" policy for these orders. Travelers can access this service by updating their ixigo or ConfirmTkt app, selecting the 'Order Food on Train' option, entering their PNR number, and choosing the delivery station.

announcements.subject: Hyundai Motor India Ltd - 544274 - Disclosure Under SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Disclosure under SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hyundai Motor India Ltd. has announced an advance intimation regarding a price increase for its cars, effective May 2026. The company plans to increase prices by up to 1% across its entire portfolio, with the exact quantum varying by model and variant. This price revision is attributed to various cost escalations, and the company aims to absorb rising costs to protect customers. However, escalating input costs have necessitated passing on a portion of this impact. This disclosure was made on April 8, 2026.

announcements.subject: Easy Trip Planners Ltd - 543272 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: EaseMyTrip Foundation signs MoU with Delhi PWD for Flyover Adoption and Urban Enhancement , Strengthening its sustainability and Community Initiatives.
announcements.ai_summary: EaseMyTrip Foundation has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Public Works Department (PWD), Government of Delhi, to adopt and enhance two flyovers: Mayur Vihar Phase 1 Flyover and Apsara Flyover. This initiative aims to improve urban infrastructure and promote sustainable city development through a public-private partnership. The foundation will be responsible for the beautification, maintenance, and landscaping of these areas, ensuring cleanliness and enhancing their visual appeal. The MoU signing ceremony was attended by dignitaries including the Hon’ble Chief Minister of Delhi and the Hon’ble Cabinet Minister (PWD). This collaboration aligns with EaseMyTrip Foundation's commitment to community initiatives and responsible corporate citizenship. The announcement was made on April 8, 2026.

announcements.subject: Biocon Ltd - 532523 - Company Statement
announcements.detail: Company Statement
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Biocon Pharma Limited, a subsidiary of Biocon Limited, has received approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its Dapagliflozin Tablets, available in 5 mg and 10 mg strengths. This approval, announced on April 8, 2026, is for the treatment of adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus, serving as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control and reduce the risk of hospitalization for heart failure. This development enhances Biocon's diabetes portfolio, which includes oral solid dosage formulations, biosimilar insulin, and GLP-1 peptides. The Dapagliflozin Tablets will be manufactured at Biocon's FDA-approved facilities, adhering to global quality and regulatory standards.

announcements.subject: HFCL Ltd - 500183 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail:
We are pleased to inform all stakeholders that HTL Limited, a material subsidiary of the Company has secured orders worth Rs.1366 crore approx., from a renowned Tier 1 customer for the supply of optical fiber cables.

These orders reaffirm the confidence reposed by our customers in the Company's manufacturing capabilities, technological excellence and product quality. 

The details as required under SEBI Master Circular No.  HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 ....
announcements.ai_summary: HFCL Ltd has announced that its material subsidiary, HTL Limited, has secured orders worth approximately INR 1366 crore (Rupees One Thousand Three Hundred Sixty Six Crore only) from a renowned Tier-1 customer for the supply of optical fiber cables. These orders are expected to be executed by December 2026. The orders are for the supply of optical fiber cables as per customer specifications and are domestic in nature. The company stated that these orders reaffirm customer confidence in its manufacturing capabilities, technological excellence, and product quality. The details of the orders were provided in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026.

announcements.subject: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd - 539404 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Business Updates
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Business Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Satin Creditcare Network Limited has provided business updates for Q4 and the full fiscal year 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. As of March 31, 2026, the company's consolidated Assets Under Management (AUM) grew by 19% year-on-year to INR 15,275 crores, driven by increased disbursements. Consolidated disbursements for FY26 rose by 17% year-on-year to INR 12,516 crores. The company added 7,39,501 new borrowers during FY26, with 2,46,281 new borrowers in Q4 FY26. Credit cost for FY26 was between 3.8%-4.0%, a decrease from 4.6% in FY25. Satin Creditcare Network Limited added 392 new branches in FY26, bringing the total branch count to 1,841 as of March 31, 2026, with a consolidated branch count of 2,015. The company also raised approximately INR 10,830 crores through various debt instruments during the fiscal year and achieved a debut score of 59 in the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended - Outcome Of Committee Meeting Held On April 7, 2026
announcements.detail: Further to our intimation dated April 1, 2026, pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, as amended, we wish to inform you that the Securities Issuance and Investment Committee of the Company in its meeting held on April 7, 2026, has approved the (i) Offer to purchase for cash, upon the terms and subject to the conditions set forth in the Tender Offer Memorandum, in an aggregate principal amount up to U.S.$45,000,000 of the ....
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sammaan Capital Limited has approved a tender offer to purchase for cash up to U.S.$45,000,000 of its outstanding U.S.$450,000,000 7.5% Senior Secured Social Bonds due 2030. This decision was made by the Securities Issuance and Investment Committee on April 7, 2026. The company will issue a Tender Offer Memorandum to bondholders and has entered into a Dealer Manager Agreement with a dealer manager and an engagement letter with an Information and Tender agent on the same date. The tender offer is subject to the conditions outlined in the Tender Offer Memorandum. The agreement with the dealer manager involves identifying and contacting bondholders to solicit offers to sell the bonds. The company does not hold any shareholding in the dealer manager entities.

announcements.subject: Maruti Interior Products Ltd - 543464 - Outcome Of Right Issue Committee
announcements.detail: outcome of right issue committee meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Maruti Interior Products Ltd has approved the allotment of 4,53,00,000 Rights Equity Shares. These shares have a face value of ₹10/- each and were issued at a price of ₹10/- per share, with no premium. This allotment was made on a Rights Basis to eligible equity shareholders on April 7, 2026, following the finalization of the Basis of Allotment in consultation with BSE Limited and the Registrar to the Issue. As a result of this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from 1,51,00,000 shares (₹15,10,00,000) to 6,04,00,000 shares (₹60,40,00,000). The Rights Issue Committee meeting commenced at 08:00 P.M. and concluded at 09:30 P.M. on April 7, 2026.

announcements.subject: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd - 540777 - Intimation Of Earnings Call
announcements.detail: Please find attached file for further details
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited will host an earnings conference call for analysts and investors on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 17:00 hours (IST). The purpose of this call is to discuss the company's financial performance for the quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026. Participants can pre-register for the call via a provided link to receive dial-in numbers, a passcode, and a PIN. Alternatively, universal access numbers for India and international toll-free numbers for countries including Australia, Hong Kong, Singapore, the UK, and the USA are also available. An audio recording of the conference call will be made available on the company's website, www.hdfclife.com, after the event.

announcements.subject: Indian Hotels Company Ltd - 500850 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed copy of press release titled "IHCL accelerates portfolio expansion; reaches 628 hotels marks a year of inorganic & sustained organic growth with 373 in operations and a pipeline of 255 hotels"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL) has announced a significant expansion of its hotel portfolio, reaching a total of 628 hotels, with a pipeline of 255 properties. This growth was driven by both inorganic and organic strategies, with 373 hotels currently in operation. The company added over 100 operating hotels through acquisitions this year, bringing the total operating hotels to 373 with over 33,000 rooms. IHCL aims to achieve its goal of a 700-hotel portfolio under its "Accelerate 2030" strategy. Key expansions include the onboarding of Claridges Collection, acquisition of a controlling stake in Atmantan, and majority stake acquisitions in ANK and Pride hospitality, bolstering the midscale segment. The company also saw organic growth across its brands, including 19 signings in Taj, with a new hotel in Cairo and a 500-key hotel in Patna.

announcements.subject: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd - 541233 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015 - Approval Of Competition Commission Of India
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015, the Company hereby intimates that the Competition Commission of India has grated its approval for the acquisition of certain equity shares of Fleur Hotels Limited by Coastal Cedar Investments BV and the internal restructuring of the Company group through amalgamation and demerger.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lemon Tree Hotels Limited has announced that the Competition Commission of India (CCI) has granted its approval, vide a communication dated April 7, 2026, for the acquisition of certain equity shares of Fleur Hotels Limited by Coastal Cedar Investments BV. This approval, under Section 31(1) of the Competition Act, 2002, also covers the internal restructuring of the Lemon Tree group through amalgamation and demerger. This development follows the company's prior intimation dated January 9, 2026, and is a significant step towards the consummation of the proposed transactions. The company is awaiting the detailed order from the CCI and will proceed with the transactions in accordance with applicable laws.

announcements.subject: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd - 500520 - Transfer Of Equity Shares By Mahindra & Mahindra Employees' Stock Option Trust To The Stock Option Grantees
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed file
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd has informed about the transfer of equity shares by the Mahindra & Mahindra Employees' Stock Option Trust to stock option grantees on April 7, 2026. This transfer is in compliance with the undertaking given to the exchanges at the time of listing of shares allotted to the Trust. A total of 20,516 equity shares have been transferred to various grantees, including Kartik Ramasubramanian (25 shares), Satish Randive (228 shares), Vaibhav Deo (111 shares), and Jagdish Soni (465 shares), among others. The detailed list of grantees and the number of shares transferred to each is provided in Annexure I.

announcements.subject: Prabha Energy Ltd - 544379 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Rights Issue Committee Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held today, i.e. April 07, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Prabha Energy Limited's Rights Issue Committee, in a meeting held on April 07, 2026, approved the allotment of 96,67,258 partly paid-up equity shares of face value Rs. 1 each on a rights basis. The issue price for these shares is Rs. 144 per share, which includes a premium of Rs. 143 per share. Of this amount, Rs. 48.96 per equity share (including a premium of Rs. 48.62) has been paid on application, with the balance payable on subsequent calls. This allotment follows the Letter of Offer dated March 05, 2026, and the basis of allotment finalized in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and approved by NSE.

announcements.subject: Prozone Realty Ltd - 534675 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Further to earlier intimations under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations on this subject, please take note that, the acquisition of equity shares of the identified material subsidiaries and target entities, has been successfully completed.
announcements.ai_summary: Prozone Realty Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of equity shares in identified material subsidiaries and target entities, as of April 07, 2026. Through its wholly owned subsidiaries, Kruti Realtors and Developers Private Limited and Prozone Liberty International Limited, the company has consolidated its shareholding in Empire Mall Private Limited, Alliance Mall Developers Co. Private Limited (Coimbatore), and Hagwood Commercial and Developers Private Limited. Post-acquisition, Prozone Realty Limited now holds 100% of Empire Mall Private Limited, having increased its stake from 34.71% by acquiring an additional 65.29%. Similarly, its shareholding in Alliance Mall Developers Co. Private Limited and Hagwood Commercial and Developers Private Limited has also reached 100%, with the company acquiring an additional 38.50% in each.

announcements.subject: Ashiana Housing Ltd-$ - 523716 - Summary Of The Operational Performance Of The Company For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended 31St March 2026
announcements.detail: Summary of operational performance of the company for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The company has reported strong operational performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For FY’26, the area booked was 26.73 lakh sq. ft., with a sales value of INR 2,421.13 Crores, marking the highest annual sales ever for the company. The "Senior Living" segment also achieved a record sales value of INR 570.15 Crores in FY’26, with 569 units and 7.37 lakh sq. ft. booked. In Q4 FY’26, 665 units were booked, a significant increase from 357 units in Q3 FY’26 and 597 units in Q4 FY’25. The launch of Ashiana Advik Phase -III, Ashiana Tarang Phase-VII, Ashiana Aaroham Phase-I & Phase-II, Ashiana Malhar Phase -IV, Ashiana Amodh Phase -III, and Ashiana Swarang Phase -III contributed to higher sales, with Aaroham Phase-I and Phase-II in Gurugram alone accounting for 5.44 lakh sq. ft. and INR 832.50 Crores in sales value in Q4 FY’26. Additionally, handovers commenced for Ashiana Shubham Phase -V and Ashiana Ekansh Phase -II in Q4 FY’26.

announcements.subject: Manbro Industries Ltd - 512595 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed Press Release dated 7th April, 2026, being issued by the Company for dissemination to the investors and public. The same is for your information and record please.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Manbro Industries Ltd has announced the strategic acquisition of a 99.84% equity stake in KD Infrastructures Private Limited, as detailed in a press release dated April 7, 2026. This acquisition aims to expand Manbro Industries' business operations into fabricated steel infrastructure solutions. KD Infrastructures Private Limited is in the process of establishing a specialized steel fabrication facility with an annual capacity of 25,000 MT. The acquired entity will offer comprehensive turnkey fabrication and infrastructure solutions across various sectors, including construction, energy, utilities, transportation, and urban development. The expanded product portfolio will include galvanized structural products, power infrastructure components, solar structures, lighting and urban poles, fabricated industrial items, and electro-optical components. This move is expected to position Manbro Industries as a multi-sector infrastructure solutions provider with significant scalability potential in a high-margin business segment.

announcements.subject: Neueon Corporation Ltd - 532887 - Receipt Of Trading Approval Of 50,89,00,968 Equity Shares Of Re. 1/- Each Allotted On Preferential Basis.
announcements.detail: as per attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Neueon Corporation Ltd has received trading approval for 50,89,00,968 equity shares of Re. 1/- each, which were allotted on a preferential basis. This approval is effective from April 08, 2026, and the shares will trade under ISIN INE333I01044. These shares were issued pursuant to a Resolution Plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Hyderabad Bench, on October 23, 2024. The allotment date for these shares was November 07, 2025, with an issue price of Re. 1/- per share. A lock-in period is applicable to these 50,89,00,968 shares until April 14, 2027. The company had previously intimated the receipt of listing approval from BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on March 21, 2026.

announcements.subject: Newgen Software Technologies Ltd - 540900 - Disclosure Of Material Event/ Information Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Enclosed disclosure of the Order passed by the Court of Cassation, Qatar.
announcements.ai_summary: Newgen Software Technologies Limited has received an order from the Court of Cassation in Qatar on April 7, 2026, at 01:09 PM. The company had filed an appeal against an adverse judgment from the Investment and Trade Court in Qatar. However, the Court of Cassation has dismissed the company's appeal. As a result, Newgen Software Technologies Limited is liable to pay USD 1,370,000 (or its equivalent in Qatari Riyals) and an additional QAR 200,000 as compensation for damages, along with court costs. This information is an update to previous disclosures made on September 30, 2025, and January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Shringar House of Mangalsutra Ltd - 544512 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Launch Of New Product Category 'Bridal Jewelry'
announcements.detail: As per attached PDF
announcements.ai_summary: Shringar House of Mangalsutra Ltd has launched a new product category named 'Bridal Jewelry' on April 7, 2026. This new category is designed to cater to the domestic market and will be available on the company's website, www.Shringar.ms. This announcement is made in compliance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company has provided this update to the stock exchanges for their records.

announcements.subject: PDS Ltd - 538730 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchange regarding the strike-off of a wholly owned subsidiary company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the strike-off of its wholly owned subsidiary, PDS Brands Private Limited, effective April 7, 2026. This action is part of an ongoing initiative to streamline the PDS Group's corporate structure by eliminating non-operational and redundant entities, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Consequently, PDS Brands Private Limited has ceased to be a wholly owned subsidiary of PDS Limited. The company has stated that this transaction does not have any material impact on its financial position, as PDS Brands did not have any active business operations, contributing Nil turnover and Nil net worth to the consolidated figures in the last financial year.

announcements.subject: Teesta Agro Industries Ltd - 524204 - Announcement Under Regulation 30(1) And (2)
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30(1) and (2)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Teesta Agro Industries Ltd has submitted its yearly disclosure under Regulation 30(1) and 30(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as amended. This disclosure pertains to the shareholding of the Promoter and Promoters Group for the year ended March 31, 2026. Mr. Hardev Singh, a Promoter of Teesta Agro Industries Ltd (Scrip Code: 524204), has provided the shareholding details as of March 31, 2026. The disclosure includes the total number of shares held and the percentage of total share/voting capital. The company has requested that this intimation be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Oberoi Realty Ltd - 533273 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: NCLT approves the Scheme of Amalgamation of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty Private Limited (''NLRPL'' or ''Transferor Company'') with Oberoi Realty Limited (''ORL'' or ''Transferee Company'') and their respective shareholders (''Scheme'')
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Oberoi Realty Limited has announced that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty Private Limited (Transferor Company) with Oberoi Realty Limited (Transferee Company) and their respective shareholders. The NCLT's order was pronounced on April 6, 2026. The Scheme will become effective from the date of filing the certified copy of the NCLT order with the Registrar of Companies. The company has enclosed the order as available on the NCLT website and will obtain the certified copy in due course. This amalgamation is being undertaken in accordance with Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Indian Overseas Bank - 532388 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Debt instruments outstanding as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indian Overseas Bank has submitted its half-yearly statement of debt securities outstanding as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54. The bank has outstanding debt instruments with a total issued amount of ₹3,665.00 Crore and an outstanding amount of ₹3,665.00 Crore as of the reporting date. Specifically, there is an outstanding amount of ₹500.00 Crore from a debenture issued on September 24, 2019, maturing on September 24, 2029, with a coupon rate of 9.0802% paid annually. Additionally, there are outstanding amounts of ₹665.00 Crore, ₹1,000.00 Crore, and ₹1,000.00 Crore from debentures issued on March 31, 2022, March 24, 2023, and January 23, 2026, respectively, with maturity dates in 2032, 2033, and 2036. These latter three issuances have coupon rates of 8.60%, 9.00%, and 7.80% respectively, and feature a call option at the end of 5 years, subject to RBI approval.

announcements.subject: Capital Infra Trus - 544338 - Investor Complaints
announcements.detail: Capital Infra Trus has informed the Exchange regarding Investor grievance report for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Capital Infra Trust has submitted its investor grievance report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/102. The report indicates that at the beginning of the quarter, there were 5 investor complaints pending, with 2 of these being SCORES complaints. During the quarter, 7 investor complaints were received, and 5 were disposed of, including 3 SCORES complaints. As of March 31, 2026, there were 7 investor complaints pending, with 3 of these being SCORES complaints. The average time taken for redressal of complaints is not explicitly stated for the quarter, but the breakdown shows 5 complaints pending for less than 1 month and 2 complaints pending for 1-3 months at the end of the quarter. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Highway Infrastructure Ltd - 544477 - Announcement Of Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Announcement of Regulation 30of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Highway Infrastructure Limited has provided an update concerning the withdrawal of a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) issued by the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI) for the operations of Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh. Following the non-acceptance of the LOA, NHAI has imposed a penalty of Rs. 26,33,000 on the company. The detailed disclosure regarding this order, as required by SEBI circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD- PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023, has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Amwill Health Care Ltd - 544353 - Update On Prior Intimation Regarding Cyber Security Incident.
announcements.detail: Please find the attached intimation under Regulation 30 of Listing Regulation.
announcements.ai_summary: Amwill Health Care Limited has provided an update regarding the IT security incident that occurred on February 18, 2026. The company has implemented containment and remediation protocols to mitigate the impact and ensure the integrity of its systems, infrastructure, and data. As a containment measure, the company proactively isolated its network. Data related to affected accounts and Structured Digital Database (SDD) data that was lost has been re-entered. To ensure compliance and accuracy, Amwill Health Care Limited has obtained a PCS certificate from Mr. Saurabh Talwar, PCS Delhi, confirming the completion of all SDD entries based on available information. This information will also be available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd - 524804 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Submission of Press Release on receipt of USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release tablets.
announcements.ai_summary: Aurobindo Pharma Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Dapagliflozin and Metformin Hydrochloride Extended-Release Tablets. These tablets are available in strengths of 5 mg/ 500 mg, 5 mg/1000 mg, 10 mg/500 mg, and 10 mg/1000 mg, and are bioequivalent to AstraZeneca AB's Xigduo XR Tablets. The product will be manufactured at Unit-IV of APL Healthcare Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary, and will be launched immediately. The estimated market size for these products is US$ 514 Million for the twelve months ending February 2026. Aurobindo Pharma has a total of 579 ANDA approvals from the USFDA as of March 31, 2026. As one of the first ANDA applicants with a paragraph IV certification, the company is eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity.

announcements.subject: Orchid Pharma Ltd - 524372 - Investor Roadshow Scheduled To Be Held On April 10, 2026.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Roadshow scheduled to be held on April 10, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Orchid Pharma Ltd has announced that its Whole Time Director, Mr. Mridul Dhanuka, will be participating in an Investor Roadshow. This event is scheduled to take place on Friday, April 10, 2026, in Gurugram, and will be a Group Meet held in a physical mode. The company has informed the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited about this schedule on April 7, 2026. Orchid Pharma Ltd has also stated that no Unpublished Price Sensitive Information will be shared during this meet.

announcements.subject: GE Vernova T&D India Ltd - 522275 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding imposition of penalty
announcements.ai_summary: GE Vernova T&D India Ltd has been informed of a penalty imposed by the Joint Commissioner of Customs. The company imported certain goods and assessed them at concessional rates of Basic Customs Duty. However, the authority determined that the imported goods did not qualify for these concessional rates, leading to a demand for short-levied differential duty. The order dated April 4, 2026, received on April 6, 2026, includes a short-levied differential duty of INR 15,14,900/-, a penalty of INR 15,14,900/-, and a redemption fine of Rs. 200,000/-. The company states there is no material impact on its financial or operational activities, with the financial impact limited to the order amount.

announcements.subject: Prostarm Info Systems Ltd - 544410 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Of Prostarm Info Systems Limited Held On Tuesday, April 07, 2026
announcements.detail: Please Find Attached the Outcome of the Board Meeting of Prostarm Info Systems Limited held on Tuesday, April 07, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Prostarm Info Systems Ltd held a Board Meeting on April 07, 2026, where several key decisions were approved. The company resolved to strategically realign its business operations by shifting its UPS-related business from the Pisoli Unit to the Bakrol Unit in Gujarat, impacting its wholly owned subsidiary, Prostarm Energy Systems Private Limited. Furthermore, Prostarm Info Systems Ltd signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Shenzhen Topband Co. Ltd (TOPBAND) of China. This MOU aims to explore a strategic alliance for Exclusive Cooperation in Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), where TOPBAND will provide SKD kits and technology, and Prostarm will handle local assembly and commercialization in India, aligning with the "Make in India" initiative.

announcements.subject: Yash Trading & Finance Ltd - 512345 - General- Updates
announcements.detail: Clarification for details mentioned in Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 04,2026
announcements.ai_summary: Yash Trading & Finance Ltd (now Lexora Global Limited) has issued a clarification regarding the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 04, 2026. The company corrected a typographical error where the EGM date was incorrectly stated as "Monday" instead of "Saturday," May 02, 2026. Additionally, a pre-split share capital error was rectified; the number of equity shares was corrected from 10,00,00,000 to 1,00,00,000. This clarification aims to improve market liquidity and affordability for retail shareholders following a 10:1 share split.

announcements.subject: EPL Ltd - 500135 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail:
Transcript of the Conference call for the Analysts 
/investors, which was held on March 30, 2026, is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: EPL Limited has released the transcript of a conference call held on March 30, 2026, for analysts and investors. The call focused on the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of Indovida India Private Limited with EPL Limited. Management, including MD & Global CEO Mr. Hemant Bakshi and CFO Mr. Deepak Goyal, discussed the strategic merger. The transcript is also available on the company's website. This announcement is in furtherance of previous intimations dated March 29, 2026, and March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: LMW Ltd - 500252 - Dislcosure letter  under  Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: Adi Lakshmi Family Trust has submitted a letter to Exchange on amendment to trust deed  under Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Adi Narayana Family Trust has submitted a disclosure letter to the exchange regarding an amendment to its trust deed, as per Regulation 11(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This certificate from RJC Associates verifies the Trust's compliance with SEBI's exemption order dated June 4, 2019, and subsequent addendums, as well as the SEBI Master Circular dated February 16, 2023, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Trust has confirmed that the beneficial interest of its beneficiaries has not been transferred, assigned, or encumbered, and that trustees have not delegated their powers. Furthermore, only individual promoters or their immediate relatives/lineal descendants serve as trustees and beneficiaries, with no outsiders introduced and no changes in beneficial interest or ownership/control of shares or voting rights. The Trust has also complied with the Companies Act, 2013, in connection with share acquisitions following an NCLT-approved amalgamation scheme.

announcements.subject: Super Sales India Ltd-$ - 512527 - Dislcosure letter  under  Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: Adi Lakshmi Family Trust has submitted a letter to Exchange on amendment to trust deed  under Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: The Adi Lakshmi Family Trust has submitted a letter to the Exchange regarding an amendment to its trust deed under Regulation 11(5) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure is in relation to an exemption order granted by SEBI on May 28, 2019, and a subsequent Master Circular dated February 16, 2023. The trust has confirmed compliance with the conditions stipulated in the exemption order for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. These conditions include ensuring that the beneficial interest of beneficiaries has not been transferred, assigned, or encumbered, and that trustees have not delegated their powers. The trust also confirmed that only individual promoters or their immediate relatives or lineal descendants are acting as trustees and beneficiaries, and no outsiders have been introduced.

announcements.subject: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd - 540168 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Business updates for the Quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company's principal outstanding loans as of March 31, 2026, were ₹211.69 crore for Gold Loans, ₹54.93 crore for Vehicle Loans, ₹62.04 crore for Micro Finance Loans, and ₹6.98 crore for Other Loans, totaling ₹335.63 crore. Disbursements for the quarter and year amounted to ₹268.79 crore and ₹1057.62 crore, respectively, with collections of ₹274.43 crore for the quarter and ₹968.21 crore for the year. The company operates 88 branches across five states, and its Gross NPA as of March 31, 2026, was ₹3.64 crore. Total borrowings stand at ₹325.92 crore, comprising ₹136.37 crore in Non-Convertible Debentures, ₹128.06 crore in Subordinated Debts/ICD, and ₹61.48 crore in Other Secured Borrowings. This data is provisional and subject to audit by the company's statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Kohinoor Foods Ltd - 512559 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kohinoor Foods Ltd is providing its quarterly disclosure regarding defaults on loan payments. This announcement is a routine filing required for listed entities. The company is reporting on its obligations for interest payments and principal repayments on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities. Investors should review these disclosures to understand the company's current debt servicing status.

announcements.subject: Ind-Swift Laboratories Ltd - 532305 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Arbitration Award
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of Arbitration Award
announcements.ai_summary: Ind-Swift Laboratories Ltd has received an arbitration award from the Arbitral Tribunal on April 7, 2026, concerning arbitration proceedings with PI Industries Limited. The Arbitral Tribunal has rejected all claims made by the claimant, PI Industries Limited, as well as all counterclaims filed by the respondents, including Ind-Swift Laboratories Limited. Consequently, the arbitration proceedings have concluded with no financial impact on Ind-Swift Laboratories Limited. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd
announcements.subject: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd - 544469 - Intimation Of Initial Subscription To Ordinary Shares In Wholly Owned Subsidiaries Of The Company
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith Intimation of initial subscription to ordinary shares in Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about its initial subscription to ordinary shares in its wholly-owned subsidiaries. This investment was made on March 4, 2026, as part of the company's ongoing strategy, following previous intimations on March 12, 13, 17, and 18, 2026. The company has invested in Sri Lotus Elegancia Realty Private Limited, Sri Lotus Legacy Realty Private Limited, Sri Lotus Marquee Projects Private Limited, Sri Lotus Imperial Projects Private Limited, and Sri Lotus Grand Abodes Private Limited. Each of these wholly-owned subsidiaries has an authorized capital of Rs. 10,00,000/- (Rupees Ten Lakhs only), with Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Limited subscribing to Rs. 10,00,000/- in paid-up capital for Sri Lotus Grand Abodes Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Tulive Developers Ltd - 505285 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Saffron Capital Advisors Pvt. Ltd. (Manager to the Delisting Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer for the attention of the Public Shareholders of Tulive Developers Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Altis Properties Private Limited and GKS Technology Park Private Limited, along with Atul Gupta and K V Ramana Shetty (collectively "Acquirers" and "Persons Acting in Concert"), have initiated a voluntary delisting proposal for Tulive Developers Limited. Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited, acting as the Manager to the Delisting Offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to BSE Limited for the public shareholders. The Acquirers intend to acquire all equity shares held by public shareholders and subsequently delist the company's shares from BSE Limited in accordance with the SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021. The Letter of Offer will be dispatched to public shareholders and made available on the company's and the manager's websites.

announcements.subject: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd - 505850 - Intimation For Opening Of New Branch In The State Of Rajasthan (Bhilwara).
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith intimation for opening of new branch in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Regulation 51 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about the opening of a new branch in Bhilwara, Rajasthan, effective April 8, 2026. This intimation is made in compliance with Regulation 30 read with Regulation 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The new branch will be located at Shop no. G-10, 11 Ground Floor, Prem Bhavan, 14-B, Gandhi Nagar, Pur Road, Bhilwara, Rajasthan- 311001. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: The Phoenix Mills Ltd - 503100 - Business Update - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please refer the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: The Phoenix Mills Limited has provided an operational business update for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. For the fiscal year 2026, the company achieved an all-time high retail consumption of approximately Rs. 16,578 crore, representing a 21% year-on-year increase, solely from its existing mall portfolio without any new additions. The fourth quarter of FY26 saw even stronger growth, with consumption reaching approximately Rs. 4,251 crore, up 31% year-on-year. The company's office portfolio also expanded significantly, with gross leasing of over 2.2 million square feet, leading to improved occupancy. Residential sales more than doubled year-on-year, and the hospitality segment remained resilient. The company has also uploaded this information on its website.

announcements.subject: Laurus Labs Ltd - 540222 - Update On Meetings Of Unsecured Creditors In Relation To The Composite Scheme Of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Please see annexed enclosure.
announcements.ai_summary: Laurus Labs Limited has announced a significant development regarding its Composite Scheme of Arrangement. The meetings of the unsecured creditors for both the Transferor Company (Laurus Synthesis Private Limited) and the Resulting Company (Sriam Labs Private Limited), which are wholly-owned subsidiaries, were held on April 06, 2026. These meetings were convened as per the directions of the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Amravati Special Branch (NCLT). The company confirms that the requisite quorum was present, and the meetings were conducted fairly and transparently. Crucially, the unsecured creditors of both entities have approved the Composite Scheme of Arrangement. This approval is a key milestone, though the scheme remains subject to further approval from the Hon’ble NCLT and other applicable statutory/regulatory authorities.

announcements.subject: Aegis Logistics Ltd - 500003 - Disclosure Pursuant To Regulation 30 Read With Schedule III Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Aegis Logistics Limited has informed the Exchange about providing Corporate Guarantee and intimation for the same is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Aegis Logistics Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee to Itochu Corporation for the full and faithful performance of obligations by its subsidiary, Aegis Vopak Terminals Limited (AVTL), as per a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated March 27, 2026. This guarantee is related to Itochu Corporation becoming a shareholder of Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited (ATPL), a subsidiary of AVTL, prior to the transfer of an Ammonia Terminal. The Corporate Guarantee amounts to INR 80,32,00,000/- and is for a limited period. The company has confirmed that this guarantee is at arm's length and no promoters or group companies have an interest in this transaction.

announcements.subject: Dhabriya Polywood Ltd - 538715 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (The "Listing Regulation') - Purchase Of Industrial Property.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Purchase of Industrial Land & Building.
announcements.ai_summary: Dhabriya Polywood Ltd has purchased an industrial property, including land and a building, for a total consideration of ₹22.46 crore. The property, measuring 2436 sq. meters, is located at Plot No. B-10(A,D,D1)A, Malviya Nagar Industrial Area, Jaipur - 302017, and is situated opposite the company's existing factory premises and registered office. This acquisition is intended to support the company's future expansion plans, including capacity enhancement for new and existing product lines. The purchase has been funded through internal accruals and partial bank funding. This intimation is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Inflame Appliances Ltd - 541083 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to provision of Reglation 30of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015, Please find the press release Highlighting the business update of the Q4 & H2FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Inflame Appliances Ltd has announced a strong business performance for Q4 and H2 FY26, ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a 20% year-on-year (YoY) growth in chimney volumes for Q4 FY26, reaching 58,446 units, and a significant 52% YoY growth in H2 FY26 to 1,34,067 units. Full-year FY26 chimney volumes increased by 38% YoY to 2,68,572 units. Total revenue for FY26 grew by 45% YoY to ₹156.6 crore, with Q4 FY26 revenue at ₹36.6 crore and H2 FY26 revenue at ₹80.2 crore. Blended realisations improved by approximately 14% YoY in FY26 due to better pricing and product mix. Capacity utilization also increased across both plants, reaching about 45% for FY26.

announcements.subject: Shubham Polyspin Ltd - 542019 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulation 2015 For Capacity Expansion
announcements.detail: Disclosure for Capacity Expansion
announcements.ai_summary: Shubham Polyspin Ltd announced a capacity expansion of 200 MT per month at its existing unit in Borisana, Gujarat. The company's current capacity is 225 MT per month, with an approximate utilization of 90%. The proposed expansion is expected to be completed by March 2027 and requires an investment of approximately Rs. 1650 Lacs. This expansion will be funded by Rs. 415 Lacs from promoters' unsecured loans and Rs. 1235 Lacs from additional bank finance. The rationale behind this expansion is the increasing demand for PP yarn in domestic and international markets, aiming to improve operational efficiency, reduce per-unit costs, and strengthen competitiveness through economies of scale. The expanded capacity will also enable the adoption of modern, energy-efficient machinery, leading to improved yarn quality and reduced waste.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - Infosys And Harness Announce Strategic Collaboration To Unlock AI Value For Enterprise Transformation And Modernization Programs
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Ltd has announced a strategic collaboration with Harness, an AI Software Delivery Platform company, effective April 7, 2026. This partnership aims to accelerate agentic AI-led software delivery transformation for global enterprises. The combined capabilities of Infosys Topaz Fabric, Infosys Cobalt, and the Harness Software Delivery Platform will focus on enhancing productivity, software engineering, AI governance, and scaling AI adoption. The collaboration seeks to automate the end-to-end software delivery lifecycle by applying AI to downstream activities such as testing, deployment, security, and governance. This initiative is designed to support large-scale modernization programs, particularly in complex and regulated environments, and will be hosted on Infosys' website.

announcements.subject: Rajshree Sugars & Chemicals Ltd - 500354 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Operational data of our sugar factories for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Rajshree Sugars & Chemicals Ltd has provided its monthly business update for March 2026, detailing the operational data for its sugar factories. For the month of March 2026, the company crushed a total of 67,261 MTs of cane across its Coimbatore Unit I and Unit II, producing 6,875 MTs of sugar and selling 4,336 MTs. In the same period, molasses production was 4,305 MTs, with own consumption and sales at 4,454 MTs. Cogeneration operations produced 92.33 Lakh Units of power, with 27.37 Lakh Units for captive consumption and 64.96 Lakh Units exported to the grid. The report also includes cumulative figures up to March 2026 for cane crushed, sugar produced and sold, molasses production, and power generation.

announcements.subject: Titan Company Ltd - 500114 - Modification To The Trust Deed Consequent To The Change In Composition Of The Trustees - Titan Employee Stock Option Trust
announcements.detail: Modification to the Trust Deed consequent to the change in composition of the trustees - Titan Employee Stock Option Trust
announcements.ai_summary: Titan Company Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about a modification to the Trust Deed of the Titan Employee Stock Option Trust. This change is consequent to an alteration in the composition of the trustees. The modification has been made in compliance with Regulation 3 of the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. A copy of the Deed of Variation has been enclosed with the announcement for information and records.

announcements.subject: Praxis Home Retail Ltd - 540901 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of LODR - Grant Of Stock Options
announcements.detail: Grant of Stock Options.
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Praxis Home Retail Ltd, in its meeting held on April 07, 2026, approved the grant of 5,00,000 stock options to eligible employees under the 'Praxis Employee Stock Option Plan 2024'. Each option will have an exercise price of Rs. 5/-. These options cover 5,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 5/- face value each. The options will vest in tranches: 40% after one year, 30% after two years, and 30% after three years from the grant date. Grantees can exercise these options within three years of their respective vesting dates. The meeting of the committee commenced at 4:05 p.m. and concluded at 4:16 p.m.

announcements.subject: Borosil Renewables Ltd - 502219 - Interview Of Mr. Pradeep Kumar Kheruka, Executive Chairman With ET Now
announcements.detail: Interview of Mr. Pradeep Kumar Kheruka, Executive Chairman with ET Now
announcements.ai_summary: Borosil Renewables Ltd has informed the stock exchanges about an interview featuring Mr. Pradeep Kumar Kheruka, the Executive Chairman, with ET Now, which took place on April 07, 2026. The interview focused on a general business update for the company. Investors can access the interview through the provided YouTube link: https://youtu.be/maIT1gXkCHU?si=P3iLO8Cz0okSW6uH. This information is also available on the company's website, www.borosilrenewables.com.

announcements.subject: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd - 544200 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Akme Fintrade (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding issuance of Non Convertible Debentures.
announcements.ai_summary: Akme Fintrade (India) Limited's Loan & Investment Committee has approved the issuance of Senior, Secured, Listed, Rated, Transferable, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) up to INR 50 Crores (Indian Rupees Fifty Crores). These NCDs will be issued on a private placement basis in one or more tranches to eligible investors. The proposed NCDs are intended to be listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The company will maintain a security cover of at least 1.10x over loan receivables throughout the tenure of the debentures. Further details regarding the tenure, coupon/interest, and payment schedules are specified in the key information document.

announcements.subject: SPL Industries Ltd - 532651 - Clarification On Shareholding Of Promoter Group
announcements.detail: Clarification on shareholding of Sunil Kumar & Sons, forming part of Promoter Group of the company attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: SPL Industries Ltd has provided a clarification regarding the shareholding of Sunil Kumar & Sons, a part of the Promoter Group. The company initially reported 1,91,700 equity shares in the name of Sunil Kumar and Sons. However, upon scrutiny with the Designated Depository (CDSL) and Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) Kfin Technologies Limited, it was found that an additional 216 equity shares were reflected under a Dummy PAN. Further verification confirmed that these 216 shares are held in a demat account in the name of Sunil Jindal and have been held for a considerable period, forming part of his overall shareholding without any recent transactions. To ensure consistency, SPL Industries Ltd will now include these 216 shares under the Promoter & Promoter Group category in future shareholding pattern filings.

announcements.subject: Prince Pipes and Fittings Ltd - 542907 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Completion of Acquisition of Manufacturing facility at Bhuj, Gujarat
announcements.ai_summary: Prince Pipes and Fittings Limited has successfully completed the second phase of its acquisition of a manufacturing facility in Bhuj, Gujarat. This follows the company's earlier disclosure on March 20, 2024, regarding an Asset Purchase Agreement (APA) with Klaus Waren Fixtures Private Limited and Mr. Narshi Mulji Shah for the Aquel bathware business. The second phase involved the acquisition of the land parcel, buildings, machinery, manufacturing equipment, and office furniture and fixtures. This acquisition is a strategic move to strengthen Prince Pipes' diversification into the bathware segment and will serve as a manufacturing base for its bathware operations, supporting the scaling of the "Aquel by Prince" product portfolio.

announcements.subject: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd - 517334 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI(Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the stock exchange regarding disclosure under regulation  30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted an announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, regarding the settlement of proceedings. SMR Hyosang Automotive Ltd., an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of the company in South Korea, entered into a mediation agreement with its sub-contractor on April 6, 2026. As part of this settlement, SMR Hyosang will pay KRW 360,000,000, equivalent to approximately INR 22,179,600, excluding VAT, by April 27, 2026. This settlement resolves dues and claims arising from sub-contracting transactions. The company has stated that there is no material impact on the financial, operational, or other activities of SMR Hyosang or the parent company.

announcements.subject: GHV Infra Projects Ltd - 505504 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Request For Reclassification From ''Promoter Group / PAC'' To ''Public Shareholder'' Under Regulation 31A Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: As per the attached Intimation letter
announcements.ai_summary: GHV Infra Projects Limited has received a request for reclassification from "Promoter Group / PAC" to "Public Shareholder" under Regulation 31A of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The request was made on April 06, 2026, by Husena A Musamji, who holds 37,50,000 equity shares, representing 5.20% of the company's shareholding. The Board of Directors will consider this request, and the company will seek necessary approvals from BSE Limited as per Regulation 31A. This intimation is considered a material event.

announcements.subject: Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd - 540788 - Letter of Offer
announcements.detail: Aftertrade Broking Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Letter of Offer to the Public Shareholders of Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd ("Target Company").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aftertrade Broking Private Limited, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to the BSE on behalf of Mr. Arvind Karsandas Bhanushali, Mrs. Deepali Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Jay Arvind Bhanushali, Mr. Nikunj Velji Mange, and Mr. Raj Arvind Bhanushali, along with Mrs. Shraddha Nikunj Mange (collectively referred to as the "Acquirers" and "PAC"). The offer is to acquire 26,76,180 equity shares, representing 26% of the total paid-up equity shares of Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd, at a price of Rs. 55/- per equity share. This offer is made in compliance with Regulation 3(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Letter of Offer has been submitted for the stock exchange's record.

announcements.subject: Alkem Laboratories Ltd - 539523 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith Press release- Alkem Launches A to Z Daily, an everyday multivitamin supplement for body and mind.
announcements.ai_summary: Alkem Laboratories Ltd. has announced the launch of "A to Z Daily," a new everyday multivitamin supplement designed for adults to provide holistic nutritional support for both body and mind. The supplement is formulated with 26 essential vitamins, minerals, and select botanicals, including Vitamin B complex, Vitamin D3, Vitamin C, Zinc, Iron, Ashwagandha, Bacopa monnieri, Panax ginseng, and L-theanine. These ingredients are intended to help manage stress, improve energy levels, and strengthen immunity. Alkem Laboratories positions "A to Z Daily" as a consistent, long-term approach for individuals seeking to maintain physical energy and mental composure amidst daily pressures. The launch was announced on April 7, 2026.

announcements.subject: CarTrade Tech Ltd - 543333 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Attached
announcements.ai_summary: CarTrade Tech Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Sobek Auto India Private Limited (OLX India), has appointed Mr. Varun Sanghi as its Non-Executive Chairman. Mr. Sanghi, who has been with CarTrade Tech for over a decade and currently serves as Chief Strategy Officer, was instrumental in the acquisition of OLX India in 2023 and has led post-integration initiatives. He also heads CarTrade Labs, the company's innovation hub. As Chairman of OLX India, Mr. Sanghi will provide strategic guidance to support the company's next phase of growth, focusing on innovation, trust, and customer-centricity. This appointment is effective from April 7, 2026.

announcements.subject: Larsen & Toubro Ltd - 500510 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Disclosure pursuant to Paragraph 9.1 (a) of the Chapter VIII of SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated Nay 22, 2024
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited has submitted its half-yearly report as required by SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54 dated May 22, 2024. The disclosure pertains to debt securities issued under SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021. The report details five outstanding debt issuances as of March 31, 2026. These include Rs. 2,000 Crore with a coupon rate of 7.725% maturing on April 28, 2028; Rs. 1,800 Crore at 8.00% maturing on April 23, 2030; Rs. 1,500 Crore at 7.19% maturing on December 5, 2034; Rs. 4,000 Crore at 7.20% maturing on January 22, 2035; and Rs. 500 Crore at 6.35% maturing on June 19, 2028. All these issuances have a yearly payment frequency and no embedded options. The company has provided the ISIN numbers, issuance dates, maturity dates, coupon rates, and amounts issued and outstanding for each debt security.

announcements.subject: Coffee Day Enterprises Ltd - 539436 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Coffee Day Enterprises Ltd is required to submit quarterly disclosures regarding defaults on payment of interest or repayment of principal on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities. This disclosure is mandated by SEBI regulations for listed entities. The company must report any such defaults within the specified quarterly periods. The exact details of any defaults, including the amount, nature of the loan, and the counterparty, would be provided in the disclosure. This reporting requirement is crucial for maintaining transparency and informing investors about the company's financial obligations.

announcements.subject: Grasim Industries Ltd - 500300 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Specification related to ISIN for debt securities for the period 1st October 2025 to 31st March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Grasim Industries Limited has provided specifications related to ISIN for private placement of debt securities for the period of 1st October 2025 to 31st March 2026. The company has outstanding Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with various issuance and maturity dates, and coupon rates ranging from 6.56% to 7.63%. Specifically, NCDs with ISIN INE047A08224# issued on 22nd March 2024 with a maturity date of 22nd March 2034 carry a coupon rate of 7.25% and are paid half-yearly. This NCD issuance of Rs. 1,250.00 crores is listed as unlisted. The company has also noted that the notice for exercising Call / Put option for these debentures should be submitted 30 days prior to the option exercise date, which is 22nd March 2030. This disclosure is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated 15th October 2025.

announcements.subject: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd - 544322 - Business Update For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 - FY26)
announcements.detail: As per Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Business update for the Quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4-FY26)
announcements.ai_summary: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY26) in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company experienced a challenging macro environment in the first nine months of FY26, but observed a gradual improvement in Q4 FY26 due to normalization of customer procurement activity, especially in the US market, following recent tariff policy developments. The order book stood at approximately Rs 214 crores as of March 31, 2026, with a steady pipeline of new enquiries. While the geopolitical situation in West Asia is being monitored for potential indirect supply chain impacts, the company expects to report year-on-year growth for Q4 FY26 compared to Q4 FY25.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Please Find Attached The Copy Of The Letter Of Offer Received By The Company From Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited In Relation To The Open Offer To The Public Shareholders Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Please find attached the copy of the Letter of Offer received by the Company from Citigroup Global India Private Limited in relation to the open offer to the public shareholders of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited, acting as the manager to the offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to Sammaan Capital Limited (formerly Indiabulls Housing Finance Limited) regarding an open offer to public shareholders. The offer is to acquire up to 34,17,54,286 equity shares, representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital. This acquisition is being made by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, along with IHC Capital Holding LLC as a person acting in concert, in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations. The offer aims to acquire shares with a face value of INR 2 each. This announcement follows a public announcement made on October 2, 2025.

announcements.subject: Regency Ceramics Ltd - 515018 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2025
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2025, we here by inform that the Hon''ble  Principal District Court, puducherry has passed judgement in favour of the Company in the matter  of National Insurance company Limited vs Regency Ceramics Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: On April 7, 2026, Regency Ceramics Limited announced that the Hon'ble Principal District Court, Puducherry, passed a judgment in favor of the company on April 6, 2026. The case involved National Insurance Company Limited vs. Regency Ceramics Limited (OP No. 33 of 2022). The court partly allowed the petition, modifying an arbitral award to Rs. 133,30,60,000 (Rupees One Hundred Thirty-Three Crores Thirty Lakhs Sixty Thousand Only) and confirming the remaining portion along with proportionate costs. This outcome is expected to have a positive impact on the company's financial position.

announcements.subject: Reganto Enterprises Ltd - 517393 - Submission Of Financial Results For Quarter Ended September 2025 Under Regulation 33 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Financial Results for quarter ended September 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Reganto Enterprises Limited (formerly Vintron Informatics Limited) submitted its financial results for the quarter ended September 2025 on April 7, 2026. The company's Board of Directors approved these results in a meeting held on March 20, 2026. The financial statements, prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 "Interim Financial Reporting" and compliant with Regulation 33 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, were reviewed by the statutory auditor. The accompanying Limited Review Report has also been submitted.

announcements.subject: MMTC Ltd - 513377 - MMTC Limited Informs The Exchange About Receipt Of NIL Requests For Re-Lodgment Of Transfer Requests Of Physical Shares As Per SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11 (2) 2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 Dated January 30, 2026.
announcements.detail: MMTC Limited informs The Exchange About Receipt of NIL Requests for re''lodgment of Transfer Requests of Physical Shares as per SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11 (2) 2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated January 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: MMTC Limited has informed the BSE Limited and NSE Limited that it has received NIL requests for the re-lodgment of transfer requests of physical shares during March 2026. This update is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11 (2) 2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026, dated January 30, 2026. The company's Registrar and Transfer Agent, MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited, has confirmed that no requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during the specified period under the special window provided by the SEBI circular.

announcements.subject: Sayaji Hotels Ltd - 523710 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Of Entering Into Hotel Management Agreement.
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 of entering into Hotel Management Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sayaji Hotels Limited has entered into a Hotel Management Agreement for a property located in Bengaluru, Karnataka. This agreement is for providing operational and management services for a hotel that will comprise 59 rooms and be developed as a 4-star property under the brand name "Enrise" by Sayaji. This initiative aligns with the company's strategic expansion plans in key Indian markets and aims to strengthen its presence in the southern region. The company has informed the BSE Limited about this development under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Matrimony.com Ltd - 540704 - Additional Details For Corporate Announcement Filed Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 On April 2, 2026
announcements.detail: The response to the email dated 06th April 2026 from the Exchange seeking additional details for corporate announcement filed under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 on April 2, 2026, is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Matrimony.com Limited has provided additional details to the BSE Limited regarding a corporate announcement filed on April 2, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company clarified that the delay in disclosing material events, specifically penalties levied by GST departments from different states, was due to internal evaluation and obtaining expert opinions on the impact and further course of action.
