The company has enclosed details of penalties, including Rs. 8,52,92,825 from the Commercial Tax Officer, GST department, Chennai, and Rs. 55,62,436 from the Assistant Commissioner, GST Department, Bengaluru. These details are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd - 532811 - Clarification On Dated 09-07-2024 Reply To NSE On 12-07-2024 But Missed With BSE
announcements.detail: Reply to BSE which was pending/ Missed to BSE, The Query raised from NSE accordingly reply to NSE on 12-07-2024
announcements.ai_summary: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd has submitted a clarification to BSE Limited regarding a non-compliance with Regulation 21(3C) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company inadvertently missed intimating BSE about a warning letter received from NSE on July 9, 2024. The Risk Management Committee meetings were held on February 13, 2023, and November 10, 2023, with a gap of 270 days, which exceeded the 180-day limit stipulated by the regulation. The company acknowledges the unintentional delay in intimation to BSE and assures future compliance.

announcements.subject: Kalind Ltd - 526935 - Intimation Under Regulation 31A Of The SEBI LODR 2015 - Submission Of Application To BSE Limited Upon Receipt Of Request For Re-Classification From "Promoter/Promoter Group" To "Public" Category.
announcements.detail: Please find attached intimation with respect to submission of application to Stock Exchange (BSE Limited) upon receipt for Reclassification from Promoter/Promoter Group to Public Category pursuant to Reg 31A of SEBI LODR.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kalind Limited has submitted an application to BSE Limited seeking a "no-objection" for the re-classification of certain individuals from the 'Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. This application is made in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The individuals named in the application, Yagnik Bharatkumar Tank and Deniis Bhupendra Desai, currently hold 0 shares and 0% of shares, respectively, and are listed as 'Promoter' in the current classification. The company will make further disclosures regarding material developments in this regard.

announcements.subject: Persistent Systems Ltd - 533179 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The Press Release titled ''Persistent Among India''s Most Sustainable Companies, Signaling Discipline at Scale'', is as enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Persistent Systems Limited has been recognized among India's Most Sustainable Companies by BW Businessworld Group for 2024-25, securing 3rd position overall and 2nd in the IT and Digital Services sector. This recognition, part of the BW Sustainable World Awards 2026, highlights the company's disciplined scaling and the integration of sustainability into its operations, capital allocation, and client delivery. The assessment evaluated organizations on ESG disclosures, governance, SDG alignment, and demonstrated impact. Persistent Systems emphasizes that sustainability is engineered into its operating model, influencing decisions from risk management to talent practices and client delivery, which is crucial for scaling AI responsibly and building enterprise trust.

announcements.subject: Aartech Solonics Ltd - 542580 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Purchase Order by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Aartech Solonics Limited has received a purchase order valued at ₹1,26,15,144.00 (Rupees One Crore Twenty-Six Lakh Fifteen Thousand One Hundred Forty-Four Only), inclusive of all applicable taxes. This is the first order received by the company for its "BestCase" product line for the financial year 2026-27. The order has been received in the normal course of business and strengthens the company's existing order book, enhancing revenue visibility. The company has provided the required details as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024.

announcements.subject: Panacea Biotec Ltd - 531349 - Demat Status Report For The Month Of March, 2026
announcements.detail:
We would like to inform you that no share has been dematerialised during the month of March 2026. 
A copy of the certificate obtained from the Company''s RTA viz. Skyline Financial Services Pvt. Ltd. regarding shares dematerialised as on 31.03.2026 is enclosed herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: Panacea Biotec Ltd has reported that no shares were dematerialized during the month of March 2026. The company has provided a certificate from its Registrar and Transfer Agent, Skyline Financial Services Pvt. Ltd., confirming the demat status as of March 31, 2026. As of this date, the total number of dematerialized shares stood at 6,11,04,526, comprising 5,35,51,635 shares with NSDL and 75,52,891 shares with CDSL. This information is submitted for the record and compliance with SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: Future Consumer Ltd - 533400 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: This announcement is a quarterly disclosure regarding defaults on payment of interest or principal on loans from banks/financial institutions and unlisted debt securities. Future Consumer Ltd is required to provide these disclosures as per SEBI regulations. The specific details of any defaults, if applicable, would be outlined in the full disclosure document.

announcements.subject: IL&FS Transportation Networks Ltd - 533177 - Intimation Pursuant To Regulation Reg. 32 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 32 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: The company confirms that no securities were issued through public issue, rights issue, or preferential issue during the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Therefore, Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, which pertains to such issuances, is not applicable to IL&FS Transportation Networks Ltd for this period. The company has requested the BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited to take this confirmation on record.

announcements.subject: Reliance Communications Ltd - 532712 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Reliance Communications Ltd is required to provide quarterly disclosures regarding defaults on payments of interest or principal on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities. This disclosure is mandated by SEBI regulations for listed entities. The company must report any such defaults to the relevant stock exchanges. This reporting is a routine compliance requirement for listed entities that have outstanding debt obligations.

announcements.subject: Ashika Credit Capital Ltd - 543766 - Declaration Confirming The Functional Website Of Ashika Credit Capital Limited For The Quarter Ended 31St March, 2026.
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that Ashika Credit Capital Limited has a functional and updated website (www.ashikagroup.com) in accordance with Regulation 46 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and amendments thereof,
announcements.ai_summary: Ashika Credit Capital Ltd has confirmed that its website, www.ashikagroup.com, is functional and updated for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This declaration is in compliance with Regulation 46 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and its amendments. The company has provided this information for the records of the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Dynacons Systems & Solutions Ltd - 532365 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation for securing project from Jammu and Kashmir Bank for ERP solution
announcements.ai_summary: Dynacons Systems & Solutions Ltd has secured a significant project from Jammu & Kashmir Bank for an Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Solution. The project involves designing, implementing, and supporting a centralized, enterprise-wide ERP platform to modernize and integrate the bank's core financial and operational processes. This initiative aims to standardize and automate operations, establish a single source of truth for organizational data, and strengthen decision-making through real-time reporting. The contract is for a duration of 5 years and has a broad consideration of Rs. 25 Crores (Excluding GST). The company is a domestic entity, and the scope of work includes ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements and supporting future growth with a scalable system.

announcements.subject: Redtape Ltd - 543957 - Certificate In Terms Of Regulation 74(5) Of SEBI (Depositories And Participants) Regulations, 2018 For The Fourth Quarter Ended On March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Certificate in terms of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the fourth quarter ended on March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Redtape Limited has submitted a certificate in terms of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company, through its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s KFin Technologies Limited, has confirmed that the details of securities dematerialized and rematerialized during the said period have been duly furnished to the stock exchanges where the company's shares are listed. This certification is a regulatory requirement and ensures compliance with depository regulations. The confirmation letter from KFin Technologies Limited is dated April 06, 2026.

announcements.subject: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd - 543300 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release on achievement of significant production milestones by the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd announced on April 7, 2026, that it has achieved significant production milestones, manufacturing 500 million differential gears and 10 million differential assemblies since its inception. This achievement reinforces its position as a key global driveline solutions provider. The company, a leading global provider of mobility technology solutions, designs and manufactures components for Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV), Passenger Vehicles, Commercial Vehicles, and Off-highway Vehicles. Sona Comstar held an estimated 8.7% global market share in differential gears in CY25, an increase from 4.5% in 2019. Production began in 1999 at its Gurugram plant, followed by its Pune facility in 2005, with accelerated production in recent years.

announcements.subject: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd - 532143 - Updates
announcements.detail: Updates
announcements.ai_summary: SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd has issued an update confirming the absence of bird flu incidents in its poultry farms, particularly in Tamil Nadu, where all its operations are located. The company clarified that it has no operations in Kerala, where avian influenza cases were previously reported. Their farms are recognized by the Government of India as avian influenza-free compartment farms, with continuous and rigorous surveillance for diseases like avian influenza, Newcastle disease, and salmonella. Enhanced biosecurity measures, including securing bird waste areas and restricting external visitors, are in place. The company assures stakeholders that the health of its layer birds remains stable, and egg production continues uninterrupted.

announcements.subject: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd - 538446 - Business Updates On Collection Efficiency
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith the intimation w.r.t. business updates.
announcements.ai_summary: Moneyboxx Finance Ltd has provided business updates on its collection efficiency for the period ending March 2026. The company's collection efficiency for the 'POS resolution %' in the 61-90 bucket showed an upward trend, reaching 62.8% in March 2026, up from 42.9% in October 2025. The number of bounce cases in the 'X Bucket' increased from 40,600 in September 2025 to 66,200 in March 2026. These updates are made pursuant to SEBI regulations and are available on the company's website, www.moneyboxxfinance.com. The update is subject to a quarterly limited review by the statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Lodha Developers Ltd - 543287 - Key Operational Updates For Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Key Operational Updates For Q4FY26 is enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lodha Developers Ltd has announced key operational updates for Q4 FY26, achieving its best-ever quarterly pre-sales of ₹ 58.9 billion, a 23% year-on-year increase. For the full year FY26, pre-sales stood at ₹ 205.3 billion, a 16% year-on-year growth, though March sales were impacted by the Iran war, falling ₹ 4.7 billion below guidance. Collections for Q4 FY26 were ₹ 52.3 billion, an 18% year-on-year increase, with FY26 collections reaching ₹ 151.6 billion, a 5% year-on-year rise. The company added twelve projects across MMR, Pune, Bengaluru, and NCR in FY26 with a Gross Development Value (GDV) of approximately ₹ 600 billion, significantly exceeding its annual guidance. As of April 1, 2026, the company has approximately ₹ 2 trillion in GDV available for sale. Net debt reduced by ₹ 8.0 billion to ₹ 53.7 billion during the quarter, with the Net debt/Equity ratio standing at 0.23x.

announcements.subject: Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd - 543278 - Q4 Update
announcements.detail: Quarterly Update - Q4 Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd has reported a strong Q4 FY2026 performance with consolidated revenue growth of approximately 64% compared to the same period in the previous financial year. For the full year FY2026, consolidated revenue grew by approximately 42% year-on-year. India operations saw revenue growth exceeding 65% in Q4 FY2026, driven by robust same-store-sales-growth (SSSG) of over 45% in key markets, with both wedding and discretionary demand remaining strong. The international operations recorded revenue growth of approximately 45% in Q4 FY2026, with the Middle East contributing approximately 39% growth, despite some impact from geopolitical situations in March. International markets accounted for approximately 11% of consolidated revenue in the quarter. The digital platform, Candere, achieved revenue growth of over 360% in the quarter.

announcements.company: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd
announcements.subject: Swan Defence And Heavy Industries Ltd - 533107 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 7, 2026 titled "SDHI secures India''s First Ammonia Dual-Fuel Bulk Carrier Order".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited (SDHI) has secured a shipbuilding contract with Energy ONE Limited for the construction of four (4) 92,500 DWT dual-fuel ammonia bulk carriers. This marks India's first order for such vessels and represents one of the largest commercial vessels ever to be built at an Indian shipyard. Each vessel will be 229.5m in length with a beam of 37m and will feature an ammonia-fuelled propulsion system. The vessels will be designed by KMS-EMEC, South Korea, and classed by Det Norske Veritas (DNV). The first vessel is scheduled for delivery in October 2029, with subsequent deliveries at four-month intervals.

announcements.company: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Ltd
announcements.subject: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Ltd - 543412 - Announcement Under SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited has informed the exchange about disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited has received approval from the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) on April 6, 2026, for the proposed transmission of 8,28,82,958 equity shares. These shares were held by the late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala. The transmission will be carried out in accordance with the probate granted in the name of the late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and the information is also available on the company's website, www.starhealth.in.

announcements.subject: Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd - 533248 - Operational Data For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended 31St March 2026
announcements.detail: The Operational Data of the Company for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2026 attached
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Pipavav Port Limited has disclosed its operational data for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For the fourth quarter of FY26, the company handled 165,000 TEUs of containers, a slight decrease from 172,000 TEUs in Q4 FY25. Dry Bulk cargo stood at 0.45 million metric tons in Q4 FY26, compared to 0.46 million metric tons in Q4 FY25. Liquid cargo handled was 0.38 million metric tons in Q4 FY26, down from 0.40 million metric tons in Q4 FY25. Ro Ro units handled increased to 67,000 units in Q4 FY26 from 48,000 units in Q4 FY25. The company also reported handling 1,747 container trains in FY26, with 414,000 TEUs carried by these trains. This operational data is available on the company's website, www.pipavav.com.

announcements.subject: Adani Enterprises Ltd - 512599 - Conversion Of Partly Paid-Up Rights Equity Shares Into Fully Paid-Up Equity Shares In Relation To The Rights Issue ('Rights Issue') By Adani Enterprises Limited (The 'Company'), Upon Receipt Of The Call Monies, As Applicable, Through Modes Other Than The ASBA Facility
announcements.detail: Intimation in relation to the Rights Issue
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Limited's Rights Issue Committee, in a meeting held on April 6, 2026, approved the conversion of partly paid-up Rights Equity Shares into fully paid-up equity shares. This conversion is contingent upon the receipt of call monies through modes other than the ASBA facility. Specifically, 20,583 partly paid-up shares of face value ₹1.00, which were 75% paid (₹0.75 face value and ₹1,349.25 premium), will become fully paid. Additionally, 2,33,470 partly paid-up shares of face value ₹1.00, which were 50% paid (₹0.50 face value and ₹899.50 premium), will also become fully paid. This conversion applies to shares where the First Call Money and Second and Final Call Money have been received.

announcements.subject:
Fusion Finance Ltd - 543652 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Trading Approval For 3626 Equity Shares Converted From Partly Paid-Up
Equity Shares To Fully Paid-Up Equity Shares.
announcements.detail: Trading approval for 3626 equity shares.
announcements.ai_summary: Fusion Finance Ltd has received trading approval from both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for 3,626 equity shares. These shares, with a face value of ₹10/- each, were converted from partly paid-up to fully paid-up equity shares on a rights issue basis. The company had previously faced initial rejection from depositories for these shares during the corporate action process, but this has now been successfully completed. These shares will be available for trading on both NSE and BSE under ISIN INE139R01012, effective from Tuesday, April 07, 2026, and will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares of the Company.

announcements.subject: Yash Trading & Finance Ltd - 512345 - Outcome Of The Meeting Of Right Issue Committee Held On 06Th April, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Meeting of Right Issue Committee held on 06th April, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Right Issue Committee of Lexora Global Limited (formerly Yash Trading & Finance Limited) met on April 06, 2026, from 09:00 PM to 09:50 PM. During this meeting, the Committee considered, approved, and took on record the Draft Letter of Offer (DLOF) for the proposed Right Issue of equity shares. The Committee also authorized the filing of this DLOF with BSE Limited. Furthermore, designated officials of the Company have been authorized to make necessary modifications, finalize the document, and undertake all other required actions related to the Right Issue.

announcements.subject: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Ltd - 532801 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('SEBI Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: We wish to inform that Divestment of 100% shareholding in R.P. Web Apps Pvt. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of the company as approved by the Board of Directors at its meeting held on March 30, 2026 has been completed.
announcements.ai_summary: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited has completed the divestment of its entire 100% shareholding in its wholly-owned subsidiary, R.P. Web Apps Private Limited. This divestment, previously approved by the Board of Directors on March 30, 2026, involved the transfer of 60,880 equity shares of face value Rs. 10/- each to AKIT IT Consulting Private Limited. The transaction was completed on April 06, 2026, resulting in R.P. Web Apps Private Limited ceasing to be a subsidiary of Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited.

announcements.subject: Tube Investments of India Ltd - 540762 - Update On Acquisition Of Orange Koi Private Limited
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition of Orange Koi Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Limited ("TII") has acquired 8,94,072 equity shares of Orange Koi Private Limited, each with a face value of Rs.10, representing 76.24% of the paid-up equity share capital. This acquisition, which took place on April 6, 2026, makes Orange Koi a subsidiary of TII under Section 2(87) of the Companies Act, 2013. This update follows TII's previous letter dated February 6, 2026, regarding the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Damodar Industries Ltd-$ - 521220 - General - Updates
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Enclosed herewith is the disclosure under regulation 10(6) of SAST Regulations.
announcements.ai_summary: Arunkumar Biyani, a promoter of Damodar Industries Limited, has made a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the inter-se transfer of equity shares in the nature of a gift. Previously, on January 30, 2026, Mr. Biyani acquired 5,000 equity shares from the market, increasing his shareholding from 23.91% to 23.93%. The current disclosure concerns the gifting of equity shares of Damodar Industries Limited owned by him.

announcements.subject: Hilton Metal Forging Ltd - 532847 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Rights Issue Committee Meeting Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail:
With reference to captioned subject and in furtherance of Rights Issue of the Company, this is to inform that
in terms of the Letter of Offer dated February 28, 2026 and in accordance with the Basis of Allotment finalized in consultation with NSE (Designated Stock Exchange) and the Registrar to the Issue on today,
April 6, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company has, at its meeting held on today, i.e., April 6, 2026,
approved the allotment ....
announcements.ai_summary: Hilton Metal Forging Ltd has approved the allotment of 1,67,70,000 Rights Equity Shares of face value ₹10 each at an issue price of ₹16.68 per share, including a premium of ₹6.68 per share. This decision was made by the Board of Directors at a meeting held on April 6, 2026, in furtherance of the company's Rights Issue, as per the Letter of Offer dated February 28, 2026. The basis of allotment was finalized in consultation with NSE and the Registrar to the Issue on April 6, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from 3,46,96,551 shares (₹34,69,65,510) to 5,14,66,551 shares (₹51,46,65,510).

announcements.subject: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd - 533155 - Q4FY26 And FY26 Business Update
announcements.detail: Please find attached business update for quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Consolidated revenue from operations for Q4FY26 reached Rs. 25,058 million, a 19.1% year-on-year increase, while standalone revenue was Rs. 16,860 million, up 6.2%. For the full fiscal year FY26, consolidated revenue grew by 17.2% to Rs. 95,441 million, and standalone revenue increased by 12.8% to Rs. 68,878 million. Domino’s India reported a Like-for-Like (LFL) growth of 0.2% in Q4FY26, whereas Domino’s Turkey saw a 9.0% LFL growth. The company added a net of 69 stores during the quarter, bringing the total store count to 3,663, with Domino’s India adding 59 new stores to reach 2,455 and Domino’s Turkey adding 4 new stores to reach 787. This information is provisional and subject to a limited review by statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: C.E. Info Systems Ltd - 543425 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of C.E. Info Systems Limited held a meeting on April 06, 2026, from 4:30 PM to 6:30 PM. During this meeting, several key personnel changes and role assignments were approved, effective from April 06, 2026. Mrs. Rashmi Verma will take on the additional role of Chief Human Resources Officer, in addition to her current position as CTO. Mr. Shishir Kumar Verma will oversee the role of Chief Operating Officer (COO) at Gtropy Systems Private Limited and will also manage Human Resources functions as CHRO for Gtropy Systems Private Limited and Mappls DT Private Limited, both subsidiaries of the company. Furthermore, Mr. Rishin Kalra will transition to the role of Chief Technical Officer (CTO) at Gtropy Systems Private Limited. These changes are intended to strengthen leadership at the subsidiary level, enhance operational efficiency, and support the group's growth strategy.

announcements.subject: Brightcom Group Ltd - 532368 - Monthly Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly updates
announcements.ai_summary: Brightcom Group Limited has submitted its monthly update presentation for February and March 2026, detailing operational progress, governance initiatives, and business developments. The company focused on structured execution across operations, partnerships, and governance during this period, rather than expansion. Key highlights include improving revenue quality, strengthening internal processes and control frameworks, and aligning global operations. The presentation emphasizes a strategic shift towards improving yield per unit of supply and deepening partner integration, with a focus on increasing direct publisher integrations and demand efficiency. Growth continues in video, CTV, and in-app ecosystems, with heightened performance expectations.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Business Performance Of Q4FY26
announcements.detail: Business Performance of Q4FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Limited has released its business performance update for Q4FY26, ahead of its official financial results. The bank opened approximately 7 lakh new bank accounts in Q4FY26, bringing its total customer base to around 1.75 crore. Deposits reached an all-time high of over ₹2,950 crore in March 2026, and quarterly renewal income was ₹62.2 crore. Loan referral disbursements through partner institutions reached approximately ₹600 crore, showing 96% growth over Q3FY26. Transaction business declined by approximately 30% compared to Q3FY26, with a recovery noted in March 2026. Digital payment services also saw a moderation of approximately 25% versus Q3FY26, with stabilization initiatives underway and recovery expected in upcoming quarters.

announcements.subject: TechNVision Ventures Ltd - 501421 - Emagia Unveils Gia Order Management Super Agent On Its Autonomous Finance Platform To Accelerate Order-To-Cash For Global Enterprises
announcements.detail: Please find the attached information for dissemination at the Corporate Announcement section of BSE website.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Emagia, an AI-powered Autonomous Finance platform provider, has announced the launch of its Gia Order Management Super Agent. This new solution is designed to autonomously capture, validate, and process customer purchase orders, aiming to accelerate order-to-cash cycles for global enterprises. Key highlights include 80-95% touchless order processing across omni-channels and multi-languages, up to 10x faster order entry cycles, and 50-70% cost reduction in processing with improved data accuracy. The platform also offers over 120 enterprise integrations. TechNVision Ventures Ltd is disseminating this news for corporate announcement purposes.

announcements.subject: Purple Finance Ltd - 544191 - Intimation Of Allotment Of Subordinated, Unsecured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable, Transferable, INR Denominated,  Non- Convertible Debentures
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed announcement pertaining to allotment of Subordinated, Unsecured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable, Transferable, INR Denominated Non-Convertible Debenture.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Purple Finance Limited, through a Circular Resolution of its Finance Committee dated April 06, 2026, has approved the allotment of 500 Subordinated, Unsecured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable, Transferable, INR Denominated, Non-Convertible Debentures. Each debenture has a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/-, aggregating to a total of Rs. 5,00,00,000/- (Rupees Five Crores Only). These debentures have been allotted on April 06, 2026, on a private placement basis to Mr. Sanjeev Prithviraj Kumar. This allotment follows the company's earlier intimation dated March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Kisan Mouldings Ltd-$ - 530145 - Intimation Of Receipt Of No-Objection Letter For Reclassification From 'Promoter And Promoter Group' Category To 'Public' Category
announcements.detail: In accordance with Regulation 30 read with Regulation 31A(8) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 as amended, we wish to inform you that the company has received a No Objection Certificate letter dated April 06, 2026 along with an Advisory letter from BSE Limited in connection with the proposed reclassification of Mrs. Bindiya Aggarwal from the Promoter Category to Public Category
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kisan Mouldings Ltd has received a No-Objection Letter and an Advisory Letter from BSE Limited on April 06, 2026, regarding the proposed reclassification of Mrs. Bindiya Aggarwal. The reclassification is from the 'Promoter and Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. These letters were issued after BSE Limited's due examination of the company's application and confirmation of compliance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company will proceed with the necessary steps to effect this reclassification and will keep the stock exchange informed of further developments.

announcements.subject: Manali Petrochemicals Ltd - 500268 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Agreement with Media Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Manali Petrochemicals Limited has executed an agreement on April 6, 2026, to further extend its engagement with Fortuna Public Relations Private Limited (FPRPL) for an additional two-year period. This extension, commencing from April 1, 2026, to March 31, 2028, will see FPRPL continue to provide public relations consultancy services. These services include promoting media and investor relations, corporate image building, and other related matters. FPRPL is not a related party to the promoter or group companies, and the company holds no shareholding in FPRPL. No special rights like director appointment or pre-emptive subscription rights have been granted to FPRPL.

announcements.subject: Route Mobile Ltd - 543228 - Shareholders Satisfaction Survey
announcements.detail: Shareholders Satisfaction Survey
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Route Mobile Ltd has initiated a Shareholders' Satisfaction Survey to gather feedback from its shareholders regarding their experience with the company. The survey communication was sent via email on April 6, 2026, to shareholders with registered email IDs. The company encourages participation to help improve investor relations and meet shareholder expectations. Feedback can be submitted through a provided link until April 20, 2026. The survey also covers feedback on services offered by the company and its Registrar and Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies Limited. This initiative is part of Route Mobile Ltd's commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

announcements.subject: Standard Capital Markets Ltd - 511700 - Partial Redemption Of 10% Secured Non- Convertible Debentures (NCD-3 Series I)
announcements.detail: The Company has redeemed its Secured, Unlisted, Unrated, Redeemable Non Convertiable 15000 NCD 3 Series I having face value 100000 aggregating to 1500000000 within 5 working day
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Standard Capital Markets Ltd has approved the partial redemption of its 10% Secured Non-Convertible Debentures (NCD-3 Series I). The company has redeemed 15,000 NCDs, each with a face value of Rs. 100,000, aggregating to Rs. 1,50,00,00,000 (Rupees One Hundred Fifty Crore). This redemption was completed within 5 working days from April 6th, 2026. The company confirms that all outstanding interest will be paid according to the terms of issue. Previously, these debentures aggregating to Rs. 250 Crore were issued on April 30th, 2025, and allotted between May 2nd, 2025, and May 6th, 2025. Following this partial redemption, the entire Rs. 250 Crore of NCD-3 Series I, including accrued interest, stands fully redeemed.

announcements.subject: Indus Infra Trust - 544137 - Unit Holding Pattern
announcements.detail: Indus Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern for Report Q4 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indus Infra Trust has submitted its Unitholding Pattern for the quarter ended March 31st, 2026, in accordance with SEBI regulations. The report indicates that as of March 31st, 2026, "Any Other BODIES CORPORATES" held 25,93,88,705 units, representing 58.56% of the total units. This is a significant increase from the previous reporting period, where this category held 6,64,50,000 units, representing 25.62% of the total units. Other categories like Individuals/HUF, Central/State Govt., Financial Institutions/Banks, and Foreign categories show zero holdings for the current quarter. The unitholding pattern is also available on the Trust's website.

announcements.subject: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd - 543257 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - IRFC opens financial year with Rs. 1,000 crore disbursal to MAHAGENCO
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd (IRFC) has announced the disbursal of a INR 1,000 crore term loan to Maharashtra State Power Generation Company Limited (MAHAGENCO) on April 6, 2026. This marks a strong start to the new financial year for IRFC. The company, a Navratna CPSE under the Ministry of Railways, has expanded its role as a diversified infrastructure financier beyond railway infrastructure to sectors like power generation. This disbursal follows a recent INR 12,842 crore loan agreement with Hindustan Urvarak & Rasayan Limited. The Chairman and Managing Director, Manoj Kumar Dubey, expressed confidence in the partnership and emphasized maintaining financial discipline while deepening engagement across infrastructure sectors.

announcements.subject: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd - 544141 - Receipt Of In Principle Approval For Issue And Allotment Of 16,00,000 Convertible Warrants
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith announcement under Reg 30 of SEBI (LODR),2015 for receipt of in principle approval for issue and allotment of 16,00,000 convertible warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pune E-Stock Broking Limited has received an in-principle approval from BSE Limited for the issuance and allotment of 16,00,000 convertible warrants. These warrants are convertible into one fully paid-up equity share each, with a face value of ₹10 per share. The allotment will be on a preferential basis to promoter and non-promoter categories at an issue price of ₹234 per warrant. The total consideration for this issuance is ₹37,44,00,000. The company has been advised to obtain undertakings from allottees regarding no intra-day trading and to strengthen internal controls before allotment to ensure compliance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations.

announcements.subject: Vipul Ltd - 511726 - Vipul Limited Has Informed The Exchange About The Reason Of Delay In Providing Material Information Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Vipul Limited has informed the Exchange about the reason of delay in providing material information under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vipul Limited has informed the exchange regarding a delay in disclosing material information. The delay was primarily due to the non-availability of requisite details with the management within the prescribed timeline. Furthermore, the process of obtaining necessary confirmations was impacted by extended weekly offs and a company holiday observed for Holi. Vipul Limited remains committed to ensuring timely and accurate disclosures in compliance with regulatory requirements. The company will submit the relevant information to the stock exchanges promptly upon receipt and confirmation by the management.

announcements.subject: PDS Ltd - 538730 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: PDS Limited has informed the stock exchange regarding press release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PDS Limited has secured a strategic sourcing mandate from a leading US value retailer, a contract expected to drive sourcing volumes of approximately ₹450 crore. This engagement will be executed through PDS subsidiary, GSCL, under the leadership of Michael Yee, who is spearheading PDS's efforts to scale its US business. The contract signifies a crucial step in strengthening PDS's presence in key markets through on-ground leadership and execution capabilities. The company highlighted that this partnership reflects the resilience of the PDS platform and the strength of its global ecosystem, with its widespread sourcing network and ability to deliver agile solutions positioning it as a partner of choice for leading global retailers. Continued investments in cost transformation, digital capabilities, and AI-led initiatives have enhanced PDS's sourcing platform and value proposition, as evidenced by this new partnership.

announcements.subject: Valencia Nutrition Ltd - 542910 - Press Release-Strategic Manufacturing Agreement Between Valencia Beverages And Superwaters P Ltd And Virchow Laboratories Ltd
announcements.detail: Valencia Beverages and Superwaters Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Valencia Nutrition Limited has entered into a definitive business agreement with Virchow Laboratories Limited for manufacturing of its juice product profile.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Valencia Nutrition Ltd, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Valencia Beverages and Superwaters Private Limited, has entered into a strategic manufacturing agreement with Virchow Laboratories Limited. This agreement covers the manufacturing of Valencia's juice product portfolio, including 8 SKUs such as Mango, Guava, and Apple variants. A committed monthly production volume has been secured, representing approximately 15% of Valencia Beverages Unit II's installed capacity in Hyderabad. This partnership aims to enhance Valencia's manufacturing capabilities and leverage Virchow Laboratories' expertise to improve production efficiency and meet growing demand. The collaboration is expected to contribute to optimal capacity utilization at Valencia's Hyderabad facility.

announcements.subject: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd - 544457 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Brigade Group and Hyatt Announce Plans for Grand Hyatt Chennai ECR and Hyatt House Bengaluru Devanahalli
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd has announced plans for two new Hyatt-branded hotels. The company, through its subsidiary BCV Developers Private Limited, has signed a management agreement with Hyatt for Hyatt House Bengaluru Devanahalli, which is planned to open in 2027 and will feature 135 serviced apartments. Brigade Hotel Ventures Limited had previously signed a management agreement with Hyatt for Grand Hyatt Chennai ECR, a beachfront hotel with approximately 200 guest rooms, expected to open in 2029. These developments are part of Brigade Group's expansion in the hospitality sector.

announcements.subject: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd - 543384 - Reply To Clarification Sought With Reference To News Appearing In Https://Economictimes.Indiatimes.Com/ Dated April 6, 2026 Quoting "Nykaa In Talks To Buy Majority Stake In Deepika Padukone''s Skincare Brand 82°E"
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the Response letter
announcements.ai_summary: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd has responded to a news item published on economictimes.indiatimes.com on April 6, 2026, regarding potential talks to buy a majority stake in Deepika Padukone's skincare brand 82°E. The company stated that it continuously evaluates strategic opportunities for growth and expansion and remains in discussions with concerned parties, including the one mentioned. FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd also noted that it had filed its "Nykaa – Quarterly Revenue Update - Q4 FY2026" on the same day, which is a regular filing. The company confirmed that there are no pending legal or regulatory proceedings related to this matter and will make appropriate disclosures as required by law.

announcements.subject: Greenlam Industries Ltd - 538979 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR), 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Greenlam Industries Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiaries, Greenlam Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and Greenlam Industries SDN. BHD. (Malaysia), have jointly acquired the entire 33% local shareholding of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific in Indonesia. Previously, the Singapore subsidiary held 67% of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific. Following this acquisition, the Indonesian entity has become a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of Greenlam Industries Limited, with the collective shareholding of the Singapore and Malaysia subsidiaries now at 100%. The turnover of PT. Greenlam Indo Pacific for FY 2024-25 was IDR 13,169,408,093, with a comprehensive income of IDR (7,318,172,587). This transaction aims to rationalize the group's holding structure and minimize compliance requirements. The announcement was made on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd - 532424 - Quarterly Update Q4 FY26
announcements.detail: The attached file is self explanatory.
announcements.ai_summary: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd has provided a quarterly update for Q4 FY26, indicating steady demand conditions in the domestic FMCG sector. The company expects its standalone business to achieve double-digit underlying sales growth and high-single digit underlying volume growth, with volume growth in double-digits excluding soaps. Standalone EBITDA margins are anticipated to remain within the normative range due to cost savings. The Indonesia business is showing stabilization with mid-single digit volume growth and sustained market share. The GAUM (Godrej Africa, USA, and Middle East) business is expected to deliver double-digit sales growth and high-single digit volume growth. Consolidated revenue growth is projected to be close to double-digit, with EBITDA growth broadly in line with revenue. The company is monitoring the impact of rising crude oil prices on input costs.

announcements.subject: Tulive Developers Ltd - 505285 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Update On Voluntary Delisting - Formation Of Independent Director Committee
announcements.detail: In relation to voluntary delisting of equity shares of the Company from BSE Limited, pursuant to regulation 28(1) of SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021 and Detailed Public Announcement published in newspapers on April 06, 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company has constituted a Committee of Independent Directors to provide reasoned recommendations on the delisting offer
announcements.ai_summary: Tulive Developers Ltd has announced the formation of a Committee of Independent Directors to provide recommendations on its voluntary delisting offer from BSE Limited. This action is in accordance with Regulation 28(1) of the SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021. The committee members are Mr. Jacob George Kandathil (Chairman), Mr. Pradeep Bhandari, and Mrs. Bhumika Jignesh Shah. The company will publish the committee's reasoned recommendations and voting pattern details at least two working days before the bidding period commences, in the same newspapers where the Detailed Public Announcement (DPA) was published on April 06, 2026. Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited is the Manager to the Delisting Offer.

announcements.subject: Visa Steel Ltd - 532721 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Conversion of Securities
announcements.detail: Conversion of 16500000 Warrants into Equity Shares of equivalent number.
announcements.ai_summary: Visa Steel Ltd has announced the allotment of 1,65,00,000 equity shares following the conversion of warrants. This allotment is pursuant to a preferential issue approved by the members at an EOGM on November 2, 2025, and subsequent approvals. The company received Rs. 49,50,00,000 on April 4, 2026, representing the balance subscription amount of Rs. 30 per warrant. These newly allotted shares rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares. Consequently, the company's issued and paid-up share capital has increased to Rs. 1,45,78,95,000, comprising 14,57,89,500 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The warrants were initially allotted to VISA Industries Limited, a member of the Promoter Group.

announcements.subject: IRB InvIT Fund - 540526 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Specification related to ISIN for debt securities for the half year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: IRB InvIT Fund has submitted its half-yearly report for the period ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017. The report details the company's outstanding debt securities, including their ISIN numbers, issuance and maturity dates, coupon rates, and payment frequencies. Specifically, for ISIN INE183W07025, the issuance date was November 4, 2025, with a maturity date of November 4, 2030, and a coupon rate of 7.35% paid quarterly, with an outstanding amount of INR 5,750 lakhs. For ISIN INE183W07017, the issuance date was November 4, 2025, maturity November 4, 2035, coupon rate 7.40% quarterly, with INR 3,000 lakhs outstanding. For ISIN INE183W07033, the issuance date was November 4, 2025, maturity November 4, 2040, coupon rate 7.40% quarterly, with INR 2,750 lakhs outstanding.

announcements.subject: Globus Spirits Ltd - 533104 - Press Release - Launch Of TERAI Tequila
announcements.detail: Press Release - Launch of TERAI Tequila
announcements.ai_summary: Globus Spirits Limited has announced the launch of TERAI Tequila, marking its entry into the premium tequila market. This new product is positioned as India's first authentic, CRT-certified tequila to be bottled domestically. TERAI Tequila is crafted in Jalisco, Mexico, at the La Huaracha Distillery using 100% Blue Weber Agave and traditional methods. The spirit is then imported to India and bottled under the strict supervision of the Consejo Regulador del Tequila (CRT). The initial offering is a Blanco expression, highlighting the purity of the agave. This launch signifies Globus Spirits' strategy to cater to evolving Indian consumer preferences for global, authentic, and luxury spirits.

announcements.subject: Banaras Beads Ltd - 526849 - Annual Discloser Pursuant To Regulation 30 (1) And 30 (2) Of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers Regulation 2011 For Year Ended 31.03.2026.
announcements.detail: Annual Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30(1) and 30(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of shares and Takeovers Regulation 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: This announcement is an annual disclosure for the year ended March 31, 2026, made by the promoters and their groups of Banaras Beads Ltd, pursuant to Regulation 30(1) and 30(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure details the shareholding of various promoters, including Ashok Kumar Gupta holding 886,185 shares (13.43%), Rekha Gupta holding 739,830 shares (11.21%), Ashok Kumar Gupta (HUF) holding 544,920 shares (8.26%), Prashant Gupta & Ashok Kumar Gupta jointly holding 472,540 shares (7.16%), Shivani Gupta holding 513,900 shares (7.79%), and Siddharth Gupta holding 701,000 shares (10.63%). Collectively, these promoters hold 3,858,375 shares, representing 58.48% of the total share/voting capital. The disclosure confirms that no single shareholder holds more than 25% of the company's shares or voting capital.

announcements.subject: Permanent Magnets Ltd-$ - 504132 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Permanent Magnets Ltd has submitted its quarterly disclosures regarding defaults on payments. This filing is in accordance with the requirements for listed entities to report any defaults on the payment of interest or repayment of principal amounts on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities. The specific details of any such defaults, if any, would be contained within the full disclosure document.

announcements.company: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd-$
announcements.subject: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd-$ - 522165 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - General Announcements
announcements.detail: We enclose herewith the intimation regarding an upgradation of the Company''s power receiving substation at Garbham, Vizianagram unit from 33kV to 132 kV. This upgradation is expected to result in reduction of electricity tariff cost for the said unit.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indsil Hydro Power and Manganese Ltd has upgraded its power receiving substation at the Garbham, Vizianagaram unit from 33 kV to 132 kV. This significant infrastructure enhancement is expected to lead to a reduction in electricity tariff costs for the unit. The company has informed the BSE Limited about this development on April 6, 2026, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This upgrade is a strategic move to improve operational efficiency and cost management at the Vizianagaram facility.

announcements.subject: PC Jeweller Ltd - 534809 - Business Update For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Business Update
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Ltd has provided a business update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, reporting a standalone revenue growth of approximately 32% year-on-year for the quarter and 49% year-on-year for FY2026. The company has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the National Skill Development Corporation to act as an Industry/Franchise Partner for the Gems & Jewellery Sector, aiming to develop up to 2,00,000 micro-entrepreneurs across India over 5 years under the PC Jeweller Brand. This initiative is expected to expand the company's retail footprint and contribute to employment generation. Additionally, PC Jeweller Ltd has reduced its outstanding bank debt by approximately 23% under a Joint Settlement Agreement and one of its subsidiaries has incorporated PCJ Mining SARL in the Republic of Chad to explore precious metal ore extraction, potentially leading to vertical integration. The company is preparing for the summer wedding season and Akshay Tritiya in Q1FY2027.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Ltd - 544569 - SIAM Report - January To March 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the SIAM Report - January to March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Motors Ltd has submitted the SIAM Report for the period January to March 2026, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This report details the production, domestic sales, and exports of Tata Motors Limited during the specified quarter. The report is self-explanatory and provides a breakdown of vehicle models and their respective sales figures for the current period compared to the same period in the previous year. This information is for the exchanges and members to record.

announcements.subject: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Ltd - 512608 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Meeting Of Board Of Directors Of Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited (The Company) - Revision In The Utilisation Of Funds Raised In Rights Issue Concluded In March 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting for modification in utilisation of funds raised through rights issue due to under subscription.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhandari Hosiery Exports Limited's Board of Directors met on April 6, 2026, to revise the utilization of funds raised from a rights issue concluded in March 2026, due to under-subscription. The rights issue was only 48.44% subscribed. As of March 31, 2026, Rs. 678 Lakhs were utilized for repayment of MSME and pressing creditors, suppliers, and rights issue expenses. The remaining funds, totaling Rs. 2378.41 Lakhs, will be utilized by June 30, 2026, primarily for long-term working capital and rights issue expenses. The company has deferred the object of payment of long-term loans and will limit the use of funds for general corporate purposes.

announcements.subject: Medicamen Biotech Ltd-$ - 531146 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Intimation Regarding Incorrect Event Disply On  NSDL Portal
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding Incorrent Event Display on NSDL Portal
announcements.ai_summary: Medicamen Biotech Ltd has issued a clarification regarding an incorrect event display on the NSDL portal. The company states that an event is being shown on the NSDL portal under its login credentials, but this has not been initiated, authorized, or undertaken by Medicamen Biotech Ltd. The company believes the display is inadvertent and incorrect and has contacted NSDL for verification and rectification. Medicamen Biotech Ltd confirms that there is no material event or information requiring disclosure from their end related to this matter.

announcements.company: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Ltd
announcements.subject: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Ltd - 544142 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Update
announcements.detail: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Limited had signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Synergy Marine Group, Singapore.
announcements.ai_summary: Shipping Corporation of India Land and Assets Limited (SCILAL) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Synergy Marine Group, Singapore, on April 06, 2026. This collaboration is aimed at working together in the areas of maritime training, research, and knowledge exchange. The event occurred at 1530 hours IST on April 06, 2026. This MOU signifies a strategic partnership to enhance capabilities within the maritime sector.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd - 500570 - SIAM Report - January To March 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, we are enclosing herewith the SIAM Report - January to March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited (formerly Tata Motors Limited) has submitted a SIAM Report for the period of January to March 2026, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This report details the production, domestic sales, and exports of the company's passenger vehicles. The report includes figures for various vehicle categories such as Micro, Compact, UVC, UV1, UV2, and UV3, comparing data for January-March 2025 with January-March 2026. The company notes that these figures have not been independently verified and audited, and final figures after audit may vary.

announcements.subject: B.R.Goyal Infrastructure Ltd - 544335 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of LOA from Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation Limited (MPRDC).
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: B.R.Goyal Infrastructure Limited has received a work order from Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation Limited (MPRDC) for the construction of a Hockey and Athletic Stadium with allied Infrastructure works at Nanakheda, Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The accepted contract value for this order is Rs. 23,37,10,448/-. The work is to be executed within 24 months, including the rainy season, from the date of signing the contract agreement. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd - 544176 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half-yearly report of Non-Convertible Debentures for the half year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd has submitted its half-yearly report for Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) for the period ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHSPoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137. The report includes a list of active ISINs as of March 31, 2026. The table details 15 different NCD series, with issuance dates ranging from November 16, 2016, to August 17, 2023, and maturity dates extending up to September 29, 2028. Coupon rates vary from 8.50% to 10.00% for fixed-rate NCDs, with some linked to benchmark rates like Mumbai Inter-Bank Outright Rate and Repo rate. The total amount issued across these series ranges from Rs. 3.00 Crores to Rs. 351.00 Crores, with outstanding amounts also detailed. This submission is a regulatory compliance for the company's debt instruments.

announcements.subject: Arihant Superstructures Ltd - 506194 - Non-Applicability Of Statement For Deviation(S) Or Variation(S) Under Regulation 32 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Non-applicability of Statement of Deviation(s) or Variation(s) under Regulation 32 of SEBI LODR.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arihant Superstructures Ltd has confirmed the non-applicability of the Statement for Deviation(s) or Variation(s) under Regulation 32 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company stated on April 6, 2026, that the proceeds raised from its Initial Public Offer (IPO) and rights issue have been utilized strictly as per the prospectus and Letter of Offer. Therefore, no deviations or variations in the use of these funds have occurred, making the submission of the deviation statement unnecessary. This confirmation has been submitted to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

announcements.subject: Tata Power Company Ltd - 500400 - Intimation In Terms Of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOS3/CIR/P/2018/139 Dated November 6, 2018.
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding transfer of securities.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Power Company Ltd has provided an intimation regarding the transfer of securities in physical mode, in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOS3/CIR/P/2018/139 dated November 6, 2018, and subsequent amendments. The company has transferred 500 equity shares from Aruna M Jain Motilal F Nashar to Arvind Agrawal and 800 equity shares from Shantaben Shah to Sonalben Bhadresh Sheth. The details of the folio numbers and distinctive numbers for these transfers are provided in the announcement. This information is also available on the company's website at www.tatapower.com.

announcements.subject: Info Edge (India) Ltd - 532777 - Company Update On Naukri Jobspeak Report
announcements.detail: Company Update on Naukri Jobspeak Report
announcements.ai_summary: Info Edge (India) Ltd has announced the release of its Naukri Jobspeak Index Report for March 2026. This monthly index, which represents the state of the Indian job market and hiring activities, is based on new job listings and recruiter searches on Naukri.com. The report captures hiring activity across various industries, cities, functional areas, and experience bands. Investors and interested parties can access the report on the company's website at https://www.infoedge.in/InvestorRelations/NaukriJobSpeak.

announcements.subject: Midwest Gold Ltd - 526570 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Regulations) 2015.
announcements.detail: Midwest Energy Devices Private Limited, Step-down subsidiary company has commenced trial production at its Lithium Battery Assembly Line and Certification - Led BESS Platform.
announcements.ai_summary: Midwest Gold Ltd announced that its step-down subsidiary, Midwest Energy Devices Private Limited, has commenced trial production at its Lithium Battery Assembly Line and Certification-Led BESS Platform. This facility, located in Bengaluru, has a semi-automated, process-driven manufacturing platform with an initial annual capacity of 1 GWh, which has a roadmap to scale up to 3 GWh. The production line is designed for traceability, process control, validation rigor, and certification readiness, verifying each battery cell before production and testing finished units. The platform offers flexibility to handle different cell types, pack capacities, and configurations, supporting Midwest's branded BESS products, contract manufacturing, and customized battery pack requirements. The company is currently advancing two flagship BESS platforms under certification-led development, including a 418 kWh Outdoor BESS Unit.

announcements.subject: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 533573 - Dislcosure letter  under  Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for CRA Family Trust
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CRA Family Trust has submitted a certificate from M/s. D. K. Mehta & Co., Chartered Accountants, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This submission is made under Regulation 11(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, in accordance with SEBI Exemption Order no. WTM/GM/CFD/DCR1/35/2020-21 dated September 30, 2020. The certificate confirms that CRA Family Trust has complied with the provisions of clause 6(ix) of the said SEBI Exemption Order. The stock exchanges are requested to take this submission on record.

announcements.company: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd
announcements.subject: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd - 523874 - Execution Of Contract With Central PSU - Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited ,Mumbai Refinery ,Mahul .
announcements.detail: Execution of Contract with Central PSU - Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited , Mumbai Refinery ,Mahul .
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: East India Drums and Barrels Manufacturing Ltd has executed a contract with Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL), Mumbai Refinery, Mahul, for the supply of Metallic drums/barrels. The aggregate contract value is Rs. 1,06,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Six Lakh only). The supplies will be made to BPCL at their Mumbai Refinery. This order reinforces the company's long-standing relationship with BPCL and its position as a trusted supplier, highlighting its manufacturing capabilities and commitment to quality. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and was announced on April 6, 2026.

announcements.subject: Paushak Ltd - 532742 - Dislcosure letter  under  Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: CRA Family Trust has submitted a letter to Exchange on amendment to trust deed under Regulation 11(5) of The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CRA Family Trust has submitted a certificate from M/s. D. K. Mehta & Co., Chartered Accountants, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This submission is made under Regulation 11(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, in accordance with SEBI Exemption Order no. WTM/GM/CFD/DCR2/36/2020-21 dated September 30, 2020. The certificate confirms that CRA Family Trust has complied with the provisions of clause 6(ix) of the said SEBI Exemption Order. The stock exchanges are requested to take this submission on record.

announcements.subject: Neetu Yoshi Ltd - 544434 - Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Neetu Yoshi Ltd announced on April 6, 2026, that it has fully repaid all its outstanding bank borrowings, making the company debt-free as of that date. This repayment was funded through internal accruals. The company expects this development to strengthen its financial statements, improve its debt-equity position, enhance financial flexibility, and reduce future finance costs. Neetu Yoshi Ltd plans to continue focusing on strengthening its financial position, improving operational efficiencies, and pursuing growth opportunities.

announcements.subject: Shri Vasuprada Plantations Ltd - 538092 - Compliances-Half Yearly Report (SEBI Circular No. CIR/IMD/DF-1/67/2017)
announcements.detail: Half Yearly communication for debt instruments
announcements.ai_summary: Shri Vasuprada Plantations Ltd has submitted its half-yearly report for the period ending March 31, 2026, as per SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoDI/P/CIR/2024/54. The company has outstanding debt securities issued on a private placement basis. Specifically, it has issued Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with a maturity date of March 21, 2033, carrying a coupon rate of 9% per annum. The total amount issued for these NCDs is Rs. 23,00,00,000. The company has also submitted these details to the depositories.

announcements.subject: Ethos Ltd - 543532 - Opening Of Ethos Watch Boutiques At Jodhpur
announcements.detail: Opening of Ethos Watch Boutiques at Jodhpur
announcements.ai_summary: The company Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, located at Upper Ground Floor, UG, Shop No.02, K Mall, Plot 13 -18, Pali Road, Sushil Nagar. This expansion marks a significant milestone in strengthening their luxury brand portfolio and further consolidates their presence in a prominent luxury retail market in India. With this new launch, Ethos Limited now operates 94 boutiques across India, aiming to make exclusive brands more accessible to discerning customers and deliver unparalleled luxury experiences. The company has not provided any specific financial figures related to this expansion.

announcements.subject:
Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd - 531910 - Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Go-Live Of Content Integration With Airtel Xstream Platform
announcements.detail: Go-Live of Content Integration with Airtel Xstream Platform
announcements.ai_summary: JOJO Limited, formerly known as Madhuveer Com 18 Network Limited, has announced the successful go-live of its content integration with Airtel Xstream Platform. The company's technical team has completed the development, testing, and deployment of API servers for content metadata and updates in the production environment. This integration ensures JOJO App's availability to Airtel's user base, and Airtel has commenced content consumption through the app. This development signifies an expansion of JOJO Limited's digital distribution presence across Airtel's ecosystem and network.

announcements.subject:
Central Bank of India - 532885 - Statement Of Outstanding Bonds For The Half Year Ended
31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Statement of Outstanding Bonds for the Half year ended 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Central Bank of India has submitted a statement of its outstanding bonds for the half-year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54. The bank has one outstanding bond with ISIN INE483A08049, issued on August 30, 2023, with a maturity date of August 30, 2033. The bond has a coupon rate of 8.80% payable annually, with a call option on August 30, 2028. The total amount issued and outstanding is ₹1500 crore. This statement has been provided to the National Securities Depository Limited and Central Depository Services (India) Limited.

announcements.subject: Indian Overseas Bank - 532388 - Compliance Of Regulations 31(4) And 31(5) Of SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Compliance of Regulations 31 (4) and  31 (5) of SEBI SAST Regulation 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Overseas Bank has submitted a compliance statement for Regulations 31(4) and 31(5) of the SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011, as of March 31, 2026. The promoter, the President of India, held 92.44% of the bank's equity shares on this date. The bank, on behalf of its promoter, declared that neither the promoter nor any persons acting in concert have made any encumbrance, directly or indirectly, on the shares during the financial year 2025-26. This disclosure is for the record and acknowledgment by the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Waaree Energies Ltd - 544277 - Commencement Of Commercial Production
announcements.detail: Commencement of Commercial Production by Sangam Solar One Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary at Samakhiali-Kutch, Gujrat, India.
announcements.ai_summary: Waaree Energies Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Sangam Solar One Private Limited, has commenced commercial production at its facility in Samakhiali-Kutch, Gujarat, India, effective April 06, 2026, at 10:00 am. The subsidiary has established four solar module line manufacturing facilities, each with an annual capacity of 750 MW, totaling 3000 MW per annum. This commencement of operations is a significant development for the company's manufacturing capabilities in the solar energy sector.

announcements.subject: Nimbus Projects Ltd - 511714 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Nimbus Projects Ltd has successfully listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) on April 06, 2026, in addition to its existing listing on the BSE since 2000. This dual listing is expected to enhance stock liquidity, improve price discovery, and provide broader access to institutional and retail investors. The stock opened at INR 199 on the NSE on its listing day. The company, a real estate developer, has approximately 3 million square feet under development, focusing on residential and mixed-use assets. With over three decades of experience, Nimbus Projects has a market capitalization in the range of ₹350-365 crore, with shares trading close to book value.

announcements.subject: Bharti Airtel Ltd - 532454 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: We are enclosing herewith a press release dated April 06, 2026 titled ''Airtel expands its 5G network footprint across UP East with over 4300+ new sites'' being issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has announced the expansion of its 5G network footprint across UP East, deploying over 4300 new sites in the last 12 months. This expansion covers 48 districts and aims to strengthen network presence for approximately 34 million people across urban, growth towns, and rural areas. The company is averaging the deployment of 12 new sites daily to enhance high-speed connectivity for work, education, entertainment, and digital payments. Customers in cities like Lucknow, Kanpur, Varanasi, and Ayodhya will benefit from this enhanced coverage, supporting the digital needs of citizens, students, micro-entrepreneurs, enterprises, and government institutions. This initiative underscores Airtel's commitment to strengthening digital connectivity and making sustained investments in advanced network infrastructure in UP East.

announcements.subject: Max Estates Ltd - 544008 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached the Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Max Estates Limited announced its pre-sales performance for the financial year 2026, achieving total pre-sales of approximately INR 5,305 crore, marking the second consecutive year of surpassing INR 5,000 crore. The fourth quarter of FY2026 contributed significantly with approximately INR 3,392 crore in bookings. Key project performances include Estate 105 (Noida) which booked approximately INR 1,783 crore within 10 days of its March 20 launch, and Estate 361 (Gurugram) which achieved pre-sales of approximately INR 1,704 crore since its December 2025 launch. The company has a total Gross Development Value (GDV) pipeline of over INR 16,000 crore for FY27 onwards.

announcements.subject: Terai Tea Company Ltd - 530533 - Corrigendum To Disclosure Of Continuing Event / Information Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: In continuation of our intimation dated 04.04.2026, pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) , Regulations 2015, we are submitting herewith enclosed attachments.
announcements.ai_summary: Terai Tea Company Ltd has submitted a corrigendum regarding the transfer of its 47.73% shareholding in its associate company, Terai Dooars Tea Co. Pvt Ltd, to Mr. Uday Narayan Sharma. This transfer, which occurred on March 30, 2026, resulted in Terai Dooars Tea Co. Pvt Ltd ceasing to be an associate of Terai Tea Company Limited. The company acknowledges that this event was not intimated to the stock exchange within the prescribed timeline. The associate company contributed INR 417.95 Lakhs in turnover and INR 198.97 Lakhs in net worth during the last financial year, representing 4.06% and 1.93% of the listed entity's respective figures. The company has provided the required details as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Vardhman Polytex Ltd - 514175 - Board Meeting Outcome for Allotment Of Secured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures On Private Placement Basis
announcements.detail: Outcome of board meeting held on 06.04.2026 regarding allotment of 7500 secured, rated, listed, redeemable Non-convertible Debentures on private placement basis aggregating to Rs. 75 crore is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited's board of directors, in a meeting held on April 6, 2026, has approved the allotment of 7,500 Secured, Rated, Listed, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). These NCDs have a face value of Rs. 1,00,000/- each, aggregating to a total of Rs. 75 Crores. The allotment is being made on a private placement basis to Special Situation India Fund at a coupon rate of 18% per annum. The NCDs are intended to be listed on BSE Limited. This action follows previous communications regarding the issuance of these debentures.

announcements.subject: Bank of Baroda - 532134 - Bank Of Baroda Outstanding Bonds As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Outstanding Bonds as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of Baroda has submitted a statement of its outstanding bonds as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with Chapter VIII, Clause 10.1 (a) of the SEBI Operational Circular dated August 10, 2021. The statement details nine outstanding bond issuances with varying maturity dates, coupon rates, and payment frequencies. Notably, the bank has perpetual bonds with coupon rates ranging from 7.95% p.a. to 8.00% p.a., and other bonds with maturity dates extending up to September 11, 2034. The total outstanding amount across these bonds as of March 31, 2026, is ₹204,23,00,00,000.

announcements.subject: LTIMindtree Ltd - 540005 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Ltd (now LTM Limited) has issued a press release announcing that it will offer MIT Open Learning's Universal AI program to its workforce in cooperation with upGrad Enterprise. This initiative aims to institutionalize foundational AI reasoning across LTM's talent pool, empowering employees in both tech and non-tech functions. The Universal AI program, developed by MIT Open Learning faculty, covers 16 foundational modules and vertical-specific modules, requiring no coding and suitable for all skill levels.
