The Gas business recorded RLNG sales of approximately 5.60 MMT, excluding internal consumption. A comprehensive disclosure of financial results will be made upon Board approval.

announcements.subject: NMDC Ltd - 526371 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Details of Production and Sales of Iron Ore (Provisional) for and upto March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: NMDC Ltd has released its monthly business update for production and sales of Iron Ore (Provisional) for the period up to March 2026, covering the financial year 2025-26. In March 2026, total production was 5.35 million tonnes (MT) and sales were 5.90 MT. Cumulatively, up to March 2026, total production reached 53.15 MT and sales were 50.23 MT. For the Chhattisgarh sector, production in March 2026 was 4.01 MT with sales of 4.25 MT, and cumulative figures up to March 2026 were 37.52 MT production and 34.67 MT sales. The Karnataka sector reported 1.34 MT production and 1.65 MT sales in March 2026, with cumulative figures of 15.63 MT production and 15.56 MT sales up to March 2026. This information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: V-Mart Retail Ltd - 534976 - Business Update At The End Of Quarter 4 Of Financial Year 2025-26 (Q4FY26)
announcements.detail: Business Update for Q4FY26
announcements.ai_summary: V-Mart Retail Ltd has provided a business update for the fourth quarter of the financial year 2025-26 (Q4FY26), ending March 31, 2026. The company reported total revenue from operations of Rs. 971 Crores, a 24% year-on-year increase from Rs. 780 Crores in the corresponding quarter of the previous year. Same store sales growth (SSSG) stood at +12% for the quarter, with V-Mart at +12% and Unlimited at +9%. During Q4FY26, V-Mart opened 29 new stores and closed 6, bringing the total operating portfolio to 577 stores as of March 31, 2026. This year saw the highest ever store additions with 92 new stores opened and 12 closures. The new stores were primarily opened in Uttar Pradesh (11), Tamil Nadu (4), Bihar (3), and West Bengal (3). These revenue figures are provisional and subject to auditor review.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd - 505283 - Personnel(S) Authorised For The Purpose Of Determining Material Event And Making Relevant Disclosure(S) To Stock Exchange W.E.F April 1, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd has updated its disclosure regarding personnel authorized to determine material events and make disclosures to the stock exchange. Effective April 1, 2026, Mr. Aman Kirloskar (Managing Director), Mr. Ramesh Birajdar (Vice President and Chief Financial Officer), and Mr. Jitendra R. Shah (Company Secretary & Head Legal) are authorized. This update follows previous letters dated April 1, 2026, and January 1, 2024. The company has provided their contact numbers and email addresses for these regulatory purposes. This is a routine update to ensure compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd - 540691 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Aditya Birla Capital Limited has informed the Exchange that Regional Director (North Western Region), Ahmedabad vide its order dated 31 March 2026 has sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Aditya Birla Capital Limited (ABCL) has announced that the Regional Director (North-Western Region), Ahmedabad, sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Aditya Birla Stressed Asset AMC Private Limited (Amalgamating Company) with Aditya Birla Financial Shared Services Limited (Amalgamated Company). This sanction was granted via an order dated March 31, 2026. This follows the Board of Directors' approval of the scheme on November 14, 2025, and is subject to other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The company has submitted this intimation to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd - 507526 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd held a Board Meeting on April 1, 2026, which commenced at 3:30 PM and concluded at 4:45 PM. The primary agenda of the meeting was to discuss the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) for the Financial Year 2026-2027, along with other related matters of the company. The outcome of this meeting has been communicated to both BSE Ltd and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.

announcements.subject: Karnataka Bank Ltd - 532652 - Provisional Key Business Parameters As On 31.03.2026
announcements.detail: Provisional Key Business Parameters as on 31.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Karnataka Bank Ltd has released its provisional key business parameters as of March 31, 2026. Deposits increased by 3.8% year-on-year to Rs. 108,840.95 crore from Rs. 104,807.49 crore as of March 31, 2025, and grew by 4.5% quarter-on-quarter to Rs. 104,111.52 crore as of December 31, 2025. CASA also saw a year-on-year increase of 10.0% to Rs. 36,621.16 crore and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 11.5% to Rs. 32,828.70 crore. The share of CASA to Total Deposits rose to 33.65% from 31.75% in the previous year. Gross Advances grew by 6.9% year-on-year to Rs. 83,336.92 crore. These figures are provisional and subject to audit.

announcements.subject: IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 524164 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IOL Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced that the Registrar of Companies has approved the striking off of its wholly owned subsidiary, IOL Life Sciences Limited, from the Register of Companies. This follows an application filed on January 27, 2026. The Registrar of Companies issued a notice on April 1, 2026, approving the strike-off. The company states that this action will not have any material impact on its financials or operations. As of March 31, 2025, IOL Life Sciences Limited contributed Nil to the company's revenue and had a Net Worth of Rs. 638,838, representing 0% of the total.

announcements.subject: Piramal Pharma Ltd - 543635 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Completion Of Acquisition Of Kenalog®, A Branded Commercial Injectable Product
announcements.detail: Please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Pharma Limited, through its step-down wholly owned subsidiary Piramal Critical Care B.V., has completed the acquisition of Kenalog® and its associated brands from Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMS). This acquisition was previously announced on January 28, 2026. The completion of this transaction will enhance Piramal Pharma's Complex Hospital Generics portfolio and bolster its market presence in the United States, Europe, and Asia Pacific.

announcements.subject: Moil Ltd - 533286 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Submission of receipt of order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, Chhindwara Division, Jabalpur Zone, Madhya Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: BPL Limited has received an order from the Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT), Delhi, on March 19, 2026, concerning DRT ANR.OA NO. 24/2024, passed on January 19, 2026. The DRT has allowed ARCIL to invoke a corporate guarantee of ₹10 crore provided by BPL Limited in 2003 for a loan availed by its subsidiary, BPL Display Devices Limited (BDDL). BDDL has been in liquidation since October 2008. BPL Limited had considered this guarantee as time-barred and had shown it under contingent liabilities as claims not acknowledged as debt in its balance sheets. The company is examining the DRT order and will take appropriate legal steps.

announcements.subject: BPL Ltd - 500074 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: intimation under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: RBL Bank Limited has responded to a clarification sought by the exchange regarding a media report dated March 30, 2026, concerning alleged diversion of ₹137 crore through mule accounts in Telangana. The bank confirmed its awareness of FIR Nos. 68/2026 to 78/2026 registered at PS Karimnagar-III Town under relevant sections of the BNS and IT Act. The matter is sub judice and under police investigation, pending before the Hon’ble Junior Civil Judge-cum-Judicial First Class Magistrate at Karimnagar. The investigation pertains to the alleged misuse of current accounts at the Kisan Nagar branch, Karimnagar, with two employees taken into custody and granted bail. RBL Bank denies any knowledge of or authorization for wrongful acts or misuse of funds, stating that such assertions are matters under investigation. The bank asserts that these events do not warrant disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and it ensures compliance with applicable regulations.

announcements.subject: RBL Bank Ltd - 540065 - Clarification Sought From RBL Bank Ltd
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited informs the exchange about response on clarification sought with reference to media report appearing on https://www.siasat.com/dated March 30, 2026 titled "137 cr diverted through mule accounts of RBL Bank in Telangana.
announcements.ai_summary: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd has announced its sales figures for March 2026, reporting a total of 13,982.830 metric tons (MT) in units sold. This update is provided in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015. The company aims to keep stakeholders informed about its monthly business performance. This information is disseminated for public record and awareness.

announcements.subject: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd - 513554 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Sales Figures for the Month of March - 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd has announced its sales figures for the month of March 2026. The company reported sales of 13982.830 metric tons (MT) for the said period. This update is provided as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015. The company is a manufacturer of various steel products including joist, channel, angel, flat, round, crossing sleeper bar, bloom, and billet.

announcements.subject: GE Vernova T&D India Ltd - 522275 - Intimation Of Change In E-Mail Address For Shareholder'S Communication/Grievance Redressal And Other Associated Matters
announcements.detail: Intimation of Change in E-mail address for Shareholder''s Communication/Grievance redressal and other associated matters
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: GE Vernova T&D India Limited (formerly known as GE T&D India Limited) has informed the stock exchanges about a change in its email address for shareholder communication and grievance redressal. The existing email ID, secretarial.compliance@ge.com, has been replaced with a new email ID, secretarial.compliance@gevernova.com. This change is effective immediately. The company requests that this update be recorded and communicated to all relevant constituents. This intimation is provided to BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.

announcements.subject: National Highways Infra Trust - 543385 - Unitholding pattern post capital restructuring
announcements.detail: National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Unitholding pattern post capital restructuring
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: National Highways Infra Trust (NHIT) has submitted its Unitholding Pattern following a capital restructuring involving the issuance of units through Institutional Placement and on a Preferential basis. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and a SEBI Master Circular dated July 11, 2025. The unitholding pattern reflects changes after the allotment of units on March 25, 2026. The Sponsor(s) / Investment Manager / Project Manager(s) and their associates/related parties hold 22,44,54,500 units, representing 10.50% of the total outstanding units. Public holding includes various institutions such as Mutual Funds (2,86,95,251 units, 1.34%), Financial Institutions/Banks (1,75,04,751 units, 0.82%), Insurance Companies (8,64,12,365 units, 4.04%), Provident/pension funds (17,01,17,367 units, 7.95%), Foreign Portfolio Investors (15,41,20,671 units, 7.21%), and Foreign Bodies Corporate (1,00,52,75,300 units, 47.01%). The disclosure is made within the stipulated 10 days of the restructuring.

announcements.subject: Force Motors Ltd-$ - 500033 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly business update
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Force Motors Limited has released its monthly business update for March 2026. In the domestic market, sales of Small Commercial Vehicles (SCV), Light Commercial Vehicles (LCV), Utility Vehicles (UV), and Sports Utility Vehicles (SUV) increased by 14.42% to 4,126 units compared to 3,606 units in March 2025. However, export sales for the same categories saw a decrease of 22.34%, with 73 units sold in March 2026 compared to 94 units in March 2025. The company attributes the decline in export volumes to ongoing geopolitical tensions, particularly in the Middle East. Overall, domestic and export sales combined for these vehicle categories rose by 13.49% to 4,199 units in March 2026 from 3,700 units in March 2025. This information is provided as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: PMC Fincorp Ltd - 534060 - As Per Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations') Read With SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 Dated January 30, 2026
announcements.detail: Disclousre as per Regulation 30 SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/1/3762/2026 Dated January 30, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PMC Fincorp Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 1, 2026, and approved several key decisions. Firstly, Mr. Puneet Arora's designation has been changed from Executive Director to Non-Executive Director, effective April 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. He will continue to be a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and will not be involved in daily operations. Secondly, M/s A. K. Choudhary & Associates has been appointed as the Scrutinizer for the upcoming Postal Ballot and e-voting process. Thirdly, the Board approved the draft notice for the Postal Ballot to seek shareholder approval. Lastly, National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) has been appointed to provide remote e-voting facilities for the Postal Ballot process. The Board meeting commenced at 3:00 PM IST and concluded at 3:40 PM IST.

announcements.subject: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd - 540168 - Intimation As Under Reg 92 Of SEBI (ICDR)Announcements Under Reg 30 SEBI (ICDR), 2018
announcements.detail: In relation to Rights Issue, we enclose copies of Advertisement issued and published by the company on 01.04.2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd has published advertisements on April 1, 2026, in the Financial Express (English, All India Edition), Jansatta (Hindi, All India Edition), and Navahakti (Marathi, Mumbai Edition) regarding its ongoing Rights Issue of equity shares. These advertisements, issued in compliance with Regulation 92 of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018, provide details concerning subscription, basis of allotment, and other relevant information for the Rights Issue. This announcement is for dissemination on the stock exchange website and serves as an update for investors on the progress of the Rights Issue.

announcements.subject: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd - 544307 - Intimation Of Grant Of 5,00,000 Stock Options Under Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019
announcements.detail: Intimation of grant of 5,00,000 stock options under Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019
announcements.ai_summary: Vishal Mega Mart Limited has informed on April 01, 2026, that its Nomination and Remuneration Committee has approved the grant of 5,00,000 stock options to eligible employees under the Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019. Each stock option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share with a face value of Rs. 10. The exercise price for these stock options is set at Rs. 105/- per option. The company has provided the requisite details as per SEBI regulations, and this intimation will be hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd - 544141 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Revised Shareholding Pattern Of The Company
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015-Revised Shareholding Pattern of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Pune E - Stock Broking Ltd has issued a revised shareholding pattern disclosure for April 01, 2026, correcting an inadvertent misstatement made in a previous notice dated February 19, 2026. The revised pattern accounts for a preferential issue of convertible warrants. Before the preferential issue, promoters and the promoter group held 80,49,859 shares, representing 51.11% of the total voting capital, and the public held 77,00,999 shares, representing 48.89%. Post the assumed full conversion of outstanding warrants and the current issue, the promoters' holding is expected to be 96,69,859 shares (50.23%), and the public's holding will be 95,80,999 shares (49.77%), bringing the total to 1,92,50,858 shares. The company has also submitted the detailed shareholding pattern as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Varroc Engineering Ltd - 541578 - Submission Of Statement/ Confirmation W.R.T. Utilization Of Issue Proceeds Under Regulation 32 & 52(7) Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations')
announcements.detail: Nil Deviation report
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Varroc Engineering Limited has submitted a statement confirming no deviation in the utilization of funds raised through Commercial Papers during the financial year 2025-26. The company raised Rs. 50 Cr in Q1 FY 2025-26 (allotted May 21, 2025, redeemed August 19, 2025), Rs. 50 Cr in Q2 FY 2025-26 (allotted August 22, 2025, redeemed November 20, 2025), Rs. 50 Cr in Q4 FY 2025-26 (allotted January 1, 2026, redeemed January 27, 2026), and another Rs. 50 Cr in Q4 FY 2025-26 (allotted January 28, 2026, redeemed February 27, 2026). The total utilization of these proceeds aligns with the objects stated in the company's offer documents. No other fund-raising activities occurred during FY 2025-26.

announcements.subject: Race Eco Chain Ltd - 537785 - Board Meeting Outcome for Intimation For The Forfeiture Of The Convertible Warrants
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting informing Forfeiture of the Convertible Warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Race Eco Chain Ltd has announced the forfeiture of 19,55,000 convertible warrants due to non-exercise of conversion options by the holders. These warrants were initially allotted on October 01, 2024, at an issue price of Rs. 352.00 per warrant, with an initial subscription amount of Rs. 17,20,40,000 received, representing 25% of the issue price. The warrant holders failed to exercise their conversion option within the stipulated 18-month period, which ended on March 31, 2026. Consequently, the subscription amount received against these warrants has been forfeited as per Regulation 169(3) of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.

announcements.subject: SK Minerals & Additives Ltd - 544584 - Quarterly Update On Estimated Turnover Of SK Minerals & Additives Limited For The Quarter Ended 31St March, 2026.
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 regarding  estimated standalone quarterly Turnover for the Quarter ended 31st March, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SK Minerals & Additives Limited has announced its estimated standalone quarterly turnover for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a turnover of Rs. 12708.35 Lakhs for the quarter. This represents a significant year-over-year growth of 50.28% compared to the same quarter in the previous year. The turnover for the quarter ended December 2025 was Rs. 8112.68 Lakhs, and for the half-year ended April-September 2025, it was Rs. 10989.14 Lakhs. The total turnover for the fiscal year April-March 2026 reached Rs. 31810.17 Lakhs, up from Rs. 21167.24 Lakhs in the previous fiscal year.

announcements.subject: Avanti Feeds Ltd-$ - 512573 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On April 01, 2026
announcements.detail: As enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Avanti Feeds Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 01, 2026, approved the investment in Thai Union Feedmill Ecuador S.A.S. (TFME), a company to be incorporated in Ecuador, South America. TFME will be engaged in aquaculture feed manufacturing and distribution. The investment will be in the form of cash, amounting to USD 3 Million, with shares subscribed at a par value of USD One per share. TFME is an associate company and a joint venture partner of Avanti Feeds Limited, with its holding company being Thai Union Feed Mill Public Company Limited, Thailand. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are currently required for the incorporation of TFME.

announcements.subject: Orient Electric Ltd - 541301 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please refer the enclosed attachment.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Orient Electric Ltd announced on April 1, 2026, the launch of Aero O2, India's first oxygen-enriching ceiling fan. This innovative product utilizes patented Bio-Oxy Plasma ION+ Technology to enhance indoor air quality by enriching oxygen levels, reducing fatigue, and revitalizing homes. The fan is designed to break down pollutants such as PM2.5, smoke, and microbes, creating a cleaner and more energizing environment. This product launch, while not triggering materiality thresholds, is disclosed as a measure of good corporate governance. The company aims to address the growing concerns of urban consumers regarding indoor air quality and declining oxygen levels in air-conditioned spaces.

announcements.subject: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd - 532500 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Maruti Suzuki sales in March 2026 and FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Maruti Suzuki India Limited announced its sales figures for March 2026 and the financial year 2025-26 on April 1, 2026. In March 2026, the company sold a total of 225,251 units, comprising 169,428 domestic sales, 8,783 sales to other OEMs, and 47,040 exports. For FY 2025-26, Maruti Suzuki achieved a record total sales of 2,422,713 units, with domestic sales reaching an all-time high of 1,861,704 units and exports also hitting a record of 447,774 units. This marks the third consecutive year the company has surpassed annual total sales of 2 million units. The company's performance highlights strong demand across its mini, compact, and utility vehicle segments.

announcements.subject: Gayatri Highways Ltd - 541546 - Quarterly Disclosures By Listed Entities Of Defaults On Payment Of Interest/ Repayment Of Principal Amount On Loans From Banks / Financial Institutions And Unlisted Debt Securities
announcements.detail: Quarterly Disclosures by listed entities of defaults on payment of interest/ repayment of principal amount on loans from banks / financial institutions and unlisted debt securities
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Gayatri Highways Ltd has disclosed defaults on payment of interest and principal on loans from banks, financial institutions, and unlisted debt securities for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company is required to provide these quarterly disclosures as per regulatory requirements. Further details regarding the specific loans and the extent of the defaults are expected to be provided in the company's filings. Investors should monitor future announcements for updates on the company's financial health and any remedial actions being taken.

announcements.subject: Citizen Infoline Ltd - 538786 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: CERTIFIED COPY OF ORDER OF NCLT ALONG WITH CERTIFIED COPY OF SCHEME AND PETITION
announcements.ai_summary: Citizen Infoline Limited has received a certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Ahmedabad's order dated March 19, 2026, approving a Scheme of Amalgamation. The order, with case number CP (CAA) No. 47 (AHM) of 2025 in CA (CAA) No. 34 of 2025, sanctions the amalgamation of Citizen Solar Private Limited into Citizen Infoline Limited. The appointed date for the amalgamation is April 1, 2023, and the effective date will be the date of filing the certified copy of the order with the Registrar of Companies (RoC). The scheme involves the transfer of all assets, liabilities, rights, and obligations of Citizen Solar Private Limited to Citizen Infoline Limited, with employees transferring without a break in service. Citizen Solar Private Limited will stand dissolved without winding up. Citizen Infoline Limited will file the certified copy with the RoC within the prescribed timeline and undertake necessary corporate actions, including applying for listing and trading approval.

announcements.subject: Rain Industries Ltd - 500339 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Rain Industries Limited - Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rain Industries Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Rain Carbon Canada Inc., in collaboration with Green Graphite Technologies Inc., has successfully completed a project to advance the production of coated spherical purified graphite. This critical material is used in lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles, micromobility, and energy storage systems. The project received CA$682,000 in support from the Government of Ontario through the Ontario Vehicle Innovation Network (OVIN), out of a total project value of CA$2.05 million. This initiative aims to address the domestic supply gap for battery materials, as over 90% of battery-grade graphite is currently sourced from China. The collaboration leverages Green Graphite Technologies' purification technology and Rain Carbon Canada's expertise in carbon precursors and processing. This press release was issued on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd - 532734 - Bussiness Update FY26
announcements.detail: Please fin dattached herewith intimation regarding Business update-FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Ltd has announced a business update for FY26, reporting its highest-ever production in iron ore mining and value-added steel products. For FY2025-26, iron ore mining production was 27.49 lakh metric tons, and iron ore pellets production was 28.56 lakh metric tons. Sponge iron (DRI) production was 24.49 lakh metric tons, steel billets at 4.77 lakh metric tons, and wire rods at 2.31 lakh metric tons. The company also generated 86.58 crore units of power in FY26.

announcements.subject: Ashok Leyland Ltd - 500477 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Sales Volume for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Ashok Leyland Ltd has released its sales figures for the month of March 2026. In the domestic market, total vehicle sales reached 23,743 units, a 5% increase compared to 22,510 units in March 2025. Cumulative domestic sales for the financial year up to March 2026 stood at 2,02,355 units, a 13% increase from 1,79,842 units in the previous year. Including exports, total vehicle sales for March 2026 were 25,381 units, a 5% rise from 24,060 units in March 2025. Cumulative domestic and export sales for the financial year reached 2,20,437 units, up 13% from 1,95,097 units.

announcements.subject: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd - 544176 - Certificate from CEO/CFO
announcements.detail: CEO/CFO Certificate for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 regarding utilisation of proceeds from Commercial Paper
announcements.ai_summary: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd has provided a certificate from its CEO/CFO for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This certificate confirms that the proceeds from Commercial Papers issued and listed during the quarter have been utilized for the purposes disclosed in the Key Information Document. The company also affirms adherence to other listing conditions related to the Commercial Papers as specified by SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS- PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Neuland Laboratories Ltd - 524558 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Neuland Laboratories Ltd has announced a leadership change with Saharsh Davuluri taking over as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director, effective immediately. This transition marks the company's next phase of Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) growth, with a sharper focus on expanding commercial New Chemical Entity (NCE) opportunities. The company has experienced significant growth, tripling its contract services revenues over the last 3 years, and has secured a growing number of commercial manufacturing contracts with global innovator companies. Saharsh Davuluri, who has been with the company for over 18 years, will lead the expansion of commercial peptide capacity and double process development capabilities. Sucheth Davuluri will assume the role of Executive Vice Chairman.

announcements.subject: CSL Finance Ltd - 530067 - Quarterly Update For The Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
announcements.detail: Please find the attached herewith Quarterly update for the Quarter ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CSL Finance Limited has provided a quarterly and yearly update for the period ended March 31, 2026. The company's Assets Under Management (AUM) reached approximately INR 1450 Crores (including DA of INR 50 Crores) as of March 2026, marking a year-on-year growth of 21.13% from INR 1197 Crores (including DA of INR 39 Crores) in March 2025. During the year, INR 135 Crores were disbursed in SME and INR 1115 Crores in WSL, with collections of INR 93 Crores in SME and INR 905 Crores in WSL. The company raised INR 523.53 Crores in debt during FY 2025-26 and secured fresh sanctions of Rs 82 Crores from 4 lenders in the current quarter. CSL Finance added 6 new lenders during the year, bringing the total to 35 lenders by March 2026. The company maintains a liquidity surplus of approximately INR 108 Crores and a Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) of approximately 44%. The portfolio mix remained stagnant at 69:31 (WSL: SME) as of March 2026. The company operates 44 branches with a team of 469 employees. This update is provisional and subject to a limited review by statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Syrma SGS Technology Ltd - 543573 - Rumour verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Please see attached the response
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Syrma SGS Technology Limited has clarified news regarding an investment of Rs. 1,600 Crore for PCB and component units in Andhra Pradesh. This development was previously communicated to the exchanges on September 10, 2025, with a subsequent update on December 01, 2025. The company had entered into a Joint Venture Agreement with Shinhyup Electronics Co. Limited, South Korea, on July 15, 2025, for manufacturing multi-layer Printed Circuit Boards (PCB) and Copper Clad Laminate (CCL). The Government of Andhra Pradesh approved the allotment of 26.70 acres of land at Menakuru Village, Naidupeta, for a manufacturing and R&D facility, along with incentive packages under the Andhra Pradesh Electronics Components Manufacturing Policy 2025-30, subject to Government of India approval.

announcements.subject: Tata Motors Ltd - 544569 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, please find enclosed herewith the press release titled "Tata Motors Limited total sales in Q4FY26."
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Motors Limited reported strong sales performance in Q4 FY26, with total sales of 1,32,465 units in domestic and international markets, a 25% year-on-year increase from 1,05,643 units in Q4 FY25. For March 2026, sales stood at 47,976 units, up 17% from 41,122 units in March 2025. The company's Commercial Vehicles (CV) segment saw robust growth, with domestic sales of 1,25,562 units in Q4 FY26, a 26% YoY increase. For the full fiscal year FY26, total sales grew by 14% to 4,28,329 units from 3,76,903 units in FY25. Electric Vehicle (EV) volumes also experienced a significant 59% YoY growth in FY26.

announcements.subject: Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd - 503101 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find attached press release on announcement that Marathon Nextgen Realty''s Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Nexzone IT Infrastructure Private Limited, has acquired a 51% controlling interest in three real estate entities with Projects worth a GDV of over Rs. 840 Crore.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Nexzone IT Infrastructures Private Limited, has acquired a 51% controlling interest in three real estate entities. These acquisitions collectively unlock a Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹840 Crores and a Carpet Area of 5.94 lakh Sq.ft. across 6 residential projects in Kanjurmarg, Mumbai. The total aggregate consideration for these acquisitions amounts to approximately ₹70 Crores. This strategic move will strengthen Marathon Nextgen Realty's presence in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region and enhance its project pipeline. The company received intimation of these acquisitions on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Welspun Living Ltd - 514162 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 For Partial Commencement Of Commercial Production In The Pillow Manufacturing Unit At Nevada, USA.
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith intimation regarding partial commencement of commercial production in the pillow manufacturing unit at Nevada, USA.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Welspun Living Limited has announced the partial commencement of commercial production at its pillow manufacturing unit in Nevada, USA. This unit was approved by the Board of Directors on July 30, 2025, with a capital expenditure of US $13 million. The commencement of production, effective March 31, 2026, is a step towards expanding the product category in the Home Textiles segment business in the USA through its subsidiary, Welspun USA Inc.

announcements.subject: APL Apollo Tubes Ltd - 533758 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release titled "Q4FY26 Sales Volume (All-time high)"
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: APL Apollo Tubes Limited announced an all-time high sales volume for Q4 FY26, registering 924,881 Ton. This represents a 9% year-on-year increase compared to 850,447 Ton in Q4 FY25. For the full fiscal year FY26, the company reported a sales volume of 3,491,243 Ton, an 11% increase year-on-year from 3,157,978 Ton in FY25. Key product categories contributing to this growth include Apollo Structural (Heavy and Light), General, Apollo Z Rust-proof, Coated, and Apollo Galv Agri/Industrial. APL Apollo Tubes Limited is India's leading structural steel tube manufacturer with 11 manufacturing facilities and a capacity of 4.5 Mn Ton.

announcements.subject: Emerald Finance Ltd - 538882 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Submission of Press release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Emerald Finance Limited has achieved two significant business milestones in Q4 FY26. The company partnered with 30 corporates for its Early Wage Access (EWA) program, allowing employees to access a portion of their earned salary. Additionally, Emerald Finance, along with its subsidiary Eclat Net Advisors Private Limited, disbursed over ₹375 Cr in gold loans during Q4 FY26. These disbursements were facilitated in association with ICICI Bank Limited, HDFC Bank Limited, RBL Bank Limited, and Muthoot Finance Limited. The EWA expansion demonstrates growing demand for employee-centric financial solutions, while the gold loan syndication highlights the company's origination capabilities and strong relationships with financial institutions. These achievements are part of Emerald Finance's strategy to build a scalable and diversified financial services platform.

announcements.subject: CLN Energy Ltd - 544347 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Regarding Closure Of Factory.
announcements.detail: The Company has informed about closure of its Pune Factory.
announcements.ai_summary: CLN Energy Ltd has closed its factory located in Pune, effective March 31, 2026. This closure is part of a strategic initiative to consolidate manufacturing activities at the Noida plant, aiming to optimize operational efficiency and resource utilization. The Noida unit possesses sufficient capacity for current and future production needs. The turnover of the Pune unit was Rs. 21,93,02,858, representing 10.01% of the company's turnover. The net worth of the Pune unit is less than 1% of the company's total consolidated net worth. No binding agreement for the sale of the Pune unit has been entered into.

announcements.subject: Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Provisional Production And Off-Take Performance Of CIL And Subsidiary Companies For The Month Of Mar'26 And For The Period Apr'25-Mar'26.
announcements.detail: Update
announcements.ai_summary: Coal India Ltd has released its provisional production and off-take performance for the month of March 2026 and the period April 2025 to March 2026, including data for its subsidiary companies. The report, generated on April 1, 2026, provides a comparative analysis against the same period last year. For the period April 2025 - March 2026, Coal India Limited's total coal production was 768.1 million tonnes, a decrease of 1.7% compared to 781.1 million tonnes in the previous year. Total off-take for the same period was 744.8 million tonnes, a decrease of 2.4% from 763.0 million tonnes in the prior year. Subsidiary performance varies, with NCL showing a 7.9% production growth and SECL showing a 5.3% off-take growth for the period.

announcements.subject: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd - 544532 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of letter of Award of Contract for Block-IX (200 MW) under "BALANCE OF SYSYTEM PACKAGE FOR DEVELOPMENT OF 1000MW (2X300MW + 2X200MW) GRID CONNECTED SOLAR PV PROJECT AT BIKANER RAJASTHAN.
announcements.ai_summary: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd has received a letter of award for Block-IX (200 MW) under the "BALANCE OF SYSTEM PACKAGE FOR DEVELOPMENT OF 1000MW (2X300MW + 2X200MW) GRID CONNECTED SOLAR PV PROJECT AT BIKANER, RAJASTHAN." The award was received on March 31, 2026, at 5:32 p.m. (IST) from NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, a subsidiary of NTPC Green Energy Limited. This award pertains to Bidding Document No. NRE-CS-5800-004(BOS1)-9. The company is pleased to inform the stock exchanges about this significant development.

announcements.subject: Panasonic Carbon India Company Ltd-$ - 508941 - Compliance-57 (5) : intimation after the end of quarter
announcements.detail: Reg 57(5) for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Panasonic Carbon India Co. Limited (PCIN) has informed BSE that Regulation 57 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to the company. PCIN is a single-product manufacturing company listed on BSE with only equity shares and has not issued any Non-Convertible Securities. Therefore, the company does not fall under the purview of Regulation 57, which pertains to the submission of financial results for listed entities that have issued debt securities. The company requests this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Banganga Paper Industries Ltd - 512025 - Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Directors (IDC)
announcements.detail: Navigant Corporate Advisors Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Directors (IDC) on the Open Offer to the Shareholders of Banganga Paper Industries Ltd ("Target Company") under regulation 26 (7) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and subsequent amendments thereto ("SEBI (SAST) Regulations").
announcements.ai_summary: Navigant Corporate Advisors Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted the Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Directors (IDC) regarding the open offer for Asgard Alcobev Limited (formerly Banganga Paper Industries Limited). The open offer is to acquire up to 9,17,41,759 equity shares of face value Re. 1/- each at a price of Rs. 1.45/- per share. This represents 26.00% of the expanded equity and voting share capital by Acquirers Ronak Jain, Sarita Jain, Privanka Jain, and K K Impex & Trading Private Limited, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs). The advertisement of the IDC's recommendations was published on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Marksans Pharma Ltd - 524404 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules USP, 100 mg & 200 mg (Rx)
announcements.ai_summary: Marksans Pharma Ltd has announced the final approval from the USFDA for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Benzonatate Capsules USP, 100 mg & 200 mg (Rx). This product is bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to Pfizer Inc.'s Tessalon Capsules. Benzonatate is a non-narcotic antitussive used to relieve persistent cough associated with lung infections. Marksans Pharma's manufacturing facilities in India, USA, and UK are approved by major regulatory agencies, and the company markets its products globally across various therapeutic segments.

announcements.subject: ITC Ltd - 500875 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Sproutlife Foods Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Sproutlife Foods Private Limited has become a subsidiary of ITC Ltd effective April 1, 2026. This acquisition aligns with ITC Ltd's strategy to enhance its future-ready portfolio in the foods segment. The company has gained the right to nominate a majority of directors on Sproutlife Foods Private Limited's board. No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for this acquisition, and there is no cash consideration or share swap involved. The specific cost of acquisition and the percentage of shareholding or control acquired were not applicable as per the disclosure.

announcements.subject: Baazar Style Retail Ltd - 544243 -  Intimation Of Closure Of Retail Store Of The Company
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that the Company has closed the operation of one store of Style Baazar at Brahmapur, Odisha today.
announcements.ai_summary: Baazar Style Retail Ltd announced on April 1, 2026, the closure of one of its retail stores. The Style Baazar store located in Brahmapur, Odisha, has ceased operations as of today. Following this closure, the company's total number of operational stores now stands at 262. This information is disclosed pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Aeroflex Industries Ltd - 543972 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Capacity expansion Update- Increase in capacity of liquid cooling SFN Skid assemblies.
announcements.ai_summary: Aeroflex Industries Ltd announced on April 1, 2026, an increase in the production capacity for its liquid cooling SFN skid assemblies. The capacity has been expanded from 2,000 pieces per year to 6,000 pieces per year, effective immediately. The company also plans to further enhance this capacity to 15,000 pieces per year, with an anticipated completion by June/July 2026. During the fourth quarter of FY 2025–26, the company sold 571 pieces of SFN skid assemblies, which have been successfully installed across multiple data centers. This expansion is in line with the company's ongoing growth plans.

announcements.subject: MIC Electronics Ltd - 532850 - Receipt Of Letter Of Acce
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation regarding the letter of acceptance received from Sambalpur Division, East Coast Railway Division of Indian Railways.
announcements.ai_summary: MIC Electronics Limited announced on April 1, 2026, that it has received a Letter of Acceptance from the Sambalpur Division, East Coast Railway Zone of Indian Railways. The order is for the provision of CIB and TIB equipment at various railway stations within the Sambalpur Division. The total value of this order is Rs. 2,12,68,360.23. The terms and conditions of the order will be finalized at the time of agreement execution. The order is to be executed within 6 months from its award date, which was March 31, 2026, at 2:30 PM. This is a domestic order awarded through a tender process, and the company's promoters or promoter group do not have any interest in the awarding entity.

announcements.subject: Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd - 512455 - Intimation For Operational Update For FY26
announcements.detail: Intimation for Operational Update for FY26
announcements.ai_summary: The company announced its provisional operational performance for FY26 on April 1, 2026, reporting its highest ever production. Iron ore output reached 21.96 million tonnes, a 120% year-on-year increase, with plans to produce 26 MT in FY27. Direct Reduced Iron (DRI) production was 484,000 tonnes, a 57% increase from FY25, driven by the commissioning of a new 360 KTPA DRI facility in Q2 FY26. The 4 MTPA pellet plant achieved 100% annualized capacity utilization, producing 3.03 million tonnes in FY26, with March 2026 marking its best-ever run rate of 0.42 million tonnes. The company's mined ore excludes 9.2 million tonnes of BHQ, which will be processed once beneficiation plants are commissioned.

announcements.subject: JK Tyre & Industries Ltd - 530007 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI(Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: JK Tyre & Industries Ltd has received a Demand Order dated March 30, 2026, from the Assistant Commissioner, Delhi South Commissionerate, under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017. The order pertains to the financial year 2019-20 and alleges wrongful availment of Input Tax Credit (ITC), confirming a demand for tax of Rs. 69,36,972/- along with an equivalent penalty of Rs. 69,36,972/- and applicable interest. The primary reasons cited are discrepancies in Input Service Distributor (ISD) credit and mismatches in ITC claimed across financial years. JK Tyre & Industries Ltd believes it has a strong case and intends to file an appeal before the appropriate appellate authority, stating there is no expected financial implication from this order.

announcements.subject: Petronet LNG Ltd - 532522 - Commissioning Of Additional LNG Regasification Facilities At Dahej I.E. Expansion Of Dahej LNG Terminal From 17.5 MMTPA To 22.5 MMTPA
announcements.detail: Corporate disclosure w.r.t. commissioning of additional LNG regasification facilities at Dahej is enclosed herewith
announcements.ai_summary: Petronet LNG Limited has announced the commissioning of additional LNG regasification facilities at its Dahej terminal. This expansion increases the terminal's capacity from 17.5 Million Metric Tonnes Per Annum (MMTPA) to 22.5 MMTPA. The commissioning of these facilities took place on March 31, 2026, at 23:30 hrs. This development is in line with the company's business expansion strategy and is disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd - 532209 - FUND RAISING BY ISSUANCE OF DEBT SECURITIES BY LARGE ENTITIES
announcements.detail: Fund raising by issuance of Debt Securities by Large Entities
announcements.ai_summary: Jammu and Kashmir Bank Limited has informed the stock exchanges that it is a Scheduled Commercial Bank as per the Second Schedule of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934. Consequently, the provisions of Chapter -XII of the Operational Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, regarding fund raising by issuance of Debt Securities by Large Entities, are not applicable to the Bank. This clarification is provided for information purposes.

announcements.subject: Hyundai Motor India Ltd - 544274 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Hyundai Motor India Limited (HMIL) has announced its sales performance for Q4 FY2025-26 and March 2026. In Q4 FY2025-26 (January-March 2026), HMIL achieved its highest-ever quarterly domestic sales of 1,66,578 units, representing an 8.5% year-on-year (YoY) growth. Total Q4 sales stood at 2,08,275 units, with a 8.7% YoY growth, including exports of 41,697 units (9.4% YoY growth). For March 2026, HMIL recorded its highest-ever domestic sales for the month, with 55,064 units (6.3% YoY growth). Total monthly sales for March 2026 were 69,004 units, comprising 13,940 units in exports. The company expressed confidence in sustaining this momentum for FY 2026-27 with upcoming product launches.

announcements.subject: Sattrix Information Security Ltd - 544189 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Business Update
announcements.ai_summary: Sattrix Information Security Limited has received a Letter of Intent (LoI) from the State Bank of India (SBI) to act as a Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP). This contract is for the supply of MSSP services for a Cyber Security Defense Center (CSDC). The order is from a domestic entity and has a total value of Rs. 9,30,00,000/- (Rupees Nine Crore Thirty Lakhs only), excluding applicable taxes. The execution period for this contract is three years. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd - 534597 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail:
Please find enclosed herewith a copy of press release from the Company for your information and records.

This information will also be hosted on Company''s website at www.rattanindia.com.
announcements.ai_summary: Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd has issued a press release announcing that its electric motorcycle company, Revolt Motors, experienced a significant sales surge in March 2026, with volumes growing approximately 3X month-on-month. This growth is attributed to increasing consumer adoption of electric motorcycles, driven by fuel price volatility and the lower running costs of EVs, which are up to 90% less than petrol bikes. Revolt Motors is observing a fundamental shift in consumer behavior towards electric mobility, not just a temporary spike. The demand is strong across India, including Tier 2 and Tier 3 markets, with states like Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, and Gujarat leading adoption. Improvements in product reliability and an expanding service network are also contributing to customer trust. This information is also hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject:
NTPC Ltd - 532555 - Declaration Of COD Of Ayana Renewable Power Four Private
Limited, A Group Company Of NTPC Green Energy Limited
announcements.detail: Disclosure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NTPC Ltd. announced the declaration of the Commercial Operation Date (COD) for a portion of its group company's renewable energy projects. Specifically, the fourth part capacity of 37.5 MW Solar power from a 150 MW Solar Project in Gujarat achieved COD effective April 2nd, 2026. Additionally, the seventh part capacity of 13.2 MW Wind power from a 100 MW Hybrid Project (comprising 92.4 MW Wind and 37.5 MW Solar) in Gujarat also achieved COD effective April 2nd, 2026. Following these declarations, NTPC group's total installed capacity has reached 89,145 MW, with a commercial capacity of 88,065 MW.

announcements.subject: Paradeep Phosphates Ltd - 543530 - Disclosure Of Information Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has successfully commissioned its 300 TPD Sulphuric Acid Plant at its Mangalore unit, effective March 31, 2026. The total expenditure incurred for this project is approximately Rs. 240 Crores, financed through internal accruals and term loans. This commissioning will enhance the company's captive sulphuric acid production, reducing import dependence and improving operational efficiency. The new capacity addition will increase the overall sulphuric acid capacity to 400 TPD. The project is expected to generate around 1,05,000 tonnes of high-pressure steam annually from waste heat, reducing CO2 emissions by 19,000 tonnes.

announcements.subject:
Ganesha Ecosphere Ltd - 514167 - Ministry Of Environment, Forest And Climate Change
Notification Dated 31St March, 2026
announcements.detail: As per the file attached.
announcements.ai_summary: The Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change has issued the Plastic Waste Management (Amendment) Rules, 2026, through a notification dated March 31, 2026 (G.S.R. 237(E)). These rules amend the draft rules issued on June 3, 2025, and elaborate on mandatory consumption targets for recycled plastic in plastic packaging. Ganesha Ecosphere Limited has submitted a copy of this Gazette Notification to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Dee Development Engineers Ltd - 544198 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: DEE Development Engineers Limited has informed the Exchange about the Outcome of the Order of Hon''ble PSERC revising the tariff for supply of electricity by its Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company M/s Malwa Power Private Limited from Rs. 3.50 per kWh to Rs. 5.227 per kWh with an annual escalation of 5% on variable tariff
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dee Development Engineers Limited has received a final order from the Punjab State Electricity Regulatory Commission (PSERC) regarding the tariff determination for its wholly-owned subsidiary, M/s Malwa Power Private Limited (MPPL). The PSERC has determined the tariff for MPPL's 6 MW biomass-based power plant for an extended period of 10 years, following the expiry of its initial 20-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with Punjab State Power Corporation Limited (PSPCL). The new tariff is set at ₹5.224 per kWh for FY 2025-26, comprising a fixed tariff of ₹0.97/kWh and a variable tariff of ₹4.254/kWh with a 5% annual escalation. This revised tariff represents an enhancement of approximately ₹1.724 per kWh compared to the interim tariff of ₹3.50 per kWh previously received. Based on this revised tariff, the company estimates an additional revenue recovery of approximately ₹5.80 Crores to date. The order was dated March 27, 2026, and received by the company on June 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: RMC Switchgears Ltd - 540358 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RMC Switchgears Limited has announced its successful migration from the SME Platform of BSE to the Main Board of BSE Limited and its listing on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). This transition is effective from April 1, 2026. The company views this as a significant milestone, reflecting its growth, progress, and commitment to enhanced governance, transparency, and investor engagement. Listing on the Main Board of BSE and NSE is expected to increase the company's visibility in the capital markets, attract wider participation from retail and institutional investors, and foster stronger engagement with the investment community. The company has expressed gratitude to its shareholders for their trust and support.

announcements.subject: Hawkins Cookers Ltd-$ - 508486 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in RTA
announcements.detail: We have re-appointed MUFG Intime India Private Limited as the Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agent for the period April 1, 2026, to March 31, 2029, for handling share transfers and related work including dematerialisation of shares
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hawkins Cookers Limited has re-appointed MUFG Intime India Private Limited as its Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agent. This appointment is for a period of three years, commencing from April 1, 2026, and concluding on March 31, 2029. The firm will be responsible for handling all share transfer activities and related administrative tasks, including the dematerialisation of shares. This re-appointment ensures continuity in the management of shareholder records and facilitates efficient processing of corporate actions. The company has provided its Corporate Identity Number as L28997MH1959PLC011304.

announcements.subject: IZMO Ltd-$ - 532341 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: izmomicro Builds ongoing Defence Electronics Supply Business in Advanced Semiconductor Packaging-Press Release enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: izmo Limited's subsidiary, izmomicro, has announced the ongoing supply of advanced semiconductor packaging solutions to India’s defence electronics sector. This expansion focuses on high-reliability, mission-critical applications, including high-frequency RF module packaging and radar receiver module assembly and packaging. These engagements are part of izmomicro's active supply chain participation within India's defence electronics industry. The company is supplying advanced packaging for RF integrated circuits and front-end module assemblies operating at microwave and millimeter-wave frequencies, as well as assembly, packaging, and supply of radar receiver module subsystems. The press release was issued on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd - 533155 - Renewal Of Master Franchise Agreement With Domino'S Pizza International Franchising Inc.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed the intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Jubilant FoodWorks Limited has renewed its Master Franchise Agreement (MFA) with Domino’s Pizza International Franchising Inc. (DPIF) for India, effective April 1, 2026. The agreement grants exclusive rights to develop and operate Domino’s Pizza stores in India for a term of 15 years, with an option for a further 10-year renewal. Additionally, the company has renewed its exclusive franchise rights for Sri Lanka and Bangladesh and will execute new master franchise agreements for these regions, similar in form to the Indian agreement. The renewal was formalized on March 31, 2026, and the event occurred at 00:03 hours IST on April 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: VST Tillers Tractors Ltd-$ - 531266 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Monthly Business Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Steel Strips Wheels Limited (SSWL) announced its monthly business update for March 2026, reporting a record-breaking performance. The company achieved its highest ever monthly sales, surpassing ₹500 Cr for the first time, with a gross turnover of ₹603.92 Cr and a net turnover of ₹520.75 Cr. SSWL also recorded its highest ever sales in the Commercial Vehicle (Truck) segment, showing a 74% year-on-year increase by volume. The Tractor segment experienced robust growth, with monthly sales up 31% year-on-year by volume. Overall, the company reported a 20.07% year-on-year growth in turnover by value and a 14.13% year-on-year growth in turnover by volume. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026.

announcements.subject: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd - 543985 - Intimation Of Investor Release - Revenue Guidance For Financial Year 2026-27 (FY27)
announcements.detail: Revenue Guidance for FInancial year 2026-27 (FY27)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has provided its revenue guidance for the financial year 2026-27 (FY27). The company projects standalone FY27 growth to range between 25% and 30%, with consolidated FY27 growth expected to be around 40%. Zaggle's focus for the year includes optimizing working capital cycles, driving revenue growth through new customer acquisition and cross-selling, and expanding its margin profile via operating leverage and AI-driven efficiency. As of December 31, 2025, Zaggle had issued over 50 million prepaid cards in partnership with banking partners and served more than 3.7 million users.

announcements.subject: SML Mahindra Ltd - 505192 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Sales Fig for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SML Mahindra Limited has reported its sales figures for the month of March 2026 and the cumulative period of April-March 2025-26. For March 2026, the company sold 606 Cargo Vehicles, a 2% increase compared to 594 in March 2025, and 1,851 Passenger Vehicles, an 8% increase from 1,721 in March 2025. For the full financial year 2025-26, total sales reached 16,632 vehicles, a 17% increase from 14,221 vehicles in the previous year. Cargo vehicle sales for the year increased by 28% to 5,412 units, while passenger vehicle sales grew by 12% to 11,220 units. These figures reflect a positive trend in the company's sales performance.

announcements.subject: Adani Green Energy Ltd - 541450 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has announced a significant achievement by adding over 5 GW (5,051 Megawatts) of renewable energy capacity in the financial year 2025–26, marking the highest greenfield annual capacity expansion globally by any company, excluding China. This brings AGEL's total operational portfolio to 19.3 gigawatts (GW). The new capacity comprises 3,409 MW of solar, 686 MW of wind, and 956 MW of wind-solar hybrid power. This expansion is expected to offset approximately 10 million tonnes of carbon emissions annually, contributing to AGEL's total operational portfolio's annual carbon offset of 36 million tonnes. A substantial portion of this new capacity was commissioned at AGEL's Khavda, Gujarat project, where 9,413 MW has already been installed out of a planned 30 GW by 2029.

announcements.subject: IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd - 532947 - Update In Relation To TOT-18 Project
announcements.detail: Update provided by IRB Infrastructure Trust in relation to TOT-18 Project
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: IRB Infrastructure Trust, an associate of IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd, has commenced toll collection on the Chandikhole Bhadrak Section of NH-16 (TOT-18 Project) effective April 1, 2026. This follows the payment of an upfront Concession Fee of Rs. 3,087 Crores to NHAI by the Project SPV, IRB Chandibhadra Tollway Private Limited, on March 30, 2026, after achieving financial closure. The Appointed Date for the project has been set as April 1, 2026. This marks the SPV's securing of tolling rights for a period of 20 years. This development is a strategic entry for the IRB Group into Odisha.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Intimation Under Regulation 29(1) Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 In Relation To Buyback Of USD Denominated Bonds
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that a meeting of the Securities Issuance and Investment Committee  of the Company is scheduled to be held on April 7, 2026, inter alia to consider and approve buyback of the USD denominated bonds, subject to applicable laws.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sammaan Capital Limited will hold a meeting of its Securities Issuance and Investment Committee on April 7, 2026. The primary agenda item for this meeting is to consider and approve the buyback of the company's USD denominated bonds. This potential buyback is subject to applicable laws, regulatory approvals, and the terms outlined in the respective issue documents. The company made this intimation on April 1, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Ltd - 541195 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: In terms of Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 ,please find below press release titled "MIDHANI achieves highest ever sales amid supply chain disruptions.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Ltd (MIDHANI) has announced a record-breaking performance for the financial year 2025-2026, achieving its highest-ever sales of ₹1,206 Crores (provisional and unaudited). This represents a 12% year-on-year growth from the previous year's sales of ₹1,074 Crores, including export orders worth ₹85 Crores. Despite supply chain disruptions, strategic planning mitigated production impacts. Key growth drivers included supplies for indigenous aero-engine programs, the Indian Navy, and Indian space sectors. Notable achievements include CEMILAC and NADCAP certifications, a ~40% YoY increase in Titanium production, and the supply of Titanium alloy windows for Shri Ram Mandir, Ayodhya. MIDHANI also obtained technology transfer for manufacturing ABHED bullet proof jackets.

announcements.subject: Adani Enterprises Ltd - 512599 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding disinvestment of an associate company by Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Adani Agri Fresh Limited (AAFL), has divested its entire 50% stake in Vishakha Industries Private Limited (VIPL) on March 31, 2026. Consequently, VIPL is no longer an associate of AAFL. VIPL had a Revenue from Operations of Rs.71.29 Lakhs and a Net Worth of Rs. 544.20 Lakhs as of March 31, 2025. AAFL received a consideration of Rs. 13.27 Crores for the sale of its 1,46,685 shares in VIPL. The buyer, Adani Properties Private Limited (APPL), belongs to the promoter and promoter group of AEL. This divestment was completed on March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd - 543916 - Execution Of Semi Knocked Down (SKD) Manufacturing Agreement With Sonomed Escalon, USA
announcements.detail: The Company has entered into Strategic Semi Knocked Down (SKD) Manufacturing Agreement with Sonomed Escalon, USA
announcements.ai_summary: Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd has entered into a strategic Semi Knocked Down (SKD) Manufacturing Agreement with Sonomed Escalon, USA, a global leader in ophthalmic diagnostic imaging. The purpose of this agreement is to undertake SKD manufacturing and further localize the production of ophthalmic ultrasound diagnostic devices in India for 100% manufacturing. Sonomed Escalon will supply components in SKD form at a preferential "Transfer Price," exclusive of taxes, duties, customs, statutory levies, and shipping unless otherwise agreed. The promoter was previously an authorized distributor for Sonomed Escalon.

announcements.subject: Brainbees Solutions Ltd - 544226 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 - Intimation of acquisition of further stake in Candes Technology Private Limited by Globalbees Brands Private Limited, material subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Brainbees Solutions Limited has announced that its material subsidiary, Globalbees Brands Private Limited, has acquired a further stake in Candes Technology Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of the company. This acquisition was made pursuant to a Securities Subscription and Purchase Agreement dated March 31, 2022. Candes Technology Private Limited is engaged in the business of electronics, electrical instruments, and audio-visual goods under the brand name "Candes". The latest financial parameters for Candes Technology Private Limited for FY 2024-25 show a turnover of INR 38.23 Crore, a PAT of INR -18.65 Crore, and a Net worth of INR -20.66 Crore.

announcements.subject: Tube Investments of India Ltd - 540762 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of equity shares by M/s. TI Clean Mobility Private Limited, subsidiary company in M/s. TIVOLT Electric Vehicles Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Ltd announced that its subsidiary, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited (TICMPL), has acquired the entire remaining stake of 5.45% in TIVOLT Electric Vehicles Private Limited for a consideration of Rs. 30 Cr. This acquisition, effective March 31, 2026, makes TIVOLT Electric Vehicles Private Limited a wholly owned subsidiary of TICMPL. TIVOLT is engaged in the manufacture and sale of electric small commercial vehicles. The acquisition aims to consolidate TICMPL's holding and enhance operational control over TIVOLT.

announcements.subject: Kings Infra Ventures Ltd - 530215 - Intimation Of Allotment Of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures On Private Placement Basis
announcements.detail: Intimation of allotment of Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis
announcements.ai_summary: Kings Infra Ventures Limited's Debenture Committee, in a meeting held on March 31, 2026, allotted the fifteenth tranche of Unlisted Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. A total of 3,000 Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures, each with a face value of Rs. 1,000, were issued, aggregating to Rs. 30,00,000/-. These NCDs are secured and redeemable, and the allotment was made through private placement.

announcements.subject: Centrum Capital Ltd - 501150 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Please note that the Company has withdrawn its capital interest and retired as a partner from Centrum Alternatives LLP (''''CAL LLP), pursuant to which CAL LLP has ceased to be a  subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Centrum Capital Limited has retired as a partner from Centrum Alternatives LLP (CAL LLP) by executing definitive documents on March 31, 2026. Following this retirement, CAL LLP has ceased to be a subsidiary of Centrum Capital Limited, with Surplus Fincare Private Limited being inducted as a new partner. For the financial year 2024-25, CAL LLP had a net worth of Rs. 141.30 Lakhs, contributing 2.09% to Centrum Capital Limited's consolidated net worth of Rs. 6,767.64 Lakhs. The company received Rs. 7.50 Lakhs as consideration for its retirement from CAL LLP.

announcements.company: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd
announcements.subject: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd - 544026 - IREDA - Business Performance For The Year Ended March 31, 2026  (Provisional)
announcements.detail: IREDA-Business Performance for the year ended March 31, 2026 (Provisional)
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited (IREDA) has reported its provisional business performance for the year ended March 31, 2026. Loan Sanctioned increased by 9% to ₹51,883 Crore compared to ₹47,453 Crore in the previous year. Loan Disbursements saw a significant rise of 16%, reaching ₹34,946 Crore from ₹30,169 Crore. The Loan Book Outstanding at the end of the fiscal year grew by 22% to ₹93,075 Crore from ₹76,282 Crore. These figures are subject to audit.

announcements.subject: BLS E-Services Ltd - 544107 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: BLS E-Services Limited has provided an Update on Acquisition of Equity Shares of Atyati Technologies Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: The acquisition of 100% equity shares of Atyati Technologies Private Limited (ATPL) by BLS E-Services Limited, initially expected to be completed by March 31, 2026, has been extended. The company has entered into an amendment of the binding offer, extending its validity period. BLS E-Services Limited is currently completing necessary steps, including executing Share Purchase Agreements/Framework Agreements and obtaining approvals from lenders, banks, and other regulatory/statutory authorities. The acquisition is now anticipated to be completed on or before April 30, 2026, subject to the fulfillment of all conditions precedents and necessary approvals.

announcements.subject: Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd - 543373 - Board Meeting Outcome for General Purpose
announcements.detail:
Dear Sir,
We would like to inform you that the Board Meeting of the company was held today, March 10, 2025, which commenced at 5.30 PM and concluded at 6.35 PM, The following items were discussed in the meeting:-
1. Transacted general business as may be deemed necessary with the permission of the Chair.
The Exchange is further requested to record the same on your records and inform the stakeholders accordingly.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd met on March 10, 2025, from 5:30 PM to 6:35 PM. During this meeting, the board transacted general business as deemed necessary. No specific details regarding the nature of this general business were provided in the announcement. The company has informed the stock exchange to record this outcome and inform stakeholders.

announcements.subject: Goodricke Group Ltd - 500166 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 - Update
announcements.detail: Update on non-binding MoU, executed for due diligence and subsequent sale of Barnesbeg Tea Estate.
announcements.ai_summary: Goodricke Group Ltd has announced the cancellation of a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Mr. Akshay Shankar Das for the proposed sale of Barnesbeg Tea Estate. This cancellation follows the inability of the parties to align on certain matters during the due diligence process, which was scheduled to be completed by March 31, 2026. Consequently, no definitive agreement has been executed, and the transaction will not proceed. The company has stated that this cancellation does not have any material financial impact on Goodricke Group Ltd. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: EID Parry India Ltd - 500125 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR), 2015
announcements.detail: Agreement entered into with the Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: EID Parry (India) Limited has announced the closure of operations of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Parry Sugars Refinery India Private Limited (PSRIPL), effective from the close of working hours on March 31, 2026. The decision was approved by the Boards of Directors of both companies. The refinery, established in 2006 as an export-oriented unit, faced challenges including non-availability of natural gas, increased operating costs due to coal boilers, a sharp decline in white premiums, reduced power export revenue, factory accidents, demurrage charges, inventory write-offs, hedge losses, and high finance costs. As of March 31, 2025, PSRIPL had accumulated losses of approximately Rs. 1,406 Crores, and the business is deemed unable to overcome current and potential challenges.

announcements.subject: Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd - 531911 - INTIMATION OF RECEIPT OF REQUEST FOR RECLASSIFICATION FROM THE ''''PROMOTER'''' TO THE ''''PUBLIC'''' CATEGORY IN ACCORDANCE WITH REGULATION 31A OF THE SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE BOARD OF INDIA (LISTING OBLIGATIONS AND DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS) REGULATIONS, 2015
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015 (Listing Regulations). We wish to inform you that the Company has recevied request from the members of the promoter category for their reclassification as public shareholder of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd has received requests from members of its promoter category to be reclassified as public shareholders, in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The individuals requesting reclassification include Amrita Jitendra Shah, Hemali Sudhir Patel, Manojkumar Harsukhlal Shah-HUF, Manoj Harsukhlal Shah, Milan Jinesh Sanghvi, Nalini Manojkumar Shah, Sanjay Jayantilal Patel, and Suketa Sanjay Patel. Notably, Amrita Jitendra Shah currently holds 7,475 shares, representing 0.04% of the company's shareholding, and does not exercise direct or indirect control or engage in management decisions. The reclassification is subject to the approval of the Board, Shareholders, and BSE Limited. The company will undertake the necessary steps as per Regulation 31A of the Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Rolex Rings Ltd - 543325 - Announcement With Regards To Final Settlement Of Right Of Recompense
announcements.detail: Disclosure for final settlement of Right of Recompense
