These orders demonstrate BCSSL's capability to deliver integrated AI platforms and high-performance computing solutions.

announcements.subject: NTPC Green Energy Ltd - 544289 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: NTPC Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release titled "NTPC Renewable Energy Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) Signed Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement (GAPA) with Solar Energy Corporation Limited (SECI) for supply of Green Ammonia."
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NTPC REL), has signed a Green Ammonia Purchase Agreement (GAPA) with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). This agreement, executed on March 30, 2026, is for the supply of Green Ammonia under the SIGHT Scheme of the National Green Hydrogen Mission. Under the terms of the GAPA, NTPC REL will supply 70,000 MTPA of Green Ammonia to M/s Krishna Phoschem Limited, situated in Meghnagar, Madhya Pradesh. SECI will act as the intermediary procurer in this transaction. This development is a significant step for NGEL's Green Hydrogen and Green Ammonia portfolio, underscoring its dedication to India's decarbonization objectives.

announcements.subject: Capri Global Capital Ltd - 531595 - Intimation - Shelf Prospectus & Tranche 1 Prospectus
announcements.detail: Intimation - Shelf Prospectus & Tranche 1 Prospectus
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Ltd is launching a public issue of secured, rated, listed, redeemable, non-convertible debentures (NCDs) with a face value of ₹1,000 each. The Tranche I Issue has a Base Issue Size of ₹1,000 million and an option to retain oversubscription of up to ₹4,000 million, aggregating to a total of ₹5,000 million. This Tranche I Issue is part of a larger Shelf Limit of up to ₹20,000 million, approved by the Board of Directors on March 10, 2026. The Shelf Prospectus and Tranche I Prospectus have been adopted by the Management Committee of the Board via a Circular Resolution passed on March 30, 2026, and have been filed with the Registrar of Companies, SEBI, and BSE Limited. The company has also uploaded this intimation on its website.

announcements.subject: Coforge Ltd - 532541 - Intimation Of Receipt Of RBI Approval With Respect To  Encora Transaction
announcements.detail: Intimation of receipt of RBI approval with respect to Encora Transaction
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) for Overseas Direct Investment exceeding USD One Billion under the Foreign Exchange Management (Overseas Investment) Rules. This approval is a significant step in the ongoing Encora acquisition transaction, which involves a share subscription and share purchase agreement with Encora US Holdco, Inc., Encora Holdings Ltd., Encora Holdco Ltd. (UK), and AI Altius Parent (Cayman) Limited. The company had previously announced receiving approvals from the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvement Act in the United States and competition-related approvals in Australia, along with shareholder approval for matters including preferential allotment and debt funding on January 28, 2026, and February 28, 2026. Coforge Limited is actively pursuing remaining regulatory approvals in various jurisdictions, which are currently in advanced stages of processing. The company will provide prompt updates to the stock exchanges upon the grant of these approvals.

announcements.company: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd
announcements.subject: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd - 534091 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Multi Commodity Exchange Clearing Corporation Limited (MCXCCL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd, has transferred Rs. 50 Lakh to its Core Settlement Guarantee Fund as a "Financial Disincentive" on March 27, 2026. This action was taken on account of a technical glitch that occurred on January 28, 2026. The disclosure is made in accordance with SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/MRD1/DTCS/CIR/P/2021/590 dated July 05, 2021, and SEBI Circular no. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026. The company has stated that there is no impact on the operations or other activities of MCX and MCXCCL arising from this financial disincentive.

announcements.company: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd
announcements.subject: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd - 543490 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of additional equity stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited from IDFC by GMR Energy Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GMR Energy Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of GMR Power and Urban Infra Limited, has acquired an additional 2.37% equity stake in GMR Kamalanga Energy Limited (GKEL) from IDFC First Bank Limited. The transaction involved the purchase of 5,09,80,769 equity shares for a consideration of Rs. 60 Crore. This acquisition is set to consolidate the company's stake in GKEL to nearly 100%, thereby enhancing its strategic control over GKEL, which operates a 1050 MW coal-based plant with a turnover of Rs. 3017 Crore for FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Religare Enterprises Ltd - 532915 - Grant Of Stock Options
announcements.detail: Grant Of Stock Options
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Religare Enterprises Limited has announced the grant of 22,692 stock options to eligible employees under the Religare Enterprises Limited Employee Stock Option Plan 2019. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of the Company approved this grant at their meeting held on March 30, 2026. Each stock option is convertible into one equity share of face value Rs. 10/-. The exercise price for these stock options is Rs. 220.34 per equity share. The options will vest in five equal annual installments of 20% each year, with the first installment vesting upon completion of one year from the date of grant. The scheme is in conformity with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021, having been approved by the Board of Directors and Shareholders.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Update On Sale Of Joint Venture
announcements.detail: Update on sale of Joint Venture
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jost’s Engineering Company Limited has completed the divestment of its entire 50% equity investment in its joint venture, Suryavayu Renewable and Energy Solutions Private Limited (SRESPL). The transaction involved the sale of its stake to Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited (Kay Cee). On March 30, 2026, Jost’s Engineering Company Limited received consideration of Rs. 1,03,100/- and transferred its 50% equity investment in SRESPL. Consequently, SRESPL has ceased to be a joint venture of Jost’s Engineering Company Limited with effect from March 30, 2026. This update follows the company's prior intimation on March 24, 2026, regarding the approval of this divestment proposal.

announcements.subject: Thrive Future Habitats Ltd - 523120 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Completion of sale of subsidiary namely Aura Flow Private Limited (formerly known as Anatomicals Ador India Private Limited).
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Thrive Future Habitats Ltd has completed the sale of its entire 58% shareholding in its subsidiary, Aura Flow Private Limited (formerly known as Anatomicals Ador India Private Limited). The transaction involved the transfer of 1,73,998 equity shares from Thrive Future Habitats Limited to Ms. Mei Ling Foon Ming Lee. As a result of this sale, Aura Flow Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Thrive Future Habitats Limited, effective March 30, 2026. This divestment was approved by the Board of Directors of Aura Flow Private Limited in their meeting held on the same date. All other terms and details of the transaction remain as previously disclosed on November 14, 2025.

announcements.subject: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd - 543985 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Recognition
announcements.detail: We wish to inform you that Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has been featured as one of ''India''s Leading ESG Entities'' in Dun & Bradstreet''s report titled ''ESG Horizons: Now and Next 2026''.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has been recognized as one of "India's Leading ESG Entities" in Dun & Bradstreet's report titled "ESG Horizons: Now and Next 2026". This announcement was made on March 30, 2026. The company has provided a copy of this recognition for record.

announcements.subject: Speciality Restaurants Ltd - 534425 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)
announcements.detail: As Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Speciality Hotels India Private Limited ("SHIPL"), a subsidiary of Speciality Restaurants Limited, has allotted 61,728 equity shares of face value ₹100 each at an issue price of ₹838.57 per share on March 30, 2026. The total consideration for this allotment was ₹5,17,63,249 (Rupees Five Crore Seventeen Lakhs Sixty-Three Thousand Two Hundred Forty-Nine Only) through a rights issue. This allotment has increased SHIPL's paid-up share capital to ₹2,00,61,500. Consequently, Speciality Restaurants Limited's shareholding in SHIPL has been diluted from 98.28% to 68.04%, with SHIPL continuing to be a subsidiary.

announcements.subject: NIBE Ltd - 535136 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Sale of Step down Subsidiary of the Company i.e Nibe Aeronautics Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nibe Defence and Aerospace Limited ("NDAL"), a subsidiary of Nibe Limited, has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on March 30, 2026, with Mr. Nibe Ganesh Ramesh ("Purchaser") for the sale of equity shares of Nibe Aeronautics Limited ("NAL"). Upon completion of the transaction, NAL will cease to be a subsidiary of NDAL and a step-down subsidiary of Nibe Limited. The transaction is expected to be completed by May 30, 2026. The consideration received is not less than the original investment amount of ₹1,52,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty-Two Lakhs only). In the financial year ended March 31, 2025, NAL contributed ₹0.00 to turnover/revenue/income and ₹191.19 Lakhs to net worth, representing 0.000% and 0.003% respectively.

announcements.subject: Majestic Auto Ltd-$ - 500267 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Restructuring
announcements.detail: Completion of Sale of Property of the Company situated at B-6, B-7 and B-9 Ecotech I Extension, Sector - Ecotech-I, Greater Noida, Distt. Gautam Budh Nagar (U.P.)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Majestic Auto Ltd has completed the sale of its leasehold property located at B-6, B-7, and B-9 Ecotech I Extension, Sector-Ecotech-I, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, measuring approximately 54,312 sq. mtrs. The company executed the Sale Deed on March 30, 2026, with Cyrrus Manufacturing LLP (the "Buyer") after receiving the full sale consideration. An advance of ₹5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crore only) was previously received. The sale of these plots contributed 11.85% to the company's net worth and 6.30% to its revenue in the last financial year (2024-25).

announcements.subject: Bank of Baroda - 532134 - Clarification On News Item Appearing In Media/Publication
announcements.detail: Clarification on news item appearing in Media/Publication
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bank of Baroda has provided a clarification regarding a news item that appeared in the media. The bank's branch received an email on March 26, 2026, for a fund transfer from an MP Government savings account, but there was a mismatch in the available balance. A revised email was received later that day. On March 27, 2026, an email with an attached letter from the State Government Department was received for fund transfer on the same day, which was a holiday. After necessary arrangements and approvals, funds were remitted on March 27, 2026. However, on the same day, the Commissioner, DIF, Bhopal, issued a letter debarring Bank of Baroda from conducting government business. On March 28, 2026, the bank submitted a written representation, and subsequently, on the same day, the debarment letter was cancelled with immediate effect. The bank stated that since the order was revoked within 24 hours, it was not disclosed, and there is no material impact on the bank.

announcements.subject: Ambuja Cements Ltd - 500425 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Ambuja Cements Limited has informed the stock exchange about the Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited and their respective shareholders.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ambuja Cements Limited has received sanction for the Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited, along with their respective shareholders. The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench (NCLT Ahmedabad), pronounced its order sanctioning the scheme on March 30, 2026. The Appointed Date for the Scheme is August 16, 2024. The scheme will become effective upon the completion of all stipulated steps. Ambuja Cements Limited will provide further updates to the exchanges once the Scheme is effective. The company will also upload this intimation on its website.

announcements.subject: 3M India Ltd - 523395 - Announcement Under Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Reg 30 of SEBI (LODR) update on PG&F business
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: 3M India Limited has announced an update regarding its Precision Grinding & Finishing (PG&F) business. Following the agreement by 3M Company, USA, to sell its global PG&F business to Nimbus, a European private equity firm, 3M India will cease its PG&F operations in India. The PG&F business in India generated approximately INR 26 crore in sales during FY 2024-25 and is supported by two employees. The global sale is expected to close on April 1, 2026, after which 3M India will no longer be able to continue these operations. The company will provide limited post-closing support for up to 12 months, extendable by an additional 6 months, under a Transition Distribution Services Agreement to ensure customer supply continuity.

announcements.subject: Raghuvir Synthetics Ltd - 514316 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of the company today i.e. 30 March 2026 .
announcements.ai_summary: Raghuvir Synthetics Limited announced the successful completion of the sale of its entire 51% shareholding in its subsidiary, Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited, on March 30, 2026. This transaction, which was approved by the Board of Directors on March 27, 2026, means that Dreamsoft Bedsheets Private Limited is no longer a subsidiary of Raghuvir Synthetics Limited. The sale was conducted at a consideration of Rs. 51,000 and was made to Mr. Yash Sunil Agarwal and Mr. Hardik Sunil Agarwal, who are also promoters of Raghuvir Synthetics Limited. The transaction was conducted on an arms-length basis.

announcements.subject: JK Paper Ltd - 532162 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Disclosure Under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: JK Paper Ltd has provided an update on the commissioning of its Hardwood Bleach Chemical Thermo-Mechanical Pulp (BCTMP) Plant. The plant's commercial production, initially expected to begin in the 4th quarter of FY 2025–26, is now anticipated to commence in the 1st quarter of FY 2026–27. The company stated that the erection and commissioning of the plant are currently in advanced stages. This information is a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, referencing a previous communication dated September 29, 2025.

announcements.subject: Muthoot Capital Services Ltd - 511766 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Raising of Funds
announcements.detail: Raising of funds through securitization
announcements.ai_summary: Muthoot Capital Services Limited announced the completion of two securitization transactions on March 30, 2026, successfully raising funds through the assignment of Two-Wheeler Loan receivables. The first transaction raised ₹1,03,70,01,698.70 by assigning receivables aggregating to ₹1,11,50,55,590. The second transaction raised ₹72,67,42,353 by assigning receivables totaling ₹77,31,30,163. These transactions represent the seventh and eighth securitization/direct assignment activities undertaken by the company during FY 2025-26. The entire pool of receivables is from the non-priority sector and was undertaken in compliance with Reserve Bank of India guidelines.

announcements.subject: Novartis India Ltd - 500672 - Intimation Of The Receipt Of Delhi High Court Order Admitting Company Petition In The Matter Of Novartis India Limited Vs. Commissioner Of Trade And Taxes (W.P.(C) 3892/2026)
announcements.detail: Intimation of the receipt of Delhi High Court Order admitting Company Petition in the matter of Novartis India Limited vs. Commissioner of Trade and Taxes (W.P.(C) 3892/2026)
announcements.ai_summary: Novartis India Limited received an order dated March 27, 2026, from the Delhi High Court admitting its petition against the Commissioner of Trade and Taxes. The petition challenges the DVAT assessment for AY 2013-14, which had resulted in a demand of approximately ₹10.89 crore for tax and interest, plus a penalty of ₹6.85 crore. The High Court's order is procedural and does not represent a final decision on the matter. The company received this order on March 29, 2026. A favorable outcome could lead to a refund of INR 54.45 Lacs. Novartis India Limited will continue to update the stock exchanges on further developments.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 30.03.2026
announcements.detail: Please find the attached
announcements.ai_summary: Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board of Directors met on March 30, 2026, and approved a borrowing program for the Financial Year 2026-27. This program includes the issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures up to an overall limit of Rs. 7,400 Crore, which can be done through private placement or public issue in one or more tranches. The Board also approved an additional investment of up to Rs 7,90,59,04,996/- in its subsidiary, Asirvad Micro Finance Limited, and an investment of up to Rs 1,50,00,00,000/- in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Manappuram Home Finance Limited. Furthermore, Mr. Narayanan Easwaran was appointed as the Group Chief Technology Officer, effective March 30, 2026. The meeting commenced at 5:00 PM and concluded at 6:30 PM.

announcements.company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd
announcements.subject: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd - 542760 - Issuance Of Parent Company Guarantee
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Para B of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2025/25 dated February 25, 2025, titled Industry Standards on Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, we hereby notify that the Company has issued Parent Company Guarantee to ABSA Bank Limited (Lender) for an amount of USD 31 million (equivalent to approx. INR 293.04 Crore) as security for the Guarantees ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited has issued a Parent Company Guarantee (PCG) to ABSA Bank Limited (Lender) for an amount of USD 31 million, equivalent to approximately INR 293.04 Crore. This guarantee is provided as security for a Guarantees facility (Non-fund based working capital facility) availed by Sterling and Wilson Engineering (Pty) Ltd., a step-down subsidiary of the company. The facility is intended for solar power projects in South Africa. The PCG is issued on an arm's length basis and the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this transaction. The guarantee will be valid for up to six years from its issuance date.

announcements.subject: Aditya Vision Ltd - 540205 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR (Opening Of Showroom)
announcements.detail: Opening of Showroom
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Vision Limited has expanded its retail presence by opening three new showrooms on March 30, 2026. These new showrooms are located in Bhilai, Bilaspur, and Durg in the state of Chhattisgarh. This expansion marks Chhattisgarh as the fourth state of operation for the company, strengthening its presence in Central India. With these openings, Aditya Vision Limited has now surpassed a milestone of 200 showrooms across Bihar, Jharkhand, Uttar Pradesh, and Chhattisgarh. The company is pursuing a growth strategy that involves increasing its retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Prism Johnson Ltd - 500338 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Sale of stake in wholly owned subsidiary companies
announcements.ai_summary: Prism Johnson Ltd has divested its entire equity shareholding in three wholly owned subsidiaries: Venkataramiah Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, Samiyaz Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, and Tescon Buildcon Private Limited, on March 30, 2026. Consequently, these companies have ceased to be wholly owned subsidiaries of Prism Johnson Ltd. The consideration received for the sale of shares includes Rs. 4,31,932 for Venkataramiah Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, Rs. 6,48,510 for Samiyaz Tile Bath Kitchen Private Limited, and Rs. 10,000 for Tescon Buildcon Private Limited. The revenue and net worth contributed by these subsidiaries to Prism Johnson Ltd as of March 31, 2025, were minimal, with revenues reported as Rs. 0.00 and net worth contributions of Rs. 0.06 crore, Rs. 0.08 crore, and Rs. 0.002 crore respectively.

announcements.subject: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd - 534623 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 In Respect Of Its Material Unlisted Subsidiary 'Jineshvar Securities Private Limited'.
announcements.detail: As per annexure attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd has disclosed changes in the Board of Directors of its material unlisted subsidiary, Jineshvar Securities Private Limited, effective March 30, 2026. Mr. Anshul Laxkar (DIN: 11100544) has been appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive and Independent) for a term of five years. Concurrently, Mr. Umesh Vasantlal Modi (DIN: 01570180) and Mrs. Manisha Umesh Modi (DIN: 02057625) have resigned from their positions as Directors. These changes have been approved by the Board of Directors of Jineshvar Securities Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Oil India Ltd - 533106 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Oil India and CSIR-IMMT signs MoU to pursue joint Research in Critical Minerals
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Oil India Limited (OIL), a Maharatna CPSE, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with CSIR - Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (IMMT) on March 30, 2026. This collaboration aims to pursue joint Research & Development (R&D) projects in the critical minerals sector, aligning with the National Critical Mineral Mission (NCMM). The MoU was signed by the Director (Exploration & Development) of OIL and the Director of CSIR-IMMT, in the presence of the CMD of OIL and senior officials from both organizations. This initiative is expected to foster R&D activities in the critical mineral domain.

announcements.subject: Bilcare Ltd-$ - 526853 - Update On Voluntary Liquidation Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015,
announcements.detail: Bilcare Limited has informed the Exchange about the update on Voluntary Liquidation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bilcare Limited has redeemed 31,50,000 preference shares of Caprihans India Limited for an aggregate of ₹3.15 crore on March 23, 2026. Furthermore, the company exercised its right to convert 12,90,000 warrants into equity shares of Caprihans India Limited, at a price of ₹200 per warrant, with each warrant convertible into one equity share of ₹10 face value. Following these conversions on March 20, 23, 24, and 25, 2026, Bilcare Limited's shareholding in Caprihans India Limited increased from 55.99% to 59.56%, with the number of equity shares held rising from 81,88,325 to 94,78,325. The company also reviewed the voluntary winding up status of its wholly owned subsidiary, Bilcare GCS Limited, in a board meeting held on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Tube Investments of India Ltd - 540762 - Update On Incremental Investment In TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.detail: Update on Incremental Investment in TI Clean Mobility Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Tube Investments of India Ltd has announced an incremental investment in its subsidiary, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited. On March 30, 2026, TI Clean Mobility Private Limited allotted 2,50,00,000 Series C Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares to Tube Investments of India Limited. This transaction is an update under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Dev Accelerator Ltd - 544513 - Monthly Newsletter - March 2026 Edition
announcements.detail: A Monthly Newsletter of March 2026 edition issued by the Company is attached.
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Accelerator Limited has issued its Monthly Newsletter for March 2026, providing an update on its business activities and market outlook. The company highlights the growing demand for professionally managed workspace infrastructure in India, driven by enterprise expansion. A significant development mentioned is the commitment to operate a 27-storey commercial tower in Ahmedabad, spanning over 8 lakh sq ft and valued at approximately ₹850 crore. This move reflects DevX's strategy to expand in markets with strong enterprise demand. The newsletter also notes DevX's ranking as the 8th fastest-growing company in India for 2026, with a reported growth of 512.79% between 2021 and 2024. Furthermore, it touches upon the rise of Global Capability Centres (GCCs) in India, which are driving demand for scalable workspace solutions.

announcements.subject: Quest Flow Controls Ltd - 543982 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Intimation of disinvestment of stake in subsidiary of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Quest Flow Controls Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the disinvestment of its entire stake in its subsidiary, H2O DYNAMICS INDIA LIMITED. The sale agreement was entered into on March 30, 2026, with Stellarin Research and Development Private Limited. The consideration received from this sale is Rs. 7,35,00,000. The net revenue of H2O DYNAMICS INDIA LIMITED for FY 24-25 was Rs. 811.31 Lakhs, and its net worth was Rs. 134.96 Lakhs. The completion of the sale is expected within 2 months. This transaction is considered an arm's length transaction as H2O Dynamics India Limited is a related party.

announcements.subject: Kamat Hotels (India) Ltd - 526668 - Closure Of IRA By Orchid Hotels, Mumbai
announcements.detail: As per the attached Intimation letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Kamat Hotels (India) Ltd has informed the exchange about the closure of its hotel, IRA by Orchid Hotels, Mumbai, effective April 1, 2026. This closure is due to the expiry of the Leave and License Agreement dated October 26, 2023. The company had previously communicated about this agreement on October 26, 2023. Kamat Hotels (India) Ltd has stated that the discontinuance of operations for this hotel property will not adversely impact the company's profitability in the coming financial years. The revenue contribution from this unit during the last financial year (ending March 31, 2025) was Rs. 4807.59 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Punjab National Bank - 532461 - Change In Interest Rates
announcements.detail: Change in Interest Rates
announcements.ai_summary: Punjab National Bank has announced that its Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rates (MCLR) will remain unchanged effective April 1, 2026. The existing MCLR rates for tenors ranging from one month to three years are 8.20%, 8.40%, 8.60%, and 8.75% respectively. Additionally, the bank's Repo Linked Lending Rate (RLLR) of 8.10% (including BSP of 0.10%) and its Base Rate of 9.50% will also remain unchanged. This update is for the record of the exchange.

announcements.subject:
Cupid Ltd-$ - 530843 - Intimation Of Disclosure Under Regulation 29(2) Of SEBI (SAST)
Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: Cupid Limited is hereby informing BSE about disclosure under regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cupid Limited has received a disclosure from Mr. Aditya Kumar Halwasiya, Promoter and Chairman and Managing Director, under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of 4,80,000 equity shares of face value of Re. 1/- each in Cupid Limited through the open market. Following this acquisition, Mr. Aditya Kumar Halwasiya now holds 44,244,5475 shares, representing 32.90% of the total share capital and 32.84% of the total diluted share capital. The disclosure also details holdings of other promoter group entities, including Columbia Petro Chem Private Limited.

announcements.subject: Prithvi Exchange (India) Ltd - 531688 - Intimation Of Branch Opening In Gurugram
announcements.detail: Intimation of branch opening in Gurugram
announcements.ai_summary: Prithvi Exchange (India) Limited has expanded its presence by opening a new branch in Gurugram. The branch is located at Shop No. F-102, First Floor, Sapphire Ninety, Sector-90, Gurugram, Haryana-122 505. The company aims to offer forex services in a contemporary and technologically updated environment and expects to provide excellent service to its clients. Prithvi Exchange (India) Limited plans to increase its national footprint by establishing more branches in the near future. This expansion was intimated to the stock exchange on March 30, 2026, under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: LCC Infotech Ltd - 532019 - Recommendations of Committee of Independent Director (IDC)
announcements.detail: Grow House Wealth Management Pvt Ltd ("Manager to the Offer") has submitted to BSE a copy of Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Director (IDC) of LCC Infotech Ltd ("Target Company") under regulation 26 (7) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisiton of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and subsequent amendments thereto ("SEBI (SAST) Regulations") in relation to the Open Offer to the Public Shareholders of LCC Infotech Ltd ("Target Company") ....
announcements.ai_summary: Grow House Wealth Management Pvt Ltd, acting as the Manager to the Offer, has submitted the Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Directors (IDC) of LCC Infotech Ltd to BSE. This pertains to an Open Offer for the acquisition of 4,38,34,271 equity shares of LCC Infotech Ltd, representing 26.00% of the emerging voting share capital. The Offer Price is set at ₹ 4.55 per equity share. The IDC recommendations were published on March 30, 2026, in the Financial Express, Jansatta, Mumbai Lakshadeep, and Duranta Barta. This open offer is being made by Mr. Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel pursuant to SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Westlife Foodworld Ltd - 505533 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release/Media Release-McDonald''s India opens a new restaurant at Metro-Linked Irrum Manzil hub in Hyderabad.
announcements.ai_summary: Westlife Foodworld Ltd announced the opening of a new McDonald's restaurant in Hyderabad, located at L&T Next Premia Mall, Irrum Manzil. This opening is part of the company's strategy to expand in high-growth urban areas and capitalize on transit-linked consumption. The new 2,800 sq. ft. dine-in restaurant offers seamless access with its direct skywalk connectivity to the Irrum Manzil Metro Station. As of December 2025, Westlife Foodworld operates 458 restaurants across 73 cities, and this addition strengthens its presence in Hyderabad with over 20 restaurants in the city. The company, which operates McDonald's restaurants in West and South India through its subsidiary Hardcastle Restaurants Pvt. Ltd., aims to provide convenience and relevance to evolving urban lifestyles.

announcements.subject: Avenue Supermarts Ltd - 540376 - Intimation Of Repayment Of Commercial Paper
announcements.detail: Redemption of Commercial Paper
announcements.ai_summary: On March 30, 2026, Avenue Supermarts Ltd confirmed the full redemption of its Commercial Paper (CP) with ISIN INE192R14311. The redemption was due to maturity and the total amount redeemed was Rs. 100 Crores. The company has duly paid the maturity proceeds to the holders of the CP. Following this redemption, the outstanding amount for this CP is now Nil. This action is in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated 15th October, 2025.

announcements.subject: Classic Leasing & Finance Ltd - 540481 - Board Meeting Outcome for OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING HELD ON 30TH MARCH, 2026
announcements.detail: OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING HELD ON 30TH MARCH, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Classic Leasing & Finance Ltd met on March 30, 2026. During this meeting, Mrs. Minu Datta resigned as a Non-Executive Independent Director due to other pre-occupations and commitments. The Board has appointed Mr. Mukesh Shaw as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of 5 years, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Shaw is a Commerce Graduate and Qualified Company Secretary with extensive experience in corporate laws and governance. Additionally, Mr. Abhishek Mussadi has been appointed as another Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, bringing valuable experience in business operations and management. Both new directors are not related to any existing directors and meet the independence criteria.

announcements.subject: KEI Industries Ltd - 517569 - Intimation Of Corporate Governance Rating/Grading Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.detail: Intimation of Corporate Governance Rating/Grading under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) regulations, 2015. CARE Analytics and Advisory Pvt Ltd (Care Edge Advisory) has assigned CG 2 + rating/grading to the overall performance of Corpoarte overnance of teh Company.
announcements.ai_summary: KEI Industries Limited has received a Corporate Governance Rating/Grading of 'CG 2+' from CARE Analytics and Advisory Pvt Ltd (Care Edge Advisory). This rating signifies that the company adheres to corporate governance practices that provide a high level of comfort to its stakeholders. The grading is assigned on a six-point scale, with CG 1 being the highest and CG 6 being the lowest. This assessment reflects the overall performance of KEI Industries Limited's corporate governance. The company operates six manufacturing facilities and has a presence in over 60 countries.

announcements.subject: Bank of Maharashtra - 532525 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Interest Rates Updates
announcements.detail: Revision in MCLR rates
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of Maharashtra has announced a revision in its Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rate (MCLR) effective March 31, 2026. The Overnight MCLR has been reduced from 7.90% to 7.75%. The MCLR for one month, three months, six months, and one year remain unchanged at 8.20%, 8.45%, 8.70%, and 8.85% respectively. This update is in line with the bank's regular review of its benchmark lending rates. Investors are advised to note these revised rates for potential loan and borrowing considerations.

announcements.subject: Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd - 543271 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: update on acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Jubilant Ingrevia Limited has successfully acquired 100% of the equity stake in Remidex Pharma Private Limited, as per the Share Purchase Agreement. This acquisition follows the initial disclosure made on March 13, 2026. The specific terms of this transaction were previously communicated to the stock exchanges on March 13, 2026. The company has confirmed the completion of this acquisition on March 30, 2026, at 6:05 pm IST. Further details regarding this acquisition are available on the company's website, www.jubilantingrevia.com.

announcements.subject: Hindustan Copper Ltd - 513599 - Construction Of New 3.0 MTPA Copper Concentrate Plant At Malanjkhand Copper Project (MCP), Madhya Pradesh, India
announcements.detail: Board of Directors of Hindustan Copper Ltd in its 461st meeting held today i.e., 30.03.2026 approved the proposal to place work order to Ardee Engineering Limited for construction of new 3.0 MTPA Copper Concentrate Plant at Malanjhkhand Copper Project, Madhya Pradesh, India.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Ltd's Board of Directors, in their 461st meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the proposal to award a work order to Ardee Engineering Limited. The order is for the construction of a new 3.0 MTPA Copper Concentrate Plant at the Malanjkhand Copper Project (MCP) in Madhya Pradesh, India. This project will be executed on a turnkey basis and is expected to be completed over a period of twenty-seven (27) months. The financial implication for this project is Rs. 469.55 Crores plus GST. The Board meeting commenced at 10:30 AM and concluded at 03:45 PM.

announcements.subject: Davangere Sugar Company Ltd - 543267 - Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Expansion of Company''s distillery production capacity.
announcements.ai_summary: Davangere Sugar Company Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved a significant expansion of the company's distillery production capacity. The company plans to add 85 KLDP to its existing capacity of 65 KLDP. This expansion is expected to be completed within 18 months and will require an investment of Rs. 127.50 Crores, which will be financed through FCCB Funding. The rationale behind this expansion is to capitalize on the rising demand for ethanol and leverage supportive government policies. The Board meeting commenced at 11:30 a.m. (IST) and concluded at 3:30 p.m. (IST).

announcements.subject: Bonlon Industries Ltd - 543211 - Board Meeting Outcome for OUTCOME OF BOARD MEETING FOR Allotment Of 22,00,000 Equity Shares Consequent To Conversion Of Warrants Of The Company
announcements.detail: The Company has submitted the outcome of Board meeting held today
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Bonlon Industries Ltd, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 22,00,000 equity shares. These shares are a result of the conversion of 22,00,000 warrants, which were initially issued at an issue price of Rs. 33/- each on a preferential basis. The allotment is to the "Promoter/Promoter Group Category," specifically to Bon-Lon Securities Ltd (11,00,000 shares) and Harshit Finvest Pvt Ltd (11,00,000 shares). The company received a balance amount of Rs. 5,44,50,000/- (Rupees Five Crore Forty-Four Lakh Fifty Thousand Only) from these allottees, representing 75% of the issue price per warrant, which is Rs. 24.75/-. This conversion increases the company's issued and paid-up capital to Rs. 16,38,33,580/-, comprising 1,63,83,358 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

announcements.subject: KFin Technologies Ltd - 543720 - Update On Request For Re-Classification Of Entity Forming Part Of The ''Promoter(S) Group'' Category
announcements.detail: Please find attached update on request for Re-classification of Capital Foods Private Limited, entity forming part of the "Promoter(s) Group'' to "Public" Category, regarding receipt of no-objection letter from Stock Exchanges.
announcements.ai_summary: KFin Technologies Limited informed on March 30, 2026, that it has received no-objection letters from both BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) for the re-classification of Capital Foods Private Limited ("CFPL") from the 'Promoter(s) Group' category to the 'Public' category. This follows an application filed by KFin Technologies Limited with the stock exchanges seeking approval for this re-classification, as per Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Accordingly, CFPL will now cease to be a part of the 'Promoter(s) Group' category of KFin Technologies Limited. The company had previously intimated the exchanges about this application on January 15, 2026, February 02, 2026, and February 04, 2026.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Update To Earlier Disclosure Dated March 26, 2026 In Relation To Acquisition Of Shares And Change In Shareholding In M/S Shri Gang Industries And Allied Products Limited. (' Shri Gang').
announcements.detail: Intimation
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd provided an update on March 30, 2026, regarding its acquisition of shares in M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited ("Shri Gang"). The company has completed the acquisition of 25,000 equity shares of Shri Gang from Mr. Vikas Gupta. Additionally, Shri Gang has allotted 2,50,000 equity shares of face value ₹10 each, at a conversion price of ₹99 per equity share, through a preferential allotment on a private placement basis to entities belonging to the Promoter and Promoter Group category of Shri Gang. This allotment, pursuant to the conversion of 2,50,000 0.01% Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares, has increased Shri Gang's paid-up equity share capital to ₹19,98,00,000, comprising 1,99,80,000 equity shares. Consequently, Suraj Industries Ltd's shareholding in Shri Gang has been revised to 20.02% of the paid-up equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Nazara Technologies Ltd - 543280 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Nazara Technologies Limited informs the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 30, 2026, titled "Nazara raises INR 500 crores through Preferential Issue of Warrants".
announcements.ai_summary: Nazara Technologies Limited announced on March 30, 2026, a preferential issue of warrants aggregating ₹500 crores, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. Each warrant is convertible into one equity share at a price of ₹260 per share, which represents a premium to the current market price. The fundraising round includes participation from Riambel Capital PCC, S Gupta Family Investments, Plutus Investment and Holding Private Limited (Promoter Group), Classic Enterprises, and Founders Collective. The proceeds will be utilized to support strategic acquisitions, including the Bluetile and BestPlay transaction, and to accelerate growth across the company's existing business verticals. This capital infusion aims to position Nazara for building globally scalable, AI-enabled gaming businesses and strengthening its market leadership.

announcements.subject: Hilltone Software and Gases Ltd - 544308 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Hilltone Software and Gases Ltd, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, has given in-principle approval for an investment in RZOLUT TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD., a Singapore and India-based company specializing in data products for risk and compliance. Rzolut Singapore, established on August 29, 2022, has a subsidiary in India named Rzolut DataStream Private Limited, incorporated on October 3, 2023. The startup, founded by Sarabjeet Singh, achieved a turnover of approximately ₹5 crores in FY 2024-25. Hilltone aims to acquire approximately 5% of Rzolut's stake, contingent on valuation and due diligence. This strategic move is expected to boost Hilltone's IT vertical and introduce it to the data solutions field with Rzolut's established customer base. Mr. Niket Shah has been authorized to appoint a valuer and consultants for due diligence, with the outcome to be presented to the Board.

announcements.subject: DLF Ltd - 532868 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Update on intimation(s) submitted on 16th April 2025 and 3rd February 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: DLF Limited announced on March 30, 2026, that it has completed the transfer of its IT/ITeS SEZ undertaking, including 'DLF TechPark II', to Makalu Builders LLP and Srijan Realty Private Limited. Concurrently, the company sold approximately 17.75 acres of vacant land in Kolkata to Gangapurna Projects LLP. These transactions, executed under a Master Framework Agreement, Business Transfer Agreement, and Agreement to Sell with Srijan Realty Private Limited and its subsidiaries, have an aggregate consideration of approximately ₹710.23 crore. The completion follows the fulfillment of conditions precedent and receipt of requisite regulatory approvals, as further to previous intimations dated April 16, 2025, and February 3, 2026.

announcements.subject: T T Ltd-$ - 514142 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of 148000 shares by T.T. Brands Limited, Promoter Group
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group entity of T T Ltd, has acquired 1,48,000 Equity Shares of T T Ltd on March 30, 2026. This acquisition was made from an unspecified seller. Following this transaction, T T Brands Limited has submitted a disclosure under regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, to the stock exchanges. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Indo Amines Ltd-$ - 524648 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR) - Update
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith intimation under regulation 30 change in status of Subsidiary to Associate Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Indo Amines Limited has announced a change in the status of its subsidiary, Indo Speciality Chemicals Private Limited, to an Associate Company. This change, effective March 30, 2026, occurred because Indo Amines Limited did not participate in the Rights Issue of Indo Speciality Chemicals Private Limited. Consequently, the shareholding of Indo Amines Limited in the subsidiary was diluted from 51.39% to 39.39%. Although the number of shares held remains 172,140, the reduced percentage of shareholding means Indo Speciality Chemicals Private Limited no longer meets the criteria to be a subsidiary but maintains significant influence, classifying it as an Associate Company. There is no material impact on the overall operations of Indo Amines Limited.

announcements.company: Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd
announcements.subject: Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd - 523309 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation for allotment of 250000 Equity shares pursuant to conversion of 250000 CCPS
announcements.ai_summary: The Preferential Issue Committee of Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited, in a meeting held on March 30, 2026, approved the allotment of 2,50,000 Equity Shares of Face Value of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted pursuant to the conversion of 2,50,000 Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of Face Value of Rs. 10/- each. The conversion was executed at a price of Rs. 99/- per share on a private placement basis. The allotment was made to Express Infra Financial Consultancy Private Limited, which belongs to the Promoter & Promoter Group category. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to Rs. 19,98,00,000, comprising 1,99,80,000 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Alkem Laboratories Ltd - 539523 - Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Incorporation Of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Of The Company As A ''Scientific Office''.
announcements.detail: Please Find Attached herewith Intimation for Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company as a ''Scientific Office''.
announcements.ai_summary: Alkem Laboratories Limited has announced the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary named 'Alkem Pharmaceuticals Scientific Office FZ LLC' in Dubai Healthcare City, UAE, effective March 30, 2026. This new entity will function as a 'Scientific Office' and is intended to undertake the manufacturing of products and obtaining product registrations, excluding trading activities. The authorized and subscribed share capital of this subsidiary is AED 3,670,000, divided into 3,670 Equity Shares of AED 1,000 each, with the acquisition cost being AED 3,670,000 in cash. As a wholly-owned subsidiary, Alkem Pharmaceuticals is a related party to Alkem Laboratories Limited.

announcements.subject: Dabur India Ltd - 500096 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Notice of meeting of Unsecured Creditors of Dabur India Limited  to be convened as per the directions issued by the Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal New Delhi Bench in connection with the Scheme of Amalgamation between Sesa Care Private Limited and Dabur India Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors
announcements.ai_summary: Dabur India Limited has announced a meeting of its unsecured creditors to be held on May 02, 2026, at 01:00 P.M. (IST) via video conferencing. This meeting is being convened as per the directions of the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, New Delhi Bench, to consider and approve the Scheme of Amalgamation between Sesa Care Private Limited and Dabur India Limited. This follows previous intimations regarding the proposed amalgamation dated March 13, 2026, December 05, 2025, and May 26, 2025. The company is adhering to Section 108 of the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI Listing Regulations for conducting this meeting with e-voting facilities. Unsecured creditors will have the opportunity to approve the scheme with or without modifications.

announcements.subject: TGV Sraac Ltd - 507753 - Announcement Under Reg.30 - Intimation Regarding Addition Of 2.5 Mwp Solar Power Capacity Addition
announcements.detail: Kindly note that the solar power capacity addtion of the company will be increased from the existing 55.40 Mwp to 57.90 MWp.
announcements.ai_summary: TGV Sraac Ltd has announced an addition of 2.5 MWp to its solar power capacity. This expansion will increase the company's total solar power generating capacity from the existing 55.40 MWp to 57.90 MWp. This announcement is in continuation of their earlier submission dated September 29, 2025, and is made in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III Part-A Para-B (3) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This move signifies an expansion in the company's renewable energy infrastructure.

announcements.subject: DCW Ltd - 500117 -  Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: The company DCW Ltd has successfully commissioned the last milestone of its announced Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride (CPVC) capacity expansion project. This expansion adds 10,000 Metric Tonnes (MT) to its existing capacity, bringing the total installed capacity to 50,000 MT per annum. The project was commissioned on March 30, 2026, as per the scheduled timeline. DCW Ltd expects to gradually ramp up this new capacity throughout the first quarter of FY27. This expansion is a significant development for the company's CPVC business.

announcements.subject: Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd - 533293 - General Update
announcements.detail: Please find attached herewith communication under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd has announced the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary, Kirloskar Advanced Systems Private Limited (KASPL), on March 30, 2026. The certificate of incorporation was issued by the Registrar of Companies, Central Registration Centre, on the same date, with Corporate Identification Number U28299PN2026PTC253954. KASPL will be engaged in various engineering and industrial business segments, including defence and railways. Its activities will encompass design, development, manufacture, assembly, testing, supply, import, export, and dealing in all types of industrial equipment, such as engines, power generating sets, motors, platforms, systems, sub-systems, unmanned systems, and integrated systems, along with providing Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) services.

announcements.subject:
Banganga Paper Industries Ltd - 512025 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Meeting Of Committee Of Independent Directors For Open Offerof Asgard Alcobev
Limited (Formerly Known As Banganga Paper Industries Limited) (BSE Code: 512025 )
announcements.detail:
Please find below the outcome of meeting of the Committee of Independent Directors for Open Offer held on
30.03.2026, inter alia has transacted the following:
The Committee of Independent Directors at its meeting held on today discussed, analyzed and reviewed that the
open offer given by Acquirers pursuant to Public Announcement dated 17th December, 2025, Detailed Public
Statement dated 20th December, 2025 published on 22nd December, 2025 and ....
announcements.ai_summary: The Committee of Independent Directors of Asgard Alcobev Limited (formerly Banganga Paper Industries Limited) met on March 30, 2026, to review the open offer. The open offer, initiated by Ronak Jain, Sarita Jain, Priyanka Jain, and K K Impex & Trading Private Limited, aims to acquire up to 9,17,41,759 equity shares of face value Re. 1/- each at a price of Rs. 1.45/- per share. This represents 26.00% of the expanded equity and voting share capital. The committee concluded that the open offer is fair and reasonable, following the Public Announcement dated December 17, 2025, Detailed Public Statement dated December 20, 2025, and the Letter of Offer dated March 19, 2026.

announcements.subject: Dhansafal Finserve Ltd - 512048 - Outcome Of Circular Resolution Passed By The Board Of Directors As On March 30, 2026
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, enclosed herewith Outcome of the Circular Resolution passed by the Board of Directors as on March 30, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Dhansafal Finserve Ltd has approved the conversion of 1,25,00,000 share warrants into equity shares via preferential allotment on March 30, 2026. The company allotted 1,25,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 01/- each, fully paid up, to specific persons/entities as detailed in Annexure-I. The company received Rs. 4,04,06,250/- at Rs. 3.2325/- per warrant for this conversion. This allotment increases the company's paid-up equity capital from Rs. 21,46,40,000 (21,46,40,000 shares) to Rs. 22,71,40,000 (22,71,40,000 shares). Luharuka Exports Private Limited is one of the entities receiving shares, increasing its post-allotment shareholding to 5,38,75,000 shares, representing 20.13% of the total voting capital.

announcements.subject: PVP Ventures Ltd - 517556 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Divestment of Shares in Picturehouse Media Limited
announcements.ai_summary: On March 30, 2026, the Board of Directors of PVP Ventures Limited approved the divestment of its residual equity stake in Picturehouse Media Limited (PHML). The company holds 33,21,179 equity shares in PHML, representing 6.36% of its paid-up share capital, which is considered a minority and non-core investment. This divestment aligns with the company's strategy to focus on its core business, particularly in the healthcare sector. The shares are being sold to Mrs. Jhansi Sureddi, a promoter of the company, at Rs. 6.64 per share, which was the closing market price on March 27, 2026. The transaction, valued at Rs. 2.20 Crores, is an inter se transfer within the promoter group and is expected to be completed by March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Ashiana Housing Ltd-$ - 523716 - Corporate Announcement For Entering Into Agreement To Sell And Agreement To Perpetual Lease Pertaining To Land Parcel Located At Panvel Maharashtra For Which Intimation Was Filed On 05Th April 2025
announcements.detail: Corporate Announcement for entering into Agreement to Sella and Agreement to Perpetual Lease pertaining to Land parcel located at Panvel, Maharashtra, the details of which are mentioned in the pdf attached
announcements.ai_summary: Ashiana Housing Limited has entered into new agreements for a land parcel in Panvel, Maharashtra, on March 30, 2026. This replaces a previously cancelled agreement to perpetual lease dated April 5, 2025. The new agreements consist of an Agreement to Sell for 6.02 acres and an Agreement to Perpetual Lease for 1.03 acres, both with M/s. Caroa Properties LLP. The company plans to develop a Senior Living project on these lands, aiming for a launch by the fourth quarter of FY '27. The 6.02 acres parcel has an FSI potential of 7,00,000 sq. ft., while the 1.03 acres parcel has a potential of 5,000 sq. ft. The company intends to apply for necessary approvals soon.

announcements.subject: EPACK Durable Ltd - 544095 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)- Updates On Commencement Of Commercial Production.
announcements.detail: EPACK Durable Limited has informed the exchange about the commencement of commercial production.
announcements.ai_summary: EPACK Durable Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, EPACK Manufacturing Technologies Private Limited, has commenced mass production of RAC – Split Air Conditioners (CBU) at its Sri City, Andhra Pradesh facility. This production is for their anchor customer, Hisense, and began on March 30, 2026. The facility has an installed capacity of 0.75 million sets per annum. This development follows an earlier intimation on February 10, 2026, and signifies an expansion in the company's manufacturing capabilities. The information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Manba Finance Ltd - 544262 - Loan Sanction From State Bank Of India
announcements.detail: This is to inform you that company has received sanction of term loan from State Bank of India.
announcements.ai_summary: Manba Finance Limited has received sanction for a term loan amounting to Rs. 100,00,00,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Crores only) from the State Bank of India. This sanction was communicated on March 30, 2026. The details regarding the terms and conditions of the loan, including interest rate and tenure, are not specified in this announcement.

announcements.subject: City Union Bank Ltd - 532210 - Opening Of 7 New Branches
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 7 new Branches on March 30, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 949 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Ltd has opened seven new branches on March 30, 2026. These new branches are located in Hyderabad (L.B. Nagar), Rayapuram, Pallipattu, Madavakurichi, Seethaparpanallur, Avudayarparai, and Enathimangalam. Following this expansion, the bank now operates a total of 949 branches.

announcements.subject: IG Petrochemicals Ltd - 500199 - Plasticizer Plant
announcements.detail: The Company has achieved the mechanical completion of its Plasticizer plant
announcements.ai_summary: IG Petrochemicals Ltd has achieved mechanical completion of its Plasticizer plant on March 30, 2026. This marks a significant milestone in the company's expansion efforts. Further details regarding the plant's operational status and expected contribution to the company's business are not provided in this announcement.

announcements.subject: Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd - 526365 - Recommendations of Committee of Independent Directors ("IDC")
announcements.detail: Deep Shailesh Lakhani ("Chairman-IDC") has submitted to BSE a copy of Recommendations of the Committee of Independent Directors ("IDC") on the Open Offer to the Public Shareholders of Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd ('Target Company') under Regulation 26(7) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and subsequent amendments thereto ('SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011').
announcements.ai_summary: The Committee of Independent Directors (IDC) of Swarnsarita Jewels India Ltd has submitted its recommendations regarding the open offer to the public shareholders. The open offer, made by Acquirers Mr. Mahendra Madanlal Chordia, Mrs. Asha M. Chordia, Mr. Sunny Mahendra Chordia, and PAC Swarnsarita Jewellers Private Limited (SJPL), aims to acquire up to 47,94,987 equity shares. These shares represent 22.97% of the Target Company's voting share capital, with a face value of ₹10 each. The offer price is set at ₹32.15 per Equity Share. The IDC members, who are independent directors of the Target Company, have confirmed they have no equity holdings or other relationships with the Target Company or the Acquirers and PAC, and have not traded in the company's securities.

announcements.subject: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd - 533271 - Intimation Regarding Payment Of Interest On Rated, Listed, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (Ncds) Issued By The Company And Listed On The WDM Segment Of BSE Limited
announcements.detail: We hereby certify that the Company has made timely payment of Interest in respect of Rated, Listed, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the Company and listed on the Wholesale Debt Segment of BSE Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Ltd has confirmed the timely payment of interest on its Rated, Listed, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). These NCDs are listed on the Wholesale Debt Segment of BSE Limited. The company has made interest payments for three series of NCDs: Series I (ISIN: INE442H08040), Series II (ISIN: INE442H08057), and Series III (ISIN: INE442H08032). The interest payment date for all three series was March 30, 2026, with the due dates being April 9, 2026, April 16, 2026, and April 23, 2026, respectively.

announcements.subject: Super Iron Foundry Ltd - 544381 - Pursuant To Regulation 30 Read With Para B Of Part A Of Schedule III Of The SEBI Listing Regulations We Would Like To Inform That The Company Has Availed Loans From Poonawalla Fincorp Limited
announcements.detail: The Company has availed loan facilities from Poonawalla Fincorp Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Super Iron Foundry Ltd has availed loan facilities from Poonawalla Fincorp Limited. The company has secured a loan amounting to ₹4,47,42,636 (Rupees Four Crore Forty-Seven Lakh Forty-Two Thousand Six Hundred Thirty-Six only). This loan is intended for meeting the working capital requirements of the company and its subsidiaries. The loan agreement was executed on March 30, 2026. Super Iron Foundry Ltd has confirmed that it holds no shareholding in Poonawalla Fincorp Limited.

announcements.subject: Bank of India - 532149 - Redemption Of 9.30% BOI Additional Tier I Bonds Series VII ISIN No. INE084A08144
announcements.detail: Redemption of 9.30% BOI Additional Tier I Bonds Series VII ISIN No.INE084A08144
announcements.ai_summary: Bank of India has completed the full redemption of its 9.30% BOI Additional Tier I Bonds Series VII, with ISIN No. INE084A08144. The redemption, which was exercised through a call option, took place on March 30, 2026. The total amount redeemed was Rs. 602 crores, and the outstanding amount is now Nil. In addition to the principal amount, the bank also paid broken period interest amounting to Rs. 55,67,92,268. This action is in accordance with Regulation 57 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The last interest payment for these bonds was on April 2, 2025.

announcements.subject: Haleos Labs Ltd - 540679 - New Email ID & Website
announcements.detail: Communication to Shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Haleos Labs Ltd (formerly SMS Lifesciences India Limited), has updated its official email IDs and website. The new email addresses are info@haleoslabs.com and cs@haleoslabs.com, and the new website is www.haleoslabs.com. These changes are a consequence of the company's name change. Haleos Labs Ltd has also dispatched communications to its physical shareholders on March 30, 2026, informing them about these updates. The company's Corporate Identification Number (CIN) and other identifying details remain unchanged. This update is effective from March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Jigar Cables Ltd - 540651 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - Update On Commencement Of Commercial Prodution.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation regarding update on commencement of commercial production.
announcements.ai_summary: Jigar Cables Ltd has provided an update on the commencement of commercial production at its new manufacturing facility. Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and in reference to their earlier intimation dated December 31, 2025, the company has commenced commercial production of conductors (semi-finished products), which are key components of MVCC, at the new unit. This commencement is effective from March 30, 2026. Full-scale commercial production of MVCC and HT cables is anticipated within the next two to three months, pending operational stabilization and completion of remaining production processes.

announcements.subject: Seamec Ltd - 526807 - Intimation On Deployment Status Of Vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK"
announcements.detail: The status of on hire of Vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK"
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Ltd has provided an update on the deployment status of its vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK". Further to their previous intimation dated March 13, 2026, the company wishes to inform that the vessel "SAMUDRA SEVAK" has been on-hired. The information regarding the vessel being on-hired was received by the company on March 29, 2026, at 02:21 hours. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd
announcements.subject: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd - 543367 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Diversification / Disinvestment
announcements.detail: We wish to inform that PARAS has divested its entire 58.02% equity stake held in its subidiary, Ayatti Innovative Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Limited (PARAS) has divested its entire 58.02% equity stake in its subsidiary, Ayatti Innovative Private Limited (Ayatti). This divestment comprises 15,20,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each, and consequently, Ayatti is no longer a subsidiary of PARAS. The Agreement for Sale was executed on March 30, 2026, with the sale completion also on the same date. PARAS received a total consideration of Rs. 6,99,20,000/- for this transaction. The buyer is Unifab Ultra Technologies LLP, and they do not belong to the promoter/promoter group/group companies. Ayatti contributed 0.32% to PARAS's consolidated turnover and had a negative net worth of Rs. 3,37,45,744.64 during the financial year 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd - 512455 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation of Completion of accquisition of the CHEMAF Group of Companies by Virtus Lloyds Minerals Holding, a step down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited (LMEL) has announced the completion of the acquisition of the CHEMAF Group of Companies by Virtus Lloyds Minerals Holding (VLMH). VLMH is a step-down subsidiary of LMEL, with VLMH holding a 100% equity stake in CHEMAF Group Limited, which includes Chemaf Resources Limited and Chemaf SA. These entities are involved in copper and cobalt mining and processing in the Democratic Republic of Congo. VLMH is a joint venture where LMEL's wholly-owned subsidiary, Lloyds Global Resources FZCO, holds a 49% equity stake, and Virtus Minerals Group, USA, holds the remaining 51%. This acquisition was disclosed on March 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Exxaro Tiles Ltd - 543327 - Announcement Under The Reg 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Reg 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation of the incorporation of the Wholly owned Subsidiary Company named " ARESTA GENERAL TRADING FZE"  in Dubai
announcements.ai_summary: Exxaro Tiles Limited has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary in Dubai named "ARESTA GENERAL TRADING FZE". The incorporation was completed on March 23, 2026, with the license issued on March 30, 2026. The subsidiary has a share capital of AED 1,00,000, consisting of 1000 shares of AED 100 each. Its primary business will be the trading of all types of tiles. As it is a wholly-owned subsidiary, it is considered a related party, and the consideration is cash.

announcements.subject: Bharat Electronics Ltd - 500049 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: BEL receives orders worth Rs.1660 Crore.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has secured new orders totaling Rs. 1660 Crore. These orders were received after the company's last disclosure on March 17, 2026. The significant orders include those for satellite communication networks, electronic warfare systems, communication equipment, avionics, software solutions, munitions, EVMs, strategic components, upgrades, spares, and services. This announcement was made on March 30, 2026, and is considered a press release.

announcements.subject: PTC Industries Ltd - 539006 - Grant Of 13,827 Options Under PTC Employees Stock Option Scheme 2019 ('Scheme')
announcements.detail: As enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: PTC Industries Ltd, through its Compensation Committee meeting held on March 30, 2026, has approved the grant of 13,827 Stock Options under the PTC Employees Stock Option Scheme 2019. These options are convertible into 13,827 equity shares of the Company, each with a face value of Re. 10/-, upon exercise by the eligible employees of the Company and its subsidiary companies. The scheme is in compliance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. This grant is in line with SEBI's master circulars regarding employee stock options.

announcements.subject: Star Cement Ltd - 540575 - Intimation Pursuant To Disclosure Requirement Under Regulation 31A(8)(C) Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ('LODR Regulations')
announcements.detail: Attached herein the Intimation pursuant to disclosure requirement under Regulation 31A(8)(c) of LODR, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Star Cement Ltd has submitted an application to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited on February 10, 2026, seeking no-objection for the reclassification of the Chamaria Group. This reclassification is from the 'Promoter/Promoter Group' category to the 'Public Category' in accordance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This action follows a Board Meeting held on February 06, 2026, where the outcome of this proposed reclassification was discussed. The Chamaria Group, comprising 28 individuals and entities, collectively held a significant number of shares as of December 31, 2025, and their reclassification is subject to regulatory approval.

announcements.subject: Dixon Technologies (India) Ltd - 540699 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR- Approval Received Under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR- Approval received under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS)
announcements.ai_summary: Dixon Technologies (India) Limited announced on March 30, 2026, that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Dixon Display Technologies Private Limited, has received approval under the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS). This approval, granted on March 30, 2026, is for undertaking Display module sub-assembly. The subsidiary plans to scale up capabilities in liquid crystal modules and TFT-LCD modules. This initiative aims to strengthen India's electronics manufacturing ecosystem and advance self-reliance in critical components.

announcements.subject: CRISIL Ltd - 500092 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: CRISIL Ltd has received a TDS proceedings assessment order under sections 201(1) and 201(1A) read with section 195 on March 29, 2026, for the Financial Year 2019-20 (AY 2020-21). The order determines a demand of INR 27.24 Crores for TDS on foreign payments, including interest. This demand is based on previous years' orders on the same issue, against which the company has filed an appeal. CRISIL Ltd intends to file an appeal against this order, and there is no immediate impact on the company's financial, operational, or other activities.

announcements.subject: Tata Chemicals Ltd - 500770 - Press Release - Tata Chemicals' Mithapur Facility Achieves 1 Million Tonnes Soda Ash Production Milestone In FY 2025-26
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed a copy of the Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Chemicals Limited announced that its Mithapur facility in Gujarat has achieved a significant milestone by producing 1 million tonnes of soda ash in the Financial Year 2025-26. This achievement is attributed to the consistent efforts and strong collaboration across various teams, including operations, maintenance, utilities, logistics, procurement, quality, safety, and support functions, as well as the Marketing & Sales teams. The company's Chief Financial Officer highlighted that this milestone reflects disciplined execution, cost optimization, and asset productivity, leading to enhanced margins and long-term value creation. This accomplishment reinforces Tata Chemicals' strong position in the global soda ash industry, emphasizing its focus on efficiency, reliability, and sustainable operations.

announcements.subject: NBCC (India) Ltd - 534309 - Intimation Of Engagement Of NBCC (India) Limited As Project Management Consultant In Republic Of Seychelles For Execution Of Housing And Associated Infrastructure Works
announcements.detail: As per the attached notification
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has been engaged as a Project Management Consultant by the Government of the Republic of Seychelles for the execution of housing and associated infrastructure works. The company has received a Letter of Intent and in-principle agreement for this project, which involves the planning, design, and procurement of 1008 affordable housing units and associated infrastructure, including a sewage treatment plant (STP). The project, valued at USD 75 million, will be funded by EXIM Bank under a Line of Credit (LoC) scheme. This engagement represents a significant international project for NBCC (India) Limited.

announcements.subject: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd - 544080 - Prior Intimation For Sale Of Equity Shares By The Promoter Under Sr. No. 7 (Ii) Of SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/Pod2/P/CIR/2023/18 Dated February 03, 2023 On The Manner Of Achieving Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS)
announcements.detail: Intimation for sale of shares by Promoter, pursuant to the Compliance of MPS Requirements
announcements.ai_summary: Mrs. Anisha Raoof Dhanani, a Promoter of Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd, intends to sell 5,000 equity shares, representing 0.16% of the company's total paid-up share capital. This sale is planned to be completed by March 30, 2026, and is being undertaken to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements. The need to divest shares arises from an increase in the Promoter/Promoter Group's shareholding beyond permissible limits, following an Open Offer initiated by Century 21 Officespace Private Limited and its Persons Acting in Concert (PACs). This action is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 03, 2023, concerning the manner of achieving MPS.

announcements.subject: Aqylon Nexus Ltd - 530943 - Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Intimation About Execution Of Memorandum Of Understanding (Mou) With AITMC Ventures Private Limited
announcements.detail: Disclosure related to execution of MOU with AITMC Ventures Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Aqylon Nexus Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with AITMC Ventures Private Limited to collaborate on a joint AI skilling program across India, with a focus on non-metropolitan areas. The program aims to train youth in AI skills, leveraging Aqylon's AI Code Platform and trained faculty to deliver a structured 3-month course. The objective is to achieve a minimum of 30,000 trained and certified AI professionals annually, with a total capacity of approximately 33,600 candidates. This initiative aligns with national government programs like Digital India and Skill India, enabling trained candidates to pursue roles such as AI Web Designers and AI Content Creators. This MoU outlines a framework for cooperation and does not constitute a legally binding agreement; any definitive agreements will be subject to mutual consent, due diligence, and regulatory compliance.

announcements.subject: Biocon Ltd - 532523 - Intimation Of Change In Name Of Step-Down Subsidiary Of The Company
announcements.detail: Intimation of change in name of step-down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Biocon Ltd has announced a change in the name of its step-down subsidiary, Biosimilar Collaborations Ireland Limited.
