announcements.subject: Mercantile Ventures Ltd - 538942 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Filing of Second motion petition with Hon''ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai
announcements.ai_summary: Mercantile Ventures Limited has filed a Second Motion Petition with the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench. This filing is in connection with the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation of India Radiators Limited (Transferor Company) with Mercantile Ventures Limited (Transferee Company). This follows previous disclosures regarding the scheme dating back to April 08, 2025.

announcements.subject: AI Champdany Industries Ltd - 532806 - Intimation Of Disposal Off Petition By NCLT, Kolkata Bench
announcements.detail: Please find the attachment
announcements.ai_summary: AI Champdany Industries Limited has informed BSE that a petition pending before the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kolkata Bench, has been amicably settled. The NCLT, Kolkata Bench, disposed of the petition as withdrawn via an order dated March 11, 2026, in Original Petition No. 80 (KB) of 2025. All related applications have also been disposed of.

announcements.subject: GTV Engineering Ltd - 539479 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Preferential Issue
announcements.detail: Preferential Issue of Equity Shares (Share Swap - Consideration other than Cash).
announcements.ai_summary: GTV Engineering Ltd's Board of Directors approved a Preferential Issue of Equity Shares, structured as a share swap with consideration other than cash. The Board also approved giving loans, guarantees, or making investments up to Rs. 100 crore, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting took place on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd - 544425 - Regulation 30 LODR - Postal Ballot
announcements.detail: Regulation 30 LODR - Postal Ballot
announcements.ai_summary: AJC Jewel Manufacturers Ltd has issued a notice for a Postal Ballot, in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The notice, along with an explanatory statement, is being sent electronically to eligible members. This action is taken as per Companies Act, 2013 and relevant MCA/SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Unified Data Tech Solutions Ltd - 544406 - Submission Of Media Release Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Submission of Media Release under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR)Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Unified Data-Tech Solutions Limited has been nominated for the 'Best Performing Listed Company' award at the ET MSME Awards 2025. This nomination recognizes the company's performance in the Data Centre Infrastructure and Cloud Sector – System Integration. The announcement was made via a media release submitted to the stock exchange.

announcements.subject: Kamdhenu Ltd - 532741 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosuer of Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Limited's Loan and Investment Committee approved the conversion of an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 10 crore provided to M/s Maa Kudargarhi Steels Private Limited (MKSPL) into 20,000 equity shares. These shares will be issued at a premium of Rs. 4990 each on a private placement basis. The valuation for this conversion was based on a report by Mr. Nitin Goyal.

announcements.subject: Maruti Interior Products Ltd - 543464 - Right Issue Committee Meeting
announcements.detail: Right issue committee meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Maruti Interior Products Ltd has extended the closing date of its ongoing Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 Equity Shares. The Rights Issue closing date has been moved from March 24, 2026, to April 6, 2026. Trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) on the stock exchange will remain suspended as per the earlier schedule.

announcements.subject: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd - 544447 - Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition Of Equity Shares Of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ('The Company') By Promoter.
announcements.detail: Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition of Equity Shares of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ("the company") by Promoter
announcements.ai_summary: SNS Infrarealty LLP, the Promoter of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited, has acquired equity shares of the company from the open market. This acquisition represents less than 2% of the total shareholding or voting rights. The company is voluntarily disclosing this information for transparency, as it does not trigger mandatory disclosure requirements under SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Prabha Energy Ltd - 544379 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: Revised Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held today, i.e. March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Prabha Energy Ltd has issued a corrigendum regarding its Rights Issue Committee Meeting outcome, revising the issue schedule due to a typographical error. The on-market trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) has been extended to March 30, 2026, and the Rights Issue closing date is now April 06, 2026. All other terms of the Rights Issue remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Reganto Enterprises Ltd - 517393 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release
announcements.ai_summary: Reganto Enterprises Limited, formerly Vintron Informatics Limited, has announced a strategic expansion into four new business verticals. These include Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Solutions, IT Systems Integration & Infrastructure, Technology & Corporate Supplies, and Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) Services. This expansion marks a significant transformation for the Delhi-based company with a 35-year legacy.

announcements.subject: Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd - 512441 - Board Meeting Outcome for For Meeting Of The Rights Issue Committee Of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: The Rights Issue Committee in their meeting held today, i.e., Monday March 23, 2026, inter alia, has considered, that the last Date for receipt of applications in the ongoing ''Rights Issue'' of the Company has been extended from Friday, March 27, 2026 to Friday, April 10, 2026. We request you to kindly take this on record.
announcements.ai_summary: The Rights Issue Committee of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited has extended the last date for receiving applications for its ongoing Rights Issue. The deadline has been moved from March 27th, 2026, to April 10th, 2026. Consequently, the last date for renunciation through on-market transfer is now April 7th, 2026.

announcements.subject: Brainbees Solutions Ltd - 544226 - Response To The Volume Movement Letter Issued By BSE Vide E-Mail Dated March 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Response to the volume movement letter issued by BSE vide e-mail dated March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Brainbees Solutions Ltd has responded to a BSE query regarding increased trading volume in its securities. The company stated that all material information has been duly disclosed to the stock exchanges and its website. Brainbees Solutions Ltd believes the volume movement is market-driven and will continue to comply with disclosure obligations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Eris Lifesciences Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'INSPECTION OF SWISS PARENTERALS UNITS 1 AND 2 BY HALMED, CROATIA'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eris Lifesciences Limited has received a list of non-compliance observations from HALMED, the Agency for Medicinal Products and Medical Devices of Croatia, following an inspection of Swiss Parenterals Ltd.’s Unit 1 and Unit 2 in Ahmedabad from March 9th to 13th, 2026. The observations are procedural and relate to achieving compliance with GMP guidelines under Directive (EU) 2017/1572. The company plans to respond to HALMED with corrective and preventive actions (CAPAs) and request a follow-on inspection. The impact on existing business is expected to be minimal, though there may be a delay in the commercialization of the EU-CDMO product pipeline. Eris Lifesciences is committed to maintaining high manufacturing standards and will provide further updates.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Railtel Corporation Of India Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Railtel Corporation of India Ltd. has secured a significant order from the Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai (BMC). The company received a Letter of Acceptance (LoA) for the Provisioning, Configuration, Testing, Commissioning, Operations & Maintenance of Cloud Services for BMC. This domestic customer project has an estimated order size of Rs. 86,36,21,334 (Including Tax). The execution of this order is scheduled to be completed by June 5, 2029. Railtel received the LoA on April 20, 2026, at 12:30 PM.

announcements.company: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates. The provided PDF content consists of a series of numbers and codes, which do not contain specific details regarding financial transactions, corporate actions, or operational updates that can be summarized for an investor. Therefore, no actionable summary can be extracted from the given information.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Copper Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 20, 2026, titled "Press Release issued by Hindustan Copper Ltd regarding Annual Plan Meeting for the Financial Years 2026 27 and 2027 28 ".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL) held its Annual Plan Meeting on April 17-18, 2026, in Kolkata to discuss its strategic growth trajectory for Financial Years 2026-27 and 2027-28. The meeting was attended by top leadership, including Chairman and Managing Director Mr. Sanjiv Kumar Singh, and Directors. A key outcome was the unveiling of HCL's Corporate Plan – Vision 2030, which has undergone a comprehensive review by Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP (DTTILLP). This plan aims to strengthen core operations, prepare for emerging opportunities, and strategically diversify into high-growth sectors, with a strong emphasis on operational excellence, productivity improvements, and modernization of legacy systems.

announcements.subject: Monitoring Agency Report
announcements.detail: Submission of Monitoring Agency Reports for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 by E2E Networks Limited
announcements.ai_summary: E2E Networks Limited has submitted its Monitoring Agency Reports for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, from Care Ratings Limited. These reports pertain to the utilization of proceeds from three fundraising activities: a Preferential Issue of ₹405.66 crore, another Preferential Issue of ₹1,079.28 crore, and a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) issue of ₹107.00 crore. The company is making this information available on its website as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Bajaj Finserv Limited has informed the Exchange about the 'Information pertaining to unlisted Insurance subsidiaries of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finserv Limited has provided information regarding its unlisted insurance subsidiaries, Bajaj General Insurance Limited and Bajaj Life Insurance Limited, for the month of March 2026 and the period up to March 2026. Bajaj General Insurance Limited reported Gross Direct Premium underwritten of ₹1,384.28 crore for March 2026, totaling ₹23,178.51 crore year-to-date. Bajaj Life Insurance Limited reported total new business premiums of ₹2,283.51 crore for March 2026, amounting to ₹14,585.82 crore year-to-date. This information is provisional and subject to a limited review by statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hyundai Motor India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 20, 2026, titled "Hyundai Motor and TVS Motor Formalize Partnership to Drive Electric Three-Wheeler Commercialization in India".
announcements.ai_summary: Hyundai Motor Company and TVS Motor Company have signed a Joint Development Agreement (JDA) on April 20, 2026, to develop and commercialize electric three-wheelers (E3W) for India and other markets. This partnership follows the E3W concept presentation at the Bharat Mobility Global Expo 2025. Hyundai Motor will lead the design and co-develop the E3W, utilizing its R&D expertise and human-centric design approach, while TVS Motor will contribute its advanced electric three-wheeler platform. The agreement aims to address India's last-mile mobility needs and promote sustainable urban transportation. Both companies will share engineering expertise and incorporate their respective strengths into the product development.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: Aequs Limited has informed the Exchange about customer intent to cease to place purchase orders
announcements.ai_summary: Aequs Engineered Plastics Private Limited (AEPPL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Aequs Limited, has received communication from its customer, Hasbro S A, indicating Hasbro's intent to cease placing purchase orders with AEPPL. AEPPL is currently in discussions with Hasbro to address this matter, and the potential impact is being assessed. The Master Supply Agreement was initially executed on March 18, 2016, and amended on May 12, 2023. The company is evaluating future courses of action based on these discussions.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Oil India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 20, 2026, titled "A Major Milestone towards Sustainable Energy Transition".
announcements.ai_summary: Oil India Limited has issued a press release on April 20, 2026, detailing a significant step towards sustainable energy. Its wholly-owned subsidiary, OIL Green Energy Limited (OGEL), has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Numaligarh Refinery Limited (NRL) on April 20, 2026. This collaboration aims to develop, procure, and supply renewable energy, with a focus on group captive requirements. The MoU was signed by representatives from both OGEL and NRL, including their respective General Managers. This initiative aligns with OGEL/OIL's strategy to integrate renewable energy and support Oil India Limited's net zero target by 2040, contributing to India's national net zero emissions goal by 2070.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 read with Para A Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: MedPlus Health Services Limited has reported that its subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, received two suspension orders for drug licenses on April 19, 2026. The first order pertains to a store located at Kodumur New Bus Stand, Andhra Pradesh, with a suspension of seven days, potentially resulting in a revenue loss of Rs 0.88 lacs. This action was taken by the Assistant Director and sales licensing authority, Drug control administration, Kurnool. The second order, issued by the Assistant Director, Drugs Control Administration, Nalgonda, Telangana, suspends the drug license for a store at Miryalaguda Road Bottu Guda, Telangana, for two days, with a potential revenue loss of Rs 0.37 lacs. These suspensions are under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Our Bank has opened 7 new Branches on April 20, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 971 Branches in total.
announcements.ai_summary: City Union Bank Limited has announced the opening of seven new branches on April 20, 2026. Following this expansion, the bank's total branch network now stands at 971 branches. The new branches are located in Eraviputhoor, Poonampalayam, Rettaiyaval Ukkadai, Panchkula, Lawrence Road, Vikaspuri, and Banswara. This expansion is in line with the bank's strategy to increase its geographical reach and customer service points.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Interarch Building Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Interarch Building Solutions Limited has secured a new order from a domestic customer, the name of which cannot be disclosed due to confidentiality. The contract involves the complete design, engineering, manufacturing, supply, and erection of a Pre-Engineered Steel Building System. The order is to be executed within a period of approximately 6 months from the award date. The specific commercial consideration or size of the order is not disclosed in the announcement.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: E2E Networks Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the Audited financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of E2E Networks Limited, in their meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of Rs. 9,564.27 lakhs for the quarter and Rs. 24,558.01 lakhs for the financial year. Other income for the quarter was Rs. 548.28 lakhs and Rs. 3,400.64 lakhs for the financial year. Total expenses for the quarter included Rs. 2,081.05 lakhs for purchase of services and consumables and Rs. 1,236.42 lakhs for employee benefit expenses. The Board also approved a sub-division of equity shares and a postal ballot notice for shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Thomas Cook  (India)  Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 20, 2026, titled "Thomas Cook India & SOTC Travel launch unique Visa Rejection Cover - A first in the Indian Travel & Travel Insurance Industry".
announcements.ai_summary: Thomas Cook (India) Limited and its group company SOTC Travel have launched a unique "Visa Rejection Cover," a first in the Indian Travel & Travel Insurance Industry, as announced in a press release dated April 20, 2026. Underwritten by ICICI Lombard, this insurance solution safeguards travelers from financial losses due to visa rejections for non-immigrant or employment visas. If a visa application is rejected, the company will indemnify the insured for non-recoverable advance payments for accommodation and travel, including applicable official cancellation charges. This cover is available across Group and FIT tours, MICE, and corporate travel businesses.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Praj Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 20, 2026, titled "Praj Matrix Launches Advanced Precision Fermentation Lab, Advancing Next-Generation Industrial Biotechnology for India s BioE3 Vision".
announcements.ai_summary: Praj Industries Limited has announced the launch of an Advanced Precision Fermentation Lab at Praj Matrix on April 20, 2026. This initiative aims to drive next-generation biotechnology and accelerate India's transition to low-carbon biomanufacturing, aligning with the Government of India's BioE3 vision. The lab, described as one of a kind globally, will focus on high-capacity, AI-enabled precision fermentation and next-generation bioprocesses to improve efficiency and reduce scale-up risks. This will enable Praj and its subsidiary, Praj HiPurity Systems, to deliver advanced fermentation solutions to the pharmaceutical, food, cosmetics, biofuels, and beverage sectors. The facility will integrate discovery, process development, and high-purity manufacturing.

announcements.subject: Utilisation of Funds
announcements.detail: Afcons Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange about commercial paper proceeds utilisation certificate for the quarter ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Afcons Infrastructure Limited has submitted a certificate confirming the utilization of proceeds from its Commercial Paper issue for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company certifies that the proceeds have been utilized for the disclosed purpose and that it has adhered to other listing conditions for Commercial Paper as specified by SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025. This certificate is for the information and record of the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sai Parenterals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 20, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Sai Parenterals Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 20, 2026, approved the provision of financial assistance to its wholly-owned subsidiary, Sai Singapore Pte. Ltd. The assistance will be in the form of an unsecured loan not exceeding AUD 1.75 million or SGD 1.610 million, equivalent to INR 11,91,40,000. This loan is for downstream investment in Noumed Pharmaceuticals PTY Limited, Australia, which is a step-down subsidiary of Sai Parenterals Limited. The board meeting commenced at 12:00 Noon and concluded at 02:40 PM.

announcements.subject: Closure of operations
announcements.detail: Rushil Decor Limited has informed the Exchange about Updation on temporary closure of operations at Manufacturing unit, Mansa due to Technological Upgradation.
announcements.ai_summary: Rushil Decor Limited has provided an update on the temporary closure of its RHPL laminate sheet manufacturing unit at Mansa, Gujarat. Operations were initially planned to resume by April 20, 2026, following technological upgradation for a new Thermic Fluid Heater system. However, due to the need for additional civil and incidental works at the RHPL Unit, the commencement of regular production has been extended by approximately 20 days. The Jumbo size laminated sheet manufacturing unit has resumed operations, and other manufacturing units continue to operate normally. The company is taking steps to complete the remaining work at the RHPL Unit as soon as possible.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Quintegra Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Large Coporate'.
announcements.ai_summary: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited has announced a significant operational milestone, becoming the first listed flexible workspace provider in India to surpass 10 million square feet of operational portfolio. This achievement was marked by the operationalization of their new centre at Tata Intellion Park in Mumbai. The company highlights that this growth reflects a structural shift in India's office market, with increasing enterprise demand for managed, campus-led solutions offering scale and consistency. Smartworks positions itself as a national-scale enterprise workspace infrastructure platform, enabling multi-city expansion for businesses with standardized delivery and predictable execution. The company also noted healthy traction at the new Mumbai centre, including the addition of a Forbes 2000 company.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: We are pleased to inform you of our robust sales performance on the auspicious occasion of Akshaya Tritiya (19th April 2026), marking a strong start to Financial Year 2026-27.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported robust sales performance on Akshaya Tritiya, April 19, 2026, marking a strong start to FY 2026-27. The company achieved a revenue of ₹127.27 Million on this occasion, a significant increase from ₹34.63 Million in FY 2025-26, representing a 267.49% year-on-year growth. Two new Exclusive Brand Outlets (EBOs) in Wakad, Pune (opened September 4, 2025) and Paud Road, Pune (opened March 15, 2026) contributed a combined revenue of ₹6.87 Million. As of April 20, 2026, the company operates a total of 36 stores, including 2 EBO/COCO stores and 34 SIS stores. PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited is committed to delivering consistent growth and value to its stakeholders.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about details of Investor Calls
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Energy Solutions Limited has provided details for investor and analyst calls scheduled for April 24, 2026. These calls are intended to discuss the company's audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, as well as the business outlook. The calls will be represented by Mr. Kandarp Patel (CEO), Mr. Kunjal Mehta (CFO), and Mr. Prashant Soni (Head Finance). The conference call is scheduled to begin at 11:00 AM Indian Standard Time. Details for universal access and international toll-free numbers are provided, along with a link for Diamond Pass registration. This announcement follows a previous intimation on April 02, 2026, regarding the Board Meeting for financial results.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: Dredging Corporation of India Limited has confirmed that there were no new allotments of equity shares resulting from the conversion of convertible warrants during the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This statement is made in compliance with Regulation 32(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has submitted this information for record and compliance purposes.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aequs Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Aequs Limited has made a further investment in its wholly owned subsidiary, Aequs Force Consumer Products Private Limited (AFCPPL), through a rights issue. As of March 31, 2025, AFCPPL reported a turnover of ₹21.2 Crore, a loss after tax of ₹21.4 Crore, and a net worth of ₹3.2 Crore. This investment is considered an arm's length transaction as AFCPPL is a wholly owned subsidiary. The company has provided details of this investment as required by SEBI Listing Regulations and a relevant SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026. Investors can find further information on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Integrated Filing- Governance
announcements.detail: Integrated Governance for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tamil Nadu Newsprint & Papers Limited has submitted its integrated governance report for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has confirmed that Annexure I (Part A) regarding the Compliance Report on Corporate Governance and Annexure I (Part B) for the Investor Grievance Redressal Report are applicable. It has also stated that it has not acquired shares or voting rights in any unlisted company during the quarter. Furthermore, there were no instances of imposition of fines or penalties, updates to ongoing tax litigations, or disclosures of loans, guarantees, comfort letters, or securities during the reporting period. The company's risk management committee is not applicable, and its market capitalization is based on the previous financial year.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Orkla India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI(LODR) Regulations, 2015'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Orkla India Limited has announced that its Managing Director & CEO, Mr. Sanjay Sharma, participated in a media interaction with Livemint on Saturday, April 18, 2026. The discussion covered the industry outlook and the company's strategic priorities, including growth initiatives. No Unpublished Price Sensitive Information was disclosed during this interaction. An article detailing the interaction, which touched upon Orkla India's potential acquisitions and focus on convenience foods for growth, was published and is available on the company's website and at the provided link. The company is exploring new growth avenues and is debt-free with a cash-rich balance sheet.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kapston Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015. '.
announcements.ai_summary: Kapston Services Limited has formed a new wholly-owned subsidiary, "KAPSTON HOME SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED" (KHSPL), to enter the Business to Consumer (B2C) Home Services Market Place. KHSPL will offer services including Cleaning, Maid Services, Electrical, Plumbing & Carpentry (EPC), and Beauty & SPA services. The company is developing a technology platform for this venture and will conduct a soft/test/BETA launch on April 19, 2026, in Hyderabad. A commercial launch for Hyderabad is planned for the following month, with expansion to other metro cities scheduled for Financial Year 2026-27. This move signifies Kapston Services Limited's strategic expansion into the B2C segment, aiming to become a dominant e-commerce platform for home services manpower solutions.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Amagi Media Labs Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 19, 2026, titled "Amagi Managed Services Modernizes Broadcasting Operations for AccuWeather®".
announcements.ai_summary: Amagi Media Labs Limited has announced a significant modernization of AccuWeather's broadcasting operations through an expanded engagement. AccuWeather is transitioning from traditional satellite and hardware infrastructure to a unified, cloud-based, internet-driven system managed by Amagi. This new system will handle both linear TV and streaming workflows in a single platform, enhancing efficiency, flexibility, and scalability across various platforms. The transformation, centered at Amagi's Master Control Room (MCR) in Princeton, N.J., integrates AccuWeather's technology stack and managed operations under Amagi's purview. This move aims to provide AccuWeather with enhanced agility and faster channel customization. Amagi's role extends beyond providing cloud playout technology to actively operating, monitoring, and optimizing critical broadcast environments. The entire solution is built on Amagi's tech stack and managed services, ensuring seamless and rapid customizations.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Ahlada Engineers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ahlada Engineers Limited's Management Committee of the Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 18, 2026, approved the incorporation of a subsidiary company in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The proposed subsidiary, which will be a wholly-owned entity of Ahlada Engineers Limited, will focus on the trading, distribution, and marketing of steel products and other allied products, including Steel Doors, Windows, and RO water purifier Systems. The company plans to invest up to AED 1,000,000 in cash in one or more tranches, with shares subscribed at par value as per Dubai laws. The incorporation is subject to approvals from FEMA, RBI, and UAE authorities. This move aims to expand Ahlada Engineers Limited's presence in the Middle East market, enhance exports, and improve customer proximity. The company will hold at least 76% of the subsidiary's shareholding at all times.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Network18 Media & Investments Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Network18 Media & Investments Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 18, 2026. The Board approved the Audited Financial Results, both standalone and consolidated, for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting commenced at 12:00 Noon and concluded at 12:50 p.m. The company has submitted these results along with the Auditors' Reports from Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, who issued an unmodified opinion. The audited financial results will be available on the company's website at https://www.nw18.com/network18/finance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sumit Woods Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sumit Woods Limited has received trading approval from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) for 25,90,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were issued on a preferential basis through the conversion of warrants. The trading approval letter, bearing reference number NSE/LIST/54470, was dated April 17, 2026. The equity shares are listed and admitted to dealings on the Exchange from April 20, 2026. The distinctive numbers for these shares range from 45268754 to 47858753. Lock-in details for these shares are mentioned in Annexure I, which is not provided here.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Piramal Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about filing of Company Scheme Application with the Honorable NCLT, Mumbai Bench on 18th April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Finance Limited (formerly Piramal Capital & Housing Finance Limited) and its transferor companies, Piramal Corporate Tower Private Limited, Piramal Agastya Offices Private Limited, and DHFL Investments Limited, have filed a Company Scheme Application with the Honorable National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench on April 18, 2026. This filing is in relation to a scheme of amalgamation amongst these entities under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. This action follows their earlier intimation dated March 27, 2026, regarding the proposed amalgamation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Coforge Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Limited has announced the declaration of the Commercial Operation Date (COD) for a capacity of 87.50 MW Solar power out of a total installed capacity of 150 MW Solar Project located in Rajasthan. This project is undertaken by a group company of NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), and the COD is effective from April 19, 2026. Following this development, the total installed capacity of the NTPC group now stands at 89,615 MW, with a commercial capacity of 88,535 MW.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Amendment to AOA/MOA
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Amendment to AOA/MOA of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited is filing a revised disclosure regarding proposed amendments to its Memorandum of Association (MOA) and Articles of Association (AOA). This follows an earlier intimation on April 16, 2026, where the Board of Directors approved these amendments subject to member approval. Additional inputs and suggestions from certain Directors concerning the proposed amendments to the Object Clause of the MOA have been incorporated for enhanced clarity and good governance. This revised intimation supersedes the corresponding disclosures in the original intimation for matters listed in Annexure A, while all other contents, including those pertaining to the AOA, remain unchanged. The company is making this revised filing to ensure completeness and accuracy of information provided to the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: NTPC Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited has announced that a capacity of 87.50 MW Solar out of the total installed capacity of 150 MW Solar Project located in Rajasthan has been declared on Commercial Operation. This project is part of Project Eleven Renewable Power Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of ONGC NTPC Green Private Limited, which is a joint venture. This declaration of commercial operation is effective from April 19, 2026. Following this addition, the total commercial capacity of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group has increased from 10,276.40 MW to 10,363.90 MW. The company has informed the exchange about this development as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, we are hereby informing the exchange regarding an update on hearing of the joint first motion application bearing no. CA(CAA)/11/Chd/Pb/2026 held on 17 April 2026, filed in relation to scheme of amalgamation between the Company and AmberPR Technoplast India Private Limited, the Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company, wherein the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal has reserved the order in the application.
announcements.ai_summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited has provided an update on the amalgamation scheme with its wholly-owned subsidiary, AmberPR Technoplast India Private Limited. The joint first motion application, bearing number CA(CAA)/11/Chd/Pb/2026, was heard by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chandigarh Bench, on April 17, 2026. Following the hearing, the Tribunal has reserved its order on the application. The company will inform the exchanges once the order is pronounced. This update is in furtherance to previous intimations dated October 22, 2024, and May 17, 2025, regarding the scheme of amalgamation under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.detail: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Rumour Verification - Regulation 30(11)
announcements.ai_summary: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the stock exchanges regarding a Material Price Movement (MPM) observed in its scrip on April 17, 2026, at 12:26 p.m. The company stated that it could not ascertain any specific event or information in the mainstream media that would have triggered this price movement. This disclosure is made for the information of the exchange, its members, and the public.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 17, 2026, titled "Press Release of Financial Results for Quarter 3 (Q3) of Financial Year 2025-26.".
announcements.ai_summary: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited announced its financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025, via a press release dated April 17, 2026. For the third quarter (Q3) of FY26, the company reported a 15% year-on-year (YoY) growth in revenue to INR 571.2 crores and a significant 94% YoY growth in Profit After Tax (PAT) to INR 34.7 crores. For the nine months of FY26 (9MFY26), revenue grew by 12% YoY to INR 1,592.5 crores, and PAT increased by 70.9% YoY to INR 83.3 crores. The company also highlighted the successful completion of its IPO, raising INR 440 crores.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Blue Blends (I) Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the Quarter and Nine months ended December 31, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Blue Blends (I) Limited's Board of Directors met on April 17, 2026, and approved the Unaudited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Statements for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, and the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025. Additionally, the Board approved the Unaudited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. These financial statements were provided by the company's Statutory Auditors, M/s. Shabbir & Rita Associates LLP. The meeting commenced at 04:00 P.M. and concluded at 04:30 P.M. at the company's Registered Office.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: JSW Steel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 17, 2026, titled "JSW Steel Named 2026 'Sustainability Champion' by the World Steel Association".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: JSW Steel Limited has been recognized as a 'Sustainability Champion' by the World Steel Association (worldsteel) for the eighth consecutive year, as announced in a press release dated April 17, 2026. This prestigious award honours companies demonstrating a strong and consistent commitment to sustainable development, meeting criteria across environmental, social, governance, and economic (ESGE) dimensions. To qualify, companies must provide verifiable evidence of meeting 20 criteria, submit Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) data for over 60% of their crude steel production, and have received formal industry recognition. Jayant Acharya, Joint Managing Director and CEO of JSW Steel, stated that this recognition underscores sustainability's integration into the company's business strategy and its role in long-term competitiveness.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hardwyn India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 17, 2026, titled "Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosures Requirement) Regulations, 2015. ( Listing Regulations ) We hereby inform you that the company has received purchase orders from the projects as mentioned in attachment.".
announcements.ai_summary: Hardwyn India Limited has received multiple purchase orders for its ISI-Certified floor springs from prestigious projects. These orders include 600 units for CM House in Chhattisgarh, 240 units for Baba Raghav Das Medical College in Gorakhpur, 310 units for UP Medical College in Gajipur, 460 units for UP Medical College in Sidharth Nagar, 180 units for UP Medical College in Pilibhit, and 255 units for Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University (CSJMU) in Kanpur. The company's floor springs are designed for reliable glass door control and are manufactured to meet safety standards for commercial and high-traffic applications.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Aurobindo Pharma Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 17, 2026, titled "Aurobindo Pharma receives USFDA approval for Dextromethorphan Polistirex Extended-Release Oral Suspension, 30 mg/5 mL (OTC)".
announcements.ai_summary: Aurobindo Pharma Limited has announced that it has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Dextromethorphan Polistirex Extended-Release Oral Suspension, 30 mg/5 mL (OTC). This product is bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to Delsym Extended-Release Oral Suspension, 30 mg/5 mL, of RB Health (US) LLC. The product will be manufactured at Unit-IV of APL Healthcare Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary, and is slated for launch in Q2FY27. The estimated market size for this product was US$ 138 million for the twelve months ending February 2026. Aurobindo Pharma now holds a total of 580 ANDA approvals from the USFDA, comprising 557 final and 23 tentative approvals.

announcements.subject: Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation for execution of Shareholders Agreement
announcements.ai_summary: VA Tech Wabag Limited has executed a Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement on April 17, 2026, with Nimble Vision Private Limited, its Promoters, Other Investors, and Existing Shareholders. This agreement is to record the terms of investment and to regulate the relationship between Nimble Vision, its Promoters, and the Investors, including their inter se rights and obligations concerning management. This follows a previous press release dated November 12, 2025, regarding WABAG's investment in Nimble Vision to advance indigenous deep-tech solutions for water conservation and automation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Popular Vehicles and Services Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Popular Vehicles and Services Limited, has provided a business update for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026. Total Revenue from Operations saw a significant year-on-year growth of 69% in Q4FY26 and 15% for FY26. New Vehicle Volume Sales increased by 44% in Q4FY26 and 21% for FY26. The company experienced strong volume performance across most categories, aided by GST reforms and improved market sentiment, though a cyber-attack impacted the luxury segment in Q4FY26. New vehicle inventory days have reduced to approximately 29 days from 41 days previously, nearing the industry average. Expansion and acquisition activities have led to higher debt levels compared to the prior period.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: NIIT Learning Systems Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 17, 2026, titled "NIIT MTS Ranked Among Training Industry s Top 20 Staffing and Temporary Resources Companies, 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: NIIT Learning Systems Limited has announced that its division, NIIT Managed Training Services (NIIT MTS), has been recognized as one of the Top 20 Companies in Staffing and Temporary Resources for 2026 by Training Industry, Inc. This recognition, detailed in a press release dated April 17, 2026, highlights NIIT MTS's significant contributions to the corporate training marketplace by providing essential staffing and temporary resources. The selection criteria included the scope and quality of services, market presence, innovation, client portfolio strength, and business performance. This acknowledgment underscores NIIT MTS's role in supporting organizations with agile talent strategies for their learning and development needs.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shadowfax Technologies Limited is acquiring the remaining and last tranche of equity shares of Criticalog India Private Limited (CIPL) from the Founders of CIPL. This acquisition will result in CIPL becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Shadowfax Technologies Limited. Previously, as of January 22, 2026, Shadowfax had acquired 6,716 CIPL Equity Shares (72.31% of equity) and 15,417 CIPL Preference Shares (100% of preference shares), representing 89.59% of CIPL's total shareholding on a fully diluted basis, for a consideration of ₹ 481.55 million. The current acquisition is in accordance with the share purchase agreement dated November 22, 2024.

announcements.subject: Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.detail: JSW Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about Joint Venture Agreement between JSW Steel Limited and POSCO Group through which Saffron Resources Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company would become a 50:50 Joint Venture between the Company and POSCO Group
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of JSW Steel Limited, at a meeting held on April 17, 2026, approved entering into a Share Subscription and Joint Venture Agreement with POSCO Co., Ltd and POSCO-India Private Limited. Through this agreement, Saffron Resources Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of JSW Steel, will become a 50:50 joint venture with POSCO Group. This joint venture aims to establish a greenfield integrated steel plant with a capacity of 6 MTPA in Odisha. Saffron Resources Private Limited possesses 887 acres of land in Odisha, which will be utilized for the proposed plant. The agreement details are annexed as per SEBI Master Circular and are also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Solex Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Share Purchase Agreement between the existing shareholders being the promoters of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Solex Energy Limited's promoters have entered into twelve Share Purchase Agreements (SPAs) on April 17, 2026, for an inter-se transfer of equity shares. Specifically, Dr. Chetan Shah will acquire 1.05% of the company's shares from Mr. Arunkumar Patodia. This transaction is an internal re-alignment of shareholding within the promoter group and does not impact the company's business operations or financial position. The agreements are between existing promoters of the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Honda India Power Products Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Honda India Power Products Limited organized its Annual Supplier Meet on April 17, 2026. This event served as a strategic platform for the company to celebrate past achievements and for its leadership to unveil the roadmap for the upcoming year. The company has informed the stock exchanges about this general update.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Agi Infra Limited has informed the Exchange about Obtaining Licence for the Project "AGI Green Crest"
announcements.ai_summary: Agi Infra Limited has received a license from the Jalandhar Development Authority (JDA) for its group housing project, 'AGI Green Crest', located in Jalandhar. The license, bearing number JDA-2026/115, was dated March 30, 2026, and received by the company on April 16, 2026. The project comprises 452 flats, including 3BHK and 2BHK units, along with planned amenities. This approval is expected to enable the company to increase its revenue and profits from the sale of flats. The company has provided details as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and the relevant SEBI circular.

announcements.subject: Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate governance - within 21 days from the end of the quarter
announcements.detail: Cura Technologies Limited has informed regarding Submission of the Non-Applicability of Compliance Report on Corporate Governance for the Quarter ended 31.03.2026 FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Cura Technologies Limited has declared that it is not required to submit the Corporate Governance Compliance Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This is due to the company's paid-up share capital of Rs. 915 Lakhs and net worth of Rs. 711.84 Lakhs, which are below the limits prescribed under Regulation 15(2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, as of March 31, 2025. Therefore, the company is exempt from the provisions of Regulation 27(2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Cura Technologies Limited undertakes to comply with these regulations within six months from the date they become applicable. A certificate from a Practicing Company Secretary confirming this non-applicability has been enclosed.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Bharat Gears Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015'. We refer to our letter dated January 23, 2026 wherein, pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (the Regulations), we informed you that at the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company held on January 23, 2026, the Board considered the legal opinion and opined that the power to determine the citizenship status of Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar, Chairman and Managing Director of the Company vests exclusively with the Central Government and, accordingly, concluded that until any direction or order is issued by the Central Government in respect of his citizenship status, the citizenship status of Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar, Chairman and Managing Director of the Company, continues to remain unchanged and he shall be regarded as a citizen of India. Thus, he shall continue to discharge his responsibilities as Chairman and Managing Director.This is to further inform you that the Board members have received an intimation from Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar, Chairman and Managing Director of the Company vide his e-mail dated April 16, 2026 that he has received a communication from the Regional Passport Office regarding the revocation of his passport, with a right of appeal to the Central Passport Office. Acting on legal advice, he has promptly filed an appeal on April 15, 2026 before the competent authority at the Central Passport Office, seeking (i) a stay of the revocation during the pendency of the appeal and (ii) quashing of the revocation order.Mr. Kanwar has further clarified that as he concludes that the Central Passport Office is the authority empowered to adjudicate the revocation, he has immediately informed the Board at this substantive juncture i.e., upon filing the appeal.Mr. Kanwar has reiterated that the determination of his citizenship status lies exclusively with the Central Government (Ministry of Home Affairs) and the Board of Directors of the Company duly noted this position at its meeting held on January 23, 2026, after considering the independent legal opinion. Separately, he has also written to the Secretaries of the Ministry of Home Affairs and the Ministry of External Affairs vide his letter dated March 30, 2026 (through Speed Post on April 04, 2026), seeking clarification on his citizenship status, to which reply is still awaited.Mr. Kanwar has also assured that he remains fully mindful of his fiduciary duties and will continue to keep the Board promptly informed of any material developments and advised that the statutory authorities be informed accordingly in a fair and transparent manner.The Company will keep you informed of any material developments in this matter, as and when required, in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.You are requested to kindly take the same on record.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Gears Limited provided an update regarding the citizenship status of its Chairman and Managing Director, Mr. Surinder Paul Kanwar. Following a communication from the Regional Passport Office regarding the revocation of his passport, Mr. Kanwar filed an appeal on April 15, 2026, seeking a stay and quashing of the revocation order. He has reiterated that the determination of his citizenship status rests exclusively with the Central Government. Mr. Kanwar has also written to the Ministry of Home Affairs and Ministry of External Affairs for clarification, with a reply still awaited. He assured the board of his continued commitment to his fiduciary duties and will keep them informed of material developments.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Kolte - Patil Developers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 16, 2026, titled "Operational Update for Q4 & FY26".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Kolte-Patil Developers Limited has released an operational update for Q4 and FY26, reporting sales of Rs. 714 crore for Q4 FY26, a 13% year-on-year increase. Quarterly collections reached a record Rs. 834 crore, up 18% year-on-year. For the full fiscal year 2026, annual sales stood at Rs. 2,605 crore, with record annual collections of Rs. 2,689 crore, an 11% increase. The company also reported a record average price realization of Rs. 9,601 per sq. ft. in Q4 FY26, a 21% year-on-year rise, and Rs. 8,314 per sq. ft. for FY26, up 7% year-on-year. Project launches for Q4 FY26 covered approximately 1 million sq. ft., and for FY26, around 4.6 million sq. ft.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: KPI Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Press Release titled KPI Green Energy Receives Inter-State Power Trading Licence from CERC, Enabling Pan-India Market Participation'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: KPI Green Energy Limited has received an Inter-State Power Trading Licence (Category IV) from the Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC). This license complements the existing intra-state power trading license from the Gujarat Electricity Regulatory Commission (GERC). The combined approvals enable KPI Green Energy to participate in pan-India power trading, establishing a comprehensive platform. This strategic move allows the company to access demand centers across multiple states, dynamically allocate power based on market conditions for improved realisations, and engage with a wider spectrum of customers.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Dcx Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: DCX Systems Limited has secured new purchase orders totaling approximately INR 9.30 Crores in the normal course of business. The order is from IAI-ELTA Systems Limited, Israel, for the manufacture and supply of a Transmitter Receiver Module. This order is a standard business transaction for the company.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: SANCTION OF COMPOSITE SCHEME OF AMALGAMATION OF VELOTIO TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED AND SCALEWORX TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED WITH R SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL LIMITED
announcements.ai_summary: R Systems International Limited announced that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi Bench, has sanctioned the composite scheme of amalgamation of Velotio Technologies Private Limited and Scaleworx Technologies Private Limited with R Systems International Limited. This sanction, effective from April 16, 2026, is pursuant to Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The amalgamation scheme will become effective upon the fulfillment of conditions specified in Clause 22 of the scheme. The certified copy of the NCLT's order is awaited, and the order is accessible on the NCLT website and the company's website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Pennar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Pennar Industries Limited has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, from Bandhan Mutual Fund. On April 13, 2026, Bandhan Mutual Fund, through its scheme Bandhan Small Cap Fund, acquired equity shares of Pennar Industries Limited, increasing its holding by 0.0889%. This acquisition brings Bandhan Mutual Fund's total holding in the company to 5.0469% of the paid-up capital/voting rights. The disclosure has been submitted to the stock exchanges and uploaded on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Firstsource Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 16, 2026, titled "Firstsource Launches Kairos   The Operating System Powering Intelligence That Operates".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Firstsource Solutions Limited has issued a press release on April 16, 2026, announcing the launch of "Kairos — The Operating System Powering Intelligence That Operates." Kairos is described as an embedded intelligence engine designed to build and operate agentic workflows across enterprise transformation. The company highlights that the gap in operational performance between enterprises successfully leveraging AI and those still struggling has reached 540 basis points and is widening. Firstsource Solutions, an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, states that Kairos integrates within existing operations to run agentic workflows end-to-end and is accountable for outcomes, having been tested internally before market release.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Garware Hi-Tech Films Limited has informed the Exchange about Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Garware Hi-Tech Films Limited has submitted an intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, regarding a communication received from SEBI. The company received a letter from SEBI dated April 08, 2026, which was communicated via email from the National Stock Exchange (NSE) on April 15, 2026, at 19:03 (IST). The details of the material contents of this communication from SEBI are being provided in compliance with the regulations. The company has also made this information available on its website at https://www.garwarehitechfilms.com/.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Aqylon Nexus Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Aqylon Nexus Limited announced the revised outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 11, 2026, where the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, were approved. The Board also approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company (100% ownership) in Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority, United Arab Emirates (UAE), to be named M/s Aqylon Nexus Holding LLC or a similar approved name. This strategic move is driven by the significant growth and market demand for the company's AI Technology Products and Services. Mr. Kiran Kumar Inampudi (DIN:01024343), Director, has been authorized to undertake all necessary steps for this subsidiary incorporation. The company also submitted its Statement of Assets and Liabilities and Cash Flow Statement for the year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor's Report and a declaration of unmodified opinion.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited has informed the stock exchange that actions have been initiated or orders have been passed concerning the company. Further details regarding the specific actions or orders are not provided in this announcement. Investors should monitor future announcements for clarification on the nature and impact of these developments.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Intellect Design Arena Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 16, 2026, titled "OnCost, Kuwait Transforms retail operation by adopting eMACH.ai Retail 6DX platform across its Strategic Branches".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Intellect Design Arena Limited has announced that OnCost, a leading FMCG retailer in Kuwait, has digitally transformed its retail operations by adopting the eMACH.ai Retail 6DX platform across its strategic branches. This AI-First in-store retail platform has been deployed to enhance customer experience and move away from restrictive legacy infrastructure to a cloud-native, microservices-led architecture. The adoption of eMACH.ai Retail 6DX provides OnCost with seamless omnichannel integration and precision inventory management, enabling real-time visibility of sales and stock levels. This transformation aims to create a hyperlocal retail ecosystem tailored to the unique demands of the Kuwait market.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange that Shri Sanjay Khanna, Chairman & Managing Director, has been entrusted with the additional charge of Director (Refineries). This additional responsibility was assigned by the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas through a letter dated April 16, 2026. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: Globe International Carriers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Monthly Business Updates for the month of April 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Globe International Carriers Limited has informed the Exchange that its subsidiary, Govind Kripa Infratech Private Limited, has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with OPO Hotels & Resorts, New Delhi. This MOU is for the operation and management of an upscale hotel property, "OPO Premier Marvel," located at Ajmer Road, Mahindra World City SEZ, Jaipur. The hotel will feature 56 rooms and aims to cater to business travelers and corporate clients, with amenities including an all-day dining restaurant, banqueting facilities, a gym, spa, and swimming pool. This strategic move diversifies the subsidiary's business portfolio and expands into the hospitality sector with scalable growth opportunities, aiming to create long-term value from the current financial year onwards.

announcements.subject: Arrangements for strategic, technical, manufacturing, or marketing tie up
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about Strategic collaboration with Tonino Lamborghini
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has entered into a strategic collaboration with the Italian lifestyle brand Tonino Lamborghini to develop a premium residential project in Sector 71, Gurugram. This collaboration involves a license agreement for branding the residences in the landmark project. The agreement is domestic in nature and does not involve a share exchange ratio or JV ratio. The scope of the business operation is focused on branding the residences by Tonino Lamborghini. This strategic partnership aims to leverage the iconic Italian brand for a premium residential offering in Gurugram.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited has announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 16, 2026. The Board approved the un-audited standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. These results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards (IND AS). The results for the nine-month period have undergone a limited review by the Statutory Auditor, Pramod K. Sharma & Co., who issued an unmodified conclusion. The company also assessed the impact of the New Labour Codes, which became effective from November 21, 2025, and concluded that there is no material incremental impact on its gratuity obligations, though it continues to evaluate the impact on contract workforce.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 16, 2026, titled "ABD Maestro Wins  Distiller of the Year  at the 15th Icons of Whisky India Awards 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has announced that its subsidiary, ABD Maestro Private Limited, has won the 'Distiller of the Year' award at the 15th Icons of Whisky India Awards 2026. This accolade marks ABD Maestro's first anniversary and its establishment of a portfolio of ten brands. The company's brand ARTHAUS Blended Malt Scotch also received the 'Campaign Innovator of the Year' award. The Icons of Whisky Awards are considered a respected global benchmark for innovation, craftsmanship, and leadership in the alcobev production industry. ABD Maestro was the only Indian company to receive the 'Distiller of the Year' honor, standing alongside six other international players. This recognition highlights the growing appetite among Indian consumers for premium, globally benchmarked spirits.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Enviro Infra Engineers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 16, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Enviro Infra Engineers Limited has announced a significant strengthening of its order book, increasing it by ₹2,240 crore since March 2026, with a clear two-year execution visibility. The company's current order book stands at over ₹4,600 crore, comprising more than ₹2,500 crore in the Water and Waste Water Treatment Segment, over ₹1,000 crore in the Renewable Segment, and over ₹1,100 crore in the O&M Order Book. This robust order book provides revenue visibility of approximately ₹2,000 crore in FY 2027. The company has secured new orders aggregating to over ₹2,240 crore, including ₹1,170 crore from water and wastewater and over ₹1,070 crore from renewable energy. A key development is the entry into the Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) segment with four projects from NTPC worth ₹1,070 crore, totaling 930 MWh, to be implemented across Uttar Pradesh, Assam, Karnataka, and Telangana. In the water treatment segment, the company secured a ₹411 crore project from Bihar Urban Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited AMRUT 2.0 in Aurangabad, Bihar, and two projects worth approximately ₹972 crore under the Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) 2.0 in Pune and Nashik, Maharashtra.

announcements.company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited
announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Issuance of Parent Company Guarantee
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited has issued a Parent Company Guarantee (PCG) to Nedbank Limited for an amount of USD 34 million, equivalent to approximately INR 317 Crore. This guarantee serves as security for an additional non-fund based working capital facility availed by Sterling and Wilson Engineering (Pty) Ltd., a step-down subsidiary, for solar power projects in South Africa. The PCG is valid until November 11, 2032. The promoter and promoter group do not have any direct or indirect interest in this transaction, and the guarantee is provided at an arm's length.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: LEEL Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under Regulation 76 of SEBI (Depositories & Participants) Regulations, 2018'.
announcements.ai_summary: The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Allahabad Bench, by its order dated March 21, 2024, approved the sale of LEEL Electricals Limited as a going concern to Krishna Ventures Limited (KVL), the Acquirer. The Sale Certificate was issued on June 12, 2024. KVL initiated the takeover process, and the new management was inducted on July 1, 2024. As part of capital restructuring post-acquisition, the Board of Directors, in its meeting on December 24, 2024, approved the cancellation and extinguishment of the existing equity share capital. This means the entire shareholding of the erstwhile Promoters/Promoters Group will be reduced to zero without any payout. Additionally, the shareholding of existing public shareholders will be reduced to 1 (ONE) equity share for every 43 (FORTY-THREE) shares held.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Tulsi Extrusions Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Tulsi Extrusions Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 15, 2026, during which the Unaudited Standalone Financial Results for the Quarter and Half year ended September 30, 2025, were approved. The meeting commenced at 05:00 P.M. and concluded at 05:40 P.M. The company also submitted the Limited Review Report from M/s K R A & CO., Chartered Accountants. Additionally, the company provided a clarification regarding the late submission of these financial results, attributing the delay to regulatory and procedural constraints stemming from its earlier insolvency and liquidation proceedings, which concluded in December 2021.

A copy of the company's Master Data from the MCA (V3 Portal) is enclosed for reference. The company's registered office is located at B1/51, Janakpuri, New Delhi-110058.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Tata Communications Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Communications Limited has issued and allotted Commercial Paper aggregating to ₹400 crore on April 13, 2026. The Commercial Paper has a face value of ₹5,00,000/- per security and a discount rate of 6.70% per annum. The redemption date for this Commercial Paper is June 15, 2026. The ISIN for this issuance is INE151A14271. This Commercial Paper has been listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: One 97 Communications Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)Regulations, 2015   Paytm is now an Indian Owned and Controlled Company ("IOCC").
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: One 97 Communications Limited, operating the brand Paytm, has officially become an Indian Owned and Controlled Company (IOCC). This change is confirmed by the shareholding pattern filed for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY26), where domestic investors hold 50.3% of the company's equity share capital. Domestic institutional ownership increased to 23.1% in Q4 FY26 from 20.3% in Q3 FY26 and 14.0% in Q4 FY25. Indian mutual funds now hold 16.6% of the shares, up from 14.3% in the previous quarter, with 41 mutual funds invested. Domestic insurance companies also increased their stake to 5.1% in Q4 FY26, indicating growing participation of domestic capital. This disclosure was made on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: SRM Contractors Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging of Contract
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: SRM Contractors Limited has announced the bagging of new contracts totaling Rs. 168 Crores. Specifically, the company secured a contract worth Rs. 128 Crores from the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) for the construction of long-term remedial measures for identified landslide locations on NH-03 in Himachal Pradesh. This project is to be executed on an EPC mode and has a time period of 12 months from the appointed date. The company has confirmed that the awarding entity is domestic and that its promoters have no interest in NHAI. The announcement was made on April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: Integrated Filing- Governance
announcements.detail: CERTIFICATE OF NON-APPLICABILITY OF REGULATION 27 OF SEBI (LISTING OBLIGATIONS AND DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS) REGULATIONS, 2015 FOR THE QUARTER AND FINANCIAL YEAR ENDED ON MARCH 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: IMP Powers Limited has submitted a certificate confirming the non-applicability of Regulation 27 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This exemption is due to the company's paid-up equity share capital being below Rupees Ten Crore (Rs. 10,00,00,000/-) and its net worth being below Rupees Twenty-Five Crore (Rs. 25,00,00,000/-) as of the last day of the previous three financial years. Consequently, compliance with specific corporate governance provisions outlined in regulations 17 through 27, among others, is not required for the said period. The certificate has been duly signed by the Director of the Company and a Practicing Company Secretary.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Tembo Global Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 15, 2026, titled "Tembo Global Industries  Subsidiary Secures Government Licence for Ammunition Manufacturing".
announcements.ai_summary: Tembo Global Industries Limited announced that its subsidiary, Tembo Classic Engineering Private Limited (TCEPL), has secured a crucial government licence from the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India. This licence authorizes TCEPL to manufacture ammunition of various calibers, marking a significant entry into the defence and security manufacturing sector. The company, formerly known as Tembo Defence Products Private Limited, is now positioned to commence commercial production as per its schedule. This development aligns with India's 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' and 'Make in India' initiatives, aiming to boost self-reliance in defence manufacturing. The Managing Director, Mr. Sanjay J. Patel, highlighted this as a landmark achievement that strengthens the company's commitment to supporting national self-reliance and creating opportunities in both domestic and global defence markets.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Marine Electricals (India) Limited has announced the inauguration and operationalization of its new plant located at Industrial Premises, Plot No. 627, GIDC Savli, Manjusar, Vadodara, Gujarat – 391775. All necessary compliances for the facility have been completed, and it is now fully operational as of April 15, 2026. The leased facility spans approximately 51,000 square feet, significantly enhancing the company's manufacturing capabilities by providing an additional 25% assembly shopfloor space. This expansion is intended to cater to increased customer demand and ensure timely product delivery. The company is providing this intimation as part of good corporate governance.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: GAIL (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 15, 2026, titled ""GAIL to invest Rs. 3800 crore in 700 MW Solar Power Projects in UP and Maharashtra"".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: GAIL (India) Limited has approved the establishment of 700 MW of solar power projects with an investment of Rs 3800 crore in Uttar Pradesh and Maharashtra. The project in Uttar Pradesh includes a 600 MW Solar Power Project and a 550 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) at TUSCO Solar Park Jhansi, primarily for the captive energy needs of GAIL’s Petrochemical Plant at Pata. Additionally, a 100 MW Solar Power Project with a 22 MWh BESS will be set up in Chhatrapati Sambhaji Nagar district, Maharashtra, to serve the captive requirements of GAIL’s PDH-PP Plant at Usar. These projects, announced on April 14, 2026, are crucial for GAIL's Net Zero targets and India's energy transition goals, with the BESS ensuring efficient solar power utilization. Upon commissioning, GAIL's renewable energy capacity will increase to over 1,000 MW from the current 147 MW.

announcements.subject: Updates
