announcements.detail: Tembo Global Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that Tembo Classic Engineering Private Limited, a subsidiary of Tembo Global Industries Limited, has been granted Licence by the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, for the manufacture of ammunition of various calibers.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tembo Global Industries Limited announced that its subsidiary, Tembo Classic Engineering Private Limited (TCEPL), has been granted a licence by the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, for the manufacture of ammunition of various calibers. This licence authorizes TCEPL to undertake manufacturing activities in accordance with specified terms and conditions and applicable regulatory frameworks. This development is a significant milestone for the Tembo Group, expected to strengthen its presence in the defence and security manufacturing sector. TCEPL is poised to commence commercial production for arms and ammunitions as per schedule.

announcements.subject: Press Release (Revised)
announcements.detail: One Point One Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a revised press release dated April 15, 2026, titled "Intimation of Press Release regarding Listing of Equity Shares on BSE Limited with effect from April 15, 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: One Point One Solutions Limited announced its equity shares have been listed and admitted for trading on BSE Limited with effect from April 15, 2026, under Scrip Code: 544748. The company will continue to be listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). This dual listing aims to enhance investor accessibility, improve trading liquidity, and expand the company's investor base. The listing on BSE is a significant milestone for the company's growth and capital market presence. There is no change in the company's equity share capital, ISIN, or face value due to this dual listing.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Wipro Limited has informed the Exchange that Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and para 202.05 read with para 202.06 of the NYSE Listed Company Manual, that Wipro Limited, through its subsidiaries has signed a definitive agreement on April 14, 2026 to acquire select customer contracts of Alpha Net Consulting LLC and its subsidiaries.
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited, through its subsidiaries, has signed a definitive agreement on April 14, 2026, to acquire select customer contracts of Alpha Net Consulting LLC and its subsidiaries. This business acquisition is intended to enhance Wipro’s existing AI-powered and Consulting-led application services capabilities, driving new growth opportunities by providing access to key clientele, their customer contracts, and related workforce. The transaction is structured as a business acquisition, not an entity acquisition, and therefore, percentage of shareholding acquired is not applicable. The consideration for this acquisition is in cash, with a purchase consideration of up to US$ 70.8 Million, subject to customary closing adjustments and includes a deferred consideration in the form of an earnout contingent on achieving certain performance metrics. No government or regulatory approvals are required for this transaction. The acquisition is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 15, 2026, titled "CleanMax Expands Its Footprint in Rajasthan to Decarbonize Industrial Operations; Partners with Sangam India Limited for 30 MWp Solar and 20 MW Wind Hybrid Renewable Project".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited issued a press release on April 15, 2026, announcing its partnership with Sangam India Limited to decarbonize industrial operations in Rajasthan. CleanMax will supply round-the-clock power through a hybrid renewable energy project comprising 30 MWp solar and 20 MW wind power, augmented with a 2 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). As of March 31, 2026, CleanMax has 525 MW of commissioned renewable energy capacity in Rajasthan and approximately 5.7 GW of contracted renewable energy sale capacity nationally, with about 3.1 GW commissioned. This partnership marks a significant expansion for CleanMax in Rajasthan, supporting Sangam India Limited's textile operations.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Oberoi Realty Limited has informed the Exchange about  Scheme of Amalgamation of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty Private Limited ( NLRPL  or  Transferor Company ) with Oberoi Realty Limited ( ORL  or  Transferee Company ) and their respective shareholders ( Scheme ) is made effective from April 14, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Oberoi Realty Limited (ORL) has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Nirmal Lifestyle Realty Private Limited (NLRPL) with Oberoi Realty Limited has been made effective from April 14, 2026. This effectiveness follows the filing of requisite forms with the office of the Registrar of Companies, Mumbai. The amalgamation involves NLRPL as the Transferor Company and ORL as the Transferee Company, along with their respective shareholders. This update is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sree Rayalaseema Hi-Strength Hypo Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Submission of report-special window- March,2026'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shriram Finance Ltd has received listing and trading approval from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for 47,11,21,055 equity shares. These shares were allotted to MUFG Bank Ltd. on a preferential basis, with a face value of Rs.2/- each, issued at a premium of Rs.838.93 per share. The approval follows a Board Meeting held on April 8, 2026, where the allotment was approved via private placement. The shares will be listed and traded on NSE and BSE effective April 13, 2026, and will be subject to lock-in restrictions until October 13, 2026.

announcements.subject: Structural Digital Database
announcements.detail: Structural Digital Database
announcements.ai_summary: Filatex Fashions Ltd has received a No-Objection Certificate from both BSE Limited and NSE Limited for the reclassification of certain promoters to the public category. This reclassification is being undertaken pursuant to Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The promoters to be reclassified are Prashant Kumar Sethia and Rajkumar Sethia, who will no longer be considered part of the Promoter and Promoter Group. This change is subject to the approval of the company's members in a forthcoming meeting. The company has been requested to ensure compliance with subsequent relevant disclosures related to this reclassification.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Affordable Robotic & Automation Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Affordable Robotic & Automation Limited's Share Allotment Committee of the Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 14, 2026, approved the preferential allotment of 6,04,839 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each to M/s. ATRI Energy Transition Private Limited, a non-promoter entity. The aggregate amount for this allotment is Rs. 15,00,00,072/-, with an Issue Price of Rs. 248/- per share, determined in accordance with SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up Equity Share Capital stands at Rs. 11,85,11,050, comprising 1,18,51,105 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each. The meeting took place from 2:30 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. at the company's registered office.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: NHPC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 14, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 14, 2026, approved a proposal for the monetization of future cash flow (Return on Equity) for a period of 10 years in a single tranche during FY 2026-27. This monetization can be applied to Uri-II and Dhauliganga Power Stations or any other power station(s). The meeting commenced at 12:30 P.M. and concluded at 02:00 P.M. This decision follows a previous intimation dated April 09, 2026, and is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Satin Creditcare Network Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Satin Creditcare Network Limited has announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, M/s Satin Growth Alternatives Limited (SGAL), has received a Certificate of Registration dated April 13, 2026, from the Securities Exchange Board of India (SEBI). This registration classifies SGAL as a Category II Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) under the SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012. This development aligns with SGAL's business objectives and is not expected to have a material impact on the financial position of Satin Creditcare Network Limited. The certificate of registration for an AIF is valid until the AIF is wound up.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Bpl Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: BPL Limited has been informed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Kochi, on April 13, 2026, that a creditor has filed an application under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, registered as Case No. KOB C.P. (IB) 10/2026. The company has been granted an opportunity to file its objections, and no further orders have been passed as of the reporting date. The creditor is requesting NCLT to act on a Supreme Court of India order, but BPL Limited's review petition is yet to be listed and heard. The company clarifies that this application is not expected to have any financial or operational impact, and business activities continue as normal.

announcements.subject: Qualified Institutional Placement
announcements.detail: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about qualified Institutional Placement - Allotment
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has announced the allotment of 67,430,883 fully paid-up Equity Shares through a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP). The allotment was approved by the Committee of Directors at a meeting held on April 13, 2026. The issue price for these shares was ₹ 370.75 per Equity Share, which includes a premium of ₹ 368.75 per Equity Share and a discount of ₹ 19.51 per Equity Share (5.00% of the floor price of ₹ 390.26). The total amount raised through this QIP is ₹ 25,000 million. The QIP opened on April 9, 2026, and closed on April 13, 2026. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹1,625,635,316 (812,817,658 Equity Shares) to ₹1,760,497,082 (880,248,541 Equity Shares). The list of allottees who received more than five percent of the offered shares is attached as Annexure A.

announcements.company: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about updates regarding Scheme of Amalgamantion / Merger.
announcements.ai_summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has received an order from the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, dated April 13, 2026, regarding the proposed Scheme of arrangement and amalgamation between Triumph Offshore Private Limited (Transferor Company) and Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited (Transferee Company). The NCLT order directs Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited to convene a meeting of its Equity Shareholders on May 25, 2026. Additionally, the NCLT has dispensed with the requirement of convening meetings for the Equity Shareholders of Triumph Offshore Private Limited, as well as for the Secured and Unsecured Creditors of both companies. This is a continuation of the company's disclosure on November 22, 2024, when the Board of Directors had approved the Scheme, subject to regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Healthcare Global Enterprises Limited (the Company) has informed the Exchange about completion of acquisition of additional 34% shares of Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited (Vizag Hospital). With this acquisition, the Company holds 85% equity share capital of Vizag Hospital.
announcements.ai_summary: Healthcare Global Enterprises Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of an additional 1,93,441 equity shares, representing 34% of the equity share capital, in Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited (Vizag Hospital). This acquisition was made from the Selling Shareholders for a total consideration of INR 154,50,17,135.82. Following this transaction, Healthcare Global Enterprises Limited now holds an aggregate of 85% of the equity share capital of Vizag Hospital. The acquisition is in accordance with the terms of the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders' Agreement (SHA) entered into on June 28, 2024, and subsequently amended on October 1, 2024, and March 29, 2026. This is a subsequent stage of the acquisition contemplated under the SPA.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RSWM Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble High Court of Judicature for Rajasthan at Jodhpur on April 13, 2026. This order disposes of the company's appeal concerning the levy of electricity duty on solar power captive consumption, amounting to Rs. 11.07 crores plus LPS. The company is currently examining the order with its legal counsels to determine the next steps, including a potential further appeal before the appropriate authorities. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Dixon Technologies (India) Limited has informed the Exchange about clarification on media reports concerning labour protest in Noida, Uttar Pradesh.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dixon Technologies (India) Limited has issued a clarification regarding media reports of a labor protest in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, stating that the event is industry-wide and triggered by misinformation. The company confirms its operations remain fully compliant with applicable laws and are not materially impacted. Employee safety and well-being are a top priority, and authorities are coordinating to restore normalcy.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: Amit Spinning Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Girnar Spintex Industries Limited (formerly Amit Spinning Industries Limited) has confirmed that a statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Regulation 32(1) of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 is not applicable for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This is because the company has not undertaken any public issue, rights issue, or preferential issue during this period. The company has requested this confirmation be taken on record by the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Linc Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Linc Limited has made a further investment of ₹5,60,52,350 in its subsidiary, Morris Linc Private Limited, on April 13, 2026. This investment is for the allotment of 56,05,235 equity shares of ₹10 each at par. The proceeds from this issuance will be utilized by Morris Linc for capital expenditure and working capital needs. The promoter of Linc Limited has an interest in Morris Linc Private Limited through their existing shareholding, and this transaction is conducted at arm's length. Morris Linc Private Limited operates in the Writing Instruments industry, with an authorized share capital of ₹12,00,00,000 and a paid-up share capital of ₹43,50,000.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Allotment of 1,76,900 Equity Shares under the Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Limited Employee Stock Option Plan, 2022 '.
announcements.ai_summary: Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the allotment of 1,76,900 Equity Shares of Rs. 2/- each under the Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Limited Employee Stock Option Plan, 2022. This allotment was made by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee to eligible employees upon exercise of vested options. These new shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up share capital has increased from Rs. 13,39,24,500 (6,69,62,250 equity shares) to Rs. 13,42,78,300 (6,71,39,150 equity shares). Details as per SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021 have been attached.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Munjal Showa Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Alkem Laboratories Limited has informed the Exchange about the incorporation of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Dubai, UAE, named ‘Alkem Pharma Trading FZCO’. The authorized and subscribed share capital of this new entity is AED 3,670,000, divided into 3,67,000 Equity Shares of AED 10 each. Alkem Pharma has been established with the objective of exporting the company’s products to African, South East Asian, and non-UAE markets. The incorporation was done through a cash consideration, involving the subscription of 3,67,000 Equity Shares of AED 10 each, amounting to AED 3,670,000, representing 100% shareholding.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchanges regarding disclosure under regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has issued a clarification regarding recent media reports concerning labor protests in Noida and other cities. The company states that this is a broader labor issue affecting multiple industries, driven by misinformation about wage revisions. Samvardhana Motherson International Limited asserts that its operations remain compliant with all applicable laws and that there is no material impact on the company. The safety of its employees is highlighted as a top priority, and authorities are working to restore normalcy. This clarification is being released to the media simultaneously.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Zota Health Care Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Postal Ballot Notice   Response to Proxy Advisory Firm'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zota Health Care Limited has issued a Postal Ballot Notice and provided a response to a proxy advisory firm, Institutional Investor Advisory Services (IiAS). The company is seeking shareholder approval via postal ballot, from March 18, 2026, to April 16, 2026, for a resolution authorizing the board to give loans, guarantees, or security, and to acquire securities of other bodies corporate in excess of the limits specified under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. The company clarifies that this authorization is for future business expansion, investment opportunities, strategic acquisitions, and support to subsidiaries, including Davaindia Health Mart Limited, which contributes substantially to revenue. The company also states that the transactions will depend on future fund requirements of subsidiaries.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Goldiam International Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Opening of New Retail Store in Place of Borivali Store for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name  ORIGEM .'.
announcements.ai_summary: Goldiam International Limited has opened a new retail store for lab-grown diamond jewellery under the brand name "ORIGEM" on April 13, 2026. This new store is located at GF 018, Infiniti Mall, Link Road, Malad (West), Mumbai – 400064, and replaces the company's previous Borivali store, which was closed due to building redevelopment. The relocation to Malad was a strategic decision based on anticipated higher footfall and business potential. This expansion brings Goldiam International Limited's total number of operational stores to twenty-four (24). The company continues to pursue its long-term strategy of increasing its retail footprint.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: BEML Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: BEML Limited has secured an export order valued at USD 36.38 million from the Middle East region for the supply of heavy Earth Moving Equipment for infrastructure development applications. Following this order, BEML's international order bookings as of April 13, 2026, stand at approximately USD 106.95 million. This development is considered to be in the normal course of business for the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates in relation to earlier intimation dated February 17, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has provided a general update regarding an earlier intimation dated February 17, 2026, concerning the issuance of a bailable warrant. The Hon’ble High Court of Bombay at Goa has quashed and set aside the orders dated January 20, 2026, and February 4, 2026, which were passed by the District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission, South Goa. The High Court observed that the direction for the personal appearance of the CEO was not warranted and that the Commission had exceeded its jurisdiction. This update will be hosted on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Punjab & Sind Bank has informed the Exchange regarding 'Details of Bonds issued and Outstanding as on 31.03.2026'.
announcements.ai_summary: Punjab & Sind Bank has submitted details of its bonds issued and outstanding as of March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI's operational circular. The bank has outstanding bonds with various ISINs, maturity dates, and coupon rates. Specifically, INE608A08017 matures on October 19, 2026, with a coupon rate of 7.99%, and has Rs. 500.00 crore outstanding. INE608A08033 matures on October 26, 2029, with a 9.50% coupon rate, and has Rs. 237.30 crore outstanding. INE608A08041 matures on December 3, 2029, with an 8.67% coupon rate, and has Rs. 500.00 crore outstanding. Lastly, INE608A08058 matures on December 20, 2034, with a 7.74% coupon rate, and has Rs. 3000.00 crore outstanding.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Innovision Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Innovision Limited's Board of Directors met on April 13, 2026, and approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The meeting, which commenced at 11:49 AM and concluded at 12:00 PM, also included the approval of the Limited Review Report issued by the company's statutory auditors on these financial results. The approved financial statements for the period ending December 31, 2025, have been submitted to the stock exchanges and will also be available on the company's website, https://innovision.co.in/.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hinduja Global Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 13, 2026, titled "HGS Named as a  Leader  in NelsonHall's 2025 NEAT Evaluation for Transforming BusinessOperations with GenAI".
announcements.ai_summary: Hinduja Global Solutions Limited (HGS) has announced its recognition as a "Leader" in NelsonHall's 2025 NEAT Evaluation for Transforming Business Operations with GenAI, specifically in the "Developing custom GenAI solutions" segment. This award highlights HGS's capability to deliver immediate value and act as a future-ready partner by transforming business operations using Generative AI. The company's HGS Agent X® platform, an AI-powered cognitive accelerator, integrates various GenAI capabilities to create tailored solutions for clients, focusing on measurable outcomes and ROI. The press release, dated April 13, 2026, emphasizes HGS's approach of re-engineering processes for high-impact opportunities rather than simply automating inefficiencies.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: J.P. Morgan India Private Limited has submitted to the Exchange a copy of Corrigendum to Public Announcement and Detailed Public Statement. of RBL Bank Limited (Target Company)
announcements.ai_summary: J.P. Morgan India Private Limited has submitted a corrigendum to the Public Announcement and Detailed Public Statement concerning RBL Bank Limited. This filing is a clarification or amendment to previous disclosures made regarding the bank. Investors should review the updated documents to understand any changes or refinements to the information previously provided. The exact nature of the amendments is not detailed in this announcement, but it pertains to disclosures related to RBL Bank Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: RBL Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Corrigendum to public announcement and detailed public statement.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RBL Bank Limited has issued a corrigendum to its public announcement and detailed public statement concerning the open offer made by Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C.) for the acquisition of equity shares of RBL Bank Limited. This corrigendum, dated April 11, 2026, is in reference to earlier disclosures and a draft letter of offer. The bank has received a copy of the corrigendum from J.P. Morgan India Private Limited, the Manager for the open offer. An advertisement of this corrigendum was published on April 12, 2026, in Financial Express, Jansatta, and Tarun Bharat. The disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Completion of Sale of land at Podanur under Phase I
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Everest Industries Limited has completed the sale of vacant, excess land at Kurichi Village, Podanur, Madukkarai Taluk, Coimbatore District, Tamil Nadu, to G Square Properties Private Limited. The transaction, which was initially approved by the board on August 29, 2025, involved the sale of 16.84 acres of land, equivalent to 18.99 acres as per Patta and 19.41 acres as per FMB. The Sale Deed was executed and registered on April 10, 2026. This sale is part of Phase I of the land disposal, with the company having previously provided updates on October 27, 2025, January 25, 2026, and April 1, 2026. The contribution of this land to the company's turnover, revenue, income, and net worth for the last financial year is not applicable as it is vacant, excess land.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: GSP Crop Science Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: GSP Crop Science Limited's Board of Directors met on April 11, 2026, to approve the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. Alongside the financial results, the Board also approved the sale of 66,740.60 square meters of industrial land owned by the company to a promoter group company, Indo GSP Chemicals Private Limited, for a consideration of ₹2,365 lakhs. The Board meeting commenced at 4:25 PM and concluded at 5:30 PM. The audited financial results and the sale of land details will be available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Incorporation
announcements.detail: Adani Enterprises Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation of Adani Mangaluru Airport City Limited, Adani Jaipur Airport City Limited , Adani Lucknow Airport City Limited and Adani TRV Airport City Limited by Adani Airport City Limited, a step down wholly owned subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Adani Enterprises Limited has announced the incorporation of four new step-down wholly owned subsidiaries by its step-down wholly owned subsidiary, Adani Airport City Limited. The newly incorporated entities are Adani Mangaluru Airport City Limited ("AMACL"), Adani Jaipur Airport City Limited ("AJACL"), Adani Lucknow Airport City Limited ("ALACL"), and Adani TRV Airport City Limited ("ATACL"). AMACL and AJACL were incorporated on April 8, 2026, while ALACL and ATACL were incorporated on April 9, 2026, all in India. These entities will be engaged in real estate activities, including owning or leasing property, construction of buildings, and potentially operating hotels and resorts. Adani Enterprises Limited received this information on April 11, 2026, at 03:20 PM IST. This announcement is made in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and a SEBI Circular dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.detail: Ambuja Cements Limited has informed the Exchange about effectiveness of Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited (Transferor Company) and Ambuja Cements Limited (Transferee Company) and their respective shareholders.
announcements.ai_summary: The Scheme of Arrangement between Penna Cement Industries Limited (Transferor Company) and Ambuja Cements Limited (Transferee Company) has become effective on April 10, 2026. This follows the sanctioning of the scheme by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, on March 30, 2026, and the subsequent filing of the certified copy of the NCLT order with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, on April 10, 2026. Consequently, Penna Cement Industries Limited is now amalgamated with Ambuja Cements Limited and dissolved without winding up. The Appointed Date for the scheme is August 16, 2024. Equity shareholders of Penna Cement Industries Limited, whose names appear in the Register of Members as of April 10, 2026, will receive cash consideration as per Clause 2.3.2 of the scheme.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Blue Dart Express Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of IT Security incident'.
announcements.ai_summary: Blue Dart Express Limited has reported a low-severity IT security incident identified within its parent group on April 10, 2026. The company has confirmed that no sensitive customer or business data was breached, and the risk is classified as low, primarily involving phishing and impersonation exposure. The CERT-In authorities have been notified as required, and immediate remedial measures have been implemented to mitigate the risk. The incident has been assessed and contained, with no significant financial impact observed on business operations or sensitive data.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: 3i Infotech Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: 3i Infotech Inc., USA, a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary of 3i Infotech Limited, has secured a new order on April 9, 2026, from a leading US-based credit union. The order involves establishing an Enterprise Application Center of Excellence (CoE) for Lending & Collections platforms, with end-to-end responsibility for application management. This engagement is for a period of 9 months and has a total value of approximately Rs. 2.76 crore, equivalent to USD 297,000, exclusive of applicable taxes. The contract aims to enhance operational efficiency, scalability, and alignment with the client's digital and business requirements. The company is making this disclosure voluntarily as the order value is below the materiality threshold.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Lupin Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 10, 2026, titled "Lupin Launches Dapagliflozin Tablets in the United States".
announcements.ai_summary: Lupin Limited has announced the launch of Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, in the United States. This launch follows the U.S. FDA's approval of its Abbreviated New Drug Application, confirming bioequivalence to Farxiga® for the indicated uses. The company, headquartered in Mumbai, India, is a global pharmaceutical leader with products in over 100 markets. Lupin has a strong presence in India and the U.S. across various therapy areas, including cardiovascular and anti-diabetic treatments. The company operates 15 manufacturing sites and 7 research centers globally, employing over 24,000 professionals. This press release was issued on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Larsen & Toubro Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T) announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, L&T Realty Properties Limited (L&T RPL), has entered into a Share Purchase and Shareholders’ Agreement to acquire 100% of the equity stake in International Green Scapes Limited (IGSL). This acquisition, executed on April 10, 2026, aims to leverage IGSL's land for L&T RPL's real estate development portfolio. Post-completion, IGSL will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of L&T. The transaction is in the real estate sector, and IGSL had a NIL turnover for FY25. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are noted as required, and the completion is expected by April 15, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has further acquired an additional 775,744 equity shares of Rs. 10 each in Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL) from existing individual shareholders. The acquisition was made at a price of Rs. 241 per share, totaling Rs. 18.69 crores. Following this acquisition, the company's effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%. This follows previous intimations regarding the acquisition of equity shares in AHLL from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company. The company's shareholding in AHLL has now increased to 100% consequent to this acquisition.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Inventure Growth & Securities Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ': Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.'.
announcements.ai_summary:
Subject: Updates
Inventure Growth & Securities Limited has informed the stock exchanges on April 10, 2026, about a dispute notice received from the advocate representing Mr. Nagji Keshavji Rita and others. The dispute arises from an Agreement for Sale of shares and is against the company and its Chairman and Managing Director (CMD), Mr. Kanji Rita. The company and the CMD appeared before the Hon’ble High Court Bombay, which has permitted the company to file its objections within two weeks. The Commercial Arbitration application is scheduled to be listed on April 24, 2026. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AstraZeneca Pharma India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary:
Subject: General Updates
AstraZeneca Pharma India Limited has received permission from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) on April 9, 2026, to import for sale and distribution of Acalabrutinib tablets 100 mg (Brand name: Calquence®) for an additional indication. This approval allows the use of Acalabrutinib tablets 100 mg in combination with venetoclax with or without obinutuzumab for the treatment of patients with previously untreated chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (CLL) / small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL). The company anticipates this permission will facilitate the marketing of Calquence® in India for this specified additional indication, subject to any other necessary statutory approvals. The company has informed the stock exchanges on April 10, 2026, about this development.

announcements.subject: Product launch
announcements.detail: Garware Hi-Tech Films Limited has informed the Exchange about New Products
announcements.ai_summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, L&T Realty Properties Limited (L&T RPL), has acquired a 100% stake in International Green Scapes Limited (IGSL). This acquisition is expected to enhance and expand L&T RPL's real estate development portfolio by leveraging the land owned by IGSL. Following the completion of this transaction, IGSL will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Larsen & Toubro Limited. No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are indicated as required for this acquisition, and the transaction is expected to be completed by April 15, 2026. The acquisition does not involve related parties, and the business of IGSL falls within the real estate industry, aligning with L&T RPL's core business.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update on litigation   Intimation regarding Appeal filed by Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Seva, Raigad, Maharashtra
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Prostarm Info Systems Limited has received an intimation that the Customs Department has filed an appeal before the Hon’ble Customs, Excise and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal, Mumbai. This appeal is against an Order-In-Original dated August 05, 2025, which had confirmed no liability towards a disputed amount of INR 25.66 Crores and dropped all proceedings. The company is currently evaluating its next course of action. The previous Show Cause Notice was received on May 21, 2024, from the Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Seva, Raigad, Maharashtra.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Divestment of entire Stake in Erkunt Sanayii Anonim Şirketi, a step-down subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Mahindra Overseas Investment Company (Mauritius) Limited (MOICML) and its subsidiary Erkunt Traktör Sanayii Anonim Şirketi, has entered into a Stock Purchase Agreement on April 10, 2026, to sell their entire 99.04% stake in Erkunt Sanayi Anonim Şirketi (Erkunt Foundry) to Hisarlar Makina Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., Mr. Oguzhan Sahinkaya, and Mr. Bunyamin Sarioglu. This divestment of the foundry business is in line with the company's capital allocation framework. Upon completion, Erkunt Foundry will cease to be a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited. Detailed information regarding the turnover, revenue, income, and net worth contributed by Erkunt Foundry for the year ended March 31, 2025, is provided in Annexure – A.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Agri-Tech (India) Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Agri-Tech (India) Limited met on April 10, 2026, and approved the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, the company reported total income of Rs. 7.94 Lacs and total expenses of Rs. 32.70 Lacs, resulting in a net loss of Rs. 26.75 Lacs. For the financial year ended March 31, 2026, total income was Rs. 27.81 Lacs and total expenses were Rs. 139.29 Lacs, leading to a net loss of Rs. 94.08 Lacs. The company also submitted the statement of impact of audit qualification and the independent auditors' report. The meeting commenced at 03:00 p.m. and concluded at 04:30 p.m.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: M&M: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Production, Sales and Export figures for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited has acquired the remaining 50% stake in Amber Resojet Private Limited (Amber Resojet) on April 10, 2026, for a total purchase consideration of INR 1,74,44,908.42. This acquisition means Amber Resojet is no longer a joint venture and has now become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Amber Enterprises India Limited. The company had previously intimated about this transaction on April 3, 2026. Further disclosures as required by SEBI LODR Regulations were submitted with the earlier intimation. This update is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Amendment to AOA/MOA
announcements.detail: Suvidhaa Infoserve Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Amendment to AOA/MOA of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Suvidhaa Infoserve Limited is seeking shareholder approval for amendments to its Articles of Association (AOA) and Memorandum of Association (MOA) through a postal ballot. The company has dispatched a Postal Ballot Notice dated April 10, 2026, to members whose names appeared on the register as of April 3, 2026. Voting will be conducted exclusively through remote e-voting, facilitated by National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL), commencing on April 11, 2026, and concluding on May 10, 2026. The results of the postal ballot are expected to be declared on or before May 11, 2026.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Univastu India Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Univastu India Limited, as part of a joint venture named 'Ansh Infratech Private Limited - Univastu India Limited-Univastu Bootes Infra LLP JV', has received a work order dated April 6, 2026, for the 'Restoration, Rejuvenation and Upgradation of Sant Dnyaneshwar Garden at Paithan Dist. Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar'. The total contract value is Rs. 109,24,42,317/- excluding GST, awarded by the Godawari Marathwada Irrigation Development Corporation. Univastu India Limited holds a 29% share in this contract, amounting to Rs. 31,68,08,272/-. The project is to be executed within 24 months.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Coal India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 10, 2026, titled "CIL Press release on CIL insulates Indian coal users from increasing input costs.".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Coal India Limited (CIL) has issued a press release on April 10, 2026, stating that it is absorbing increased operational costs to insulate Indian coal users from rising prices. Despite a 44 percent increase in Ammonium Nitrate (AN) prices from Rs. 50,500 per metric ton to Rs. 72,750 per metric ton as of April 1, 2026, and a 26% rise in the average cost of explosives from Rs. 39,588 per metric ton in February 2026 to Rs. 49,783 per metric ton by March end, CIL is not passing these costs on. CIL consumes approximately 9 Lakh metric tons of explosives annually. The company is also compensating contractors for increased industrial diesel prices.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Ajooni Biotech Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Undertaking of functional website'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ajooni Biotech Limited has informed the Exchange that its website, www.ajoonibiotech.com, has been updated and is now functional. This update is in compliance with Regulation 46 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company requests that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: Statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.detail: Abhishek Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Reg. 32
announcements.ai_summary: Mahaalaxmi Texpro Limited (formerly Abhishek Corporation Limited) has submitted a Statement of Deviation or Variation as per Clause 32(1) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company has indicated that there was no deviation or variation in the utilization of funds raised. The mode of fund raising, date of raising funds, and the amount raised are all listed as 'NA' for this reporting period. The report filed is for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and no specific explanation for deviation or variation is required as none occurred.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: NIBE Limited has informed the Exchange about the update on Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: Nibe Limited has provided an update on the sale of equity shares held by its subsidiary, Nibe Defence and Aerospace Limited (NDAL), in Nibe Aeronautics Limited (NAL). The transfer of 15,20,000 shares to Mr. Ganesh Nibe was completed on April 09, 2026. Consequently, NAL has ceased to be a subsidiary of NDAL and also a step-down subsidiary of Nibe Limited. This update follows an earlier intimation regarding the execution of a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) between NDAL and Mr. Ganesh Nibe.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ajmera Realty & Infra India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding operations update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026 dated April 10, 2026, titled "Ajmera Realty scales new heights with INR 1,701 Cr pre-sales; beats FY26 guidance and clocks highest ever annual collections".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Ajmera Realty & Infra India Limited announced its operational update for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with pre-sales reaching INR 1,701 crore, exceeding the FY26 guidance and marking the highest ever annual collections. The company achieved sales area of 6,60,246 sq. ft, up 11% YoY, and collections of INR 1,103 crore, up 71% YoY. Ajmera Realty launched four projects in FY26, aggregating an estimated GDV of INR 3,088 crore, with strong buyer interest in its flagship developments. This announcement was made on April 10, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Mangalam Worldwide Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 10, 2026, titled "Press Release".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mangalam Worldwide Limited (MWL) has announced its empanelment as an approved vendor with leading global and domestic institutions, including QatarEnergy, Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL), Engineers India Limited (EIL), and Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited (GSFC). This development, effective April 10, 2026, is expected to open new revenue streams for MWL through sector diversification and strengthen its position in international energy, refinery, infrastructure, power, and industrial sectors. The empanelment validates MWL's product quality, manufacturing capabilities, and operational reliability, enabling participation in high-specification projects and expanding its presence in both international and domestic markets. Partnerships with QatarEnergy will grant access to global oil and gas supply chains, while collaborations with BHEL and EIL will establish footholds in India's power infrastructure and refinery-petrochemical sectors, respectively.

announcements.subject: Product launch
announcements.detail: Park Medi World Limited has informed the Exchange about launch of Hospital in Panchkula
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Park Medi World Limited has announced the successful launch of its new multi-super specialty hospital in Panchkula on April 10, 2026. This expansion aims to address the growing demand for advanced healthcare services in Haryana, Punjab, Himachal Pradesh, and Chandigarh, reducing the need for patients to travel to metropolitan areas for specialized treatments. The new facility is equipped with advanced diagnostics, modular operation theatres, and critical care infrastructure, offering comprehensive care across specialties like oncology, neurosciences, orthopedics, and cardiology, including robotic-assisted procedures. The hospital is designed with a significant proportion of beds dedicated to high-acuity critical care services. This launch, combined with the ongoing expansion of its Mohali facility, will bring the Group's total bed capacity in the Tricity region to approximately 850 beds, strengthening its integrated healthcare ecosystem in North India.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Highway Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange about Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Highway Infrastructure Limited, has decided to withdraw its Letter of Acceptance (LOA) for the Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh, issued by the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI). As a consequence of not accepting the LOA, NHAI has debarred the company, including its directors and owners, from the list of pre-qualified bidders for a period of three months. This decision impacts the company's ability to participate in future bidding processes for a specified duration. The detailed disclosure regarding this action is enclosed as 'Annexure – A'.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Certificate in terms of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018'.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted a confirmation certificate for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. This certificate, issued by KFin Technologies Limited, confirms the company's compliance with the said regulations concerning dematerialization of shares. The company has confirmed demat requests, ensured securities are listed on stock exchanges, and cancelled physical certificates after verification. The depositories' names have been substituted in the register of members for approved demat requests. This submission is for the record and confirms ongoing regulatory compliance.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Tata Steel Limited has informed the Exchange about acquisition of equity stake in Tata Steel Colors Private Limited (Formerly Tata BlueScope Steel Private Limited)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Tata Steel Limited has completed the acquisition of the remaining 10,000 equity shares of face value ₹10/- each in its subsidiary, Tata Steel Colors Private Limited (formerly Tata BlueScope Steel Private Limited), for a consideration of ₹0.03 crore. This transaction, which took place on April 9, 2026, was executed as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated November 12, 2025, with BlueScope Steel Asia Holdings Pty Ltd. Following this acquisition, Tata Steel Limited's shareholding in Tata Steel Colors Private Limited has increased from 99.99% to 100%, making it an indirect wholly owned subsidiary. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulations 30 and 51 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Nimbus Projects Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Nimbus Group Reports 77% YoY Growth in Q4 FY26 Pre-Sales".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Nimbus Projects Limited has announced a significant 77% year-on-year growth in pre-sales for the fourth quarter of FY26, with pre-sales booking value reaching Rs. 281.24 crore compared to Rs. 158.90 crore in the corresponding period last year. Customer collections also saw a substantial increase of 121%, rising to Rs. 100.63 crore from Rs. 45.51 crore. For the full FY26, the company reported pre-sales of Rs. 545 crore and customer collections of Rs. 285 crore. This strong performance, detailed in a press release dated April 09, 2026, reflects sustained homebuyer confidence and effective sales strategies. The information is available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Rajputana Stainless Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Rajputana Stainless Limited, at their meeting held on April 09, 2026, considered and approved the unaudited financial results for the third quarter and nine-month period ended December 31, 2025. The Board also took note of the Limited Review Report issued by the company's statutory auditors. The financial results, along with the Limited Review Report, have been submitted to the stock exchanges for record.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: BSE Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'SEBI Approval to launch Derivative Contracts on  BSE Focused IT Index '.
announcements.ai_summary: BSE Limited has received approval from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) to launch derivative contracts on the "BSE Focused IT Index". This index tracks the performance of 14 companies within the Information Technology sector. The launch of these derivative contracts is expected to provide new trading and hedging opportunities for market participants interested in the IT sector. BSE Limited will issue separate exchange circulars detailing the launch and contract specifications. Investors should monitor these upcoming circulars for specific information on contract sizes, expiry dates, and margin requirements. This regulatory approval signifies an expansion of BSE's product offerings and could potentially increase trading volumes on the exchange.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Eicher Motors Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "FLYING FLEA C6 IS HERE - UNLOCKING A WHOLE NEW LEVEL OF CITY+CAPABILITY".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Eicher Motors Limited has issued a press release dated April 09, 2026, announcing the launch of its new city+ electric mobility brand, Royal Enfield's Flying Flea, and its first motorcycle, the Flying Flea C6. The Flying Flea C6 will be available for bookings and test rides starting at 12 PM on April 10, 2026, at its first store in Jayanagar, Bengaluru. The motorcycle is priced at ₹ 2.79 Lakh (ex-showroom) or ₹ 1.99 Lakh (Battery-as-a-Service). Deliveries are scheduled to commence at the end of May 2026. The Flying Flea C6 boasts a top speed of 115 km/h, over 400 Nm of wheel torque, and a lightweight of 124 kgs.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Lyka Labs Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Lyka Labs Limited has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Lyka Exports Limited with Lyka Labs Limited has been sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, via an order dated March 16, 2026. The certified true copy of the NCLT order was received on March 24, 2026, and subsequently filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, on April 8, 2026, making the Scheme effective from April 8, 2026. The Appointed Date for the Scheme is April 1, 2022. Upon effectiveness, the authorized share capital of Lyka Labs Limited has automatically increased to Rs. 59,00,00,000, divided into 5,70,00,000 Equity shares of Rs. 10 each and 2,00,000 Redeemable Preference Shares of Rs. 100 each, replacing the previous Clause V of the Memorandum of Association.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Suraj Estate Developers Limited has informed the Exchange about Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015   Non-exercise of option to convert Warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Suraj Estate Developers Limited has informed the exchange that a total of 13,30,000 convertible warrants, initially allotted on a preferential basis at an issue price of Rs. 750/- per warrant, will not be exercised for conversion. The company had previously received Rs. 49,87,50,000, representing 50% of the issue price, as an initial subscription amount. As the warrant holder did not exercise the conversion option by the deadline of April 8, 2026, which is 18 months from the allotment date, the received amount of Rs. 49,87,50,000 stands forfeited as per SEBI regulations. This action is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Jana Small Finance Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Half Yearly reporting of ISIN for debt securities Mar-26'.
announcements.ai_summary: Jana Small Finance Bank Limited has provided its half-yearly statement of debt securities as of March 31, 2026, as per SEBI circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/PoD1/P/CIR/2024/54. The bank has outstanding debt securities with various maturity dates and coupon rates. Specifically, INE953L08329, listed on BSE, was issued on December 22, 2015, matures on July 07, 2027, with a coupon rate of 13.80%, and has an outstanding amount of ₹75 crore out of ₹330 crore issued. INE953L08311, unlisted, matures on November 30, 2026, with a coupon rate of 13.50%, and has an outstanding amount of ₹50 crore. INE953L08337, listed on BSE, was issued on October 16, 2025, matures on October 16, 2035, with a coupon rate of 10.55%, and has an outstanding amount of ₹250 crore. The bank has requested the exchanges to take this information on record.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Dev Information Technology Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Limited has secured a significant work order from National Informatics Centre Services Incorporated (NICSI) on behalf of the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System of the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). The order, valued at approximately INR 26 Crore, encompasses the design, development, integration, and maintenance of software/applications/platforms, along with cybersecurity services for the Pharmacy Council of India's existing IT infrastructure. This includes the development of web-based software infrastructure and applications for the National Pharmacists Registration Tracking System. The company will proceed with the execution of this order as per the terms agreed upon.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Datamatics Global Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Datamatics Launches TruAI Underwriting to Transform Insurance Underwriting with Agentic AI.".
announcements.ai_summary: Datamatics Global Services Limited has issued a press release on April 09, 2026, announcing the launch of "TruAI Underwriting." This new solution is an Agentic AI-based platform designed to significantly enhance and streamline the insurance underwriting process. TruAI Underwriting aims to assist insurers in assessing financial and medical risks with greater speed, consistency, and accuracy, particularly for complex, data-intensive cases. The solution ingests and analyzes data from various structured and unstructured sources, extracts relevant parameters, identifies risk indicators, and provides contextual recommendations to underwriters. It is designed to reduce underwriting turnaround time by up to 70%, lower costs by up to 50%, and improve accuracy by up to 25%. The final underwriting decision remains with the human underwriter, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited announced on April 9, 2026, its decision to acquire a 26% stake in Neon Hybren Private Limited. This acquisition is a strategic move to comply with the Electricity Rules 2005, which require a minimum 26% shareholding to qualify as a captive user for power supply from Neon's captive power plant in Punjab. Neon Hybren Private Limited is a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited, being a subsidiary of Mahindra Susten Private Limited, which is in turn a subsidiary of Mahindra Holdings Limited. The Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement (SSSHA) has been executed with Neon and MSPL. Upon completion, MSPL's shareholding in Neon will reduce from 100% to 74%, but Neon will continue to be a step-down subsidiary of Mahindra & Mahindra Limited.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has entered into a Technology Collaboration Agreement (TCA) with E2S Company Limited, Republic of Korea. This international agreement focuses on Static Excitation Systems (SEE) and Brushless Excitation Systems (AVR) for synchronous machines. The TCA will enable BHEL to design, engineer, manufacture, install, commission, service, test, retrofit, and sell both static and brushless excitation systems in India and overseas. This collaboration is expected to help BHEL maintain its competitive edge, strengthen its capabilities in the excitation system business, and contribute to the Government's 'Make in India' initiative. Specific details regarding consideration and significant terms are confidential.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Bharat Forge Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Forge Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 9, 2026, reviewed a proposal for the phased restructuring of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bharat Forge CDP GmbH (BF CDP), located in Germany. The restructuring may involve an orderly wind-down and solvent liquidation of BF CDP due to market challenges and cost disadvantages in Germany. To support this proposed restructuring, the Board has approved a financing arrangement of up to EUR 30 million. The Board has authorized a sub-committee to oversee the further evaluation and implementation of this proposal. The company will communicate subsequent developments to the stock exchanges as per SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Bonus
announcements.detail: Anand Rathi Wealth Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors at its meeting held on April 09, 2026, have considered and approved bonus at the ratio of 1 : 1, i.e 1 Equity Shares for every 1 Equity Shares held.
announcements.ai_summary: Seamec Limited informed the exchange on April 09, 2026, that its vessel, "SEAMEC AGASTYA," has been temporarily taken out of operation due to technical reasons, effective from April 9, 2026, at 08:30 hrs. The company had previously communicated the vessel's deployment status on January 17, 2026. Seamec Limited will provide a further update once the technical defect has been rectified. The company is a member of the IMCA and holds ISO certifications for quality, environmental, and occupational health and safety management systems.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Oil Country Tubular Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Oil Country Tubular Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026. The Board of Directors approved a Term Loan Agreement dated April 9, 2026, to avail a Term Loan facility amounting to Rs. 6.82 Crores (Rupees Six Crores Eighty-Two Lakhs Only) from Cosmos Co-Operative Bank Ltd. This loan will be utilized for the purchase of new machinery/equipment. The meeting commenced at 11:30 A.M. (IST) and concluded at 12:25 P.M. (IST). The company also confirmed that it does not have any subsidiary companies.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Dilip Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Dilip Buildcon Limited, through its joint venture DBL -RBL (JV), has been declared the L-1 bidder for a significant project by the Narmada Water Resources Water Supply & Kalpasar Department, Government of Gujarat. The project involves the "Designing and Construction of Ged Barrage, Protection work & Other allied activities across river Sabarmati between Hirpura barrage & Lakroda weir" on an EPC mode. The order value is Rs. 268 Crores, excluding GST, and the completion period is 24 months. This includes a 10-year period for Operation and Maintenance. The company is required to submit further disclosures as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Persistent Systems Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Persistent Launches Merchant Risk Management Solution Powered by Databricks AI".
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Persistent Systems Limited, has announced the launch of its new Merchant Risk Management and Fraud Detection solution. This solution is powered by the Databricks Data Intelligence platform and utilizes Agentic AI for proactive risk assessment and fraud prevention. It enables financial institutions to reduce fraud losses and improve detection accuracy by analyzing merchant profiles, compliance history, and transaction patterns in real-time. The solution is designed as a Databricks accelerator and can unify batch and streaming data for continuous monitoring and AI-driven actions before losses occur. This launch is part of Persistent Systems' ongoing efforts in digital engineering and enterprise modernization.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 & 51 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF 11TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES V (INE153A08089)
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited (MTNL) has confirmed the funding of the 11th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series V (INE153A08089). The funding for this payment, due on April 12, 2026, was completed on April 8, 2026, and has been deposited into the designated escrow account maintained with the Bank of India. This action is in compliance with Regulations 30 & 51 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. This update assures bondholders of timely interest payments and demonstrates the company's adherence to its financial obligations.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Escorts Kubota Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Escorts Kubota Limited has informed the exchange that the company intends to launch a new tractor series by Powertrac shortly. This announcement, made on April 09, 2026, is a disclosure pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The launch of a new product line signifies a business expansion initiative. Investors should anticipate further details regarding the new tractor series, including its specifications and target market, as the launch date approaches. This development could potentially enhance the company's product portfolio and market presence.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Steel Strips Wheels Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 09, 2026. It is informed that the Board of Directors of the Company in its meeting held today i.e. Thursday, April 9, 2026, inter alia, have approved to execute a  Amendment Agreement To Shareholders Agreement  with NuPower Renewables Private Limited (holding company of EUPL) and Echanda Urja Private Limited (EUPL), as well as  Amendment Agreement to Energy Sale Agreement  with EUPL, for further acquiring 37582 equity shares of Face value of Rs. 10/- each of EUPL at a consideration of Rs. 3.76 lakhs. The said acquisition of shares is for the purpose of procuring additional renewable (wind) power from EUPL for the Chennai plant of company under Group Captive Scheme.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Steel Strips Wheels Limited, in a board meeting held on April 9, 2026, approved the execution of an Amendment Agreement to the Shareholders Agreement with NuPower Renewables Private Limited and Echanda Urja Private Limited (EUPL). Additionally, an Amendment Agreement to the Energy Sale Agreement with EUPL was also approved. The company will acquire an additional 37,582 equity shares of EUPL, each with a face value of Rs. 10/-, for a total consideration of Rs. 3.76 lakhs. This acquisition is intended to secure additional renewable (wind) power for the company's Chennai plant under a Group Captive Scheme. The board meeting commenced at 10:30 a.m. and concluded at 11:35 a.m.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kakatiya Cement Sugar & Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation on receipt of request for Re-lodgment of transfer requests of physicals shares   status as on March 31, 2026.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kakatiya Cement Sugar & Industries Limited has informed the stock exchanges about the receipt of requests for re-lodgment of transfer requests for physical shares. As of March 31, 2026, the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA), XL Softech Systems Ltd., reported that no requests for re-lodgment of transfer requests for physical shares were received, processed, approved, or rejected during the month. Consequently, there was no average time taken for processing these requests. This update is in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97, dated July 02, 2025, and a subsequent SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Micro Systems Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Business Update'.
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Micro Systems Limited has successfully completed blast trials for Limpet Mines, which are diver-carried mines used in Naval Defence. This achievement positions the company as the sole Indian entity to have successfully developed this product for the Indian Navy. This milestone is significant as it strengthens the company's capabilities in providing a complete spectrum of underwater mines, including shallow water, deep water, and limpet mine categories, thereby enhancing its expertise in underwater electronic warfare systems. This update is provided for the information of stakeholders.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Asian Granito India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates - Receipt of Listing and Trading Approval of equity shares allotted pursuant to Scheme of Arrangement.
announcements.ai_summary: Asian Granito India Limited has received listing and trading approval from both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for 6,45,63,636 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted pursuant to the Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Asian Granito India Limited, Adicon Ceramica Tiles Private Limited, and Adicon Ceramics Limited. The listing approval was granted by BSE on March 30, 2026, and by NSE on March 30, 2026. Trading approval from both exchanges was received on April 08, 2026. The shares are expected to be listed and admitted to dealings upon confirmation from NSDL/CDSL for credit of beneficiaries' accounts or dispatch of physical share certificates.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Rategain Travel Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "RateGain s UNO Platform Powers Direct GDS Connectivity for Hotelogix Worldwide".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: RateGain Travel Technologies Limited announced a strategic partnership with Hotelogix, a cloud-based Property Management System. This collaboration will enable Hotelogix customers worldwide to access direct GDS (Global Distribution System) connectivity via RateGain's UNO Platform. This integration allows hotels to connect directly with Amadeus, Sabre Corporation, and Travelport, reaching over 600,000 travel agents and corporate travel programs. The partnership aims to simplify GDS distribution for hotels, eliminating the need for third-party providers and reducing costs. Hotels using Hotelogix PMS can now manage GDS connectivity within their existing system, enhancing their distribution capabilities and driving bookings.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Premier Energies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 09, 2026, titled "Premier Energies Secures Orders Worth ₹ 2,577 Crores in Q4 FY26".
announcements.ai_summary: Premier Energies Limited announced on April 09, 2026, that it has secured new orders worth ₹2,577 Crores in Q4 FY26 for the supply of 1,600 MW of solar cells and modules. The execution of these orders is scheduled to take place across FY 2027 and FY 2028. These contracts were awarded by a mix of leading domestic Independent Power Producers (IPPs), module manufacturers, and EPC contractors in India. This significant order inflow reflects the company's growing scale, with its cell capacity expected to reach 10.6 GW by September 2026 and module manufacturing capacity recently expanded to 11.1 GW.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Coforge Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Coforge launches  Mod Squads    Outcome-based human-agent pods under a subscription pricing construct".
announcements.ai_summary: Coforge Limited has issued a press release dated April 08, 2026, announcing the launch of "Mod Squads." These are outcome-based human-agent pods offered under a subscription pricing construct, aiming to replace traditional Time & Material models with predictable costs and faster time-to-market. Enterprises can assemble custom AI-native teams tailored to specific industry and engineering workflows. Coforge is offering over 130 pre-built AI agents across industry-specific (e.g., fraud detection for banking, claims triaging for insurance) and engineering-focused (e.g., legacy code reverse engineering, QA automation) categories. These agents can be deployed on customer-hosted or Coforge-hosted Forge-X infrastructure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Signature Global Cuts Net Debt by 77% to INR 2.0 Billion in FY26; Achieves Pre-Sales of INR 82.2 Billion".
announcements.ai_summary: Signatureglobal (India) Limited has issued a press release announcing significant financial and operational achievements for FY26. The company has successfully reduced its net debt by 77%, bringing it down to INR 2.0 billion at the end of FY26 from INR 8.8 billion at the end of FY25, reaching a historic low. This strong balance sheet is further supported by INR 27.70 billion in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2026. The company reported robust pre-sales of INR 82.2 billion for FY26 and collections of INR 40.0 billion during the same period. The average sales realization saw a substantial increase to INR 15,250 per sq. ft. in FY26, up from INR 12,457 per sq. ft. in FY25, attributed to higher sales in premium markets and price adjustments. Additionally, the company received INR 12.93 billion from Millennia Realtors Private Limited for a joint venture, signaling its expansion into large-scale commercial development in the NCR region.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Redemption of Optional Convertible Debentures and acquisition of equity shares pursuant to conversion of loan
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Refex Industries Limited has announced the redemption of Optional Convertible Debentures (OCDs) amounting to ₹3,00,00,000 by its subsidiary, Venwind Refex Power Limited (VRPL), on April 08, 2026. Furthermore, VRPL has converted an outstanding loan of ₹4,85,03,664, provided by Refex Industries Limited, into equity shares. This conversion resulted in Refex Industries Limited being allotted 2,768 equity shares of VRPL, increasing its shareholding from 77.39% to 77.77%, a rise of 0.38%. The face value of each equity share is ₹10, and the conversion was at a fair value of ₹17,523 per share.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gretex Corporate Services Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gretex Corporate Services Limited has entered into a mandate agreement with a multi-brand retail company based in Lucknow. This retail company is planning to list on either the SME Platform of BSE or the Emerge Platform of NSE. This announcement serves as an intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has provided its contact details and CIN for record-keeping.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Press Release: ACJKEL Expands its Global Footprint- Plans Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Singapore'.
announcements.ai_summary: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Limited has issued a press release announcing its strategic expansion into the global market by planning to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary in Singapore. This move signifies the company's intent to broaden its international presence and operations. Further details regarding the scope and timeline of this expansion are expected to be released.

announcements.subject: Name and Symbol Change
announcements.detail: AKZOINDIA: Members of the Exchange are hereby informed that the name of Akzo Nobel India Limited shall be changed to JSW Dulux Limited and symbol be changed to JSWDULUX w.e.f. April 15, 2026.
