announcements.ai_summary: Akzo Nobel India Limited will undergo a name and symbol change, becoming JSW Dulux Limited with the new symbol JSWDULUX. This change will be effective from April 15, 2026. Members of the National Stock Exchange of India are hereby informed of this alteration. The existing symbol for the company is AKZOINDIA.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Almondz Global Securities Limited has informed the Exchange regarding   Revised Clarification on Shareholding Pattern pursuant to NSE Observatio
announcements.ai_summary: Almondz Global Securities Limited has provided a revised clarification on its shareholding pattern pursuant to an observation from NSE. The company had previously sought in-principle approval for a preferential issue of convertible warrants, with shareholder approval obtained on March 27, 2026. NSE had raised observations regarding disclosures in the Explanatory Statement to the EGM Notice, specifically concerning the shareholding pattern. Almondz Global Securities Limited clarifies that 15,078,408 equity shares, initially proposed for allotment, were reflected in the pre-issue shareholding pattern but have since been withdrawn as they had not been allotted at the time of the notice. Consequently, these shares are not considered in either the pre or post-issue shareholding pattern. The company is submitting a revised shareholding pattern and confirms this clarification does not impact the validity of the resolutions passed at the EGM.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: BSE Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Equity Shares in Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation
announcements.ai_summary: BSE Limited has announced the acquisition of equity shares in Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation, a Section 8 Company. This follows SEBI approval received under Regulation 38(2) of Securities Contracts (Regulation) (Stock Exchanges and Clearing Corporations) Regulations, 2018. The Section 8 Company, named "Social Stock Exchange Capacity Building Foundation" (SSE CBF), was incorporated on April 7, 2026. BSE Limited, along with NABARD, SIDBI, and NSE, are jointly promoting this entity. The acquisition is related to the developmental/social impact sector, focusing on capacity building and training for Social Stock Exchange activities. This intimation is made in continuation to an earlier intimation dated December 17, 2025.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: The Karnataka Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Statement of Debt Securities Issued under Private Placement basis In accordance with SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021- for the Half Year Ended March 31, 2026. (Listed On NSE Debt Segment)'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Karnataka Bank Limited has provided an update regarding debt securities issued on a private placement basis for the half-year ended March 31, 2026. The bank has issued Non-Convertible Securities amounting to Rs. 300.00 crore with a coupon rate of 10.70% per annum, maturing on March 30, 2032. These securities have an embedded call option, subject to prior RBI approval, allowing the bank to redeem them after five years from the allotment date. The total amount outstanding remains Rs. 300.00 crore. This information is submitted in accordance with SEBI (Issue and Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: PNC Infratech Limited has informed regarding Resolution Plan submitted by the Company under CIRP for Gwalior Bypass Project Ltd (Corporate Debtor) in 2020 - Plan not approved - Settlement reached by the Company with the erstwhile Promoter/Director of the Corporate Debtor - Rs. 20.00 Crore Compensation received by the Company towards costs incurred by it as part of settlement.
announcements.ai_summary: PNC Infratech Limited has announced a settlement regarding the Gwalior Bypass Project Ltd (Corporate Debtor) CIRP. The company's resolution plan, approved by the Committee of Creditors (CoC) in 2020, was not approved by the NCLT due to protracted legal proceedings involving Mr. Nakul Bharana, an erstwhile director. To resolve the matter, PNC Infratech entered into an amicable settlement with Mr. Bharana and received Rs. 20.00 Crore as compensation for costs incurred. The company has also issued a No Objection Certificate (NOC) to Mr. Bharana on April 7, 2026. This settlement aims to finally resolve the dispute, which involved a performance bank guarantee of Rs. 29.51 Crores that had been valid for nearly six years.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aaron Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Achieves Highest Ever Turnover of Rs.92.01 Crore in FY 2025-26
announcements.ai_summary: Aaron Industries Limited has reported its highest ever turnover for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, reaching Rs. 92.01 Crore. This represents a substantial year-on-year growth of 18.06% compared to Rs. 77.93 Crore in FY 2024-25. The Elevator Division contributed Rs. 68.95 Crore, while the Stainless Steel Polishing Division generated Rs. 23.05 Crore. In the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, the company's total revenue was Rs. 27.32 Crore, an increase of 13.31% from Rs. 24.11 Crore in Q4 FY 2024-25.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Rajputana Stainless Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "A defining Milestone: Debt-free Status Achieved".
announcements.ai_summary: Rajputana Stainless Limited has announced achieving debt-free status as of April 8, 2026, marking a significant milestone post-listing. The company has successfully repaid its entire outstanding debt amounting to Rs. 96.01 Crores. This repayment includes term loans, working capital facilities, and unsecured borrowings, aligning with the stated utilization of its IPO proceeds. This strategic move signifies a strengthened financial position for the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat Pipavav Port Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Pipavav Port Limited has received an intimation from Mr. Amit Bhardwaj, the Chief Commercial Officer, expressing his intention to be relieved of his duties and responsibilities effective June 30, 2026. This communication was dated April 7, 2026. The company is treating this as an intimation under Regulation 30(2) read with Schedule III Part A Para A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The information has also been made available on the company's website, www.pipavav.com.

announcements.subject: Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: SML Mahindra Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Report for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: SML Mahindra Limited has provided its production, sales, and export figures for the month of March 2026. In March 2026, the company produced 1,652 commercial vehicles, an increase from 1,594 in March 2025. Sales for March 2026 stood at 2,393 commercial vehicles, up from 2,129 in March 2025. Export figures for March 2026 show 64 commercial vehicles, a decrease from 186 in March 2025. These figures are reported as part of the company's monthly business updates.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of controlling stake in 250 bed Kalinga Hospital Ltd.
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Limited announced on April 8, 2026, its approval to acquire a controlling stake of approximately 58.39% in Kalinga Hospital Ltd. This acquisition pertains to a 250-bedded multi-specialty hospital located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, known as ‘Kalinga Hospital’. The company will enter into a share purchase agreement to facilitate this transaction. To support Kalinga Hospital Ltd.'s operational and developmental needs, Max Healthcare has approved providing loans up to ₹100 Crore for construction, renovation, and equipment. Additionally, the company will issue a corporate guarantee to a bank or financial institution for the refinancing of $5 million in External Commercial Borrowings of Kalinga Hospital Ltd.'s existing promoter. The acquisition is being financed by a Senior Secured Term Loan of up to ₹300 Crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Max Healthcare forays in Bhubaneswar, Odisha; to acquire controlling stake in 250 bed Kalinga Hospital".
announcements.ai_summary: Max Healthcare Institute Limited has issued a press release on April 8, 2026, announcing its foray into Bhubaneswar, Odisha, through the acquisition of a controlling stake in Kalinga Hospital Ltd. This 250-bed multi-specialty hospital will operate under the name ‘Kalinga Hospital’. The company's board has approved the share purchase agreement for this acquisition, which represents approximately 58.39% of Kalinga Hospital Ltd. To support the hospital's growth, Max Healthcare will provide loans up to ₹100 Crore for construction, renovation, and equipment upgrades. Furthermore, a corporate guarantee will be issued for $5 million in External Commercial Borrowings related to the refinancing of the existing promoter's debt. The acquisition will be financed through a Senior Secured Term Loan of up to ₹300 Crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vidya Wires Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 08, 2026, titled "Press Release on Sales Number for Q4 and FY 2026".
announcements.ai_summary: Vidya Wires Limited has issued a press release on April 08, 2026, detailing its sales numbers for the fourth quarter and the full financial year 2025-26. The company reported consolidated sales of INR 5,979.29 million for Q4 FY26, a 57.5% increase compared to Q4 FY25's INR 3,796.20 million. For the full financial year FY26, consolidated sales reached INR 18,347.43 million, up from INR 14,742.87 million in FY25, representing a 24.4% year-on-year growth. A significant milestone for the group during the quarter was the commencement of commercial production at its wholly-owned subsidiary, ALCU Industries Private Limited. The reported sales figures for Q4 FY26 and FY26 are provisional and subject to review by the company's statutory auditor.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Bartronics India Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Tejas Networks Ltd. has announced that it has won the Golden Peacock Innovative Product/Service Award 2026 for its WavePlexus™ portfolio of Radio Access Network (RAN) products. This award is administered by the Institute of Directors and is considered a benchmark for corporate innovation and governance. The company also received certification for meeting the rigorous standards of the Golden Peacock Excellence Model, demonstrating a commitment to sustainability-driven excellence. The judging panel for the award was chaired by former Chief Justice of India, Hon’ble Justice Uday U. Lalit, along with other distinguished members. The WavePlexus™ portfolio consists of modular, energy-efficient 4G and 5G radio and baseband products, including advanced 32TR and 64TR Massive MIMO solutions, which comply with both 3GPP and O-RAN standards. These products are deployed in carrier-grade networks globally and are designed for world-class performance, lower power consumption, and reduced total cost of ownership.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: PAKKA LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 07, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Pakka Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 7, 2026, approved a preferential issue of up to 27,20,000 fully paid-up equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 110 per share, including a premium of Rs. 100, aggregating up to Rs. 29,92,00,000. Additionally, the board approved the preferential issue of up to 90,90,000 fully convertible warrants at an issue price of Rs. 110 per warrant, including a premium of Rs. 100, aggregating up to Rs. 99,99,00,000. These issues are subject to shareholder approval and other regulatory clearances. The shares and warrants are to be allotted to non-promoter, public individuals as per Annexure-A.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: The Indian Hotels Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "IHCL ACCELERATES PORTFOLIO EXPANSION; REACHES 628 HOTELS MARKS A YEAR OF INORGANIC & SUSTAINED ORGANIC GROWTH WITH 373 IN OPERATIONS AND A PIPELINE OF 255 HOTELS".
announcements.ai_summary: The Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL) announced on April 07, 2026, that it has reached a portfolio of 628 hotels, marking a year of significant inorganic and sustained organic growth. The company currently has 373 hotels in operation and a pipeline of 255 hotels. IHCL's Executive Vice President - Real Estate & Development, Ms. Suma Venkatesh, highlighted a record of 250 signings through inorganic and organic growth, expanding its brandscape and presence in the midscale segment. This includes the onboarding of Claridges Collection, acquisition of a controlling stake in Atmantan, and Brij hospitality. Ginger has expanded its portfolio to over 250 hotels across 150+ locations. IHCL also signed 19 hotels under the Taj brand, including one in Cairo and a 500-key hotel in Patna. The company opened over 30 hotels this fiscal year, entering new markets and strengthening its presence in existing ones, bringing the total operating hotels to 373 with over 33,000 rooms. IHCL is on track to achieve its goal of a 700-hotel portfolio under its "Accelerate 2030" strategy.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Zota Health Care Limited has informed the Exchange about Davaindia Stores Update for Q4FY26.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Zota Health Care Limited has provided an update on its Davaindia stores for the fourth quarter of the financial year 2025-26 (Q4FY26) as of March 31, 2026. During Q4FY26, the company opened 248 new Davaindia stores, contributing to a total of 997 stores opened during the entire FY26. The total number of COCO (Company-owned, Company-operated) stores managed by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Davaindia Health Mart Limited, increased to 1656 from 1438 at the end of Q3FY26. Similarly, the total number of FOFO (Franchisee-owned, Franchisee-operated) stores grew to 923 from 893. Consequently, the total operative Davaindia stores across all types reached 2579 as of March 31, 2026. This robust expansion in store count signifies active business development for the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Kundan Minerals and Metals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Kundan Minerals and Metals Limited has announced that its foreign subsidiary, Kundan Ventures FZCO, is in advanced discussions for potential investment opportunities in Mauritania. These opportunities involve the acquisition of companies within Mauritania. The matter is currently under evaluation and negotiation, and the company expects to make further disclosures to the stock exchanges upon finalization of the transaction, in accordance with applicable regulations.

announcements.subject: Sale or disposal
announcements.detail: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has informed the Exchange about Sale or disposal
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Arvind Skyline Private Limited (ASPL), has acquired 4,900 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each for Rs. 49,000, representing 49% of the paid-up share capital of Oxford Navrang Realtors Pvt. Ltd. (ONRPL). This acquisition was finalized on April 6th, 2026. Concurrently, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has sold 1,300 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, equivalent to 13% of ASPL's equity share capital, to Mr. Khetshi Barot and Mr. Kaushal Agarwal for a total consideration of Rs. 13,000. Following these transactions on April 6th, 2026, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited will retain an 87% equity share capital in ASPL. The company has also announced a significant high-rise project in Mumbai with a top-line potential of approximately Rs. 2,400 Cr.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary Arvind Skyline Private Limited (ASPL), has acquired a 49% stake in Oxford Navrang Realtors Pvt. Ltd. (ONRPL) for a total consideration of ₹49,000. This acquisition involved 4,900 equity shares of ₹10 each and was executed via a Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement dated April 6, 2026. Concurrently, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited sold 13% of its equity share capital in ASPL, comprising 1,300 equity shares of ₹10 each, to Mr. Khetshi Barot and Mr. Kaushal Agarwal for ₹13,000. Post these transactions, Arvind SmartSpaces Limited will retain an 87% equity share capital in ASPL. ONRPL, incorporated on July 4, 2025, operates in the real estate development and construction industry and had a Nil turnover as of March 31, 2026. The company also issued a media release on April 7, 2026, announcing the signing of its largest high-rise project in Mumbai with a top-line potential of approximately ₹2,400 crore.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Press Release of Birla Estates Private Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Birla Estates Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited, has achieved bookings exceeding ₹1,600 crores for its luxury project, Birla Arika Phase 2 in Gurugram. Nearly 97% of the residences, which amounts to 152 out of 156 units, were sold within a month of its launch on April 07, 2026. The project is a luxury residential development located in Central Gurugram. The strong performance is attributed to buyer confidence in the brand's luxury offerings and a shift towards spacious residences with expansive landscaped areas and lifestyle amenities. The project is envisioned as a low-density community featuring four exclusive clubs.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: EFC (I) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "EFC ACHIEVES OVER 90 PERCENT OCCUPANCY IN RECORD TIME AT SPRINT BUSINESS CENTER WAKADEWADI, PUNE, A FULLY OWNED ASSET OF THE COMPANY.".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: EFC (I) Limited has announced a significant operational milestone with its fully owned asset, Sprint Business Center in Wakadewadi, Pune, achieving over 90% occupancy in record time. This premium A-Grade commercial workspace, spread over 49,556 sq. ft., has been leased to large enterprise and multinational clients. This rapid stabilization of occupancy highlights strong market absorption for premium office infrastructure, EFC's brand credibility, and efficient leasing capabilities, strengthening recurring revenue visibility from owned assets.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Servotech Renewable Power System Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Servotech Renewable Secures 67% share across multiple tenders of DC Fast EV Chargers floated by PSUs/OMCs".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Servotech Renewable Power System Limited has announced securing approximately 67% of the awarded capacity across multiple tenders for DC Fast EV Chargers floated by Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) and Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs). The company secured orders for 423 units out of a total tendered quantity of approximately 631 units. These orders are for 60kW and 120KW DC Fast EV Chargers and will be implemented in FY2026-27. This achievement reinforces Servotech's strong position in the EV charging infrastructure segment and is expected to significantly strengthen its order pipeline.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: United Drilling Tools Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 07, 2026, titled "Award of order".
announcements.ai_summary: United Drilling Tools Limited has announced the award of a significant domestic order from ADiL Group for the supply of Integral Blade Stabilizers. This order is scheduled to be fulfilled over approximately 2 months. The company, with CIN L29199DL1985PLC015796, secured this contract against strong competition from Chinese manufacturers, highlighting its engineering capabilities, product quality, and competitive pricing. The press release, dated April 7, 2026, emphasizes that these Integral Blade Stabilizers are critical, high-precision components for oil and gas well drilling.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: DPSC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'website of India Power Corporation Limited (formerly DPSC Limited) i.e. www.indiapower.com is updated and functional as per Regulations 46 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015'.
announcements.ai_summary: This announcement from DPSC Limited (formerly India Power Corporation Limited) informs the stock exchanges that its website, www.indiapower.com, has been updated and is functional. This update is in compliance with Regulation 46 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company, identified by CIN L40105WB1919PLC003263, has its registered office in Kolkata and central office in Dishergarh. The update ensures that all necessary information is accessible to stakeholders as per regulatory requirements.

announcements.subject: Utilisation of Funds
announcements.detail: Paisalo Digital Limited has informed the Exchange about Utilisation of Funds
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Paisalo Digital Limited has provided a certificate confirming the utilization of funds from Commercial Paper (CP) issuances for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company issued a CP with ISIN INE420C14243 on February 27, 2026, maturing on May 29, 2026, with a maturity amount of INR 30.00 crores, listed on BSE. Paisalo Digital Limited certifies that the issuance proceeds were fully utilized for the stated purposes and that other listing conditions have been adhered to, as per SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Vardhman Acrylics Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Demat report for the month ended 31st March, 2026.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Vardhman Acrylics Limited has provided an update regarding the dematerialization of its shares for the month ended March 31, 2026. The company's fully paid-up equity shares are available for demat with both NSDL and CDSL under ISIN No. INE116Go1013. According to the enclosed details, there were no shares dematerialized with CDSL during the month ended March 31, 2026. Similarly, no shares were dematerialized with NSDL during the same period. This report was submitted to the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 07, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Hexaware Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Hexaware Ranked #1 in Value for Money in Whitelane Research2026 Netherlands IT Sourcing Study'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Hexaware Technologies Limited has been recognized as the #1 company in "Value for Money" in the Whitelane Research 2026 Netherlands IT Sourcing Study, achieving an 89% satisfaction score. The company also secured strong positions in other key performance indicators, ranking #5 in Account Management Quality (85%), #4 in Security (86%), and #7 in Service Delivery Quality (83%). This evaluation by Whitelane Research, in collaboration with Eraneos, is based on input from over 350 leading organizations in the Netherlands. Hexaware was among the top 15 IT service providers in General Satisfaction, placing 13th overall with an 80% satisfaction score, and was one of only five new entrants in the rankings. Furthermore, in Application Services, Hexaware broke into the top 10 by market share, ranking 13th with 80% provider service satisfaction and a strong renewal intention rate. The company also placed among the top three in the Use of AI category, with half of respondents acknowledging its positive track record in applying AI to improve services.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Vardhman Polytex Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Quarterly disclosure for payment of interest/repayment of principal amount of loan from banks/ financial institution and unlisted debt securities for the quarter ended 31 March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Vardhman Polytex Limited has provided a quarterly disclosure regarding its financial obligations as of March 31, 2026. The company reported total outstanding loans and revolving facilities from banks and financial institutions amounting to INR 54.38 Crore. Within this, an amount of INR 17.33 Crore is currently in default. There are no outstanding amounts or defaults related to unlisted debt securities, such as NCDs and NCRPS, which stand at INR 0.00 Crore. The total financial indebtedness of Vardhman Polytex Limited, encompassing both short-term and long-term liabilities, is INR 54.53 Crore as of the reporting date. This disclosure is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular dated July 11, 2023.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: S. P. Apparels Limited has informed the Exchange about Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.ai_summary: S. P. Apparels Limited has issued a corporate guarantee to The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited for an amount of Rs. 27,96,26,400 (Rupees Twenty-Seven Crores Ninety-Six Lakhs Twenty-Six Thousand Four Hundred Only). This guarantee, dated April 6, 2026, serves as security for a term loan facility availed by Jumeirah Lanka Pvt Limited, an associate company. Notably, Mr. P. Sundararajan, the Chairman & Managing Director of S. P. Apparels Limited, is also a director in Jumeirah Lanka Pvt Limited, and this transaction is considered to be at "arm's length." The guarantee is not expected to have any impact on S. P. Apparels Limited other than its disclosure as a contingent liability in the financial statements.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Popular Vehicles and Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Popular Vehicles and Services Limited has renewed and enhanced its inventory funding facility with Axis Bank Limited for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Popular Autoworks Private Limited. The company will continue to extend a Corporate Guarantee in favor of Axis Bank Limited for this facility, which is up to Rs. 20,00,00,000/- (Rupees Twenty Crores only). This renewal pertains to the Jaguar Land Over DF Scheme. The intimation was provided on April 06, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited has received an independent ESG score of 66 from NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Limited. This rating was assigned based on publicly available information, and the bank did not participate in the evaluation or provide specific data. The bank was informed of this ESG disclosure by BSE Limited on April 06, 2026. This intimation is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Amendment to AOA/MOA
announcements.detail: Amagi Media Labs Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Amendment to AOA/MOA of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Amagi Media Labs Limited has announced that its shareholders have approved the alteration of the company's Articles of Association (AOA) through a Special Resolution passed via postal ballot and remote e-voting on April 03, 2026. This alteration involves the insertion of Article 64B. The company had previously adopted restated AOA on July 24, 2025, comprising Part A and Part B. Part B will automatically terminate upon the commencement of listing and trading of the company's equity shares on recognized stock exchanges, with Part A continuing in full force. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: CREDITACCESS GRAMEEN LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Interim Business Update - March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: CreditAccess Grameen Limited has released an interim business update for March 2026, indicating strong momentum and positioning for growth acceleration in FY27. The Gross Lending Portfolio (GLP) grew by 14% year-on-year (YoY) to ₹29,590 Crores in FY26, meeting guidance. Disbursements for FY26 reached ₹24,860 Crores, up 24% YoY, with Q4 FY26 disbursements at ₹8,313 Crores, a 28% YoY increase. The company added 9.8 lakh new borrowers in FY26, and its asset quality has normalized, with an overall X-Bucket CE of 99.84% in March 2026. The branch network expanded by 183 branches in FY26.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Prabha Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation on closure of Issue period of Rights Issue'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Prabha Energy Limited has announced the closure of its Rights Issue. The issue, which offered partly paid-up equity shares of face value ₹1 each, opened on Friday, March 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. IST and closed on Monday, April 06, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. IST. The total issue size was aggregating up to ₹13920.85 Lakhs. This announcement follows previous communications regarding the rights issue process.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gallantt Ispat Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Gallantt Ispat Limited has provided an update on its production and revenue data for the fourth quarter (Q4) and the full fiscal year (FY) 2026. In Q4 FY26, power production increased by 14% YoY to 2,23,789 Mega Units, and pellet production saw a significant 59% YoY rise to 2,21,612 MT. For the full FY26, total steel production reached 0.88 million tonnes (mt), a 3% YoY increase, with sales also up 3% YoY to 0.85 mt. The company reported a capacity utilization of 91% in Q4 FY26 and 86% for the full FY26.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Devyani International Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates - Change of Registered Office
announcements.ai_summary: Devyani International Limited has officially shifted its registered office from the National Capital Territory of Delhi to the State of Haryana. This move was approved by the Regional Director (Northern Region) on March 20, 2026, and has been recorded by the Registrar of Companies, Haryana, as of April 6, 2026. Consequently, the company's Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has changed from L15135DL1991PLC046758 to L15135HR1991PLC143853. The new registered office is located at Plot No. 18, Sector – 35, Gurugram – 122004, Haryana. The company had previously informed the exchange about this proposed shifting on January 1, 2026, and received shareholder approval on February 9, 2026. This update is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Ganges Securities Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Certificate in terms of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018'.
announcements.ai_summary: Ganges Securities Limited has submitted a certificate in terms of Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. This certificate, received from MUFG Intime India Private Limited, the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, pertains to the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The certificate confirms that securities received from depository participants for dematerialisation during the specified quarter were processed, and the security certificates were either accepted or rejected. It also confirms that the dematerialised securities have been listed on the stock exchanges and that the cancelled physical certificates have been replaced with depository entries within the prescribed timelines.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Aye Finance Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 06, 2026, titled "Aye Finance Delivers Strong FY26 Performance".
announcements.ai_summary: Aye Finance Limited has reported a strong financial performance for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026 (FY26). The company's Assets Under Management (AUM) saw a significant year-on-year growth of 27%, reaching ₹7,044 crore in FY26, up from ₹5,534 crore in FY25. Disbursements also increased by 20% year-on-year to ₹5,169 crore, indicating robust demand from micro-enterprises. In the fourth quarter of FY26 (Q4 FY26), disbursements rose by 26% sequentially to ₹1,655 crore. The company has also demonstrated an improvement in asset quality, with the 1-90 days past due (DPD) ratio decreasing to 1.87% as of March 2026. Collection efficiency remained strong, reaching its highest level in March 2026 with a non-overdue collection efficiency of 99.5%.

announcements.company: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited
announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 06, 2026, titled "We wish to inform you that the Company has contracted to sell its 2007 built Medium Range Tanker, Jag Prakash of about 47,848 dwt on April 06, 2026, to an unaffiliated third party. The vessel will be delivered to the new buyer in Q1 FY27.".
announcements.ai_summary: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited has announced the sale of its 2007-built Medium Range Tanker, Jag Prakash, which has a deadweight tonnage (dwt) of approximately 47,848. The sale was contracted on April 06, 2026, to an unaffiliated third party. The vessel is scheduled for delivery to the new buyer in the first quarter of the financial year 2027 (Q1 FY27). Following this sale, the company's owned fleet will comprise 40 vessels, including 26 tankers and 14 dry bulk carriers, with an aggregate dwt of 3.20 million. Additionally, GE Shipping has contracted to acquire one secondhand Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier and one secondhand Medium Range Tanker, with these acquisitions also expected to be completed in Q1 FY27.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Avenir Investment RSC Ltd has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 18 (6) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Avenir Investment RSC Ltd has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 18 (6) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing indicates a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers related to Sammaan Capital Limited. Further details regarding the specific nature of the acquisition, the number of shares involved, and the percentage of voting capital acquired are expected to be provided in the submitted disclosure. Investors should review the full disclosure for comprehensive information on this transaction.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: WeWork India Management Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 06, 2026, titled "Driven by enterprise demand, WeWork India adds 700,000+ sq. ft. across Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Chennai".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: WeWork India Management Limited has announced a significant expansion, adding over 700,000 sq. ft. of Grade A office space across Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Chennai, driven by enterprise demand. This expansion includes five large-scale, long-term lease agreements, totaling approximately 12,000 desks across five new centers. The lease agreements are structured for durations ranging from 10 to 20 years, reflecting sustained demand and a shift towards partnership-led growth models in the flexible workspace sector. This move reinforces WeWork India's leadership in South India and its position as a preferred partner for both enterprise occupiers and institutional landlords.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Take Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 06, 2026, titled "TAKE Solutions Launches Rs. 50 Million Innovation Fund to Back AI, Deep Tech and Digital Health Startups".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Take Solutions Limited has announced the launch of an Innovation Fund with an initial corpus of Rs. 50 million (Rs. 5 crore) to support startups in Artificial Intelligence (AI), deep technology, and digital health. This initiative aims to invest in high-potential startups that leverage data, AI, and scientific innovation to transform healthcare delivery, diagnostics, and human health outcomes. The fund aligns with the company's strategy to build scalable AI-driven healthcare and digital capabilities and create long-term shareholder value. The fund will focus on early- and growth-stage companies and will provide strategic support beyond capital, including domain expertise and global networks.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vibhor Steel Tubes Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 06, 2026, titled "Vibhor Steel Tubes Secures CRISIL  BBB+/Stable/A2  Rating for Rs 100 crore Bank Facilities".
announcements.ai_summary: Vibhor Steel Tubes Limited has announced a press release regarding its bank facilities. CRISIL Ratings has assigned a 'BBB+/Stable' long-term rating and a 'Crisil A2' short-term rating to the company's bank loan facilities aggregating to Rs 100 crore. These ratings reflect the company's established market position in the steel tubes and pipes segment, consistent operational performance, and prudent financial management. The 'Stable' outlook indicates CRISIL's expectation of continued demand benefit from infrastructure, construction, and industrial sectors, alongside a balanced capital structure. The assigned ratings are expected to enhance the company's credibility with lenders and stakeholders, providing greater financial flexibility for expansion plans and working capital needs.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has provided a general update for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. As of March 31, 2026, the company's Assets Under Management (AUM) stood at approximately ₹ 60,325 crore. The company maintained ample liquidity, with approximately ₹ 7,550 crore available as of the same date. Poonawalla Fincorp emphasized its commitment to a risk-first approach, robust risk management systems, and a diversified asset base. The company is focused on business expansion to build a long-term sustainable and profitable model. This information is provisional and subject to audit by the statutory auditors.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Aye Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about Business update for the quarter & year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Aye Finance Limited has released its provisional business highlights for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a significant 27% year-on-year growth in its Assets Under Management (AUM), reaching ₹7,044 crore for FY26, up from ₹5,534 crore in FY25. Disbursements also saw a healthy 20% increase, totaling ₹5,169 crore in FY26 compared to ₹4,291 crore in FY25. Asset quality demonstrated continued improvement, with PAR X reducing by 115 basis points since October 2025 to 6.88% as of March 2026. The 1-90 days Past Due (DPD) amount decreased to ₹132 crore, representing 1.87% of the AUM, and Gross Non-Performing Assets (GNPA) in Q4FY26 reduced by 17 basis points to 4.77%. Collection efficiency for non-overdue accounts reached 99.5% in March 2026. These figures are provisional and subject to review by statutory auditors and approval from the Audit Committee and Board of Directors.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Motisons Jewellers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 ‐ Non‐exercise of option to convert warrants.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Motisons Jewellers Limited has announced that 82,70,000 warrants, initially allotted on October 05, 2024, have lapsed. These warrants were convertible into equity shares of face value Rs. 10/- each at a total issue price of Rs. 170/- per warrant. The lapse occurred because certain warrant holders, including North Star Opportunities Fund VCC-Bull Value Incorporated VCC Sub-Fund, Eminence Global Fund PCC- Eubilia Capital Partners Fund I, and Nexpact Limited, did not exercise their conversion rights within the stipulated 18-month period. Consequently, the amounts received against these lapsed warrants stand forfeited. The company has uploaded this notice on its website, www.motisonsjewellers.com. This development follows a stock split on November 08, 2024, which altered the conversion ratio of the warrants.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: NMDC Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates - Prices of Iron Ore w.e.f. 05th April 2026   Reg.
announcements.ai_summary: NMDC Limited has announced the revised prices for Iron Ore, effective from April 05, 2026. The price for Baila Lump (65.5%, 10-40 mm) has been fixed at ₹5,300/- Per Ton. Additionally, the price for Baila Fines (64%, -10 mm) is set at ₹4,500/- Per Ton. It is important to note that these prices are FOR (Freight on Road) prices and are exclusive of various charges including Royalty, DMF, NMEDT, Cess, Forest Permit Fee, transit fee, GST, environmental Cess, and other applicable taxes. This update has been provided in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Mangalam Worldwide Limited has informed the stock exchanges about a Settlement Order passed by SEBI on March 30, 2026, in the matter of Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited. This order involves certain common Independent Directors of Mangalam Worldwide Limited and has been settled by these individuals under the SEBI (Settlement Proceedings) Regulations, 2018, through payment of settlement amounts without admission or denial of findings. The proceedings initiated by SEBI via a Show Cause Notice dated February 10, 2025, are now disposed of. The company is disclosing this event as part of good corporate governance.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Intimation for sale of shares held by Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited in its wholly owned subsidiary, Clean Max Ahhope Private Limited to Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverages Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited, on 3 April 2026, approved the sale of its wholly owned subsidiary, Clean Max Ahhope Private Limited, to Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverages Private Limited. Clean Max Ahhope Private Limited was incorporated on 15 October 2025 and has not yet contributed to the company's turnover, revenue, income, or net worth. The Share Purchase Agreement is expected to be entered into on or before 15 May 2026, with the sale completion also anticipated by the same date, unless mutually agreed otherwise by the parties. The consideration received from this sale will be INR 35,000. This transaction is subject to SEBI Listing Regulations and a Master Circular dated 30 January 2026.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Piramal Pharma Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Piramal Critical Care B.V., has successfully completed the acquisition of Kenalog® and its associated brands from Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMS). This acquisition, previously intimated on January 28, 2026, strengthens Piramal Pharma's Complex Hospital Generics portfolio. The company will now enhance its presence in key markets including the United States, Europe, and Asia Pacific. This development is a significant step for Piramal Pharma in expanding its product offerings.

announcements.subject: Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.detail: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited has informed the Exchange about Memorandum of Understanding/Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited (now SPR Auto Technologies Limited) has been informed by its technical collaborator, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH (“KS”), about a strategic realignment. Certain central functions of KS have been carved out and transferred to a newly established entity, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH. Consequently, the existing Licence Agreement(s) between KS and the Company have been transferred by assignment/assumption of contract to Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH, with the Company's consent given on April 2, 2026. The scope of services, commercial terms, and operational points remain unchanged, and the new entity assumes all rights and obligations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Transwarranty Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Transwarranty Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about a gift of 12,00,000 equity shares by Mr. Kumar Nair, a Promoter of the Company. These shares have been gifted to various transferees, including Indiradevi (2,50,000 shares), Anitha Plakkot (2,50,000 shares), Jayachandran K (2,50,000 shares), and Sheila Satish Divakaran (2,50,000 shares), among others. Following this transfer, the recipients will be classified under the Promoter/Promoter Group category of the Company. The shareholding pattern for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, will be updated to reflect this revised shareholding.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulation 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Rossari Biotech Limited's material subsidiary, Unitop Chemicals Private Limited, has approved the sale of its office premises in Saki Naka, Mumbai, for a consideration of Rs. 10 crores. This transaction is anticipated to conclude by the end of the second quarter of the financial year 2027. The sale is not expected to impact the business operations of either the company or its subsidiary, as no business activities are conducted from the premises. Furthermore, the sale does not qualify as the sale of an undertaking under Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013. Detailed information will be provided upon the execution of the agreement.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
announcements.ai_summary: Fujiyama Power Systems Limited has disclosed that the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) conducted a search and seizure operation on March 24th, 2026, at one of the company's facilities in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. During this operation, BIS seized company products valued at Rupees Two Crores and Fifty-Two Lakhs (INR 2.52 Crores). The company has fully cooperated with the BIS officials and is continuing to provide necessary information. Fujiyama Power Systems Limited is seeking legal advice to release the seized products, as they believe there is no apparent basis for the seizure. The company emphasizes its commitment to integrity and compliance, and states that this incident has not impacted its ongoing operations.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Bharat Coking Coal Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Bharat Coking Coal Limited has reported that coal mining and dispatch activities at the ABOCP Mine, located in Block -II, have been illegally halted by unorganized individuals since approximately 3:00 PM on April 2nd, 2026, and these operations remain stopped. This stoppage is attributed to demands from local laborers for full-time wages and benefits, despite an existing agreement from August 18th, 2020, which acknowledged an oversupply of personnel and limited their workdays to 4-5 per month with HPC wages. The company has taken several actions in response, including mailing letters to the SSP Dhanbad and DIG (CISF), BCCL, lodging an FIR at Baghmara Police Station, and informing relevant authorities at BCCL headquarters.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Panache Digilife Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Panache Digilife Limited has withdrawn its proposed preferential issue of up to 6,07,348 warrants convertible into equity shares. The Board had approved this proposal on February 12, 2026, and shareholders had approved it at the EGM on March 13, 2026. The company had also received in-principle approval from NSE on March 18, 2026. However, the proposed investor has expressed unwillingness to participate due to prevailing market conditions. The company will not proceed with the allotment of these warrants and assures stakeholders that this withdrawal will not materially impact business operations or financial stability. The company may explore alternative capital raising avenues.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: J.Kumar Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Please find enclosed herewith the certificate pursuant to Regulation 74(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the fourth quarter ended as on March 31, 2026'.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: J. Kumar Infraprojects Limited has submitted a certificate pursuant to Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026. The certificate, issued by their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, M/s. Bigshare Services Private Limited, confirms that the company's entire shareholding is in demat form. No requests for rematerialisation or dematerialisation were received during the specified quarter. The company secretary, Poornima, has provided this update for record.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Filatex Fashions Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 03, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Filatex Fashions Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 03, 2026. The Board approved a proposal to raise funds by issuing Foreign Currency Convertible Bonds (FCCBs) for an aggregate amount not exceeding USD 100 million, subject to member and regulatory approvals. A committee will be constituted to oversee this issuance. Additionally, the Board approved an increase in the authorized share capital from ₹8,50,00,00,000 to ₹10,00,00,00,000, divided into 10,00,00,00,000 equity shares of ₹1 each, requiring shareholder approval. The Board also approved proposals for loans, guarantees, securities, and investments up to ₹2000 Crores under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Jindal Stainless Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has announced the acquisition of an additional equity stake in Oyster Green Hybrid One Private Limited (“Oyster Green”) on April 3, 2026, thereby completing its committed investment in the special purpose vehicle. Oyster Green was formed in collaboration with Oyster Renewable Energy Private Limited to develop a 282 MW hybrid renewable energy project for Jindal Stainless Limited's power requirements. Oyster Green is a subsidiary of Oyster Renewable Energy Private Limited, which is a related party due to a common promoter group. The transaction is being conducted on an arm's length basis. This update follows a letter dated June 2, 2025, informing the stock exchanges about the initial acquisition.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Premier Energies Limited has informed the Exchange about Completion of Acquisition of Transcon Ind Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Premier Energies Limited has completed the second and final tranche of its strategic acquisition of equity shares in Transcon Ind Limited. The transaction, which involved the acquisition of 52,073 equity shares allotted on a preferential basis through private placement for a consideration of INR 250,30,97,037, was finalized on April 3, 2026. Following this acquisition, Premier Energies Limited now holds a 51% stake in Transcon Ind Limited, making it a subsidiary. Consequently, Neotrafo Solutions India Private Limited, a subsidiary of Transcon Ind Limited, has become a step-down subsidiary of Premier Energies Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Univastu India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates-Incorporation of an Associate Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Univastu India Limited has informed the Exchange about the incorporation of an associate company, UV BHARAT PRIVATE LIMITED (CIN: U43299MH2026PTC470039), on April 1, 2026. This incorporation follows a Board meeting outcome dated January 13, 2026. UV BHARAT PRIVATE LIMITED is registered with the Registrar of Companies, Mumbai. The associate company operates in the Construction and Infrastructure industry and its incorporation is expected to expand and strengthen Univastu India Limited's existing operations. Univastu India Limited has acquired a 49% subscription to the share capital of UV BHARAT PRIVATE LIMITED through a cash consideration. No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for this incorporation.

announcements.subject: Incorporation
announcements.detail: AXISCADES Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about Incorporation
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: AXISCADES Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary, AXISCADES Technologies Aviation Equipment Engineering Services LLC, in Dubai, UAE, on April 2, 2026. The capital for this new entity is Dhirams 150,000/-. The incorporation is part of the company's strategy to explore new business opportunities in the aerospace sector within this geography. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about full early redemption of Senior, Rated, Listed, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has completed the full early redemption of its Senior, Rated, Listed, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). The redemption covers 4,990 NCDs, each with a face value of INR 10,00,000, aggregating to INR 499,00,00,000. This early redemption was approved by the Debenture Holders and the Debenture Trustee. The company confirms that timely payment of both interest and principal has been made as per Regulation 57 of the Listing Regulations. The NCDs were originally issued on a private placement basis. This action was completed on April 02, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Viyash Scientific Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of Equity Shares under Sequent Scientific Limited Employee Stock Option Plan 2020
announcements.ai_summary: The Nomination and Remuneration Committee of Viyash Scientific Limited has approved the issuance and allotment of 16,667 Equity Shares of Rs. 2/- each, fully paid, to eligible employees. These shares are being allotted at an exercise price of Rs. 86/- per equity share under the Sequent Scientific Limited Employee Stock Option Plan 2020. This allotment will increase the company's issued and paid-up equity share capital from Rs. 87,37,01,620/- (43,68,50,810 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each) to Rs. 87,37,34,954/- (43,68,67,477 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each). The newly allotted shares will rank pari passu with the existing equity shares of the company. This action was approved by the committee via resolution passed by circulation on April 02, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: SEDEMAC Mechatronics Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 02, 2026, titled "Sales update for FY 2025-26".
announcements.ai_summary: SEDEMAC Mechatronics Limited has issued a press release dated April 02, 2026, announcing its sales update for FY 2025-26. The company achieved the highest-ever annual/trailing twelve months (TTM) sales of Control-Intensive ECUs. In Q4 FY25-26, the company sold 1,043,025 ECUs, a 65.1% increase compared to 631,893 ECUs in Q4 FY24-25. For the full FY25-26, sales reached 3,901,075 ECUs, a 60.0% increase from 2,438,518 ECUs in FY24-25. This information will also be uploaded on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 w.r.t approval of Scheme of Amalgamation between ADF Foods (India) Limited and Telluric Foods Limited, subsidiaries of ADF Foods Limited through Fast Track route.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ADF Foods Limited has announced that the Regional Director (RD) – North Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Ahmedabad, has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation between its subsidiaries, ADF Foods (India) Limited (Transferor Company) and Telluric Foods Limited (Transferee Company), through the Fast Track route. This approval was granted via an Order dated April 1, 2026, received by the company on April 2, 2026. The merger will become effective from the appointed date specified in the scheme, upon filing the Order with the Registrar of Companies. Following this, the Transferor Company will stand dissolved.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Cupid Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 02, 2026, titled "Cupid Limited Deploys Rs. 82.88 crore as Strategic Investment into Baazar Style Retail Limited".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Cupid Limited has made a strategic investment of ₹82.88 crore into Baazar Style Retail Limited (Style Baazar) on April 2, 2026, representing 25% of its total planned investment of ₹331.53 crore. This investment has resulted in the allotment of 1,01,00,000 warrants in Style Baazar, convertible into equity shares. The investment aims to leverage Style Baazar's retail network of over 260 stores to enhance market access and shelf visibility for Cupid's FMCG products. Cupid anticipates generating incremental annual revenue of ₹500 crore within the next three years as the partnership scales. The company expects to see faster rollout of its expanded product portfolio and deeper penetration into high-potential regional markets.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Sushila Daga has submitted to  the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Sushila Daga has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This regulation typically pertains to disclosures made by persons acquiring shares or voting rights, or persons who have acquired control, in a target company. Investors should review the full disclosure document to understand the specifics of the acquisition, including the number of shares acquired, the price per share, and the percentage of total voting capital involved. This filing is a mandatory step in the takeover regulations process.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Nahar Poly Films Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'DEMAT REPORT FOR THE MONTH OF MARCH, 2026'.
announcements.ai_summary: Nahar Poly Films Limited has submitted its DEMAT report for the month of March 2026 to the stock exchanges. As per the report, 2095 equity shares were dematerialized during March 2026. Following this, the total holding of National Securities Depository Ltd. (NSDL) and Central Depository Services Ltd. (CDSL) as of March 31, 2026, stands at 24,086,713 equity shares. This update is in compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. The company has provided the necessary certificate detailing the particulars of shares dematerialized.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LG Electronics India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 02, 2026, titled "LG Electronics India Hits 1 Million AC Sales in Q1 CY 26 ReinforcesCompany s Market Leadership Leadership".
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: LG Electronics India Limited announced a significant achievement with over 1 million air conditioner sales in the first quarter of 2026, marking their fastest and strongest start to a summer season in India. This milestone highlights the company's market leadership, driven by early launches of new energy-efficient AC models and a successful marketing campaign during the ICC World Cup. The company is further reinforcing its commitment to the Indian market by expanding its AC manufacturing facility in Sri City to meet increasing demand. This strategic move underscores LG Electronics India's dedication to innovation, distribution, and localization within India.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Provisional Business Figures
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Limited has released its provisional business figures for the period ending March 31, 2026. The bank reported a Total Business of Rs. 290,340.57 Crores, representing a year-on-year growth of 13.61%. Total Deposits stood at Rs. 165,354.04 Crores, an increase of 11.30% YoY, with CASA Deposits reaching Rs. 75,478.40 Crores, up 8.07% YoY. Gross Advances grew by 16.83% to Rs. 124,986.53 Crores. However, Gross Investments saw a slight decrease of 1.55% to Rs. 41,319.50 Crores. These figures are provisional and subject to audit. The bank has provided these updates in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Intimation of Investment in Rivpe Technology Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited has invested Rs. 49,99,99,939.92 in Rivpe Technology Private Limited (RTPL). This investment resulted in RTPL allotting 3,42,147 Equity shares of Face Value of Rs. 10 each to Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Limited by way of a rights issue. The company has confirmed that this investment will not alter the shareholding structure, and RTPL will continue to be a wholly owned subsidiary. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Max Estates Limited has informed the Exchange about the allotment of 4,869 Equity Shares pursuant to the exercise of stock options.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Max Estates Limited has approved the allotment of 4,869 equity shares on April 2, 2026, pursuant to the exercise of stock options under the Max Estates Employee Stock Option Plan 2023. These shares have a face value of INR 10/- each. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from INR 1,63,44,54,830/- to INR 1,63,45,03,520/-, comprising 16,34,50,352 equity shares of INR 10/- each. The event occurred on April 2, 2026, at 13:23 hrs (IST). This allotment is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Granting/withdrawal/surrender/cancellation/suspension of key licenses/ regulatory approvals
announcements.detail: Monarch Networth Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about Receipt of Mutual License from SEBI
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Monarch Networth Capital Limited has received final registration from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) to commence its Mutual Fund business. The company will act as a Sponsor for "Monarch Mutual Fund," and its wholly-owned subsidiary, Monarch Asset Management Private Limited, has received approval to act as the Asset Management Company (AMC). This development marks Monarch's evolution into a fully integrated financial services platform, enabling it to expand its investment offerings. The company has a diversified platform including retail broking with over 3 lakh clients, institutional broking, Alternate Investment Funds (AIF) with approximately ₹1,000 crore AUM, and Portfolio Management Services (PMS). Monarch Networth Capital Limited's Profit After Tax (PAT) grew from ₹2 crore in FY2019 to ₹135 crore in 9MFY25.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: The Ramco Cements Limited has informed the Exchange regarding - Compliance of Regulation 6(1) and 7(1) of SEBI LODR
announcements.ai_summary: The Ramco Cements Limited has confirmed its compliance with Regulation 6(1) and 7(1) of the SEBI LODR Regulations. The company acts as an in-house registry for handling its equity shares and commercial papers. For its debentures, the company utilizes Cameo Corporate Services Limited, located at Subramanian Building, No.1, Club House Road, Chennai 600 002, as its registrar. This information has been submitted for the record.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Business Update for Q4 FY26'.
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Limited provided a business update for the fourth quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 (Q4 FY26). The company estimates overall disbursement at approximately Rs. 17,180 crore for Q4 FY26, representing a ~11% year-on-year growth. For the full FY26, disbursement is estimated at approximately Rs. 61,100 crore, a ~6% YoY growth (excluding finance lease). Business Assets grew by ~12% to approximately Rs. 1,33,800 crore as of March 31, 2026. Collection Efficiency (CE) is estimated at 98% for Q4 FY26 and 96% for FY26. Stage-3 assets are estimated between 3.4% to 3.5%, and Stage-2 assets between 4.8% to 4.9% as of March 31, 2026. The company maintains a comfortable liquidity position with over Rs. 9,000 crore.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Dharani Sugars & Chemicals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ''. Reg 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Dharani Sugars and Chemicals Limited has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosure, signed by a promoter, pertains to the target company, Dharani Sugars and Chemicals Limited, listed on the Bombay and National Stock Exchanges. The filing indicates a promoter holding of 20,430,006 shares, representing a certain percentage of voting rights, though the exact percentage is not fully detailed in the provided text. This filing is a routine update regarding promoter holdings and compliance with takeover regulations.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Ceigall India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 02, 2026, titled "Ceigall Executes 15 PPAs With MPPMCL for 130 MW Solar Capacity".
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited has issued a press release on April 02, 2026, titled "Ceigall Executes 15 PPAs With MPPMCL for 130 MW Solar Capacity". The press release details the execution of 15 Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Ceigall Green Energy MP Limited, with Madhya Pradesh Power Management Company Limited (MPPMCL) on April 1, 2026. These PPAs are for a capacity of 130 MW under the Surya Mitra Krishi Feeder Yojna. The agreements stipulate a 25-year term for implementing, operating, maintaining, and supplying power at a tariff of Rs. 2.85 per unit. The EPC cost for these projects is approximately ₹572.00 Crore, including GST, with a 12-month work execution period.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: Ceigall India Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall India Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Ceigall Green Energy MP Limited, has executed 15 Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with Madhya Pradesh Power Management Company Limited (MPPMCL) on April 1, 2026. These PPAs are for a total awarded capacity of 130 MW under the Surya Mitra Krishi Feeder Yojna. The agreements are for solar photovoltaic power generating stations, with terms including implementation, operation, maintenance, and power supply for 25 years at a quoted tariff of Rs. 2.85 per unit. The work execution period is 12 months, and the operational period is 25 years. The broad consideration or size of the contracts is approximately ₹572.00 Crore, including GST. This information was disclosed on April 02, 2026.

announcements.subject: Acquisition
announcements.detail: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has informed the Exchange about update  with respect to investment in Inventurus Knowledge Solutions, Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary.
announcements.ai_summary: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Limited has completed its second tranche of investment in its wholly owned subsidiary, Inventurus Knowledge Solutions, Inc. The company acquired an additional 32,635 shares for USD 20,990,505. This acquisition marks the completion of the investment event that was initially approved by the Board on March 13, 2026. The company has submitted this update as per Regulation 30(7) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Omnitech Engineering Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Omnitech Engineering Limited has officially updated its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) following its listing on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited. The company's CIN has changed from "U26100GJ2021PLC124801" to "L26100GJ2021PLC124801". Alongside this change, the status of the company has been updated from "Unlisted" to "Listed". A copy of the Company's Master Data from the MCA (V3 Portal) has been enclosed for reference, confirming these updates.

announcements.company: Gaudium IVF and Women Health Limited
announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Gaudium IVF and Women Health Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 01, 2026, titled  Gaudium IVF Introduces AI-Led Infertility Treatment, Marking an Industry First in India .
announcements.ai_summary: Gaudium IVF and Women Health Limited has issued a press release dated April 01, 2026, announcing a significant industry first in India: the introduction of AI-led infertility treatment. This innovative approach integrates advanced AI-driven embryology systems, such as SiD (Sperm Identification Device) and ERICA (Embryo Ranking Intelligent Classification Assistant), into their clinical practice. The initiative was inaugurated by Hon’ble Union Minister Shri Nitin Jairam Gadkari and is a collaboration with UK-headquartered embryology innovation organization, IVF 2.0. This development marks Gaudium IVF's commitment to leveraging technology in fertility healthcare, following its recent status as India's first publicly listed IVF chain. The press release is available on the company's website, www.gaudiumivfcentre.com.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Agreements
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited has entered into an agreement with M/s Fortuna Public Relations Private Limited, New Delhi (FPRPL), effective April 1, 2026. FPRPL will serve as the Company's Public Relations Consultants, focusing on media relations, mass communications advice, and corporate image building. This agreement is valid for a period of two years, concluding on March 31, 2028. The company has confirmed that there is no shareholding in FPRPL, and the parties are not related. The agreement does not involve any special rights for FPRPL, such as appointing directors or pre-emptive rights on share subscriptions.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Popular Vehicles and Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated April 01, 2026, titled "100% subsidiary, Popular Autoworks Pvt Ltd commence operations of state-of-the-art JLR 3S Facility in Nagpur, Maharashtra".
announcements.ai_summary: Popular Vehicles and Services Limited announced on April 01, 2026, that its wholly owned subsidiary, Popular Autoworks Private Limited, has commenced operations of a new state-of-the-art Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) 3S facility in Nagpur, Maharashtra. The facility, located at MIDC, Hingna Road, Nagpur, includes a showroom, workshop with 8 service bays capable of servicing approximately 50 vehicles per month, and a pre-owned car section. The total investment in this facility is approximately ₹15 crore. This expansion strengthens PVSL's presence in Maharashtra and its partnership with JLR, aiming to provide a premium ownership experience to customers in the Vidarbha region.

announcements.subject: Monthly Business Updates
announcements.detail: TVS Motor Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Monthly Business Updates for the month of March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: TVS Motor Company Limited reported its sales update for March 2026 on April 01, 2026. The company recorded total sales of 519,358 units in March 2026, a 25% increase compared to 414,687 units in March 2025. Two-wheeler sales grew by 25% to 498,134 units, with domestic two-wheeler sales increasing by 25% to 372,383 units. Motorcycle sales rose by 18% to 232,788 units, and scooter sales increased by 31% to 217,624 units. Electric vehicle sales saw a significant growth of 44%, reaching 38,877 units. International business sales grew by 25% to 141,443 units. For the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, total sales increased by 28% to 15.60 Lakh units.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The South Indian Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Business Updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: The South Indian Bank Limited has provided business updates for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. As of March 31, 2026, the bank's Gross Advances stood at Rs. 1,01,295 Crore, showing a Year-on-Year growth of 15.66%. Total Deposits reached Rs. 1,23,346 Crore, an increase of 14.71% year-on-year. CASA (Current Account Savings Account) deposits were Rs. 39,621 Crore, up by 17.47% year-on-year, resulting in a CASA Ratio of 32.12%, an improvement of 75 basis points. These figures are provisional and subject to audit by the bank's statutory auditors. The information was disclosed on April 01, 2026.

announcements.subject: Commencement of commercial production/operations
announcements.detail: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited has informed the Exchange about Commencement of commercial production of its enhanced capacity  at its Unit at Banda, Distt. Sagar, Madhya Pradesh
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Ltd. has announced the commencement of commercial production for its enhanced capacity at its Banda unit in the Sagar district of Madhya Pradesh. Effective March 31, 2026, the Diammonium Phosphate & Nitrogen and phosphorus (DAP/NPK) plant's capacity has been increased from 2,40,000 MTPA to 3,30,000 MTPA, representing a capacity addition of 90,000 MTPA. This expansion required an investment of approximately Rs. 107 Crore, financed through a mix of debt and internal accruals. The rationale behind this expansion is to meet the growing demand and supply gap for DAP/NPK fertilizers in India. The company's existing capacity utilization was 100% up to January 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: SONAM LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on April 01, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sonam Limited held a Board Meeting on April 01, 2026, at its registered office in Morbi, Gujarat. The meeting, which commenced at 05:00 p.m. and concluded at 05:30 p.m., resulted in the approval of appointing HI-CARE CAPITAL ADVISORS LLP as its Investor Relations (IR) Agency. This appointment is effective from April 01, 2026. The company has also designated a specific email address, cs@sonamquartz.com, for all investor-related queries. The IR agency's contact details are: Address: 409, Anant Building, Kalawad Road, Rajkot, Gujarat - 360005, and Email: info@hicareadvisors.com. The information will be available on the company's website at https://www.sonamquartz.com.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: ABB India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
